Genesis34:14 Baakoba bati: “Titusobola kukola ekyo: okugha mwanhinaife omusaadha atali mukekete, kuba ekyo kiba nga kitunhoomoola inho." 
Numbers13:31 Aye abantu be yaja nabo baakoba bati: “Titusobola naire kuja kulumba bantu bale, kuba ba maani inho okutusinga.”" 
Joshua22:29 Ife titusobola naire okudheemera Musengwa Katonda, oba buti okukyuka ni tulekera okujiira ku by'akoba, ni tuzimba alutaari okwokerangaku ebigheebwayo, oba okugheerangaku emere ey'empeke, oba emisengo. Titusobola kuzimba alutaari yindi ate nga eya Musengwa Katonda waife eri agho gha mberi gha Weema ey'Okwagaananirangamu ni Musengwa Katonda.”" 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ebintu ebirigho buti biswikiriire amagezi gaife. Titusobola kubitegeera ni tubimalayo. Naani asobola okubinoonerezaaku n'abitegeera? 
Jeremiah2:25 Mulobe kuseenenia ngaito dhaimwe, waire okwereetera ekigheeghe, nga mulumuka okunonereza emisambwa. Aye imwe mukoba muti, ‘Titusobola kulekera agho, kuba tugonza inho emisambwa egy'abamaghanga agandi, era egyo gye twidhanga okunonereza.’ ”" 
Matthew1:1 Oluzi lwa Yesu Kurisito mwidhukulu wa Daudi, mwidhukulu wa Aburahamu luti bwe lwali:" 
Matthew1:2 Aburahamu yazaala Isaaka, Isaaka yaazaala Yakobo, Yakobo yaazaala Yuda ni baganda be." 
Matthew1:3 Yuda yazaala Perezi ni Zera mu Tamari Perezi yaazaala Hezironi, Hezironi yaazaala Ramu." 
Matthew1:4 Ramu yazaala Amminadabu, Amminadabu yaazaala Nahashoni, Nahashoni yaazaala Salumoni." 
Matthew1:5 Salumoni yazaala Boazi mu Rahabu, Boazi yaazaala Obedi mu Ruthi, Obedi yaazaala Yesse." 
Matthew1:6 Yesse yazaala Daudi kyabazinga ate Daudi yaazaala Solomoni mu oyo eyali muka Uria. 
Matthew1:7 Solomoni yazaala Rehoboamu, Rehoboamu yaazaala Abiya, Abiya yaazaala Asa." 
Matthew1:8 Asa yaazaala Yehoshafati, Yehoshafati yaazaala Yoramu, Yoramu yaazaala Uzzia." 
Matthew1:9 Uzzia yazaala Yothamu, Yothamu yaazaala Ahazi, Ahazi yaazaala Hezekia." 
Matthew1:10 Hezekia yazaala Manasse, Manasse yaazaala Amoni, Amoni yaazaala Yosia." 
Matthew1:11 Yosia yazaala Yekonia ni baganda be, mu byanda eby'okuwangangusibwa okw'e Babiloni." 
Matthew1:12 Nga batwaliibwa e Babiloni, Yekonia yazaala Shealutieli, Shealutieli yaazaala Zerubbabeli." 
Matthew1:13 Zerubbabeli yazaala Abiudi, Abiudi yaazaala Eliakimu, Eliakimu yaazaala Azori." 
Matthew1:14 Azori yazaala Zadoki, Zadoki yaazaala Akimu, Akimu yaazaala Eliudi." 
Matthew1:15 Eliudi yazaala Eleazari, Eleazari yaazaala Matthani, Matthani yaazaala Yakobo." 
Matthew1:16 Yakobo yazaala Yosefu iba Maria, eyazaala Yesu ayetebwa Kurisito." 
Matthew1:17 Kale ense dhityo bwe dhaali: Okuva ku Aburahamu okutuuka ku Daudi, ense ikumi na ina okuva ku Daudi okutuuka ku kuwangangusibwa okw'e Babiloni ense ikumi na ina okuva ku kuwangangusibwa okw'e Babiloni okutuuka ku Kurisito, ense ikumi na ina." 
Matthew1:18 Okuzaalibwa kwa Yesu Kurisito kuti bwe kwali. Maria, inhina, ng'amaze okwandhula Yosefu, aye ng'akaali kumubayira, kyaboneka ng'ali nda ku bwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Matthew1:19 Yosefu iba, olw'okuba yali muntu mutuufu, era nga tiyayenda kumuswaza, mule yaasalagho okumulekagho mu ngiso." 
Matthew1:20 Aye aba akaalowooza ekyo, malaika wa Musengwa yaamubonekera mu kirooto yaamukoba ati: “Yosefu omwana wa Daudi, otatya kutwala Maria abe mukazi wo, kuba ky'alinda kya Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Matthew1:21 Aidha kuzaala omwana wa bulenzi, era oidha kumutuuma eriina lya Yesu, kuba n'oyo alirokola abantu mu bibi byaibwe.”" 
Matthew1:22 Bino byonabyona byaligho okutuukiriza Musengwa kye yayogerera mu mulanzi ati: 
Matthew1:23 “Bona, omughala omwegha aja kutoola enda azaale omwana wa bulenzi, era eriina balimweta Emmanueli”, ekitegeeza kiti: “Katonda ali n'ife.”" 
Matthew1:24 Yosefu bwe yasisimuka mu ndoolo yaakola nga malaika wa Musengwa bweyamulagira, yaatwala Maria mukazi we," 
Matthew1:25 aye nga ghazira bya bufumbo okutuusa bwe yazaala omwana ow'obulenzi era yaamutuuma eriina Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Agho Yesu bwe yazaalibwa e Bethelehemu mu Buyudaaya, mu byanda bya kyabazinga Herode, ghaabaagho abakugu mu by'emuunienie abaava e buvandhuba baatuuka mu Yerusalemu." 
Matthew2:2 Baakoba bati: “Ali gha oyo azaaliibwa okuba kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya? Kuba tuboine emuunienie y'e buvandhuba era n'okwidha tumusinze.” 
Matthew2:3 Olwawulira bino, kyabazinga Herode ni Yerusalemu yoonayoona baatabulwa." 
Matthew2:4 Agho Herode yaasoloza Bakabona Abakulu boonaboona n'Abanamateeka ab'eighanga yaababuuza gha Kurisito ye yali ow'okuzaalibwa. 
Matthew2:5 Baamukoba bati: “Mu Bethelehemu eky'e Buyudaaya kuba kyaghandiikibwa omulanzi kiti: 
Matthew2:6 ‘Iwe Bethelehemu mu nsi ya Yuda, toli mutene mu bwami obw'omu Yuda, kuba mu iwe n'omwidha okusimuka omufuzi, anaalabirira abantu bange Abaisiraeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Agho ni Herode yaayeta abasaadha mu kyama yaababuuza ku biseera emuunienie bye yabonekeramu. 
Matthew2:8 Yaabatuma e Bethelehemu ng'akoba ati: “Muje mwagale bukalamu omwana oyo, era bwe mumuzuula muntemyaku zeena nsobole okwidha okumusinza.”" 
Matthew2:9 Olwamala okuwulira ebya kyabazinga baasimbula, aye okuja okubona nga muunienie ye baabona e buvandhuba ebakulembeiremu okutuusa bwe yatuuka n'eyemerera ghaigulu gh'ekigo aghaali omwana." 
Matthew2:10 Bwe baabona emuunienie baasangaala ekibitiriire. 
Matthew2:11 Agho baingira mu ndhu, baabona omwana ghalala n'inhina Maria, beeyala ku itaka baamusinza era baasibulula ebitereke byaibwe baamugha ebirabo: Zaabu, obubbaani ni mirra." 
Matthew2:12 Era nga bwe baalabulwa mu kirooto obutaira wa Herode, baagema engira eyindi okuja mu nsi ey'ewaibwe." 
Matthew2:13 Agho ng'abo baakavaagho, malaika wa Musengwa yaabonekera Yosefu mu kirooto yaamukoba ati: “Situka otoole omwana n'inhina mulumukire e Misiri, era musigale eyo okutuusa lwe ndiba ni kye nkukoba, kuba Herode aja kunoonia omwana okumwita.”" 
Matthew2:14 Agho Yosefu yaasituka yaagema ku mwana n'inhina obwire obwo baaja e Misiri 
Matthew2:15 era baasigala eyo okutuusa Herode bwe yafa. Kyali kityo okutuukiriza Musengwa kye yayogerera mu mulanzi ati: “Nayeta omwana wange ave mu Misiri.” 
Matthew2:16 Agho Herode bwe yategeera nga bamutebwike, yaasungughala ekibitiriire era yaalagira okwita abaana abalenzi boonaboona ab'emyaka ebiri n'okwika ghansi abaali mu Bethelehemu n'ebiketezo ebikiriinaine, okusinziira ku biseera bye yali amaze okukakasa obukalamu n'abasaadha bale." 
Matthew2:17 Kityo ni kyatuukirira omulanzi Yeremia kye yakoba ati: 
Matthew2:18 “Mu Rama yaawulikikayo amamiro ag'okugegenga n'okukuba empungu edh'amaani. Rakeli ng'agegenga olw'abaana be, era nga tayenda na kusaasirwa, kuba baali nga tibakaaligho.”" 
Matthew2:19 Agho Herode bwe yamala okufa, malaika wa Musengwa yaabonekera Yosefu mu kirooto, e Misiri." 
Matthew2:20 Yaamukoba ati: “Situka ogeme ku mwana n'inhina muje mu nsi ya Isiraeli, kuba abaali banoonia okwita omwana bamaze okufa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Agho Yosefu yaasituka yaagema ku mwana n'inhina yaaja mu nsi ya Isiraeli. 
Matthew2:22 Aye bwe yawulira ati Arikelao n'eyali afuga Buyudaaya ng'omusika wa Herode, yaatya okuja eyo. Era bwe yalabulwa mu kirooto yaaja mu biketezo eby'e Galilaaya." 
Matthew2:23 Era bwe yatuuka yaatyama mu kibuga ekyetebwa Nazarethi kyatuukirira kityo ekyayogerwa abalanzi kiti: “Alyetebwa Munazarethi.” 
Matthew3:1 Mu nnaku edho, Yoanne Omubatiza yaatuuka era yaayegeresa mu irungu ery'e Buyudaaya," 
Matthew3:2 yaakoba ati: “Mwenenie kuba Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu buseese.” 
Matthew3:3 Ono, omulanzi Isaia ye yayogeraku bwe yakoba ati: “Ghaligho amamiro g'oyo alangirira mu irungu ati: ‘Mutegeke Musengwa gh'anaabita, era mutereeze obugira bwe.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Yoanne ono, yali n'ekivaalo kye nga kya buviiri bwa ngamiya n'olukoba olw'oluwu mu nkende era emere ye yali nga nzige na mudheenene gwa mu nsiko." 
Matthew3:5 Abantu okuva e Yerusalemu ni mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, ni mu biketezo ebiriinaine omwiga Yorudani boonaboona baaja y'ali" 
Matthew3:6 era yaababatiza mu mwiga Yorudani nga bwe baatula ebibi byaibwe. 
Matthew3:7 Bwe yabona Abafarisaayo kamaala n'Abasaddukaayo nga baidha y'ali okubatizibwa, yaabakoba ati: “Imwe eizaire ery'emisota naani eyabalabula okulumuka ekibonerezo ekiri kwidha?" 
Matthew3:8 Kale ni mwanie ebibala ebyoleka okwenenia. 
Matthew3:9 Era muteeyinula nga mukoba muti, ‘Tuli ni iseife Aburahamu,’ kuba, ka mbakobere, mu mabaale gano Katonda aghanga okufuniramu Aburahamu abaana!" 
Matthew3:10 Kwo n'okuba empasa eteereibwa ku kikolo eky'emiti kale buli muti ogutaania bibala bikalamu gwa kutemebwa gusuulibwe mu muliro. 
Matthew3:11 “Bwenebwene nze mbabatiza na maadhi okulaga okwenenia kwaimwe, aye anvaaku einhuma n'asinga nze obukumu, oyo ye ntagwanira na kuba mu kifo kye alibatiza mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu ni mu muliro." 
Matthew3:12 Agemye olugali mu ngalo, aidha kulongoosa bukalamu ekifo kye aghakubirwa engaano, engaano agikungaanize mu kyagi, omusinsi agwokye mu muliro ogutazikira.”" 
Matthew3:13 Agho Yesu yaava e Galilaaya yaatuuka ku Yorudani ye Yoanne, Yoanne amubatize." 
Matthew3:14 Yoanne yaagezaaku okumulobera ng'akoba ati: “Ninze ngwaine iwe ombatize kabiri niiwe oidha ye ndi?” 
Matthew3:15 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mperaano leka kibe kityo kuba tutyo ife bwe tugwaine okutuukiriza obutuufu bwonabwona.” Agho yaamuganha. 
Matthew3:16 Yesu bwe yamala okubatizibwa, mangu ago yaava mu maadhi, era okuja okubona ng'eigulu limubwikulirwa, yaabona Mwoyo wa Katonda ng'aika ng'enjiibwa, ng'amwikaku." 
Matthew3:17 N'eiroboozi lyava mu igulu lyakoba liti: “Ono ni mutabane wange omugonzi, mwe neesiimira einho.”" 
Matthew4:1 Agho Mwoyo yaatwala Yesu mu irungu, Sitaani amukeme." 
Matthew4:2 Bwe yamala okusiiba enaku amakumi ana (40), omusana n'obwire, endhala yaamuluma." 
Matthew4:3 Omukemi yaaseeta, yaamukoba ati: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda koba amabaale gano gafuuke emigaati.”" 
Matthew4:4 Aye Yesu yaakoba ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kiti: ‘Omuntu taba mulamu lwa mugaati gwonka, aye na buli kibono ekiva mu munwa gwa Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Agho Sitaani yaatwala Yesu mu kibuga ekitukuvu, yaamuniinia ku kasulya ak'eisinzizo," 
Matthew4:6 yaamukoba ati: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda, weesuule ghansi kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: ‘Aliragira bamalaika be baakugemerera mu mikono gyaibwe, olobe kwekontola kigere ku ibaale.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Era kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Tokemanga Musengwa Katonda wo.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Kabiri Sitaani yaamutwala ku lusozi oluleeyi einho, yaamulaga obwakyabazinga obw'ensi n'ekitiisa kyabwo." 
Matthew4:9 Era yaamukoba ati: “Ebyo byonabyona ndidha kubikugha bwe weeyala ghansi n'onsinza.” 
Matthew4:10 Agho Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Sitaani ja ere! Kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Osinzanga Musengwa Katonda wo, era ni yenka y'ogheerezanga.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Agho Sitaani yaamuleka, era bamalaika baidha baamugheereza." 
Matthew4:12 Agho Yesu bwe yawulira ati Yoanne bamugemye, yaaja e Galilaaya." 
Matthew4:13 Yaava e Nazarethi, yaaja yaaba e Kaperinaumu eky'oku nhandha, mu biketezo eby'e Zebuluni ni Nafutali" 
Matthew4:14 okutuukiriza omulanzi Isaia kye yakoba, ati:" 
Matthew4:15 “Ekiketezo kya Zebuluni n'ekya Nafutali, ku ngira ey'oku nhandha ng'osomoike Yorudani. Galilaaya ey'abamaghanga agandi!" 
Matthew4:16 Abantu abaabanga mu kizikiiza baboine obutangaavu obunene. N'abo ababaire mu nsi ey'olumbe n'ekinsense kyayo, ekimulika kibaakiire.”" 
Matthew4:17 Okuva olwo Yesu yainhama okwegeresa n'okukoba ati: “Mwenenie kuba Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu buseese.” 
Matthew4:18 Yesu yali ng'atambula ku mbali okw'enhandha ey'e Galilaaya, yaabona aboluganda babiri: Simoni ayetebwa Petero ni Anderea muganda we, nga bali kutega akatimba mu nhandha kuba baali bavubi." 
Matthew4:19 Yaakoba ati: “Munnonereze, ndidha kubafuula abavubi ab'abantu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Era mangu ago baaleka obutimba baamunonereza. 
Matthew4:21 Bwe yava agho, yeeyongerayo, yaabona aboluganda abandi babiri: Yakobo ni Yoanne, abaana ba Zebedaayo, nga bali mu lyato n'iseibwe Zebedaayo nga batereeza obutimba bwaibwe yaabeeta." 
Matthew4:22 Era mangu ago baaleka eryato ni iseibwe, baamunonereza." 
Matthew4:23 Agho Yesu yeezungulula Galilaaya yoonayoona, ng'ayegeresa mu sinagoga dhaibwe, era ng'abakobera Amawulire Amalungi ag'Obwakyabazinga yaawonia buli bulwaire na buli bugodhe mu bantu." 
Matthew4:24 Yaawulikika mu Siria mwonamwona baamuleetera boonaboona abaali obubi: abaalwala endwaire edha buli nsambo, n'abaali na buli kibaluma, abaaliku emizimu, n'abasimbu, n'abalema, era yaabawonia." 
Matthew4:25 Ebiyindi by'abantu byava mu Galilaaya, ni mu Dekapoli, ni mu Yerusalemu, ni mu Buyudaaya, n'okusomoka Yorudani, byamunonereza." 
Matthew5:1 Agho Yesu bwe yabona abantu kamaala batyo, yaaniina ku lusozi, era bwe yamala okutyama, Abeegeresebwa be baaseeta gh'ali." 
Matthew5:2 Yaabeegeresa ng'akoba ati: 
Matthew5:3 “Ba nkabi abaavu mu mwoyo, kuba Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bwaibwe." 
Matthew5:4 Ba nkabi abagegenga, kuba balyesiima." 
Matthew5:5 Ba nkabi abawombeefu, kuba baligheebwa ensi Katonda ye yasuubiza." 
Matthew5:6 Ba nkabi abalumwa endhala n'endiwo ey'okukola ebituufu, kuba baliigusibwa." 
Matthew5:7 Ba nkabi ab'ekisa, kuba balisaasirwa." 
Matthew5:8 Ba nkabi ab'omwoyo omulungi, kuba balibona Katonda." 
Matthew5:9 Ba nkabi abakolerera emiraala, kuba balyetebwa baana ba Katonda." 
Matthew5:10 Ba nkabi abakirigibwa olw'obutuufu, kuba Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bwaibwe." 
Matthew5:11 “Muli ba nkabi bwe banaabavumanga, ni babakiriga, era ni baboogeraku buli kibi kyonakyona olw'okuba nze, nga basubagha." 
Matthew5:12 Musangaale era musagambe, kuba empeera yaimwe eri mu igulu nnene. Kuba batyo bwe baakiriga abalanzi abaabasooka." 
Matthew5:13 “Niimwe omuunhu ogw'ensi. Aye omuunhu bwe guwaamu ensa gwiramu gutya ensa! Kuba guba tigukaali na mugaso okutoolaku okusuulibwa ku luya abantu baagutyankirira. 
Matthew5:14 “Niimwe ekimulika eky'ensi. Ekibuga ekizimbwa ku lusozi tikighanga kugisibwa. 
Matthew5:15 Era tibakunaania itaala ni balifundikira mu kiibo, aye balighanika ku kikondo lyamulisa boonaboona ababa mu ndhu." 
Matthew5:16 Ekimulika kyaimwe kyakire abantu kityo, babone ebikolwa byaimwe ebikalamu, baghe Iseimwe ow'omu igulu ekitiisa." 
Matthew5:17 “Muleke kudhuuba muti naidha okudibya Amateeka oba abalanzi, tyaidha kudibya aye kutuukiriza." 
Matthew5:18 Bwenebwene mbakobera nti, okutuusa ng'eigulu n'ensi biwoiregho, enukuta endala waire akatoonheze akalala, tibiridibizibwa mu Mateeka, okutuusa nga byonabyona bibairegho." 
Matthew5:19 Kale oyo yeenayeena alimenha ekirala ku biragiro bino ebitonioli, era n'ayegeresa atyo abantu, alyetebwa asembayo mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu aye oyo abigema era n'abyegeresa, alyetebwa wa kitiisa mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu." 
Matthew5:20 Ka mbakobere: okutoolaku ng'obutuufu bwaimwe busingaku obw'Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo, timulingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa mu igulu." 
Matthew5:21 “Mwawulira nga bakoba ab'eira bati, ‘Otaitanga, oyo yeenayeena aliita alisalirwa omusango.’" 
Matthew5:22 Aye nze mbakoba nti, buli muntu alikoba muganda we ati, ‘Raka,’ alisalirwa omusango mu mbuga ate oyo alikoba ati, ‘Musiru iwe’, alisalirwa omusango gwa kusuulibwa mu muliro gwa geyeena.”" 
Matthew5:23 Kale ni bw'oba otwala ekirabo kyo ku alutaari n'oidhukirira eyo oti muganda wo akuliku ekibono," 
Matthew5:24 leka agho ekirabo kyo mu maiso ga alutaari, oje otabagane ni muganda wo, memale oidhe ogheeyo ekirabo kyo." 
Matthew5:25 Isania ni y'owoza naye nga mukaali mu ngira, y'owoza naye alobe kukutwala ya mulamuzi, omulamuzi kukugemya mwisirukale kukusuula mu ikomera." 
Matthew5:26 Bwenebwene nkukobera nti, toliva omwo okutuusa ng'omaze okusasula n'akasente akasembayo." 
Matthew5:27 “Mwawulira nga bakoba bati, ‘Toyendanga.’" 
Matthew5:28 Aye nze mbakoba nti, buli alingirira omukazi olw'okumwegomba, aba amwenzeeku mule mu mwoyo." 
Matthew5:29 Kale oba nga eriiso lyo ery'oku mukono omusaadha likusuula mu kibi, litoolemu olisuule ekisingaku n'ekitundu ekirala ku iwe okuzikirira aye omubiri gwo gwonagwona gwaloba kusuulibwa mu geyeena." 
Matthew5:30 Oba nga omukono gwo omusaadha gukusuula mu kibi, gutemeku ogusuule kuba kisinga, ekitundu ekirala ku iwe okuzikirira aye omubiri gwo gwonagwona gwaloba kuja mu geyeena." 
Matthew5:31 “Era kyakobwa kiti, ‘Oyo yeenayeena abinganga mukazi we amughanga embaluwa ey'okumubinga.’" 
Matthew5:32 Aye nze mbakoba nti, kiisi anaabinganga mukazi we, okutoolaku ng'amulanga bwenzi, aba amuleeteire okwenda ate n'oyo abayiza omukazi ye babinze aba ayenze." 
Matthew5:33 “Era mwawulira nga bakoba ab'eira bati, ‘Tolayiranga bya kusubagha, aye otuukirizanga by'olayiriire Musengwa.’" 
Matthew5:34 Aye nze mbakoba nti: Mutalayiranga naire, waire okulayira eigulu, kuba n'ekityamo kya Katonda;" 
Matthew5:35 waire ensi, kuba ni kw'ata ebigere bye; waire Yerusalemu, kuba n'ekibuga kya Kyabazinga omukulu;" 
Matthew5:36 waire okulayira omutwe gwo, kuba n'oluviiri olulala tosobola kulufuula lweru oba lwirugavu." 
Matthew5:37 Endhogera yaimwe ebenga eti, ‘Yii,’ oba eti, ‘Busa!’ Kuba ekisinga ku ebyo nga kiviire mu mubi." 
Matthew5:38 “Mwawulira nga bakoba bati, ‘Eriiso lisasulwa na liiso, n'eriino lisasulwa na liino.’" 
Matthew5:39 Aye nze mbakoba nti: Mutatakanianga mubi era ole bw'akukubanga ku itama ery'omukono omusaadha omugaluliranga n'erindi. 
Matthew5:40 Ole ayenda okuwoza n'iwe atwale ekanzu yo, omulekeranga n'ekooti" 
Matthew5:41 Era oyo akukaka okuja naye kilomita endala, ojanga naye ibiri." 
Matthew5:42 Oyo akusabanga omughanga, era n'oyo ayenda okukweyazikwaku omughanga." 
Matthew5:43 “Mwawulira nga bakoba bati, ‘Ogonzanga mukagwa wo era waakyagha omuzigu wo.’" 
Matthew5:44 Aye nze mbakoba nti: Mugonzanga abazigu baimwe, era musabiranga abo ababakiriga." 
Matthew5:45 Memale olwo mube abaana ba Iseimwe ali mu igulu ayakiza endhuba ye abalungi n'ababi, n'agwikiza amaadhi ge abo abakolera ku mazima n'abatagakoleraku" 
Matthew5:46 kuba bwe mugonza abo ababagonza mufunamu ki? Abaghooza boona tibwebakola? 
Matthew5:47 Era oba nga mulamusa baganda baimwe bonka, kye musinga abandi kiri gha? N'abantu ab'ensi batyo tibwebakola?" 
Matthew5:48 Kale ni, imwe mubenga batukuvu nga Iseimwe ow'omu igulu bw'ali omutukuvu." 
Matthew6:1 “Mwegendereze ebikolwa byaimwe ebirungi obutabikola mu maiso ga bantu nga mwenda bababone, kuba bwe mukola mutyo timulifuna mpeera wa Iseimwe ali mu igulu." 
Matthew6:2 “Kale ni bw'ogabiranga abaavu, otajanga ng'ofuuwa magwala, ng'abakuusa bwe bakola mu sinagoga ni mu nguudo, nga benda abantu babaghe ekitiisa. Bwenebwene mbakobera, nti empeera yaibwe bagifunie." 
Matthew6:3 Aye iwe bw'ogabanga, toganhanga mukono gwo mugooda kumanha musaadha kye gukola." 
Matthew6:4 Kityo ni ky'ogabye kyaba kya kyama era Lata wo abona eby'ekyama alikugha empeera. 
Matthew6:5 “Bwe mubanga nga musaba mutabanga ng'abakuusa kuba benda okusaba nga beemereire mu sinagoga ni mu maagaanana ag'enguudo, abantu bababone bwenebwene mbakobera nti empeera yaibwe bagifunie." 
Matthew6:6 Aye iwe bw'obanga ng'osaba, ongiranga mu kisenge kyo waigalagho olwigi, memale ni waasaba Lata wo oyo ataboneka. Era Lata wo oyo abona eby'ekyama alikugha empeera." 
Matthew6:7 “Aye mu kusaba mutabalankananga ng'abatatya Katonda bwe bakola, kuba badhuuba bati mu bibono byaibwe kamaala mwe bawulirirwa." 
Matthew6:8 Kale ni mutafaanana ng'abo, kuba Iseimwe aidhi kye mwenda nga mukaali na kukisaba." 
Matthew6:9 Agho ni musabanga muti: ‘Iseife ali mu igulu, eriina lyo litiibwe." 
Matthew6:10 Obwakyabazinga bwo bwidhe. By'oyenda bikolebwe mu nsi nga bwe bikolebwa mu igulu. 
Matthew6:11 Tughe leero emere yaife eyabuliidho. 
Matthew6:12 Tusonighe ebibi byaife, nga bwe tusonigha abatukola ebibi." 
Matthew6:13 Totutwala mu kulebwa, aye tulokole mu bubi.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Bwe munaasonighanga abantu ebibi byaibwe Iseimwe ow'omu igulu mwena anaabasonighanga ebibi byaimwe. 
Matthew6:15 Aye bwe mutaasonighenga bantu, ni Iseimwe taabasonighenga bibi byaimwe." 
Matthew6:16 “Bwe musiibanga, mutadhuunianga ng'abakuusa: Kuba beeyonoona emboneka yaibwe baboneke mu bantu nga basiiba. Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, abo empeera yaibwe bagifunie." 
Matthew6:17 Iwe bw'osiibanga, osiiganga omutwe gwo omuzigo, era amaiso go oganaabanga," 
Matthew6:18 olobe kuboneka mu bantu ng'osiiba, aye Lata wo ali mu ngiso n'abe akubone oyo Lata wo abona eby'ekyama alikugha empeera." 
Matthew6:19 “Oteebiikiranga bya bukombe mu nsi muno, ebisiisa n'okutalaiga mwe bibyonoonera, n'abaibi mwe basima ni babiiba." 
Matthew6:20 Mwebiikire eby'obukombe mu igulu, eyo ebisiisa waire okutalaiga ye kutabyonoonera, era abaibi ye batasima waire okwiba;" 
Matthew6:21 kuba obukombe bwo ghe buli n'omwoyo gwo ghe guba. 
Matthew6:22 “Eriiso n'eitaala ery'omubiri. Kale eriiso lyo bweriba eiramu, omubiri gwo gwonagwona gwidhula obutangaavu." 
Matthew6:23 Aye eriiso lyo bweriba eibi, omubiri gwo gwonagwona guba mu nzikiiza. Kale ni oba nga obutangaavu obuli mu iwe bufuuse nzikiiza, memale olwo enzikiiza yeene enaayaga gha?" 
Matthew6:24 “Ghazira asobola kugheereza basengwa babiri kuba, oba alikyagha mulala yaayenda owundi, oba aligumira ku mulala yaasambaadha owundi. Timusobola kugheereza Katonda ate na bya bufuni." 
Matthew6:25 “Kyenva mbakoba nti: muteeraliikiriranga mu bulamu bwaimwe kye munaalya oba kye munaanhwa, waire omubiri gwaimwe kye munaavaala. Obulamu ti bwa mughendo okusinga emere? N'omubiri ti gwa mughendo okusinga eby'okuvaala?" 
Matthew6:26 Mubone enhonhi tidhirima mere, tidhikungula, tidhitereka mu byagi, aye Iseimwe ali mu igulu adhigha okulya! Imwe timuli ba mughendo y'ali okusinga enhonhi?" 
Matthew6:27 Naani ku imwe, ni bwe yeeraliikirira atya, asobola okwongera akaseera ku bulamu bwe?" 
Matthew6:28 “Eby'ebivaalo lwaki mubyeraliikirira? Mudhuubirize ku bimuli eby'omu nsiko nga bwe bikula: ghazira kye bikola waire kuluka ngoye. 
Matthew6:29 Aye ka mbakobere, waire Solomoni mu kitiisa kye kyonakyona tiyavaalanga ng'ekirala ku ebyo." 
Matthew6:30 Kale oba Katonda avaaza atyo eisubi ery'omu nsiko eririgho leero ate enkyo ni lisuulibwa mu muliro, talisingagho kubavaaza, imwe abali n'okwikiriza okutono?" 
Matthew6:31 “Kale ni muteeraliikiriranga nga mukoba muti tunaalya ki? Oba muti tunaanhwa ki? Oba muti tunaavaala ki? 
Matthew6:32 Abataidhi Katonda n'abanoonia ebyo imwe Iseimwe ali mu igulu aidhi ati ebyo byonabyona mubyenda. 
Matthew6:33 Kale ni musookenga kunoonia Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda n'obutuufu bwe, era byonabyona biribongerwaku." 
Matthew6:34 Mulekenga ni kweraliikirira byaidho kuba olwaidho lulyeraliikirira ebyalwo, buli lunaku luli n'ebizibu ebirumala." 
Matthew7:1 “Mutasaliranga bandi musango, olwo mwena bwe gutalibasalirwa" 
Matthew7:2 kuba nga bwe musalira abandi omusango, mwena bwe gulibasalirwa, era n'ekipimo kye munaapimirangamu banaimwe, mwena n'ekiribapimirwamu." 
Matthew7:3 Lwaki olingirira akakaba akali mu liiso lya muganda wo, aye n'oloba okubona ekisiki ekiri mu liryo?" 
Matthew7:4 Oba, okoba otya muganda wo oti, ‘Ka nkutoole akakaba mu liiso,’ aye nga mu liiso lyo mulimu ekisiki?" 
Matthew7:5 Mukuusa iwe, sooka otoole ekisiki mu liiso eriryo, memale obone bukalamu akakaba akali mu liiso lya muganda wo n'okukatoolamu." 
Matthew7:6 “Embwa mutadhighanga bitukuvu, kuba dhisobola okubakyukira dhaabakankada. Ate amabaale ag'omughendo mutagasuuliranga mbiidhi, kuba dhiganiinirira buniinirire." 
Matthew7:7 “Musabe muligheebwa mwagale mulizuula mukonkone ku lwigi muliigulirwagho. 
Matthew7:8 Kuba buli asaba afuna, oyo ayagala azuula, n'oyo akonkona ku lwigi aliigulirwagho." 
Matthew7:9 Kale naani mu imwe agha omwana we eibaale ng'amusabye omugaati? 
Matthew7:10 Oba ng'amusabye ekyenhandha n'amugha omusota? 
Matthew7:11 Kale, oba nga imwe ababi mwidhi okugha abaana baimwe ebirabo ebirungi, Iseimwe ali mu igulu talisingagho inho okugha ebirungi abamusaba?" 
Matthew7:12 “Kale ni ebyo byonabyona bye mwenda abantu babakolere, mutyo mwena mubibakolerenga kuba ekyo Amateeka n'abalanzi kye bitegeeza." 
Matthew7:13 “Mwingirire mu mulyango omutono kuba omulyango omunene, n'engira enene etuuka mu kuzikirira, era abantu kamaala bagema eyo." 
Matthew7:14 Ate omulyango omutono, n'engira enfunda etuuka mu bulamu, era n'abagizuula batono." 
Matthew7:15 “Mwekuume abalanzi abaguya, abo abaidha ye muli nga beefuula bawolu oti ntaama, ate nga munda n'emisege emiswankuzi." 
Matthew7:16 Mulibamanhira ku bikolwa byaibwe. Koodhi emizabbibu baginoga ku miwa, oba emitiini ku lukandwa?" 
Matthew7:17 Omuti omulungi gwania ebibala bikalamu, n'omuti omubi gwayania ebibala ebibi." 
Matthew7:18 Omuti omulungi tigusobola kwania bibala bibi, era n'omuti omubi tigusobola kwania bibala bikalamu." 
Matthew7:19 Buli muti ogutaania bibala bikalamu gutemebwa era gwasuulibwa mu muliro. 
Matthew7:20 Kale, ku bikolwa byaibwe kwe mulibamanhira." 
Matthew7:21 “Buli muntu andheta ati: ‘Musengwa, Musengwa’, ti n'alingira mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu, aye oyo akola Lata wange ali mu igulu ky'ayenda." 
Matthew7:22 Ku lunaku olwo, abantu kamaala balinkoba bati, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa, titwalanganga mu liina lyo, twabinganga emizimu emibi, era titwakolanga byewuunhio kamaala mu liina lyo?’" 
Matthew7:23 Agho ni ndibaatulira nti: tibaidhi naire, munve mu maiso imwe abadheemu." 
Matthew7:24 “Kale buli awulira ebibono byange bino n'abijiiraku afaanana ng'omusaadha omugezigezi eyazimba endhu ye ku lubaale: 
Matthew7:25 Amaadhi gaagwa, omwidhuzo gwayoolooka, kiwunga yaakunta, byakuba endhu eyo aye tiyagwa; kuba yali ezimbiibwa ku lubaale." 
Matthew7:26 “Aye buli awulira ebibono byange bino n'atabijiiraku afaanana omusaadha omusirusiru eyazimba endhu ye ku musenho: 
Matthew7:27 Amaadhi gaagwa, mukoka yayoolooka, kiwunga yaakunta, byakuba endhu eyo era yaagwa, yaamenhekeragho irala.”" 
Matthew7:28 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebibono ebyo abantu beewuunhia endhegeresa ye 
Matthew7:29 kuba yali abeegeresa nga mwene buyinza, ti ng'Abanamateeka baibwe." 
Matthew8:1 Agho Yesu bwe yava ku lusozi, ebikunsu eby'abantu byamunonereza." 
Matthew8:2 Agho omuntu ow'endwaire ey'ebigenge yaidha ye Yesu yaakuba amakiryaivu yaakoba ati: “Musengwa, bw'oyenda oghanga okumponia.”" 
Matthew8:3 Yesu yaagolola omukono gwe yaamugemaku ng'akoba ati: “Nhenda, wona.” Era mangu ago yaawona endwaire ey'ebigenge." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Bona nti tokoberaku muntu, aye ja weeyandhule ewa kabona era ogheeyo ekirabo Musa kye yalagira, kwe banaakakalisa.”" 
Matthew8:5 Yesu bwe yangira mu Kaperinaumu, Omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale yaidha yaamweghemba," 
Matthew8:6 ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa, omugheereza wange agoomeire ghaka mu bulumi obubitirivu.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Leka ndidhe mmuwonie.” 
Matthew8:8 Omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale yairamu ati: “Musengwa, tigwanira iwe kwingira mu ndhu yange, aye yogera bwogere kibono omugheereza wange aidha kuwona." 
Matthew8:9 Nze zeena ndi muntu atwalibwa, ate ndi n'abaisirukale be ntwala. Era bwe nkoba ono nti, ‘Ja,’ aja n'owundi nti, ‘Idha,’ aidha n'omwiru wange nti, ‘Kola kino,’ akikola.”" 
Matthew8:10 Yesu bwe yawulira ebyo, yeewuunhia, era yaakoba abaali bamunonereza, ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere tyagaananga muntu ali na kwikiriza nga kuno mu Isiraeli!" 
Matthew8:11 Era ka mbakobere: abantu kamaala baliva ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba n'olw'e bugwandhuba, baatyama ni Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu" 
Matthew8:12 aye abaana ab'omu Bwakyabazinga balibingirwa ku luya mu kizikiiza, omuliba okugegenga n'okuluma emba olw'obulumi obubitirivu.”" 
Matthew8:13 Agho Yesu yaakoba omukulu w'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale ati: “Ja, kikukolerwe nga bw'oikiriiza.” Era mu saawa yeene eyo, omugheereza yaawona." 
Matthew8:14 Agho Yesu yaatuuka mu nhumba ya Petero, yaabona mukoirume wa Petero nga alambaire agho omusuudha gumuli bubi." 
Matthew8:15 Yaamugema ku mukono, omusuudha gwamuleka yaasituka yaamugheereza." 
Matthew8:16 Obwire bwe bwali nga buziba, baamuleetera abantu kamaala abaaliku emizimu emibi era yaabinga emizimu egyo ng'ayogera bwogere, era yaawonia abalwaire boonaboona." 
Matthew8:17 Kino kyatuukiriza omulanzi Isaia kye yakoba ati: “Yatuwonia ebituluma, yeetwika ebirwaire byaife.”" 
Matthew8:18 Yesu bwe yabona ng'abantu kamaala bamwetooloire, yaalagira Abeegeresebwa be basomoke enhandha." 
Matthew8:19 Munamateeka mulala yaaseeta yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa ndidha kukunonereza buli gh'onaajanga.” 
Matthew8:20 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ebibe biri n'ebiina, n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhiri n'ebisu, aye Omwana ow'Omuntu azira gh'aisa mutwe.”" 
Matthew8:21 Owundi, mulala ku Beegeresebwa be, yaamukoba ati: “Sooka onganhe nje nziike lata wange.”" 
Matthew8:22 Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Nnonereza, leka abafu baziike abafu baibwe.”" 
Matthew8:23 Agho Yesu yaaniina eryato, n'Abeegeresebwa be baaja naye." 
Matthew8:24 Tibwalwa kiwunga ow'amaani yaasituka ku nhandha, amayengo nga genda kusaaniagho bwa lyato. Yesu yali atendwike." 
Matthew8:25 Kale Abeegeresebwa baaseeta gh'ali baamuzuusa nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa, tuwonie tuli kusaanagho.”" 
Matthew8:26 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mutiire, imwe ab'okwikiriza okutono!” Yaasituka, yaakaabukira kiwunga n'enhandha, era kyaba mulaala inho." 
Matthew8:27 Abantu beewuunhia nga bakoba bati: “Ono muntu wa kika ki kiwunga n'enhandha ye biwulira!” 
Matthew8:28 Agho bwe yatuuka eruuyi ere mu nsi ey'Abagadara, abantu babiri abaaliku emizimu emibi baamwagaana nga bava mu lwambiidhi omwaziikibwanga abantu, nga bakambwe ekibitiriire era nga ghazira muntu asobola kubita mu ngira eyo." 
Matthew8:29 Olwamubona baawowoigana nga bakoba bati: “Otwendeza ki iwe Omwana wa Katonda? Oidhie ghano okutudaazadaaza ng'obwire bukaali kutuuka?” 
Matthew8:30 Ghaaligho ekighaso eky'embiidhi kamaala edhaali dhiri kulya, nga dheeswireku akata." 
Matthew8:31 Emizimu gyamweghemba nga gikoba giti: “Bw'otubinga ghano, tusindike mu kighaso eky'embiidhi.”" 
Matthew8:32 Yaagikoba ati: “Kale muje.” Agho gyabavaaku, gyaja mu mbiidhi. Ekighaso kyonakyona kyalindimukira ku kiyiriro embiidhi dhaagwa mu nhandha, dhaafiira mu maadhi." 
Matthew8:33 Abaali badhaaya baalumuka baaja mu kibuga, baaghaya byonabyona n'ebyafa ku baaliku emizimu." 
Matthew8:34 Agho ab'omu kibuga boonaboona baavaayo baidha ye Yesu. Era bwe baamubona baamweghemba ave mu kiketezo kyaibwe. 
Matthew9:1 Agho Yesu yaaniina mu lyato, yaasomoka yaatuuka mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe." 
Matthew9:2 Tibwalwa, nga bamuleetera omuntu eyagogoma, ng'alambaire ku ndiri. Yesu bwe yabona okwikiriza kwaibwe, yaakoba omugogomu ati: “Guma omwoyo mwana wange, ebibi byo bikusoniyiibwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Agho, abandi ku Banamateeka, mule munda baakoba bati: “Ono avuma Katonda!”" 
Matthew9:4 Aye Yesu yategeera ebidhuubo byaibwe, yaakoba ati: “Lwaki muba n'ebidhuubo ebibi bityo?" 
Matthew9:5 Kiki ekisinga obwangu? Okukoba oti, ‘Ebibi bikusoniyiibwa,’ oba okukoba oti, ‘Situka otambule’?" 
Matthew9:6 Aye ka mbalage ng'Omwana ow'Omuntu ali n'obukumu ku nsi obusonigha ebibi.” Agho yaakoba omugogomu ati: “Situka, ogeme endiri yo, oje ewaimwe.”" 
Matthew9:7 Yaasituka yaaja ewaibwe. 
Matthew9:8 Abantu bwe baabona, baatya era baagha Katonda ekitiisa eyagha abantu obukumu obwaga agho." 
Matthew9:9 Agho Yesu bwe yali ng'atambula, ng'ava eyo, yaabona omuntu ng'atyaime ghe bawooleza, nga bamweta Matayo, era yaamukoba ati: “Nnonereza.” Yaasituka yaamunonereza." 
Matthew9:10 Bwe yali ng'atyaime ku kiiwulo mu ndhu, abaghooza kamaala n'aboonooni baidha baatyama ni Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be okulya." 
Matthew9:11 Abafarisaayo bwe baabona ekyo, baakoba Abeegeresebwa be bati: “Lwaki omwegeresa waimwe alya n'abaghooza n'aboonooni?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yesu bwe yawulira, yaakoba ati: “Abalamu ti n'abenda omuyigha aye abalwaire." 
Matthew9:13 Kale muje mwege amakulu ga kino, ‘Ekisa kye nhenda aye ti misengo.’ Tinaidha kweta batuufu, aye aboonooni.”" 
Matthew9:14 Agho abeegeresebwa ba Yoanne baidha ye Yesu nga bakoba bati: “Lwaki ife n'Abafarisaayo tusiiba emikuzi kamaala aye nga Abeegeresebwa bo tibasiiba?” 
Matthew9:15 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Abageni b'oyo abayiiza basobola okunakughala ng'abayiiza akaali nabo? Enaku bwe dhirituuka, abayiiza n'abatoolebwaku, olwo ni balisiiba." 
Matthew9:16 “Ghazira atunga kighero kya lugoye luyaaka mu lugoye lukaire, kuba kikanukagho, ekituli kyeyongera bweyongere." 
Matthew9:17 Era tibata mwenge gwa mizabbibu musu mu nsawo dha luwu nkaire. Bwe bakikola, ensawo dhitulika, omwenge gwafukika era n'ensawo dhaadhagalika. Aye omwenge gw'emizabbibu omusu baguta mu nsawo dha luwu mpyaka, olwo byombi byakuumibwa bukalamu.”" 
Matthew9:18 Yesu bwe yali ng'akaayogera nabo ebyo, omukungu mulala yaatuuka, yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaakoba ati: “Mughala wange yaakakutuka aye idha omugemeku n'omukono gwo, aidha kulama.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yesu yaasituka yaamunonereza ghalala n'Abeegeresebwa be. 
Matthew9:20 Ghaabaagho omukazi eyali alwaire ekikulukuto okumala emyaka ikumi n'ebiri, yaava emugongo wa Yesu, yaagema ku lusa lw'ekivaalo kye" 
Matthew9:21 kuba mule yali akoba ati: “Ni bwenaagema obw'oku kivaalo kye ndidha kuwona.” 
Matthew9:22 Yesu bwe yakyuka yaamubona, yaakoba ati: “Mughala iwe guma omwoyo okwikiriza kwo kukuwoniiza.” Era ku saawa eyo yeene omukazi yaawona." 
Matthew9:23 Yesu bwe yatuuka mu ndhu ey'omukungu, yaabona abafuuyi b'endere n'abantu abaali babyangatana," 
Matthew9:24 yaakoba ati: “Muveeyo, omughala tafiire, aye atendwike!” Baamusekerera." 
Matthew9:25 Aye bwe baamala okufulumya abantu, Yesu yangira yaamugema ku mukono, omughala yaayemerera." 
Matthew9:26 Amawulire gano gaabuna ekiketezo ekyo kyonakyona. 
Matthew9:27 Olwava agho, abatulu babiri baamunonereza, bwe baasiikana nga bakoba bati: “Omwana wa Daudi tusaasire!”" 
Matthew9:28 Yesu bwe yatuuka mu ndhu abatulu baaseeta gh'ali, era yaabakoba ati: “Mwikiriza nga nsobola okubawonia?” Baamukoba bati: “Yii, Musengwa!”" 
Matthew9:29 Agho yaagema ku maiso gaibwe yaakoba ati: “Kibe kityo nga bwe mwikiriiza.” 
Matthew9:30 Agho amaiso gaibwe gaazibuka. Yesu yaabasikirira ati: “Mubone nga tighaba akimanha.” 
Matthew9:31 Aye bano olwava agho baaja baamulaalaisa mu nsi eyo yoonayoona. 
Matthew9:32 Abo bwe baali nga bafuluma, ghaabaagho kasiru ng'aliku omuzimu omubi." 
Matthew9:33 Omuzimu bwe gwamala okubingibwa, kasiru yaayogera abantu kamaala beewuunhia inho, baakoba bati: “Ekintu kiti tikibonekangaku mu Isiraeli!”" 
Matthew9:34 Aye Abafarisaayo baakoba bati: “Emizimu agibinga na buyinza bwa mukulu waagyo.” 
Matthew9:35 Agho Yesu yaaja ng'abita mu bibuga byonabyona ni mu byalo, nga bw'ayegeresa mu sinagoga dhaibwe era nga bw'abakobera Amawulire Amalungi ag'Obwakyabazinga yaawonia kiisi bulwaire na bugodhe." 
Matthew9:36 Bwe yabona abantu kamaala batyo, yaabagemerwa ekisa, kuba baali beinhamiire era nga babundaire ng'oti n'entaama edhiziraku mwayi." 
Matthew9:37 Agho ni yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Eby'okukungula biri kamaala, aye abakungula n'abatono." 
Matthew9:38 Kale ni musabe mwene bikungulwa asindike abakozi mu bikungulwa bye.” 
Matthew10:1 Agho Yesu yaayeta Abeegeresebwa be Eikumi n'Ababiri, yaabagha obuyinza ku mizimu emibi bagibingenga era bawonienga kiisi bulwaire na bugodhe." 
Matthew10:2 Amaina ag'Abatume eikumi n'Ababiri ni gano: asooka ni Simoni ayetebwa Petero, ni Anderea muganda we, ni Yakobo mutabane wa Zebedaayo ghalala ni Yoanne muganda we." 
Matthew10:3 Filipo ni Barutholomayo, Thomasi ni Matayo omughooza, Yakobo mutabane wa Alufaayo ni Thaddaayo," 
Matthew10:4 Simoni Omukananayo ni Yuda Isikarioti eyamulyamu olukwe. 
Matthew10:5 Bano Eikumi n'Ababiri Yesu be yatuma, yaabalagira ati: “Mutajanga mu biketezo bya bamaghanga gandi, era mutangiranga mu bibuga bya Basamaria." 
Matthew10:6 Aye, muje eri entaama edhaabula edh'omu ndhu ya Isiraeli." 
Matthew10:7 Bwe muja mubakobenga muti, ‘Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu buseese.’" 
Matthew10:8 Abalwaire mubawonianga, abafu mubazuukizanga, abali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge mubalongoosanga, emizimu emibi mugibinganga. Mwafuna kya busa mwena mukigheerenga busa." 
Matthew10:9 Timutwalanga zaabu, waire feeza, waire mpiiya," 
Matthew10:10 waire nsawo ya lugendo oba ebivaalo ebibiri, waire ngaito oba mwigo kuba omukozi agwana okusasulwa enkemba ye." 
Matthew10:11 “Mu buli kibuga oba kyalo kye munaajangamu, mwagale aganha okubakyaza era agho ghe mube mubenga okutuusa lwe muva mu kifo ekyo." 
Matthew10:12 Ate nga mungira mu ndhu eyo, mukobanga muti, ‘Emiraala gibe n'imwe.’" 
Matthew10:13 Era endhu eyo bw'eba ng'egwaine, emiraala gyaimwe ginaagisigalangaku aye bw'eba tegwaine, emiraala gyaimwe ginaabairiranga." 
Matthew10:14 Bwe ghabangagho omuntu yeenayeena aloba okubakyaza, oba okuwulira ebibono byaimwe, mukunkumulanga enkungu mu bigere byaimwe nga muva mu ndhu ye oba mu kibuga ekyo." 
Matthew10:15 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere ku lunaku olw'okusalirwaku omusango, Sodoma ni Gomorra birisaasirwa okusinga ekibuga ekyo." 
Matthew10:16 “Bona, ndi kubatuma, nga muli oti ntaama ghagati mu misege. Kale ni mube bakabwidhibwidhi ng'emisota, ng'ate muli bawolu ng'oti njiibwa." 
Matthew10:17 Mwekuume abantu kuba balibaghaayo mu mbuga, era ni mu sinagoga dhaibwe, balibakuba enkoba." 
Matthew10:18 Balibatwala mu maiso ag'abafuzi ni bakyabazinga nga babalanga nze, mube badhulizi bange mu abo ni mu bamaghanga agandi." 
Matthew10:19 Aye bwe babaghangayo muteeraliikiriranga kye munaayogera, oba kye munaakoba kuba mu kaseera keene ako munaagheebwanga eky'okwogera." 
Matthew10:20 Ti niimwe munaayogeranga ku bwaimwe, aye Mwoyo wa Iseimwe." 
Matthew10:21 “Omuntu alighaayo muganda we okwitibwa ate omuzaire yaaghaayo omwana we, n'abaana balidheemera abazaire era baabaita." 
Matthew10:22 Abantu boonaboona balibakyagha olw'eriina lyange. Aye oyo alyekalangula okutuusa ku nkomerero, alirokolwa." 
Matthew10:23 Era bwe babakiriganga nga muli mu kibuga kino, mulumukiranga mu kindi kuba bwenebwene mbakobera: Timulimaza bibuga bya Isiraeli ng'Omwana w'Omuntu akaali kwidha." 
Matthew10:24 “Ayegeresebwa tasinga amwegeresa, waire omugheereza okusinga musengwa we." 
Matthew10:25 Kimala ayegeresebwa okuba ng'omwegeresa we, n'omugheereza okuba nga Musengwa we. Kale oba nga mwenemu bamweta Beelezebulu, memale leero balyaza gha okubiiya ab'omu maka ge!" 
Matthew10:26 “Kale abo mutabatyanga kuba ghazira kibwikiibwa kitalibwikulibwa, oba ekigisiibwa ekitalimanhibwa." 
Matthew10:27 Kye mbakobera mu kizikiiza, mukyogeranga mu musana ate kye muwulira mu kyama, mukirangiriranga ghaigulu ku mayumba." 
Matthew10:28 Mutatyanga abo abaita omubiri aye nga tibaghanga kwita mwoyo, aye mutye oyo aghanga okuzikiriza omwoyo n'omubiri mu geyeena." 
Matthew10:29 Kale enkazaluya eibiri tidhigula sente ndala eti? Ate nga ghazira ndala ku edho egwa ku itaka nga Lata waimwe tayenze. 
Matthew10:30 Aye imwe n'enviiri edh'oku mitwe gyaimwe dhoonadhoona mbale. 
Matthew10:31 Kale ni mulekenga kutya, muli ba mughendo okusinga enkazaluya kamaala." 
Matthew10:32 “Kale, kiisi ayatula mu maiso ag'abantu ati wange, nze zeena ndikobera Lata wange ali mu igulu nti wange." 
Matthew10:33 Ate kiisi alineegaana mu maiso ag'abantu, nze zeena ndimwegaana mu maiso ga Lata wange ali mu igulu." 
Matthew10:34 “Mutadhuuba muti naidha kuleeta miraala ku nsi tyaidha kuleeta miraala, aye ntalo." 
Matthew10:35 Kuba naidha okuleetagho obutaisania ghagati gh'omwana ni lata we, ghagati gh'omughala n'inhina, ghagati gha namughala n'inhazaala we." 
Matthew10:36 Era abazigu b'omuntu banaabanga ba mu ndhu beene. 
Matthew10:37 “Oyo agonza lata we oba inhina okusinga nze, tangwanira, n'oyo agonza mutabane oba mughala we okusinga nze, tangwanira." 
Matthew10:38 Oyo atabbeeda musalaba gwe n'annonereza, tangwanira." 
Matthew10:39 Oyo agezaaku okuwonia obulamu bwe abufiirwa, ate oyo afiirwa obulamu bwe olw'okuba nze abuwonia." 
Matthew10:40 “Asangaalira imwe, aba asangaaliire nze ate asangaalira nze aba asangaaliire ole eyantuma." 
Matthew10:41 Oyo asangaalira omulanzi olw'okuba nga mulanzi, empeera alifuna ya mulanzi n'oyo asangaalira omuntu akola ebituufu olw'okuba akola ebituufu, empeera alifuna ya muntu mutuufu." 
Matthew10:42 Era yeenayeena aligha omulala ku bato bano olwendo olw'amaadhi amainhogovu okunhwa, olw'okuba Mwegeresebwa wange, bwenebwene mbakobera nti taliroba kufuna mpeera ye.”" 
Matthew11:1 Agho Yesu bwe yamaliriza bye yagalagira Abeegeresebwa be Eikumi n'Ababiri, yaava agho yaaja okulangirira n'okwegeresa abantu mu bibuga byaibwe." 
Matthew11:2 Yoanne bwe yali mu ikomera, yaawulira Kurisito by'ali kola. Agho yaatuma abeegeresebwa be" 
Matthew11:3 okumubuuza bati: “Niiwe ow'okwidha, oba tuteegerere wundi?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Muje mukobere Yoanne bye muwulire ni bye muboine. 
Matthew11:5 Abatulu babona, abalema batambula, abali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge balongooka, abaasemba amatu bawulira, abafu bazuukizibwa, n'abaavu bakoberwa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Matthew11:6 Era wa nkabi atambona ng'ekitimuguunha.” 
Matthew11:7 Abo bwe baali bali kuja, Yesu yaatoolera okukobera ebiyindi by'abantu ebigema ku Yoanne ati: “Kiki kye mwaja okubona mu irungu? Lugada empewo lw'etengeesa?" 
Matthew11:8 Kale mwaja kubona ki? Muntu avaire madholobera? Abavaala amadholobera baba mu bisaagaati bya bakyabazinga. 
Matthew11:9 Aye kale imwe mwaja kubona ki? Mulanzi? N'agh'agho, ka mbakobere: Mwaja kubona asingaku n'omulanzi" 
Matthew11:10 kuba n'oyo eyaghandiikibwaku ati, ‘Bona, ndi kutuma omukwenda wange akukulembereremu, aidha kukutegekera engira yo mw'olibita.’" 
Matthew11:11 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, mu baali bazaaliibwa abakazi timubangamu asinga Yoanne Omubatiza, ate ng'asembayo mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu amusinga." 
Matthew11:12 Okuva mu byanda bya Yoanne okutuusa buti, Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu butwalibwa na maani, era abakozesa amaani n'ababutwala" 
Matthew11:13 kuba Amateeka n'Abalanzi boonaboona okutuukira irala ku Yoanne baayogera ku Bwakyabazinga buno. 
Matthew11:14 Era oba nga mwenda okukimanha oyo ni Eliya ow'okwidha. 
Matthew11:15 Ali n'amatu awulire. 
Matthew11:16 “Abantu ab'oluse luno nnaabagerangerania ku ki? Bali ng'oti n'abaana abato abatyama mu biya baayeta abandi 
Matthew11:17 nga babakoba bati, ‘Twabafuuyira endere timwakina, twakuba empungu, aye timwagegenga!’" 
Matthew11:18 “Yoanne yaidha nga talya era nga tanhwa, baakoba bati, ‘Aliku omuzimu omubi.’" 
Matthew11:19 Ate Omwana ow'Omuntu yaidha ng'alya era ng'anhwa, baakoba bati, ‘Mubone omusaadha omulyalya, omutamiivu, mukagwa w'abaghooza era n'aboonooni.’ Ate nga obutuufu bw'amagezi bubonekera mu bikolwa byago.”" 
Matthew11:20 Agho Yesu yaatoolera okuvumirira ebibuga mwe yali akoleire ebyewuunhio kamaala, ni biroba okwenenia." 
Matthew11:21 Yaakoba ati: “Abantu ab'e Korazini, mukagwireku! N'abe Bethisaida, mukagwireku! Kuba ebyewuunhio ebikolerwa mu imwe nguli byali bikoleirwa mu Tiro ni Sidoni, nguli beenenia, baavaala ekutiya, beebbaaka n'eivu." 
Matthew11:22 Aye ka mbakobere: Ku lunaku olw'okusalirwaku omusango, Tiro ni Sidoni birisaasirwa okusinga imwe." 
Matthew11:23 Ate imwe abantu be Kaperinaumu, koodhi mwegulumiza kwenda kutuuka bwa mu igulu? Mwidha kwisibwa bwa mu magombe kuba nguli ebyewuunhio ebyabaagho mu imwe byali kubaagho mu Sodoma, nguli kikaaligho n'okutuusa olwaleero." 
Matthew11:24 Aye ka mbakobere: Ku lunaku olw'okusalirwaku omusango, Sodoma kirisaasirwa okusinga imwe.”" 
Matthew11:25 Mu kiseera ekyo Yesu yaakoba ati: “Lata nkusaaka, Musengwa ow'eigulu n'ensi, kuba bino wabigisa abagezi n'abamanhi, waabimanhisa abato." 
Matthew11:26 N'agh'agho Lata, kuba iwe otyo bwe wasiima." 
Matthew11:27 “Byonabyona Lata wange yabingemya, era ghazira aidhi Mwana okutoolaku Lata, waire aidhi Lata okutoolaku Mwana, n'oyo Mwana y'aba asiimye okumumanhisa." 
Matthew11:28 “Mwidhe ye ndi imwe mwenamwena abadaaga n'abali n'ebibavuna, ndidha kubawuumuza." 
Matthew11:29 Mubbeede ekikoligo kyange, era mundhegereku kuba nze ndi muwombeefu era tyegulumiza agho emyoyo gyaimwe giribatereera" 
Matthew11:30 kuba ekikoligo kyange kyangu, n'omugugu gwange mugheghere.”" 
Matthew12:1 Agho olwatuuka Yesu yaabita mu misiri egy'engaano ku lwa Sabbato. Abeegeresebwa be endhala yaabaluma, era batandiika okuwulula engaano bwe balya." 
Matthew12:2 Aye Abafarisaayo olwakibona baamukoba bati: “Bona, Abeegeresebwa bo bali kukola ekitaikirizibwa kukola ku Sabbato.”" 
Matthew12:3 Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Timusomangaku Daudi kye yakola, endhala bwe yamuluma ni be yali nabo?" 
Matthew12:4 Bwe yangira mu ndhu ya Katonda, n'alya emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda, gye yali taikirizibwa kulya, waire be yali nabo okutoolaku bakabona bonka?" 
Matthew12:5 Oba timusomangaku mu Mateeka muti ku lwa Sabbato, bakabona boonoona Sabbato mu isinzizo, aye baaloba kuba na musango?" 
Matthew12:6 Aye ka mbakobere: ghano ghaligho asinga n'eisinzizo. 
Matthew12:7 Ate nguli mubaire mwidhi ekyaghandiikibwa kino bwe kikoba, ‘Nhenda kisa aye ti misengo’, mwandibaire nga timusalira banaimwe musango abazira kye basobiiza" 
Matthew12:8 kuba Omwana w'Omuntu ni Musengwa wa Sabbato.” 
Matthew12:9 Olwava agho, Yesu yaaja yangira mu sinagoga yaibwe." 
Matthew12:10 Mwalimu omuntu eyali n'omukono ogwaniala. Agho baamubuuza oba nga kiikirizibwa okuwonia ku Sabbato nga benda bamuseeghe. 
Matthew12:11 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Naani ku imwe aba n'entaama ye, n'egwa mu kiina ku Sabbato, aloba okugigema n'agitoolamu?" 
Matthew12:12 Omuntu tasinga ntaama mughendo? Agho ni kiikirizibwa okukola obulungi ku Sabbato.” 
Matthew12:13 Agho yaakoba omusaadha ati: “Funhulula omukono gwo.” Yaagufunhulula era gwairagho okuba omulamu nga gule ogundi. 
Matthew12:14 Aye Abafarisaayo olwafuluma nga beekobaana kubona ngeri ya kumuzikirizaamu. 
Matthew12:15 Yesu olwamanha olukwe olwo yaava agho. Era abantu kamaala baamunonereza, era yaabawonia boonaboona." 
Matthew12:16 Yaabasikirira n'obutamulaalaisa. 
Matthew12:17 Kino kyatuukiriza Isaia omulanzi kye yalanga ati: 
Matthew12:18 “Ono n'omugheereza wange ye nalonda omugonzi, omwoyo gwange mwe gusagambira. Ndidha kumutaamu Mwoyo wange, akobere amaghanga eby'amazima." 
Matthew12:19 Taliba wa ntaka oba akaabuka, era ghazira aliwulira iroboozi lye mu maagaanana." 
Matthew12:20 Olugada oluvuniike talirukutulamu, n'olutambi olunioka taliruzikiza, okutuusa ng'atuusiiza amazima ku bughanguzi." 
Matthew12:21 Era mu liina lye, amaghanga agandi mwe galisuubirira.”" 
Matthew12:22 Agho Yesu baamuleetera omuntu aliku omuzimu omubi nga mutulu era kasiru, yaamuwonia yaaba ng'aghanga okwogera era n'okubona." 
Matthew12:23 Abantu boonaboona beewuunhia inho era baakoba bati: “Ono ti ni mwidhukulu wa Daudi?” 
Matthew12:24 Aye Abafarisaayo olwakiwulira baakoba bati: “Ono emizimu emibi tagibinga na buyinza bundi, okutoolaku obwa Beelezebulu omukulu waagyo.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yesu bwe yamanha bye balowooza yaabakoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwonabwona omuzira kwisania buzikirira era n'ekibuga oba amaka omuzira kwisania, tibisobola kubaagho." 
Matthew12:26 Kale ni oba Sitaani abinga Sitaani, mwene aba yeeyawiiremu kale obwakyabazinga bwe bughanga butya okubaagho?" 
Matthew12:27 Ye oba nga nze emizimu emibi ngibinga na buyinza bwa Beelezebulu, ab'ekikunsu kyaimwe bagibinga na buyinza bw'ani? Abo ni n'abalibasalira omusango." 
Matthew12:28 Aye, oba nga emizimu emibi ngibinga na buyinza bwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda butuuse mu imwe." 
Matthew12:29 “Ole aghanga atya okungira mu ndhu y'omuntu ow'amaani n'anhaga ebibye okutoolaku ng'asoose kusiba muntu oyo ow'amaani? Memale olwo ni yaanhaga eby'omu ndhu ye! 
Matthew12:30 “Oyo ataba ninze aba muzigu wange n'oyo atasololeza ghalala ninze asansaania. 
Matthew12:31 Kale ni ka mbakobere: Abantu balisoniyibwa buli kibi ni mu nsambo yoonayoona evuma Katonda aye alivuma Mwoyo Mutukuvu talisoniyibwa. 
Matthew12:32 Era n'oyo alisala ku Mwana w'Omuntu ekibono alisoniyibwa aye oyo alyogera ekibi ku Mwoyo Mutukuvu, talisoniyibwa, idho ni lule." 
Matthew12:33 “Omuti mugwete mukalamu nga n'ekibala kyagwo kikalamu oba omuti mugwete mubi nga n'ekibala kyagwo kibi kuba omuti gumanhirwa ku kibala kyagwo. 
Matthew12:34 Imwe eizaire ery'emisota, musobola mutya okwogera ebikalamu nga muli babi! Ebiidhwire mu mwoyo, omunwa ti bye gwogera?" 
Matthew12:35 Omuntu omulungi, ku birungi by'abiika kw'atoola ebirungi, n'omuntu omubi, ku bibi by'abiika kw'atoola ebibi." 
Matthew12:36 “Aye ka mbakobere: ku lunaku olw'okusaliraku omusango abantu balyewozaaku ebyakalebule bye boogera. 
Matthew12:37 Ebibono byo n'ebirikuviiraku okusinga omusango, era ebibono byo n'ebirikuviiraku omusango okukusinga.”" 
Matthew12:38 Agho abandi ku Banamateeka n'Abafarisaayo baamwiramu nga bakoba bati: “Mwegeresa twenda otughe akamanhiso.” 
Matthew12:39 Aye Yesu yaabairamu yaabakoba ati: “Abantu ab'oluse luno aboonooni, abatatya Katonda, nga benda obumanhiso! Ate ng'ezira kamanhiso ke baja kugheebwa okutoolaku aka Yona omulanzi:" 
Matthew12:40 Nga Yona bwe yali munda y'ogwenhandha okumala enaku eisatu, omusana n'obwire, n'Omwana w'Omuntu atyo bw'aliba mu itaka munda enaku isatu, omusana n'obwire." 
Matthew12:41 Ab'e Nineve, mu kusalirwa omusango, balisituka baalumiriza abantu ab'oluse luno kuba beenenia Yona bwe yalangirira okwenenia ate nga ghano ghaligho n'asinga Yona." 
Matthew12:42 Kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba, mu kusalirwa omusango alisituka, yaalumiriza abantu b'oluse luno kuba yava etali kumpi yaidha okuwulirisa amagezi ga Solomoni. Aye ghano ghaligho asinga Solomoni." 
Matthew12:43 “Omuzimu omubi bwe guva mu muntu, guja nga gubita mu bifo ebikalukalu nga gwagala agh'okuba, gwaloba kuzuulagho." 
Matthew12:44 Agho nga gukoba guti, ‘Ka ndhireyo mu ndhu yange mwe nava.’ Era bwe gwira gujaagaana nga ndhereere, ndheye era nga etegekeibwa bukalamu." 
Matthew12:45 Agho ni nga guja guleeta giinaagwo egigusinga n'obubi, nga gingira nga giba omwo era olumaliira obulamu obw'omuntu oyo buba bubi okusinga obwasooka. Kityo bwe kiriba ku bantu ab'oluse luno aboonooni.”" 
Matthew12:46 Yesu yali akaayogera eri abantu, baganda be n'inhina baaba ku luya nga benda okwogera naye." 
Matthew12:47 Ghaabaagho omuntu yaamukoba ati: “Bona, inhoko ni baganda bo bali ku luya benda kwogera n'iwe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Yesu yairamu eyamukobera ati: “Naani mukaire wange era ni baani baganda bange?” 
Matthew12:49 Agho yaasonka ku Beegeresebwa ng'akoba ati: “Bano ni mukaire wange, ni baganda bange." 
Matthew12:50 Buli akola Lata wange ali mu igulu ky'ayenda, oyo ni muganda wange, ni mwanhinaze ni mukaire wange.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ku lunaku olwo Yesu yaafuluma mu ndhu yaaja yaatyama ku mbali okw'enhandha. 
Matthew13:2 Ebiyindi eby'abantu byesololeza gh'ali, era yaaniina bwa mu lyato yaatyama, eikuukuubira lyonalyona lyayemerera ku bukalu." 
Matthew13:3 Yaabakobera ebintu kamaala mu nfumo yaakoba ati: “Omusizi yafuluma okusiga ensigo. 
Matthew13:4 Bwe yali asiga, edhindi dhaagwa ku ngira enhonhi dhaidha dhaadhirya." 
Matthew13:5 Ate edhindi dhaagwa ku lubaalebaale okuzira itaka lingi, era mangu ago dhaamera kuba tidhaali na itaka lingi." 
Matthew13:6 Aye endhuba olwavaayo, ng'edho edhaali dhimeze dhiniala, era olw'obutaba na mizi nga dhikala." 
Matthew13:7 Edhindi dhaagwa mu mawa, amawa gaadhifundekeza." 
Matthew13:8 Ate edhindi dhaagwa mu itaka eirungi dhaayama, okundi kikumi, okundi nkaaga, okundi asatu." 
Matthew13:9 Ali n'amatu awulire.” 
Matthew13:10 Agho Abeegeresebwa baaseeta gh'ali, baamukoba bati: “Lwaki oyogera nabo mu nfumo?”" 
Matthew13:11 Yaabairamu ati: “Kuba imwe mwagheebwa okumanha ebyama eby'Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu, aye abo tibagheebwanga." 
Matthew13:12 Kuba aliku ni k'ali nako alyongerwaku yaaba na bingi. Aye azira, ni k'ali nako kalimutoolebwaku." 
Matthew13:13 Kale ni ndhogera nabo mu nfumo kuba babona aye tibabona, bawulira aye tibawulira waire okutegeera." 
Matthew13:14 Era abo batuukiriza Isaia kye yalanga ng'akoba ati, ‘Okuwulira muliwulira aye timulitegeera, era n'okubona mulibona aye timulitegeera;" 
Matthew13:15 kuba omwoyo ogw'abantu bano mukalangafu, amatu gaibwe gasembye, n'amaiso gaibwe bagazibye. Nkani bandiboine n'amaiso gaibwe, bandiwuliire n'amatu gaibwe, baategeera n'omwoyo, baakyukira ye ndi naabawonia.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Aye imwe mwesiimye, kuba amaiso gaimwe gabona n'amatu gaimwe gawulira." 
Matthew13:17 Bwenebwene mbakobera nti, abalanzi kamaala n'abantu abatuufu beegomba okubona bye mubona, aye tibaabibona era n'okuwulira bye muwulira aye tibaabiwulira." 
Matthew13:18 “Kale imwe muwulire olufumo luno olw'omusizi. 
Matthew13:19 Yeenayeena awulira ekibono eky'Obwakyabazinga n'atakitegeera, ali ng'oti n'ensigo eyagwa ku ngira omubi aidha yaswankula ekyo ekisigiibwa mu mwoyo gwe." 
Matthew13:20 Ensigo eyagwa ku lubaalebaale, n'oyo awulira ekibono, mangu ago yaakisangaalira n'eisanhu." 
Matthew13:21 Aye ng'azira mizi, era asigala atyo akaseera katono. Ebizibu oba okukirigibwa bwe bibaagho olw'ekibono, mangu ago ng'alekayo." 
Matthew13:22 Ensigo edhaagwa mu mawa, n'oyo awulira ekibono aye okweraliikirira eby'obulamu obw'ensi, n'okuguyibwa eby'obukombe bifundekeza ekibono kyaloba kwama naire." 
Matthew13:23 Ate ensigo edhaagwa mu itaka eirungi, n'oyo awulira ekibono yaakitegeera, yaayama ebibala: owekikumi, owenkaaga, n'owasatu.”" 
Matthew13:24 Kabiri yaabakobera olufumo olundi ng'akoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana ng'omuntu eyasiga ensigo enungi mu nimiro ye. 
Matthew13:25 Abantu bwe baali batendwike, omuzigu yaidha yaamansa ensigo edh'eisubi eibi mu ngaano, yeejiira." 
Matthew13:26 Ebisimbe bwe byakula ni bitaaku n'ebibala, ng'eisubi eibi lyona liboneka." 
Matthew13:27 Agho abagheereza ba mwenemu baaseeta gh'ali baamukoba bati, ‘Musengwa, mu nimiro yo tiwasigamu nsigo nungi? Memale lwaki mulimu eisubi eibi?’" 
Matthew13:28 Yaabakoba ati, ‘Omuzigu n'eyakola ekyo.’ Abagheereza baamukoba bati, ‘Buti oyenda tuje tuliighemu?’" 
Matthew13:29 Aye yaabakoba ati, ‘Busa, tomanha bwe muba mwigha eisubi ibi ni mwighiramu na ngaano." 
Matthew13:30 Muleke byombi bikulire ghalala okutuuka mu kukesa, era mu kukesa ndikoba abakesi baasooka okwighamu eisubi eibi, baalisiba ghalala mu binhwa baalyokya, ate engaano baagisololeza mu kyagi kyange.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Yaabakobera olufumo olundi ati: “Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana ng'oti n'akamuuma ka kaladaali, omuntu ke yatoola n'asiga mu nimiro ye." 
Matthew13:32 Waire nga n'akatonioli mu nsigo dhoonadhoona, bwe kamera kakula kaaba kabba okusinga ebimera ebindi kaafuuka muti, era enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhiidha dhaazimba ebisu mu nsaga dhaagwo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Yaabakobera olufumo olundi ati: “Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana ng'oti n'ekizimbulukusa, omukazi kye yatoola n'atabika mu biibo ebisatu eby'engaano, okutuusa byonabyona bwe byazimbuluka.”" 
Matthew13:34 Ebyo byonabyona Yesu yabikoberanga abantu mu nfumo, era ghazira kye yabakobera nga takozeisa lufumo." 
Matthew13:35 Kino ni kyatuukiriza omulanzi kye yakoba ati: “Ndyogeranga mu nfumo, ndyatula ebitaatulwanga okuva ku kwinhama okw'ensi.”" 
Matthew13:36 Agho Yesu yaasiibula abantu, yangira mu ndhu. Abeegeresebwa be baaseeta, baamukoba bati: “Twinhonhole olufumo olw'eisubi eibi ery'omu nimiro.”" 
Matthew13:37 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Asiga ensigo enungi n'Omwana w'Omuntu," 
Matthew13:38 enimiro n'ensi, ensigo enungi n'abaana ab'Obwakyabazinga, ate eisubi eibi n'abaana ab'omubi." 
Matthew13:39 Omuzigu asiga eisubi eibi ni Sitaani, okukesa n'enkomerero ey'ensi, abakesi ni bamalaika." 
Matthew13:40 Kale ni ng'eisubi eibi bwerisolozebwa ni lyokebwa mu muliro, kityo bwe kiriba ku nkomerero ey'ensi." 
Matthew13:41 Omwana w'Omuntu alituma bamalaika be baasunsula mu Bwakyabazinga bwe ebyo byonabyona ebireetera abantu okwonoona, era n'abakola ebibi" 
Matthew13:42 baabasuula mu nkoomi ey'omuliro, omuliba okugegenga n'okuluma emba olw'obulumi obubitirivu." 
Matthew13:43 Abo abatuufu balimesunkana oti ndhuba mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Iseibwe. Ali n'amatu awulire. 
Matthew13:44 “Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana n'eky'obukombe ekyagisibwa mu nimiro. Omuntu bw'akizuula akigisa, ate olw'eisanhu ly'aba nalyo, aja yaatunda ebibye byonabyona yaagula enimiro eyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Era Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana omusuubuze eyayagala amabaale ag'omughendo. 
Matthew13:46 Bwe yazuula eibaale eirala ery'omughendo einho, yaaja yaatunda ebibye byonabyona yaaligula." 
Matthew13:47 “Era Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana ng'akatimba akategebwa mu nhandha kaasoloza buli kika kya kyanhandha. 
Matthew13:48 Bwe kaidhula baakasika baakatuusa ku bukalu, baatyama, baalondamu ebirungi nga bata mu nsawo, ng'ebibi babisuula ere." 
Matthew13:49 Kityo bwe kiriba ku nkomerero ey'ensi: Bamalaika baliidha baayawula ababi mu balungi 
Matthew13:50 baabasuula mu nkoomi ey'omuliro omuliba okugegenga n'okuluma emba olw'obulumi obubitirivu. 
Matthew13:51 “Ebyo byonabyona mubitegeire?” Baamukoba bati: “Yii.” 
Matthew13:52 Yaabakoba ati: “Kale ni kiisi Munamateeka ayega mu by'Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu afaanana ng'oti n'omuntu mwenemu, atoola mu iterekero lye ebiyaaka n'ebikaire.”" 
Matthew13:53 Yesu bwe yamaliriza enfumo edho, yaava agho," 
Matthew13:54 yaatuuka mu kibuga eky'ewaibwe yaayegeresa mu sinagoga yaibwe, era baayasaamirira inho baakoba bati: “Ono amagezi agaaga agho agatoola gha, era aghanga atya okukola ebyewuunhio by'akola?" 
Matthew13:55 Ono ti n'omwana ow'omubaadhi? Inhina ti ni Maria? Ni baganda be ti ni Yakobo, ni Yosefu, ni Simoni, ni Yuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Baanhina boonaboona tibali kwaife? Memale ono ebyo byonabyona abitoola gha?” 
Matthew13:57 Kale baamuboola. Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Omulanzi azira ye batamutaamu kitiisa, okutoolaku mu kyalo eky'ewaibwe ni mu ndhu ey'ewaibwe.”" 
Matthew13:58 Era eyo tiyakolayo byewuunhio kamaala kuba tibaikiriza. 
Matthew14:1 Mu kiseera ekyo, Herode omufuzi wa Galilaaya yaawulira okwatiikirira kwa Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 era yaakoba abagheereza be ati: “Oyo ateekwa kuba nga ni Yoanne Omubatiza n'azuukiire mu bafu, kyava aghanga okukola ebyewuunhio ebyo.”" 
Matthew14:3 Herode oyo yali yagema Yoanne yaamuliidha, yaamuta mu ikomera olwa Herodia muka muganda we Filipo" 
Matthew14:4 kuba Yoanne yamukoba ati: “Ti kituufu iwe okumubayiza.” 
Matthew14:5 Aye waire yeegomba okumwita, yatya abantu abaali bamutwala nga mulanzi." 
Matthew14:6 Mperaano ku lunaku olw'amazaalibwa ga Herode, mughala wa Herodia yakina mu maiso g'abaaligho boonaboona, yaasangaaza Herode." 
Matthew14:7 Herode yaamusuubiza nga n'okwefuugha yeefuugha, okumugha kyonakyona ky'aghanga okusaba." 
Matthew14:8 Omughala nga yeeyambisa amagezi inhina ge yamugha, yaakoba ati: “Mpa ghano buti ku lusowaani omutwe gwa Yoanne Omubatiza.”" 
Matthew14:9 Kyabazinga yeidhusa, aye olw'okuba nga yali amaze okulayira mu maiso g'abo be yatyama nabo, yalagira bagumughe." 
Matthew14:10 Yaatuma mu ikomera, baatema ku Yoanne omutwe," 
Matthew14:11 baaguleetera ku lusowaani, baagugha omughala, omughala yaagutwalira inhina." 
Matthew14:12 Abeegeresebwa be baidha baatwala omulambo, baaguziika era baaja baakobera Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Yesu olwabiwulira yaava agho, yaagema eryato yaaja eyo yenka mu kifo ezira bantu. Aye abantu olwamanha, baava mu bibuga baamunonereza nga babita ku lukalu." 
Matthew14:14 Yesu bwe yava mu lyato yaabona olukunkumuli olw'abantu yaabagemerwa ekisa era yaawonia abalwaire baibwe. 
Matthew14:15 Obwire nga buli kuziba, Abeegeresebwa baaseeta gh'ali baamukoba bati: “Ekifo kino kiziramu bantu, ate n'obwire bujiire siibula abantu baje mu byalo baghange okwegulirayo ku kamere.”" 
Matthew14:16 Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ghazira kibatwala, imwe mubaghe balye.”" 
Matthew14:17 Aye baamukoba bati: “Tuzira kantu ghano okutoolaku emigaati etaanu n'ebyenhandha ebibiri.” 
Matthew14:18 Yaabakoba ati: “Mubindeetere ghano.” 
Matthew14:19 Bwe yamala okulagira abantu okutyama ku busubi, yaatoola emigaati etaanu n'ebyenhandha ebibiri, yaalinga ghaigulu, yaabigha enkabi nga yeebaza Katonda, yaamegulamegulamu emigaati, era yaagigha Abeegeresebwa be, era Abeegeresebwa be baagigabula abantu." 
Matthew14:20 Boonaboona baalya baiguta. Baasoloza ebitundu ebyafiikagho, ebiibo ikumi na bibiri ebiidhuvu." 
Matthew14:21 Abaalya baali abasaadha ng'oti enkumi itaanu (5,000), nga tobaze bakazi na baana." 
Matthew14:22 Era tibwalwa Yesu yaalagira Abeegeresebwa be okuniina mu lyato bamwembereremu basomokenga eruuyi ere, mwene nga bw'asiibula abantu." 
Matthew14:23 Bwe yamala okusiibula abantu yaaja okusaba yenka eyo ku lusozi. Eigulo lyatuuka ng'ali eyo yenka. 
Matthew14:24 Eryato mu kiseera ekyo lyali liri ghagati mu nhandha era ng'amayengo gali kulisunda inho olwa kiwunga eyalifuluma emberi. 
Matthew14:25 Nga buli kumpi okukya, Yesu yaidha ye bali ng'ali kutambulira ku maadhi." 
Matthew14:26 Aye Abeegeresebwa be olwamubona ng'ali kutambulira ku maadhi, baadhugumira era baakoba bati: “Muzimu!” Era baayana olw'okutya." 
Matthew14:27 Aye Yesu tiyalwa, yaayogera nabo, yaabakoba ati: “Mugume emyoyo mutatya, ninze.”" 
Matthew14:28 Agho Petero yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, oba niiwe lagira ndidhe y'oli nga ntambulira ku maadhi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Idha.” Agho Petero yaava mu lyato, ng'atambulira ku maadhi okuja eri Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Aye bwe yabona kiwunga yaadhugumira, era bwe yatoolera okudhugumira yaawowoigana ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa mponia!”" 
Matthew14:31 Era Yesu yaagolola mangu omukono yaamugema, era yaamukoba ati: “Okwikiriza kwo nga kutono! Lwaki obuusiizabuusiiza?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bwe baamala okuniina mu lyato nga kiwunga awoleera. 
Matthew14:33 Era abaali mu lyato baamusinza nga bakoba bati: “Bwenebwene, oli Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Matthew14:34 Bwe baasomoka, baatuuka mu kiketezo eky'e Gennesareti." 
Matthew14:35 Ab'eyo bwe baamumanha baatuma woonawoona mu nsi eyo baaleeta ye yali abalwaire boonaboona. 
Matthew14:36 Baamweghemba aganhe kasinga bageme bwa ku lusa olw'ekivaalo kye era boonaboona abaagemaku baawona. 
Matthew15:1 Agho Abafarisaayo n'Abanamateeka okuva e Yerusalemu baaseeta aghaali Yesu baakoba bati: 
Matthew15:2 “Lwaki Abeegeresebwa bo baloba okugema empisa dha badhaadha dhe baatulekera? Tibanaaba mu ngalo dhaibwe nga baja okulya omugaati.” 
Matthew15:3 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Lwaki imwe muloba okugema ekiragiro kya Katonda nga mwegemya empisa dha badhaadha baimwe? 
Matthew15:4 Ate nga Katonda yakoba ati, ‘Lata wo ni inhoko obatangamu ekitiisa,’ era ati, ‘Oyo avuma Ise oba inhina aitibwenga bwitibwe.’" 
Matthew15:5 Aye imwe mukoba muti, ‘Ole bw'akoba Ise oba inhina ati kye nandikughaire nakisengamu Katonda," 
Matthew15:6 aba takeetaaga kuta kitiisa mu Ise.’ Mu ngeri eyo ekibono kya Katonda mwakidibya olw'empisa ya badhaadha baimwe. 
Matthew15:7 Bakuusa imwe! Isaia bye yalanga ku imwe bituufu inho, bwe yakoba ati," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Abantu bano bantaamu ekitiisa mu bibono bubono, aye omwoyo gwaibwe gundi ghala." 
Matthew15:9 Bansinza mu nsinza eziramu, nga beegeresa endhegeresa abantu ye bataagho obute, n'eba ng'oti n'endhegeresa eyange.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Agho Yesu yaayeta abantu baseeta y'ali, yaabakoba ati: “Muwulirise era mutegeere:" 
Matthew15:11 ekingira mu kanwa ti n'ekireetera omuntu okuba omwonoonefu, aye ekiva mu kanwa n'ekimuleetera okuba omwonoonefu.”" 
Matthew15:12 Abeegeresebwa be baaseeta, baamukoba bati: “Oidhi nga Abafarisaayo basungughaire olw'ebibono byo?”" 
Matthew15:13 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Buli kisimbe ekitasimbwa Lata wange ow'omu igulu kiriighibwagho. 
Matthew15:14 Mubaleke abo abatulu abakulemberamu batulu banaibwe ate nga omutulu bw'akulemberamu mutulu mwine, bombi bagwa mu kiina.”" 
Matthew15:15 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Twinhonhole olufumo olwo!” 
Matthew15:16 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Olwo mwena mukaali kutegeera? 
Matthew15:17 Timubona nga buli ekingira mu kanwa kija mu nda, era mwe kiva ni kifuluma?" 
Matthew15:18 Aye ebintu ebiva mu kanwa biva ku mwoyo, era ebyo n'ebireetera omuntu okuba omwonoonefu" 
Matthew15:19 kuba ku mwoyo n'okuva ebidhuubo ebibi, obutemo, okwenda, okwemadula, obwibi, okughaayiriza, n'okuvuma Katonda." 
Matthew15:20 Bino n'ebireetera omuntu okuba omwonoonefu.” 
Matthew15:21 Yesu olwava agho yaaja mu biketezo eby'e Tiro ni Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Ghaabaagho omukazi Omukanaani eyava mu kiketezo ekyo, yaaseeta yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Musengwa, mwidhukulu wa Daudi, nkusaba ondhune. Mughala wange aliku omuzimu omubi gumutawaania.”" 
Matthew15:23 Aye Yesu yaaloba kumwiramu waire kibono. Abeegeresebwa be baaseeta baamweghemba nga bakoba bati: “Musiibule aje kuba ali kutunonereza bw'awowoigana.” 
Matthew15:24 Yesu yairamu ati: “Tyatumibwa ghandi okutoolaku eri entaama edhaabula edh'omu ndhu ya Isiraeli.” 
Matthew15:25 Aye omukazi yaidha bwidhe yaakuba amakiryaivu yaakoba ati: “Musengwa nhamba.” 
Matthew15:26 Aye Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Ti kikalamu okutoola emere ey'abaana waagisuulira obubwa.” 
Matthew15:27 Omukazi yaakoba ati: “N'agh'agho Musengwa aye n'obubwa bulya ku bukunkumuka obumagala okuva ku meeza dha beene bwo.” 
Matthew15:28 Agho Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mukazi iwe okwikiriza kwo kunene! Kikukolerwe nga bw'oyenda.” Era okuva ku saawa eyo omughala yaawona. 
Matthew15:29 Yesu yaava agho yaabita ku nhandha ey'e Galilaaya, yaaniina ku lusozi ghaigulu yaatyama eyo." 
Matthew15:30 Abantu kamaala baasombokera y'ali, nga baleese abalema, n'abatulu, n'abateesobola, ni bakasiru, n'abandi kamaala, baabata agho mu maiso ge, yaabawonia." 
Matthew15:31 Abantu beewuunhia inho okubona bakasiru nga boogera, n'abateesobola nga balamu, n'abalema nga batambula, n'abatulu nga babona. Agho baagha Katonda wa Isiraeli ekitiisa." 
Matthew15:32 Agho Yesu yaayeta Abeegeresebwa be, yaabakoba ati: “Abantu bano bangemya ekisa, kuba buti enaku isatu nga bali ninze, ate nga bazira ka kulya tyenda kubasiibula nga bayala, kuba baghanga okugwa ku ngira.”" 
Matthew15:33 Abeegeresebwa be baamukoba bati: “Memale ife tunaafuna gha mu irungu muno emigaati egimala okwigusa abantu abaaga agho?” 
Matthew15:34 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Muligho n'emigaati emeka?” Baakoba bati: “Musanvu, n'obwenhandha butonotono.”" 
Matthew15:35 Agho yaalagira abantu batyame ghansi," 
Matthew15:36 yaatoola emigaati omusanvu, n'obwenhandha, yeeyanza yaabimegulamu, yaagha Abeegeresebwa be, era Abeegeresebwa be baabigabula abantu." 
Matthew15:37 Boonaboona baalya baiguta, baasoloza ebitundu ebyafiikagho, ebiibo musanvu ebiidhuvu." 
Matthew15:38 Abaalya baali abasaadha enkumi ina (4,000) nga tobaze bakazi na baana." 
Matthew15:39 Agho Yesu yaasiibula abantu yaaniina mu lyato yaaja mu kiketezo eky'e Magadani. 
Matthew16:1 Agho Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo baaseeta aghaali Yesu, nga bamuleba, abaghe akamanhiso akava mu igulu." 
Matthew16:2 Aye Yesu yairamu yaabakoba ati: “Eigulo bwe bwerituuka, mukoba muti, ‘Obwire bunaaba bukalamu kuba eigulu limyuse’" 
Matthew16:3 ate mu nkyo eigulu bwe limyuka mukoba muti, ‘Gazigwire era gandiba amabi.’ Mwidhi emboneka ey'eigulu ky'etegeeza aye mwaloba okumanha obumanhiso obw'ebiseera bino?" 
Matthew16:4 Abantu ab'oluse luno aboonooni era abatatya Katonda benda akamanhiso! Ate nga akamanhiso tikaidha kubagheebwa, okutoolaku akamanhiso aka Yona.” Yaabavaaku yaaja." 
Matthew16:5 Abeegeresebwa bwe baasomoka enhandha beerabira okutwala emigaati. Yesu yaabakoba ati: 
Matthew16:6 “Mwekuume era mwegendereze ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo!” 
Matthew16:7 Aye baatoolera okwebuuzagania beene na beene nga bakoba bati: “Kuba tituleese migaati?” 
Matthew16:8 Yesu yaakimanha n'okubakoba ati: “Ye bano abali n'okwikiriza okutono! Lwaki mwogera ku ky'okubula emigaati? 
Matthew16:9 Mukaali kutegeera, naire okwidhukira emigaati etaanu gye mwagabula abantu enkumi eitaanu, n'ebiibo bye mwasoloza?" 
Matthew16:10 Waire emigaati omusanvu gye mwagabula enkumi eina, n'ebiibo bye mwasoloza?" 
Matthew16:11 Kale kitya bwe mutategeera nti bye mbakobye tibigema ku migaati? Aye mwegendereze ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo.” 
Matthew16:12 Agho ni baategeera bati takobye kwegendereza kizimbulukusa kya migaati, aye ebyegeresebwa Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo." 
Matthew16:13 Agho Yesu bwe yatuuka mu biketezo bya Kaisaria Filippi, yaabuuza Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Omwana w'Omuntu abantu bamweta batya?”" 
Matthew16:14 Baakoba bati: “Abandi bamweta Yoanne Omubatiza, abandi Eliya, ate abandi Yeremia, oba omulanzi ng'abalanzi abandi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Yaabakoba ati: “Aye imwe mundheta mutya?” 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Niiwe Kurisito Omwana wa Katonda omulamu.” 
Matthew16:17 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Simoni mutabane wa Yona, oli wa nkabi, kuba ti muntu buntu eyakubwikulira ekyo, aye Lata wange ow'omu igulu." 
Matthew16:18 Era zeena ka nkukobere, Petero, ‘Oli lubaale, era ku lubaale kuno, kwe ndizimba Ekikunsu kyange eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito n'emiryango egy'e magombe tigirikisobola naire." 
Matthew16:19 Ndikugha ebisumuluzo eby'Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu, era kyonakyona ky'olisiba ku nsi nga ni mu igulu kisibiibwa, ate kyonakyona ky'olisimulula ku nsi nga ni mu igulu kisimulwirwa.’ ”" 
Matthew16:20 Agho ni yaasikirira Abeegeresebwa obutakobera ku muntu yeenayeena bati ni Kurisito. 
Matthew16:21 Okuva ku olwo Yesu yaatoolera okulaga Abeegeresebwa be ati ali n'okuja e Yerusalemu, n'okudaazibwadaazibwa einho abakulu ab'ebika, Bakabona Abakulu, n'Abanamateeka, era bamwite, ate azuukire ku lunaku olwokusatu." 
Matthew16:22 Agho Petero yaamwiza gha mbali yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa tokoba otyo, Katonda agwana ayambe ebyo birobe kukutuukaku.”" 
Matthew16:23 Aye Yesu yaakyuka yaakoba Petero ati: “Nva mu maiso Sitaani, oli kitimuguunha mu ngira yange kuba ebya Katonda tobitegeera, otegeera bya bantu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Agho Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Oba nga ghaligho ayenda okuunonereza, alobe kwefaaku naire, abbeede omusalaba gwe annonereze" 
Matthew16:25 kuba buli ayenda okuwonia obulamu bwe abufiirwa aye oyo afiirwa obulamu bwe ku lwange alibufuna. 
Matthew16:26 Omuntu aganhulwamu ki okufuna ensi yoonayoona aye n'afiirwa obulamu bwe? Oba omuntu aghanga kughaayo ki okununula obulamu bwe? 
Matthew16:27 Omwana w'Omuntu aja kwidha mu kitiisa kya Ise, ni bamalaika be, era buli muntu amughe ekimugwana ng'ajiira ku bikolwa bye." 
Matthew16:28 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere ghaligho abandi ku beemereire ghano abataja kukomba ku kufa okutuusa nga baboine Omwana w'Omuntu ng'aidha nga Kyabazinga.” 
Matthew17:1 Nga ghabiseegho enaku mukaaga, Yesu yaagema ku Petero, Yakobo ni Yoanne muganda we, yaabakulemberamu baaja ku lusozi oluleeyi baaba eyo bonka." 
Matthew17:2 Agho yaafuuka obundi nga babona, amaiso ge gaayaka oti ndhuba, n'ebivaalo bye byayakaayakana oti musana." 
Matthew17:3 Okuja okulinga nga Musa n'Eliya baboneka nga bali kwogera ni Yesu. 
Matthew17:4 Agho Petero yaakoba Yesu ati: “Musengwa, tulongoire twaba ghano era bw'osiima ndidha kuseementa ghano entindi isatu: eyindi yiyo, eyindi ya Musa n'eyindi y'Eliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Yali akaayogera, ekireri ekimesunkana kyabakingiriza era eiroboozi lyava mu kireri lyakoba liti: “Ono ni mutabane wange omugonzi, aneesiimisa, mumuwulirenga.”" 
Matthew17:6 Abeegeresebwa olwawulira ekyo, baatya inho, era beeyala ghansi nga beefundiike." 
Matthew17:7 Aye Yesu yaaseeta yaabagemaku, yaakoba ati: “Musituke, muleke kutya.”" 
Matthew17:8 Bwe baalinga ghaigulu, ghazira wundi ye baabona okutoolaku Yesu yenka." 
Matthew17:9 Bwe baali baikirira ku lusozi Yesu yaabasikirira, yaakoba ati: “Ghatabaagho ye mukobera ku kye muboine okutuusa ng'Omwana w'Omuntu amaze okuzuukira mu bafu.”" 
Matthew17:10 Abeegeresebwa baamubuuza bati: “Lwaki Abanamateeka bakoba bati Eliya n'ow'okusooka okwidha?” 
Matthew17:11 Yaabairamu ati: “Kituufu Eliya n'ow'okusooka okwidha, era wa kutereeza byonabyona" 
Matthew17:12 aye ka mbakobere: Eliya yaidha ira, aye tibaamumanha era baamukola byonabyona nga bwe baasiima. Mu nsambo n'endala bwe baja okudaazadaaza n'Omwana w'Omuntu.”" 
Matthew17:13 Agho Abeegeresebwa baamanha nga mu bye yali abakoba, yali ayogera ku Yoanne Omubatiza." 
Matthew17:14 Bwe baatuuka mu lukunkumuli olw'abantu, ghaabaagho omuntu yaaseeta ye Yesu, yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bye." 
Matthew17:15 Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa, saasira mutabane wange, agwa ensimbu era adaagadaaga inho kuba emikuzi kamaala agwa mu muliro, ate n'olundi mu maadhi." 
Matthew17:16 Namuleeta y'Abeegeresebwa bo aye tibaaghanga kumuwonia.” 
Matthew17:17 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Yii, oluse luno oluzira kwikiriza, era olw'abantu abadankaanu! Ndituusa gha okuba n'imwe? Ndituusa gha okubaguminkiriza? Mumundeetere ghano.”" 
Matthew17:18 Yesu yaakaabukira omuzimu omubi gwamuvaaku, era omulenzi yaawona, mu saawa yeene eyo." 
Matthew17:19 Agho Abeegeresebwa baidha ye Yesu nga bali bonka baakoba bati: “Lwaki ife titwasobola kugubinga?” 
Matthew17:20 Yaabakoba ati: “Kuba muli n'okwikiriza kutono. Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: bwe muba n'okwikiriza okwaga akamuuma ka kaladaali, mulikoba olusozi luno muti, ‘Va ghano, ja ghale,’ lwaja, era ghazira kye mutalighanga kukola. [" 
Matthew17:21 Aye ogw'engeri eno tiguva ku muntu okutoolaku ng'obise mu kusaba n'okusiiba.]” 
Matthew17:22 Bwe baali mu Galilaaya Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Omwana w'Omuntu aja kugheebwayo mu mikono egy'abantu," 
Matthew17:23 era baidha kumwita ate ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukira.” Abeegeresebwa baanakughala inho. 
Matthew17:24 Agho baatuuka e Kaperinaumu. Abasoloza empooza ey'eisinzizo baaseeta ghe Petero baakoba bati: “Omwegeresa waimwe tagha mpooza ya isinzizo?” 
Matthew17:25 Yaakoba ati: “Agha.” Yesu yaamwesooka, yaakoba ati: “Simoni, olowooza otya? Bakyabazinga ab'ensi, empooza oba omusolo babitoola ku baani? Ku bataka oba ku basenze?”" 
Matthew17:26 Yaakoba ati: “Ku basenze.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ekikoba abataka ba idembe obutagha. 
Matthew17:27 Aye obutabanhiiza ja osuule eirobo mu nhandha, era ekyenhandha ky'onaagemya okusooka okitoole okyasamye omunwa. Oidha kwagaanamu empiiya ndala ogitoole ogibaghe, weesasulire era osasulire ninze.”" 
Matthew18:1 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo Abeegeresebwa baidha ye Yesu baamubuuza bati: “Naani asinga obubbede mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu?” 
Matthew18:2 Yesu yaayeta omwana omuto, yaamuta ghagati ghaibwe," 
Matthew18:3 yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere okutoolaku nga mukyuse mwaba ng'oti baana bato, timughanga naire kwingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa mu igulu." 
Matthew18:4 Kale buli eyeisa n'afaanana ng'omwana omuto, oyo n'asinga obubbede mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu." 
Matthew18:5 Ate buli asangaalira omuto oti n'ono mu liina lyange, aba asangaalira nze." 
Matthew18:6 “Aye aleetera omulala ku bato bano abandhikiriza okwona, oyo ekyandiwuze n'okusibibwa olubengo mu nkoto n'asuulibwa mu nhandha ghagati." 
Matthew18:7 Ensi ekagwireku olw'ebisendasenda abantu okwonoona! Kituufu ebisendasenda okwona tibiroba kubaagho, aye oyo abireeta akagwireku!" 
Matthew18:8 “Omukono gwo, oba ekigere kyo bwe kiba kikusendasenda okwona, kitemeku okisuule ghala omala gaba na mukono mulala oba kigere kirala, waafuna obulamu, otasuuliibwa mu muliro ogutazikira ng'oli n'emikono ebiri oba n'ebigere bibiri." 
Matthew18:9 Era, oba eriiso lyo likusendasenda okwona, litoolemu olisuule ghala omala gaba ow'eitulu, waafuna obulamu otasuuliibwa mu muliro gwa geyeena ng'oli n'amaiso abiri." 
Matthew18:10 “Mwegendereze, obutanhoomanga ni bw'aba omulala ku bato bano. Kuba ka mbakobere, mu igulu, bamalaika baibwe buliidho babona amaiso ga Lata wange ali mu igulu. [" 
Matthew18:11 Kuba Omwana w'Omuntu yaidha okuzaawula abazaaye.] 
Matthew18:12 “Imwe mukibona mutya? Omuntu bw'aba n'entaama dhe ekikumi, memale endala n'ebula, taleka kyenda na mwenda eyo ku nsozi, n'aja n'ayagala eyo ebuze?" 
Matthew18:13 Era bw'agizuula, bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Asagamba inho olw'eyo okusinga olwa dhire ekyenda n'omwenda edhitaabula." 
Matthew18:14 Atyo ni, ni Lata waimwe ali mu igulu tayenda waire mulala ku bato bano azikirire." 
Matthew18:15 “Muganda wo bw'akukola ekibi, ja omunenie nga muli bwa babiri mwenka. Bw'akuwulirisa, ng'olwo muganda wo oyo omuwoniiza." 
Matthew18:16 Aye bw'atakuwulirisa, otoola mwino mulala oba babiri waaja nabo: Buli kibono kyakakasibwa abadhulizi babiri oba basatu." 
Matthew18:17 Aye bw'aloba okuwulirisa abo, olwo ni ng'okobera Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito. Bw'aloba okuwulirisa n'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza, ng'olwo ni mumubisa ng'azira kwikiriza era ng'omughooza w'omusolo." 
Matthew18:18 “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Byonabyona bye munaasibanga ku nsi nga ni mu igulu bisibiibwa ate byonabyona bye munaasimululanga ku nsi nga ni mu igulu bisimulwirwa. 
Matthew18:19 “Era ka mbakobere: Ababiri ku imwe bwe baisania ku kintu kye basaba, Lata wange ali mu igulu alikibakolera" 
Matthew18:20 kuba ababiri oba abasatu ghe beesololeza mu liina lyange, zeena mbaagho agho ghagati waibwe.”" 
Matthew18:21 Agho Petero yaaseeta yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, muganda wange ng'ankoze ekibi nnaamusonighanga kutuusa li? Okutuusa ku mikuzi musanvu?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Tikukoba nti okutuuka ku mikuzi musanvu aye, okutuuka ku nsanvu emikuzi musanvu." 
Matthew18:23 Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu kyebuva bufaananizibwa ku kyabazinga eyayenda okugondhoola n'abagheereza be ebigema ku bintu bye, bye baali nabyo." 
Matthew18:24 Bwe yatoolera okutereeza embalirira ye, baamuleetera eyali n'eibandha lye lya mutwalo gwa talanta." 
Matthew18:25 Aye olw'okuba yali nga tasobola kulisasula, musengwa we n'okulagira bamutane, ni mukazi we, n'abaana, n'ebintu bye byonabyona bye yali nabyo, eibandha lisasulwe." 
Matthew18:26 “Agho omugheereza yaakuba amakiryaivu yaamweghemba ng'akoba ati, ‘Nguminkiriza, ndidha kukusasula byonabyona.’" 
Matthew18:27 Musengwa w'omugheereza oyo yaamugemerwa ekisa yaamuleka, era yaamusonigha n'eibandha." 
Matthew18:28 “Aye omugheereza oyo bwe yali afuluma yaayagaana mugheereza mwine ye yali abandha dinari kikumi. Yaamugema, yaamugwa mu mamiro nga bw'amukoba ati, ‘Nsasula eibandha lyange.’" 
Matthew18:29 Mugheereza mwine ono yaakuba amakiryaivu yaamweghemba ng'akoba ati, ‘Nguminkiriza ndidha kukusasula.’" 
Matthew18:30 Aye yaaloba, era yaaja yaamuta mu ikomera okutuusa ng'amusaswire eibandha." 
Matthew18:31 Bagheereza baine bwe baabona ebikoleibwa, baanakughala inho, era baaja baakobera musengwa waibwe byonabyona ebyabaagho." 
Matthew18:32 Agho musengwa we yaamweta, yaamukoba ati, ‘Mugheereza iwe omubi, nakusoniighe eibandha eryo lyonalyona kuba waneegayiriire" 
Matthew18:33 kale iwe weena obaire togwaniire kusaasira mugheereza mwino nga nze zeena bwe nakusaasiire?’ 
Matthew18:34 Musengwa yaanakughala inho, era yaamughaayo mu ikomera bamudaazedaaze, okutuusa ng'asaswire eibandha lyonalyona." 
Matthew18:35 Atyo ni, Lata wange ali mu igulu bw'alibakola, okutoolaku nga buli muntu asonigha muganda we mu mwoyo gwe.”" 
Matthew19:1 Mperaano Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaava e Galilaaya yaaja mu biketezo eby'e Buyudaaya, ng'osomoike Yorudani." 
Matthew19:2 Abantu lukunkumuli baamunonereza era yaabawoneza eyo. 
Matthew19:3 Agho Abafarisaayo baaseeta gh'ali, baamuleba nga bakoba bati: “Kiikirizibwa omusaadha okubinga mukazi we ng'amulanga ensonga yoonayoona?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Timusomangaku muti, ‘Okuviira irala mu mainhama, omutonzi yakola omusaadha n'omukazi?’" 
Matthew19:5 Yaabakoba ati, ‘N'olw'ensonga eyo kyova omuntu alekanga ise n'inhina yeeyimba ghalala ni mukazi we, ababiri baafuuka omuntu mulala’" 
Matthew19:6 nga tibakaali babiri, aye muntu mulala. Agho ni Katonda kye yayimba omuntu atakiyimbululanga.”" 
Matthew19:7 Baamukoba bati: “Memale lwaki Musa yalagira okukola embaluwa emubinga era n'okumusiibula?” 
Matthew19:8 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Musa yabaganha okubinga bakazi baimwe olw'okuba muli ba nkandya, aye nga okuva mu mainhama kityo ti bwe kyali." 
Matthew19:9 Aye ka mbakobere: Oyo yeenayeena abinga mukazi we, okutoolaku nga lwa bwenzi, memale n'abayiza owundi, oyo aba ayenze.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abeegeresebwa baamukoba bati: “Oba nga ensonga dhityo bwe dhiri ku musaadha ni ku mukazi we ekisinga n'obutabayiza.” 
Matthew19:11 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ti kiri nti abantu boonaboona baghanga okutegeera ekibono kino, okutoolaku abo be kyagheebwa." 
Matthew19:12 Kuba eriyo abatabayiza olw'okuba baazaalibwa nga tibaghanga kubayiza, yaabaayo abaafuulibwa okuba abatasobola kubayiza, ate yaabaayo abaasalagho beene obutabayiza olw'Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu. Kale oyo akitegeire, atyo akitegeere.”" 
Matthew19:13 Agho ghaabaagho abaamuleetera abaana abato, abagemeku nga bw'abasabira aye Abeegeresebwa be baabadhuuka." 
Matthew19:14 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Abaana mubaleke mutabalobera kwidha ye ndi, kuba abali ng'oti n'abo n'ababa mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu.”" 
Matthew19:15 Bwe yamala okubaisaaku emikono yaava agho.
