Matthew19:16 Agho ghaabaagho omuntu mulala yaidha ye Yesu yaakoba ati: “Mwegeresa, kirungi ki kye nteekwa okukola okughanga okufuna obulamu obutawaagho?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ombuuliza ki ku kirungi? Omulungi ali mulala. Aye oba nga oyenda okufuna obulamu obutawaagho, gema ebiragiro.”" 
Matthew19:18 Yaamukoba ati: “Ebiri gha?” Yesu yaakoba ati: “Toitanga, toyendanga, toibanga, otaghaayirizanga," 
Matthew19:19 lata wo n'inhoko obaghanga ekitiisa, era ogonzanga mwino nga bwe weegonza mwene.”" 
Matthew19:20 Omwisuka yaamukoba ati: “Bino byonabyona nabigema. Kiki kye nkaabulaku?” 
Matthew19:21 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oba ng'oyenda okuba atuukiriire, ja otane ebibyo, oghe abaavu, era oidhe onnonereze, obukombe oliba nabwo mu igulu.”" 
Matthew19:22 Aye omwisuka olwawulira ekyo, yaaja ng'afootookereire, kuba yali n'ebintu kamaala." 
Matthew19:23 Agho Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Kiriba kikalangufu omukombe okungira mu Bwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu. 
Matthew19:24 Era ka mbakobere: Kiba kyangu engamiya okubita mu mpami ey'empiso okusinga omukombe okutuuka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.” 
Matthew19:25 Abeegeresebwa olwawulira ekyo, beewuunhia ekibitiriire nga bakoba bati: “Memale olwo naani aghanga okulokolebwa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu yaabalingirira, yaabakoba ati: “Ku bw'omuntu kino tikisoboka, aye mu Katonda byonabyona bisoboka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Agho Petero yaamukoba ati: “Bona eno, ife twaleka byonabyona twakunonereza olwo ife tulifuna ki?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere mu kiseera eky'okwiza byonabyona obuyaaka, ng'Omwana w'Omuntu atyaime ku kityamo kye eky'ekitiisa, imwe abaanonereza mwena mulityama ku bityamo ikumi n'abiri mwafuga ebika eikumi n'ebibiri ebya Isiraeli." 
Matthew19:29 Era yeenayeena aleka enhumba, oba baganda be, oba baanhina, oba ise, oba inhina, oba abaana, oba ebibandha, ku lwange aliirizibwagho emikuzi kikumi, era yaafuna n'obulamu obutawaagho." 
Matthew19:30 Aye abantu kamaala ab'emberi abaliba ab'ensembo, n'ab'ensembo abaliba ab'emberi." 
Matthew20:1 “Kuba Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaanana ng'oti ni mwene ghaka eyawuuna okuta abakozi mu isamba lye ery'emizabbibu. 
Matthew20:2 Ng'amaze okwisania n'abakozi okubagha dinari ndala buli lunaku, yaabasindika mu isamba lye ery'emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:3 Yaafuluma ku saawa eyokusatu yaabona abandi nga beemereire agho mu kiya nga bazira kye bakola. 
Matthew20:4 Era abo yaabakoba ati: Mwena muje mu isamba lyange ery'emizabbibu, ndidha kubagha ekyo ekinaabagwanira.”" 
Matthew20:5 Era baaja. Kabiri yaafuluma ku saawa eyomukaaga, n'eyomwenda yaakola n'ekirala." 
Matthew20:6 Era ni ku saawa oti ikumi na ndala yaafuluma, yaayagaana abandi abeemereire, yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mwemereire ghano olunaku lwonalwona nga muzira kye mukola?”" 
Matthew20:7 Baamukoba bati: “Kuba ghazira atughaire kya kumukolera.” Yaabakoba ati: “Mwena muje mu isamba ery'emizabbibu.” 
Matthew20:8 Eigulo bwe bweryatuuka, mwene isamba ery'emizabbibu yaakoba omusaadha we akozesa abakozi ati: “Yeta abakozi obasasule enkemba ng'otoolera n'abasembyeyo okwidha, okutuuka ku basoose.”" 
Matthew20:9 Ab'esaawa eikumi nga n'endala baatuuka, baafuna dinari ndala buli muntu." 
Matthew20:10 Abaasooka bwe baatuuka baadhuuba nga baakufuna ekisingagho aye boona baafuna dinari ndala buli muntu. 
Matthew20:11 Olwagifuna beemuluguunhiza mwene ghaka bati: 
Matthew20:12 “Bano abasembyeyo okwidha bakoleire bwa saawa ndala, aye mbo waabaazayaza n'ife abakoze olunaku lwonalwona nga n'omusana gutumamula?”" 
Matthew20:13 “Aye mwene ghaka yaakobaku mulala ati, ‘Muna tikuseire. Titwaisainia n'iwe kukolera dinari ndala?" 
Matthew20:14 Gema ekikyo weejiire nze nhenze okugha ono asembyeyo okwidha ng'oti niiwe bwe nkughaire. 
Matthew20:15 Ghaligho ekindobera okukozesa ebyange nga bwe nhenda? Oba, nze okuba omulungi n'okuuninga ekimodi?’" 
Matthew20:16 “Kale ab'ensembo batyo bwe baliba ab'emberi ate n'ab'emberi baaba ab'ensembo.” 
Matthew20:17 Agho Yesu bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okuniinaniina e Yerusalemu, yaatoola Abeegeresebwa Eikumi n'Ababiri yaabaiza embali mu kyama, era mu ngira yaabakoba ati:" 
Matthew20:18 “Bona eno, buti tuli kuniinaniina e Yerusalemu, Omwana w'Omuntu aidha kugheebwayo mu Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka bamusalire ogw'okufa." 
Matthew20:19 Era balimughaayo mu bamaghanga agandi, baamukiina, baamukuba enkoba, baamukomerera ni ku musalaba aye ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukira.”" 
Matthew20:20 Agho inhina w'abaana ba Zebedaayo yaaseeta Yesu gh'ali, n'abaana be, yaakuba amakiryaivu yaabaaku ni ky'amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oyenda ki?” Yaamukoba ati: “Koba abaana bange bano bombi batyame, omulala ku mukono gwo omusaadha ate owundi ku mugooda, mu Bwakyabazinga bwo.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yesu yairamu ati: “Kye musaba timukiidhi. Mughanga okunhwa ku kikopo kye nja okunhwa?” Baamukoba bati: “Tughanga.” 
Matthew20:23 Yaabakoba ati: “N'agh'agho, ekikopo kyange mulikinhwaku, aye eky'okutyama ku mukono gwange omusaadha ni ku mugooda, kino ti kyange okukibagha, aye kirigheebwa abo Lata wange be yakitegekera.”" 
Matthew20:24 Abandi eikumi bwe baakiwulira, baasungughalira aboluganda bano ababiri." 
Matthew20:25 Agho Yesu yaabeeta y'ali, yaakoba ati: “Mwidhi ng'abafuzi abamaghanga agandi bagafuga, era n'abakulu baibwe baba n'obuyinza ku banaibwe." 
Matthew20:26 Kityo ti bwekiri mu imwe. Yeenayeena ayenda okuba omukulu mu imwe abe mugheereza waimwe," 
Matthew20:27 era buli ayenda kuba asooka mu imwe, abe mwiru waimwe." 
Matthew20:28 Ng'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'ataidha kugheerezebwa aye okugheereza, n'okughaayo obulamu bwe olw'okununula abantu kamaala.”" 
Matthew20:29 Baava e Yeriko, eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyamunonereza." 
Matthew20:30 Ghaabaagho abatulu babiri abaali batyaime embali ku luguudo, kale olwawulira bati Yesu ali kubita agho, baayasiikana nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa, mwidhukulu wa Daudi tusaasire!”" 
Matthew20:31 Abantu kamaala mu ikuukuubira baabadhuuka nga babakoba basirike aye abatulu baayongera bwa kwasiikana bati: “Musengwa, mwidhukulu wa Daudi, tusaasire!”" 
Matthew20:32 Agho Yesu yaayemerera, yaabeeta, yaakoba ati: “Mwenda mbakolere ki?”" 
Matthew20:33 Baamukoba bati: “Musengwa tuzibule amaiso.” 
Matthew20:34 Yesu ekisa kyamugema, yaabagema ku maiso era mangu ago baaghanga okubona era baamunonereza." 
Matthew21:1 Nga bali kumpi okutuuka e Yerusalemu, nga batuuse e Bethifage, nga ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, Yesu yaatuma Abeegeresebwa babiri." 
Matthew21:2 Yaabakoba ati: “Muje mu kyalo ekibali emberi olunaakingira muti nga mwagaana endogoyi ng'esibiibwa n'akaana kaayo mudhisibule mudhindeetere. 
Matthew21:3 Bwe ghabaagho ali ni ky'abakoba, mumukoba muti, ‘Musengwa n'ali kudhenda’ era aidha kudhigheereza mangu inho.”" 
Matthew21:4 Bino byali bityo okutuukiriza omulanzi bye yayogera ati: 
Matthew21:5 “Mukobe abantu b'e Sioni muti: Mubone, Kyabazinga waimwe ali kwidha ye muli. Muwombeefu era ali kwidhira ku ndogoyi, atyaime ku ndogoyi ento.”" 
Matthew21:6 Abeegeresebwa baaja baakola nga Yesu bwe yabakoba. 
Matthew21:7 Baaleeta endogoyi n'akaana kaayo, baadhaalaku ebivaalo byaibwe, Yesu yaatyamaku." 
Matthew21:8 Abantu kamaala mu ikuukuubira baayala ebivaalo byaibwe mu ngira, n'abandi baatema obusaga ku miti baabwala mu ngira." 
Matthew21:9 Eikuukuubira ery'abantu abaamukulemberamu n'abaamunonereza baaleekaana bati: “Hosanna mwidhukulu wa Daudi. Wa nkabi oyo aidha mu liina lya Musengwa, Hosanna mu igulu eyo.”" 
Matthew21:10 Bwe yangira mu Yerusalemu, ekibuga kyonakyona kyasaatira, eno nga bwe bakoba bati: “Naani oyo!”" 
Matthew21:11 Eikuukuubira lyakoba liti: “Ono ni Yesu omulanzi ow'e Nazarethi mu Galilaaya.” 
Matthew21:12 Agho Yesu yangira mu isinzizo lya Katonda, yaabingamu boonaboona abaali batundira n'abaali bagulira mu isinzizo. Yaafundika emeeza edh'abaali bafaana empiiya, n'ebityamo eby'abaali batunda enjiibwa." 
Matthew21:13 Era yaabakoba ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Endhu yange enaayetebwanga ndhu ya kusabiramu,’ aye imwe mugifiire mpuku ya banhazi!”" 
Matthew21:14 Abatulu n'abalema baaja ghe yali mu isinzizo, era yaabawonia." 
Matthew21:15 Aye Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka bwe baabona ebyewuunhisa bye yakola, ni babona n'abaana nga baleekaanira mu isinzizo bati: “Hosanna mwidhukulu wa Daudi,” baanakughala." 
Matthew21:16 Baamukoba bati: “Owulira abo kye bakoba?” Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Yii, imwe timusomangaku ekikoba kiti, ‘Mu minwa egy'abaghere n'abayonka mwe wafunira okusaaka okutuufu?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Agho yaabaleka yaava mu kibuga, yaaja e Bethania yaasula eyo." 
Matthew21:18 Ku nkyo Yesu bwe yali ali kwira mu kibuga, endhala yaamuluma." 
Matthew21:19 Yaabona omuti omutiini ku ngira, yaaja ghe guli, aye tiyayagaanaku kantu okutoolaku amakaba gonka. Yaagukoba ati: “Otaanianga ebyanda n'ebyanda!” Era omuti omutiini gwakaliragho." 
Matthew21:20 Abeegeresebwa olwakibona beewuunhia inho, baakoba bati: “Omuti omutiini gukaze gutya amangu gatyo?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, bwe muba n'okwikiriza, nga timubuusabuusa, timulikola ekyo ekikoleibwa ku mutiini kyonka, aye ni bwe mulikoba olusozi luno muti, ‘Va ghano weesuule mu nhandha,’ kityo bwe kiriba." 
Matthew21:22 Era byonabyona bye munaasabanga, nga muli n'okwikiriza, mwidha kubifunanga.”" 
Matthew21:23 Agho Yesu yaidha mu isinzizo, era bwe yali ayegeresa Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika baaseeta gh'ali baamukoba bati: “Buyinza ki obukukoza bino, era naani eyakugha obuyinza obwo?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Zeena ka mbabuuzeeyo ekibono kirala, bwe mundhiramu ekyo, zeena nga mbakobera obuyinza obunkoza ebyo." 
Matthew21:25 Okubatiza kwa Yoanne kwava gha? Kwava mu igulu oba mu bantu?” Agho beebuuzagania nga bakoba bati: “Bwe tukoba tuti, ‘Kwava mu igulu,’ aidha kutukoba ati, ‘Memale lwaki timwamwikiriza?’" 
Matthew21:26 Ate bwe tukoba tuti, ‘Kwava mu bantu,’ tuba twereeteire omutawaana ogw'abantu, kuba boonaboona bakiidhi nga Yoanne yali mulanzi mwene.”" 
Matthew21:27 Agho baakoba Yesu bati: “Titwidhi.” Agho yaakoba ati: “Zeena tiidha kubakobera buyinza bunkoza ebyo.” 
Matthew21:28 “Kale mudhuuba mutya ku kino? Ghaaligho omusaadha ng'ali n'abaana be babiri. Yaaja y'asooka yaamukoba ati, ‘Mwana wange, ja olwaleero okole mu isamba ery'emizabbibu.’" 
Matthew21:29 Omwana yaamwiramu ati, ‘Tiije.’ Aye olumaliira yeenenia yaaja." 
Matthew21:30 Omusaadha yaaja y'owokubiri yaamukoba n'ekirala. Oyo yairamu ati, ‘Isebo ndidha kuja.’ Aye tiyaja." 
Matthew21:31 Ku babiri abo naani eyakola lata we kye yayenda?” Baakoba bati: “N'eyasooka.” Agho ni, Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: abaghooza b'omusolo ni bamalaaya balibasooka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda" 
Matthew21:32 kuba Yoanne yaidha ye muli ng'agemye engira entuufu mwaloba kumwikiriza, aye abaghooza ni bamalaaya baamwikiriza. Aye imwe waire nga mwabona ekyo, era timwenenia ni mu mwikiriza." 
Matthew21:33 “Muwulire olufumo olundi. Ghaaligho omuntu mulala eyali n'eisamba lye ery'emizabbibu, yaalisitaku olukomera, yaasimamu ekikunhiro eky'omwenge gw'emizabbibu, yaazimbamu ekituuti ekireeyi, yaataamu abakozi, yaaja mu nsi eyindi." 
Matthew21:34 Ebiseera eby'okukungula bwe byatuuka yaatuma abagheereza be eri abakozi afune ebiva mu isamba lye. 
Matthew21:35 Aye abakozi baagema abagheereza be abo, omulala baamukuba, owundi baamwita, ate owundi baamukanhuugirira amabaale." 
Matthew21:36 Kabiri yaatuma abagheereza abandi abasingaku abaasooka aye era baabakola n'ekirala. 
Matthew21:37 Olumaliira yaabatumira omwana we, mule ng'akoba ati, ‘Omwana wange baidha kumutaamu ekinhagansi.’" 
Matthew21:38 Aye olwabona omwana, nga beekoba bati, ‘Ono n'omusika, mukole tumwite obusika bube bwaife.’" 
Matthew21:39 Agho baamugema, baamusindiikiriza ku luya okw'eisamba ery'emizabbibu, baamwita." 
Matthew21:40 “Kale mwene isamba bw'aliidha, alikola ki abakozi abo?”" 
Matthew21:41 Baamukoba bati: “Abakozi ababi abo, abatemo alibazikiriza bubi inho, era eisamba yaalitaamu abakozi abandi abalimugha ebibala mu biseera byabyo.”" 
Matthew21:42 Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Timusomangaku kino ekyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Eibaale abazimbi lye baaloba bati lizira mugaso, n'eryafuuka empango ey'omusingi mu nsonda. Ekyo Musengwa n'eyakikola, era okukibona tukyewuunhia.’" 
Matthew21:43 “Kale ni ka mbakobere: Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda bulibatoolebwaku bwagheebwa eighanga eryama ebibala byabwo. [ 
Matthew21:44 Yeenayeena agwa ku ibaale lino amenhekamenheka, aye eibaale lino ye ligwaku limumaniangula. ]”" 
Matthew21:45 Bakabona Abakulu n'Abafarisaayo bwe bawulira enfumo dhe, baakimanha nga beene be yali ayogeraku." 
Matthew21:46 Baagezaaku okumugema, aye baatya olukunkumuli olw'abantu abaali bamwidhi nga mulanzi." 
Matthew22:1 Agho kabiri Yesu yaayongera okubeegeresa mu nfumo, yaakoba ati:" 
Matthew22:2 “Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bufaananizibwa ng'oti ni kyabazinga eyategekera mutabane embaga ey'obufumbo. 
Matthew22:3 Yaatuma abagheereza be okuja okunona abaayetebwa ku mbaga, aye baaloba okwidha." 
Matthew22:4 Kabiri yaatuma abagheereza abandi yaabakoba ati, ‘Mukobe abaayetebwa muti, embaga etuuse, mmaze okwita ente endaagho n'ente entototo empiite, era mmaze okutegeka buli kintu baidhe ku mbaga.’" 
Matthew22:5 Aye era tibaafaayo beetambulira ku dhaibwe, omulala yaaja ku bya kibandha kye, owundi yaaja mu bya kutunda." 
Matthew22:6 Abaasigalagho baagema abagheereza baababisa bubi era baabaita. 
Matthew22:7 Kyabazinga yaanakughala, yaasindika amagye ge gaazikiriza abaisi abo era gaayokya n'ekibuga kyaibwe." 
Matthew22:8 Agho yaakoba abagheereza be ati, ‘Kituufu embaga ewoire okutegeka, aye ababaire beeteibwa ti n'abaali bagwaine." 
Matthew22:9 Kale ni muje eyo mu maagaanana, be munaayagaana boonaboona mubeete ku mbaga.’" 
Matthew22:10 Agho abagheereza baaja eyo mu maagaanana baasoloza buli ye baayagaana, abalungi n'ababi, era ekisenge eky'embaga kyaidhula abageni." 
Matthew22:11 “Agho kyabazinga bwe yangira okulamusa ku bageni yaayagaanamu omuntu atavaire kivaalo kya ku mbaga. 
Matthew22:12 Yaamukoba ati, ‘Muna, ongire otya muno ng'ozira kivaalo kya ku mbaga?’ Ole yaabuudhaala bubuudhaale." 
Matthew22:13 Agho kyabazinga yaakoba abagheereza ati, ‘Mumusibe amakono n'amagulu mumusuule ku luya mu kizikiiza eri okugegenga n'okuluma emba olw'obulumi obubitirivu.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Abantu kamaala abeetebwa, aye batono abalondebwa.”" 
Matthew22:15 Agho Abafarisaayo baaja beekobaana engeri ye baghanga okumuleba mu by'ayogera. 
Matthew22:16 Baamutumira abeegeresebwa baibwe, ni baine ba Herode, baakoba bati: “Mwegeresa twidhi oli wa mazima era oyegeresa mu mazima engira ya Katonda, ozira ye weeguya, kuba tojiira ku mboneka ya bantu." 
Matthew22:17 Kale tukobere, odhuuba otya? Kiikirizibwa okugha Kaisari omusolo oba bbe?”" 
Matthew22:18 Yesu bwe yamanha olukwe lwaibwe yaabakoba ati: “Bakuusa imwe, lwaki mundeba?" 
Matthew22:19 Mundage ku mpiiya dhe bagha omusolo.” Baamuleetera edinari. 
Matthew22:20 Yaabakoba ati: “Kino ekifaananie ni bino ebighandiiko ebiriku by'ani?” 
Matthew22:21 Baakoba bati: “Bya Kaisari.” Agho yaabakoba ati: “Kale ni ebya Kaisari mubiirize Kaisari n'ebya Katonda mubiirize Katonda.” 
Matthew22:22 Olwawulira ekyo beewuunhia inho, era baamuleka baaja." 
Matthew22:23 Ku lunaku lwene olwo, Abasaddukaayo, abakoba bati ezira kuzuukira, baaseeta aghaali Yesu, baamubuuza bati:" 
Matthew22:24 “Mwegeresa, Musa yakoba ati, ‘Omusaadha bw'afanga ng'azira mwana, muganda w'omufu atwalanga namwandu oyo yaafunira muganda we eizaire.’" 
Matthew22:25 Kale ni ghaaligho aboluganda musanvu ewaife eyo, omuberi yaabayiza, yaafa nga talese izaire, era omukazi yaamulekera muke we." 
Matthew22:26 Kyaba kityo ku wokubiri, ni ku wokusatu, okutuusa ku womusanvu." 
Matthew22:27 Olumaliira lwa boonaboona okufa, omukazi yeena yaafa." 
Matthew22:28 Kale ni ku lw'okuzuukira aliba muka ani ku abo omusanvu? Kuba boonaboona baamubayizaaku.” 
Matthew22:29 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mughaba inho olw'obutamanha Byaghandiikibwa, waire okumanha amaani ga Katonda" 
Matthew22:30 kuba ku lw'okuzuukira ezira kubayiza waire kubayira, aye baliba nga bamalaika mu igulu bwe bali." 
Matthew22:31 Aye ebigema ku kuzuukira okw'abafu, timusomangaku Katonda kye yabakoba, bwe yakoba ati:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ninze Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka, Katonda wa Yakobo?’ Ti Katonda wa bafu aye Katonda wa balamu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ebiyindi eby'abantu bwe baawulira ebyo baayasaamirira olw'endhegeresa ye. 
Matthew22:34 Abafarisaayo bwe baawulira bati Yesu asiriisa Abasaddukaayo, beesoloza." 
Matthew22:35 Era mulala ku abo, nga Munamateeka, yaamubuuza ng'amuleba ati:" 
Matthew22:36 “Mwegeresa kiragiro ki ekisinga mu Mateeka?” 
Matthew22:37 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “ ‘Ogonzanga Musengwa Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwo gwonagwona, n'okutegeera kwo kwonakwona.’" 
Matthew22:38 Kino n'ekiragiro ekisooka era ekisinga. 
Matthew22:39 Ekyokubiri kifaanana ng'oti n'ekyo: ‘Ogonzanga muntu mwino nga bwe weegonza mwene.’ 
Matthew22:40 Mu biragiro bino ebibiri n'omuva Amateeka goonagoona n'eby'abalanzi.” 
Matthew22:41 Agho Abafarisaayo bwe baali nga bakeesololeiza ghalala, Yesu yaababuuza" 
Matthew22:42 ati: “Mudhuuba mutya ku Kurisito? Mwana w'ani?” Baamukoba bati: “Wa Daudi.” 
Matthew22:43 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Memale lwaki Daudi ng'aidhuziibwa Mwoyo, amweta ‘Musengwa’ ng'akoba ati," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Musengwa yakoba Musengwa wange ati: Tyama ku mukono gwange omusaadha, okutuusa bwe ndita abazigu bo ghansi gh'ebigere byo’" 
Matthew22:45 Agho ni oba Daudi amweta ‘Musengwa’, kabiri aba atya mwidhukulu we?”" 
Matthew22:46 Tighaaba amwiramu kibono, era okuva ku olwo tighaaba akana kwongera kumubuuza." 
Matthew23:1 Agho Yesu yaayogera eri ebiyindi eby'abantu n'Abeegeresebwa be. 
Matthew23:2 Yaakoba ati: “Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo n'abatyama ku kityamo kya Musa. 
Matthew23:3 Kale byonabyona bye bakoba mubikole era mubigeme, aye mutakola bye bakola, kuba bye bakoba ti bye bakola." 
Matthew23:4 Basiba emigugu emizito, egiteetwikika baagitwika abantu, ate nga beene tibenda na kugigemaku." 
Matthew23:5 Era mu byonabyona bye bakola benda abantu bababone, kuba bagaziya fulakiteria dhaibwe, baaleeya amadhwenge ag'ebivaalo byaibwe." 
Matthew23:6 Bagonza okuba mu bifo eby'ekitiisa ku mbaga, era ni mu sinagoga bagonza ebifo ebisinga bukalamu" 
Matthew23:7 okulamusibwa mu biya, n'abantu okubeeta bati, ‘Mwegeresa.’" 
Matthew23:8 “Aye imwe batabeetanga bati, ‘Mwegeresa,’ kuba muli n'omwegeresa mulala ate mwenamwena muli baluganda." 
Matthew23:9 Era ku nsi kuno mutabanga na muntu ye mweta ‘Lata’, kuba Iseimwe ali mulala, ali mu igulu." 
Matthew23:10 Waire imwe okwetebwa abalanzi kuba omulanzi waimwe ali mulala, ni Kurisito." 
Matthew23:11 Asinga obukulu mu imwe ali n'okuba mugheereza waimwe. 
Matthew23:12 Oyo eyeetwala okuba owa ghaigulu aliisibwa ghansi, ate eyeisa ghansi alitwalibwa okuba owa ghaigulu." 
Matthew23:13 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo abakuusa imwe, kuba mwigaliragho abantu Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu kuba imwe beene timungira waire okuganha abenda okwingira.” [" 
Matthew23:14 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo, abakuusa imwe, mukaavuula eby'omu ndhu dha banamwandu, ate mwasaba esaala edhitakutuka nga mwenda okweraga. Kale ekibonerezo kyaimwe kikakali.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo, abakuusa imwe, kuba mubunia ebifo eby'oku nhandha ni ku bukalu, okufunayo omuntu omulala ye mukyusa ate bwe mumala okumufuna, mwamufuula agwanira geyeena emikuzi ebiri okubasinga." 
Matthew23:16 “Mukagwireku imwe, abakulembera abandi nga muli batulu. Mukoba muti, ‘Alayira mu liina ery'eisinzizo ekirayiro tikimusiba, aye alayira mu zaabu ow'eisinzizo asibwa ekirayiro kye.’" 
Matthew23:17 Muli basiru ate abatulu einho. Kiki ekisinga, zaabu oba eisinzizo eritukuza zaabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Era mukoba muti, ‘Ole bw'alayira mu alutaari, ekirayiro tikimusiba, aye yeenayeena alayira mu kirabo ekiri ku alutaari asibwa ekirayiro kye.’" 
Matthew23:19 Abatulu imwe, kiki ekisinga, ekirabo oba alutaari etukuza ekirabo ekyo?" 
Matthew23:20 Kale ni ole alayira alutaari, alayira mu alutaari n'ebyo byonabyona ebigiriku." 
Matthew23:21 Era n'oyo alayira mu isinzizo, alayira mu isinzizo ni mu Katonda oyo aba mu isinzizo eryo." 
Matthew23:22 Ate alayira mu igulu, alayira mu kityamo kya Katonda ni mu Katonda akityamaku." 
Matthew23:23 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo, abakuusa imwe, kuba mughaayo ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu ikumi eky'obuwoowo obuwoomesa eiva, nga buno: eduosimo, anetho, ni kumino. Aye mwaleka ebisinga obukulu ebiri mu Mateeka, bino: Okukolera banaimwe ebibagwaniire, ekisa, n'okwikiriza. Ebyo mugwaine okubikola ate ni bire obutabireka." 
Matthew23:24 Imwe abakulemberamu abandi nga muli batulu, musengeedha ensowera egwire mu maadhi ge muja okunhwa, aye ate mwamira engamiya enamba!" 
Matthew23:25 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo, abakuusa imwe, ebikopo n'esowaani mubinhiriza ku ngulu ate nga munda mwidhwire bukambuzi na bya mulyakubi." 
Matthew23:26 Mufarisaayo iwe omutulu, sooka onaaze munda mu kikopo, memale onhirize ni ku ngulu." 
Matthew23:27 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo, abakuusa imwe, kuba mufaanana ng'amagombe ge basiizeeku langi endheru obulungi, nga gaboneka bulungi ku ngulu, aye nga munda gaidhwire magumba ga bafu na buli kivundu kyonakyona." 
Matthew23:28 Mutyo mwena bwe muli: Ku ngulu mufaanana ng'abantu abatuukirivu, aye munda mwidhwire buguya na budheemu." 
Matthew23:29 “Mukagwireku Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo abakuusa imwe, kuba muzimba amagombe g'abalanzi, mwatimba ebiidhukizo eby'abatuukirivu," 
Matthew23:30 era mwakoba muti, ‘Nguli twaligho mu biseera bya badhaadha titwandyeyimbye nabo mu kuyugha musaayi gwa balanzi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Kale mutyo beene mwakakasa muti muli baana b'abo abaita abalanzi. 
Matthew23:32 Kale ni mumalirize badhaadha baimwe kye batoolera. 
Matthew23:33 “Imwe emisota, abaana ab'emisota egy'obusagwa! Muliwona mutya okusalirwa omusango gwa geyeena?" 
Matthew23:34 Kale ndidha kubatumira abalanzi, n'abasaadha abagezi n'abeegeresa abandi mulibaita, mwabakomerera ku misalaba, abandi mulibakuba enkoba mu sinagoga dhaimwe, era mwabakiriga mu buli kibuga." 
Matthew23:35 Agho ni mulibaaku omusango olw'omusaayi ogw'abatuufu ogwayuyibwa mu nsi, okuva ku musaayi gwa Abeli ataali na musango okutuuka ku musaayi gwa Zekaria omwana wa Berakia ye mwaitira ghagati gh'eisinzizo n'alutaari." 
Matthew23:36 Bwenebwene, ka mbakobere: Bino byonabyona biribaagho ku bantu ab'oluse luno." 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu iwe aita abalanzi, n'okuba abatumiibwa y'oli amabaale! Emikuzi emeka gye nayenda okusoloza abaana bo aghalala ng'enkoko bw'esoloza obwana bwayo mu maghagha, aye nga tonganha?" 
Matthew23:38 Kale ni endhu yaimwe yaakulekebwa agho ebe kifulukwa," 
Matthew23:39 kuba ka mbakobere: Timuliirayo kumbona okutuusa lwe mulikoba muti, ‘Wa nkabi oyo aidha mu liina lya Musengwa.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Agho Yesu bwe yava mu isinzizo, ng'agolola, Abeegeresebwa be baidha okumulaga enzimba ey'eisinzizo." 
Matthew24:2 Yaabakoba ati: “Ebyo byonabyona timuli kubibona? Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Ghano tighaliba ibaale lirisigala ku liinaalyo nga tirisuuliibwa ghansi.” 
Matthew24:3 Bwe yali ng'atyaime ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, Abeegeresebwa baidha y'ali mu kyama, baakoba bati: “Tukobere ebyo biribaagho li, era kiki ekiriba akamanhiso ak'okwidha kwo, n'okufundikira okw'ebyanda?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mwekuume, ghalobe kubaagho abaghabya." 
Matthew24:5 Abantu kamaala baliidha mu liina lyange nga beeyeta nze, Kurisito, era balighabya abantu kamaala." 
Matthew24:6 Muliwulira entalo ghano ni ghale, mwekuume, mutatabulwa ebyo biri n'okubaagho, aye ng'enkomerero ekaali." 
Matthew24:7 Eighanga lirirumba liinaalyo, n'obwakyabazinga bwalumba bwinaabwo. Ghalibaagho endhala ni musisi mu biketezo kamaala." 
Matthew24:8 Aye bino byonabyona, biriba oti bisa ebisooka eby'omukazi alumwa." 
Matthew24:9 “Mu biseera ebyo balibagema baabaghaayo okudaazibwadaazibwa, n'okwitibwa. Abamaghanga agandi boonaboona balibakyagha nga babalanga nze." 
Matthew24:10 Agho abantu kamaala baliterebuka, baaliidhaganamu enkwe, era baakyaghagana." 
Matthew24:11 Abalanzi abaguya kamaala baliboneka era balikyamya abantu kamaala. 
Matthew24:12 Olw'okuba obudheemu bulyeyongera, okugonza kw'abantu kamaala kuja kwiririra." 
Matthew24:13 Aye oyo alyekalangula okutuusa ku nkomerero, alirokoka." 
Matthew24:14 Era n'Amawulire Amalungi ag'Obwakyabazinga galirangirirwa mu nsi yoonayoona, ng'amazima ag'okudhulirwa amaghanga goonagoona agho ni ng'enkomerero etuuka." 
Matthew24:15 “Kale bwe mubonanga Ekyenhinhalwa Ekizikiriza, ekyayogerwaku Danieli omulanzi, nga kiri mu kifo ekitukuvu, asoma bino ategeere." 
Matthew24:16 Abo abaliba mu Buyudaaya balumukiranga mu nsozi. 
Matthew24:17 Oyo aliba ghaigulu ku ndhu ataikanga kutoola mu ndhu ye bibye. 
Matthew24:18 Era oyo aliba mu nimiro atakyukanga kwira inhuma kunona kivaalo kye. 
Matthew24:19 Abalinda n'abayonsa mu nnaku edho nga balidaagadaaga inho! 
Matthew24:20 Musabe, obwire bwaimwe obw'okulumukiramu bulobe kubaagho mu biseera bya kiinhogogo oba ku Sabbato" 
Matthew24:21 kuba ghalibaagho okudaagadaaga okw'amaani, nga tikubangaghooku kutyo okuva ku mainhama ag'ensi, okutuuka buti, era okutaja kubaagho kabiri." 
Matthew24:22 Nguli enaku edho tidhaakendeezebwaku, ghazira muntu yandiwonie. Aye ku lw'abalonde enaku edho dhirikendeezebwaku." 
Matthew24:23 “Agho ni bweghabaagho abakoba ati, ‘Bona, Kurisito wuuno’ oba ati, ‘Wuule.’ Mutaikirizanga" 
Matthew24:24 kuba ghaliidhagho abantu abeeyeta Kurisito n'abeeyeta abalanzi, era baakola obumanhiso obw'amaani n'ebyewuunhio, nga benda okuwubania n'abalonde, bwe kiba kisoboka." 
Matthew24:25 “Mwekuume mbakobeire nga bukaali. 
Matthew24:26 Kale ni, bwe bakoba bati, ‘Kurisito ali mu irungu,’ timujangayo oba bati, ‘Wuuno, ali mu kisenge,’ mutaikirizanga." 
Matthew24:27 Kuba ng'olukuba bwe lumyansa okuva ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba ni lutuuka ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, n'okwidha kw'Omwana w'Omuntu kutyo bwe kuliba." 
Matthew24:28 Aghaba omulambo ensega ghe dheesololeza. 
Matthew24:29 “Okudaagadaaga okw'enaku edho nga kwakawa, endhuba eriirugala, omwezi guliroba okwaka, emuunienie dhirimagalika okuva mu igulu, n'amaani ag'omu igulu galitengeesebwa." 
Matthew24:30 Agho akamanhiso ak'Omwana w'Omuntu kaliboneka mu igulu era abantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi balikuba empungu, nga babona Omwana w'Omuntu aidhira mu bire eby'omu igulu n'amaani, n'ekitiisa ekinene." 
Matthew24:31 Eigwala ery'amaani bwe lirifuuwa, alituma bamalaika be baasoloza abalonde be okuva mu mpewo eina, okuva eigulu ye liva okutuusa ye likoma." 
Matthew24:32 “Mwegere ku lufumo olw'omuti omutiini. Ensaga bwe dhiira obuto mumanha muti endoboozi eri kumpi. 
Matthew24:33 Kale imwe mwena bwe mubonanga ebintu bino byonabyona, mumanhanga muti ali kumpi, ku mulyango kwene." 
Matthew24:34 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: abantu ab'oluse luno baliba bakaali kuwaagho ng'ebintu bino byonabyona bibairegho. 
Matthew24:35 Eigulu n'ensi biriwaagho aye ebibono byange tibiriwaagho. 
Matthew24:36 “Aye ghazira aidhi lunaku olwo ni saawa, ni bwebaakaba bamalaika ab'omu igulu, waire Mwana, okutoolaku Lata yenka." 
Matthew24:37 Nga bwe kyali mu biseera bya Noa, ni mu kwidha kw'Omwana w'Omuntu bwe kiriba." 
Matthew24:38 Nga bwe kyali mu nnaku edho edhaakulembera amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo, abantu baali mu kulya na kunhwa, kubayiza na kubayira, okutuusa olunaku Noa lwe yangira mu lyato." 
Matthew24:39 Aye tibaamanha okutuusa amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo bwe gaidha ni gabasaaniagho. Kale atyo n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliidha. 
Matthew24:40 Agho abaliba ababiri mu nimiro, omulala alitwalibwa owundi yaalekebwa." 
Matthew24:41 Ababiri abaliba basa ku lubengo, omulala alitwalibwa owundi yaalekebwa." 
Matthew24:42 “Kale ni mumoge, kuba timwidhi kiseera Musengwa waimwe ky'alituukiramu." 
Matthew24:43 Mutegeere ni kino: Nguli mwenemu amanha bwire ki omwibi bw'anaatuukiramu, nguli akuuma yaaloba kuganha ndhu ye kusimibwa." 
Matthew24:44 Kale imwe mwena mwetegeke, kuba mu kiseera kye mutamusuubiriramu, Omwana w'Omuntu mw'alituukira." 
Matthew24:45 “Naani omugheereza omulungi era omugezi? Oyo musengwa we ye yalekera ab'omu maka ge okubaghanga emere yaibwe mu kiseera ekituufu? 
Matthew24:46 Wa nkabi omugheereza oyo Musengwa we bw'aira n'amwagaana ng'ali kukola atyo. 
Matthew24:47 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Aja kumusigira ebibye byonabyona. 
Matthew24:48 Aye omugheereza bw'aba mubi n'akoba mule mu mwoyo gwe ati Musengwa we taidha kwira mangu," 
Matthew24:49 era n'atoolera okukuba bagheereza baine, n'okulya n'okunhwa n'abatamiivu," 
Matthew24:50 Musengwa w'omugheereza aliidha mu kiseera ky'atamusuubiriramu, ku saawa gy'ataidhi." 
Matthew24:51 Musengwa we alimubonereza inho, yaamuta mu bakuusa omuli okugegenga n'okuluma emba olw'obulumi obubitirivu." 
Matthew25:1 “Agho ni, Obwakyabazinga obw'omu igulu bulifaanana ng'abaghala eikumi abaagema amataala gaibwe ni baja okusangaalira eyali abayiiza." 
Matthew25:2 Abataanu ku abo baali basiru, ate abataanu nga bagezi." 
Matthew25:3 Kuba abasiru baatwala amataala gaibwe, aye tibaatwala mafuta." 
Matthew25:4 Aye abagezi baatwala enthupa edh'amafuta ghalala n'amataala gaibwe. 
Matthew25:5 Abayiiza bwe yalwagho okutuuka, boonaboona baawongera era baatenduka." 
Matthew25:6 “Mu bwire ghagati ghabaagho aleekaana ati, ‘Abayiiza wuuno atuuse! Mwidhe mumusangaalire.’" 
Matthew25:7 Agho abaghala boonaboona baazuuka, baatereeza amataala gaibwe." 
Matthew25:8 Abasiru baakoba abagezi bati, ‘Mutughe ku mafuta gaimwe, kuba amataala gaife gali kuzikira.’" 
Matthew25:9 Aye abagezi baabakoba bati, ‘Gasobola obutatumala ife n'imwe ekisinga muje ye bagatunda mwegulireyo.’" 
Matthew25:10 Bwe baaja okugula amafuta abayiiza yaatuuka, era abo abaali beetegeike bangira naye ku mbaga, olwigi lwaigalwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Nga ghabiseegho entangama, abaghala bale abandi boona baidha, baakoba bati, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa twiguliregho.’" 
Matthew25:12 Aye yaabairamu ati, ‘Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, tibaidhi.’" 
Matthew25:13 “Agho ni, mumoge kuba timwidhi lunaku waire saawa." 
Matthew25:14 “Kuba kiriba oti n'omuntu eyali aja mu lugendo n'ayeta abagheereza be n'abagemya ebintu bye. 
Matthew25:15 Mulala yamugha talanta itaanu, owundi ibiri, n'owundi ndala, ng'ajiira ku busobozi bwaibwe, yaaja." 
Matthew25:16 Eyafuna talanta eitaanu yaja mangu ago yaadhisuubuza, yaazaazaamu talanta edhindi itaanu." 
Matthew25:17 N'eyafuna talanta eibiri yeena atyo, yaaja yaazaazaamu edhindi ibiri." 
Matthew25:18 Aye ole eyafuna endala, yaaja yaasima mu itaka, yaaziika omwo lupiiya ya musengwa we." 
Matthew25:19 “Nga ghabiseegho entangama, musengwa w'abagheereza abo yaira yaababuuza ebigema ku bibye." 
Matthew25:20 Eyafuna talanta eitaanu yaaseeta ni talanta edhindi itaanu yaakoba ati, ‘Musengwa, wampa talanta itaanu aye bona nazaazaamu talanta edhindi itaanu.’" 
Matthew25:21 Musengwa we yaamukoba ati, ‘Weekaza, omugheereza omulungi era omwesigwa obaire mwesigwa mu bitono, ndidha kukugemya ebingi ingira mu isanhu lya Musengwa wo.’" 
Matthew25:22 “N'oyo eyafuna talanta eibiri yaaseeta, yaakoba ati, ‘Musengwa, wampa talanta ibiri aye bona, nazaazaamu talanta edhindi ibiri.’" 
Matthew25:23 Musengwa we yaamukoba ati, ‘Weekaza, omugheereza omulungi era omwesigwa obaire mwesigwa mu bitono, ndidha kukugemya ebingi ingira mu isanhu lya musengwa wo.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Era n'oyo eyafuna talanta endala yaaseeta, yaakoba ati, ‘Musengwa, namanha ng'oli muntu mukalangufu, okungula by'otaasimba, ate waasololeza y'otaasigira." 
Matthew25:25 Kale, natya, talanta yo naaja naagigisa mu itaka gema, ebibyo biibyo.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Aye musengwa we yaamwiramu ng'akoba ati, ‘Mugheereza iwe omubi, era omugayaavu! Wamanha oti nkungula ye ntaasimba, oti era nsoloza ye ntaasigira." 
Matthew25:27 Agho ni, wali ogwaine okugha lupiiya yange abasuubuzi, era okwira nga nfuna kyange n'amagoba." 
Matthew25:28 Kale mumutooleku talanta eyo mugighe ole ali n'eikumi. 
Matthew25:29 Kuba buli aliku ni ky'ali nakyo alyongerwaku yaaba na bingi, aye azira, n'ekyo ky'ali nakyo kirimutoolebwaku." 
Matthew25:30 Era n'oyo omugheereza azira mugaso mumusuule ku luya mu kizikiiza. Eyo eriba okugegenga n'okuluma emba olw'obulumi obubitirivu.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliidha mu kitiisa kye eky'Obwakyabazinga ng'ali ni bamalaika boonaboona, alityama ku kityamo kye eky'ekitiisa." 
Matthew25:32 Amaghanga goonagoona galyesololeza mu maiso ge, era yaabaawulamu, ng'omwayi bw'ayawula entaama mu mbuzi," 
Matthew25:33 entaama yaadhiiza ku luuyi olw'omukono gwe omusaadha, ate embuzi yaadhiiza ku luuyi olw'omugooda." 
Matthew25:34 Agho Kyabazinga alikoba abo abaliba ku luuyi olw'omukono gwe omusaadha ati, ‘Mwidhe imwe Lata wange be yagha enkabi, mube mu Bwakyabazinga obwabategekerwa okuva ensi lwe yatondebwa." 
Matthew25:35 Kuba nali muyala mwampa eky'okulya endiwo yaanuma mwampa eky'okunhwa nali nga timundidhi mwansangaalira. 
Matthew25:36 Nali nga mbita madu mwampa eky'okuvaala, nali mulwaire mwangenza, naaba mu ikomera mwaidha mwambona.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Agho abatuufu balimwiramu bati, ‘Musengwa twakubona li ng'endhala ekuluma ni tukugha eky'okulya, oba nga endiwo ekuluma ni tukugha eky'okunhwa?" 
Matthew25:38 Twakubona li nga titukwidhi ni tukusangaalira oba ng'oli madu ni tukugha eky'okuvaala? 
Matthew25:39 Era twakubona li ng'oli mu ikomera ni twidha okukubona?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Agho Kyabazinga alibairamu ati, ‘Bwenebwene ka mbakobere buli kye mwakolera omulala ati ku baganda bange bano abato, mwakikolera nze.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Agho, alikoba abo abaliba ku mugooda ati, ‘Munve mu maiso imwe abalaame, muje mu muliro ogutazikira ogwategekerwa Sitaani ni bamalaika be!" 
Matthew25:42 Kuba nali ng'endhala enuma timwampa kya kulya, nali nfa endiwo, timwampa kya kunhwa." 
Matthew25:43 Bwe nali timanhiibwa ye muli timwansangaalira, bwe nali amadu timwampa kya kuvaala, bwe nali omulwaire, ni bwe nali mu ikomera ti mwaidha kumbona.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Agho boona baliiramu baakoba bati, ‘Musengwa, twakubona li ng'endhala ekuluma, oba ng'ofa endiwo, oba nga titukwidhi, oba ng'oli madu, oba ng'oli mugodhe, oba ng'oli mu ikomera ni tuloba okukulaadha?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Agho alibairamu ati, ‘Bwenebwene ka mbakobere buli lwe mutaalaadha omulala ku bato bano timwalaadha nze.’" 
Matthew25:46 Ng'olwo bano baja ku kibonerezo ekitawaagho, aye abatuufu nga baja mu bulamu obutawaagho.”" 
Matthew26:1 Agho olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo byonabyona yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati:" 
Matthew26:2 “Mwidhi ng'ebulayo enaku ibiri Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa kituuke, era Omwana w'Omuntu aidha kugheebwayo akomererwe ku musalaba.”" 
Matthew26:3 Agho Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika beesololeza mu kisaagaati kya Kayafa Omukulu wa Bakabona," 
Matthew26:4 baasala olukwe olw'okugema Yesu mu ngiso bamwite. 
Matthew26:5 Aye Bakabona baakoba bati: “Tutakikola ku lunaku lukulu, tomanha bantu bwe bakola keegugungo.”" 
Matthew26:6 Agho Yesu bwe yali e Bethania mu ndhu ya Simoni eyali n'endwaire ey'ebigenge," 
Matthew26:7 ng'ali ku kiiwulo alya, omukazi yaidha ng'ali n'akadoome ka alabasituro, nga kalimu omuzigo ogw'omughendo, yaagusiiga ku mutwe gwa Yesu!" 
Matthew26:8 Abeegeresebwa olwakibona baanakughala, baakoba bati: “Lwaki omuzigo ogwo gwonooneibwa?" 
Matthew26:9 Omuzigo ogwo gwandibaire gusobola okutanibwamu empiiya kamaala, dhaagheebwa abaavu.”" 
Matthew26:10 Aye Yesu yaakimanha, yaakoba ati: “Lwaki mutabula omukazi ono? Ekikolwa ky'ankoleire kikalamu" 
Matthew26:11 kuba abaavu muli nabo buliidho, aye nze timwidha kuba ninze buliidho." 
Matthew26:12 Era kino ky'akoze okunsiiga omuzigo ku mubiri kibaire kunziraga. 
Matthew26:13 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Buli Amawulire Amalungi gano ye galikoberwa, mu nsi yoonayoona, kino omukazi ky'akoze kyona kinaayogerwangaku okumwidhukira.”" 
Matthew26:14 Agho mulala ku ikumi n'Ababiri ayetebwa Yuda Isikarioti, yaaja eri Bakabona Abakulu," 
Matthew26:15 yaabakoba ati: “Munampaamu ki nze mmubagemye?” Baamugha ebitundu bya feeza amakumi asatu. 
Matthew26:16 Era okuva ku olwo yaanoonia bwa kaghagaanhia ka kumubagemya. 
Matthew26:17 Ku lunaku olusooka mu dh'emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, Abeegeresebwa baidha ye Yesu baakoba bati: “Gha y'oyenda tukutegekere, y'onaaliira Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yaakoba ati: “Muje ewa nankani mu kibuga, mumukobe muti Omwegeresa akobye ati, ‘Ekiseera kyange kituuse, ewuwo ye nnaaliira Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa n'Abeegeresebwa bange.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Abeegeresebwa baakola nga Yesu bwe yabakoba, baategeka Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
Matthew26:20 Eigulo bwe lyatuuka yaatyama ku kiiwulo ghalala n'Abeegeresebwa be eikumi n'ababiri. 
Matthew26:21 Bwe baali bali kulya yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, mulala ku imwe aidha kumpaayo.”" 
Matthew26:22 Abeegeresebwa baanakughala inho, era baatoolera okumukoba mulala mulala bati: “Musengwa, otakoba oti ninze?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Oyo akoza ninze mu kibya, oyo n'aidha okumpaayo." 
Matthew26:24 Kale Omwana w'Omuntu aja kufa nga bwe kyamughandiikibwaku, aye akagwireku oyo anaaghaayo Omwana w'Omuntu! Omuntu oyo kyandimubeereire kikalamu nguli tiyazaalibwa.”" 
Matthew26:25 Yuda, eyamulyamu olukwe, yaakoba ati: “Mwegeresa, otakoba oti ninze?” Yaamukoba ati: “Niiwe okyogeire.”" 
Matthew26:26 Bwe baali balya, Yesu yaatoola omugaati, yaagugha enkabi nga yeebaza, yaagumegulamegulamu, yaagha Abeegeresebwa yaakoba ati: “Mutoole, mulye guno mubiri gwange.”" 
Matthew26:27 Ate yaatoola ekikopo, yeeyanza, yaakibagha ng'akoba ati: “Munhwe kuno mwenamwena" 
Matthew26:28 kuba guno musaayi gwange, ogw'endagaano empyaka oguyuyibwa olw'abantu kamaala okusoniyibwa ebibi." 
Matthew26:29 Ka mbakobere: tiriirayo kunhwa ku kibala kino eky'omuzabbibu, okutuusa ku lunaku olwo lwe ndikinhwa n'imwe nga kiyaaka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Lata wange.”" 
Matthew26:30 Era bwe baamala okwemba olwembo baafuluma baaja ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva. 
Matthew26:31 Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Imwe mwenamwena, obwire bwaleero, mwidha kuneegaana kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Ndiita omwayi, n'entaama edh'omu kisibo dhaasansaana.’" 
Matthew26:32 Aye bwe ndimala okuzuukira ndibeesookayo e Galilaaya.” 
Matthew26:33 Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Waire abandi boonaboona banaakwegaana, nze tiidha kukwegaana naire.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka nkukobere obwire bwaleero bwene, enkoko enaaba ekaali kukolyoka, ng'oneegaaniire emikuzi esatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Ni bwe kiba nga kyetaagisa nze okufa n'iwe, tiidha kukwegaana naire.” Era n'Abeegeresebwa boonaboona baakoba batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Agho Yesu yaatuuka nabo mu kifo ekyetebwa Gethisemane, era yaakoba Abeegeresebwa ati: “Imwe mutyame ghano, nze njenga ere nsabe.”" 
Matthew26:37 Yaatoola Petero ni batabane ba Zebedaayo bombiriri yaaja nabo yaawulira enaku n'okweraliikirira. 
Matthew26:38 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Ndi n'enaku ku mwoyo eyenda kundhita. Imwe musigale ghano mumoge ghalala ninze.” 
Matthew26:39 Yeeyongerayooku katono, yaakuba amakiryaivu yaasaba ng'akoba ati: “Lata oba kisoboka mponia ekikopo kino, ti nga nze bwe nhenda, aye nga iwe bw'oyenda.”" 
Matthew26:40 Yaidha eri Abeegeresebwa, yaayagaana nga batendwike, agho yaakoba Petero ati: “Olwo imwe timughanze kumogaku ninze saawa ndala eti?" 
Matthew26:41 Mumoge era musabe mulobe kulebwa kuba omwoyo mumalirivu aye omubiri munafu.” 
Matthew26:42 Kabiri yaaja omukuzi ogwokubiri yaasaba ng'akoba ati: “Lata, oba nga ekikopo kino tikighanga kuntoolebwaku, okutoolaku nga nkinhweire, kikolebwe nga bw'oyenda.”" 
Matthew26:43 Yaira kabiri, yaabaagaana nga batendwike, kuba amaiso gaibwe gaali gazitoighe." 
Matthew26:44 Yaabaleka kabiri yaaja yaasaba omukuzi ogwokusatu, ng'ayogera ebibono n'ebirala ebyo." 
Matthew26:45 Agho yaaja eri Abeegeresebwa yaabakoba ati: “Imwe buti mutenduke era muwuumule. Biwoire. Esaawa etuuse, era Omwana w'Omuntu aja kugheebwayo mu mikono egy'aboonooni." 
Matthew26:46 Musituke, tuje, anampaayo ali kumpi.”" 
Matthew26:47 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayogera, Yuda, omulala ku Ikumi n'Ababiri yaatuuka n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu okuva eri Bakabona Abakulu, n'abakulu ab'ebika, nga bagemye empiima n'emiigo." 
Matthew26:48 Mperaano, eyamulyamu olukwe yabagha akamanhiso. Yali abakobye ati: “Ye nnaalamusa nga mmugwa mu kifuba nga n'oyo, mumugeme.”" 
Matthew26:49 Era mangu ago olwatuuka ghe Yesu ng'amukoba ati: “Ba miraala Mwegeresa!” Ng'amugwa mu kifuba. 
Matthew26:50 Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Muna kiki ekikuleese?” Agho, nga bale baseeta bamugema nga bamukalangula." 
Matthew26:51 Aye mulala ku abo abaali ni Yesu yaasowolayo empiima ye, yaatema omwiru w'Omukulu wa Bakabona yaamukutulaku kutu." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Empiima yo giize mu kiruutu kyayo kuba abo boonaboona abakozesa empiima, empiima n'eribazikiriza." 
Matthew26:53 Olowooza oti tisobola kusaba Lata wange n'ampeereza magye ga bamalaika gaswika ikumi n'abiri buti buti? 
Matthew26:54 Aye ng'olwo kabiri Ebyaghandiikibwa bituukirira bitya, ebikoba biti kiri n'okuba kityo?”" 
Matthew26:55 Mu saawa yeene eyo, Yesu yaakoba eikuukuubira ati: “Mwidhie okungema ng'abaja okugema omunhazi, mwaidha n'empiima n'emiigo? Buli lunaku natyamanga mu isinzizo naayegeresa, aye timwangema." 
Matthew26:56 Aye bino byonabyona bibairegho okutuukiriza ebyo ebyaghandiikibwa abalanzi.” Agho Abeegeresebwa boonaboona baamuleka baalumuka. 
Matthew26:57 Abo abaagema Yesu, baamutwala ewa Kayafa Omukulu wa Bakabona, eyeesolokeza Abanamateeka n'abakulu ab'ebika." 
Matthew26:58 Petero yaamunonereza ng'aleseeghooku akata, okutuukira irala mu kisaagaati eky'Omukulu wa Bakabona yangira yaatyama n'abakuumi, abone ebinairirira." 
Matthew26:59 Bakabona Abakulu, n'embuga yoonayoona, baanoonia obudhulizi obw'okusubaayiriza ku Yesu, kwe babe basinziire okumwita." 
Matthew26:60 Aye ti baabufuna naire, waire ng'abadhulizi kamaala abaguya baavaayo baamughaayira. Aye olumaliira babiri bavaayo," 
Matthew26:61 baakoba bati: “Ono yakoba ati asobola okumenha eisinzizo lya Katonda ate era mu nnaku isatu yaalizimba.” 
Matthew26:62 Omukulu wa Bakabona yaasituka, yaamukoba ati: “Bano bye bali kukuseegha, ozira ky'oiramu?”" 
Matthew26:63 Aye Yesu yaasirika busirike. Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona yaamukoba ati: “Mu ga Katonda omulamu, tukobere oba nga niiwe Kurisito Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Niiwe okyogeire. Aye ka mbakobere: okuva ni buti, mwidha kubona Omwana w'Omuntu ng'atyaime ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogw'ow'obukumu, era ng'aidhira mu bire eby'eigulu.”" 
Matthew26:65 Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona yaakendebula ebivaalo bye, era yaakoba ati: “Avumye Katonda! Tukaayenderaki abadhulizi? Mumaze okuwulira bw'avuma Katonda!" 
Matthew26:66 Imwe mukoba mutya?” Baamwiramu bati: “Agwaine afe.” 
Matthew26:67 Baamufuudha mu maiso, baamudaazadaaza inho, baamukuba empi," 
Matthew26:68 nga bwe bamukoba bati: “Kurisito, teeba, naani akukubye?”" 
Matthew26:69 Agho Petero bwe yali ng'atyaime agho ku luya mu kisaagaati, omughala yaaseeta gh'ali, yaakoba ati: “Iwe weena obaire ni Yesu Omugalilaaya.”" 
Matthew26:70 Aye yeegaana mu maiso ga boonaboona ati: “Tiidhi ky'okoba.” 
Matthew26:71 Bwe yali afuluma ku luya omughala owundi yaamubona era yaakoba abaali beemereire agho ati: “Ono abaire ni Yesu ow'e Nazarethi.” 
Matthew26:72 Kabiri era yeegaana nga n'okwefuugha kw'ataire, ati: “Nze oyo omusaadha timwidhi.”" 
Matthew26:73 Nga ghabiseegho akaseera katono, abaali beemereire agho baaseeta, baakoba Petero bati: “Bwenebwene oli munaibwe inho, kuba endhogera yo yeene ekuseegha.”" 
Matthew26:74 Agho yaatoolera okwefuugha era n'okulayira ati: “Nze omusaadha timwidhi.” Era mangu ago, enkoko yaakolyoka." 
Matthew26:75 Petero yaidhukira ekibono Yesu kye yali amukobye ati: “Enkoko enaaba ng'ekaali kukolyoka, oidha kuba ng'oneegaine emikuzi esatu.” Agho yaafuluma ku luya, yaalira inho." 
Matthew27:1 Obwire bwe bwakya, Bakabona Abakulu boonaboona n'abakulu ab'ebika baateesa ensambo ey'okwitamu Yesu." 
Matthew27:2 Agho baamusiba baamutwala era baamughaayo ew'omufuzi Pilato. 
Matthew27:3 Agho Yuda, eyamulyamu olukwe, bwe yabona nga bamusalire gwa kufa, yeenenia. Yaizaayo ebitundu bya feeza bire amakumi asatu ye Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika." 
Matthew27:4 Yaabakoba ati: “Nayona okughaayo omusaayi ogw'omuntu azira musango.” Aye baamukoba bati: “Ebyo bibyo ife tibitugemaaku.” 
Matthew27:5 Agho Yuda yaasuula ebitundu bya feeza bire mu isinzizo. Yaava agho, yaaja yeetuga." 
Matthew27:6 Aye Bakabona Abakulu baatoola ebitundu bya feeza ebyo bakoba bati: “Tikiikirizibwa kuta mpiiya dhino mu ndyanga ya isinzizo, kuba mpiiya dha musaayi.”" 
Matthew27:7 Agho ni baateesa, era baadhigulamu ekibandha eky'omuwumbi, nga n'omw'okuziikanga abatamanhiibwa." 
Matthew27:8 Kyova ekibandha ekyo kyetebwa ekibandha eky'omusaayi ni ye buli eno. 
Matthew27:9 Agho kyatuukirira Yeremia omulanzi kye yalanga ng'akoba ati: “Baatoola feeza emwamwa amakumi asatu, omughendo ogugula oyo, abandi ku bantu ba Isiraeli gwe baasalagho okumutunda," 
Matthew27:10 baagulamu ekibandha eky'omuwumbi, nga Musengwa bwe yankoba.”" 
Matthew27:11 Agho Yesu yaayemerera mu maiso ag'omufuzi, Pilato era Pilato yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya?” Yesu yaakoba ati: “Niiwe okyogeire.”" 
Matthew27:12 Aye Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika bwe baamuseegha azira kye yairamu. 
Matthew27:13 Agho Pilato n'okumukoba ati: “Towulira byaga agho bano bye bakuvunaana?” 
Matthew27:14 Yaaloba kumwiramu waire kibono kirala, era omufuzi oyo yeewuunhia ekibitiriire." 
Matthew27:15 Mperaano, buli ku lunaku olw'Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa, omufuzi oyo yali amanhiriire okulekulirayo abantu omusibe mulala ye baabanga nga basabye." 
Matthew27:16 Ku mukuzi guno ghaaligho omusibe eyali amanhiibwa einho, nga ni Barabba." 
Matthew27:17 Kale, bwe baali nga beesoloiza, Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Mwenda mbalekulire ani? Barabba oba Yesu ayetebwa Kurisito?”" 
Matthew27:18 Kuba yali aidhi nga baamughaayo lwa nsaalwa. 
Matthew27:19 Mperaano, Pilato bwe yali ng'atyaime ku kityamo kye eky'obulamuzi, mukazi we yaamutumira obukwenda nga bukoba buti: “Omuntu oyo azira musango otaba ni ky'omukola kuba ebintu by'oyo kamaala byandaaziiza mu kirooto.”" 
Matthew27:20 Aye Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika baapikiriza abantu basabe Barabba, aye Yesu aitibwe." 
Matthew27:21 Omufuzi oyo yairamu kabiri yaabuuza ati: “Ku babiri naani ye mwenda mbalekulire?” Baakoba bati: “Barabba.” 
Matthew27:22 Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Memale olwo Yesu ayetebwa Kurisito mmukole ki?” Boonaboona baakoba bati: “Mukomerere ku musalaba.” 
Matthew27:23 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki, yakola kibi ki?” Aye bale baakaalaama bukaalaame nga bakoba bati: “Akomererwe ku musalaba.”" 
Matthew27:24 Pilato bwe yabona nga byonabyona bya bwereere, okudhagalala nga n'okuligho, yaatoola amaadhi yaanaaba mu ngalo mu maiso ag'eikuukuubira ng'akoba ati: “Nze nzira musango ku kuyugha omusaayi ogw'omuntu ono niimwe beene abalibona.”" 
Matthew27:25 Abantu boonaboona baakoba bati: “Omusaayi gwe gube ku ife ni ku baana baife.” 
Matthew27:26 Agho Pilato yaabalekulira Barabba ate Yesu nga bamaze okumuwaiga enkoba, yaamubagemya bamukomerere ku musalaba." 
Matthew27:27 Agho abaisirukale ab'omufuzi oyo baatwala Yesu munda mu kisaagaati ekyetebwa Puraetorio, era eigye lyonalyona lyesololeza gh'ali." 
Matthew27:28 Baamutoolamu ebivaalo bye, baamuvaaza olugoye olw'ekitiibwa olwa kasaayisaayi." 
Matthew27:29 Baaluka engule ey'amawa baagimuta ku mutwe, baamugemya n'olugada mu mukono omusaadha. Agho ni baakuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ge baamukiina nga bakoba bati: “Ghangaala Kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya!”" 
Matthew27:30 Baamufuudhaku amatanta, baatoola olugada baamukonta mu mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Agho nga bamaze okumudaazadaaza, baamutoolamu olugoye olumyufu, baamuvaaza ebivaalo bye, baamutwala okumukomerera ku musalaba." 
Matthew27:32 Bwe baali bafuluma bati, baayagaana omusaadha Omukurenayo, ye baayetanga Simoni ono baamukaka okubbeeda omusalaba gwa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Baatuuka mu kifo ekyetebwa Gologotha, ekitegeeza ekifo eky'ekighanga." 
Matthew27:34 Agho baamugha omwenge ogw'emizabbibu okunhwa nga gutabwirwamu ekintu ekikaagha era bwe yakombaku yaaloba kugunhwa. 
Matthew27:35 Bwe bamala okumukomerera ku musalaba, baagabana ebivaalo bye nga babikubaku akalulu." 
Matthew27:36 Baatyama agho baamukuuma. 
Matthew27:37 Agho nga ghaigulu gh'omutwe gwe baataagho ensonga ye baamulanga ng'eghandiikiibwa eti: ONO NI YESU KYABAZINGA OW'ABAYUDAAYA. 
Matthew27:38 Baamukomerera n'abanhazi babiri omulala ku mukono omusaadha, ate owundi ku mugooda." 
Matthew27:39 Ababise baamuvuma bwe batengeesa emitwe gyaibwe," 
Matthew27:40 nga bakoba bati: “Iwe omenha eisinzizo, ate n'olizimba mu nnaku eisatu! Oba ng'oli Mwana wa Katonda weewonie, va ku musalaba oike.”" 
Matthew27:41 Era ni Bakabona Abakulu baakoba n'ekirala, baamukiina, aghalala n'Abanamateeka n'abakulu ab'ebika baakoba bati:" 
Matthew27:42 “Yawonianga abandi, mwene taghanga kwewonia! Mbu ni kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, mperaano aike ave ku musalaba, olwo tumwikirize." 
Matthew27:43 Yeesiga Katonda. Mperaano amuwonie, oba nga amwenda kuba yakobanga ati Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew27:44 Abanhazi be baamukomerera nabo boona batyo baamuduula. 
Matthew27:45 Mperaano, okuva ku saawa eyomukaaga enzikiiza yaagema ensi yoonayoona okutuuka ku saawa eyomwenda." 
Matthew27:46 Era nga ku saawa eyomwenda, Yesu yaaleekaana ati: “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani?” Ekitegeeza kiti: “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki ondekuliire agho?”" 
Matthew27:47 Abandi ku baali beemereire agho olwakiwulira baakoba bati: “Ali kweta Eliya!” 
Matthew27:48 Era mangu ago owundi yaalumuka yaatoola ekyangu yaakiinhika mu mwenge ogw'emizabbibu endoota, era yaakita ku lugada yaamugha anhwe." 
Matthew27:49 Aye abandi baakoba bati: “Leka tubone oba nga Eliya anaidha okumuwonia.” 
Matthew27:50 Yesu kabiri yaaleekaana mu iroboozi ery'amaani, era bwe yamala yaisa omuuka ogwasembayo." 
Matthew27:51 Agho olusuubo olw'omu isinzizo lwakanukamu ghabiri, okuva ghaigulu okutuuka ghansi ensi yeesuukunda, embaale dhaayatika." 
Matthew27:52 Amagombe gaiguka, era emibiri kamaala egy'abatuukirivu abaafa gyazuukizibwa," 
Matthew27:53 baava mu magombe. Era ng'amaze okuzuukira baaja mu kibuga ekitukuvu era abantu kamaala baababona. 
Matthew27:54 Agho omukulu w'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale n'abo abaali naye nga bakuuma Yesu bwe baabona musisi n'ebintu engeri ye byabaamu, baatya ekibitiriire, baakoba bati: “Bwenebwene, ono abaire Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Matthew27:55 Agho era ghaaligho abakazi kamaala, abaali bali kulengera nga baliku ghala, abaanonereza Yesu okuva e Galilaaya nga bamugheereza." 
Matthew27:56 Mu abo mwalimu Maria Magadalene ni Maria mukaire wa Yakobo ni Yosefu, ni mukaire wa batabane ba Zebedaayo." 
Matthew27:57 Eigulo bwe lyatuuka ghaidhagho omusaadha omukombe okuva mu Arimathea, eriina lye nga ni Yosefu, ate ng'era yali mwegeresebwa wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 Ono yaaja ye Pilato yaamusaba omulambo gwa Yesu. Pilato yaalagira bagumughe. 
Matthew27:59 Agho Yosefu yaatoola omulambo yaaguzinga mu lugoye olweru. 
Matthew27:60 Yaaguta mu magombe agage amayaaka, ge yali asimye mu lubaale. Agho yaagalangula ogubaale ogunene yaaguta mu mulyango ogw'amagombe, yaagolola." 
Matthew27:61 Maria Magadalene ni Maria ole owundi baali agho nga batyaime nga balingiriire amagombe. 
Matthew27:62 Ku lunaku olwairirira nga n'olunaku olwiririra okutegeka, Bakabona Abakulu n'Abafarisaayo baaja ewa Pilato." 
Matthew27:63 Baakoba bati: “Musengwa twidhukiire ng'omuguya oyo bwe yali ng'akaali mulamu yakoba ati, ‘Nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu ndizuukira.’" 
Matthew27:64 Kale ni lagira amagombe gakuumirwe irala okutuusa olunaku olwokusatu, tomanha Beegeresebwa bwe baidha ni bamwiba ate ni bakoba bantu bati, ‘Azuukire mu bafu.’ Era olwo obuguya obunairirira bwidha kuba bubi okusinga obwasooka.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Abakuumi muli nabo. Muje mukuume nga bwe mughanga.” 
Matthew27:66 Agho baaja baakalangula amagombe nga eibaale balitaaku akamanhiso, era baataagho n'abakuumi." 
Matthew28:1 Olwa Sabbato bwe lwabita memale mu nkyonkyo ku lunaku olusooka ku Sabbato, Maria Magadalene ni Maria ole owundi baaja okuluutaku y'amagombe." 
Matthew28:2 Ghaabaagho musisi ow'amaani kuba malaika wa Musengwa yaikirira okuva mu igulu, yaidha yaagalangula eibaale yaalitoolagho yaalityamaku." 
Matthew28:3 Yali afaanana ng'oti lukuba, n'ekivaalo kye nga kyeru oti mugozi." 
Matthew28:4 Abakuumi baamutya inho baadhugumira, baaba oti bafiire." 
Matthew28:5 Malaika yaakoba abakazi ati: “Mutatya, kuba ndidhi muli kwagala Yesu eyakomererwa ku musalaba." 
Matthew28:6 Muno aziramu kuba azuukire nga bwe yakoba. Mwidhe mubone ekifo ghe yabaire ateereibwa. 
Matthew28:7 Era mutezeeku muje mukobere Abeegeresebwa be muti, ‘Azuukire mu bafu, era abeesoosengayo e Galilaaya, eyo ye mulimubonera.’ Timwerabira bye mbakobeire.”" 
Matthew28:8 Baafuluma mangu mu magombe nga batya, ate n'eisanhu lingi baalumuka okukobera Abeegeresebwa be." 
Matthew28:9 Tibwalwa Yesu yaabaagaana yaabakoba ati: “Miraala!” Baaseeta baamugema ku bigere, baamusinza." 
Matthew28:10 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mutatya aye muje mukobere baganda bange, baje e Galilaaya eyo ye balimbonera.”" 
Matthew28:11 Bwe baali baja abandi ku bakuumi baidha mu kibuga baakobera Bakabona Abakulu byonabyona ebyaligho. 
Matthew28:12 Bakabona Abakulu beesoloza n'abakulu ab'ebika, beekobaana baagha abakuumi empiiya kamaala." 
Matthew28:13 Baabakoba bati: “Mukobere abantu muti, ‘Abeegeresebwa be baidha obwire baamwiba nga ife tutendwike.’" 
Matthew28:14 Era ekyo omufuzi bw'anaakiwulira, ife twidha kumwinhonhola tubawonie omusango.”" 
Matthew28:15 Baatwala empiiya baakola nga bwe baabakoba. Ekibono ekyo kyabuna mu Buyudaaya n'okutuusa buti. 
Matthew28:16 Agho, Abeegeresebwa eikumi n'omulala baaja e Galilaaya, ku lusozi Yesu lwe yali abakobye." 
Matthew28:17 Bwe baamubona, baamusinza aye abandi tibaakakasa." 
Matthew28:18 Yesu yaaseeta yaayogera nabo ati: “Nagheebwa obuyinza bwonabwona mu igulu ni mu nsi. 
Matthew28:19 Kale ni muje mu maghanga goonagoona, abantu mubafuule beegeresebwa, nga mubabatiza mu liina lya Lata n'erya Mwana, n'erya Mwoyo Mutukuvu" 
Matthew28:20 nga mubeegeresa okugema byonabyona bye nabalagira, era mwidhukire nga nze ndi n'imwe enaku dhoonadhoona okutuusa ku nkomerero ey'ensi.”" 
Mark1:1 Entandiika y'Amawulire Amalungi aga Yesu Kurisito Omwana wa Katonda. 
Mark1:2 Era nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa Isaia omulanzi kiti: “Bona, ndi kutuma omukwenda wange akukulembereremu akutegekere gh'onaabita.”" 
Mark1:3 Nti era eriyo n'eiroboozi ery'oyo alangirira mu irungu ati: “Mutegeke engira ya Musengwa, mutereeze gh'anaabita.”" 
Mark1:4 Ng'olwo ni Yoanne Omubatiza aboneka mu irungu ng'alangirira abantu beenenie, babatizibwe, memale basoniyibwe ebibi." 
Mark1:5 Abantu beesombanga okuva mu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya yoonayoona n'ab'omu Yerusalemu boonaboona baaja ye Yoanne, yaababatiza mu mwiga Yorudani, nga bwe baatula ebibi byaibwe." 
Mark1:6 Ekivaalo kya Yoanne kyali nga kya buviiri bwa ngamiya era nga yeesiba olukoba olw'oluwu mu nkende, era yalyanga nzige na mudheenene gwa mu nsiko." 
Mark1:7 Yayegeresa ati: “Oyo anandhiririra ansingira irala ghala obukumu era tigwanira na kukutama kusibulula busibiro bwa ngaito dhe. 
Mark1:8 Nze mbabatiza na maadhi, aye oyo alibatiza na Mwoyo Mutukuvu.”" 
Mark1:9 Agho Yesu yaidha ng'ava e Nazarethi eky'e Galilaaya, Yoanne yaamubatiza mu mwiga Yorudani." 
Mark1:10 Olwava mu maadhi ati yaabona eigulu nga liryebuka, agho ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaamwikaku ng'oti njiibwa." 
Mark1:11 Era n'eiroboozi lyawulikika okuva mu igulu nga likoba liti: “Niiwe mutabane wange omugonzi, nkwesiimiramu inho.”" 
Mark1:12 Tighaabita na ntangama, Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaamusindika mu irungu." 
Mark1:13 Eyo Yesu yaamalayo enaku amakumi ana (40), Sitaani yaamukema. Yaabanga ghalala n'ensolo edh'omu nsiko, aye bamalaika nga bamugheereza." 
Mark1:14 Agho Yoanne ng'amaze okugemwa, Yesu yaaja e Galilaaya yaalangirira Amawulire Amalungi agava ewa Katonda." 
Mark1:15 Era ng'akoba ati: “Obwire butuuse, Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda buseese, mwenenie era mwikirize Amawulire Amalungi.”" 
Mark1:16 Yesu bwe yali atambula ku mbali okw'enhandha ey'e Galilaaya, yaabona Simoni ni muganda we Anderea nga bali kutega obutimba mu nhandha kuba baali bavubi." 
Mark1:17 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Munnonereze ndidha kubafuula abavubi ab'abantu!” 
Mark1:18 Mangu ago baaleka obutimba bwaibwe baamunonereza. 
Mark1:19 Bwe yeeyongeraku emberi katono, yaabona Yakobo ni Yoanne, batabane ba Zebedaayo. Baali mu lyato nga batereeza obutimba bwaibwe." 
Mark1:20 Era boona mangu ago yaabeeta baaleka iseibwe Zebedaayo n'abakozi mu lyato, baanonereza Yesu." 
Mark1:21 Baatuuka e Kaperinaumu era Yesu tiyalwa, ku lwa Sabbato yangira mu sinagoga yaayegeresa." 
Mark1:22 Abantu baayasaamirira olw'endhegeresa ye, kuba yabeegeresa nga mwene buyinza, aye ti ng'Abanamateeka." 
Mark1:23 Tibwalwa ng'omuntu aliku omuzimu omubi aboneka mu sinagoga era yaayasiikana ati: 
Mark1:24 “Otwendeza ki iwe Yesu ow'e Nazarethi? Oidhie kutuzikiriza? Nkwidhi niiwe omutukuvu wa Katonda.” 
Mark1:25 Yesu yaakaabukira omuzimu ati: “Sirika, era omuntu ono muveeku.”" 
Mark1:26 Agho omuzimu gwamusikambula inho, gwamuvaaku nga gwana." 
Mark1:27 Abaaligho boonaboona beewuunhia era beebuuzagania beene na beene bati: “Kino naani eyali akiboine? Eno ndhegeresa ki empyaka ey'obuyinza? Ono alagira n'emizimu gyamuwulira!” 
Mark1:28 Era ebigema ku Yesu byasansaana mangu mu biketezo eby'e Galilaaya byonabyona. 
Mark1:29 Agho, Yesu aghalala ni Yakobo ni Yoanne baava mu sinagoga baaja mu ndhu ya Simoni n'Anderea." 
Mark1:30 Mukoirume wa Simoni yali mulwaire wa musuudha era ng'alambaire. Era Yesu olwatuuka ati nga bamukobera. 
Mark1:31 Yesu yaaja, yaamugema ku mukono, yaamusitusa. Era omusuudha gwawona yaabagheereza." 
Mark1:32 Endhuba bwe yagwa nga ni kanzimyenzimye agemye, baaleetanga gh'ali abalwaire aba buli nsambo nga n'abagemeibwa emizimu bali omwo." 
Mark1:33 Abantu ab'omu kibuga boonaboona beesololeza agho ku mulyango. 
Mark1:34 Yaawonia abantu kamaala abaali n'obulwaire obwa buli nsambo, emizimu kamaala yaagibinga ku be gyali gigemye, era nga tagiganha na kwogera, kuba gyali gimwidhi." 
Mark1:35 Enkyo Yesu yaawuuna be pwi pwi pwi nga n'endhuba ekaali kuvaayo, yaasituka yaaja mu kifo ezira bantu yaaba eyo ng'asaba." 
Mark1:36 Simoni, ni baine bwe baali, baaja nga bamwagala." 
Mark1:37 Era bwe baamuzuula baamukoba bati: “Abantu boonaboona bali kukwagala.” 
Mark1:38 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Tuje aghandi mu bibuga ebiriinaine ghano, yoona ndhegereseeyo abaayo kuba ekyo kye naidhirira.”" 
Mark1:39 Atyo ni, Yesu yaatambula mu Galilaaya mwonamwona ng'ayegeresa mu sinagoga dhaibwe era n'abaaliku emizimu ng'abawonia." 
Mark1:40 Ghaabaagho omuntu ow'endwaire ey'ebigenge, yaidha ye Yesu, yaakuba amakiryaivu era yaamweghemba ati: “Bw'oyenda oghanga okumponia.”" 
Mark1:41 Agho Yesu yaamugemerwa ekisa, yaagolola omukono yaamugemaku, yaamukoba ati: “Nhenda, wona!”" 
Mark1:42 Era mangu ago ng'endwaire ey'ebigenge eyo esaanagho, ng'awona." 
Mark1:43 Yesu yaamusikirira inho, yaamusiibula," 
Mark1:44 era yaamukoba ati: “Bona nga ghazira y'okoberaku, aye ja busimbalaala weeyandhule ewa kabona, ogheeyo ekirabo olw'okuwona kwo nga Musa bwe yalagira, memale boonaboona bakakase.”" 
Mark1:45 Aye, ono olwafuluma ng'atoolera kukobera buli ye yayagaananga, era atyo yaasansaania amawulire woonawoona. Era okuva ku olwo nga Yesu takaaghanga kungira mu kibuga mu lwatu, aye yaasigalira kubanga mu bifo eby'embali ezira bantu. Eyo, abantu okuva buli ghantu ye baamwagaananga." 
Mark2:1 Nga ghabiseegho enaku, Yesu yangira mu Kaperinaumu, era kyawulikika ng'aize eka." 
Mark2:2 Abantu kamaala beesoloza baidhula ni ku mulyango era Yesu ng'abakobera ekibono. 
Mark2:3 Agho ghaidhagho abaaleeta omugogomu nga bamusitwire bana. 
Mark2:4 Aye tibaaghanga kumutuusa aghaali Yesu olw'eikuukuubira ery'abantu. Baaghenha ekituli mu kasulya, gheene Yesu ghe yali, baisiza agho endiri omugogomu kwe yali alambaire." 
Mark2:5 Yesu bwe yabona okwikiriza kwaibwe, yaakoba omugogomu ati: “Mwana wange ebibi byo bisoniyiibwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Aye agho ghaali ghatyaimegho abandi ku Banamateeka, nga bali kwebuuza mule munda bati:" 
Mark2:7 “Ono lwaki ayogera atyo? Avuma Katonda! Ani aghanga okusonigha ebibi okutoolaku Katonda yenka!” 
Mark2:8 Mangu ago nga Yesu mule munda amaze okutegeera bye balowooza, yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mulowooza mutyo mu myoyo gyaimwe?" 
Mark2:9 Kiki ekisinga bwangu, okukoba omugogomu ono nti, ‘Ebibi byo bisoniyiibwa’, oba nti, ‘Situka ogeme endiri yo otambule’?" 
Mark2:10 Aye leka mumanhe muti, Omwana w'Omuntu ali n'obuyinza ku nsi obw'okusonigha ebibi!” Agho yaakoba omugogomu ati:" 
Mark2:11 “Iwe, situka, gema endiri yo oje eka!”" 
Mark2:12 Mangu ago yaasituka, yaagema endiri ye yaaja nga boonaboona balingiriire era boonaboona baayasaamirira era baagha Katonda ekitiisa nga bakoba bati: “Kino titukibonanga!”" 
Mark2:13 Agho Yesu kabiri yaaja ku nhandha, n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyonalyona lyaidha y'ali, era yaabeegeresa." 
Mark2:14 Era bwe yali ng'atambula yaabona Levi mutabane wa Alufaayo ng'atyaime agho ghe baawoolezanga omusolo yaamukoba ati: “Nnonereza!” Agho yeena yaasituka yaamunonereza. 
Mark2:15 Mperaano, Yesu bwe yali ng'atyaime mu nhumba ya Levi okulya, abaghooza b'omusolo kamaala n'aboonooni, boona baatyama okulya ni Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be, kuba kamaala ku baghooza ni ku boonooni baali batandiise okumunonereza." 
Mark2:16 Agho Abanamateeka ab'omu Bafarisaayo bwe baabona ng'alya n'aboonooni n'abaghooza, baakoba Abeegeresebwa be bati: “Lwaki alya n'abaghooza n'aboonooni, n'okunhwa n'anhwa nabo?”" 
Mark2:17 Yesu olwawulira ebyo, yaabakoba ati: “Abalamu ti n'abenda omuyigha, aye abalwaire kuba abatuufu ti be naidha okweta, aye aboonooni.”" 
Mark2:18 Mu kiseera ekyo abeegeresebwa ba Yoanne n'Abafarisaayo baali basiiba agho ni abantu n'okwidha eri Yesu baamukoba bati: “Abeegeresebwa ba Yoanne n'abeegeresebwa b'Abafarisaayo basiiba, aye lwaki ababo tibasiiba?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Abali ku mbaga basobola okusiiba ng'omugole akaali nabo? Entangama yoonayoona y'amala nabo tibasiiba. 
Mark2:20 Aye enaku dhiidha kutuuka omugole abatoolebweku, ng'olwo ni basiiba." 
Mark2:21 “Ezira atunga kighero kya lugoye luyaaka mu lugoye lukaire, kuba oluyaaka lukanula olukaire ekituli kyeyongera obunene." 
Mark2:22 Era ezira afuka mwenge ogw'emizabbibu musu mu nsawo dha luwu nkaire kuba ensawo dhikanuka n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu gwafukika. Omwenge omusu guli na kufukibwa mu nsawo dha luwu mpyaka.” 
Mark2:23 Olundi Yesu yaabita mu musiri ogw'engaano ku lwa Sabbato, era Abeegeresebwa be baatoolera okuja bwe banoga ku ngaano." 
Mark2:24 Agho Abafarisaayo n'okukoba Yesu bati: “Abeegeresebwa bo lwaki bakola ku Sabbato ekiroberwa mu Mateeka?” 
Mark2:25 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Timusomangaku ku Daudi kye yakola bwe yali mu kizibu ng'endhala emuluma, ye mwene ni be yali nabo," 
Mark2:26 bwe yangira mu nhumba ya Katonda, mu byanda bya Abiathari eyali Omukulu wa bakabona n'alya emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda, egyali nga tigiriibwa bantu bandi, okutoolaku bakabona bonka ate era n'aghaaku n'abo be yali nabo?”" 
Mark2:27 Yesu n'okukoba ati: “Sabbato yateebwagho lwa bulungi bwa muntu aye ti omuntu ku lw'obulungi bwa Sabbato. 
Mark2:28 Kyova ni, Sabbato eri mu buyinza bw'Omwana w'Omuntu.”" 
Mark3:1 Agho kabiri yangira mu sinagoga, era omwo mwalimu omuntu ow'omukono ogwaniala." 
Mark3:2 Abaaligho beekalirisa Yesu babone oba nga awonia omuntu oyo ku Sabbato, memale bamuseeghe." 
Mark3:3 Yesu yaakoba ole eyali n'omukono ogwaniala ati: 
Mark3:4 “Situka oyemerere ghagati.” Era yaakoba ati: “Kigwaine ku Sabbato okukola obulungi oba okukola obubi? Okuwonia obulamu oba okubuzikiriza?” Aye baasirika busirike. 
Mark3:5 Agho Yesu ng'asungughaire, yaabeezunguluza amaiso era nga n'okunakughala anakughaire olw'obukalangufu obw'emyoyo gyaibwe. Yaakoba ow'omukono ogwaniala ati: “Golola omukono.” Yaagugolola era gwawona!" 
Mark3:6 Olwava agho ng'Abafarisaayo mangu ago bagemagana ni baine ba Herode nga beekobaana ngeri ya kuzikirizaamu Yesu. 
Mark3:7 Yesu yaava agho n'Abeegeresebwa be, baaja ku nhandha. Eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyava mu Galilaaya ni mu Buyudaaya lyamunonereza." 
Mark3:8 Era n'abaava mu Yerusalemu, ni mu biketezo bya Idumea abaasomoka Yorudani, n'abaava mu biketezo eby'e Tiro n'e Sidoni, boonaboona bwe baawulira bye yali akola, abantu kamaala beesomba okuja y'ali." 
Mark3:9 Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be okutegekayo akaato okumpi, eikuukuubira lirobe okumunhigiriza." 
Mark3:10 Olw'okuba yawonianga ebirwaire ebya buli nsambo baamwenhigirizangaku baamugemaku. 
Mark3:11 N'emizimu bwe gyamubonanga nga gyeyala agho mu maiso ge gyayasiikana giti: “Niiwe Omwana wa Katonda!” 
Mark3:12 Aye yaagisikirira inho girobe kumulaalaisa. 
Mark3:13 Agho yaaniina mu nsozi yaayeta be yayenda, baaja y'ali." 
Mark3:14 Yaalondaku eikumi n'ababiri be yayeta Abatume, babenga naye abatume okwegeresa" 
Mark3:15 era babenga n'obukumu okubinga emizimu. 
Mark3:16 Ati ni bwe yalonda Eikumi n'Ababiri: Simoni ye yatuuma erya Petero," 
Mark3:17 Yakobo mutabane wa Zebedaayo ni Yoanne muganda we, be yatuuma eriina “Boanerigesi”, ekitegeeza, “Abaana ab'olukuba”," 
Mark3:18 ni Anderea, Filipo, Barutholomayo, Matayo, Thomasi ni Yakobo mutabane wa Alufaayo, Thaddaayo, Simoni Omukananayo," 
Mark3:19 ni Yuda Isikarioti eyamulyamu olukwe. 
Mark3:20 Agho yaira eka, abantu kamaala kabiri beesoloza, Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be nga tibakaaghanga waire kukomba ku kamere." 
Mark3:21 Ababe bwe baawulira, baaja okumugema baali bakoba bati: “Alalwike!”" 
Mark3:22 Abanamateeka abaali baviire e Yerusalemu baakoba bati: “Abandwa Beelezebulu, era emizimu agibinga ku buyinza bwa mukulu waagyo!”" 
Mark3:23 Agho yaabeeta era yaabakoba mu nfumo ati: “Sitaani aghanga atya okubinga Sitaani? 
Mark3:24 Era obwakyabazinga obweyawulamu tibusobola kubaagho. 
Mark3:25 N'abantu ab'endhu endala bwe beeyawulamu, endhu eyo nga tekaaligho." 
Mark3:26 Era, oba nga Sitaani yeeyawiiremu yeerwanisa mwene, taghanga kubaagho, enkomerero ye etuuse!" 
Mark3:27 “Ezira aghanga kwingira mu ndhu ya muntu wa maani okumunhaga ebibye, okutoolaku ng'asoose okusiba ow'amaani oyo memale yaanhaga eby'omu ndhu ye." 
Mark3:28 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Abantu balisoniyibwa ebibi byonabyona, n'ebivumo bye bavuma Katonda." 
Mark3:29 Aye, alivuma Mwoyo Mutukuvu, oyo talisoniyibwa ebyanda n'ebyanda, aliba n'ekibi ekitawaagho.”" 
Mark3:30 Yakoba atyo kuba baali bakoba bati aliku omuzimu omubi. 
Mark3:31 Agho baganda ba Yesu n'inhina baatuuka, baayemerera ku luya baamutumisa." 
Mark3:32 Abantu kamaala abaali batyaime nga bamwetooloire baamukoba bati: “Ng'okaayogera, baganda bo, baanhoko n'inhoko baabano ku luya bali kukwagala.”" 
Mark3:33 Yaabairamu ati: “Mukaire wange ni baganda bange ni baani?” 
Mark3:34 Era yeezunguluza amaiso abaali batyaime okumwezungulula yaabakoba ati: “Bano ni baganda bange, ni mukaire wange!" 
Mark3:35 Buli akola Katonda ky'ayenda, oyo ni muganda wange, ni mwanhinaze, ni mukaire wange.”" 
Mark4:1 Agho kabiri yainhama okwegeresa eyo ku nhandha. Abantu lukunkumuli beesololeza gh'ali, era yaaniina bwa mu lyato eryali mu nhandha yaatyama omwo, abantu boonaboona baasigala ku bukalu." 
Mark4:2 Yaabeegeresa ebintu kamaala mu nfumo era mu kubeegeresa yaabakoba ati: 
Mark4:3 “Muwulirise! Olwatuuka, omusizi yaafuluma okuja okusiga ensigo." 
Mark4:4 Bwe yali asiga, ensigo edhindi dhaagwa mu ngira, era enhonhi dhaidha dhaadhirya." 
Mark4:5 “Edhindi dhaagwa ku lubaalebaale aghaali eitaka eitonioli, era tidhaalwa dhaamera. Aye olw'eitaka okuba eitono," 
Mark4:6 tidhaaba na mizi, era endhuba olwavaayo ng'obusimbe buniala, nga bukala." 
Mark4:7 “Edhindi dhaagwa mu mawa, amawa gaaduuma gaadhifundekeza era edho tidhaabala." 
Mark4:8 “Edhindi dhaagwa ku itaka eirungi, dhaamera dhaakula, dheeyongera okwama ndala yaavaamu asatu, eyindi nkaaga n'eyindi kikumi!”" 
Mark4:9 Agho yaakoba ati: “Ali n'amatu agawulira awulire.” 
Mark4:10 Agho Yesu bwe yali embali yenka, abaali agho, n'Eikumi n'Ababiri baamubuuza ku nfumo." 
Mark4:11 Yaabakoba ati: “Imwe mwagheebwa okumanha ebyama eby'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, aye abandi ab'endha, buli kintu kibakoberwa mu nfumo:" 
Mark4:12 olwo babe, ng'okumoga bamoga aye nga tibabona, n'okuwulira baawulira aye nga tibategeera; kuba bandibaire bakyuka baasoniyibwa ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Mark4:13 Era yaabakoba ati: “Olufumo luno timulutegeire! Memale enfumo edhindi dhoonadhoona mulidhitegeera mutya? 
Mark4:14 “Omusizi asiga kibono. 
Mark4:15 Agho ni, abali ku ngira okusigibwa ekibono n'abo oluwulira ekibono, mangu ago Sitaani ng'aidha aswankula ekibasigiibwamu." 
Mark4:16 Era edho edhisigibwa mu itaka ery'oku lubaalebaale, n'abo abawulira ekibono baakitwala n'eisanhu." 
Mark4:17 Aye olw'okuba bazira mizi, ekibono bakisanhukira akaseera katono era ebizibu oba okukirigibwa bwe kwidha olw'ekibono, bawaamu mangu amaani." 
Mark4:18 “Edhindi edhaasigibwa mu mawa, n'abo abawulira ekibono" 
Mark4:19 aye olw'okweraliikirira eby'obulamu obw'oku nsi, okuguyibwa eby'obukombe, n'okwegomba kwonakwona okundi, bwe bibangiramu, bifundekeza ekibono, kyaloba kubala naire." 
Mark4:20 Ate edho edhaasigibwa mu itaka eirungi, n'abo abawulira ekibono baakiikiriza n'omwoyo mulala era kyayama, okundi asatu, okundi nkaaga, n'okundi kikumi.”" 
Mark4:21 Agho Yesu era yaakoba ati: “Eitaala balireeta kulifundikira mu kiibo, oba kulita mu kunkuliisi? Ti kulighanika ku kikondo kyalyo?" 
Mark4:22 Ghazira kikwekeibwa kitalikwekulwa, era ghazira kyama kitalimanhika mu lwatu!" 
Mark4:23 Ali n'amatu agawulira, awulire.”" 
Mark4:24 Ekindi, yaabakoba ati: “Mwegendereze bye muwulira, ekigero ky'ogerera abandi weena ky'oligererwa, ate n'okwongerwa kiryongerwaku;" 
Mark4:25 kuba ali nakyo aligheebwa ate ole azira, n'ako k'ali nako kalimutoolebwaku.”" 
Mark4:26 Era yaakoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda bufaanana ng'oti n'omuntu asiga ensigo mu itaka," 
Mark4:27 yaatenduka era yaazuuka, omusana n'obwire ensigo eyo yaamera yaakula nga taidhi." 
Mark4:28 Eitaka lyene n'erikuza ekimera ekyo okutuusa ku kwama ebibala. Ekimera ekyo kisooka kuleeta makaba, kyabeeka ebifaaganda ebito. Ate ebifaaganda ebyo byakula byabaamu empeke edhikuze obukalamu." 
Mark4:29 Era empeke edho olwenga dhiti ng'omuntu aja na muwolo kuwoobya, kuba okukungula kutuuse.”" 
Mark4:30 Agho yaakoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda tunaabufaanania ki? 
Mark4:31 Oba tunaabugeza ku ki? Buli ng'akamuuma ka kaladaali bwe kasimbibwa mu itaka, katonioli okusinga emuuma dhoonadhoona edhiri mu nsi." 
Mark4:32 Aye bwe kasimbibwa mu itaka kakula kaaleegha okusinga ebisimbe byonabyona, era kaleeta ensaga enene nga n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhisobola okuzimba ebisu mu kinsense kyako.”" 
Mark4:33 Era yaabakobera ekibono mu nfumo kamaala edhifaananaku n'edho, nga bwebaaghanganga okutegeera." 
Mark4:34 Tiyayogeranga nabo nga takozeisa lufumo aye bwe baasigalanga bonka ng'Abeegeresebwa be abainhonhola byonabyona. 
Mark4:35 Ku lunaku lwene olwo nga buli kuziba, Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Tusomoke tuje eruuyi ere.”" 
Mark4:36 Baaleka ekiyindi eky'abantu, baamutwala nga bwe yali mu lyato, n'amaato agandi gaaja naye." 
Mark4:37 Agho kiwunga ow'amaani yaatoolera era amayengo gaafukika mu lyato, kumpi kwidhula bwidhule." 
Mark4:38 Yesu yali atendwike mu kalumba ak'eryato nga yeeziziike akaito, baamuzuusa baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, tofaayo ng'obona tufa!”" 
Mark4:39 Yesu yaasituka yaakaabukira kiwunga, n'enhandha yaagikoba ati: “Sirika, laala!” Era kiwunga yaalekera, n'enhandha yaalaala inho." 
Mark4:40 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mutiire mutyo? Muzira kwikiriza?” 
Mark4:41 Baatya n'okutya kunene era buli muntu yaakoba mwine ati: “Ono oba muntu wa nsambo ki? Kiwunga n'enhandha bimuwulira!” 
Mark5:1 Agho Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be baasomoka enhandha baaja eruuyi ere mu kiketezo eky'e Gerasa. 
Mark5:2 Bwe yali ava mu lyato ati, mangu ago omuntu aliku omuzimu omubi yaidha gh'ali ng'ava mu lwambiidhi omwaziikibwanga abantu." 
Mark5:3 Yali asula mu lwambiidhi omwo, nga ghazira aghanga kumusiba waire na ndhegere." 
Mark5:4 Emikuzi kamaala yali asibibwa endhegere aye nga adhikutula bukutule, era nga ghazira amughanga." 
Mark5:5 Omusana n'obwire yabanga eyo mu lwambiidhi ni mu nsozi ng'ayasiikana bwe yeekulubula n'amabaale. 
Mark5:6 Olwalengera Yesu yaalumuka yaidha yaamusinza," 
Mark5:7 era yaayasiikana ati: “Yesu Omwana wa Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene onhendeza ki? Mu ga Katonda otandaazadaaza!” 
Mark5:8 Kuba Yesu yali akobye ati: “Iwe omuzimu omubi, va ku muntu ono!”" 
Mark5:9 Agho Yesu yaamubuuza ati: “Eriina lyo niiwe ani?” Yaamukoba ati: “Ninze Igye, kuba tuli kamaala.”" 
Mark5:10 Era yeeghemba inho Yesu alobe kubabinga mu nsi eyo. 
Mark5:11 Okumpi agho ku lusozi ghaaligho embiidhi edhaali dhiri kulya. 
Mark5:12 Agho emizimu n'okusaba Yesu giti: 
Mark5:13 “Tusindike mu mbiidhi omwo, tube omwo.” Yaagiganha, gyamuvaamu gyangira mu mbiidhi era ekighaso kyonakyona eky'embiidhi edhaali dhighera ng'enkumi eibiri (2,000) dhaalindimukira ku kiyiriro, dhaagwa mu nhandha dhaadimira." 
Mark5:14 Abaali bali kudhaaya baalumuka baaja baakobera ab'omu kibuga n'ab'omu byalo, era abantu baidha okubona ebibairegho." 
Mark5:15 Era baatuuka aghaali Yesu baalingirira omuntu eyaliku eigye eiramba ery'emizimu, ng'atyaime, avaire, era ng'ategeera bukalamu, baatya!" 
Mark5:16 Abo abaali baboine ebyaligho ku muntu eyaliku emizimu, ni ku mbiidhi, babaghayira nga bwe byali." 
Mark5:17 Agho ni baatoolera okweghemba Yesu ave mu kiketezo kyaibwe. 
Mark5:18 Yesu bwe yali ng'aniina mu lyato, ole eyaliku emizimu yaamusaba baje boona." 
Mark5:19 Yesu tiyaganha, aye yaamukoba ati: “Ja eka ye ab'ewaimwe obakobere Musengwa by'akukoleire n'ekisa ky'akulaze.”" 
Mark5:20 Yaaja era yaatoolera okukobera ab'omu kiketezo eky'e Dekapoli Yesu kye yamukolera, era boonaboona baayasaamirira." 
Mark5:21 Kabiri Yesu bwe yasomoka eruuyi ere, abantu kamaala inho beesololeza gh'ali, era ng'ali kumpi n'enhandha." 
Mark5:22 Agho mulala ku bakulu ba sinagoga, eriina lye nga ni Yairo, yaidha. Bwe yabona Yesu, yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bye," 
Mark5:23 yaamweghemba inho ati: “Mughala wange ali kumpi kufa, idha omugemeku awone, abe mulamu.”" 
Mark5:24 Agho Yesu yaaja naye, n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyamunonereza era baaja nga bamwenhigirizaaku." 
Mark5:25 Ghaaligho omukazi eyali alwaire ekikulukuto okumala emyaka ikumi n'ebiri. 
Mark5:26 Yaadaagira mu bayigha kamaala yaaghaayo ebibye byonabyona, aye yaabulayo amuwonia, yeeyongeranga bweyongere okuba obubi." 
Mark5:27 Bwe yawulira ku Yesu, yaidhira emugongo mu ikuukuubira yaagema ku kivaalo kye." 
Mark5:28 Kuba yakoba mule ati: “Nguli ngema kasinga ku kivaalo kye ndidha kuwona.” 
Mark5:29 Tibwalwa ng'omusaayi gulekera era ni mwene mule yaawulira ng'awonie ekirwaire. 
Mark5:30 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo Yesu yaamanha nga ghaligho amaani agamuviiremu, era n'okugaluka n'abuuza eikuukuubira ery'abantu ati: “Naani agemye ku bivaalo byange?”" 
Mark5:31 Abeegeresebwa be baamukoba bati: “Weena obona abantu bwe bali kukwenhigirizaaku aye era waabuuza akugemyeku?” 
Mark5:32 Aye Yesu yaamagamaga abone eyali akikoze. 
Mark5:33 Omukazi yaatya era yaadhugumira, ng'ategeire ekimukoleirwa. Yaidha yaakuba amakiryaivu agho mu maiso ga Yesu yaamukobera byonabyona nga bwe byali." 
Mark5:34 Agho Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mwana wange, okwikiriza kwo kukughaire obwibuka, ja bwera era sagaalukira irala.”" 
Mark5:35 Yali akaayogera, abaava ew'omukulu wa sinagoga baidha baakoba bati: “Mughala wo afiire! Omwegeresa okaamudaagiza ki?”" 
Mark5:36 Ekyo Yesu yaaba oti takiwuliire, yaakoba omukulu wa sinagoga ati: “Otatya, ikiriza bwikirize.”" 
Mark5:37 Tiyaganha muntu yeenayeena kumunonereza okutoolaku Petero ni Yakobo ni Yoanne muganda wa Yakobo. 
Mark5:38 Baatuuka mu ndhu ey'omukulu wa sinagoga baabona okuwowoigana okw'amaani, abali kugegenga n'abali kukuba empungu." 
Mark5:39 Yesu bwe yangira yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki muwowoigana era mwagegenga mutyo? Omwana tafiire, atendwike butenduke.”" 
Mark5:40 Baamusekerera, aye yaabafulumya ku luya yaasigaza ise w'omwana n'inhina ni bale abaali naye bangira aghaali omwana." 
Mark5:41 Agho yaagema omughala ku mukono yaamukoba ati: “Talitha Kumi”, ekitegeeza kiti: “Iwe omughala nkukoba situka.”" 
Mark5:42 Mangu ago omughala yaasituka yaatambula, kuba yali wa myaka ikumi n'ebiri. Era kino kyabeewuunhisa ekibitiriire." 
Mark5:43 Yesu yaabasikirira obutakobera muntu yeenayeena, era yaabakoba okufunira omughala eky'okulya." 
Mark6:1 Yesu yaava agho, yaaja ewaibwe, n'Abeegeresebwa be baamunonereza." 
Mark6:2 Olwa Sabbato bwe lwatuuka, yaatoolera okwegeresa, mu sinagoga. Abantu kamaala abaamuwulira beewuunhia baakoba bati: “Ono bino abitoola gha? Magezi ga kika ki agaamugheebwa, n'ebyewuunhio ebyaga agho n'asobola okubikola!" 
Mark6:3 Ono ti n'omubaadhi mutabane wa Maria? Ti muganda wa Yakobo, ni Yose, ni Yuda, ni Simoni? Baanhina tituli nabo kuno?” Kale baamuboola." 
Mark6:4 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Omulanzi azira ye batamutaamu kitiisa okutoolaku mu kyalo ky'ewaibwe, mu b'enda ye, ni mu b'endhu ye.”" 
Mark6:5 Eyo tiyaghanga kukolerayo kyewuunhio naire, okutoolaku yawonia abalwaire batonotono ng'abagemaku." 
Mark6:6 Era yeewuunhia inho obutaikiriza bwaibwe. Yaabitabita mu byalo ebiriinaine agho ng'ayegeresa. 
Mark6:7 Agho yaayeta Eikumi n'Ababiri era yatoolera okubatuma babiri babiri, yaabagha n'obuyinza ku mizimu emibi." 
Mark6:8 Yaabalagira obutatwala kintu kyonakyona mu lugendo lwaibwe, okutoolaku mwigo gwonka, aye tiikutwala mugaati, waire ndyanga, waire mpiiya mu nsibiro dhaibwe." 
Mark6:9 Yaabakoba bateemu engaito, aye batavaala bivaalo bibiri." 
Mark6:10 Era yaabakoba ati: “Buli ndhu ye mungirangamu, mubanga omwo okutuusa lwe muvaayo." 
Mark6:11 Ate mu kifo kyonakyona mwe batabasangaalira waire okubawulira, bwe mubanga mukivaamu mukunkumulanga enkungu eri mu bigere byaimwe, kabe akamanhiso okubalaga nti musango gwaibwe.”" 
Mark6:12 Kale baaja nga balangirira okwenenia. 
Mark6:13 Baabinga emizimu kamaala era baawonia abalwaire kamaala nga babasiiga omuzigo. 
Mark6:14 Agho Herode kyabazinga yaawulira ku Yesu, kuba eriina lye lyali limanhikaine inho era abandi nga bakoba bati: “Yoanne Omubatiza n'azuukiire mu bafu era kyava akola ebyewuunhio”." 
Mark6:15 Abandi baakoba bati: “Oyo Eliya.” Abandi baakoba bati: “Oyo mulanzi, ng'abalanzi abandi.”" 
Mark6:16 Herode olwakiwulira yaakoba ati: “Yoanne ye natemaku omutwe n'oyo azuukiire!” 
Mark6:17 Herode mwene oyo n'eyatuma bageme Yoanne, era yaamuta mu ikomera olwa Herodia ye yali asigwire ku muganda we Filipo" 
Mark6:18 kuba Yoanne yakobanga Herode ati: “Tikiikirizibwa iwe okusigula muka muganda wo.” 
Mark6:19 Olw'ekyo Herodia yeegemerera Yoanne nga yeeguguna na kumwita, aye yaaloba kusobola." 
Mark6:20 Herode yali atya Yoanne, ng'amwidhi bw'ali omuntu omutuufu era omutuukirivu n'okumukuumanga obukalamu. Yayagaananga obuzibu mu bye yayogeranga, aye ng'amuwulirisa bukalamu." 
Mark6:21 Aye olunaku lwatuuka, Herodia yaafuna akakisa. Lwali lunaku lwa mazaalibwa ga Herode. Era Herode oyo yaagabula abaami, n'abakulu ab'abaisirukale, n'abataka abakulu mu Galilaaya." 
Mark6:22 Ku mbaga eyo mughala wa Herodia bwe yangira n'akina, Herode n'abageni be basiima. Agho Herode yaakoba omughala ati: “Nsaba kyonakyona ky'oyenda ndidha kukikugha.”" 
Mark6:23 N'okwefuugha yeefuugha ati: “Kyonakyona ky'onansaba ndidha kukikugha, waire kukwawuliraku ku bwakyabazinga bwange.”" 
Mark6:24 Omughala yaafuluma yaakoba inhina ati: “Nsabe ki?” Mukaire we yaakoba ati: “Omutwe gwa Yoanne Omubatiza.” 
Mark6:25 Omughala yaayangughaku okwira eri Herode yaamukoba ati: “Nhenda butibuti, ompe ku lusowaani omutwe gwa Yoanne Omubatiza.”" 
Mark6:26 Kino Herode kyamukosa inho, aye olw'okuba yali yeefuuye ate n'olw'abageni be, yali tasobola kuloba." 
Mark6:27 Kale mangu ago, yaalagira omwisirukale aje aleete omutwe gwa Yoanne. Era omwisirukale yaaja mu ikomera yaatema ku Yoanne omutwe." 
Mark6:28 Yaaleeta omutwe nga guli ku lusowaani yaagugha omughala, ate omughala yaagugha inhina." 
Mark6:29 Abeegeresebwa be bwe baawulira baaja, baatwala omulambo baaguziika mu magombe." 
Mark6:30 Abatume bwe baira aghaali Yesu baamukobera byonabyona bye baakola ni bye baayegeresa.
