Mark6:31 Yaabakoba ati: “Mwidheku embali ezira bantu, ye munaaghanga okuba mwenka mughegheereku katono.” Kuba abantu kamaala baidhanga bwe baja, baabula obugheereso nga tibaghanga na kulya." 
Mark6:32 Agho baaniina mu lyato baaja bonka mu kifo omuzira bantu. 
Mark6:33 Abantu kamaala baababona nga baja era baabamanha. Kale abantu okuva mu bibuga byonabyona baalumuka ku bigere baabeesookayo. 
Mark6:34 Yesu bwe yali atuuka ku bukalu ati yaabona eikuukuubira ery'abantu, yaabasaasira, kuba baali oti n'entaama edhiziraku mwayi. Agho yaatoolera okubeegeresa ebintu kamaala." 
Mark6:35 Ebiseera bwebyaja nga biseenena, Abeegeresebwa be baidha baamutuukirira baamukoba bati: “Kino ekifo timuba bantu ate n'obwire bujiire" 
Mark6:36 siibula abantu baje mu biya okumpimpi ni mu byalo beegulireyo kye banaalya.” 
Mark6:37 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Imwe mubaghe balye.” Baamukoba bati: “Tuje tugule emigaati egy'edinari ebikumi ebibiri (200) tubaghe balye!” 
Mark6:38 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Muligho n'emigaati emeka? Muje mubone.” Olwamanha baamukoba bati: “Etaanu n'ebyenhandha bibiri.” 
Mark6:39 Agho yaalagira babatyamye mu bikunsu ku busubi. 
Mark6:40 Baabatyamya mu bikunsu bya kikumi kikumi n'ataanu ataanu. 
Mark6:41 Agho yaatoola emigaati etaanu n'ebyenhandha ebibiri, yaalinga ghaigulu, yaabigha enkabi nga yeebaza yaamegulamegulamu emigaati yaagha Abeegeresebwa be bagabule abantu. N'ebyenhandha ebibiri yaabigabania mu boonaboona." 
Mark6:42 Boonaboona baalya baiguta. 
Mark6:43 Abeegeresebwa baasoloza ebiibo ikumi na bibiri ebiidhuvu eby'ebitundu ebyasigala ku migaati n'ebyenhandha. 
Mark6:44 Ku baalya emigaati, abasaadha baali enkumi itaanu (5,000)." 
Mark6:45 Tibwalwa, Yesu yaalagira Abeegeresebwa be baniine eryato basomoke enhandha, beesookengayo e Bethisaida, mwene ng'asiibula abantu." 
Mark6:46 Bwe yamala okubasiibula, yaaja ku lusozi okusaba." 
Mark6:47 Agho obwire bwaziba, ng'ab'omu lyato bali mu nhandha ghagati, ate nga mwene ali yenka ku bukalu." 
Mark6:48 Yaabalengera nga bali kufaabiina n'enkasi kuba empewo yali ebava mberi, era agho nga buli kumpi okukya yaabatuukaku ng'ali kutambulira ku maadhi. Yaayenda okubabitaku," 
Mark6:49 aye bale olwamubona ng'ali kutambulira ku maadhi baadhuuba bati musambwa era baayana. 
Mark6:50 Kuba boonaboona baamubona, baatya inho. Aye mangu ago yaayogera nabo, yaabakoba ati: “Mugume emyoyo, ninze mutatya.”" 
Mark6:51 Agho yaaniina mu lyato mwe baali empewo yaalekera agho, baayasaamirira inho," 
Mark6:52 kuba n'eky'emigaati baali tibakitegeire olw'obukalangufu obw'emyoyo gyaibwe. 
Mark6:53 Bwe baasomoka, baatuuka mu kiketezo eky'e Gennesareti, baatuuka ku bukalu." 
Mark6:54 Olwava mu lyato bati, Yesu baamutegeera mangu ago." 
Mark6:55 Baabitabita mu kiketezo kyonakyona, era baatoolera okutwalira abalwaire ku ndiri buli ghe baawuliranga bati Yesu gh'ali." 
Mark6:56 Era kiisi ghe yajanga, mu byalo, oba mu bibuga, oba mu buduuka, abalwaire nga babata mu biya era baamweghemba abaganhe kasinga bagemeku bugeme ku lusa olw'ekivaalo kye era boonaboona abaakigemaku, baawona." 
Mark7:1 Agho olwatuuka, ng'Abafarisaayo n'abandi ku Banamateeka okuva e Yerusalemu baidha aghaali Yesu." 
Mark7:2 Baabona ng'Abeegeresebwa be abandi balya n'engalo embi, nga tibanaabye." 
Mark7:3 Ate nga Abafarisaayo n'Abayudaaya boonaboona, nga bajiira ku mpisa ya badhaadha baibwe, tibalya nga tibanaabye ngalo okutuusa mu nkokola." 
Mark7:4 Era nga bwe bava mu kiya, tibalya nga tibanaabye. Eriyo n'empisa edhindi kyodo dhe baali nga bajiiraku ng'okwamula amabuga, ebibya, ensugha, n'ebintu ebindi eby'ebyuma." 
Mark7:5 Kale Abafarisaayo n'Abanamateeka baamubuuza bati: “Lwaki Abeegeresebwa bo tibabisa mu mpisa ya badhaadha, baalya omugaati nga tibanaabye mu ngalo?”" 
Mark7:6 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bakuusa imwe, Isaia yalanga bukalamu ku imwe nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Abantu bano bantaamu ekitiisa mu bibono bubono, aye omwoyo gwaibwe gundi ghala." 
Mark7:7 Bansinza mu nsinza eziramu, nga beegeresa endhegeresa abantu ye bataagho, yaaba ng'oti n'endhegeresa eyange.’" 
Mark7:8 “Kale muleka eiteeka lya Katonda mwagema empisa edh'abantu.” 
Mark7:9 Era yaayongera yaabakoba ati: “Nga mwidhi bukalamu obutafa ku iteeka lya Katonda musobole okukuuma agaimwe! 
Mark7:10 Kuba Musa yakoba ati, ‘Lata wo ni inhoko obatangamu ekitiisa’, era ati, ‘Oyo avuma ise oba inhina aitibwenga bwitibwe.’" 
Mark7:11 Aye imwe mukoba muti ole bw'akoba ise oba inhina ati kyonakyona kye nandikughaire kiri ‘Korubani’, ekitegeeza kiti nakisengamu Katonda," 
Mark7:12 ng'omuntu oyo timukaamuganha kuba na kantu k'akolera lata we oba inhina. 
Mark7:13 Mu nsambo oti n'eyo mudibya ekibono kya Katonda nga mwegeresa empisa dha badhaadha baimwe. Era n'ebindi kamaala eby'ensambo ng'oti n'eyo bye mukola.” 
Mark7:14 Agho Yesu kabiri yaayeta abantu gh'ali, yaabakoba ati: “Mumpulirise mwenamwena era mutegeere." 
Mark7:15 Ghazira kiva ku luya wa muntu ni kimwingiramu ni kimwonoona, aye ebyo ebiva mu muntu n'ebyonoona omuntu. [" 
Mark7:16 Ali n'amatu agawulira, awulire.]”" 
Mark7:17 Bwe yangira mu ndhu ng'aviire mu bantu, Abeegeresebwa be baamubuuza ku lufumo lwe." 
Mark7:18 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Mwena obwo timutegeire? Timubona nga buli kintu ekiva ku luya okungira mu muntu tikighanga kumwonoona? 
Mark7:19 Kuba tikingira mu mwoyo gwe, aye kija mu nda, ate era yaakifulumya.” Mu ngeri eno yaakakasa ati emere yoonayoona nungi." 
Mark7:20 Yaakoba ati: “Ekiva mu muntu n'ekyonoona omuntu 
Mark7:21 kuba mu mwoyo ogw'omuntu n'omuva ebidhuubo ebibi, obwenzi, obwibi, obutemo," 
Mark7:22 omuluulu, omulyakubi, obugwenhufu, obuguya, ensaalwa, okughaayiriza, olunkulu n'obusirusiru." 
Mark7:23 Ebibi bino byonabyona biva mu muntu era byayonoona omuntu.” 
Mark7:24 Olwava agho yaasituka yaaja mu biketezo eby'e Tiro ni Sidoni, yangira mu ndhu nga tayenda ghabeegho amanha, aye tiyasobola kwegisa." 
Mark7:25 Ghaaligho omukazi eyali ni kaghala ke nga kaliku omuzimu omubi. Oyo olwamuwuliraku yaidha yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bye. 
Mark7:26 Omukazi ono yali Mugureki, nga wa ighanga lya Surofenisia yaasaba Yesu abinge omuzimu ku kaghala ke." 
Mark7:27 Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Linda abaana baigute memale, kuba ti kituufu okutoola omugaati ogw'abaana n'ogusuulira bubwa!”" 
Mark7:28 Omukazi yairamu, yaakoba ati: “N'agh'agho, Musengwa aye n'obubwa, bulya ku bukunkumuka abaana bwe bamagaza nga balya.”" 
Mark7:29 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oba bw'okobye, ja, omwana wo omuzimu gumuviireku.”" 
Mark7:30 Era yairayo eka yaayagaana omwana ng'alambaire ku buliri, ng'omuzimu gumulese." 
Mark7:31 Agho kabiri yaava mu kiketezo ky'e Tiro, yaabita mu Sidoni okuja ku nhandha ey'e Galilaaya, ng'abitira irala mu kiketezo eky'e Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Baamuleetera omusigha era atayogera bukalamu, baamweghemba amugemeku." 
Mark7:33 Agho yaamutoola mu bangi, yaamwiza gha mbali, yaamuta engalo mu matu, yaafuudha, yaamugema ku lulimi" 
Mark7:34 yaalinga ghaigulu, yaisa omuuka, yaakoba ati: “Effatha!” Ekitegeeza kiti: “Iguka.”" 
Mark7:35 Okutemya n'okuzibula ng'amatu gaiguka, n'olulimi lwasibulukuka, yaayogera bukalamu." 
Mark7:36 Yesu yaabasikirira obutakobera muntu yeenayeena aye ye yakoma okubasikirira, beene ye baakoma okubyogera." 
Mark7:37 Era beewuunhia inho baakoba bati: “Byonabyona abikola bukalamu. Abasigha abazibula amatu, ni bakasiru aboogeza!”" 
Mark8:1 Mu nnaku edho kabiri abantu baaba kamaala, nga bazira na ka kulya. Yaayeta Abeegeresebwa be yaabakoba ati:" 
Mark8:2 “Abantu bano bangemya ekisa, kuba buti enaku isatu nga bali ninze, aye bazira ka kulya!" 
Mark8:3 Ate nga bwe mbasiibula ni bairayo eka nga bayala batyo, baidha kugwa ku ngira, kuba abandi bava ghala.”" 
Mark8:4 Abeegeresebwa be baamwiramu bati: “Otoola gha ghano mu irungu emigaati egiigusa abo boonaboona?” 
Mark8:5 Yesu yaababuuza ati: “Muligho n'emigaati emeka?” 
Mark8:6 Baamwiramu bati: “Musanvu.” Yaalagira abantu batyame ghansi. Yaatoola emigaati omusanvu, yeeyanza, yaagimegulamegulamu, yaagigha Abeegeresebwa be bagabule era baakola batyo baagabula olukunkumuli olw'abantu." 
Mark8:7 Era baaliyo n'obwenhandha butono buti, bwona yaabugha enkabi nga yeebaza era yaakoba bwona babugabule." 
Mark8:8 Baalya, baiguta era baasoloza ebiibo musanvu eby'ebitundu ebyafiikagho." 
Mark8:9 Abaalya baali ng'oti nkumi ina (4,000)." 
Mark8:10 Yaabasiibula, era tiyalwa yaaniina mu lyato n'Abeegeresebwa be baaja mu kiketezo eky'e Dalumanutha." 
Mark8:11 Agho ghaidhagho Abafarisaayo, okutakana ni Yesu, baamuleba, nga bamwendaku akamanhiso okuva mu igulu." 
Mark8:12 Yesu yaisa ekikoowu, yaakoba ati: “Lwaki abantu ab'enaku dhino benda akamanhiso? Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, ghazira kamanhiso kaidha kugheebwa bantu ba nnaku dhino!”" 
Mark8:13 Yaabaleka yaaniina mu lyato kabiri, yaasomoka." 
Mark8:14 Bwe bwatuuka, ng'Abeegeresebwa be beerabira okuja n'emigaati okutoolaku omulala gwe baali nagwo mu lyato." 
Mark8:15 Yaabalabula yaabakoba ati: “Mwekuume, mwegendereze ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafarisaayo n'ekya Herode.”" 
Mark8:16 Baakubagania ebidhuubo beene na beene ku kino nga mule bakoba bati: “Oba lwa butaba na migaati!” 
Mark8:17 Yesu olwakimanha, yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mudhuuba ku ky'okubula emigaati? Mukaali kumanha waire kutegeera?" 
Mark8:18 Emyoyo gyaimwe mikalangufu? Muli n'amaiso aye timubona? Era muli n'amatu aye timuwulira? Timwidhukira," 
Mark8:19 emigaati etaanu bwe nagimeguliramu abantu enkumi eitaanu? Biibo bimeka ebyaidhula ebitundu bye mwasoloza?” Baamukoba bati: “Ikumi na bibiri.” 
Mark8:20 “Ate emigaati omusanvu bwe nagimeguliramu abantu enkumi eina, mwasoloza ebiibo ebiidhuvu eby'ebitundu bimeka?” Baakoba bati: “Musanvu.”" 
Mark8:21 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Era mukaali kutegeera?” 
Mark8:22 Agho baatuuka e Bethisaida, ghaabaagho abaaleetera Yesu omutulu era baamweghemba amugemeku." 
Mark8:23 Yaagema omutulu ku mukono, yaamutoola mu kibuga. Era ng'amaze okumufuudha ku maiso n'okumugemaku, yaamubuuza oba ng'aliku ni ky'abona." 
Mark8:24 Agho yaalinga ghaigulu yaakoba ati: “Mbona abantu bali ng'oti miti gitambula.” 
Mark8:25 Agho kabiri yaamugema ku maiso, omusaadha yaabona era yaabonera irala bukalamu byonabyona." 
Mark8:26 Agho yaamusindika eka ng'akoba ati: “Otangira na mu kibuga.” 
Mark8:27 Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be baava agho baaja mu byalo bya Kaisaria Filippi mu ngira yaabuuza Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Abantu nze bandheta batya?” 
Mark8:28 Baamukoba bati: “Yoanne Omubatiza, abandi bati Eliya, ate abandi bati mulala ku balanzi.”" 
Mark8:29 Agho era yaababuuza ati: “Kale imwe mundheta mutya?” Petero yaamukoba ati: “Niiwe Kurisito.” 
Mark8:30 Yesu yaabasikirira balobe kubaaku ye bakobera ku bimufaaku. 
Mark8:31 Yaatoolera okubeegeresa ng'Omwana w'Omuntu bwateekwa okudaazibwadaazibwa einho, okwegaanibwa abakulu ab'ebika, Bakabona Abakulu, n'Abanamateeka, n'okwitibwa, era nga ghabise enaku isatu azuukire." 
Mark8:32 Ekibono kino yakyogerera irala mu lwatu. Agho Petero yaamwiza gha mbali yaamugaya. 
Mark8:33 Yesu yaakyuka yaalingirira Abeegeresebwa be, yaadhuuka Petero ati: “Nva mu maiso, Sitaani! Kuba tofa ku bya Katonda, ofa ku bya bantu!”" 
Mark8:34 Agho yaayeta ekiyindi eky'abantu n'Abeegeresebwa be baaseeta gh'ali, yaabakoba ati: “Ole ayenda okuunonereza, alobe kwefaaku naire, abbeede omusalaba gwe, annonereze" 
Mark8:35 kuba ayenda okuwonia obulamu bwe, oyo abubuza bubuze aye abuza obulamu bwe ku lwange n'olw'Amawulire Amalungi, oyo abuzaawula." 
Mark8:36 “Omuntu aganhulwamu ki okufuna ensi yoonayoona aye n'afiirwa obulamu bwe? 
Mark8:37 Kintu ki omuntu ky'asobola okugha olw'obulamu bwe? 
Mark8:38 Omuntu nze ye ngemya ensoni, n'ebibono byange ye bigemya ensoni mu nnaku dhino edh'abatatya Katonda n'aboonooni, yeena Omwana w'Omuntu alimugemerwa ensoni lw'aliira mu kitiisa kya Ise ni bamalaika abatukuvu.”" 
Mark9:1 Yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, ghaligho abandi ku bemereire ghano abatalirega ku kufa okutuusa lwe balibona Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda nga bwidha n'amaani.”" 
Mark9:2 Nga ghabiseegho enaku mukaaga, Yesu yaagema ku Petero ku Yakobo ni ku Yoanne, yaaja nabo bonka eyo embali ku lusozi oluleeyi eyo, yaafuuka obundi, nga babona." 
Mark9:3 Ebivaalo bye byamesunkana, nga byeru inho, nga ghazira na mwozi mu nsi aghanga kubyamula atyo." 
Mark9:4 Agho Eliya ni Musa baababonekera nga bali kwogera ni Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Petero yaakoba Yesu ati: “Mwegeresa, tulongoire twaba ghano era ka tuseemente entindi isatu, eyiyo eya Musa n'eya Eliya!”" 
Mark9:6 Yali taidhi ky'ayogera, kuba baali batiire inho." 
Mark9:7 Agho ekireri kyavaayo kyabakingiriza, era eiroboozi lyava mu kireri liti: “Ono ni mutabane wange omugonzi, mumuwulirenga.”" 
Mark9:8 Mangu ago, okuja okulingalinga nga ghazira muntu wundi ye babona, okutoolaku Yesu yenka ni beene." 
Mark9:9 Bwe baali baikirira ku lusozi, yaabasikirira obutakoberaku muntu kye baboine okutuusa Omwana w'Omuntu ng'azuukiire mu bafu." 
Mark9:10 Era ekibono kino baakitereka mu beene, ng'eno bwe beebuuzagania okuzuukira mu bafu kye kitegeeza." 
Mark9:11 Era baamubuuza bati: “Lwaki Abanamateeka bakoba bati Eliya n'ateekwa okusooka okwidha?” 
Mark9:12 Yaabairamu ati: “Kituufu Eliya asooka okwidha okutereeza byonabyona era nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa ku Mwana w'Omuntu, wa kudaazibwadaazibwa ebintu kamaala n'okutwalibwa ng'ekitagasa." 
Mark9:13 Aye ka mbakobere, Eliya yaidha ira! Baamukola nga bwe baayenda, nga bwe kyali kimughandiikiibwaku.”" 
Mark9:14 Bwe baatuuka aghaali Abeegeresebwa be, baabona ekiyindi eky'abantu ekinene nga kibeetooloire, n'Abanamateeka nga babatakania." 
Mark9:15 Era mangu ago abantu olwamulengera, baasamaalirira n'okwewuunhia, baamulumuukirira baamulamusa." 
Mark9:16 Yesu yaababuuza ati: “Kiki ekibatakania nabo?” 
Mark9:17 Agho mulala mu kiyindi yairamu ati: “Mwegeresa nkuleeteire mutabane wange aliku omuzimu omubi gu kasiru. 
Mark9:18 Buli lwe gumwidhaku, gumutandigira ghansi, yaafuukeera eiwovu mu kanwa, yaaluma emba, yaakadambala. Nsabye Abeegeresebwa bo bagumubingeku, aye tibasoboire.”" 
Mark9:19 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Yii, oluse luno oluzira kwikiriza! Ndituusa gha okuba n'imwe? Ndituusa gha okubaguminkiriza? Mumundeetere ghano.”" 
Mark9:20 Baamuleeta gh'ali. Era olwamubona, omuzimu gwamusikambula. Mangu ago gwamutandigira ghansi, yeegalangula bw'afuukeera eiwovu mu kanwa." 
Mark9:21 Agho Yesu yaabuuza lata we ati: “Amaze ntangama ki ng'ali ati?” 
Mark9:22 Yaamukoba ati: “Kuva mu buto. Era emikuzi kamaala nga gumusuula mu muliro ni mu maadhi, gumwite. Aye oba nga ghaligho ky'osobola okutukolera, tusaasire, otuyambe.”" 
Mark9:23 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Waakoba oti oba nsobola! Byonabyona bisoboka y'oyo aikiriza.” 
Mark9:24 Mangu ago lata w'omwana yaayogerera ghaigulu, nga n'okulira bw'alira, ati: “Isebo, ndhikiriza, aye nhamba mu butaikiriza bwange.”" 
Mark9:25 Yesu olwabona ng'eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyesoloza yaakaabukira omuzimu omubi, yaagukoba ati: “Muzimu iwe kasiru era masighale, nze nkulagira ono muveeku, era toirangayo kumwidhaku.”" 
Mark9:26 Agho omuzimu gwayana era gwasikambula inho omulenzi, gwamuvaaku. Yaaba oti afiire era abantu kamaala baakoba bati: “Afiire!”" 
Mark9:27 Aye Yesu yaamugema ku mukono yaamusitula, era yaayemerera." 
Mark9:28 Yesu bwe yangira mu ndhu Abeegeresebwa be baamubuuza mu kyama bati: “Lwaki ife titughanze kugubinga?” 
Mark9:29 Yaabakoba ati: “Ekika ekyo tikibingibwa mu ngeri yoonayoona, okutoolaku mu kusaba.”" 
Mark9:30 Olwava agho, beeyongerayo nga basalira mu Galilaaya era nga tayenda ghabeegho amanha." 
Mark9:31 Kuba yayegeresa Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Omwana w'Omuntu aja kugheebwayo mu mikono egy'abantu bamwite, era nga ghabise enaku isatu nga bamaze okumwita aidha kuzuukira.”" 
Mark9:32 Aye ekibono kye yali abakoba tibaakitegeera, ate baatya okumubuuza." 
Mark9:33 Agho baatuuka e Kaperinaumu. Nga bangiire mu ndhu yaababuuza ati: “Mu ngira mubaire mwogera ku ki?” 
Mark9:34 Aye baasirika busirike, kuba mu ngira baaja nga batakana bati naani mu beene asinga obubbede." 
Mark9:35 Yesu yaatyama yaayeta Eikumi n'Ababiri, yaabakoba ati: “Oyo ayenda okuba asooka, ali na kuba inhuma wa boonaboona era mugheereza wa boonaboona.”" 
Mark9:36 Agho yaagema omwana omuto yaamuta ghagati ghaibwe, yaamulera, yaabakoba ati:" 
Mark9:37 “Oyo asangaalira omuto oti n'ono mu liina lyange, asangaalira nze ate kiisi ansangaalira tasangaalira nze, aye ole eyantuma.”" 
Mark9:38 Agho Yoanne yaakoba ati: “Mwegeresa twabona omuntu ng'ali kubinga emizimu emibi mu liina lyo ate nga tabita n'ife, twamulobera.”" 
Mark9:39 Aye Yesu yaakoba ati: “Timumuloberanga, kuba ghazira oyo akola kyewuunhio mu liina lyange ate mu kiseera n'ekirala n'asobola okundhogeraku obubi" 
Mark9:40 kuba atatutakania aba munaife. 
Mark9:41 “Era kiisi yeenayeena alibagha olwendo olw'amaadhi okunhwa mu liina lyange, kuba muli ba Kurisito, bwenebwene mbakobera nti taliroba kufuna mpeera ye." 
Mark9:42 “Oyo yeenayeena aleetera omulala ku bato bano abandhikiriza okukola ekibi, ekyandiwuze, oyo n'okusibibwa olubengo olunene mu nkoto n'asuulibwa mu nhandha." 
Mark9:43 Era omukono gwo bwe guba gukusendasenda okwona, gutemeku kasinga ofune obulamu ng'oli n'omukono mulala, okusinga okuba n'emikono ebiri waaja mu geyeena, mu muliro ogutazikira. [" 
Mark9:44 Enhengere dhaibwe mwe dhitafiira waire omuliro okuzikira.] 
Mark9:45 “Era oba nga ekigere kyo kikusendasenda okwona, kitemeku kasinga ofune obulamu ng'oli mulema, okusinga okuba n'ebigere byombi waasuulibwa mu geyeena. [" 
Mark9:46 Enhengere dhaibwe mwe dhitafiira waire omuliro okuzikira.] 
Mark9:47 “Era oba nga eriiso lyo likusendasenda okwona, litoolemu ongire mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda n'eriiso irala, okusinga okuba n'amaiso abiri waasuulibwa mu geyeena" 
Mark9:48 Enhengere dhaibwe mwe dhitafiira waire omuliro okuzikira. 
Mark9:49 “Kuba buli muntu alirungwamu omuliro. 
Mark9:50 Omuunhu mulungi. Aye omuunhu bwe guwaamu ensa oba okaalungamu ki? “Mube n'omuunhu mu bulamu bwaimwe era n'emiraala beene na beene.” 
Mark10:1 Yesu yaava agho yaaja mu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya ng'osomoike Yorudani abantu kamaala baasombokera gh'ali kabiri era yeena yaabeegeresa, nga bwe yali amanhiriire." 
Mark10:2 Agho Abafarisaayo baaseeta baamubuuza nga bamuleba oba nga kiikirizibwa mu Mateeka omusaadha okubinga mukazi we. 
Mark10:3 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Musa yabalagira ki?” 
Mark10:4 Baakoba bati: “Musa yaganha okumughandiikira embaluwa ey'okumubinga, memale yasiibulwa.”" 
Mark10:5 Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Olw'okuba muli ba nkandya kyova yabaghandiikira eiteeka eryo. 
Mark10:6 Aye ng'okuviira irala mu mainhama Katonda ng'atonda, yakola omusaadha n'omukazi." 
Mark10:7 Omusaadha kyava aleka ise n'inhina naagumira ku mukazi we, ababiri baafuuka muntu mulala." 
Mark10:8 Olwo nga tibakaali bantu babiri aye mulala. 
Mark10:9 Ekyo ni Katonda kye yayimba omuntu atakiyimbululanga.” 
Mark10:10 Nga bali mu ndhu, Abeegeresebwa be baamubuuza kabiri ku nsonga eno." 
Mark10:11 Yaabakoba ati: “Oyo abinga mukazi we n'abayiza owundi aba ayenze ku mukazi oyo. 
Mark10:12 Era n'omukazi bw'anoba ku iba n'abayira owundi, aba ayenze.”" 
Mark10:13 Agho baamuleetera abaana abato abagemeku, aye Abeegeresebwa be baadhuuka abaali babaleeta nga babalobera." 
Mark10:14 Yesu olwakibona, yaasungughala, yaabakoba ati: “Muleke abaana abato baidhe ye ndi, mutabalobera kuba abali ng'abo n'ababa mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
Mark10:15 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, oyo ataikiriza Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda ng'omwana omuto, taghanga naire kububaamu.”" 
Mark10:16 Agho yaalera abaana yaabagha omukisa ng'abaisaaku emikono. 
Mark10:17 Yesu olwagwa mu ngira ati, ghaabaagho eyamulumuukirira yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaamubuuza ati: “Mwegeresa omulungi, nkole ki okufuna obulamu obutawaagho?”" 
Mark10:18 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ondhetera ki omulungi? Ezira mulungi okutoolaku Katonda yenka. 
Mark10:19 Ebiragiro obiidhi: ‘Toitanga, toyendanga, toibanga, toghaayirizanga, tokupankupanianga, lata wo n'inhoko obaghanga ekitiisa.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Agho yaakoba Yesu ati: “Mwegeresa, ebyo byonabyona nabigema okuva mu buto.”" 
Mark10:21 Yesu yaamwekalirisa yaamwesiimisa, era yaamukoba ati: “Kirala ky'okaabulwaku! Ja otunde by'oli nabyo byonabyona, oghe abaavu, eby'obukombe oliba nabyo mu igulu oidhe obitenga ninze.”" 
Mark10:22 Ekyo kyamunakughaza yaaja ng'afootookereire, kuba yali n'ebintu kamaala." 
Mark10:23 Yesu yeezunguluza maiso, yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Nga kikalangufu abakombe okutuuka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda!”" 
Mark10:24 Abeegeresebwa be beewuunhia ebibono ebyo. Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Baana bange, nga kikalangufu okutuuka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
Mark10:25 Kiba kyangu engamiya okubita mu mpami ey'empiso okusinga omukombe okutuuka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.” 
Mark10:26 Agho beewuunhia n'okusingagho era mule beebuuza bati: “Memale olwo naani asobola okulokolebwa?” 
Mark10:27 Agho Yesu yaabalingirira, yaakoba ati: “Ku bw'omuntu tikisoboka aye ti ku Katonda kuba mu Katonda byonabyona bisoboka.”" 
Mark10:28 Agho Petero yaatoolera okumukoba ati: “Kale ife, twaleka byonabyona twabita ni iwe!”" 
Mark10:29 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene mbakobera nti ghazira oyo aleka maka ge, oba baganda be, oba baanhina, oba inhina, oba ise, oba baana, oba kibandha kye, ku lwange ni ku lw'Amawulire Amalungi" 
Mark10:30 n'atafuna maka ni baganda be ni baanhina ni ba inhina n'abaana n'ebibandha, emikuzi kikumi mu nsi muno, taaku okudaazibwadaazibwa, ate mu biseera ebiidha, obulamu obutawaagho." 
Mark10:31 Aye abantu ab'emberi kamaala abaliba ab'ensembo n'ab'ensembo abaliba ab'emberi.” 
Mark10:32 Agho Abeegeresebwa baaba mu ngira nga baja e Yerusalemu, Yesu nga n'abembereiremu; beewuunhia inho era baamunonereza nga batya. Kabiri yaatoola Eikumi n'Ababiri yaatoolera okubakobera ebija okumugwira, ng'akoba ati:" 
Mark10:33 “Mwetegereze, buti tuli kuja e Yerusalemu, Omwana w'Omuntu aidha kugheebwayo ye Bakabona Abakulu ni y'Abanamateeka. Abo baidha kumughaayo eri abamaghanga agandi," 
Mark10:34 bamukiine, baamufuudheku amatanta, baamudaazedaaze era bamwite. Aye nga ghabise enaku isatu alizuukira.”" 
Mark10:35 Agho Yakobo ni Yoanne, abaana ba Zebedaayo baaseeta aghaali Yesu baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, twenda otukolere kyonakyona kye tunaakusaba.”" 
Mark10:36 Yaabakoba ati: “Kiki kye mwenda mbakolere?” 
Mark10:37 Baamukoba bati: “Tuganhe, omulala atyame ku mukono gwo omusaadha, ate owundi ku mugooda mu kitiisa kyo.”" 
Mark10:38 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Kye musaba timukiidhi! Musobola okunhwa ekikopo kye nhwaku, oba okubatizibwa n'okubatizibwa kwe mbatizibwa?”" 
Mark10:39 Baamukoba bati: “Tusobola.” Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ekikopo kye nhwa mulikinhwa, n'okubatizibwa kwe mbatizibwa mwena mulikubatizibwa." 
Mark10:40 Aye eky'okutyama ku mukono gwange omusaadha oba ku mugooda ti ninze nkibagha, era ky'abo be kyategekerwa.”" 
Mark10:41 Bale Eikumi bwe baawulira, baasungughalira Yakobo ni Yoanne." 
Mark10:42 Yesu yaabeeta yaabakoba ati: “Mwidhi muti abo ababalibwa nga bafuzi ba maghanga, bagafuga, era n'abakulu mu abo, baba n'obuyinza ku banaibwe." 
Mark10:43 Aye mu imwe tikiri kityo! Buli ayenda okuba omukulu mu imwe, abe mugheereza waimwe." 
Mark10:44 Era buli ayenda okuba asooka mu imwe, abe mwiru wa boonaboona" 
Mark10:45 kuba n'Omwana w'Omuntu tiyaidha kugheerezebwa aye kugheereza n'okughaayo obulamu bwe, olw'okununula abantu kamaala.”" 
Mark10:46 Agho baatuuka e Yeriko era yaava mu Yeriko ng'ali n'Abeegeresebwa be n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu. Barutimao omutulu, omwana wa Timao, eyali ng'asabiriza yali atyaime agho ku mbali ku ngira." 
Mark10:47 Bwe yawulira ati Yesu Omunazarethi n'ali kubita yaatoolera okwasiikana ng'akoba ati: “Yesu, mwidhukulu wa Daudi, nsaasira.”" 
Mark10:48 Abantu kamaala baamukaabukira asirike, aye yayongera bwongere kwasiikana ati: “Mwidhukulu wa Daudi, nsaasira.”" 
Mark10:49 Yesu yaayemerera, yaakoba ati: “Mumwete.” Agho baayeta omutulu nga bamukoba bati: “Guma omwoyo, situka, ali kukweta.”" 
Mark10:50 Agho yaasuula ere ekidhuuba, yaasituka mangu yaaja aghaali Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oyenda nkukolere ki?” Omutulu yaamukoba ati: “Rabboni”, ekitegeeza “Mwegeresa”, “Nhenda kwiramu kubona.”" 
Mark10:52 Agho Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ja, okwikiriza kwo kukuwoniiza.” Era nga mangu ago airamu okubona, era yaamunonereza mu ngira." 
Mark11:1 Nga bali kumpi okutuuka e Yerusalemu, agho kumpi n'ebibuga Bethifage ni Bethania ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, yaatuma babiri ku Beegeresebwa be, yaabakoba ati:" 
Mark11:2 “Muje mu kyalo ekibali mu maiso, era bwe munaaba mukingira muti, mwidha kubona endogoyi ento ng'esibiibwa nga tetyamwangaku muntu yeenayeena mugisibule mugireete." 
Mark11:3 Bwe ghabaagho abakoba ati, ‘Mukola ki?’ Mumukobe muti, ‘Musengwa n'agyenda era aidha kugiiza mangu.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Baaja era baayagaana endogoyi ento ng'esibiibwa ku luya ku mulyango, mu luguudo baagisibula." 
Mark11:5 Abandi ku baali bemereire agho n'okubakoba bati: “Mubaire ki abali kusibula endogoyi?” 
Mark11:6 Baabakoba nga Yesu bwe yali akobye, era baabaleka baaja." 
Mark11:7 Endogoyi baagireeta ye Yesu, baagyalaku engoye dhaibwe yaagityamaku." 
Mark11:8 Abantu kamaala baayalirira mu ngira engoye dhaibwe, abandi baatema ensaga edh'emiti okuva mu nimiro." 
Mark11:9 Agho abaali emberi n'abaanonereza baayasiikana bati: “Hosanna! Wa nkabi oyo aidha mu liina lya Musengwa. 
Mark11:10 Bwa nkabi obwakyabazinga bwa iseife Daudi obuli kwira! Hosanna! Ghaigulu irala.” 
Mark11:11 Yatuuka e Yerusalemu, yangira mu isinzizo era ng'amaze okwekalirisa buli kintu, yaaja e Bethania n'Eikumi n'Ababiri, kuba obwire bwali bujiire." 
Mark11:12 Olunaku olwairirira, bwe baali bava e Bethania, Yesu endhala yaamuluma." 
Mark11:13 Agho bwe yalengera omuti omutiini nga guliku amakaba, yaaja ghe guli abone oba ng'ayagaanaku akantu. Aye yaja okugutuukaku nga kuzira kantu, okutoolaku amakaba gonka kuba ebiseera tibyali bya mitiini." 
Mark11:14 Agho yaagukoba ati: “Tighabanga alya ku iwe kibala ebyanda n'ebyanda!” Era Abeegeresebwa be baakiwulira. 
Mark11:15 Agho baatuuka e Yerusalemu. Bwe yangira mu isinzizo yaatoolera okubingamu abaali batundira n'abaali bagulira mu isinzizo. Yaafundika emeeza edh'abafaanisa empiiya n'ebityamo by'abo abaali batana enjiibwa. 
Mark11:16 Era yaaloba kuganha muntu yeenayeena kubisa kantu mu isinzizo. 
Mark11:17 Agho yaayegeresa ng'abakoba ati: “Tikyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Endhu yange enaayetebwanga yaakusabiramu amaghanga goonagoona.’ Aye imwe mugifiire mpuku ya banhazi!”" 
Mark11:18 Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka olwawulira ebyo, baanoonia engeri ey'okumuzikiriza. Baali bamutya kuba abantu boonaboona baali nga basamaaliriire olw'endhegeresa ye." 
Mark11:19 Olunaku bwe lwaseenena, baava mu kibuga." 
Mark11:20 Enkyo ku lunaku olwairirira bwe baabitagho, baabona omuti omutiini nga gukaze okuviira irala ku mizi." 
Mark11:21 Agho Petero yaidhukira, yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa, bona omuti omutiini gwe wakolimiire gukaze!”" 
Mark11:22 Yesu yaabairamu ng'akoba ati: “Mubenga n'okwikiriza mu Katonda. 
Mark11:23 Bwenebwene mbakobera, buli alikoba olusozi nga luno ati, ‘Va ghano weesuule mu nhandha’, nga tabuusabuusa mu mwoyo gwe, aye ng'aikiriza ati ky'akobye kya kubaagho, ekyo kirimukolerwa." 
Mark11:24 Kale ka mbakobere, buli kye musaba nga mweghemba Katonda, mwikirize muti mukifunie, era timuliroba kukifuna!" 
Mark11:25 “Era buli lwe musaba, bweghabaagho ye muliku ekibono, mumusonighenga, olwo Lata waimwe ali mu igulu yeena abasonighe ebisobyo byaimwe. [" 
Mark11:26 Aye bwe mutasonighanga, ni Lata waimwe ali mu igulu talibasonigha bisobyo byaimwe.]”" 
Mark11:27 Agho kabiri baatuuka e Yerusalemu, era bwe yali mu isinzizo ng'atambula, Bakabona Abakulu, Abanamateeka, n'abakulu b'ebika baidha y'ali," 
Mark11:28 baamukoba bati: “Buyinza ki bw'okozesa bino by'okola? Era naani eyakugha obuyinza obwo okughanga okukola ebyo?” 
Mark11:29 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ka mbabuuze ekibono kirala, bwe mundhiramu, ndidha kubakobera obuyinza obunkoza ebyo." 
Mark11:30 Okubatiza kwa Yoanne kwava mu igulu oba mu bantu? Mundhiremu.” 
Mark11:31 Agho baakubagania ebidhuubo beene na beene, baakoba bati: “Bwe tukoba tuti kwava mu igulu, aidha kukoba ati, ‘Memale lwaki timwamwikiriza?’" 
Mark11:32 Mperaano tukobe tuti kwava mu bantu?” Baali batya abantu, kuba boonaboona baali bakitwala bati Yoanne yali mulanzi mwene." 
Mark11:33 Agho baakoba bati: “Titwidhi!” Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Niini zeena tiibakobere buyinza bunkoza ebyo.” 
Mark12:1 Agho Yesu yaatoolera okwogera nabo mu nfumo, ati: “Ghaaligho omuntu, yaasimba eisamba ery'emizabbibu, yaalisitaku olukomera, yaasimamu ekikunhiro eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, yaazimbamu ekituuti ekireeyi, yaataamu abakozi, yaaja mu lugendo olw'eghala." 
Mark12:2 “Ekiseera bwe kyatuuka, yaatuma omugheereza we y'abalimi anoneyo ku bibala eby'eisamba ery'emizabbibu." 
Mark12:3 Aye baamugema baamukuba era baamwiririzaayo ngalo ndhereere. 
Mark12:4 “Kabiri yaabatumira omugheereza owundi, oyo baamukuba oluguma era baamukola ebiswaza." 
Mark12:5 Era yaatuma owundi, oyo baamwita era n'abandi kamaala abandi baabakuba, abandi baabaita." 
Mark12:6 “Yali ekaasigaireyo mulala, omwana omugonzi, ye yasembyayo okutuma, mule ng'akoba ati, ‘Omwana wange baidha kumutaamu akanhagansi!’" 
Mark12:7 Aye abakozi abo, mule baakoba bati, ‘Ono n'omusika, ka tumwite obusika bube bwaife.’" 
Mark12:8 Agho nga bamugema, bamwita, bamusuula ku luya okw'eisamba ery'emizabbibu.”" 
Mark12:9 Agho Yesu yaabuuza ati: “Kale mwene isamba alikola ki?” Bale bairamu bati: “Aliidha yaazikiriza abakozi abo, n'eisamba yaaligha abandi.”" 
Mark12:10 Yaakoba ati: “Timusomanga kino ekyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Eibaale abazimbi lye baaloba bati lizira mugaso n'eryafuuka empango ey'omusingi mu nsonda." 
Mark12:11 Ekyo Musengwa n'eyakikola era okukibona tukyewuunhia!’ ” 
Mark12:12 Baali benda okumugema, kuba baali bamanhie ng'olufumo alugereiza ku beene, aye baatya ekiyindi eky'abantu. Kale baamuleka yaaja." 
Mark12:13 Baatuma abandi ku Bafarisaayo n'abandi ku baine ba Herode bamutege mu by'akoba. 
Mark12:14 Bwe baatuuka baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, twidhi oli wa mazima era mpaagho ye weeguya. Mu nkola yo tojiira ku mboneka ya muntu, aye oyegeresa mu mazima engira ya Katonda. Kale ni tukobere, kiikirizibwa okugha Kaisari omusolo oba bbe? Tugughenga oba tutagughanga?”" 
Mark12:15 Aye Yesu olw'okumanha obukuusa bwaibwe, yaabakoba ati: “Lwaki mundeba? Mundeetere ghano e dinari mbone!”" 
Mark12:16 Baagimuleetera. Yaabakoba ati: “Ekifaananie kino ni bino ebighandiiko ebiriku by'ani?” Baamukobera bati: “Bya Kaisari.” 
Mark12:17 Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ebya Kaisari mubighe Kaisari n'ebya Katonda mubighe Katonda.” Era baamwewuunhia. 
Mark12:18 Abasaddukaayo, abakoba bati ezira kuzuukira, baidha ye Yesu, baamukoba bati:" 
Mark12:19 “Mwegeresa, Musa yaleka ng'atughandiikiire ati, ‘Muganda w'omuntu bw'afanga n'aleka omukazi aye nga talese mwana, muganda w'omufu atwalanga omukazi oyo yaafunira muganda we eizaire.’" 
Mark12:20 “Agho olwatuuka, nga ghabaagho aboluganda musanvu omuberi yaafuna omukazi, yaafa nga talese izaire." 
Mark12:21 N'owokubiri yaamubayiza, era yaafa nga talese izaire, n'owokusatu atyo." 
Mark12:22 Era batyo omusanvu tibaaleka izaire. Olumaliira omukazi yeena yaafa. 
Mark12:23 Mperaano mu mazuukira, abo bwe balizuukira aliba muka ani?”" 
Mark12:24 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ti kyemuva mughaba, olw'obutamanha Byaghandiikibwa waire okumanha amaani ga Katonda!" 
Mark12:25 Ekituufu kiri nti bwe bazuukira mu bafu, baba nga tibakaabayiza waire okubayira baba ng'oti bamalaika mu igulu." 
Mark12:26 “Ate ebigema ku bafu okuzuukira, timusomangaku mu kitabo kya Musa, ku ebyo ebigema ku kisaka, nga Katonda bwe yamukoba ati, ‘Ninze Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka, era Katonda wa Yakobo?’" 
Mark12:27 Katonda taba wa bafu, aye wa balamu! Mughaba inho.”" 
Mark12:28 Ghaaligho mulala ku Banamateeka yaatuuka yaabawulira bwe baabuuza, era bwe yabona ng'abaizeemu bukalamu yaamubuuza ati: “Kiragiro ki ekisooka mu biragiro byonabyona?”" 
Mark12:29 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Ekisooka ni kino, ‘Wulira iwe Isiraeli. Musengwa Katonda waife ni Musengwa yenka." 
Mark12:30 Era ogonzanga ni Musengwa Katonda wo n'omutima gwo gwonagwona, n'omwoyo gwo gwonagwona, n'amagezi go goonagoona era n'amaani go goonagoona.’" 
Mark12:31 Ekyokubiri ni kino, ‘Ogonzanga mwino nga iwe mwene bwe weegonza.’ Ezira kiragiro kindi kiwula bino.”" 
Mark12:32 Omunamateeka yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa, oli mutuufu mu ky'okobye bwenebwene Musengwa Katonda ali mulala, ghazira wundi okutoolaku oyo" 
Mark12:33 era nti okumugonza n'omwoyo gwonagwona, n'okutegeera kwonakwona, n'amaani goonagoona, era n'okugonza mwino nga iwe bwe weegonza, kisinga ebigheebwayo byonabyona ebyokebwa ni biweekereragho, n'emisengo gyonagyona egigheebwayo ye Katonda.”" 
Mark12:34 Yesu bwe yabona ng'aizeemu bukalamu, yaamukoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda tobuli ghala.” Era okuva ku olwo ng'ezira akanaghala kumubuuza kibuuzo." 
Mark12:35 Yesu bwe yali ng'ayegeresa mu isinzizo, yaakoba ati: “Abanamateeka bakoba batya bati Kurisito mwidhukulu wa Daudi!" 
Mark12:36 Daudi mwene, ku bwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu yakoba ati, ‘Musengwa yakoba Musengwa wange ati: Tyama ku mukono gwange omusaadha okutuusa bwe ndita abazigu bo ghansi gh'ebigere byo.’" 
Mark12:37 “Daudi mwene amweta ‘Musengwa’ memale obwo aba atya mwidhukulu we!” Olukunkumuli olw'abantu abaali agho baamuwulirisa n'eisanhu. 
Mark12:38 Era mu kwegeresa kwe yaabakoba ati: “Mwekuume Abanamateeka abenda okubonebwa nga bali kukaadha mu bivaalo ebireeyi, n'okulamusibwa mu biya," 
Mark12:39 n'okutyama mu bifo eby'emberi mu sinagoga, n'okuba mu bifo eby'ekitiisa ku mbaga, era" 
Mark12:40 n'okukaavuula eby'omu ndhu dha banamwandu nga basoma esaala edh'okweraga edhitakutuka. Abo ekibonerezo balifuna kinene.” 
Mark12:41 Agho yaatyama emberi w'ekifo ekiteebwamu ebiwongebwa, yaalingirira abantu boonaboona nga bwe basuulamu empiiya abakombe kamaala nga basuulamu buvangata." 
Mark12:42 Yaidhayo namwandu nga mwavu, yaasuulamu obusente bubiri nga bugheza kwadaranti ndala eti." 
Mark12:43 Agho yaayeta Abeegeresebwa be yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene mbakobera nti namwandu ono omwavu atairemu kinene omuteebwa ebiwongebwa okusinga boonaboona 
Mark12:44 kuba abandi boonaboona baghaireyo ku bingi bye bali nabyo. Aye ono omukazi, mu bwetaavu bwe, aswiremu byonabyona by'abaire nabyo, nga n'obulamu bwe bwonabwona.”" 
Mark13:1 Agho bwe yali ng'ava mu isinzizo, mulala ku Beegeresebwa be yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa bona amabaale amalungi n'ebizimbe ebirungi!”" 
Mark13:2 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Tobona gazimbe ago? Tighaliba ibaale lirisigala ku liinaalyo nga tirisuuliibwa ghansi.” 
Mark13:3 Bwe yali ng'atyaime ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, ng'olingiriire eisinzizo, Petero ni Yakobo ni Yoanne n'Anderea baamubuuza nga bali bonka, bati:" 
Mark13:4 “Tukobere, ebyo biribaagho li, ate era kamanhiso ki akalitumanhisa nga bino byonabyona biri kumpi okutuukirira?”" 
Mark13:5 Agho Yesu yainhama okubakoba ati: “Mwekuume ghalobe kubaagho abaghabya. 
Mark13:6 Abantu kamaala baliidha mu liina lyange nga bakoba bati, ‘Ni nze’, era balighabya abantu kamaala." 
Mark13:7 Aye bwe muwuliranga ku ntalo ghano ni ghale, mutatyanga ebyo biri n'okubaagho, aye ng'enkomerero ekaali." 
Mark13:8 Eighanga lirirumba liinaalyo n'obwakyabazinga bulirumba bwinaabwo. Ghalibaagho musisi mu biketezo kamaala, ghaabaagho n'endhala; okwo n'okwinhama okw'ebibonoobono." 
Mark13:9 “Imwe beene mwekuume baidha kubatwala mu mbuga, baidha kubakubira mu sinagoga era balibasimba mu maiso ag'abafuzi ni bakyabazinga nga babalanga nze, mube abadhulizi mu abo." 
Mark13:10 Kuba Amawulire Amalungi gali n'okukoberwa amaghanga goonagoona. 
Mark13:11 “Ate bwe babagemanga ni babaghaayo muteraliikiriranga kya kwogera, aye ekinaabagheebwanga mu saawa yeene eyo kye munaakobanga. Kuba ti niimwe aboogera aye Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Mark13:12 Omuntu alighaayo muganda we okwitibwa, lata w'omwana alighaayo omwana, era abaana balidheemera ababazaala, baabaita." 
Mark13:13 Abantu boonaboona balibakyagha olw'eriina lyange. Aye aliguma okutuuka ku nkomerero n'alirokolebwa. 
Mark13:14 “Aye bwe mulibona Ekyenhinhalwa Ekizikiriza nga kiri ghe kitagwaine kuba, olwo oyo asoma bino ategeeranga, era abali mu Buyudaaya balumukiranga mu nsozi." 
Mark13:15 Oyo ali ghaigulu ku ndhu ataikanga, waire okungira mu ndhu okutoolamu ekintu kyonakyona." 
Mark13:16 Era oyo aliba mu nimiro atairanga ka kunona kivaalo kye. 
Mark13:17 Abalinda n'abayonsa, mu nnaku edho, nga bakagwireku!" 
Mark13:18 Musabe Katonda bino birobe kubaagho mu biseera bya kiinhogogo. 
Mark13:19 “Kuba mu nnaku edho mulibaamu ebibonoobono ebitabangaghooku okuva Katonda lwe yatonda ebitonde n'okutuusa mperaano, era ebitalibaagho." 
Mark13:20 Era nguli Musengwa tiyakendeeza ku nnaku edho, ghazira muntu yandiwonie. Aye ku lw'abalonde, be yalonda, yakendeeza ku nnaku edho." 
Mark13:21 “Agho ni, bweghabaagho abakoba ati, ‘Bona, Kurisito wuuno’, oba ati, ‘Wuule’, mutaikirizanga" 
Mark13:22 kuba ghaliidhagho abeeyeta Kurisito n'abeeyeta abalanzi, baakola obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio nga benda kuwubania abalondemu bwe kiba kisoboka." 
Mark13:23 Aye imwe mwekuume, mbakobeire byonabyona nga bukaali." 
Mark13:24 “Mu nnaku edho ng'okudaagadaaga kuwoire, endhuba erizikira n'omwezi gwaloba kwaka," 
Mark13:25 emuunienie dhirimagalika okuva mu igulu n'amaani ag'omu igulu galitengeesebwa; 
Mark13:26 ng'olwo ni babona Omwana ow'Omuntu ng'aidhira mu bire n'amaani amangi n'ekitiisa. 
Mark13:27 Agho ng'atuma bamalaika nga basoloza abalonde be okuva mu mpewo eina, okuva ensi y'ekoma okutuuka eigulu ye likoma." 
Mark13:28 “Mwegere ku lufumo olw'omuti omutiini. Ensaga bwe dhiira obuto n'amakaba ni gatoolera okwidha, mumanha muti endoboozi eri kumpi." 
Mark13:29 Kale imwe bwe mubonanga ebintu bino nga bibaagho, mumanhanga muti ali kumpi ku lwigi kwene." 
Mark13:30 Bwenebwene mbakobera nti ebintu bino byonabyona biribaagho nga n'abantu ab'oluse luno bakaali kuwaagho. 
Mark13:31 Eigulu n'ensi biriwaagho aye ebibono byange tibiriwaagho. 
Mark13:32 “Aye ghazira aidhi lunaku olwo oba saawa ni bwebaakaba bamalaika mu igulu, waire Omwana, okutoolaku Lata." 
Mark13:33 Mwekuume, mumoge kuba timwidhi kaseera!" 
Mark13:34 “Kiri ng'omuntu avaagho n'aja eghala, n'aleka amaka ge ng'aghaire abagheereza be obuyinza ate n'emirimo emyawufu buli mugheereza. Era oyo ali ku mulyango n'amulagira okukuumanga." 
Mark13:35 Kale mumoge, kuba timwidhi mwene ghaka gh'atuukira, oba igulo, oba mu bwire ghagati, oba mu nkoko nga dhikolyoka, oba nga bukya!" 
Mark13:36 Kale bw'abagwaku alobe kubaagaana nga mutendwike. 
Mark13:37 Kye nkoba imwe, kye nkoba boonaboona nti mwekuume!”" 
Mark14:1 Agho, yali ng'ekaabulayo enaku ibiri okutuuka ku Kibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa n'Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa, Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka baanoonia engeri ey'okumugema mu nkukutu bamwite." 
Mark14:2 Aye baakoba bati: “Tutakikola ku lunaku lukulu, tomanha abantu bwe bataagho keegugungo.”" 
Mark14:3 Agho Yesu bwe yali ng'ali ku kiiwulo alya e Bethania mu ndhu ya Simoni eyali omulwaire ow'ebigenge, omukazi yaidha ng'ali n'akadoome k'alabasituro nga kalimu omuzigo omulungi, ogw'omughendo, ogw'akawoowo ka narudo. Yaamenha akadoome ako, yaafuka omuzigo ku mutwe gwa Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Ghabaagho abaavuuvuuma mule bati: “Lwaki omuzigo ogwo gwonooneibwa? 
Mark14:5 Omuzigo ogwo gubaire gusobola okutanibwa dinari edhiswika mu bikumi ebisatu, dhaagabirwa abaavu! Baamusungughalira inho.”" 
Mark14:6 Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Omukazi mumuleke lwaki mumutabula? Ekikolwa ky'ankoleire kirungi. 
Mark14:7 Abaavu muba nabo buliidho, era mughanga okubakolera obulungi buli lwe mwenze aye nze timwidha kuba ninze buliidho." 
Mark14:8 Akoze ky'asobola, ansiize omuzigo nga bukaali." 
Mark14:9 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere nti mu nsi yoonayoona buli Amawulire Amalungi ye galikoberwa, omukazi ono ky'akoze kyona kinaayogerwangaku, okumwidhukira.”" 
Mark14:10 Agho Yuda Isikarioti, omulala ku Eikumi n'Ababiri, yaaja eri Bakabona Abakulu, aghange okumughaayo ye bali." 
Mark14:11 Bwe baakiwulira, baasangaala era baamusuubiza okumugha empiiya. Era Yuda yaanoonia bwa mukisa gwa kumubagemya." 
Mark14:12 Ku lunaku olusooka mu dh'emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa, lwe baitirangaku entaama ento ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa, Abeegeresebwa be baamukoba bati: “Oyenda tuje tukutegekere gha y'onaaliira Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa?”" 
Mark14:13 Agho yaatuma babiri ku Beegeresebwa be, yaabakoba ati: “Muje mu kibuga, mwidha kwagaana omusaadha eyeetwise ensugha ey'amaadhi, mumunonereze." 
Mark14:14 Woonawoona gh'anangira mukobe mwene ndhu muti, ‘Omwegeresa akobye ati ekisenge kye kiri gha, ky'anaaliiramu Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa n'Abeegeresebwa be?’" 
Mark14:15 Aidha kubalaga ekisenge ekinene ghaigulu nga kirimu bye twenda mututegekere omwo.” 
Mark14:16 Abeegeresebwa baasimbula baatuuka mu kibuga, baayagaana nga bwe yabakoba, baategeka Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa ekyo." 
Mark14:17 Eiguloigulo yaatuuka n'Eikumi n'Ababiri. 
Mark14:18 Agho bwe baali bali ku kiiwulo nga balya, Yesu yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere nti mulala ku imwe, bwe tuli ghano ku kiiwulo aidha kumpaayo.”" 
Mark14:19 Abeegeresebwa baanakughala era baamubuuza mulala mulala bati: “Ni nze?” 
Mark14:20 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mulala ku imwe Eikumi n'Ababiri ali kukoza ninze mu kibya. 
Mark14:21 Kale Omwana w'Omuntu aja kufa nga bwe kyamughandiikibwaku aye ng'akagwireku anaaghaayo Omwana w'Omuntu! Kyandibaire kikalamu nguli omuntu oyo tiyazaalibwa!” 
Mark14:22 Bwe baali bali kulya Yesu yaatoola omugaati, yaagugha enkabi nga yeebaza, yaagumegulamegulamu, yaabagha, yaakoba ati: “Mulye, guno n'omubiri gwange.”" 
Mark14:23 Era yaatoola ekikopo, yeeyanza, yaakibagha, baakinhwaku boonaboona." 
Mark14:24 Era yaabakoba ati: “Guno n'omusaayi gwange ogw'endagaano empyaka ogunaayuyika ku lw'abantu kamaala. 
Mark14:25 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Tiriirayo kunhwa ku kibala kya muzabbibu okutuusa olunaku olwo lwe ndinhwa ekibala ekiyaaka mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.” 
Mark14:26 Era bwe baamala okwemba olwembo baasituka, baaja ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva." 
Mark14:27 Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Imwe mwenamwena mwidha kuneegaana kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Ndiita omwayi, n'entaama dhaasansaana.’" 
Mark14:28 Aye bwe ndimala okuzuukira ndibasookayo e Galilaaya.” 
Mark14:29 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Abandi boonaboona ni bwe balikwegaana, nze bbe!”" 
Mark14:30 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka nkukobere, mwene iwe olwaleero obwire, enkoko enaaba ekaali kukolyoka mikuzi ebiri, ng'oneegaine emikuzi esatu.”" 
Mark14:31 Petero yaasinzaagho okukakasa, yaakoba ati: “Ni bwe kiba nga kyetaagisa nze okufa n'iwe, tiikwegaane.” N'abandi boonaboona baakoba batyo." 
Mark14:32 Agho baatuuka mu kifo ekyetebwa Gethisemane era Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Mutyame ghano, nze nga nsaba.”" 
Mark14:33 Yaatoola Petero, Yakobo ni Yoanne yaaja nabo. Yaatabulwa era yeeraliikirira." 
Mark14:34 Era yaabakoba ati: “Ndi n'enaku ku mwoyo eyenda na kundhita. Imwe musigale ghano mukuume.” 
Mark14:35 Bwe yeeyongerayooku katono, yaakuba amakiryaivu yaasaba ati oba kisoboka ekiseera ekyo kimubiteku." 
Mark14:36 Era yaakoba ati: “Abba, Lata, byonabyona obisobola. Ntoolaaku ekikopo kino aye ti nga nze bwe nhenda, aye nga iwe bw'oyenda.”" 
Mark14:37 Okuja okwira, yaayagaana nga batendwike. Yaakoba Petero ati: “Simoni, otendwike? Toghanze kumoga waire saawa ndala eti?" 
Mark14:38 Mumoge era musabe, mulobe kukemebwa kuba omwoyo mumalirivu aye omubiri munafu.”" 
Mark14:39 Kabiri yaaja yaasaba ng'ayogera ebibono birala ebyo. 
Mark14:40 Era kabiri okuja okwira yaabaagaana nga batendwike ng'amaiso gabazitoighe olw'endoolo. Baabulwa kye bamwiramu. 
Mark14:41 Yaira omukuzi ogwokusatu yaabakoba ati: “Mukaatenduka era mukaawuumula? Mulekere agho! Biwoire! Saawa etuuse, Omwana w'Omuntu aja kugheebwayo mu mikono egy'aboonooni." 
Mark14:42 Musituke tuje, anampaayo ali kumpi.”" 
Mark14:43 Mangu ago, Yesu bwe yali ng'akaayogera, Yuda, omulala ku Ikumi n'Ababiri, n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu baatuuka nga bava ye Bakabona Abakulu, n'Abanamateeka, n'abakulu ab'ebika, nga bagemye empiima n'emiigo." 
Mark14:44 Mperaano eyamulyamu olukwe yali amaze okubatemyaku ng'akobye ati: “Ye nnaalamusa nga mmugwa mu kifuba nga n'oyo mumugeme mumutwale nga mumukalangwire.” 
Mark14:45 Era Yuda olwatuuka ati, ng'aja busimbalaala ye Yesu, ng'amukoba ati: “Mwegeresa”, era ng'amugwa mu kifuba." 
Mark14:46 Agho baagema Yesu era baamukalangula. 
Mark14:47 Aye owundi ku baali beemereire agho yaasowolayo empiima yaatema omwiru w'Omukulu wa Bakabona, era yaamukutulaku kutu." 
Mark14:48 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mwidhie okungema ng'abaja okugema omunhazi, mwaidha n'empiima n'emiigo?" 
Mark14:49 Buli lunaku nabanga n'imwe mu isinzizo nga ndhegeresa aye timwangema. Kale Ebyaghandiikibwa biri n'okutuukirizibwa.” 
Mark14:50 Agho Abeegeresebwa be boonaboona baalumuka, baamuleka." 
Mark14:51 Ghaabaagho omwisuka eyali ali kumunonereza nga tavaire, okutoolaku eisuuka lye yali yeeswireku, baamugema" 
Mark14:52 aye yaabalekera eisuuka yaalumuka madu. 
Mark14:53 Agho baatwala Yesu ew'Omukulu wa Bakabona. Agho Bakabona Abakulu, n'abakulu ab'ebika, n'Abanamateeka boonaboona beesoloza." 
Mark14:54 Petero yaavanga einhuma aye ng'aliku ghala, okutuukira irala mu luya lw'Omukulu wa Bakabona, era yaatyama n'abakuumi yaayota omuliro." 
Mark14:55 Agho Bakabona Abakulu n'embuga yoonayoona, baanoonia obudhulizi ku Yesu kwe banaasinziira okumwita, aye nga tibabufuna." 
Mark14:56 Abantu kamaala baamughaaku obudhulizi nga basubagha, era ng'obudhulizi tibugemagana." 
Mark14:57 Era yaabaayo n'abandi abaasituka baagha obudhulizi obw'okusubagha nga bakoba bati: 
Mark14:58 “Twamuwulira ng'akoba ati, ‘Ndimenhagho eisinzizo lino eryazimbibwa abantu, ate mu nnaku isatu ndizimba erindi, nga tirizimbibwa bantu.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Aye ng'era obudhulizi bwaibwe tibugemagana. 
Mark14:60 Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona yaayemerera ghagati yaabuuza Yesu ati: “Ozira ky'oiramu? Kiki bano kye bakulumirizaamu?” 
Mark14:61 Aye yaasirika, era azira kye yairamu. Kabiri Omukulu wa Bakabona n'okumubuuza yaamukoba ati: “Niiwe Kurisito Omwana w'oyo Katonda asaakibwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Agho Yesu yaakoba ati: “Ninze. Era mulibona Omwana w'Omuntu ng'atyaime ku mukono omusaadha ogw'ow'obukumu, era ng'aidhira mu bire eby'eigulu.”" 
Mark14:63 Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona yaakendebula ebivaalo bye, yaakoba ati: “Tukaayendera ki abadhulizi abandi?" 
Mark14:64 Muwulire bw'avuma Katonda, imwe ekyo mukibona mutya?” Agho boonaboona baagumusalira bati agwaine afe." 
Mark14:65 Ng'olwo abandi batoolera kumufuudhaku, baamughemba mu maiso, baamukuba, eno nga bwe bamukoba bati: “Teeba akukubye.” N'abakuumi baamusangaaza na gafunsi." 
Mark14:66 Petero bwe yali ng'akaali agho ghansi mu luya, omughala mulala ku bagheereza b'Omukulu wa Bakabona, yaidha." 
Mark14:67 Bwe yabona Petero ng'ayota omuliro, yaamulingirira, yaakoba ati: “Iwe weena wali n'Omunazarethi oyo Yesu.”" 
Mark14:68 Aye Petero yeegaana ng'akoba ati: “Tiidhi era titegeera ky'okoba.” Yaaja ng'afuluma ku luya, era enkoko yaakolyoka." 
Mark14:69 Kabiri omughala olwamubona ng'atoolera kukobera abaali bemereire agho ati: “Ono n'omulala ku bale.” 
Mark14:70 Aye kabiri yeegaana. Ate nga ghabiseegho akaseera katono, abaali beemereire agho baakoba Petero bati: “Bwenebwene oli mulala ku bale, kuba, n'okuba oli Mugalilaaya.”" 
Mark14:71 Agho yaatoolera n'okwefuugha era n'okulayira ati: “Nze tiidhi muntu ono ye muli kukoba.” 
Mark14:72 Mangu ago enkoko yaakolyoka omukuzi ogwokubiri. Era Petero yaidhukira ekyo Yesu kye yamukoba ati: “Enkoko enaaba ng'ekaali kukolyoka mikuzi ebiri, oidha kuba ng'oneegaine emikuzi esatu.” Agho yaagwa mu maziga yaalira." 
Mark15:1 Olwakya buti, nga Bakabona Abakulu, n'abakulu ab'ebika, n'Abanamateeka n'embuga yoonayoona, bateesa, nga basiba Yesu nga bamutwala, bamughaayo ewa Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Agho Pilato yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya?” Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Niiwe okyogeire.” 
Mark15:3 Era Bakabona Abakulu baamughaghabira emisango kamaala. 
Mark15:4 Pilato kabiri yaamubuuza, yaakoba ati: “Ozira ky'oiramu? Bona, emisango emeka gye bakughaghabiire!”" 
Mark15:5 Aye Yesu tiyamwiramu kibono, era Pilato yeewuunhia!" 
Mark15:6 Mperaano buli ku lunaku olukulu Pilato yalinga abalekulirayo omusibe mulala ye baabanga nga basabye. 
Mark15:7 Ku mukuzi guno, yaliyo omusibe mulala ng'ayetebwa Barabba, eyasibibwa n'abadheemu, abaali baise abantu mu keegugungo akaaligho." 
Mark15:8 Agho ni eikuukuubira ery'abantu bwe baidha, baatoolera okusaba Pilato abakolere nga buliidho." 
Mark15:9 Agho Pilato yaabairamu ati: “Mwenda mbalekulire kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya?” 
Mark15:10 Kuba mule yamanha nga Bakabona Abakulu baaghaayo Yesu lwa nsaalwa. 
Mark15:11 Aye Bakabona Abakulu baapikiriza ekiyindi bati koodhi abalekulire Barabba. 
Mark15:12 Pilato yairamu kabiri yaakoba ati: “Memale ono ye mweta kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya mwenda mmukolere ki?” 
Mark15:13 Bairamu nga baasiikana bati: “Mukomerere ku musalaba.” 
Mark15:14 Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Aye lwaki, yakola kibi ki?” Beeyongera kwasiikana bati: “Mukomerere ku musalaba.”" 
Mark15:15 Agho Pilato olw'okwenda okusiimya ekiyindi, yaabalekulira Barabba, era yaaghaayo Yesu akomererwe ku musalaba ng'amaze okumukuba enkoba." 
Mark15:16 Agho abaisirukale baamutwala munda mu kisaagaati, mu Puraetorio, era baasololezaamu banaibwe ab'ekikunsu ekyo." 
Mark15:17 Baamuvaaza olugoye olwa nakasooma, baazingazinga amawa baakola engule baagimuvaaza." 
Mark15:18 Agho baatoolera okumusaaka bati: “Ghangaala, kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya!”" 
Mark15:19 Baamukonta mu mutwe n'olugada, baamufuudhaku, baakuba amakiryaivu baamusinza." 
Mark15:20 Agho nga bamaze okumudaaza, baamutoolamu olugoye olwa nakasooma, baamuvaaza engoye dhe, baamutwala okumukomerera ku musalaba." 
Mark15:21 Ghaabaagho omubise mulala, Simoni Omukurenayo eyali ng'ava mu nimiro, nga ni lata wa Alekisandero ni Rufo, baamukaka okubbeeda omusalaba gwa Yesu." 
Mark15:22 Baatwala Yesu mu kifo Gologotha, ekitegeeza ekifo eky'ekighanga!" 
Mark15:23 Baamugha omwenge ogw'emizabbibu okunhwa gutabwirwamu mirra, aye nga tayenda." 
Mark15:24 Agho nga bamukomerera ku musalaba, nga baira mu kugabana bivaalo bye, baabikubiraku akalulu okubona buli mulala ky'atwala." 
Mark15:25 Esaawa dhaali dhighera isatu, baamukomerera ku musalaba." 
Mark15:26 Omusango gwe baamulanga gwaghandiikibwa guti: “KYABAZINGA OW'ABAYUDAAYA!” 
Mark15:27 Era baamukomerera n'abanhazi babiri omulala ku mukono omusaadha, ate owundi ku mugooda. [" 
Mark15:28 Ekighandiiko ekitukuvu kyatuukirira ekikoba kiti: “Yabalirwa mu babi.”] 
Mark15:29 Ababise baamuvuma, baatengeesa emitwe gyaibwe nga bakoba bati: “Ha! Iwe amenha eisinzizo era waalizimba mu nnaku isatu!" 
Mark15:30 Weewonie, va ku musalaba oike!”" 
Mark15:31 Era ni Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka boona baamuduula nga bakoba bati: “Yawonianga abandi, mwene tasobola kwewonia!" 
Mark15:32 Ti ni Kurisito kyabazinga wa Isiraeli, mperaano aike ave ku musalaba tubone era twikirize.” Bale be baamukomerera nabo boona baamuvuma!" 
Mark15:33 Esaawa bwe dhaaghera omukaaga, enzikiiza yaagema ensi yoonayoona okutuuka esaawa omwenda." 
Mark15:34 Ku saawa eyomwenda, Yesu yaayasiikana ati: “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani?” Ekitegeeza kiti: “Katonda wange, Katonda wange lwaki ondekuliire agho?”" 
Mark15:35 Abandi ku baali beemereire agho olwakiwulira, nga bakoba bati: “Wulira ali kweta Eliya.”" 
Mark15:36 Ghaabaagho omuntu mulala, yaalumuka yainhika ekyangu mu mwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'endoota, yaakita ku lugada, yaamugha anhwe nga bw'akoba ati: “Muleke tubone oba nga Eliya anaidha yaamughanula ku musalaba!”" 
Mark15:37 Aye Yesu yaayasiikana mu iroboozi ery'amaani era yaisa omuuka ogusembayo. 
Mark15:38 Agho olusuubo olw'omu isinzizo lwakanukamu ghabiri okuva ghaigulu okutuuka ghansi. 
Mark15:39 Agho omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale eyali ayemereire agho mu maiso bwe yabona nga bw'aisiiza omuuka ogusembayo, yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene omuntu ono abaire Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Mark15:40 Agho era ghaaligho n'abakazi abaali bali kumulengera nga baliku ghala; mu abo mwalimu Maria Magadalene, ni Maria mukaire wa Yakobo omuto, ni Yose, ni Salome." 
Mark15:41 Abakazi abo baabitanga naye ng'ali e Galilaaya era baamugheerezanga ghalala n'abandi kamaala abaaniinaniina naye e Yerusalemu. 
Mark15:42 Bwe bwali buziba ku lunaku olw'okwetegeka olukulembera Sabbato," 
Mark15:43 Yosefu ow'e Arimathea yaidha. Yali musaadha wa kitiisa ku lwekobaano olw'embuga ate ng'era yali ateegerera Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda. Oyo, nga tatya, yaaja ye Pilato yaamusaba omulambo gwa Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato yeewuunhia oba nga Yesu yali amaze okufa, era yaayeta omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale yaamubuuza oba nga Yesu yali afiire." 
Mark15:45 Era, ekyo omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale bwe yamala okukimukakasa, yaikiriza Yosefu, atwale omulambo." 
Mark15:46 Yosefu yaagula olugoye olweru, yaamughanula ku musalaba, yaamuzinga mu lugoye, yaamuta mu magombe, agaali gasimiibwa mu lubaale yaagalangula eibaale yaalita mu mulyango ogw'amagombe." 
Mark15:47 Era Maria Magadalene ni Maria inhina wa Yose, beekalirisa ghe yateebwa." 
Mark16:1 Olwa Sabbato bwe lwabita, Maria Magadalene ni Maria inhina wa Yakobo ni Salome, baagula obuwoowo baje basiige ku mulambo gwa Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Era mu nkyonkyo, ku lunaku olwo olusooka mu Sabbato, baatuuka ku magombe, ng'endhuba evaayo." 
Mark16:3 Baali beebuuza bati: “Naani anaatugalangulira eibaale okuva mu mulyango ogw'amagombe?” 
Mark16:4 Aye baaja okulingayo bati, nga babona ng'eibaale eryali libitiriire obubba, ligalangwirwa lyaizibwa gha mbali." 
Mark16:5 Agho bangira mu magombe, baabona omwisuka ng'atyaime ku mukono omusaadha ng'avaire ekivaalo ekyeru baayasaamirira." 
Mark16:6 Yaabakoba ati: “Mutatya. Ndidhi nti muli kwagala Yesu ow'e Nazarethi, eyakomererwa ku musalaba azuukiire, muno aziramu. Mubone ekifo ghe yabaire ateereibwa." 
Mark16:7 Kale muje, mukobere Abeegeresebwa be ni Petero muti, ‘Abeesoosengayo e Galilaaya eyo ye mulimubonera nga bwe yabakoba.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Agho baafuluma mu magombe, baalumuka kuba baali batengera nga batya era ezira ye baakoberaku kintu kyonakyona kuba baali batiire. [" 
Mark16:9 Yesu bwe yazuukira mu nkyo, ku lunaku olwo olusooka ku Sabbato, yasooka okubonekera Maria Magadalene, ye yabingaku emizimu omusanvu." 
Mark16:10 Oyo n'eyaja n'akobera abo abaabanga naye, abaali banakughaire era nga balira." 
Mark16:11 Aye abo olwawulira bati mulamu era bati ni Maria Magadalene amuboineku, baaloba kwikiriza." 
Mark16:12 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yesu yaabonekera babiri ku abo, mu nsambo eyindi, nga baja mu kyalo." 
Mark16:13 Abo baaja baakobera abandi, aye era boona tibaabaikiriza." 
Mark16:14 Olwasembayo yaabonekera eikumi n'omulala nga batyaime balya, yaabanenia olw'obutaikiriza abo abaamubona ng'azuukiire." 
Mark16:15 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Muje mu nsi yoonayoona mukobere ebitonde byonabyona Amawulire Amalungi. 
Mark16:16 Oyo aikiriza era n'abatizibwa alirokolebwa aye ataikiriza omusango gulimusinga. 
Mark16:17 “Abaikiriza baliba n'obumanhiso buno: mu liina lyange balibinga emizimu, balyogera mu nnimi dhe batayegangaku," 
Mark16:18 baligema emisota mu ngalo dhaibwe, era ni bwe balinhwa ekiita kyonakyona tibalibaaku kabi, abalwaire balibaisaaku emikono era baawona.”" 
Mark16:19 Musengwa Yesu bwe yamala okwogera nabo, yaatwalibwa mu igulu, y'atyaime ku mukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda." 
Mark16:20 Ate Abeegeresebwa baaja baayegeresa buli ghantu Musengwa ng'ali nabo. Ebibono byaibwe ng'abikakasa n'ebyewuunhio bye yabakozanga.] [Mangu ago baakobera Petero ni be yali nabo, byonabyona malaika bye yabalagira. Era ebyo olwawa, Yesu mwene yaabatuma okuja okulangirira Amawulire Amatukuvu agatawaagho ag'obulokozi woonawoona okuva e buvandhuba okutuuka e bugwandhuba.]" 
Luke1:1 Abantu kamaala bageziizaaku nga bwe basobola okughandiika ebijiire nga bibaagho mu ife 
Luke1:2 nga bwe baabitukobera, abaabiboneraku irala okuva mu mainhama, abeegeresa ekibono kya Katonda." 
Luke1:3 Isebo ow'ekitiisa Theofilo, zeena ni, nga mmaze okunoonereza byonabyona n'obwegendereza okuva ku ntoolo, kyambonekera nga kikalamu mbikughandiikire nga mbisengeike," 
Luke1:4 osobole okumanha obukakafu obw'ebibono bye wayegeresebwa. 
Luke1:5 Mu biseera bya Herode, kyabazinga wa Buyudaaya, ghaaligho kabona nga bamweta Zekaria, nga wa mu kikunsu kya Abiya. Ni mukazi we nga bamweta Elisabethi, nga mwidhukulu wa Aaroni." 
Luke1:6 Bombi baali batuufu mu maiso ga Katonda, nga bagema ebiragiro bya Musengwa byonabyona n'amateeka ge, nga tibasobyamu." 
Luke1:7 Aye baali baziraku mwana, kuba Elisabethi yali mugumba, era nga bombi emyaka gyali gibawoireku." 
Luke1:8 Lwali lulala, Zekaria bwe yali ng'ali ku mulimo gwe ogw'obwakabona mu maiso ga Katonda, mu lugobo olw'ekikunsu kye," 
Luke1:9 akalulu kaamugwaku okwingira mu isinzizo okuniosa obubbaani, ng'empisa ey'obwakabona bwe yali." 
Luke1:10 Abantu abeesoloza boonaboona baali ku luya nga basaba, mu saawa ey'okuniosa obubbaani." 
Luke1:11 Agho malaika wa Musengwa yaaboneka, ng'ayemereire ku mukono omusaadha ogw'alutaari ey'okuniokezaaku obubbaani." 
Luke1:12 Zekaria olwamubona yeezinduka era yaatya inho. 
Luke1:13 Aye malaika yaamukoba ati: “Zekaria otatya, kuba okusaba kwo kuwuliirwa era mukazi wo Elisabethi aidha kukuzaalira omwana omulenzi, omutuume eriina Yoanne." 
Luke1:14 Olifuna eisanhu era waasangaala era abantu kamaala balisagamba olw'okuzaalibwa kwe. 
Luke1:15 Kuba aliba mukulu mu maiso ga Musengwa era talinhwa mwenge gwa mizabbibu oba ekitamiiza kyonakyona. Aliidhuzibwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu ng'akaali mu nda ya inhina. 
Luke1:16 Abaana ba Isiraeli kamaala alibaiza ye Musengwa Katonda waibwe. 
Luke1:17 Alyembereramu Musengwa mu mwoyo n'amaani ng'oti n'Eliya bye yali nabyo, emyoyo gya badhaadha agiitukize mu baidhukulu, abadheemu abaize mu magezi ag'abatuufu, ateeregho atyo Musengwa abantu abeetegefu.”" 
Luke1:18 Zekaria yaakoba malaika ati: “Ekyo ndikimanhira ku ki? Nze ndi mukaire, ni mukazi wange emyaka gimuwoireku.”" 
Luke1:19 Malaika yaamwiramu ati: “Ninze Gaburieli ayemerera mu maiso ga Katonda, era ntumiibwa okwogera n'iwe nkukobere amawulire amalungi ago." 
Luke1:20 Aye ni wulira kino: Oidha kuziba omunwa, obe nga toghanga kwogera okutuusa ku olwo bino lwe biribaagho kuba iwe toikiriza bibono byange, ebirituukirizibwa mu biseera byabyo.”" 
Luke1:21 Abantu baali mu kulindirira Zekaria, era nga beewuunhia ekimulwisisaayo mu isinzizo." 
Luke1:22 Bwe yafuluma tiyasobola kwogera ye bali, agho baamanha nga ghaligho ekimubonekeire mu isinzizo. Yagezaaku okubamanhisa bye yayenda mu bumanhiso, yaasigala ng'omunwa guzibye." 
Luke1:23 Agho olugobo lwe bwe lwawaaku, yairayo eka." 
Luke1:24 Era ghaabita entangama ya nnaku ti nhingi, mukazi we Elisabethi yaatoola enda, era yaamala emyezi etaanu nga taidha mu bantu," 
Luke1:25 ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa ati bw'ankoze, mu nnaku dh'aboine yamponia okuswala kwe mbaire nakwo mu bantu!”" 
Luke1:26 Mu mwezi ogwomukaaga, Katonda yaatuma malaika Gaburieli mu kibuga eky'e Galilaaya, eriina lyakyo Nazarethi" 
Luke1:27 y'omughala omwegha, eriina lye Maria, eyali ayandhwire omusaadha ow'omu kika kya Daudi, eriina lye Yosefu." 
Luke1:28 Malaika yaidha y'ali yaamukoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'iwe, oli wa nkabi, Musengwa ali n'iwe!”" 
Luke1:29 Maria yaatabulwa inho, era yaalowoolereza inho ku kulamusa okwo kye kutegeeza." 
Luke1:30 Aye malaika yaamukoba ati: “Maria otatya, Katonda akughaire omukisa." 
Luke1:31 Oidha kutoola enda ozaale omwana wa bulenzi, omutuume eriina Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Aliba mukulu era alyetebwa Mwana w'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene. Musengwa Katonda alimugha ekityamo kya Daudi dhaadha we. 
Luke1:33 Alifuga ekika kya Yakobo ebyanda n'ebyanda, era Obwakyabazinga bwe tibulikoma.”" 
Luke1:34 Maria yaakoba malaika ati: “Kiyinzika kitya ekyo, ate nga tiidhi musaadha?”" 
Luke1:35 Malaika yaamwiramu ati: “Mwoyo Mutukuvu aidha kukwikaku, n'amaani g'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene gaidha kukuboghera, kyova ky'olizaala, ekitukuvu, kiryetebwa Mwana wa Katonda." 
Luke1:36 Ate bona, Elisabethi ow'ekika kyo ali nda ya mwana mulenzi, mu bukaire bwe obwo. Era guno omwezi n'ogwomukaaga ogw'oyo ye baayetanga omugumba" 
Luke1:37 kuba mpaagho kirema Katonda.” 
Luke1:38 Maria yaakoba ati: “Ndi ghano omugheereza wa Musengwa, ka kikolebwe nga bw'okobye.” Agho malaika yaavaagho, yaagolola." 
Luke1:39 Ghaabitagho enaku ntono Maria yaasituka yaaja mangu mu kibuga eky'omu nsi ey'ensozi, mu Buyudaaya." 
Luke1:40 Yangira mu ndhu ya Zekaria, yaalamusa Elisabethi." 
Luke1:41 Ekyabaagho: Elisabethi olwawulira Maria ng'amulamusa, omwana yeedhaga mu nda ye, Elisabethi yaidhula Mwoyo Mutukuvu" 
Luke1:42 era yaaleekaanira ghaigulu ati: “Wagheebwa omukisa mu bakazi, n'omwana y'olinda yagheebwa omukisa!" 
Luke1:43 Kiviire kuki inhina Musengwa wange okwidha ye ndi? 
Luke1:44 Kuba bona eno, amamiro agaanamwisa olungwire mu kutu, omwana yeedhaga mu nda yange." 
Luke1:45 Weesiimye eyaikiririzaagho kuba Musengwa bye yakukoba birituukirira.” 
Luke1:46 Maria yaakoba ati: “Omwoyo gwange gugulumiza Musengwa. 
Luke1:47 Omwoyo gwange gusangaaliire mu Katonda omununuzi wange. 
Luke1:48 Yalingirira obunafu obw'omugheereza we; kuba bona, okuva n'olwaleero ense dhoonadhoona dhiidha kundhetanga wa nkabi," 
Luke1:49 olw'okuba ow'obukumu yankolera eby'amaani era eriina lye itukuvu. 
Luke1:50 Ekisa kye ku bamutya kirigho ku nse n'ense. 
Luke1:51 Akoze eby'amaani n'omukono gwe, abeekuza mu birowoozo byaibwe yabasansaania." 
Luke1:52 Ab'obukumu yabaniinusa ku makonero, y'aniinia abanafu." 
Luke1:53 Yaigusa abayala n'ebirungi, abakombe yaabaleka bwereere." 
Luke1:54 Yayamba Isiraeli omugheereza we, ng'aidhukira ekisa kye:" 
Luke1:55 Nga bwe yakoba badhaadha baife, okukiraga Aburahamu n'eizaire lye ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
Luke1:56 Maria yaasigala ni Elisabethi okumala emyezi ng'esatu, memale yairayo ewuwe." 
Luke1:57 Agho, ebiseera bya Elisabethi eby'okuzaala byatuuka, yaazaala omwana wa bulenzi." 
Luke1:58 Baliraanwa be n'abekika kye bwe baawulira nga Musengwa amulaze ekisa ekyaga agho, baidha okumusanhukiraku." 
Luke1:59 Bwe lwatuuka olunaku olwomunaana, beesoloza okukeketa omwana, era baaba bamutuuma eriina lya Zekaria, oti ni ise" 
Luke1:60 aye inhina yaabakoba ati: “Busa, aidha kwetebwa lya Yoanne.”" 
Luke1:61 Baamukoba bati: “Aye mu kika kyo muzira ayetebwa liina eryo!” 
Luke1:62 Baakozesa obumanhiso, baabuuza ise eriina ly'ayenda bamwete." 
Luke1:63 Yaabasaba akabaawo, yaaghandiika ati eriina lye ni Yoanne. Boonaboona beewuunhia inho." 
Luke1:64 Mangu ago omunwa gwazibuka, olulimi lwasibulukuka, yaayogera era yaasaaka Katonda." 
Luke1:65 Abantu abaali babaliinaine boonaboona baatya, era ebintu ebyo byayogerwaku woonawoona mu nsi ey'ensozi ey'e Buyudaaya." 
Luke1:66 Era boonaboona abaabiwulira baabitereka mu myoyo gyaibwe, mule nga bwe beebuuza bati: “Kale omwana ono aliba ki?” Kuba bwenebwene omukono gwa Musengwa gwali nga gumuliku." 
Luke1:67 Era ni ise Zekaria yaidhula Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaalanga ng'akoba ati: 
Luke1:68 “Musengwa Katonda wa Isiraeli asaakibwe, kuba akyaliire abantu be era yaabanunula." 
Luke1:69 Atufuniire amaani okutulokola mu ndhu ya Daudi omugheereza we. 
Luke1:70 Nga bwe yayogerera mu batuukirivu be, abalanzi abaaligho eira," 
Luke1:71 ati aidha kutuwonia abazigu baife, era atuwonie n'omukono ogw'abatukyagha." 
Luke1:72 Alage okusaasira kwe yasuubiza badhaadha baife, aidhukire endagaano ye entukuvu." 
Luke1:73 Ekirayiro kye yalayirira Aburahamu dhaadha waife okukituukiriza mu ife. 
Luke1:74 Nga tumaze okununulwa mu mikono egy'abazigu baife, tumugheereze aghazira kutya" 
Luke1:75 mu maiso ge, mu butukuvu ni mu mazima enaku edh'obulamu bwaife dhoonadhoona." 
Luke1:76 N'iwe Omwana, olyetebwa mulanzi w'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene; kuba olyembereramu Musengwa waamutegekera engira dhe" 
Luke1:77 oghe abantu be amagezi ag'okulokoka, mu kusoniyibwa ebibi byaibwe." 
Luke1:78 Olw'okusaasira okunene okwa Katonda waife ali ng'oti n'endhuba evaayo, aliva ghaigulu yaidha yaatukyalira." 
Luke1:79 Okwakira abo abatyaime mu nzikiiza ni mu kinsense eky'olumbe, n'okutereeza ebigere byaife mu ngira ey'eidembe.”" 
Luke1:80 Omwana yaakula era yaaba wa maani mu mwoyo, yaabanga eyo mu malungu okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yeeyoleka Isiraeli." 
Luke2:1 Agho olwatuuka mu nnaku edho, ekiragiro kyava ewa Kaisari Agusito nga kikoba abantu okubalibwa." 
Luke2:2 Okubalibwa kuno okwasooka, kwaligho nga Kwirinio n'afuga Siria." 
Luke2:3 Abantu boonaboona baaja okughandiikibwa, buli muntu ku kyalo eky'ewaibwe." 
Luke2:4 Yosefu yeena yaava mu kyalo Nazarethi eky'e Galilaaya yaaniinaniina okuja mu kyalo kya Daudi mu Buyudaaya, ekyetebwa Bethelehemu kuba yali wa kika kya Daudi, era wa ku nda ye." 
Luke2:5 Yaaja okweghandiisa ni Maria eyali amaze okumwandhula, era ng'ali nda." 
Luke2:6 Agho olwatuuka nga bakaali eyo, enaku dhe edh'okuzaala dhaatuuka." 
Luke2:7 Yaazaala omwana we omuberi nga mulenzi, yaamuzingirira mu bugozi, yaamuta mu kiibo ensolo mwe dhiriira kuba tibaafuna kifo mu ndhu ey'abageni." 
Luke2:8 Mu kiketezo ekyo mwalimu abaayi abaabanga eyo mu byayiro obwire nga bakuuma ebyayo byaibwe. 
Luke2:9 Agho malaika wa Musengwa yaidha ghe baali, ekitiisa kya Musengwa kyayaka okubeezungulula era baatya inho." 
Luke2:10 Aye malaika yaabakoba ati: “Mutatya, mubone eno, mbaleeteire Amawulire Amalungi era agasangaaza eri abantu boonaboona" 
Luke2:11 kuba olwaleero, mu kibuga kya Daudi, omununuzi Kurisito Musengwa, abazaaliirwa." 
Luke2:12 Kano akamanhiso kwe munaamanhira: Mwidha kwagaana omwana omughere nga bamuzingiriire mu bugozi nga bamulambaaziiza mu kitabo.” 
Luke2:13 Tibwalwa nga ghabaagho ogukuukuubira ogw'eigye eikologho ery'omu igulu ghalala ni malaika ole, baasaaka Katonda nga bakoba bati:" 
Luke2:14 “Ekitiisa kibe ye Katonda eyo ghaigulu yeene, n'emiraala gibe ku nsi ku bantu be b'agonza.”" 
Luke2:15 Bamalaika bwe baamala okuva abaayi ghe baali ni baja mu igulu, abaayi baakoba bati: “Tuje e Bethelehemu tubone kino ekibaireyo, Musengwa ky'atumanhiisa.”" 
Luke2:16 Baaja nga bangugha, baayagaana Maria ni Yosefu n'omwana omughere nga bamulambaaziiza agho mu kitabo." 
Luke2:17 Bwe baabona omwana, baaghaya ku bintu malaika bye yabakobera ku mwana oyo" 
Luke2:18 era boonaboona abaabiwulira, beewuunhia inho ebintu bino abaayi bye baabakobera." 
Luke2:19 Maria ebibono ebyo byonabyona yaabita ku mwoyo era yaabirowoozangaku inho. 
Luke2:20 Abaayi baagolola nga bagulumiza Katonda era nga bwe bamusaaka, olwa byonabyona bye baabona ni bye baawulira nga bwe byabakoberwa." 
Luke2:21 Bwe dhaatuuka enaku omunaana omwana okukeketebwa, baamutuuma eriina Yesu, eriina malaika lye yamweta nga n'enda ye ekaali kutoolebwa." 
Luke2:22 Enaku edh'okutukuzibwa kwaibwe bwe dhaatuuka nga bwekiri mu Mateeka ga Musa, baamutwala e Yerusalemu okumughaayo ye Musengwa." 
Luke2:23 Nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Musengwa kiti: “Buli mwigulanda ow'obulenzi anaabanga mulonde wa Musengwa.” 
Luke2:24 Era baaja n'okughaayo omusengo nga bwe kyalagirwa mu iteeka lya Musengwa amayemba abiri oba enjiibwa ento ibiri. 
Luke2:25 Mu Yerusalemu mwalimu omuntu, eriina lye nga ni Simeoni, nga muntu akola ebituufu, atya Katonda ng'alindirira okununulwa kwa Isiraeli, era Mwoyo Mutukuvu ng'amuliku." 
Luke2:26 Mwoyo Mutukuvu yali amaze okumumanhisaaku ati talifa ng'akaali kubona ku Kurisito, omusiige wa Musengwa." 
Luke2:27 Oyo ni yaidha mu isinzizo, Mwoyo Mutukuvu nga n'amukobye. Era abazaire ab'omwana Yesu bwe baamuleeta okumukolaku ebimugemaku ng'empisa y'eiteeka bwe yali," 
Luke2:28 yaamugema mu mikono gye, yaasaaka Katonda ng'akoba ati:" 
Luke2:29 “Mperaano Musengwa, siibula omugheereza wo mu idembe nga bwe wakoba." 
Luke2:30 Kuba amaiso gange gaboine okulokola kwo," 
Luke2:31 kwe wategekera mu maiso ag'amaghanga goonagoona: 
Luke2:32 Ekimulika eky'okumulisa amaghanga ekitiisa, eky'abantu bo Abaisiraeli.”" 
Luke2:33 Ise n'inhina beewuunhia inho ebibono bino ebyamwogerwaku. 
Luke2:34 Simeoni yaabasabira enkabi, ate yaakoba Maria inhina ati: “Ono omwana ateereibwagho olw'okuzikirira n'okuzuukira okw'abangi mu Isiraeli, era abe akamanhiso ak'okutakania." 
Luke2:35 N'iwe mwene weena omwoyo gwo empiima erigufumita, olwo ebidhuubo ebiri mu myoyo egy'abangi byeyerula.”" 
Luke2:36 Era ghaaligho ni Anna omulanzi mughala wa Fanueli, ow'ekika kya Asheri, eyali omukazi omukaire. Okuva ku myaka gye egy'obwegha yamala n'iba emyaka musanvu." 
Luke2:37 Yaaba namwandu okutuusa emyaka kinaana n'ena. Yali nga tava mu isinzizo, omusana n'obwire ng'ali ku kugheereza Katonda, kusaba na kusiiba." 
Luke2:38 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo yaatuuka yeebaza Katonda, era yaayogera ku mwana oyo eri boonaboona abaali balindirira okununulwa kwa Yerusalemu." 
Luke2:39 Bwe baamala byonabyona eiteeka lya Musengwa bye liragira, bairayo e Galilaaya, mu kyalo eky'ewaibwe e Nazarethi." 
Luke2:40 Omwana yaakula yaaba wa maani, ng'aidhwire amagezi era n'enkabi dha Katonda ng'ali nadho." 
Luke2:41 Buli mwaka, abazaire ba Yesu baajanga e Yerusalemu ku Kibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa." 
Luke2:42 Bwe yagheza emyaka eikumi n'ebiri egy'obukulu, baniinaniina okuja ku kibinuko, ng'empisa bwe yali." 
Luke2:43 Enaku bwe dhaawaaku, nga bali kwirayo, omwana Yesu yaasigala mu Yerusalemu. Aye abazaire be tibaamanha," 
Luke2:44 baali badhuuba bati bali naye mu bantu, be baali bali kutambula nabo. Era baatambula olugendo lwa lunaku lulamba, nga bali kumwagala mu b'ekika ni mu bamanhe." 
Luke2:45 Bwe bataamubona, bairayo e Yerusalemu nga bali kumwagala." 
Luke2:46 Nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu, baamwagaana mu isinzizo ng'atyaime ghagati mu beegeresa ng'abawulirisa, ate nga bw'ababuuza ebibuuzo." 
Luke2:47 Era boonaboona abaamuwulirisa beewuunhia inho amagezi ge, ni bye yairangamu." 
Luke2:48 Abazaire be bwe baamubona, baayasaamirira, era inhina yaamukoba ati: “Mwana wange, lwaki otukoze otyo? Bona, lata wo ninze obweira tuli kukwagala nga tuli beeraliikirivu inho.”" 
Luke2:49 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Mubaire mundhagalira ki? Mubaire timwidhi nga nteekwa okuba ku gwa Lata wange?” 
Luke2:50 Aye ekibono kye yabakoba tibaakitegeera. 
Luke2:51 Agho Yesu yaaserengeta nabo, yaatuuka e Nazarethi, era yaabawuliranga. Inhina ebintu ebyo byonabyona yaabita ku mwoyo." 
Luke2:52 Yesu yeeyongera mu magezi n'okukula era n'okugonzebwa Katonda n'abantu. 
Luke3:1 Agho mu mwaka ogweikumi n'etaanu ogw'obufuzi bwa Tiberio Kaisari, Pontio Pilato yali nga n'afuga Buyudaaya, ate Herode nga n'ow'eisaza ly'e Galilaaya, muganda we Filipo nga n'ow'eisaza ly'e Iturea n'ekiketezo eky'e Turakoniti, ate Lisania nga n'ow'eisaza ly'e Abilene," 
Luke3:2 era Bakabona Abakulu baali nga ni Anna ni Kayafa. Mu kiseera ekyo ekibono kya Katonda kyatuuka ku Yoanne mutabane wa Zekaria eyo mu irungu. 
Luke3:3 Yoanne yaaja woonawoona mu biketezo ebyetooloire Yorudani, yaalangirira okubatizibwa okw'okwenenia okusoniyibwa ebibi." 
Luke3:4 Nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Isaia omulanzi kiti: “Ghaligho eiroboozi ery'oyo aleekaanira mu irungu ati, ‘Mutegeke Musengwa gh'anaabita, era mutereeze obugira bwe." 
Luke3:5 Buli kiiko kiriidhuzibwamu eitaka, buli lusozi na buli kasozi byasendebwa. Engira engodegode dhiritereezebwa, n'edh'ebikonko dhaanhirizibwa." 
Luke3:6 Olwo abantu boonaboona baabona nga Katonda bw'alokola.’ ” 
Luke3:7 Abantu kamaala beesomba okwidha ye Yoanne okubatizibwa. Kyeyava n'abakoba ati: “Imwe eizaire ery'emisota, naani eyabalabula okulumuka ekibonerezo ekiri kwidha?" 
Luke3:8 Agho ni, mwanie ebibala ebigwaniire okwenenia, era mutatoolera na kukoba mule muti, ‘Tuli ni iseife Aburahamu.’ Kuba ka mbakobere mu mabaale gano, Katonda aghanga okufuniramu Aburahamu abaana!" 
Luke3:9 Kwo n'okuba empasa eteereibwa ku kikolo eky'emiti kale buli muti ogutaania bibala bikalamu gwa kutemebwa era gusuulibwe mu muliro.” 
Luke3:10 Abantu baamubuuza bati: “Mperaano tukole ki?” 
Luke3:11 Yaabairamu ati: “Ali n'ebivaalo ebibiri agheeku azira, n'oyo ali n'emere yeena akole n'ekirala.”" 
Luke3:12 Abaghooza ab'omusolo boona baidha okubatizibwa, era baamubuuza bati: “Mwegeresa, ife tukole ki?”" 
Luke3:13 Yaabakoba ati: “Mutaswisangagho ku ekyo ekibalagirwa.” 
Luke3:14 Abaisirukale boona baamubuuza bati: “Ate ife twena tukole ki?” Yaabairamu ati: “Mutanhaganga muntu yeenayeena waire okumughaamirizanga, mube bamativu n'ekyo ekibasasulwa.”" 
Luke3:15 Abantu beesumba inho, era boonaboona baadhuuba mu myoyo gyaibwe bati oba Yoanne yandiba Kurisito." 
Luke3:16 Yoanne yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene nze mbabatiza na maadhi, aye ansinga obukumu aidha, ye ntagwaniire waire okusibulula obusibiro obw'engaito dhe. Oyo alibabatiza na Mwoyo Mutukuvu era na muliro." 
Luke3:17 Wuuyo agemye olugali mu ngalo aja kulongoosa bukalamu ekifo kye aghakubirwa engaano, engaano agisololeze mu kyagi, omusinsi agwokye n'omuliro ogutazikira.”" 
Luke3:18 Kale atyo ni yaakubiriza abantu n'ebintu ebindi kamaala ng'abakobera Amawulire Amalungi. 
Luke3:19 Aye Herode ow'eisaza, Yoanne ye yanenia olwa Herodia muka muganda we n'olw'ebibi byonabyona bye yali akoze," 
Luke3:20 yaayongeraku ni kino kyona: yaigalira Yoanne mu ikomera. 
Luke3:21 Agho olwatuuka, abantu boonaboona nga bamaze okubatizibwa, ni Yesu ng'amaze okubatizibwa ng'ali kusaba, eigulu lyabwikuka." 
Luke3:22 Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaika ng'afaanana oti njiibwa yaamwikaku, ate eiroboozi lyaidha okuva mu igulu lyakoba liti: “Niiwe mutabane wange omugonzi, nkwesiimiramu inho.”" 
Luke3:23 Yesu ghe yatandiikira okwegeresa nga wa myaka nga makumi asatu, era nga kimanhiibwa kiti: Mwana wa Yosefu omwana wa Heli," 
Luke3:24 omwana wa Matthati, omwana wa Levi, omwana wa Meliki, omwana wa Yannai, omwana wa Yosefu," 
Luke3:25 omwana wa Mattathia, omwana wa Amosi, omwana wa Nahumu, omwana wa Esili, omwana wa Naggai," 
Luke3:26 omwana wa Maathi, omwana wa Mattathia, omwana wa Semei, omwana wa Yoseki, omwana wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 omwana wa Yoanani, omwana wa Reesa, omwana wa Zerubbabeli, omwana wa Shealutieli, omwana wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 omwana wa Meliki, omwana wa Addi, omwana wa Kosamu, omwana wa Elimadamu, omwana wa Eri," 
Luke3:29 omwana wa Yoshua, omwana wa Eliezeri, omwana wa Yorimu, omwana wa Matthati, omwana wa Levi," 
Luke3:30 omwana wa Simeoni, omwana wa Yuda, omwana wa Yosefu, omwana wa Yonamu omwana wa Eliakimu," 
Luke3:31 omwana wa Melea, omwana wa Menna, omwana wa Mattatha, omwana wa Nathani, omwana wa Daudi," 
Luke3:32 omwana wa Yesse, omwana wa Obedi, omwana wa Boazi, omwana wa Sala, omwana wa Nahashoni" 
Luke3:33 omwana wa Amminadabu, omwana wa Adimini, omwana wa Arini, omwana wa Hezironi, omwana wa Perezi, omwana wa Yuda" 
Luke3:34 omwana wa Yakobo, omwana wa Isaaka, omwana wa Aburahamu, omwana wa Tera, omwana wa Nahori," 
Luke3:35 omwana wa Serugi, omwana wa Reu, omwana wa Pelegi, omwana wa Eberi, omwana wa Shela" 
Luke3:36 omwana wa Kainani, omwana wa Arifakisadi, omwana wa Shemu, omwana wa Noa, omwana wa Lameka," 
Luke3:37 omwana wa Methusela, omwana wa Enoka, omwana wa Yaredi, omwana wa Mahalaleeli, omwana wa Kainani," 
Luke3:38 omwana wa Enoshi, omwana wa Sethi, omwana wa Adamu, omwana wa Katonda." 
Luke4:1 Yesu yaira okuva ku Yorudani, ng'aidhwire Mwoyo Mutukuvu, era Mwoyo yaamutwala mu irungu," 
Luke4:2 yaamala enaku amakumi ana (40) Sitaani ng'amukema. Mu nnaku edho tiyalya ku kantu koonakoona, era bwe dhaawaaku endhala yaamuluma." 
Luke4:3 Sitaani yaamukoba ati: “Oba nga oli Mwana wa Katonda, koba eibaale lino lifuuke omugaati.”" 
Luke4:4 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Omuntu taba mulamu lwa mugaati gwonka.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Agho Sitaani yaamutwala ku lusozi era mu kaseera akazira ghe kaaga yaamulaga obwakyabazinga bwonabwona. 
Luke4:6 Yaamukoba ati: “Ndidha kukugha obukumu ku bwakyabazinga obwo bwonabwona n'ebitiibwa byabwo, kuba byampeebwa era ye mba nhenze ye mbigha." 
Luke4:7 Kale bw'okuba amakiryaivu n'onsinza, byonabyona biidha kuba bibyo.”" 
Luke4:8 Yesu yairamu ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Osinzanga Musengwa Katonda wo, era ni yenka y'ogheerezanga.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Baava agho Sitaani yaamutwala e Yerusalemu yaamuta ku kasolya ak'eisinzizo, yaamukoba ati: “Oba oli Mwana wa Katonda va ghano weesuule ghansi" 
Luke4:10 kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Aliragira bamalaika be baakulabirira, baakukuuma’" 
Luke4:11 era kiti, ‘Balikulera mu ngalo dhaibwe olobe kwekonta kigere ku ibaale.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Tokemanga Musengwa Katonda wo.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Sitaani ng'amaze okumukema mu ngeri yoonayoona, yaamuviira okutuusa ng'ebiseera bituuse." 
Luke4:14 Agho Yesu mu maani ga Mwoyo Mutukuvu yairayo e Galilaaya, era kyawulikika mu biketezo byonabyona ebyetooloire agho." 
Luke4:15 Yaayegeresa mu sinagoga dhaibwe nga boonaboona bamutaamu ekitiisa. 
Luke4:16 Yaatuuka e Nazarethi ye yakulira, ku Sabbato yangira mu sinagoga nga bwe yali amanhiriire, yaasituka okusoma." 
Luke4:17 Baamugha ekitabo. Bwe yakiwumbulula yaatuuka aghaaghandiikibwa bino: 
Luke4:18 “Omwoyo gwa Musengwa gundiku, kuba yansiiga omuzigo okukobera abaavu Amawulire Amalungi. Yantuma okukobera abasibe nti baidha kulekulwa, n'abatulu nti baidha kubona. Era yantuma okuwonia abo abatuntuzibwa," 
Luke4:19 n'okulangirira omwaka gwa Musengwa ogw'okulokolwa.” 
Luke4:20 Yaawumbaku ekitabo yaakiiriza omugheereza, yaatyama. Boonaboona abaali mu sinagoga baamutaaku amaiso." 
Luke4:21 Agho yaatoolera okubakoba ati: “Ebyaghandiikibwa bino bye muwuliire n'amatu gaimwe, olwaleero bituukiriire.”" 
Luke4:22 Boonaboona baasiima era beewuunhia inho ebibono ebiwoomu ebyali bimuvaamu, era baakoba bati: “Ono ti n'omwana wa Yosefu?”" 
Luke4:23 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Nkakasa nga mwidha kunkoba ng'olugero luno bwe lukoba luti, ‘Omuyigha, weeyighe mwene,’ era muti, ‘Ebyo bye twawuliranga bye wakolera e Kaperinaumu, bikolereku ni ghano ku kyalo eky'ewaimwe woona.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere ezira mulanzi aikirizibwa ku kyalo kya waibwe. 
Luke4:25 “Aye mbakobera mu butuufu bwene: Mu byanda bya Eliya, banamwandu baali kamaala mu Isiraeli eigulu bwe lyesiba emyaka esatu n'emyezi omukaaga, endhala ey'amaani n'egwa mu nsi woonawoona." 
Luke4:26 Aye Eliya tiyatumwa eri waire omulala ati ku abo, okutoolaku ew'omukazi namwandu ow'omu Zarefathi eky'omu Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Ate era ab'endwaire ey'ebigenge baali kamaala mu Isiraeli mu byanda bya Elisha omulanzi. Aye era ku abo ghazira naire mulala eyawonezebwa okutoolaku Naamani Omusiria.” 
Luke4:28 Boonaboona abaali mu sinagoga bwe baawulira ebyo baidhula obusungu. 
Luke4:29 Baasituka baamubingira ku luya okw'ekibuga, baamutwala ku mpumi ey'olusozi ekibuga kyaibwe kwe kyazimbibwa, nga benda bamusuule ghansi." 
Luke4:30 Aye yaababitamu ghagati yaaja. 
Luke4:31 Agho yaaserengeta e Kaperinaumu, ekibuga eky'omu Galilaaya era yaabeegeresa ku lwa Sabbato." 
Luke4:32 Beewuunhia endhegeresa ye, kuba ebibono bye nga bya buyinza." 
Luke4:33 Mu sinagoga mwalimu omuntu eyaliku omuzimu omubi, yaayasiikanira ghaigulu ati:" 
Luke4:34 “Tuleke, otwendeza ki, Yesu Omunazarethi? Oidhie kutuzikiriza? Nze nkwidhi, niiwe omutukuvu wa Katonda.”" 
Luke4:35 Aye Yesu yaagukaabukira ati: “Sirika era muveeku.” Omuzimu gwamusuula ghansi mu bantu, gwamuvaaku nga tigumukosiisa." 
Luke4:36 Boonaboona baayasaamirira, era buli muntu yaakoba mwine ati: “Kiki kino? Emizimu emibi agiragira n'obukumu n'amaani gyavaagho!”" 
Luke4:37 Agho ebibono ebimufaaku byatuuka mu buli kifo ekyetooloire agho. 
Luke4:38 Agho Yesu yaasituka yaava mu sinagoga, yangira mu ndhu ya Simoni. Yaayagaana mukoirume wa Simoni ng'ali n'omusuudha omungi, era baamusaba amuwonie." 
Luke4:39 Yaayemerera ghe yali yaalagira omusuudha gwa muleka, era mangu ago yaasitukiramu yaabagheereza." 
Luke4:40 Agho endhuba bwe yali ng'egwa, boonaboona abaali n'abagodhe ab'ebirwaire ebya buli nsambo, baabaleeta gh'ali, era yaabagemaku mulala mulala yaabawonia." 
Luke4:41 Era n'emizimu emibi gyona gyava ku bantu kamaala nga gyasiikana giti: “Iwe oli Mwana wa Katonda!” Yaagikaabukira nga tagiganha kwogera, kuba gyali gimwidhi nga ni Kurisito." 
Luke4:42 Bwe bwakya enkyo yaavaagho yaaja mu kifo omuzira bantu. Aye abantu baamwagala era baamutuukaku, baamusigaza nga tibenda abaveeku." 
Luke4:43 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Nteekwa okwegeresa ab'omu bibuga ebindi boona eby'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, kuba natumibwa lwa kino.”" 
Luke4:44 Era yaayegeresa mu sinagoga edh'omu Buyudaaya mwonamwona. 
Luke5:1 Agho olwatuuka, bwe yali ng'ayemereire ku mbali kw'enhandha Gennesareti, abantu nga bali kumwenhigirizaaku abaali benda okuwulira ekibono kya Katonda,"
