Luke5:2 yaabona amaato abiri ku bukalu aye ng'abavubi bagaviiremu nga bali kwamula obutimba bwaibwe. 
Luke5:3 Yaaniina mu lyato irala, erya Simoni, yaamukoba aliseeseeyooku katono okuva ku bukalu, yaatyama yaayegeresa abantu ng'ali mu lyato." 
Luke5:4 Bwe yamala okwogera, yaakoba Simoni ati: “Twala eryato ere mu maadhi amangi, mutege obutimba bwaimwe mugemye ebyenhandha.”" 
Luke5:5 Simoni yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa twafaabiikaine obwire bwonabwona ghazira kye twagemiisa. Aye olw'ekibono kyo ndidha kutega obutimba.” 
Luke5:6 Bwe baakola ekyo baagemya ebyenhandha kamaala n'obutimba bwayenda kukanuka. 
Luke5:7 Baaghemya bavubi banaibwe ab'eryato erindi baidhe bababeereku. Baidha baidhuza amaato gombi gaayenda na kudimira. 
Luke5:8 Simoni Petero bwe yabona atyo yaagwa ku bikiryaivu bya Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa ndeka kuba nze ndi mwonooni!” 
Luke5:9 Kuba Petero ni boonaboona be yali nabo baali mu kwewuunhia kungi olw'ebyenhandha kamaala bityo bye baagemya. 
Luke5:10 Era mu nsambo n'endala Yakobo ni Yoanne abaana ba Zebedaayo baine ba Simoni boona baayasaamirira. Yesu yaakoba Simoni ati: “Otatya, okuva ni mperaano oidha kuba muvubi wa bantu.”" 
Luke5:11 Era olwatuusa amaato ku bukalu baaleka byonabyona baamunonereza. 
Luke5:12 Olwatuuka Yesu bwe yali ali mu kibuga kirala, ghaabaagho omusaadha nga alwaire endwaire ey'ebigenge. Bwe yabona Yesu, yeeyala ku itaka, yaamweghemba ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa, bw'oyenda, oghanga okumponia.”" 
Luke5:13 Yesu yaagolola omukono yaamugemaku yaakoba ati: “Nhenda, wona!” Era mangu ago ng'endwaire ey'ebigenge emuleka." 
Luke5:14 Yaamusikirira obutakoberaku muntu yeenayeena, aye aje yeeyandhule ye kabona, agheeyo ekirabo olw'okuwona kwe, nga Musa bwe yalagira, ng'okwo kwe bali n'okukakalisa." 
Luke5:15 Aye ebimufaaku byayongera kusansaana, era abantu kamaala beesoloza okumuwulirisa n'okuwonezebwa ebibaluma." 
Luke5:16 Aye Yesu yaabavangaku yaaja eyo ezira bantu yaasaba. 
Luke5:17 Lwali lulala, Yesu yali ayegeresa, era ng'ali n'amaani ga Musengwa ag'okuwonia. Abafarisaayo n'Abanamateeka abaali baviire mu buli kyalo: abaava e Galilaaya, mu Buyudaaya, ni mu Yerusalemu nga batyaime agho." 
Luke5:18 Ghaidhagho abasaadha nga basitwire omuntu ku ndiri, nga yagogoma. Baayenda bamusitule bamungize bamumute mu maiso." 
Luke5:19 Aye bwe baalemwa okufuna engeri ey'okumusitula okumwingiza olw'eikuukuubira ery'abantu, baaniina ghaigulu ku ndhu, baatoolaghooku obutegula, baamwisiza agho n'endiri ye, baamuta ghagati mu maiso ga Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Yesu bwe yabona okwikiriza kwaibwe yaakoba ati: “Musaadha iwe, osoniyiibwa ebibi byo.”" 
Luke5:21 Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo baatoolera okwebuuza nga bakoba bati: “Ono naani ayogera ebivuma Katonda? Naani aghanga okusonigha ebibi okutoolaku Katonda yenka?” 
Luke5:22 Aye Yesu yaamanha ebidhuubo byaibwe, yaakoba ati: “Lwaki mudhuuba mutyo mu myoyo gyaimwe." 
Luke5:23 Kiki ekisinga obwangu, okukoba nti, ‘Ebibi byo bikusoniyiibwa,’ oba nti, ‘Situka otambule’?" 
Luke5:24 Aye ka mumanhe muti Omwana w'Omuntu ali n'obukumu ku nsi okusonigha ebibi.” Agho yaakoba omugogomu ati: “Nkoba iwe, situka ogeme endiri yo oje ewaimwe.”" 
Luke5:25 Era ng'asitukiramu omulundi mulala nga balingiriire, ng'agema ndiri kwe yali alambaire, ng'agolola ewuwe nga bw'asaaka Katonda." 
Luke5:26 Boonaboona baayasaamirira, baasaaka Katonda, era nga baidhwire okutya baakoba bati: “Olwaleero tuboine ebinene!”" 
Luke5:27 Ebyo olwawa, yaavaagho yaaja, yaabona omughooza ow'omusolo ng'eriina lye ni Levi, ng'atyaime agho ghe bawooleza, yaamukoba ati: “Nnonereza.”" 
Luke5:28 Yaaleka byonabyona yaasituka yaamunonereza. 
Luke5:29 Levi oyo yaamukolera embaga ey'amaani mu ndhu ye. Era abaghooza kamaala n'abantu abandi abaaligho yaalya nabo. 
Luke5:30 Aye Abafarisaayo n'Abanamateeka baibwe beemuluguunhia, baakoba Abeegeresebwa be bati: “Lwaki mulya era ni munhwa n'abaghooza n'aboonooni?”" 
Luke5:31 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Abalamu ti n'abenda omuyigha, aye abalwaire." 
Luke5:32 Abatuufu ti be naidha okweta, aye aboonooni.”" 
Luke5:33 Kabiri baamukoba bati: “Abeegeresebwa ba Yoanne basiiba emikuzi kamaala eno bwe basaba, n'abeegeresebwa ab'Abafarisaayo boona bakola batyo, aye ababo balya era baanhwa.”" 
Luke5:34 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Abageni b'oyo abayiiza musobola mutya okubasiibya ng'abayiiza akaali nabo? 
Luke5:35 Aye ekiseera kiidha, era abayiiza bw'alibatoolebwaku olwo ni mu kiseera ekyo balisiiba.”" 
Luke5:36 Ate yaabakobera n'olufumo luno: “Ezira akanula kighero ku lugoye luyaaka n'akitunga ku lugoye lukaire. Bw'akikola, oluyaaka alukanula ate n'ekighero eky'oluyaaka kyaloba kutuukana na lukaire." 
Luke5:37 Era ezira afuka mwenge gwa mizabbibu mu nsawo dha luwu nkaire bw'akikola omwenge ogwo omusu gutulisa ensawo gwafukika, n'ensawo dhaadhagalika." 
Luke5:38 Aye omwenge gw'emizabbibu omusu guteekwa kuteebwa mu nsawo dha luwu mpyaka. 
Luke5:39 Era ghazira anhwa mwenge gwa mizabbibu muwolu ni yeegomba musu kuba akoba ati omuwolu n'ogusinga.” 
Luke6:1 Olwatuuka Yesu yaabita mu musiri ogw'engaano ku lwa Sabbato. Abeegeresebwa be baanoga ku ngaano baagikunhira mu ngalo dhaibwe baalya. 
Luke6:2 Abandi ku Bafarisaayo baakoba bati: “Lwaki mukola ekitaikirizibwa ku Sabbato?” 
Luke6:3 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Timusomangaku ku Daudi kye yakola, mwene endhala bwe yamuluma ni be yali nabo," 
Luke6:4 bwe yangira mu ndhu ya Katonda n'atoola emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda n'alya, n'aghaaku ni be yali nabo egitaikirizibwa kuliibwa bandi, okutoolaku bakabona bonka?”" 
Luke6:5 Yaabakoba ati: “Omwana w'Omuntu n'afuga Sabbato.” 
Luke6:6 Ku lwa Sabbato olundi, Yesu yangira mu sinagoga okwegeresa. Omwo mwalimu omuntu ng'omukono gwe omusaadha gwaniala." 
Luke6:7 Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo beekalirisa Yesu babone oba ng'awonia ku Sabbato, bafune ensonga ey'okumuvunaana." 
Luke6:8 Aye Yesu yaategeera ebidhuubo byaibwe, yaakoba omusaadha ow'omukono ogwaniala ati: “Situka oyemerere ghagati.” Yaasituka yaayemerera." 
Luke6:9 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Leka mbabuuze: Kiikirizibwa ku Sabbato okukola obulungi oba okukola obubi? Okuwonia obulamu oba okubuzikiriza?” 
Luke6:10 Yaabeezunguluza amaiso boonaboona, yaakoba omusaadha ati: “Funhulula omukono gwo.” Yaagufunhulula era gwawona." 
Luke6:11 Aye bale baidhula obusungu, era beekobaana ku kye babe bakole Yesu." 
Luke6:12 Olwatuuka mu nnaku edho, Yesu yaaja ku lusozi okusaba, era yaakyesa obwire ng'asaba Katonda." 
Luke6:13 Bwe bwakya yaayeta Abeegeresebwa be, yaalondaku eikumi na babiri be yayeta Abatume:" 
Luke6:14 Simoni era ye yatuuma erya Petero, ni muganda we Anderea, ni Yakobo, ni Yoanne, ni Filipo, ni Barutholomayo," 
Luke6:15 ni Matayo, ni Thomasi, ni Yakobo mutabane wa Alufaayo, ni Simoni ayetebwa Omuzeloti," 
Luke6:16 ni Yuda mutabane wa Yakobo ni Yuda Isikarioti, eyamulyamu olukwe." 
Luke6:17 Agho yaikirira nabo, yaayemerera ku museetwe ghalala n'eikuukuubira ery'Abeegeresebwa be, n'olukunkumuli olw'abantu abaava mu Buyudaaya bwonabwona, ni mu Yerusalemu, ni mu biketezo eby'oku nhandha ebiriinaine Tiro ni Sidoni," 
Luke6:18 abaidha okumuwulira n'okuwonezebwa ebirwaire byaibwe. N'abaali badaazibwadaazibwa emizimu emibi boona baawonezebwa. 
Luke6:19 Abantu boonaboona baagezaaku okumugemaku, kuba amaani gaamuvangamu gaaja gaabawonia boonaboona." 
Luke6:20 Yesu yaalingirira Abeegeresebwa be yaakoba ati: “Muli ba nkabi abaavu, kuba Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda bwaimwe." 
Luke6:21 Muli ba nkabi abayala buti, kuba muliigusibwa. Muli ba nkabi abagegenga buti, kuba mulisangaala." 
Luke6:22 “Muli ba nkabi abantu bwe banaabakyaghanga, bwe banaabeeyawulangaku, bwe banaabavumanga, bwe baneenhinhalanga eriina lyaimwe bati ibi, nga babalanga Omwana ow'Omuntu." 
Luke6:23 Musagambanga ku lunaku olwo era mwedhaganga, kuba empeera yaimwe mu igulu nnene kuba era ni badhaadha baibwe batyo bwe baabisa abalanzi." 
Luke6:24 Aye mukagwireku imwe abakombe, kuba muli n'ebibasanhusa." 
Luke6:25 Mukagwireku imwe buti abaigwite, kuba endhala eribaluma. Mukagwireku imwe abaseka mperaano, kuba muligegenga, mwalira." 
Luke6:26 “Mukagwireku imwe, abantu boonaboona bwe banaaboogerangaku ebikalamu, kuba ni badhaadha baibwe batyo bwe baakola ku balanzi abasubayi." 
Luke6:27 “Aye ka mbakobere imwe abampulirisa: Mugonzenga abazigu baimwe, ababakyagha mubakoleranga birungi," 
Luke6:28 ababakolimira mubendezanga nkabi, era musabiranga ababavuma." 
Luke6:29 Ole bw'akukubanga ku itama omugaluliranga n'erindi, ole bw'akutoolangaku ky'ovaala tomuloberanga kutwala ni kye weebwika." 
Luke6:30 Buli akusaba omughanga, ate ole akutoolangaku ebibyo otabimusabanga." 
Luke6:31 Era nga bwe mwandyenze abantu babakolere, mwena bwe mube mubakolere." 
Luke6:32 “Oba nga mugonza ababagonza kiri gha agho ekibasiimisa? Kuba n'aboonooni bagonza ababagonza. 
Luke6:33 Oba nga mukolera bukalamu abo ababakolera obukalamu, kiki agho ekibasiimisa? Kuba n'aboonooni bakola n'ekirala." 
Luke6:34 Era oba nga muwola abo be musuubira okufunaku, kiki agho ekibasiimisa? N'aboonooni boona bawola boonooni, baghange okufuna ekyagayaga." 
Luke6:35 “Aye imwe, mugonzenga abazigu baimwe, mubakolenga bukalamu, era muwolenga nga ghazira kye musuubirayo olwo empeera yaimwe eriba nnene. Muliba baana b'oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene kuba oyo alaga abatasiima n'aboonooni ekisa." 
Luke6:36 Mubenga ba kisa nga Lata waimwe bw'ali ow'ekisa. 
Luke6:37 “Mutasalanga musango era mwena tigulibasalirwa, mutasaliranga muntu musango kumusinga mwena tigulibasalirwa kubasinga. Musonighenga mwena mulisoniyibwa." 
Luke6:38 Mugabenga, era mwena muligheebwa. Ekipimo ekituufu ekitengeeseibwa ni kisiinhirwa, ni kiidhula era n'okuyuyika ni kiyuyika, kye balibagemya; kuba ekipimo kye mupimiramu abandi mwena kye mulipimirwamu.”" 
Luke6:39 Era yaabakobera n'olufumo luno ati: “Omutulu asobola okwembereramu mutulu mwine? Bombi tibagwa mu kiina? 
Luke6:40 Ayegeresebwa tasinga amwegeresa, aye kiisi ayegeresebwa bw'aba amaze okwegeresebwa mu bwidhuvu, aba ng'oyo amwegereisa." 
Luke6:41 “Lwaki obona akakaba akali mu liiso lya muganda wo aye n'oloba kufaayo ku kisiki ekiri mu liiso lyo lyene? 
Luke6:42 Oba, okoba otya muganda wo oti, ‘Muganda wange, ka nkutoole akakaba mu liiso,’ nga iwe mwene tobona kisiki kiri mu liryo? Muguya iwe, sooka otoole ekisiki mu liiso lyo memale oghange okubona obukalamu akakaba akali mu liiso lya muganda wo, n'okukatoolamu." 
Luke6:43 “Ezira muti mukalamu gutaaku bibala bibi, waire omuti omubi okutaaku ebibala ebikalamu." 
Luke6:44 Kuba buli muti ogumanhira ku bibala bye gutaaku. Kyova tonooneza mitiini ku miwa, oba emizabbibu ku namukodolya." 
Luke6:45 Omuntu omulungi atoola ku birungi ebiri mu mwoyo gwe yaakola ebirungi, ate omuntu omubi atoola ku bibi ebiri mu mwoyo gwe yaakola ebibi kuba ku biidhwire mu mwoyo omunwa gwe kwe gutoola bye gwogera." 
Luke6:46 “Lwaki mundheta Musengwa, Musengwa, ng'ate timukola bye nkoba?" 
Luke6:47 Buli muntu aidha ye ndi n'awulira ebibono byange era n'abijiiraku, ka mbakobere bw'afaanana:" 
Luke6:48 Ali ng'oti n'omuntu eyazimba endhu, nga yasooka yaasima ghansi, yaakuba omusingi ku lubaale, omwidhuzo gwabaagho, omwiga gwayalaala gwabanda endhu eyo, aye tigwaghanga kugitengeesa, kuba yali ezimbiibwa bukalamu." 
Luke6:49 Aye oyo awulira ebibono byange n'atabijiiraku afaanana ng'oti n'omuntu eyazimba endhu ku itaka nga tatairegho musingi, era omwiga bwe gwayalaala ni gugibanda, mangu ago ng'egwa era yaasaanagho.”" 
Luke7:1 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebibono bye byonabyona eri abaamuwulirisa, yangira mu Kaperinaumu." 
Luke7:2 Yaabaayo omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale eyali n'omwiru we ye yali agonza einho nga mulwaire era ng'ali kumpi na kufa. 
Luke7:3 Bwe yawulira ebifa ku Yesu yaamutumira abakulu b'Abayudaaya ng'amusaba aidhe awonie omwiru we. 
Luke7:4 Bwe baatuuka ye Yesu baamweghemba inho, baakoba bati: “Ogwaine okumukolera ekyo," 
Luke7:5 kuba agonza eighanga lyaife, era yatuzimbira ni sinagoga.”" 
Luke7:6 Yesu yaaja nabo. Aye bwe yali ali kumpi okutuuka ku ndhu, omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale yaatuma bakagwa be yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa otadaaga, kuba nze tigwaniire iwe ongire mu ndhu yange." 
Luke7:7 Kyova nadhuubye nga nze mwene tigwaine kwidha y'oli. Aye koba bukobe kibono, omwiru wange aidha kuwona" 
Luke7:8 kuba ndi musaadha mutwalibwa, ate era ndi n'abaisirukale be ntwala. Era nkoba ono nti, ‘Ja,’ era yaaja. Ate owundi nti, ‘Idha,’ era yaidha ate omwiru wange nti, ‘Kola kino,’ era yaakikola.”" 
Luke7:9 Yesu bwe yawulira ebyo yaamwewuunhia era yaakyuka yaakoba eikuukuubira ery'abantu abaali bamunonereza ati: “Ka mbakobere, nighemwakaba mu Isiraeli tyagaananga kwikiriza kwaga agho.”" 
Luke7:10 Abaatumibwa bwe baira eka, baayagaana ng'omwiru ali bukalamu." 
Luke7:11 Olwatuuka, ku lunaku olwairirira, Yesu yaaja mu kibuga ekyetebwa Naini. Abeegeresebwa be baaja naye n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu kamaala." 
Luke7:12 Bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okutuuka ku mulyango ogw'ekibuga, ghaabaagho omulambo gwe baali bafulumya. Omufu yali nga yazaalibwa mulala ati ku inhina, ate ng'ono yali namwandu era abantu ab'ekibuga abaaligho baali kamaala." 
Luke7:13 Musengwa bwe yamubona yaamusaasira, yaamukoba ati: “Otalira.”" 
Luke7:14 Yaaseeta yaagema ku miruumo, abaali basitwire omulambo baayemerera. Yaakoba ati: “Mwisuka, nkukoba situka!”" 
Luke7:15 Eyali omufu yaatyama, yaatoolera okwogera, era Yesu yaamugemya inhina." 
Luke7:16 Boonaboona ensisi yaabagema era baagha Katonda ekitiisa nga bakoba bati: “Mu ife mulimu omulanzi ow'amaani, era ni Katonda akyaliire abantu be!”" 
Luke7:17 Ekibono kino ekigema ku Yesu kyabuna mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona ni mu biketezo byonabyona ebiriinaine wo. 
Luke7:18 Abeegeresebwa ba Yoanne baamukobera ku bintu bino byonabyona. 
Luke7:19 Agho Yoanne yaayeta babiri ku beegeresebwa be, yaabatuma ye Musengwa okubuuza bati: “Niiwe ow'okwidha oba tusuubireyo owundi?”" 
Luke7:20 Era abasaadha bwe baatuuka ye Yesu baamukoba bati: “Yoanne Omubatiza atutumye y'oli ng'akoba ati, ‘Niiwe ow'okwidha, oba tusuubireyo owundi?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo, Yesu yaawonia abantu kamaala endwaire, ni kawumpuli, n'emizimu emibi, n'abatulu kamaala yaabagha okubona." 
Luke7:22 Agho yaabairamu yaabakoba ati: “Muje mukobere Yoanne bye muboine ni bye muwuliire: abatulu bairamu kubona, abalema batambula, ab'endwaire ey'ebigenge balongooka, abaasemba amatu bawulira, abafu bazuukizibwa, n'abaavu bakoberwa Amawulire Amalungi" 
Luke7:23 Era wa nkabi atambona nga ekitimuguunha.” 
Luke7:24 Abakwenda ba Yoanne bwe baagolola, Yesu yaatoolera okwogera ku Yoanne eri abantu ati: “Kiki ekyabatwala mu irungu okubona? Lugada empewo lw'etengeesa?" 
Luke7:25 Bwenebwene kiki ekyabatwala okubona? Muntu avaire amadholobera? Abavaala amadholobera era nga bali mu kwedhalabya baba mu bisaagaati bya bakyabazinga. 
Luke7:26 Aye imwe kiki ekyabatwala okubona? Mulanzi? N'agh'agho. Ate ka mbakobere oyo asinga n'omulanzi. 
Luke7:27 N'oyo ye kyaghandiikibwaku kiti, ‘Bona ndi kutuma omukwenda wange akwembereremu, aidha okukutegekera engira yo mw'olibita.’" 
Luke7:28 Ka mbakobere ezira muntu yeenayeena azaalibwa mukazi asinga Yoanne aye asembayo mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda amusinga.” 
Luke7:29 Abantu boonaboona baamuwulira, era abaghooza ab'omusolo baamanha obutuufu bwa Katonda, Yoanne yaababatiza." 
Luke7:30 Aye Abafarisaayo n'Abanamateeka baaloba amagezi ga Katonda, era tiyababatiza." 
Luke7:31 Yesu yaayongera okubakoba ati: “Kale abantu ab'oluse luno nnaabageza ku ki? Bafaanana ki? 
Luke7:32 Bafaanana ng'oti n'abaana abatyaime mu kiya abayetagana nga bakoba bati, ‘Twabafuuyira endere timwakina, twakuba empungu timwagegenga!’" 
Luke7:33 Yoanne Omubatiza yaidha nga talya mugaati era nga tanhwa mwenge, mwakoba muti, ‘Aliku omuzimu omubi!’" 
Luke7:34 Ate Omwana w'Omuntu yaidha ng'alya era ng'anhwa, mwakoba muti, ‘Mubone omusaadha, omulyalya, mukagwa w'abaghooza n'aboonooni!’" 
Luke7:35 Aye abaana ab'amagezi n'abakakasa obutuufu bwago.” 
Luke7:36 Agho ghaabaagho Omufarisaayo yaayeta Yesu okulya. Yesu yaaja yangira mu ndhu ey'Omufarisaayo yaatyama ku kiiwulo. 
Luke7:37 Mu kibuga omwo, mwalimu omukazi omwonooni, era bwe yamanha nga Yesu ali ku kiiwulo mu ndhu ey'Omufarisaayo, yaidha n'akadoome ak'obuwoowo." 
Luke7:38 Yaayemerera einhuma gh'ebigere bye yaalira. Era yaaboza ebigere bya Yesu n'amaziga ge, yaabisiimuuza enviiri dhe, yaabinhwegera, yaabisiiga obuwoowo." 
Luke7:39 Aye Omufarisaayo ole eyayeta Yesu bwe yabona, yaakoba mule ati: “Nguli ono abaire mulanzi yaalibaire ng'aidhi omukazi amugemaku ki ky'ali, kuba mwonooni!”" 
Luke7:40 Agho Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Simoni, ndi ni kye nkukoba.” Simoni yaakoba ati: “Mwegeresa, yogera.”" 
Luke7:41 Yesu yatoolera ati: “Ghaaligho eyali ni b'abandha babiri mulala ng'amubandha dinari ebikumi bitaanu, ate owundi makumi ataanu." 
Luke7:42 Bwe baabulwa ghe badhitoola okumusasula, yaabasonigha bombi. Kale naani ku bombi asinga okumusiima?”" 
Luke7:43 Simoni yairamu ati: “Ndhuuba ole ye yasonigha ekinene.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Osaze mu mazima.” 
Luke7:44 Yaakyuka yaalingirira omukazi, yaakoba Simoni ati: “Obona omukazi ono? Nhingiire mu ndhu yo, tompaire maadhi ga kunaaba bigere. Aye ono aboziiza ebigere byange n'amaziga ge era yaabisiimuula n'enviiri dhe." 
Luke7:45 Tonnhwegeire naku, aye ono okuviira irala bwe nhingiire talekeire kunhwegera bigere byange." 
Luke7:46 Tonsiize muzigo ku mutwe, aye ono ebigere byange abisiize obuwoowo." 
Luke7:47 Kale ka nkukobere, ebibi bye kamaala bisoniyiibwa kuba alaze okugonza kunene. Ole asoniyibwa ebitono aba n'okugonza kutono.”" 
Luke7:48 Agho yaakoba omukazi ati: “Ebibi byo bisoniyiibwa.” 
Luke7:49 Be yali nabo ku kiiwulo baatoolera okwebuuza mule bati: “Naani ono asobola n'okusonigha ebibi?” 
Luke7:50 Aye Yesu yaakoba omukazi ati: “Okwikiriza kwo kukuwoniiza, ja miraala.”" 
Luke8:1 Olwatuuka, nga ghabiseegho entangama, Yesu yaaja ng'abita mu bibuga ni mu byalo bw'alangirira era bw'akobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi ag'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, nga n'Eikumi n'Ababiri bali naye." 
Luke8:2 Era ghaaligho n'abakazi, be yali nabo abaali bawonezeibwa emizimu emibi n'ebirwaire ebindi: Maria ayetebwa Magadalene eyavaaku emizimu omusanvu," 
Luke8:3 ni Yoanna muka Kuza omughanika wa Herode, ni Susanna, n'abandi kamaala abaatoolanga ku byaibwe okuyamba Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be." 
Luke8:4 Agho abantu kamaala beesololeza aghaali Yesu okuva mu buli kibuga. Yaabakobera olufumo luno: 
Luke8:5 “Ghaabaagho omuntu eyaja okusiga ensigo bwe yali asiga, eyindi yaagwa ku ngira yaaniinirirwa era n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhaidha dhaagirya." 
Luke8:6 Eyindi yaagwa ku lubaale yaamera, aye yaavuuluka kuba tiyali na maadhi." 
Luke8:7 Eyindi yaagwa mu mawa, era olw'okukulira mu mawa gaagifundekeza." 
Luke8:8 Eyindi yaagwa mu itaka eirungi, yaakula yaayama, yaataaku kikumi.” Bwe yasirisa ebyo yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Ali n'amatu agawulira awulire!”" 
Luke8:9 Abeegeresebwa be baamubuuza olufumo olwo kye lutegeeza. 
Luke8:10 Yaakoba ati: “Imwe mwagheebwa okumanha ebyama eby'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda aye eri abandi biri mu nfumo, baabona nga tibabona, baawulira nga tibategeera.”" 
Luke8:11 “Mperaano olufumo lutegeeza kino: Ensigo, n'ekibono kya Katonda." 
Luke8:12 Eyagwa ku ngira, n'abantu abawulira ekibono kya Katonda, memale Sitaani n'aidha n'akiswankula mu myoyo gyaibwe balobe kwikiriza na kulokolebwa." 
Luke8:13 Ate eyagwa ku lubaale, n'abantu abawulira ekibono kya Katonda ni bakisangaalira n'eisanhu aye nga bazira mizi baikirizaaku kaseera buseera, aye akaseera ak'okulebwa bwe katuuka nga babivaaku." 
Luke8:14 Ate eyo eyagwa mu mawa n'abantu abawulira ekibono kya Katonda, aye bwe baja, okweraliikirira, obukombe, n'amasanhu ag'obulamu buno bibafundekeza, era tibaleeta bibala." 
Luke8:15 Eyo eyagwa mu itaka eirungi, n'abo abawulira ekibono kya Katonda n'omwoyo ogugwaine era omulungi, baakikalangula baabala ebibala nga baguminkiriza." 
Luke8:16 “Ezira muntu akunaania itaala kabiri n'alifundikaku kiibo, oba n'alita mu kunkuliisi aye alita ku kikondo kyalyo memale abangira baabona okumulika kwalyo." 
Luke8:17 “Kuba ezira kigise kitalikwekulwa, waire kyama ekitalimanhibwa mu lwatu." 
Luke8:18 “Mwegendereze niini ensambo ye muwuliramu, kuba oyo ali ni kyali nakyo aligheebwa, ate oyo azira, ni ky'adhuuba okuba nakyo kirimutoolebwaku.”" 
Luke8:19 Agho inhina ni baganda be baidha y'ali, aye tibaaghanga kumutuukaku olw'abantu okuba kamaala." 
Luke8:20 Baamukobera bati: “Inhoko ni baganda bo beemereire ku luya benda okukubona.” 
Luke8:21 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mukaire wange ni baganda bange n'abo abawulira ekibono kya Katonda era ni bakikoleraku.” 
Luke8:22 Lwali lulala Yesu yaaniina mu lyato n'Abeegeresebwa be, yaabakoba ati: “Tusomoke enhandha tuje kule.” Baasimbuka baaseeyeeya." 
Luke8:23 Bwe baali nga bali kuseeyeeya yaatenduka. Agho kiwunga yaidha ku nhandha, eryato nga lyenda kwidhula era nga bali bwa ku mutawaana." 
Luke8:24 Baaseeta ghe yali baamuzuusa baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, Mwegeresa, tuli kusaanagho!” Aye bwe yazuuka, yaakaabukira kiwunga n'amaadhi agaali gatabwike byalekera era kyaba mulaala." 
Luke8:25 Yaabakoba ati: “Okwikiriza kwaimwe kuli gha?” Baatya era beewuunhia nga bwebabuuzagania bati: “Aye naani ono, alagira n'empewo n'amaadhi era ni bimuwulira!”" 
Luke8:26 Agho baaseeyeeya baikirira mu nsi ey'ab'e Gerasa eringiriire Galilaaya. 
Luke8:27 Bwe yatuuka ku bukalu yaayagaanana n'omusaadha eyali ava mu kibuga ng'aliku emizimu emibi, era yali amaze entangama nga tavaala, nga tasula mu ndhu, ng'asula eyo mu lwambiidhi omwaziikibwanga abantu." 
Luke8:28 Bwe yabona Yesu, yaagwa agho mu maiso ge era yaaleekaanira ghaigulu ati: “Yesu Omwana wa Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, onhendeza ki? Nkweghembye otandaazadaaza.”" 
Luke8:29 Kuba yalagira omuzimu omubi okumuvaaku. Emikuzi kamaala gwamugemanga, baamukuuma era baamusiba n'endhegere aye ng'edho adhikutula, omuzimu gwamutwala mu irungu." 
Luke8:30 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: “Eriina lyo niiwe ani?” Yaakoba ati: “Ninze ‘Igye,’” kuba emizimu emibi kamaala egyamuliku." 
Luke8:31 Era gyamweghemba alobe kugisindiikiriza mu lwina olutakoma. 
Luke8:32 Mperaano, agho ku lusozi ghaaligho ekighaso eky'embiidhi kamaala kale gyamusaba agiganhe gije mu mbiidhi edho, era yaagiganha." 
Luke8:33 Agho ni gyava ku musaadha gyangira mu mbiidhi era ekighaso eky'embiidhi kyalindimukira ku kiyiriro dhaagwa mu nhandha dhaadimira. 
Luke8:34 Abaali bali kudhaaya bwe baabona ebibairegho baalumuka baaja baakobera ab'omu kibuga ni mu byalo. 
Luke8:35 Abantu baaja okubona ebibairegho, era bwe baatuuka aghali Yesu, baayagaana omusaadha eyavaaku emizimu ng'atyaime agho gha bigere bya Yesu ng'avaire era ng'ategeera bukalamu, baatya." 
Luke8:36 Abo abaabona ebyabaagho baabakobera eyaliku emizimu emibi bwe yawonezebwa. 
Luke8:37 Abantu boonaboona ab'omu nsi ey'ab'e Gerasa baamusaba abaviire kuba baali batiire inho. Kale yaaniina mu lyato yairayo. 
Luke8:38 Omusaadha eyavaaku emizimu emibi yaamusaba abitenga naye aye Yesu yaamusiibula ng'akoba ati: 
Luke8:39 “Irayo eka obakobere ebikulu Katonda by'akukoleire.” Era yaaja mu kibuga mwonamwona ng'alangirira ebyo Yesu bye yamukolera. 
Luke8:40 Agho Yesu bwe yairayo, abantu kamaala baamusangaalira kuba boonaboona baali bamutegeire." 
Luke8:41 Olwo ni ghaidhagho omusaadha ayetebwa Yairo, eyali nga mukulu wa sinagoga. Yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bya Yesu yaamusaba ajeeku mu ndhu ye." 
Luke8:42 Kuba mughala we omulala bedengedenge, eyali ow'emyaka eikumi n'ebiri yali ali kufa. Bwe yali aja abantu kamaala baamwenhigirizaaku." 
Luke8:43 Ghaabaagho omukazi eyali alwaire ekikulukuto okumala emyaka ikumi n'ebiri, aye ghaabulagho asobola okumuwonia." 
Luke8:44 Ono yaaseeta ng'ava emugongo yaagema ku lusa olw'ekivaalo kya Yesu, era mangu ago ng'omusaayi gulekera agho." 
Luke8:45 Yesu yaabuuza ati: “Naani angemyeku?” Boonaboona bwe beegaana, Petero yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa, eikuukuubira ery'abantu likwetooloire era bali kukwenhigirizaaku.”" 
Luke8:46 Aye Yesu yaakoba ati: “Ghaligho angemyeku, kuba ntegeire amaani bwe ganviiremu.”" 
Luke8:47 Omukazi bwe yabona nga takaaghanga kwegisa, yaidha ng'adhugumira yeeyala agho mu maiso ga Yesu, yaayogera ekimumugemeisaaku ng'abantu boonaboona bamuwulira, era yaakoba nga bw'awoneiregho." 
Luke8:48 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Omughala, okwikiriza kwo kukuwoniiza ja miraala.”" 
Luke8:49 Yali akaayogera ghaabaagho eyaidha ng'ava ew'omukulu wa sinagoga yaakoba ati: “Mughala wo afiire, otayongera kudaaza Mwegeresa.”" 
Luke8:50 Aye Yesu bwe yawulira ekyo yaakoba Yairo ati: “Otatya, ikiriza bwikirize, aidha kuwona.”" 
Luke8:51 Bwe yatuuka ku ndhu, tiyaganha muntu wundi yeenayeena kungira naye okutoolaku Petero ni Yoanne ni Yakobo ni lata w'omughala n'inhina." 
Luke8:52 Boonaboona abaaligho, baali mu kulira na kugegenga. Aye yaabakoba ati: “Mutalira, tafiire aye atendwike!”" 
Luke8:53 Baamusekerera, nga bakiidhi ng'afiire." 
Luke8:54 Yesu yaamugema ku mukono yaamweta ati: “Omughala, situka.”" 
Luke8:55 Omughala yairibwa, yaasitukiramu era Yesu yaalagira bamughe emere alye." 
Luke8:56 Abazaire be beewuunhia aye yaabasikirira obutakoberaku muntu yeenayeena ebibairegho. 
Luke9:1 Yesu bwe yamala okweta aghalala Eikumi n'Ababiri, yaabagha amaani n'obukumu ku mizimu emibi gyonagyona, n'okuwonianga endwaire." 
Luke9:2 Yaabatuma okulangirira Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda n'okuwonia abalwaire. 
Luke9:3 Era yaabakoba ati: “Bwe muja, timutwala kantu koonakoona, waire omwigo, waire ensawo, waire omugaati, waire empiiya, waire omuntu okuba n'ebivaalo ebibiri." 
Luke9:4 Endhu yoonayoona mwe mwingiranga musulanga omwo, era mwe muviiranga okweyongerayo." 
Luke9:5 Ate yoonayoona ye batabasangaaliranga, bwe mubanga nga muva mu kibuga ekyo, mukunkumulanga enkungu mu bigere byaimwe nga n'obudhulizi.”" 
Luke9:6 Agho baasimbuka baabitabita mu buli kyalo nga bakobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi woonawoona, era nga bawonia abalwaire." 
Luke9:7 Agho Herode ow'eisaza yaawulira byonabyona ebyaligho era byamuwubania, kuba eriyo abaali bakoba bati Yoanne azuukire mu bafu," 
Luke9:8 abandi bati Eliya n'aboneike, ate abandi bati mulala ku balanzi ab'eira n'azuukiire." 
Luke9:9 Aye Herode yaakoba ati: “Yoanne nze namutemaku omutwe, ate naani ono ye mpuliraku ebyaga agho?” Yaayenda okumubona." 
Luke9:10 Abatume bwe baira baalomboodhera Yesu bye baakola. Yaabagemaku yaaja nabo bonka mu kibuga ekyetebwa Bethisaida. 
Luke9:11 Abantu kamaala baategeera era baamunonereza yaabasangaalira, yaabakobera ku Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda era yaawonia abaali benda okuwonezebwa." 
Luke9:12 Obwire bwe bwatoolera okuziba, Eikumi n'Ababiri baaseeta, baamukoba bati: “Siibula abantu baje mu bibuga ni mu byalo ebyetooloire ghano bafune agh'okusula ni bye benda, kuba ghano tuli mu irungu.”" 
Luke9:13 Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Imwe mubaghe eky'okulya.” Baakoba bati: “Memale ife tuligho n'emigaati etaanu n'ebyenhandha bibiri, koodhi nga tuja twagula emere ey'abantu bano boonaboona?”" 
Luke9:14 Ghaaligho abasaadha ng'oti nkumi itaanu (5,000). Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Mubatyamye mu bikunsu bya bantu ng'amakumi ataanu ataanu.”" 
Luke9:15 Baakola batyo, baabatyamya boonaboona." 
Luke9:16 Yaatoola emigaati etaanu n'ebyenhandha ebibiri yalinga ghaigulu mu igulu, yaabigha enkabi yeeyanza, yaabimegulamu yaagha Abeegeresebwa bagabule abantu." 
Luke9:17 Boonaboona baalya baiguta, era baasoloza ebiibo ikumi na bibiri eby'ebitundu ebyafiikagho." 
Luke9:18 Agho olwatuuka, Yesu yali ali kusaba yenka aye nga Abeegeresebwa be bali naye, yaababuuza ati: “Abantu bandheta batya?”" 
Luke9:19 Baamwiramu bati: “Yoanne Omubatiza, aye abandi bati Eliya, ate abandi bati mulala ku balanzi ab'eira n'azuukiire.”" 
Luke9:20 Yaabakoba ati: “Ate imwe mundheta ani?” Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Niiwe Kurisito wa Katonda.” 
Luke9:21 Aye yaabasikirira ekyo balobe kukikoberaku muntu yeenayeena. 
Luke9:22 Era yaabakobera ati: “Omwana w'Omuntu taliroba kudaazibwadaazibwa inho. Abakulu ab'ebika, Bakabona Abakulu, n'Abanamateeka, balimwegaana era aliitibwa, ate ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukira.”" 
Luke9:23 Agho ni yaabakoba boonaboona ati: “Oba nga ghaligho ayenda okuba Omwegeresebwa wange, alobe kwefaaku naire, abbeede omusalaba gwe buli lunaku annonereze" 
Luke9:24 kuba buli ayenda okuwonia obulamu bwe, oyo abuza bubuze aye abuza obulamu bwe ku lwange, oyo abuzaawula." 
Luke9:25 Kigasa ki omuntu okufuna ensi yoonayoona aye yaazaagha oba yaazikirira? 
Luke9:26 Era buli ye ngemya ensoni, n'ebibono byange ye bigemya ensoni, oyo yeena aligemya Omwana w'Omuntu ensoni lw'aliidha mu kitiisa kye, n'ekya Ise, n'ekya bamalaika abatukuvu." 
Luke9:27 “Aye bwenebwene, ka mbakobere: Ghaligho abandi ku bemereire ghano abatalirega ku kufa okutuusa nga baboine Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke9:28 Agho olwatuuka, nga ghabiseegho enaku oti munaana ng'amaze okwogera ebibono ebyo, yaatwala Petero ni Yoanne ni Yakobo, baaniina ku lusozi okusaba." 
Luke9:29 Bwe yali asaba, emboneka ye mu maiso yaafuuka bundi n'ebivaalo bye byafuuka byeru, byamesunkana." 
Luke9:30 Okuja okubona nga ghaligho abasaadha babiri Musa ni Eliya, be yali ali kwogera nabo." 
Luke9:31 Baabonekera mu kitiisa baayogera ku kuja kwe, kwe yali aja okumalira mu Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:32 Petero ni be yali nabo baali batenduka, aye bwe baazuuka baabona ekitiisa kya Yesu, n'abasaadha ababiri nga bemereire naye." 
Luke9:33 Agho abasaadha bwe baava aghali Yesu, Petero yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, tulongoire twaba ghano, era ka tuseemente entindi isatu: eyiyo, eya Musa, n'eya Eliya.” Yali taidhi ky'ali kukoba." 
Luke9:34 Yali akaayogera ekire kyaidha kyabakingiriza era baawulira okutya bwe baali bali kwingira mu kire. 
Luke9:35 Agho eiroboozi lyava mu kire nga likoba liti: “Ono ni Mutabane wange, omulonde, mumuwulirenga!”" 
Luke9:36 Eiroboozi bwe lyasirika, baabona Yesu ng'ali yenka. Baasirika, ghaabulagho ye bakoberaku mu nnaku edho, ekintu kyonakyona ku bye baabona." 
Luke9:37 Olunaku olwairirira, bwe baikirira okuva ku lusozi, baayagaanana n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu." 
Luke9:38 Ghaabaagho omusaadha mu ikuukuubira yaayetera ghaigulu ati: “Mwegeresa, nkweghembye bona omwana wange. Ono n'omwana ye ndi naye yenka," 
Luke9:39 aye bona omuzimu gumugema, talwa ng'ayasiikana, era nga gumutandigira, ng'afuukeera. Era tigumuvaaku nga tigumumenhiemenhie." 
Luke9:40 Neeghembye Abeegeresebwa bo bagumubingeku, aye tibaghanze.”" 
Luke9:41 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Yii, oluse luno olw'abantu abazira kwikiriza era abadankaanu! Ndituusa gha okuba n'imwe n'okubaguminkiriza? Leeta ghano mutabane wo.”" 
Luke9:42 Bwe yali aseeta, omuzimu gwamusuula ghansi era gwamusikasika inho. Aye Yesu yaakaabukira omuzimu omubi, yaawonia omulenzi era yaamugemya lata we." 
Luke9:43 Boonaboona baayasaamirira olw'obukumu bwa Katonda. Boonaboona baali bakeewuunhia bye yakola, Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati:" 
Luke9:44 “Muwulirise bukalamu bino bye nja okubakoba: Omwana w'Omuntu aja kugheebwayo mu mikono egy'abantu.” 
Luke9:45 Aye kino tibaakitegeera kuba kyabakwekebwa baaloba kukimanha, ate baatya okumubuuza ku kibono ekyo." 
Luke9:46 Agho baatoolera okutakana beene na beene nga beebuuzagania naani mu beene asinga obubbede. 
Luke9:47 Yesu yaategeera ebidhuubo eby'omu myoyo gyaibwe, yaatoola omwana yaamwemereza agho okuliiraana ghe yali," 
Luke9:48 era yaabakoba ati: “Buli asangaalira omwana ono mu liina lyange aba asangaaliire nze; asangaalira nze aba asangaaliire oyo eyantuma; kuba asembayo mu imwe mwenamwena, oyo n'omubbede.”" 
Luke9:49 Agho Yoanne yaamwiramu ati: “Mwegeresa, twabona omuntu ng'ali kubinga emizimu emibi mu liina lyo era twamulobera, kuba ti mwegeresebwa wo ng'oti niife.”" 
Luke9:50 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mutamuloberanga, kuba oyo atabatakania aba munaimwe.”" 
Luke9:51 Agho enaku dha Yesu edh'okutwalibwa mu igulu bwe dhaatuuka, Yesu yaamalirira okuja e Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:52 Yaatuma abakwenda bamwesookengayo. Era bwe baaja bangira mu kyalo eky'Abasamaria basobole okumwetegekera," 
Luke9:53 aye tibaamusangaalira kuba yabonekera irala ng'aja Yerusalemu. 
Luke9:54 Abeegeresebwa be, Yakobo ni Yoanne bwe baabona ekyo, baakoba bati: “Musengwa, wandyenze tulagire omuliro guve mu igulu gubazikirize?”" 
Luke9:55 Aye Yesu yaabakyukira yaabanenia. 
Luke9:56 Era baavaagho baaja mu kyalo ekindi. 
Luke9:57 Agho bwe baali batambula mu ngira ghaabaagho eyamukoba ati: “Ndidha kukunonerezanga buli gh'onaajanga.” 
Luke9:58 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ebibe biri n'ebiina, n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhiri n'ebisu, aye Omwana w'Omuntu azira gh'aisa mutwe.”" 
Luke9:59 Yesu yaakoba owundi ati: “Nnonereza.” Aye ole yaakoba ati: “Musengwa, nganha nsooke nje nziike lata wange.”" 
Luke9:60 Agho yaamukoba ati: “Leka abafu baziike abafu baibwe, aye iwe ja olangirire Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke9:61 Kabiri owundi yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, nze ndidha kukunonereza, aye nganha nsooke nje nsiibule ab'eka.”" 
Luke9:62 Oyo Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ezira agema mbago kulima ate n'alingirira ebimuli einhuma, oyo tawoomera mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.”" 
Luke10:1 Ebyo olwawa, Musengwa yaalonda nsanvu na babiri, yaabatuma babiri babiri bamwembereremu mu buli kibuga, ni mu buli kifo mwe yali aja okuja." 
Luke10:2 Yaabakoba ati: “Eby'okukungula bwenebwene biri kamaala aye abakozi n'abatono kale ni musabe Musengwa mwene bikungulwa asindike abakozi mu bikungulwa. 
Luke10:3 Muje aye mwegendereze, mbatuma nga muli ng'oti n'entaama ento mu misege." 
Luke10:4 Mutatwalanga nsawo yoonayoona, waire ngaito ate mu ngira timulamusanga muntu yeenayeena." 
Luke10:5 Buli ndhu ye mungirangamu musookanga kukoba muti, ‘Endhu eno ebe miraala.’" 
Luke10:6 Bwe mulibaamu omwana ow'emiraala, emiraala gyaimwe girigisigalaku. Aye bwe mulibula, gija ku bairira." 
Luke10:7 Mu ndhu yeene eyo mwe musulanga, mwalyanga era mwanhwanga bye babagha kuba omukozi agwana okusasulwa enkemba ye. Mutavanga mu ndhu kwira mu yindi." 
Luke10:8 Ekibuga kyonakyona kye mungirangamu ni babasangaalira, mulyenga abantu abo kye babagha." 
Luke10:9 Muwonie abalwaire abali mu kibuga omwo, mubakobere muti obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda buseese." 
Luke10:10 Aye ekibuga kyonakyona kye mungiramu ni batabasangaalira, mujanga mu nguudo dhaakyo mwakoba muti," 
Luke10:11 ‘N'enkungu ey'omu kibuga kyaimwe etugemye ku bigere byaife tugibakunkumuliire aye mumanhe kino muti, Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda buseese.’" 
Luke10:12 Ka mbakobere: Ku lunaku lule, Sodoma kirisaasirwa okusinga ekibuga ekyo." 
Luke10:13 “Okagwireku Korazini! Okagwireku Bethisaida! Kuba ebyewuunhio ebikolebwa mu imwe nguli byakolebwa mu Tiro ni mu Sidoni, nguli beenenia, baavaala ekutiya, baatyama ni mu ivu." 
Luke10:14 Aye ku lunaku olw'okusaliraku omusango, Tiro ni Sidoni birisaasirwa okusinga imwe." 
Luke10:15 “Ate iwe Kaperinaumu olisitulibwa okutuuka mu igulu? Busa, oliisibwa mu magombe waazikirira!" 
Luke10:16 “Awulira imwe aba awuliire nze; aloba okubawulira aba alobye kuwulira nze; ate aloba okuwulira nze aba alobye kuwulira ole eyantuma.” 
Luke10:17 Agho Ensanvu n'Ababiri (72) baira nga basangaavu, baakoba bati: “Musengwa, mu liina lyo n'emizimu emibi gyona gyatuwuliranga!”" 
Luke10:18 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Nabona Sitaani ng'agwa okuva mu igulu oti lukuba. 
Luke10:19 Muboine! Nabagha obukumu okuniinirira emisota ni siga, n'okughangula amaani goonagoona ag'omuzigu. Ghazira kintu kyonakyona kiribakola kabi." 
Luke10:20 Aye mutasangaala olw'okuba emizimu gibawulira, musangaale olw'okuba amaina gaimwe gaaghandiikibwa mu igulu.”" 
Luke10:21 Mu kiseera kyene ekyo Yesu yaasagamba mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu, era yaakoba ati: “Lata, nkusaaka, Musengwa ow'eigulu n'ensi, kuba ebintu bino wabigisa ku bagezi n'abamanhi, waabimanhisa abato. N'agh'agho Lata, kuba otyo bwe wasiima." 
Luke10:22 “Ebintu byonabyona, Lata wange yabimpa era ghazira aidhi Mwana okutoolaku Lata, ate ghazira aidhi Lata okutoolaku Mwana n'oyo yeenayeena Mwana y'aba asiimye okumumanhisa.”" 
Luke10:23 Agho yaakyuka yaalingirira Abeegeresebwa be yaabakoba nga bali bonka ati: “Ba nkabi ababona bye mubona! 
Luke10:24 Kuba ka mbakobere: Abalanzi kamaala ni bakyabazinga beegomba okubona bye mubona, aye tibaabibona, era n'okuwulira bye muwulira aye tibaabiwulira.”" 
Luke10:25 Ghaabaagho Omunamateeka yaasituka yaaleba Yesu ng'akoba ati: “Mwegeresa, nkole ki okufuna obulamu obutawaagho?”" 
Luke10:26 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kitya mu mateeka. Osoma otya?” 
Luke10:27 Yairamu ati: “Ogonzanga Musengwa Katonda wo n'omwoyo gwo gwonagwona, n'amaani go goonagoona, n'okutegeera kwo kwonakwona, era ogonzanga muntu mwino nga iwe mwene bwe weegonza.”" 
Luke10:28 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oizeemu bukalamu, kola otyo, oidha kuba mulamu.”" 
Luke10:29 Aye ole olw'okwenda okulaga ati ky'abuuziiza kya makulu, yaakoba Yesu ati: “Muntu munange naani?”" 
Luke10:30 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Ghaaligho omuntu eyali aikirira okuva e Yerusalemu okuja e Yeriko yaagwa mu banhazi, baamuleka bwereere, baamukuba era baamuleka ng'aziriike." 
Luke10:31 Ghaabaagho kabona eyali aikirira mu ngira eyo, yaamubona, yaabita embali yaaja." 
Luke10:32 N'Omulevi yeena atyo, bwe yatuuka mu kifo ekyo n'amubona, yaabita eruuyi yaaja." 
Luke10:33 Ghaabaagho Omusamaria eyali mu lugendo lwe, yaamutuukaku era bwe yamubona yaamugemerwa ekisa" 
Luke10:34 yaaseeta ghe yali, yaamusiba gha biwundu ng'amaze okubiyughaku omuzigo n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Agho yaamuta ku ndogoyi ye, yaamutwala mu ndhu ey'abageni, yaamugenza." 
Luke10:35 Bwe bwakya enkyo yaagha dinari ibiri mwene ndhu eyo, era yaamukoba ati, ‘Kola ng'omugenza, era kyonakyona ky'onaasansaania okusingagho ndikikusasula nga ndhize.’" 
Luke10:36 “Kale ku abo abasatu naani eyali mwine w'oyo eyagwa mu banhazi?” 
Luke10:37 Yaakoba ati: “Ole eyamugemerwa ekisa.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ja, weena okole otyo.”" 
Luke10:38 Bwe baali baja, ghaabaagho ekyalo kye yatuukamu ghabaagho omukazi nga bamweta Maritha yaamukyaza." 
Luke10:39 Ono yali ni muganda we nga bamweta Maria. Maria oyo yaatyama agho gha bigere bya Musengwa yaawulirisa by'akoba. 
Luke10:40 Maritha yali ali kwetawula na mirimo gya kugheereza. Bwe yaidha ye Yesu n'amukoba ati: “Musengwa, toli kubona nga muganda wange andekeire emirimo egy'okugheereza zenka? Mukobeku, aidhe ambeereku.”" 
Luke10:41 Musengwa yaamwiramu ati: “Maritha, Maritha weeraliikirira era otaghaanizibwa ebintu kamaala" 
Luke10:42 aye ekyetaagisa kiri kirala, Maria n'alonze ekintu ekirungi, ekitaghanga kumutoolebwaku.”" 
Luke11:1 Olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yamala okusaba, ghaabaagho mulala ku Beegeresebwa be yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, twegerese okusaba, ng'oti ni Yoanne bwe yayegeresa abeegeresebwa be.”" 
Luke11:2 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bwe mubanga musaba mukobanga muti, ‘Lata, Eriina lyo litiibwe, Obwakyabazinga bwo bwidhe." 
Luke11:3 Emere yaife eyabuliidho gitughenga buli lunaku. 
Luke11:4 Tusonighe ebibi byaife kuba ife beene tusonigha buli atukola obubi, era otatutwala mu kulebwa.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Naani ku imwe aba ni mukagwa we, aja y'ali mu bwire ghagati n'amukoba ati, ‘Mukagwa, mpolaayo emigaati esatu," 
Luke11:6 kuba ghaligho mukagwa wange antuuseeku ng'ava mu lugendo, ate nzira kye mmugha.’" 
Luke11:7 Memale ole n'aba mu ndhu n'amwiramu ati, ‘Tondaaza, tumaze okweigala, nze n'abaana bange twebwise ira, tisobola kusituka kwidha kukugha ky'oyenda.’" 
Luke11:8 Ka mbakobere: Waire nga tasituka kumugha olw'okuba mukagwa we, asituka yaamugha kyonakyona ky'ayenda olw'okumudeeba." 
Luke11:9 “Kale nze mbakobera: Musabe muligheebwa mwagale mulizuula mukonkone ku lwigi muliigulirwagho. 
Luke11:10 Kuba buli asaba afuna, buli ayagala azuula era buli akonkona ku lwigi aliigulirwagho." 
Luke11:11 Naani ku imwe balata b'abaana, agha omwana we omusota ng'amusabye ekyenhandha" 
Luke11:12 oba ng'amusabye eigi n'amugha siga? 
Luke11:13 Kale oba imwe, ababi, mwidhi okugha abaana baimwe ebirabo ebirungi, memale Lata waimwe ow'omu igulu! Talisingagho inho okugha Mwoyo Mutukuvu ababa bamusabye?”" 
Luke11:14 Agho olwatuuka, Yesu yaabinga ku muntu omuzimu omubi, nga ni gukasiru. Omuzimu bwe gwamuvaaku, kasiru yaatoolera okwogera, era abantu kamaala beewuunhia inho." 
Luke11:15 Aye abandi baakoba bati: “Aghanga okubinga emizimu emibi ku bwa Beelezebulu, omukulu ow'emizimu emibi.”" 
Luke11:16 Ate abandi nga bamuleba, baamusaba akamanhiso okuva mu igulu." 
Luke11:17 Aye Yesu bwe yamanha ebidhuubo byaibwe, yaabakoba ati: “Buli bwakyabazinga obwekutulakutulamu buzikirira, era ni bw'eba endhu esasika." 
Luke11:18 Kale ni oba Sitaani yeekutwiremu atyo, obwakyabazinga bwe bunaayemereragho butya? Kuba niimwe omukobye muti emizimu ngibinga ku bwa Beelezebulu." 
Luke11:19 Aye oba nga emizimu ngibinga ku bwa Beelezebulu, abaana baimwe bagibinga ku bw'ani? Kale abo n'abalibasalira omusango." 
Luke11:20 Aye oba nga emizimu emibi ngibinga na bukumu bwa Katonda, agho ni Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda butuuse mu imwe." 
Luke11:21 “Ow'amaani ng'ali n'eby'okulwanisa, bw'akuuma amaka ge ebintu bye biba miraala." 
Luke11:22 Aye amusinga amaani bw'amulumba n'amughangula, amutoolaku eby'okulwanisa bye yeesiga, era yaatoola n'ebintu by'amwagaana nabyo yaabigaba." 
Luke11:23 Omuntu yeenayeena ataba ghalala ninze aba muzigu wange, ate oyo atasoloza ninze asansaania." 
Luke11:24 “Omuzimu omubi bwe guva ku muntu ye gubangaku, guja nga gubita eyo mu bifo ebikalukalu nga gwagala agh'okuwuumulira. Bwe gulemwa, gukoba guti, ‘Ka neirireyo mu ndhu yange mwe nava.’" 
Luke11:25 Bwe gwira gujaagaana nga ndheye era ng'etegekeibwa bukalamu. 
Luke11:26 Agho guja gwayeta emizimu giinaagwo egindi musanvu egigusinga obubi, nga gingira nga giba omwo era ku nkomerero obulamu bw'omuntu oyo buba bubi inho okusinga obwasooka.”" 
Luke11:27 Agho olwatuuka, Yesu bwe yali akaayogera ebyo, ghaabaagho omukazi mu bantu, yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Enda mwe wali ya nkabi, n'amabeere ge wayonka ga nkabi!”" 
Luke11:28 Aye Yesu yaakoba ati: “Abasinga okuba ab'enkabi n'abo abawulira ekibono kya Katonda ni bakigema.” 
Luke11:29 Agho abantu kamaala bwe baaja nga beesololeza aghali Yesu, yaatoolera okwogera ye bali ng'akoba ati: “Abantu ab'oluse luno bantu babi benda akamanhiso aye ezira kamanhiso kaja kubagheebwa okutoolaku aka Yona." 
Luke11:30 Kuba nga Yona bwe yaba akamanhiso eri ab'e Nineve, n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aidha okuba eri abantu ab'oluse luno." 
Luke11:31 Kyabazinga omukazi ow'e Sheba alisituka n'abantu ab'oluse luno ku lunaku olw'okusalirwaku omusango yaagubasalira okubasinga kuba yava ensi y'ekoma yaidha okuwulira amagezi ga Solomoni. Aye ate mubone, ali ghano n'asinga Solomoni." 
Luke11:32 Abantu ab'e Nineve balisituka n'abantu ab'oluse luno ku lunaku olw'okusalirwaku omusango baagubasalira kuba beene beenenia bwe baawulira okulamba kwa Yona aye ate mubone: ali ghano n'asinga Yona.” 
Luke11:33 “Ghazira akunaania itaala n'alita mu ziizi oba n'alifundikira mu kiibo. Ky'akola alita ku kikondo eky'eitaala, abangira baasobola okubona." 
Luke11:34 Eriiso lyo liri ng'oti n'eitaala ery'omubiri gwo. Eriiso lyo bwe liba eiramu, omubiri gwo gwonagwona guba mutangaavu. Aye bweriba eifu, omubiri gwo gwona guba mu nzikiiza." 
Luke11:35 Kale ni mwegendereze, tomanha ekimulika ekibalimu bwe kifuuka nzikiiza." 
Luke11:36 Bwe kiba ni ng'omubiri gwo gwonagwona gutangaala, nga muzira kazikiiza koonakoona, gulitangaala gwakutangaaza ng'oti n'eitaala eryaka.”" 
Luke11:37 Bwe yali akaayogera ghabaagho Omufarisaayo eyamweta ewuwe okulya naye, era yaaja yaatyama ku kiiwulo." 
Luke11:38 Omufarisaayo kyamwewuunhisa inho okubona nga Yesu atyaime ku kiiwulo nga tanaabye. 
Luke11:39 Aye Musengwa yaamukoba ati: “Imwe Abafarisaayo, muja mwatukuza ku ngulu okw'ekikopo n'esowaani ate nga munda mwaimwe mwidhwire obukambuzi n'obubi." 
Luke11:40 Abasiru imwe, eyakola ku ngulu ti n'eyakola ni munda?" 
Luke11:41 Ebiri munda mubigabirenga abaavu, era agho byonabyona lwe binaabanga ebirongoofu." 
Luke11:42 “Aye mukagwireku Abafarisaayo! Mugha ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu ikumi ebya kakubansiri na buli isubi, aye mwaloba kufaayo ku kukolera bantu ebibagwaniire ni ku kugonza Katonda! Ate nga bino muteekwa okubikola, aye ni bire obutabireka." 
Luke11:43 “Mukagwireku Abafarisaayo! Kuba mwenda inho ebityamo eby'emberi mu sinagoga, n'okulamusibwa mu biya." 
Luke11:44 Mukagwireku Abafarisaayo! Kuba muli oti magombe agataboneka, abantu kwe batambulira nga tibaidhi.”" 
Luke11:45 Agho mulala ku Banamateeka yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa, bw'okoba otyo, twena oba otuvumye.”" 
Luke11:46 Yesu yaakoba ati: “N'imwe mwena Abeegeresa b'Amateeka mukagwireku! Kuba mutwika abantu emigugu emizibu okwetwika, ate nga imwe beene timughanga kubagemeraku naire." 
Luke11:47 Mukagwireku! Kuba muzimba amagombe ag'abalanzi ate nga badhaadha baimwe n'abaabaita. 
Luke11:48 Kale mutyo mwakakalisa irala era mwaghagira ebikolwa bya badhaadha baimwe kuba abo baabaita ate imwe mwazimba amagombe gaibwe. 
Luke11:49 Ni mu Magezi ga Katonda kikoba kiti, ‘Abandi balibakiriga n'abandi balibaita.’" 
Luke11:50 Kyova ab'oluse luno balibuuzibwa omusaayi ogw'abalanzi boonaboona gwe baafuka okuva ku kwinhama okw'ensi," 
Luke11:51 okuva ku musaayi gwa Abeli okutuuka ku musaayi gwa Zekaria eyaitirwa ghagati gh'alutaari n'eisinzizo. Bwenebwene nga bwe mbakobeire, ab'oluse luno balibuuzibwa omusaayi ogwo." 
Luke11:52 “Mukagwireku imwe Abeegeresa b'Amateeka, kuba mwatoolagho ekisumuluzo eky'okumanha! Imwe beene timwangira ate mwalobera n'abandingiire.”" 
Luke11:53 Bwe yali avaagho Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo baatoolera okumusokasoka n'okumubuuliriza ebintu kamaala 
Luke11:54 nga bamutega bamugemye mu by'ayogera. 
Luke12:1 Mu kiseera ekyo abantu baali nga beesoloiza kamaala inho era nga bali na kuniinaganaku. Agho Yesu yaasookera ku Beegeresebwa be yaakoba ati: “Mweghale ekizimbulukusa eky'Abafarisaayo nkoba obuguya bwaibwe. 
Luke12:2 Ezira kighembeibwaku kitalighembulwa, era n'ekigisiibwa ekitalimanhibwa." 
Luke12:3 Kale ebyo bye mwayogerera mu nzikiiza biryogerwa mu musana, ni bye mwagheegheetera mu kutu mu bisenge, birirangirirwa ghaigulu ku ndhu." 
Luke12:4 “Bakagwa, ka mbakobere: Mutatyanga abo abaita omubiri, ate ebyo oluwa baaba nga ghazira kyonakyona kye baghanga kukola." 
Luke12:5 Aye ka mbalabuleku: Mutye oyo ali n'obukumu obw'okwita n'okusuula mu geyeena. Bwenebwene mbakobera oyo ye mube mutye! 
Luke12:6 “Enkazaluya eitaanu tidhigula sente ibiri? Aye Katonda tasobola kwerabiraku waire ndala eti. 
Luke12:7 Ate oba n'omughendo ogw'enviiri edhiri ku mitwe gyaimwe Katonda agwidhi. Kale mutatyanga, muli ba mughendo okusinga enkazaluya ekyodo." 
Luke12:8 “Aye ka mbakobere: Oyo yeenayeena ayatula mu maiso ag'abantu ati wange, yeena Omwana w'Omuntu alimwatula mu maiso ga bamalaika ba Katonda" 
Luke12:9 ate oyo aneegaana mu maiso ag'abantu yeena alyegaanibwa mu maiso ga bamalaika ba Katonda. 
Luke12:10 Era yeenayeena ayogera ekibono ekibi ku Mwana w'Omuntu, alisoniyibwa, aye oyo avuma Mwoyo Mutukuvu talisoniyibwa." 
Luke12:11 “Ate bwe babatwalanga mu sinagoga ni mu bafuzi ni mu baami okubawozesa, muteraliikiriranga kya kwiramu oba kya kwogera" 
Luke12:12 kuba Mwoyo Mutukuvu alibeegeresa mu saawa yeene eyo kye mugwaine okwogera.” 
Luke12:13 Agho ghaabaagho mulala ku bantu abaaligho yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa, koba muganda wange angabanie ku by'obusika bwaife.”" 
Luke12:14 Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Musaadha iwe, naani eyantaagho okubatawulula n'okubagabania ebyaimwe?”" 
Luke12:15 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Mwegendereze era mweghale okululunkanira ebintu kwonakwona kuba obulamu obw'omuntu tibuli mu kuba na bintu ni bwe biba kamaala bitya.” 
Luke12:16 Agho yaabakobera olufumo luno ati: “Ghaaligho omuntu omukombe eyali n'enimiro edhaayama einho. 
Luke12:17 Kyeyava mule ni yeebuuza ati, ‘Nkole ntya, nga nzira ghe nsololeza birime byange?’" 
Luke12:18 Yaakoba ati, ‘Kino kye nja okukola: ndidha kumenhagho ebyagi byange nzimbe ebisinga bino obunene, ntereke omwo emere yange n'eby'obukombe byange." 
Luke12:19 Era olwo nkobe omwoyo gwange nti: Mwoyo gwange, ofunie ebirungi kamaala, wuumula, olye, onhwe osagambe.’" 
Luke12:20 Aye Katonda yaamukoba ati, ‘Musiru iwe! Obwire bwaleero omwoyo gwo guja kukutoolebwaku, olwo ebyo by'otegeike bija kuba by'ani?’" 
Luke12:21 “Atyo bw'aba ole eyeesololeza eby'obukombe eby'oku nsi ate nga mu bya Katonda ti mukombe.” 
Luke12:22 Agho yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Kale ka mbakobere muteraliikiriranga kya kulya, lwa bulamu bwaimwe, oba kya kuvaala olw'emibiri gyaimwe." 
Luke12:23 Obulamu bwa mughendo okusinga emere, era n'omubiri gwa mughendo okusinga ebivaalo." 
Luke12:24 Kale bw'odhuuba amakoova: Tigasiga waire okukungula, gazira kyagi waire eiterekero ery'ensambo eyindi lyonalyona, ate nga Katonda agafunisa emere. Aye imwe timuli ba mughendo okusinga enhonhi?" 
Luke12:25 Ye naani ku imwe, ni bwe yeeraliikirira atya, asobola okwongera waire akatono ku buleeyi bwe?" 
Luke12:26 Kale, oba nga waire ekitono kityo ghazira akighanga, memale lwaki mweraliikirira ebindi?" 
Luke12:27 Ate bw'olowooza ebimuli bya liri nga bwe bikula: Tibitakabana waire okuluka engoye aye nhenda okubakobera, waire Solomoni mu bitiisa bye byonabyona, tiyavaalanga n'ayaga waire n'ekimuli ekirala ku ebyo." 
Luke12:28 Kale oba Katonda avaaza atyo eisubi obusubi eriba olwaleero mu nimiro ate enkyo ni lisuulibwa ku kikoomi memale mbo talisingagho kuvaaza imwe abali n'okwikiriza okutono? 
Luke12:29 Imwe muteemalira ku kwagala kye munaalya ni kye munaanhwa waire okweraliikirira mu bidhuubo 
Luke12:30 kuba ebyo abantu ab'ensi bye basiiba nga baagala aye imwe Lata waimwe aidhi nga mubyenda. 
Luke12:31 Imwe mwagale Obwakyabazinga bwe, n'ebyo byona biidha kubagheebwa." 
Luke12:32 “Mutatya imwe waire nga muli bwa byayo bitono biti, kuba Lata waimwe kyamusanhusa okubagha Obwakyabazinga." 
Luke12:33 Mutunde ebyaimwe, mugabire abaavu, mwetungire ensawo edhitakairigha mufune n'obukombe obutawaagho mu igulu omwibi y'atatuuka waire ensiiriri okubwonoona." 
Luke12:34 Kuba obukombe bwaimwe ghe buli n'omwoyo gwaimwe ghe guba. 
Luke12:35 “Mwesibe ensibiro, mukunaanie n'entaala dhaake." 
Luke12:36 Mube ng'abagheereza abali kuteegerera musengwa waibwe okwira ng'ava ku kikuudhuko eky'okubayiza nga bw'atuuka n'akonkona ati bamwiguliragho mangu. 
Luke12:37 Abagheereza abo nga ba nkabi, abo musengwa waibwe b'aliira n'ayagaana nga beetegefu. Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Alyesiba, yaabatyamya ku kiiwulo, yaabita ng'abagheereza." 
Luke12:38 Ni bw'aba ng'aidhie mu bwire ghagati oba nga buja kukya, n'abaagaana atyo, abagheereza abo ba nkabi!" 
Luke12:39 Mukiidhi bukalamu muti nguli mwenemu amanhanga esaawa omwibi y'anaidhiraku, yandimwagainenga nga yeetegeike, era tiyandiganhie mwibi kusima kituli mu ndhu ye." 
Luke12:40 Mwena muteekwa okwetegeka kuba Omwana w'Omuntu aja kutuuka ku saawa ye mutamusuubiriraku.” 
Luke12:41 Agho Petero yaakoba ati: “Musengwa, olufumo olwo olufumiire ife oba bantu boonaboona?”" 
Luke12:42 Musengwa yaakoba ati: “Omughanika omwesigwa era omwegendereza n'ali gha? N'oyo musengwa we y'akuumisa ab'omu maka ge n'okubaghanga emere yaibwe mu biseera ebituufu? 
Luke12:43 Yeesiimye omugheereza oyo musengwa we bw'aliidha n'amwagaana ng'akola atyo. 
Luke12:44 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere aja kumutaagho alabirire ebintu bye byonabyona. 
Luke12:45 Aye omugheereza oyo bw'akoba mu mwoyo gwe ati, ‘Musengwa aidha kulwagho okutuuka,’ n'atoolera okukubakuba abairu abasaadha n'abakazi, n'alya era n'anhwa n'okutamiira n'atamiira," 
Luke12:46 musengwa w'omugheereza oyo aliira ku lunaku lw'atamusuubiriraku era ku saawa y'ataidhi. Alimwegobaku yaamusindika mu badheemu. 
Luke12:47 “Ate omugheereza amanha musengwa we by'ayenda n'atakola ntegeka, oba okukola nga musengwa we bw'ayenda, alikubwa emiigo kamaala." 
Luke12:48 Aye oyo ataidhi, bw'akola ekimugwaniza okukubwa, alikubwa mitontono. Buli eyagheebwa ebingi era alibuuzibwa bingi era oyo eyateresebwa ebingi, alisingagho okubuuzibwa.”" 
Luke12:49 “Naidha kukunaania ku nsi muliro, ate nkaayenda ki oba nga gumaze okukunaana?" 
Luke12:50 Ndi n'okubatizibwa kwe nja okubatizibwamu, era kuunumya inho omwoyo, okutuusa lwe kulituukirizibwa." 
Luke12:51 Mudhuuba muti naidha kuleeta miraala ku nsi? Busa! Ka mbakobere: Kwawukana. 
Luke12:52 Kuba okuva ni mperaano abataanu mu ndhu baidha kwawukana, abasatu nga tibaisania n'ababiri, n'ababiri nga tibaisania n'abasatu." 
Luke12:53 Ghalibaagho obutaisania: Lata w'omwana taliisania ni mutabane, n'omwana taliisania n'ise inhina w'omulenzi taliisania ni muka mutabane, n'omughala taliisania n'inhazaala we.”" 
Luke12:54 Agho Yesu yaakoba abantu ati: “Bwe mubona ekire nga kisituka ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba, mukoba muti ganaagwa, era bwe kiba." 
Luke12:55 Ate bwe mubona empewo ng'eri kukunta okuva ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba nga weekubiireku ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, mukoba muti, leero kanaayaka, era bwe kiba." 
Luke12:56 Baguya imwe! Oba nga mwidhi okutuuka ku makulu ag'emboneka ey'ensi n'eigulu, mulemwa mutya okutuuka ku makulu ag'ebiseera bino?" 
Luke12:57 “Lwaki timwesaliragho imwe beene ekituufu? 
Luke12:58 Bwe muba muja embuga n'akughaghabiire, gezaaku okwisania naye nga mukaali mu ngira, talwa kukukwekwebya n'akutuusa ya mulamuzi, omulamuzi n'akugemya mwisirukale, ate omwisirukale n'akuta mu ikomera." 
Luke12:59 Ka nkukobere: Omwo tolivaamu okutuusa ng'omaze okusasula n'akasente akasembayo.” 
Luke13:1 Mu kiseera ekyo ghaabaagho abaakobera Yesu ku Bagalilaaya, bale Pilato be yatabula omusaayi gwaibwe n'emisengo gyaibwe." 
Luke13:2 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mudhuuba muti Abagalilaaya abo okudaazibwadaazibwa batyo, baali boonooni inho okusinga Abagalilaaya boonaboona?" 
Luke13:3 Busa, ka mbakobere imwe mwena bwe muteenenia, muja kuzikirira mutyo." 
Luke13:4 “Oba abo eikumi n'omunaana, omunaala ogw'e Siloamu be gwagwaku ni gubaita. Mulowooza muti baali boonooni okusinga abantu boonaboona abaabanga mu Yerusalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Busa, ka mbakobere: Mwena bwe muteenenia muja kuzikirira mutyo mwenamwena.”" 
Luke13:6 Yesu yaabafumira olufumo luno ati: “Ghaaligho omusaadha eyali n'omuti omutiini nga musimbe mu nimiro ye ey'emizabbibu. Yaaja ye guli okwagala ku bibala, aye tiyayagaanaku." 
Luke13:7 Yaakoba omukozi ow'omu nimiro eyo ati, ‘Bona eno, buti emyaka giigino esatu mbaire nga ndhagala ku muti guno ebibala aye nga tyagaanaku. Gutemegho, lwaki gumala eitaka ery'obwereere?’" 
Luke13:8 Aye yaamwiramu ati, ‘Musengwa guleke n'omwaka guno gwona ntoodhetoodhegho okwezunguluza, nteegho n'obusa." 
Luke13:9 Tomanha bwe gwama ye bwidha; bwe kitaliba kityo, oligutemagho.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Bwe yali ali kwegeresa mu sinagoga ndala, ku Sabbato," 
Luke13:11 ghaabaagho omukazi eyaliku omuzimu ogwamulwaza okumala emyaka ikumi na munaana, nga gwamufunhamu tasobola kwemerera butereevu." 
Luke13:12 Yesu bwe yamubona yaamweta yaamukoba ati: “Mukazi iwe! Obulwaire bwo buwonie.” 
Luke13:13 Yaamwisaaku emikono, era okutemya n'okuzibula ng'ayemerera butereevu, era yaagha Katonda ekitiisa." 
Luke13:14 Olw'okuba Yesu yamuwonia ku Sabbato, omukulu wa sinagoga, yaasungughala era yakoba ekikunsu eky'abantu ati: “Ghaligho enaku mukaaga emirimo kwe giteekwa okukolerwa, mwidhenga ku nnaku edho muwonezebwe, aye ti ku lwa Sabbato.”" 
Luke13:15 Musengwa yaamwiramu ati: “Bakuusa imwe! Naani mu imwe, ku lwa Sabbato atasibula nte ye, oba ndogoyi ye mu kitabo n'agitwala kunhwa?" 
Luke13:16 Kale tikigwaine omukazi ono mwidhukulu wa Aburahamu, Sitaani y'abaire asibye okumala emyaka eikumi n'omunaana, kusibululwa mu busibe obwo waire ku lwa Sabbato?”" 
Luke13:17 Bwe yakoba ebyo abaali bamutakania baaswala ate abantu boonaboona baasagamba olw'eby'ekitiisa bye yali akola. 
Luke13:18 Agho yaakoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda tunaabufaanania ki? Era tunaabugeza ku ki? 
Luke13:19 Buli oti kamuuma ka kaladaali omuntu ke yatoola n'akasimba mu nimiro ye, kaakula, kaafuuka muti, n'enhonhi edh'omu ibbanga dhaakola ebisu ku nsaga dhaagwo.”" 
Luke13:20 Era kabiri yaakoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda nnaabufaanania ki? 
Luke13:21 Buli oti n'ekizimbulukusa omukazi kye yatoola n'atabula mu biibo bisatu eby'engaano, byonabyona ni bizimbulukuka.”" 
Luke13:22 Yesu yaaja ng'abita mu bibuga ni mu byalo ng'ayegeresa, ng'alaga e Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:23 Ghaabaagho eyamubuuza ati: “Musengwa ab'okulokolebwa n'abatono?” Yesu yaabakoba ati: 
Luke13:24 “Mufube inho okungirira mu mulyango omufunda, kuba ka mbakobere abantu kamaala baligezaaku okungira aye tibalighanga." 
Luke13:25 Mwenemu bw'alimala okusituka n'asibagho olwigi, imwe mulyemerera ku luya mwatoolera okukonkona ku lwigi nga mukoba muti, ‘Musengwa, twiguliregho.’ Alibairamu ati, ‘Tibaidhi! Muva gha?’" 
Luke13:26 Olwo mulitoolera okumukoba muti, ‘Watubonanga nga tulya era nga tunhwa, era wayegeresanga mu byalo byaife.’" 
Luke13:27 Aye alibakoba ati, ‘Nze tibaidhi, tiidhi ye muva! Munve ni mu maiso imwe abakozi ab'ebibi.’" 
Luke13:28 Ghalibaagho okulira n'okuluma emba, bwe mulibona Aburahamu ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo n'abalanzi boonaboona nga bali mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, ate nga imwe bababingira ku luya!" 
Luke13:29 Eriyo abaliva ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba n'olw'e bugwandhuba abaliva ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, baatyama ku mbaga mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
Luke13:30 Ate bona, ghaligho ab'ensembo abaliba ababeri, era ghaabaagho ababeri abaliba ab'ensembo.”" 
Luke13:31 Mu saawa yeene eyo ghaabaagho Abafarisaayo abaidha baamukoba bati: “Va ghano oje, kuba Herode ayenda kukwita.”" 
Luke13:32 Yaabakoba ati: “Muje mukobe ekibe ekyo muti, ‘Ndi ghano ndi kubinga emizimu emibi, ndi kuwonia abalwaire, leero n'idho, ate ku lunaku olwokusatu mmalirize.’" 
Luke13:33 Nteekwa okutambula olugendo lwange olwaleero, n'idho, ni lule, kuba tikisoboka omulanzi okufiira aghatali mu Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:34 “Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu iwe oita abalanzi n'abakwenda abakugheerezebwa n'obakuba amabaale! Ng'emikuzi kamaala neegomba okusoloza abaana bo aghalala ng'enkoko bw'ekola, aye nga toganha!" 
Luke13:35 Kale bona, endhu yaimwe esigaire bwereere etyo. Era ka mbakobere timuja kumbonaku okutuusa lwe mulikoba muti ‘Wa nkabi oyo aidha mu liina lya Musengwa.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Agho olwatuuka Yesu yaaja okulya ew'omukulu ow'Abafarisaayo mulala, baamulingirira inho." 
Luke14:2 Mu maiso ge agho ghaaligho omusaadha eyali azimbyezimbye amakono n'amagulu. 
Luke14:3 Yesu yaabuuza Abeegeresa b'Amateeka n'Abafarisaayo ati: “Kiikirizibwa okuwonia ku lwa Sabbato oba bbe?” 
Luke14:4 Aye baasiriikirira. Yesu yaamugemaku yaamuwonia era yaamusiibula. 
Luke14:5 Era yaabakoba ati: “Naani ku imwe aba n'omwana we, oba n'ente ye n'egwa mu kidiba, ataja mangu ago kugisikayo ni bwe luba lwa Sabbato?”" 
Luke14:6 Bino byabakaya okubiiramu. 
Luke14:7 Bwe yabona engeri abageni abeete ye baali bali kugwidhubaniramu ebifo eby'ekitiisa, yaabakobera olufumo luno:" 
Luke14:8 “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'akwetanga ku mbaga tiweetyamyanga mu kifo kya kitiisa, tomanha bw'aba ng'ayeseeyo omuntu akusinga ekitiisa" 
Luke14:9 ole eyabeeta mwembi n'aidha n'akukoba ati, ‘Viirayo ono mu kifo.’ Agho waatoolera okuswala ng'oli kufuna ekifo eky'einhuma." 
Luke14:10 Aye bwe bakwetanga ojanga waatyama mu kifo eky'einhuma, kale oyo eyakweta bw'atuuka, yaidha yaakukoba ati, ‘Mukagwa, seeta eno emberi’ olwo ni, olifuna ekitiisa mu boonaboona b'otyaime nabo." 
Luke14:11 Kuba buli eyeetwala ati wa ghaigulu aja kwisibwa, ate buli eyeisa aja kutwalibwa nga wa ghaigulu.”" 
Luke14:12 Yaakoba era n'oyo eyamweta ati: “Bw'ofumbanga ekyomusana oba ekyeigulo toyetanga mikwano gyo, oba baganda bo, oba ab'ekika kyo, oba baliraanwa bo abakombe, kuba tomanha boona bwe bakweta n'osasulwa." 
Luke14:13 Aye bw'ofumbanga embaga, oyetanga abaavu, n'abateesobola, n'abalema, n'abatulu" 
Luke14:14 olwo oliba wa nkabi, kuba bazira kye balikusasula olisasulwa ng'abatuufu bazuukira.”" 
Luke14:15 Olwawulira ebyo, mulala ku be yali nabo ku kiiwulo yaamukoba ati: “Nga wa nkabi oyo alirya ku mere mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda!”" 
Luke14:16 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ghaaligho omuntu eyafumba embaga makeke yaayeta abantu kamaala. 
Luke14:17 Ekiseera eky'embaga bwe kyatuuka, yaatuma omugheereza we aje akobe abo abeete baidhe, kuba okutegeka kwali kuwoire." 
Luke14:18 Aye boonaboona baakola n'ekirala baatoolera okwewolereza. Mulala yaakoba ati, ‘Nguze ekibandha, nteekwa okuja okukirambuula nkusaba onsonighe.’" 
Luke14:19 Owundi yaakoba ati, ‘Naguze emiyimbo etaanu egy'ente edhirima era ndi kuja buti kudhigezesa, nkusaba onsonighe.’" 
Luke14:20 Owundi yaakoba ati, ‘Nabayiiza, kale tighanga kwidha.’" 
Luke14:21 “Kale omugheereza yaira yaabikobera musengwa we. Agho mwenemu yaasungughala, era yaalagira omwiru we ati, ‘Ja mangu mu buguudo ni mu nguudo edh'ekibuga oleete abaavu, abateesobola, abatulu n'abalema.’" 
Luke14:22 Omugheereza yaakoba ati, ‘Isebo ky'olagiire kikoleibwa aye era ghakaaligho ebifo.’" 
Luke14:23 Musengwa we kyeyava n'amulagira ati, ‘Ja mu nguudo enene ni mu ngira okake abantu okwidha, endhu yange eidhule." 
Luke14:24 Aye ka mbakobere: Ghazira ku abo abaali beeteibwa anaakomba ku mbaga yange.’ ” 
Luke14:25 Ebiyindi eby'abantu byali biri kutambula ni Yesu. Yesu yaakyuka yaabakoba ati: 
Luke14:26 “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'aidha ye ndi memale n'atakyagha ise, n'inhina, ni mukazi we, n'abaana be, ni baganda be, ni baanhina ate era n'obulamu bwe mwene, taghanga kuba mwegeresebwa wange." 
Luke14:27 Era atabbeeda musalaba gwe n'annonereza tasobola kuba mwegeresebwa wange. 
Luke14:28 “Naani ku imwe aba ayenze okuzimba enhumba ya bukomye, atasooka kutyama n'abalirira ebyetaagisa, n'abona oba ng'ali n'eby'okugimaliriza?" 
Luke14:29 Tomanha bw'ataagho musingi, ate n'atagimaliriza, boonaboona ababona ni batoolera okumusekerera," 
Luke14:30 nga bakoba bati, ‘Omuntu ono yaatoolera okuzimba yaalemwa okumaliriza!’" 
Luke14:31 “Oba, kyabazinga ki aba ng'aja okutabaala kyabazinga owundi, atasooka kutyama ni yeebuuza oba ng'asobola n'abantu omutwalo omulala okutabaala ole ali n'emitwalo ebiri?" 
Luke14:32 Era bw'abona nga tasobola agheereza mangu obukwenda ng'ole akaali ghala yaamusaba baisanie. 
Luke14:33 Kale ni, buli muntu ku imwe atayenda kuleka by'ali nabyo byonabyona, tasobola kuba mwegeresebwa wange." 
Luke14:34 “Omuunhu mulungi, aye omuunhu bwe guwaamu ensa, ogwizaamu otya ensa?" 
Luke14:35 Guba tigugasa waire itaka, waire okuba ekigimusa, bagusuula bwa ku luya. Ali n'amatu agawulira awulire!”" 
Luke15:1 Mperaano, abaghooza ab'omusolo n'aboonooni baaseeta ye Yesu okumuwulirisa." 
Luke15:2 Abafarisaayo n'Abanamateeka mule baaduuduuma nga bakoba bati: “Ono asangaalira aboonooni era yaalya nabo!” 
Luke15:3 Agho Yesu yaabakobera olufumo luno: 
Luke15:4 “Naani ku imwe aba n'entaama ekikumi, memale endala ku edho n'emubulaku, ataleka ekyenda n'omwenda ku nsiko n'aja n'ayagala eyo ebuze okutuusa lw'agizuula?" 
Luke15:5 Bw'agibona agibbeedera ku mabega nga bw'asagamba. 
Luke15:6 Era bw'atuuka eka ayetaku bakagwa be n'ab'oku lulaalo yaabakoba ati, ‘Mwidhe tusagambe kuba nzwire entaama yange ebaire ebuze.’" 
Luke15:7 Ka mbakobere ni mu igulu okusagamba kuba kutyo, olw'omwonooni omulala eyeenenia, okusinga olw'abantu abatuufu ekyenda n'omwenda abateetaaga kwenenia." 
Luke15:8 “Oba mukazi ki aba ni budhegedhege eikumi, me male akandi ni kamubulaku, atakunaania itaala n'ayeya ndhu, n'ayagala inho na bwegendereza okutuusa lw'akazuula?" 
Luke15:9 Era bw'akazuula ayetaku bakagwa be n'ab'oku lulaalo yaabakoba ati, ‘Mwidhe tusagambe kuba nzwire ka dhegedhege kange akaali kabuze.’" 
Luke15:10 Kale ka mbakobere: Ebaayo okusagamba mu bamalaika ba Katonda olw'omwonooni omulala eyeenenia.” 
Luke15:11 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Ghaaligho omusaadha ng'ali ni batabane babiri. 
Luke15:12 Omuto yaakoba ise ati, ‘Lata, mpa ekimega kyange eky'obusika’ era iseibwe yaabagabania mu bibye." 
Luke15:13 Ghaabita enaku ntono omulenzi oyo yaasoloza ebibye byonabyona yaaja eyo mu nsi ey'eghala, yaadiibuulira eyo ebibye nga yeebisa nga bw'abona." 
Luke15:14 Ng'amaze okumalagho byonabyona bye yali nabyo, endhala ey'amaani yaagwa mu nsi eyo, yaatoolera okuluga." 
Luke15:15 Kye yakola yaaja yaasenga omutaka mulala ow'omu nsi eyo, era oyo yaamugha gwa kwayanga mbiidhi dhe." 
Luke15:16 Era yeegombanga okulya ku bimere eby'embiidhi, nga ghazira abimugha." 
Luke15:17 Aye bwe yairamu amagezi yaakoba ati, ‘Ye ng'abakozi ba lata wange balya emere baalekerera! Aye nze naalambukira ghano?" 
Luke15:18 Ndidha kwesitula, nje ye lata wange mmukobe nti, Lata, nayona mu maiso ga Katonda ni mu maiso go" 
Luke15:19 tikaagwanira na kwetebwa mutabane wo, ntwala ng'omukozi wo.’" 
Luke15:20 “Agho yeesitula yaaja ye ise. Aye yali akaali ghalaku, ise yaamulengera era yaamugemerwa enaku yaamulumuukirira, yaamugwa mu kifuba, yaamunhwegera." 
Luke15:21 Omwana yaamukoba ati, ‘Lata, nayona mu maiso ga Katonda ni mu maiso go, tikaagwanira na kwetebwa mutabane wo.’" 
Luke15:22 Aye ise yaakoba abagheereza be ati, ‘Muleete mangu ekivaalo ekisinga bukalamu mumuvaaze, mumuteeku empeta ku ngalo, mumuvaaze n'engaito." 
Luke15:23 Muleete n'ente entototo eyo empiite era ensavu obukalamu, mugiite, tulye, tusagambe" 
Luke15:24 kuba mutabane wange ono yali afiire aye mperaano mulamu, yali yaghata aye aboneike.’ Era embaga yainhama." 
Luke15:25 “Mu kiseera ekyo mutabane omukulu yali ali mu nimiro, era bwe yali aira ng'ali kumpi n'endhu yaawulira ekinhumo, ebivuga n'okukina." 
Luke15:26 Agho yaayeta mulala ku bagheereza yaamubuuza ekigwiregho. 
Luke15:27 Omugheereza yaamukoba ati, ‘Muke wo n'aize, era lata wo aise ente entototo empiite era ensavu obukalamu, kuba asangaire okumubona nga mulamu.’" 
Luke15:28 “Aye omulenzi omukulu yaanakughala era nga tayenda na kwingira. Kale ise yaafuluma yaamweghemba angire. 
Luke15:29 Aye omulenzi yaakoba lata we ati, ‘Bona eno, emyaka kamaala nga nkugheereza era tikudheemerangaku mu by'ondagira, aye tompangaku waire akabuzi oti nsanhukeku ni bakagwa bange." 
Luke15:30 Aye ono mutabane wo eyadiibuulira ebintu byo mu bamalaaya olwidhie, ng'omwitira ente entototo empiite era ensavu obukalamu!’" 
Luke15:31 Ise yaamukoba ati, ‘Mwana wange iwe oli ninze buliidho, era ebyange byonabyona bibyo." 
Luke15:32 Tugwaine tusangaale era tusagambe, kuba muto wo ono yali afiire aye azuukire, yali yaghata aye aboneike.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Yesu era yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Ghaaligho omuntu omukombe eyali n'omughanika we, baamumuseeghera bati ayonoona ebintu bye." 
Luke16:2 Kyeyava n'amweta n'amukoba ati, ‘Biki bino bye nkuwuliraku? Kale inhonhola ebigema ku bughanika bwo, kuba tokaaghanga kuba mughanika.’" 
Luke16:3 Omughanika yaakoba mule ati, ‘Nkole ki? Musengwa wange aja kuntoola ku bughanika. Okulima tikusobola, ate okusabiriza kungemya ensoni." 
Luke16:4 Ntegeire eky'okukola abantu okunsangaalira mu ndhu dhaibwe, bwenaaba nga ntooleibwa ku bughanika.’" 
Luke16:5 “Agho yaayeta buli muntu musengwa we ye yali abandha. Yaakoba eyasooka ati, ‘Musengwa wange akubandha ki?’" 
Luke16:6 Ole yaakoba ati, ‘Endebe kikumi (100) edh'omuzigo.’ Yaamukoba ati, ‘Gema ekighandiiko kyo, era tyama mangu oghandiike amakumi ataanu (50).’" 
Luke16:7 Agho yaakoba owundi ati, ‘Ate iwe eibandha lyo lyaga gha?’ Yaamukoba ati, ‘Ensawo kikumi (100) edh'engaano.’ Yaamukoba ati, ‘Gema ekighandiiko kyo oghandiike kinaana (80).’" 
Luke16:8 “Kale musengwa yaasaaka omughanika oyo atali mwesimbu olw'amagezi ge yasala kuba abaana ab'ensi eno bagezigezi mu ngeri ye bakolaganamu n'ab'oluse lwaibwe okusinga abaana ab'omusana. 
Luke16:9 “Era ka mbakobere: Mwefunire emikwano mu bukombe buno obw'ensi, kuba ni bwe buliwaagho, balibasangaalira mu bulamu obw'ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Luke16:10 Omwesimbu mu bitono einho era aba mwesimbu mu binene, n'oyo atali mwesimbu mu bitono era taba mwesimbu mu binene." 
Luke16:11 Kale oba nga timwali beesimbu mu bukombe buno obw'ensi, naani aja okubateresa obukombe bwene obw'amazima?" 
Luke16:12 Era oba nga timwali beesimbu ku by'abandi naani alibagha ebyaimwe? 
Luke16:13 “Ezira mugheereza aja kuba ni basengwa be babiri kuba akyaghaku mulala yaayenda owundi, oba yeekubira ku mulala yaanhooma owundi. Timusobola kugheereza byombi: Katonda na bukombe bwa nsi.”" 
Luke16:14 Mperaano Abafarisaayo, kuba baali benda inho eby'obukombe, bino byonabyona baabiwulira aye baamusekerera." 
Luke16:15 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Niimwe abeerongoosa mu maiso ag'abantu aye Katonda aidhi emyoyo gyaimwe kuba abantu kye basuuta, Katonda akyenhinhala." 
Luke16:16 “Amateeka n'abalanzi byaligho okutuuka ku Yoanne okuva n'olwo Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda bwayegeresebwa nga n'Amawulire Amalungi, era buli muntu agezaaku okubungiramu n'amaani." 
Luke16:17 Aye kyangu eigulu n'ensi okuwaagho okusinga Amateeka okuvaaku waire akatoonheze. 
Luke16:18 “Buli muntu abinga mukazi we n'abayiza owundi aba ayenze, ate omuntu abayiza omukazi oyo iba y'abinze yeena aba ayenze." 
Luke16:19 “Ghaaligho omusaadha omukombe eyavaalanga ebivaalo bya nakasooma nga byakolebwa mu ngoye mpegheevu, era nga buli lunaku yabanga oti ali ku mbaga." 
Luke16:20 Ghaabaagho omusaadha omwavu eyali aidhwire amabwa ye baayetanga Lazaro, ng'aba agho ku mulyango ogw'omukombe." 
Luke16:21 Yeegombanga okulya aigute obukunkumuka obwavanga ku meeza ey'omukombe, era embwa dhaidhanga dhaakomberera amabwa ge." 
Luke16:22 “Ekiseera kyatuuka, omusaadha omwavu yaafa, bamalaika baamutwala mu kifo Aburahamu mwe yali. Omukombe yeena yaafa, yaaziikibwa." 
Luke16:23 Omukombe ng'ali e magombe mu bulumi obungi einho, yaagangamula ku maiso, yaalengera Aburahamu ni Lazaro nga bali ghalala." 
Luke16:24 Agho yaayeta ati, ‘Aburahamu lata, nsaasira otume Lazaro ainhike olwala lwe mu maadhi, aidhe ampozewozeeku olulimi, kuba ndi kulumizibwa inho eno mu muliro.’" 
Luke16:25 “Aye Aburahamu yaamukoba ati, ‘Mwana wange idhukira oti mu bulamu bwo wafuna ebirungi byonabyona, aye Lazaro yaafuna ebibi kale mperaano ono n'okuba mu kwesiima, iwe n'oba mu kubonaabona." 
Luke16:26 Ate ghagati waife n'imwe ghaateebwagho olukonko olunene, ng'abo abandyenze okuva eno okwidha eyo tibasobola, waire abenda okuva eyo okwidha eno.’" 
Luke16:27 Omukombe yaakoba ati, ‘Niini nkweghembye lata, mutume eri ab'omu ndhu ya lata wange," 
Luke16:28 kuba ndiyo ni baganda bange bataanu, abalabule tomanha boona bwe baidha mu kifo kino eky'okubonaabona.’" 
Luke16:29 “Aye Aburahamu yaamukoba ati, ‘Baganda bo bali ni Musa n'abalanzi, babawulirise.’" 
Luke16:30 Omukombe yaakoba ati, ‘Aburahamu lata, aye bweghabaagho ava e magombe n'aja ye bali, baidha kwenenia.’" 
Luke16:31 Aye Aburahamu yaamukoba ati, ‘Oba nga tibawulira Musa n'abalanzi, tibaja kwikiriza omuntu ni bw'alizuukira okuva mu bafu.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Agho Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Ebisendasenda abantu okugwa mu kibi byakubaagho, aye akagwireku oyo abireeta." 
Luke17:2 Oyo kyandimubeereire kikalamu ngoli asibibwa olubengo olunene mu nkoto n'asuulibwa mu nhandha, okusinga okuleetera ni bw'aba omulala ku bato bano okugwa mu kibi." 
Luke17:3 “Kale mwekuume, muganda wo bw'akukolanga ekibi, omunenianga era bwe yeenenianga omusonighanga." 
Luke17:4 Era bw'akukolanga ebibi emikuzi musanvu olunaku olulala, era n'airanga y'oli emikuzi egyo omusanvu n'akukoba ati, ‘Tikairayo,’ omusonighanga.”" 
Luke17:5 Abatume baakoba Musengwa bati: “Twongereku okwikiriza.” 
Luke17:6 Musengwa yaabakoba ati: “Nguli mulikuuku n'okwikiriza okwaga n'akamuuma ka kaladaali, mwandisoboire okukoba omuti ogw'enkenene guno muti, ‘Va ghano weesimbe mu nhandha’ gwabawulira." 
Luke17:7 “Naani ku imwe aba n'omugheereza we alima oba ayaya, n'amukoba nga yaakava mu nimiro ati, ‘Idha otyame tulye?’" 
Luke17:8 Tamukoba bukobe ati, ‘Ntegekera kye nnaalya era ovaale bukalamu ompeereze okutuusa bwe nnaamala okulya n'okunhwa, memale weena olye era onhwe?’" 
Luke17:9 Bw'amala yeebaza omugheereza oyo olw'okukola by'amulagiire? 
Luke17:10 Kale mwena bwe mukolanga ebyo byonabyona ebibalagirwa mukobanga muti ‘Tuli bagheereza abazira kye tugasa, tukoze bw'ekyo kye tuteekwa okukola.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Olwatuuka bwe yali aja e Yerusalemu, yaabita ghagati gha Galilaaya ni Samaria." 
Luke17:12 Bwe yali aja okungira mu kabuga, yaayagaanana n'ab'endwaire ey'ebigenge ikumi, era baayemerera nga ghakaabulayo akata," 
Luke17:13 baaleekaana bati: “Yesu Musengwa, tusaasire.”" 
Luke17:14 Yesu bwe yababona yaabakoba ati: “Muje mweyandhule ye bakabona.” Era bwe baali baja baalongooka. 
Luke17:15 Omulala ku abo bwe yabona ng'awonie, yaira einhuma okusaaka Katonda ng'ayogerera ghaigulu" 
Luke17:16 era yaatuuka yeeyala ku itaka agho gha bigere bya Yesu nga yeeyanza. Era ono yali Musamaria. 
Luke17:17 Agho Yesu yaakoba ati: “Abawonie tibabaire ikumi? Memale omwenda bali gha? 
Luke17:18 Tighabaire aira kugha Katonda kitiisa okutoolaku ono ow'eighanga erindi?” 
Luke17:19 Kale n'okumukoba ati: “Situka oje okwikiriza kwo kukuwoniiza.” 
Luke17:20 Abafarisaayo baamubuuza bati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda butuuka li?” Yaabairamu ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda tibuja kwidha na bumanhiso 
Luke17:21 era abantu tibalikoba bati, ‘Bona eno, buubuno’ oba bati, ‘Buubule!’ Kuba Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda buli mu imwe.”" 
Luke17:22 Agho yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Ekiseera kiri kwidha mwe mulyegombera okubona Omwana w'Omuntu waire olunaku olulala luti, aye nga timusobola." 
Luke17:23 Ghalibaagho ababakoba bati, ‘Wuule ghale’ oba bati, ‘Wuuno ghano.’ Aye mutajangayo waire okubanonereza," 
Luke17:24 kuba ng'olukuba bwe lughemya ni lumulisa ghansi gh'eigulu woonawoona okuva ku luuyi olundi okutuuka ku lundi, atyo n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliba ku lunaku lwe." 
Luke17:25 Aye ateekwa okusooka okudaazibwa einho, n'okwegaanibwa ab'oluse luno." 
Luke17:26 Nga bwe kyali mu nnaku dha Noa era bwe kiriba ni mu nnaku edh'Omwana w'Omuntu. 
Luke17:27 Abantu baali bali ku kulya, kunhwa, kubayiza, na kubayira, okutuusa ku lunaku Noa lwe yangira mu lyato, amaadhi ag'omwidhuzo gaidha gabazikiriza boonaboona." 
Luke17:28 Mu nsambo n'endala, bwe kiriba oti ni bwe kyali mu nnaku dha Loti: Abantu baali mu kulya, kunhwa, kugula, kutunda, kusiga na kuzimba," 
Luke17:29 aye ku lunaku Loti lwe yafuluma mu Sodoma, omuliro n'obunhota byamagalika okuva mu igulu byabazikiriza boonaboona." 
Luke17:30 Kityo bwe kiriba ku lunaku Omwana w'Omuntu lw'alibonekeraku. 
Luke17:31 Ku lunaku olwo, oyo aliba ku ndhu ku ngulu aye nga ebibye biri mu ndhu atairanga inhuma." 
Luke17:32 Mwidhukire muka Loti ekyamutuukaku. 
Luke17:33 Buli agezaaku okuwonia obulamu bwe aja kubufiirwa, aye buli afiirwa obulamu bwe alibuwonia." 
Luke17:34 Ka mbakobere: Mu bwire obwo ababiri abaliba mu buliri obulala, owundi alitwalibwa owundi yaalekebwa." 
Luke17:35 Ababiri abaliba aghalala nga bali kusa, owundi alitwalibwa owundi yaalekebwa. [" 
Luke17:36 Ababiri abaliba mu nimiro, owundi alitwalibwa owundi yaalekebwa.]”" 
Luke17:37 Agho baamukoba bati: “Musengwa, luuyi gha?” Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Aghaba ekifiire ensega ghe dheesololeza.”" 
Luke18:1 Agho yaabafumira olufumo okubalaga ati bagwaine okusabanga buliidho era n'obutakoogha. 
Luke18:2 Yaabakoba ati: “Ghaaligho ekibuga kirala, omwali omulamuzi eyali nga tatya Katonda era nga tata mu muntu yeenayeena kinhagansi." 
Luke18:3 Era mu kibuga omwo mwabaamu namwandu eyaidhanga y'ali n'amukoba ati, ‘Tutawulule, omponie omuzigu.’" 
Luke18:4 Omulamuzi yaamala entangama ng'alobye. Aye olumaliira yaakoba mu mwoyo gwe ati, ‘Waire titya Katonda, era ghazira muntu yeenayeena ye ntaamu kinhagansi," 
Luke18:5 aye olw'okuba namwandu ono ansinie, ndidha kubatawulula, alobe kwidha kunkooya buli kaakyeire.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Agho Musengwa yaakoba ati: “Muwulire omulamuzi oyo omubi bw'akoba. 
Luke18:7 Memale obwo Katonda bw'atalitawulula abalonde be abamusaba omusana n'obwire? Mbo bw'alirwa okubayamba? 
Luke18:8 Ka mbakobere: Aja kubatawulula, ate mangu. Aye Omwana w'Omuntu bw'aliidha, alyagaana okwikiriza ku nsi?”" 
Luke18:9 Agho, abo abaali beidhi nga batukuvu era nga banhooma abandi boonaboona, yaabakobera olufumo luno:" 
Luke18:10 “Olwatuuka nga ghabaagho abantu babiri, Omufarisaayo n'omughooza w'omusolo, nga baja mu isinzizo okusaba." 
Luke18:11 Omufarisaayo yaayemerera yaasaba mu mwoyo gwe ati, ‘Katonda wange nkwebaza, kuba tiri ng'oti n'abantu abandi, abanhazi, abazira mazima, abenzi era tiri ng'oti n'omughooza w'omusolo oyo." 
Luke18:12 Nze nsiiba emikuzi ebiri buli nnaku musanvu, era ku buli bintu eikumi bye nfuna nkughaaku ekirala.’" 
Luke18:13 Aye omughooza w'omusolo, yaayemerera ghalaku era nga tayenda na kusitulira maiso eri eigulu, yeekuba mu kifuba bw'akoba ati, ‘Katonda wange, nsaasira nze omwonooni!’" 
Luke18:14 Ka mbakobere: Omughooza w'omusolo ono yairayo ewuwe nga mutukuvu mu maiso ga Katonda okusinga ole kuba buli eyeetwala ati wa ghaigulu aja kwisibwa era buli eyeetwala nga wa ghansi aja kutwalibwa nga wa ghaigulu.” 
Luke18:15 Abantu baamuleetera n'abaana abato boona abagemeku, aye Abeegeresebwa be bwe baakibona baabadhuuka." 
Luke18:16 Aye Yesu yaabeeta yaabakoba ati: “Muleke abaana abato baidhe ye ndi mutabalobera kuba abali oti n'abo ni beene Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda. 
Luke18:17 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Ataikiriza Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda oti mwana muto taghanga kubungiramu naire.” 
Luke18:18 Ghaabaagho omwami mulala yaamubuuza ati: “Mwegeresa omulungi, nkole ki okufuna obulamu obutawaagho?”" 
Luke18:19 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Lwaki okoba oti ndi mulungi? Ezira mulungi okutoolaku Katonda yenka. 
Luke18:20 Oidhi ebiragiro: ‘Toyendanga, toitanga, toibanga, toghaayirizanga. Lata wo n'inhoko obaghanga ekitiisa.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Ole yairamu ati: “Ebyo byonabyona nabigema okuva mu buto.” 
Luke18:22 Yesu bwe yawulira ekyo yaamukoba ati: “Okaabuzaayo ekintu kirala. Ja otoole by'oli nabyo byonabyona ogabire abaavu, eby'obukombe oliba nabyo mu igulu era oidhe obitenga ninze.”" 
Luke18:23 Bwe yawulira ekyo, yaafootookerera, kuba yali mukombe mu bakombe." 
Luke18:24 Yesu bwe yamubona ng'afootookereire yaakoba ati: “Nga kikalangafu abakombe okwingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda! 
Luke18:25 Kiba kyangu engamiya okubita mu mpami ey'empiso okusinga omukombe okungira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.” 
Luke18:26 Abaakiwulira baakoba bati: “Memale olwo naani asobola okulokolwa?” 
Luke18:27 Aye Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Ebitasoboka mu bantu, Katonda abisobola.”" 
Luke18:28 Agho Petero yaamukoba ati: “Kale ife, twaleka ebyaife twakunonereza.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere ezira oyo aleka maka, mukazi, oba baganda be, oba bazaire oba baana olw'okuba Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda," 
Luke18:30 n'atafuna ebisingagho kamaala mu nsi muno, ate ni mu biseera ebiidha n'agheebwa obulamu obutawaagho.”" 
Luke18:31 Agho Yesu yaatwala Eikumi n'Ababiri gha mbali, yaabakoba ati: “Buti tuli kuniinaniina e Yerusalemu era ebintu byonabyona ebyaghandiikibwa abalanzi ebigema ku Mwana w'Omuntu bija kutuukirira." 
Luke18:32 Aja kugheebwayo mu mikono egy'abamaghanga agandi, bamukiine, bamuvume, bamufuudheku amatanta." 
Luke18:33 Ate nga bamaze okumuwaiga enkoba baidha kumwita, era ku lunaku olwokusatu azuukire.”" 
Luke18:34 Aye ghazira mu ebyo kye baategeera; amakulu ag'ebibono ebyo gaabeegisaaku era tibaagemya bye yabakoba. 
Luke18:35 Agho olwatuuka, bwe yali ali kumpi okutuuka e Yeriko, ghaabaagho omutulu eyali atyaime ku mbali ku ngira ng'asabiriza." 
Luke18:36 Bwe yawulira eikuukuubira ery'abantu nga libita yaabuuza ki ekirigho," 
Luke18:37 era baamukobera bati, Yesu ow'e Nazarethi n'ali kubita." 
Luke18:38 Agho yaayasiikana ati: “Yesu mwidhukulu wa Daudi, nsaasira!”" 
Luke18:39 Abaali bakulembeiremu baamudhuuka asirike, aye yayongera bwongere kwasiikana ati: “Mwidhukulu wa Daudi nsaasira!”" 
Luke18:40 Kale Yesu yaayemerera, yaalagira bamumuleetere. Bwe yaseeta, yaamubuuza ati:" 
Luke18:41 “Oyenda nkukolere ki?” Yaakoba ati: “Musengwa nhenda kwiramu kubona.” 
Luke18:42 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Iramu okubona, okwikiriza kwo kukuwoniiza.”" 
Luke18:43 Akaseera keene ako yairamu okubona era yaanonereza Yesu nga bw'agha Katonda ekitiisa. Abantu boonaboona bwe baakibona baasaaka Katonda. 
Luke19:1 Agho Yesu yangira mu Yeriko ng'ali kukibitamu. 
Luke19:2 Ghabaagho omusaadha nga bamweta Zakkayo nga mughooza wa musolo mukulu era nga mukombe. 
Luke19:3 Yayenda okubona Yesu aye tiyaghanga olw'eikuukuubira ery'abantu ate nga yali musaadha mumpi. 
Luke19:4 Kale yaalumuka, yaaja emberi, yaaniina omuti omutiini aghange okumubona, kuba eyo n'engira ye yali aja okubitamu." 
Luke19:5 Yesu bwe yatuuka mu kifo yaalinga ghaigulu yaamukoba ati: “Zakkayo, yangughaku okwika, kuba olwaleero nteekwa okukukyalira mu maka go.”" 
Luke19:6 Kale yaayangughaku yaika, era yaamusangaalira n'eisanhu." 
Luke19:7 Boonaboona bwe baakibona, baavuuvuuma nga bakoba bati: “Ajiire okukyalira omusaadha omwonooni.”"
