Luke19:8 Agho Zakkayo yaayemerera yaakoba Musengwa ati: “Musengwa, ndidha kwawulamu ghagati ebintu byange, ekitundu ekindi nkigabire abaavu era oba nga ghaligho omuntu yeenayeena ye nakupankupaniaku ekikye kyonakyona, ndidha kukimuliyira emikuzi ena.”" 
Luke19:9 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Olwaleero okulokoka kutuuse ku ndhu eno, kuba ono yeena mwidhukulu wa Aburahamu." 
Luke19:10 Era Omwana ow'Omuntu yaidha okunoonia n'okuwonia ekyali kibuze.” 
Luke19:11 Bwe baali bakaawulirisa ebyo, Yesu yeeyongera, yaabafumira olufumo, kuba yali ali kumpi ni Yerusalemu, ate nga baali badhuuba bati Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda bwali bwa kuboneka mangu ago." 
Luke19:12 Kale yaabakoba ati: “Ghaaligho omusaadha ow'ekitiisa eyaja mu nsi ey'eghala afuulibwe kyabazinga memale aire. 
Luke19:13 Ng'akaali kuja yaayeta abagheereza be ikumi yaabagha mina ikumi yaabakoba ati, ‘Mudhisuubuze okutuusa lwe ndiira.’" 
Luke19:14 Aye abantu ab'omu nsi ye, baali nga baamukyagha, era baagheereza abakwenda abaamuva einhuma okukoba bale ye yali ali kuja bati tibenda oyo abafuge." 
Luke19:15 “Bwe yaira ng'amaze okufuulibwa kyabazinga, yaakoba bamwetere abagheereza be, be yalekera mina, amanhe kye baafunamu mu kusuubula." 
Luke19:16 Eyasooka yaidha yaakoba ati, ‘Musengwa, mina yo yazaala mina edhindi ikumi.’" 
Luke19:17 Yaamukoba ati, ‘Weekaza omugheereza omulungi! Olw'okuba wali mwesigwa mu bitono, oidha kufuga ebibuga ikumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Owokubiri yaidha yaakoba ati, ‘Musengwa, mina yo yazaala mina edhindi itaanu.’" 
Luke19:19 Oyo yeena yaamukoba ati, ‘Iwe oidha kufuga ebibuga bitaanu!’" 
Luke19:20 “Omugheereza owundi yaidha yaakoba ati, ‘Musengwa, mina yo yiino ye nazingirira mu kagoye ni ngigisa." 
Luke19:21 Nakutya kuba oli muntu muzibu: otwala ebitali bibyo era waakungula by'otaasiga.’ 
Luke19:22 Yaamukoba ati, ‘Omugheereza omubi iwe, by'oyogeire kwe nnaasinziira okukusalira omusango. Wamanha oti ndi muzibu, ntwala ebitali byange, naakungula bye ntaasiga" 
Luke19:23 lwaki kale tiwateresa basuubuzi mina yange? Nze olwandiize nandibaire ngifuna nga kuliku n'amagoba.’ 
Luke19:24 “Agho yaakoba abaali beemereire agho ati, ‘Mumutooleku mina eyo mugighe ole ali ni mina eikumi.’" 
Luke19:25 Baamukoba bati, ‘Musengwa, ole ali ni mina ikumi!’" 
Luke19:26 Musengwa yaakoba ati, ‘Ka mbakobere: yeenayeena aliku ni ky'ali nakyo aligheebwa aye oyo azira, ni k'ali nako kalimutoolebwaku." 
Luke19:27 Ate abo abazigu bange abataayenda mbafuge, mubaleete ghano mubaite nga mbona.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaakulemberamu yaaniinaniina, yaasimba e Yerusalemu." 
Luke19:29 Bwe yatuuka okumpi ni Bethifage ni Bethania, agho nga ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, yaatuma babiri ku Beegeresebwa be," 
Luke19:30 ng'abakoba ati: “Muje mu kyalo kye mulingiriire, ekyo bwe munaaba mukingira muti munaayagaana endogoyi ento ng'esibiibwa nga tetyamwangaku muntu yeenayeena, mugisibule mugireete." 
Luke19:31 Bwe ghabaagho ababuuza ati, ‘Lwaki muli kugisibula?’ Munaakoba muti Musengwa n'agyenda.”" 
Luke19:32 Kale abo be yatuma baaja era baayagaana nga kiri nga bwe yakoba. 
Luke19:33 Bwe baali basibula endogoyi, beene yo baababuuza bati: “Lwaki muli kusibula endogoyi?”" 
Luke19:34 Baabairamu bati: “Musengwa agyenda.” 
Luke19:35 Baagireeta ye Yesu, baagyalaku ebivaalo era baagimutyamyaku." 
Luke19:36 Bwe yali ng'aja, baayala ebivaalo byaibwe mu luguudo." 
Luke19:37 Bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okutuuka agho ng'oserengeta Olusozi lw'Emiti Emyoliva, eikuukuubira ery'Abeegeresebwa lyatoolera okusagamba n'okusaaka Katonda, mu mamiro ag'amaani olw'ebyewuunhio byonabyona bye baali baboine." 
Luke19:38 Baakoba bati: “Wa nkabi kyabazinga oyo aidha mu liina lya Musengwa! Emiraala gibe mu igulu n'ekitiisa kibe eyo ghaigulu yeene.” 
Luke19:39 Agho Abafarisaayo abaali mu ikuukuubira, baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, koba ku Beegeresebwa bo.”" 
Luke19:40 Yaabairamu ati: “Ka mbakobere bano bwe basirika amabaale gaidha kuleekaana.” 
Luke19:41 Agho Yesu yaatuuka okumpi n'ekibuga, bwe yakibona yaalira." 
Luke19:42 Yaakoba ati: “Nguli wamanha waire olwaleero luno ebireeta emiraala! Aye mperaano bya kwegisaaku 
Luke19:43 kuba enaku dhiri kukwidhira abazigu bakusiteku olukomera, bakusibiremu bakuzingize ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona." 
Luke19:44 Balikusaaniagho iwe n'abantu bo abakulimu era tibalireka ibaale ku liinaalyo kuba tiwamanha lunaku lwa kukukyalira.” 
Luke19:45 Agho Yesu yangira mu isinzizo yaatoolera okubingamu abaali bali kutaniramu ebintu. 
Luke19:46 Yaabakoba ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Endhu yange enaabanga ndhu yaakusabiramu.’ Aye imwe mugifiire mpuku ya banhazi!”" 
Luke19:47 Era yali ng'ayegeresanga buli lunaku eyo mu isinzizo. Bakabona Abakulu, Abanamateeka n'abataka abakulu, banoonia amagezi ag'okumusaaniagho," 
Luke19:48 aye baalemwa okubona eky'okukola kuba abantu boonaboona nga bwe bamuwulirisa, tibenda kulekera." 
Luke20:1 Lwali lulala Yesu bwe yali ng'ali kwegeresa abantu mu isinzizo nga bw'abakobera Amawulire Amalungi, Bakabona Abakulu, Abanamateeka, n'abakulu ab'ebika beesoloza." 
Luke20:2 Baamukoba bati: “Tukobere, buyinza bwa kika ki bw'okozesa ebintu bino? Era naani eyakugha obuyinza obwo?”" 
Luke20:3 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Zeena ka mbabuuzeeku ekibuuzo, munkobere." 
Luke20:4 Okubatiza kwa Yoanne kwava mu igulu oba mu bantu?” 
Luke20:5 Agho batoolera okwekobaana beene na beene bati: “Bwe tunaakoba tuti kwava mu igulu, aidha kukoba ati lwaki timwamwikiriza?" 
Luke20:6 Ate bwe tunaakoba tuti kwava mu bantu, abantu boonaboona baidha kutukuba amabaale, kuba bakikakasa mu myoyo gyaibwe bati Yoanne yali mulanzi.”" 
Luke20:7 Agho baamukoba bati: “Titwidhi ghe kwava.” 
Luke20:8 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Zeena tiibakobere buyinza bwe nkozesa bintu bino.” 
Luke20:9 Agho yaakobera abantu olufumo luno ati: “Ghaaligho omusaadha eyasimba eisamba lye ery'emizabbibu, yaataamu abakozi, yaaja mu nsi eyindi, yaalwayo." 
Luke20:10 Ekiseera kyatuuka, yaatuma omugheereza aje y'abakozi amunonere ku biva mu isamba lye aye abakozi baamukuba era baamwiririzaayo ngalo nkalu." 
Luke20:11 Kabiri yaatuma omugheereza owundi, oyo yeena baamukuba, baamukola ebiswaza era yeena baamwiririzaayo ngalo nkalu." 
Luke20:12 Era yaatuma owokusatu, aye ono yeena baamusindiikiriza baamutoola mu isamba nga bamutaireku n'ebibwa." 
Luke20:13 Mwene isamba yeebuuza ati, ‘Nkole ki? Ka ntume mutabane wange omugonzi, oba katyo banaamutaamu ekinhagansi.’" 
Luke20:14 Aye abakozi bwe baamubona, baakoba bati, ‘Ono n'omusika, ka tumwite obusika bube bwaife.’" 
Luke20:15 Agho baamusindiikiriza okumutoola mu isamba, baamwita. “Kale mwene isamba aja kubakola ki?" 
Luke20:16 Aja kwidha azikirize abakozi abo n'eisamba aliteemu abandi.” Abantu bwe baawulira ekyo baakoba bati: “Katonda ataganha ekyo kubaagho.” 
Luke20:17 Yesu yaabalingirira yaabakoba ati: “Kale, ekyaghandiikibwa kino kitegeeza ki? ‘Eibaale abazimbi lye baaloba bati lizira mugaso, n'eryafuuka empango ey'omusingi mu nsonda.’" 
Luke20:18 Buli muntu agwa ku ibaale eryo amenhekamenheka, ate bwe ligwa ku muntu, limumanhiangula.”" 
Luke20:19 Mu saawa eyo Abanamateeka ni Bakabona Abakulu baayenda bamugeme kuba baategeera bati mu lufumo olwo yali ayogera ku beene, aye baatya abantu." 
Luke20:20 Kale baagunirira baasasula abantu empiiya ab'okumuleba, abeefuula abeesimbu ate nga baayenda kumugemekeza mu by'ayogera, basobole okumughaayo mu mikono egy'ab'obuyinza." 
Luke20:21 Baidha baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, twidhi tuti by'oyogera ni by'oyegeresa bituufu, toboola muntu yeenayeena, aye oyegereresa irala amagira amatuufu aga Katonda." 
Luke20:22 Mpegaano tukobere, twikirizibwa mu Mateeka okugha Kaisari omusolo oba bbe?”" 
Luke20:23 Aye Yesu yaiguka mu katego kaibwe era yaabakoba ati 
Luke20:24 “Mundage e dinari. Ekifaananie ekiriku n'ebighandiiko by'ani?” Baamukoba bati: “Bya Kaisari.” 
Luke20:25 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Niini mughe Kaisari ebya Kaisari, ni Katonda mumughe ebya Katonda.”" 
Luke20:26 Era tibaaghanga kumugema mu bibono bye yayogera ng'abantu baligho, kale baasirika busirike nga beewuunhia kye yabairamu." 
Luke20:27 Agho abandi ku Basaddukaayo baidha, abakoba bati ezira kuzuukira," 
Luke20:28 baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, Musa yatughandiikira ati, ‘Muganda w'omuntu bw'afa, n'aleka omukazi aye nga talese baana, muganda w'omufu atwalanga namwandu oyo, yaafunira muganda we eizaire.’" 
Luke20:29 Mperaano ghaaligho aboluganda musanvu asooka yaafuna omukazi yaafa nga tazaire 
Luke20:30 owokubiri yaatwala namwandu," 
Luke20:31 n'owokusatu atyo, okutuusa boonaboona omusanvu bwe baafa nga tibazaire." 
Luke20:32 Olumaliira omukazi yeena yaafa. 
Luke20:33 Olwo mu kuzuukira omukazi oyo aliba muka ani? Kuba boonaboona omusanvu baaliku ba iba.” 
Luke20:34 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Abantu ab'ensi eno babayiza ate babayira," 
Luke20:35 aye abo abalibonebwa nga bagwaine okuzuukira n'okwingira mu bulamu obwo tibalibayira era tibalibayiza. 
Luke20:36 Baliba nga tibakaafa, kuba baliba ng'oti bamalaika. Era baliba baana ba Katonda, kuba baliba bazuukiire." 
Luke20:37 Era ku by'abafu okuzuukira kiragibwa bukalamu mu kitabo kya Musa, mu bigema ku kisaka ebikoba biti, ‘Musengwa Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka, Katonda wa Yakobo.’" 
Luke20:38 Kale ni, ti Katonda wa bafu aye wa balamu kuba eri Katonda, boonaboona baba balamu.”" 
Luke20:39 Olwo abandi ku Banamateeka baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, oizeemu bukalamu!”" 
Luke20:40 Era okuva olwo tibairayo kukana kumubuuza. 
Luke20:41 Yesu yaabuuza ati: “Lwaki bakoba bati Kurisito mwidhukulu wa Daudi? 
Luke20:42 Ate nga Daudi mwene akoba mu kitabo kya Zabbuli ati, ‘Musengwa yakoba Musengwa wange ati: Tyama ghano ku mukono gwange omusaadha," 
Luke20:43 okutuusa lwe ndita abazigu bo ghansi gh'ebigere byo.’ 
Luke20:44 Kale oba Daudi amweta Musengwa we, memale aba atya kabiri mwidhukulu we?”" 
Luke20:45 Agho ng'abantu boonaboona bali ku muwulirisa, yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati:" 
Luke20:46 “Mwekuume Abanamateeka abagonza okuniaga nga bavaire ebivaalo ebireeyi, okulamusibwa mu biya n'okutyama mu bifo ebisinga mu sinagoga ni ku mbaga" 
Luke20:47 abakaavuula eby'omu ndhu dha banamwandu, baalwagho nga basaba nga beeraga. Ekibonerezo kyaibwe kirisingaku eby'abandi.”" 
Luke21:1 Yesu yeetegereza yaabona abakombe nga bata ebirabo byaibwe mu kifo omuteebwa ebirabo. 
Luke21:2 Yaabona namwandu omwavu ng'ataamu budhegedhege bubiri. 
Luke21:3 Yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere namwandu ono omwavu atairemu okusinga boonaboona. 
Luke21:4 Kuba bale batoirenga ku bingi bye bali nabyo, aye ono mu bwavu bwe aghaireyo kyonakyona ky'ali nakyo mu bulamu bwe.”" 
Luke21:5 Abantu bwe baali boogera ku isinzizo engeri ye lyazimbibwamu n'amabaale ag'omughendo agaboneka obulungi, n'ebirabo abantu bye baagha, yaabakoba ati:" 
Luke21:6 “Ebiseera biidha, ebyo bye mubona ghalobe kubaagho ibaale lisigala ku liinaalyo nga tirisuuliibwa ghansi.”" 
Luke21:7 Baamubuuza bati: “Mwegeresa, bino biribaagho li, era kamanhiso ki akalibaagho nga biri kumpi kubaagho?”" 
Luke21:8 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mwekuume, ti kulwa nga babaghabya kuba ghalibonekagho abantu kamaala abalyeyeta eriina lyange nga bakoba bati, ‘Ninze oyo,’ era bati, ‘Ekiseera kituuse!’ Aye timubanonerezanga." 
Luke21:9 Ate bwe muwulira ku ntalo ni ku bwegugungo timudhugumiranga, kuba ebintu ebyo biri n'okusooka okubaagho, aye tikitegeeza kiti mangu ago enkomerero eriba ng'etuuka.”" 
Luke21:10 Era yaabakoba ati: “Eighanga lirirumba eighanga erindi, obwakyabazinga bwalumba obwakyabazinga obundi." 
Luke21:11 Ghalibaagho musisi ow'amaani, ghaabaagho endhala n'endwaire ya kawumpuli mu biketezo kamaala, era ghabaagho ebitiisa n'obumanhiso obw'amaani okuva mu igulu." 
Luke21:12 Aye ng'ebyo byonabyona bikaali kubaagho, balibagema baabadaazadaaza, baabaghaayo mu mikono gya ab'obuyinza mu sinagoga ni mu makomera, baabaseeghayo ye bakyabazinga ni y'abafuzi abandi, ku lwange." 
Luke21:13 Kino kiribasobozesa okugha obudhulizi. 
Luke21:14 Mukite mu myoyo gyaimwe obuteetegekera kya kwiramu ng'ekiseera kikaali. 
Luke21:15 Kuba ninze ndibagha engeri ey'okwogera n'amagezi, nga ku bazigu baimwe ghazira aghanga kubitakania waire kubiroba." 
Luke21:16 Era muligheebwayo abazaire baimwe, baganda baimwe, ab'ekika kyaimwe, mikwano gyaimwe, era baliita abandi ku imwe." 
Luke21:17 Abantu boonaboona balibakyagha ku lw'eriina lyange. 
Luke21:18 Aye ghazira luviiri lwa ku mutwe gwaimwe luja kuzikirira. 
Luke21:19 Mu kuguma kwaimwe mwe muliwoneza obulamu bwaimwe.” 
Luke21:20 “Aye bwe mubonanga ab'amagye nga bali agho beezungulwire Yerusalemu, ng'olwo mumanha muti okuzikirizibwa kwakyo kutuuse." 
Luke21:21 Ng'olwo abali mu Buyudaaya balumukira mu nsozi, ng'abali mu kibuga bavaamu, era ababanga mu kyalo bataingiranga mu kibuga;" 
Luke21:22 kuba edho n'edhiriba enaku edh'okubonereza n'okutuukiriza ebyaghandiikibwa byonabyona. 
Luke21:23 Nga bakagwireku abaliba enda, n'abaliba bonsa mu nnaku edho kuba okudaagadaaga okw'amaani kuja kuba ku nsi eno n'obusungu bwa Katonda bwike ku bantu bano." 
Luke21:24 Abandi balibaita n'empiima, abandi balitwalibwa mu maghanga goonagoona nga banhage, era Yerusalemu kiriniinirirwa abamaghanga agandi okutuusa enaku edh'abamaghanga agandi lwe dhiriwaaku." 
Luke21:25 “Ghalibaagho obumanhiso ku ndhuba, ku mwezi ni ku muunienie, ate ku nsi ghalibaagho okweraliikirira mu maghanga, n'okusoberwa olw'okuduma okw'amayengo n'enhandha." 
Luke21:26 Abantu balizirikaku olw'okutya nga balinda ebyo ebiri kwidha ku nsi, kuba amaani ag'omu igulu galitengeesebwa." 
Luke21:27 Agho ng'abantu babona Omwana ow'Omuntu ng'aidhira mu kire n'amaani n'ekitiisa ekingi. 
Luke21:28 Ebintu ebyo bwe bitooleranga okubaagho musitukanga mwayemerera, mwalinga ghaigulu kuba okununulibwa kwaimwe kuliba kutuuse.”" 
Luke21:29 Agho Yesu yaabafumira olufumo ati: “Mubonere ku mutiini, n'emiti egindi." 
Luke21:30 Imwe beene bwe mubona nga gitoolereza okusibusa amakaba nga mumanha ng'endoboozi eri kumpi. 
Luke21:31 Mu nsambo n'endala bwe mubonanga ng'ebintu ebyo bitooleire okubaagho, mumanhanga ng'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda buli kumpi." 
Luke21:32 Bwenebwene, ka mbakobere, ebintu bino bija kubaagho ng'ab'oluse luno bakaali kuwaagho." 
Luke21:33 Eigulu n'ensi bija kuwaagho, aye ebibono byange tibija kuwaagho." 
Luke21:34 “Mwekuume, ti kulwa nga mwemalira bwa mu binhumo, kutamiira na kweraliikirira bya bulamu buno, olunaku lule lwabagwaku nga timwidhi." 
Luke21:35 Kuba abantu boonaboona ab'oku nsi lulibagwaku ng'oti iggu. 
Luke21:36 Mulingirire inho ebirigho era musabe, musobole okuwona ebyo ebija okubaagho era n'okwemerera mu maiso g'Omwana w'Omuntu.”" 
Luke21:37 Buli lunaku yayegeresanga mu isinzizo aye obwire ng'aja yaasula ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva. 
Luke21:38 Era buli ku nkyo abantu boonaboona beesololezanga mu isinzizo okumuwulirisa. 
Luke22:1 Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa era ekyetebwa Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa, kyali kiri kumpi okutuuka." 
Luke22:2 Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka baali bali kwagala engeri ey'okuzikiriza Yesu, kuba baali batya abantu." 
Luke22:3 Agho Sitaani yangira mu Yuda ayetebwa Isikarioti eyali omulala ku abo Eikumi n'Ababiri. 
Luke22:4 Ono yaaja yeekobaana ni Bakabona Abakulu, n'abaisirukale ab'omu isinzizo nga bw'anaamubagha." 
Luke22:5 Baasangaala inho baisania empiiya dhe banaamugha. 
Luke22:6 Yuda yaaganha era yaatoolera okwagala akaghagaanhia ak'okumubagha nga ghazira bantu kamaala. 
Luke22:7 Agho olunaku olw'Ekibinuko eky'Emigaati Egitazimbulukusiibwa lwatuuka, kwe baitiranga entaama ento ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
Luke22:8 Yesu yaatuma Petero ni Yoanne ng'abakoba ati: “Muje mututegekere Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa.” 
Luke22:9 Baamubuuza bati: “Gha ye waalyenze tukitegekere?” 
Luke22:10 Yaabairamu ati: “Bwe munaaba mwingira mu kibuga mwidha kwagaanana n'omusaadha eyeetwise ensugha ey'amaadhi mumunonereze okutuuka mu ndhu y'anangiramu. 
Luke22:11 Mukobe mwenemu muti, ‘Omwegeresa akobye ati ekisenge ky'anaaliiramu embaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa ghalala n'Abeegeresebwa be kiri gha?’" 
Luke22:12 Aidha kubalaga ekisenge ekinene ghaigulu ekirimu bye twenda, mwe mube mutegekere.”" 
Luke22:13 Baaja baayagaana nga buli kintu kiri nga Yesu bwe yabakoba era baategekera omwo embaga ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa. 
Luke22:14 Esaawa bwe yatuuka, Yesu n'Abatume baatyama ku kiiwulo." 
Luke22:15 Yaabakoba ati: “Nhenze inho okulya ku mbaga eno ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa n'imwe, nga nkaali kudaazibwadaazibwa." 
Luke22:16 Kuba ka mbakobere: Tija kwirayo kugirya okutuusa bw'erituukirizibwa mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.” 
Luke22:17 Agho yaagema ekikopo yeeyanza Katonda yaakoba ati: “Mugeme buli muntu anhweku 
Luke22:18 kuba ka mbakobere: Tiriirayo kunhwa ku mwenge gwa muzabbibu okutuusa Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda lwe buliidha.” 
Luke22:19 Olwo yaatoola omugaati yeeyanza Katonda, yaagumegulamegulamu, yaabagha ng'akoba ati: “Guno n'omubiri gwange, [ogugheebwayo ku lwaimwe. Kino mukikolanga okundidhukira.”" 
Luke22:20 Mu nsambo n'endala yatoola ekikopo nga bamaze okulya yaakoba ati: “Ekikopo kino n'endagaano ya Katonda empyaka ekolebwa n'omusaayi gwange ogufukibwa ku lwaimwe.] 
Luke22:21 Aye kale mubone, oyo ow'okundyamu olukwe ali ninze ghano ku kiiwulo!" 
Luke22:22 Kuba Omwana w'Omuntu aja kuva ku nsi nga bwe kyategekebwa, aye akagwireku oyo amulyamu olukwe!”" 
Luke22:23 Agho baatoolera okwebuuzagania naani ku beene aghanga okukola ekyo. 
Luke22:24 Abeegeresebwa be baatoolera okutakana beene na beene bati naani ku beene asinga. 
Luke22:25 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bakyabazinga b'abamaghanga agandi bagafuga," 
Luke22:26 aye imwe timugwaine kuba mutyo. Asinga mu imwe agwaine kuba oti n'asembayo, omukulu abe oti mugheereza:" 
Luke22:27 kuba naani asinga? Atyama ku kiiwulo oba amugheereza? Ti n'atyama ku kiiwulo? Aye nze ndi mu imwe ng'omugheereza. 
Luke22:28 “Imwe mugumye mwaba ninze mu byonabyona ebituyuguumiiza. 
Luke22:29 Kale ndidha kubagha Obwakyabazinga nga zeena Lata wange bwe yabumpa," 
Luke22:30 musobole okulya n'okunhwa ninze ku kiiwulo kyange mu Bwakyabazinga bwange. Era mulityama ku makonero mwalamula ebika eikumi n'ebibiri ebya Isiraeli. 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni, oli kuwulira? Sitaani aikiriziibwa okubaleba, ayawule abalungi n'ababi ng'oti n'omuntu asensa engaano mu biwusu." 
Luke22:32 Aye nze nkusabiire okwikiriza kwo kulobe kukendeera, era bw'okyukanga ogumyanga baganda bo.”" 
Luke22:33 Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa, ndi mwetegefu okusibibwa era n'okufiira aghalala n'iwe.”" 
Luke22:34 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Petero, ka nkukobere olwaleero luno enkoko enaaba ekaali kukolyoka ng'oneegaine emikuzi esatu nga bw'otandhidhi.”" 
Luke22:35 Yesu yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Ku olwo lwe nabatuma ni mbakoba obutaja na mpiiya, nsawo oba engaito, ghaligho kye mwayenda ni mutakifuna?” Bairamu bati: “Ghazira.”" 
Luke22:36 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Aye mperaano ali n'empiiya atadhireka mu nsambo n'endala ali n'ensawo atagireka, oyo azira, atunde ekivaalo agule empiima." 
Luke22:37 Ka mbakobere kiri n'okutuukirira ku nze ekyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Yabalirwa mu bamenhi ab'amateeka’ kuba ebyo ebingemaku biri n'enkomerero yaabyo.”" 
Luke22:38 Baamukoba bati: “Musengwa, bona empiima ibiri dhiidhino.” Yaabakoba ati: “Kimala.”" 
Luke22:39 Yesu yaafuluma, yaaja ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva nga bwe yali amanhiriire, Abeegeresebwa be baamunonereza." 
Luke22:40 Bwe yatuukayo yaabakoba ati: “Musabe mulobe kulebwa.” 
Luke22:41 Yaabaleka agho yeeyongerayooku akata nga gh'otuusa okusuula eibaale," 
Luke22:42 yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaasaba, ati: “Lata, bwe kuba nga n'okwenda kwo ntoolaaku ekikopo kino, aye ti nga nze bwe nhenda aye nga iwe bw'oyenda.” [" 
Luke22:43 Agho yaabonekerwa malaika okuva mu igulu ng'aidha okumugumya. 
Luke22:44 Yaawulira enaku mu mwoyo, yaasaba inho, yaagezimula era olugezi lwaba ng'oti matondo ga musaayi n'agali kutoonha ku itaka.]" 
Luke22:45 Bwe yamala okusaba, yaasituka yaira y'Abeegeresebwa be yaabaagaana nga batendwike olw'enaku eyabali mu mwoyo," 
Luke22:46 yaabakoba ati: “Musituke musabe mulobe kulebwa.” 
Luke22:47 Yali akaayogera ng'eikuukuubira ery'abantu livaayo nga ni Yuda omulala ku ikumi n'Ababiri akulembeiremu, era yaaseeta aghaali Yesu okumugwa mu kifuba." 
Luke22:48 Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Yuda oli kughaayo Omwana w'Omuntu ng'omugwa mu kifuba?” 
Luke22:49 Abaali ni Yesu bwe baabona ebirigho baamukoba bati: “Musengwa tutandiike okulwanisa empiima?” 
Luke22:50 Era Omwegeresebwa owundi yaasala omugheereza w'Omukulu wa Bakabona yaamutoolaku kutu ow'oku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha. 
Luke22:51 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Muleke!” Era yaagema ku kutu ow'omwiru yaamuwonia. 
Luke22:52 Agho Yesu yaakoba Bakabona Abakulu, n'abaisirukale ab'omu isinzizo, n'abakulu ab'ebika abaidha okumugema ati: “Mwidhie okungema n'empiima n'emiigo oti muja kugema munhazi?" 
Luke22:53 Nabanga n'imwe mu isinzizo buli lunaku, timwangema. Aye eno n'esaawa yaimwe era amaani ag'enzikiiza gali kukola.”" 
Luke22:54 Agho baamugema baamutwala mu ndhu y'Omukulu wa Bakabona. Era Petero yaabanonereza, aye ng'aliku ghala." 
Luke22:55 Ghaaligho omuliro ogwali gukumiibwa mu luya ghagati era nga ghaligho abantu ku muliro agho, Petero yeena yaaja yaabatyamamu." 
Luke22:56 Omugheereza omughala yaamubona ng'atyaime gha muliro yaamulingirira era yaakoba ati: “Omusaadha ono yeena yalinga n'ole.” 
Luke22:57 Aye Petero yeegaana ati: “Mukazi iwe, nze timwidhi.”" 
Luke22:58 Ghaabitagho akaseera katono omuntu owundi yaamukoba ati: “Iwe weena oli mulala ku bale.” Aye Petero yeegaana ati: “Musaadha iwe nze tiri.” 
Luke22:59 Bwe ghaabitagho entangama ya saawa nga ndala, kabiri ghaabaagho omuntu eyamwekalangulaku ati: “Bwenebwene omusaadha ono yeena yalinga n'ole kuba, n'okuba Mugalilaaya.”" 
Luke22:60 Aye Petero yairamu ati: “Musaadha iwe, ni by'oyogera tibiidhi!” Mu kaseera keene ako yali akaayogera, enkoko yaakolyoka." 
Luke22:61 Musengwa yaakyuka yaalinga ku Petero, era Petero yaidhukira ebibono bya Musengwa bye yamukoba ati: “Olwaleero luno enkoko enaaba ng'ekaali kukolyoka ng'oneegaine emikuzi esatu.”" 
Luke22:62 Petero yaafuluma yaalira inho. 
Luke22:63 Abasaadha abaali bali kukuuma Yesu baamukiina era baamukuba 
Luke22:64 baamughemba ku maiso memale baamukoba bati: “Teeba, naani akukubye?”" 
Luke22:65 Era baamwogeraku ebibono eby'okuvuma kamaala inho. 
Luke22:66 Bwe bwakya, abakulu ab'ebika, Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka beesoloza baatyama mu lwekobaano olwo." 
Luke22:67 Baamukoba bati: “Oba niiwe Kurisito tukobere.” Aye yaabairamu ati: “Bwe nnaabakobera timwidha kwikiriza 
Luke22:68 ate bwe nnaababuuza timwidha kwiramu. 
Luke22:69 Aye okuva ni mperaano Omwana w'Omuntu aidha kuba ng'atyaime ku mukono omusaadha ogw'amaani ogwa Katonda.” 
Luke22:70 Boonaboona baamukoba bati: “Ekikoba niiwe Omwana wa Katonda?” Yaabakoba ati: “Niimwe abakyogeire.” 
Luke22:71 Agho baakoba bati: “Kabiri tukaayenderaki obudhulizi obundi? Tubyewuliriire beene ng'abyogera.” 
Luke23:1 Agho ni embuga yoonayoona yaasalagho era yaagheereza Yesu ewa Pilato. 
Luke23:2 Baatoolera okumughaghabira bati: “Ono twamwagaana ng'akiidhamya abantu b'eighanga lyaife ng'abakoba obutaghanga Kaisari musolo, era nga yeeyeta Kurisito, ekitegeeza kiti Kyabazinga.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe kyabazinga wa Bayudaaya?” Yaamwiramu ati: “Oyogeire.” 
Luke23:4 Pilato yaakoba Bakabona Abakulu n'eikuukuubira ery'abantu ati: “Nze tibona musango ku muntu ono.” 
Luke23:5 Aye beekalangula bati: “Endhegeresa ye yasiikuula ebidhuubo eby'abantu mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, okuviira irala mu Galilaaya okutuusa bw'atuuse ni ghano.”" 
Luke23:6 Pilato bwe yawulira ebyo, yaabuuza oba ng'omuntu oyo Mugalilaaya." 
Luke23:7 Bwe yakitegeera ng'ava mu kiketezo ekifugibwa Herode yaamugheereza ye Herode, kuba yeena yali ali mu Yerusalemu mu biseera ebyo." 
Luke23:8 Herode bwe yabona Yesu yaasangaala inho kuba yali yamuwuliraku, era nga yayenda ira okumubonaku era ni ghano yali asuubira nga anaamubona ng'akola ekyewuunhio." 
Luke23:9 Kale yaamubuuza ebibuuzo kamaala inho aye yaaloba kwiramu. 
Luke23:10 Bakabona Abakulu n'Abanamateeka baayemerera beekalangula n'amaani okughaghabira Yesu. 
Luke23:11 Era Herode n'abaisirukale be, baamukola ebikolwa eby'obudhoozi baamusekerera, agho baamuvaaza ekivaalo eky'ekitiisa memale yaamwiriza Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Era ku lunaku olwo Herode ni Pilato buli muntu yafuuka mukagwa wa mwine, kuba einhuma ere buli muntu yali muzigu wa mwine." 
Luke23:13 Agho Pilato yaayeta ghalala Bakabona Abakulu, abafuzi, n'abantu." 
Luke23:14 Yaabakoba ati: “Mundeeteire omuntu ono nga mukoba muti akiidhamya abantu era bwe mmuwozeisa mu maiso gaimwe, mwena muboine nga ghazira musango gumusinze mu egyo gye mumughaghabiire." 
Luke23:15 Ni bw'aba Herode yeena ghazira musango gwamwagaineku, kuba era wuuyo amutwiriiza. Bwenebwene ghazira kye yakola kimugwaniza kufa." 
Luke23:16 Kale ndidha kumukangaivula memale mmulekule.” [ 
Luke23:17 Ku buli lunaku lukulu yali n'okubalekulirayo omusibe mulala.] 
Luke23:18 Boonaboona baaleekaanira ghalala bati: “Oyo mutoolegho, tusibulire Barabba.”" 
Luke23:19 Barabba n'omusaadha ye baasiba olw'akadhagalalo akaaligho mu kibuga n'olw'okwita omuntu. 
Luke23:20 Pilato yairamu okwogera nabo ng'ali kwenda okulekula Yesu," 
Luke23:21 aye baaleekaana bati: “Mukomerere! Mukomerere!” 
Luke23:22 Omukuzi ogwokusatu yaabakoba ati: “Kibi ki kye yakola? Nze tiboine musango gumugwaniza kufa ndidha kumukangaivula memale mmulekule.” 
Luke23:23 Aye beekalangula n'amamiro amakaalaamu abakolere kye baali bali kumukoba, bati Yesu akomererwe. Era baaghangula." 
Luke23:24 Kale Pilato yaasalagho ati kye basabye kibakolerwe. 
Luke23:25 Yaasibula eyasibwa olw'akadhagalalo n'olw'okwita omuntu, ye baasaba, aye yaaghaayo Yesu okumukola nga bwe benda." 
Luke23:26 Abaisirukale bwe baali batwala Yesu baagema omusaadha ayetebwa Simoni Omukurenayo eyali ava mu kyalo ng'aja mu kibuga, baamusituza omusalaba yaatambula nagwo ng'anonereza Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyaja nga limunonereza omwali n'abakazi abaajanga nga balira bwe bagegenga. 
Luke23:28 Yesu yaakyuka yaabakoba ati: “Bakazi imwe ab'e Yerusalemu mutalira nze, aye mwerire beene n'abaana baimwe" 
Luke23:29 kuba mumanhe kino. Enaku dhiri kwidha abantu mwe balikobera bati: beesiimye abagumba, n'enda edhitazaalangaku, n'amabeere agataayonsaaku!" 
Luke23:30 Agho balitoolera okukoba ensozi bati, ‘Mutugweku’ n'okukoba obusozi bati, ‘mutusandikire!’" 
Luke23:31 Kuba, oba nga bakola bino ku muti omubisi, kiriba kitya ku mukalu?”" 
Luke23:32 Ghaaligho abantu babiri abaiza emisango be baatwalira aghalala naye okwitibwa. 
Luke23:33 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo ekyetebwa eky'Ekighanga baamukomerera agho n'abaizi ab'emisango bale, owundi ku luuyi lw'omukono gwe omusaadha ate owundi ku luuyi olw'omugooda." 
Luke23:34 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Lata basonighe kuba tibaidhi kye bali kukola.” Baagabana ebivaalo bye nga bakuba akalulu. 
Luke23:35 Abantu baayemerera agho beerolera, ate abafuzi baamusekerera bati: “Yalokolanga abandi, yeerokole mwene, oba nga ni Kurisito wa Katonda omulonde!”" 
Luke23:36 Abaisirukale boona baatuuka baamudherega baamugha omwenge ogw'emizabbibu endoota. 
Luke23:37 Baakoba bati: “Oba nga niiwe kyabazinga ow'Abayudaaya weerokole!” 
Luke23:38 Ghaigulu we baataagho ekighandiiko ekikoba kiti: “ONO NI KYABAZINGA OW'ABAYUDAAYA.” 
Luke23:39 Owundi ku baizi ab'emisango ye baali bakomereire agho yaamuvuma ati: “Ti niiwe Kurisito? Weerokole twena otulokole!” 
Luke23:40 Aye mwine yaamukaabukira ati: “Obwo iwe totya Katonda? Olw'okuba tuli ku kibonerezo n'ekirala! 
Luke23:41 Ife tuli kusasulwa olw'ebyo bye twakola, aye mwene azira kibi kye yaali akoze.”" 
Luke23:42 Yaakoba Yesu ati: “Ondidhukiranga ng'otuuse mu Bwakyabazinga bwo.” 
Luke23:43 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka nkukobere: Olwa leero oidha kuba ninze mu kifo eky'okwesiima.” 
Luke23:44 Olwo agho dhaali esaawa nga mukaaga, ensi yairugala be zigizigi okutuusa esaawa mwenda," 
Luke23:45 endhuba ng'erekeire okwaka. Olusuubo olw'omu isinzizo lwakanukamu ghabiri. 
Luke23:46 Yesu yaaleekaana ati: “Lata, nta omwoyo gwange mu ngalo dho!” Bwe yamala okwogera atyo yaisa omuuka ogusembayo." 
Luke23:47 Omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale bwe yabona ebibairegho, yaasaaka Katonda era yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene omuntu ono tabaire na musango!”" 
Luke23:48 Era n'ebiyindi eby'abantu abaidha okwerolera bwe baabona ebibairegho bairayo eka nga beewumbye. 
Luke23:49 Boonaboona be yali aidhigaine nabo nga n'omuli n'abakazi abaatambula naye okuva e Galilaaya, baayemerera ghalaku baalingirira ebintu bino." 
Luke23:50 Mperaano ghaaligho omusaadha ng'ayetebwa Yosefu ow'omu kibuga Arimathea eky'e Buyudaaya. Ono yali atyama ku lwekobaano olw'embuga nga musaadha mulungi era ng'akola bituufu. 
Luke23:51 Ono yali ng'anuyirira Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda era tiyaisania ni baine mu ntegeka yaibwe yoonayoona. 
Luke23:52 Yosefu ono yaja ye Pilato yaasaba omulambo gwa Yesu. 
Luke23:53 Yaagughanulayo, yaaguzinga mu lugoye olweru yaaguta mu magombe agaabaadhibwa mu lubaale era agaali tigateebwangamuuku mufu yeenayeena." 
Luke23:54 Luno lwali lunaku lwa kwetegeka nga Sabbato eri kwinhama. 
Luke23:55 Abakazi abaidha ni Yesu okuva e Galilaaya, baanonereza, baabona amagombe n'ensambo omulambo gwe ye gwateebwamu" 
Luke23:56 baira baategeka obuwoowo n'omuzigo. Ku lwa Sabbato baawuumula, ng'ebiragiro bwe bikoba." 
Luke24:1 Ku lusooka mu Sabbato, baawuuna be pwi pwi pwi, baaja ku magombe n'obuwoowo bwe baategeka ku lule." 
Luke24:2 Baayagaana ng'eibaale ligalangwirwa okuva ku magombe," 
Luke24:3 aye bwe bangira baaloba kwagaanamu mulambo gwa Musengwa Yesu. 
Luke24:4 Baali bakaali agho, nga basobeirwa, baabona abasaadha babiri abavaire ebimesunkana nga beemereire agho." 
Luke24:5 Baatya inho baakoteka emitwe, abasaadha baabakoba bati: “Lwaki muli kwagalira omulamu mu bafu?" 
Luke24:6 Tali ghano, azuukiire. Mwidhukire bwe yabakoba ng'akaali e Galilaaya," 
Luke24:7 bwe yakoba ati, ‘Omwana w'Omuntu ali n'okugheebwayo mu mikono gy'ababi, akomererwe era olunaku olwokusatu azuukire.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Era baidhukira ebibono bye ebyo. 
Luke24:9 Baava ku magombe baira, baakoberaku eikumi n'omulala n'abandi boonaboona ebintu ebyo byonabyona." 
Luke24:10 Abakazi abaakobera Abatume ebintu bino baali Maria Magadalene, Yoanna, ni Maria inhinha owa Yakobo n'abandi be baali nabo." 
Luke24:11 Aye ebibono ebyo byabawulikanira ng'oti bya kudhondha era baaloba kubiikiriza. 
Luke24:12 Petero yaasituka, yaalumuka okuja ku magombe era bwe yatuuka yaakutama, yaalengeza mu magombe, yaabona bwa ngoye dhe baamuziikamu dhonka, yairayo eka nga yeewuunhia mu mwoyo gwe ebyo ebyaligho." 
Luke24:13 Ku lunaku lwene olwo ghaabaagho ku Beegeresebwa babiri abaali batambula nga baja mu kyalo ekyetebwa Emmao. Okuva e Yerusalemu okutuuka Emmao ghaligho kilomita ikumi na ndala. 
Luke24:14 Baajanga nga baghaya ku bintu bino ebyali byakamala okubaagho. 
Luke24:15 Baali bakaaghaya bwe beebuuzagania, Yesu mwene yaabatuukaku yaatoolera okutambula nabo" 
Luke24:16 aye amaiso gaibwe gaaliku ekintu baaloba kumutegeera. 
Luke24:17 Yaababuuza ati: “Bibono ki ebyo bye muli kwogeraku nga mutambula?” Baayemerera nga badhuunie. 
Luke24:18 Owundi ye baayetanga Kileopa yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe wenka omugeni mu Yerusalemu ataidhi bintu bikibairemu mu nnaku dhino?” 
Luke24:19 Yaakoba ati: “Bintu ki?” Baakoba bati: “Ebigema ku Yesu ow'e Nazarethi eyali omulanzi ow'amaani mu bikolwa ni mu bibono mu maiso ga Katonda n'abantu boonaboona 
Luke24:20 era nga Bakabona Abakulu n'abafuzi bwe baamughaayo okusalirwa ogw'okufa era n'akomererwa? 
Luke24:21 Ate ife ni twali tumwesunga tuti n'ow'okununula Isiraeli, aye wuuno luno lwakusatu kasookanga bino bibaagho." 
Luke24:22 Ebyo nga bikaali agho ghaligho abakazi mu kikunsu kyaife abatuwugulaiza bwe bajiire ku magombe ku nkyo. 
Luke24:23 Tibaagaineeyo mulambo gwe, baira era baatukobera bati bamalaika bababonekeire baabakoba bati mulamu." 
Luke24:24 Era abandi ku ife boona bajiire ku magombe era baayagaana nga biri bwenebwene ng'abakazi bwe bakobye, aye Yesu tibamuboine.”" 
Luke24:25 Agho yaabakoba ati: “Ye bano abasirusiru, ab'emyoyo egirwa okwikiriza abalanzi bye boogera!" 
Luke24:26 Tikyali nti bino byali biri n'okutuuka ku Kurisito memale atuuke mu kitiisa kye?” 
Luke24:27 Agho yaatoolera okubainhonhola Ebyaghandiikibwa, ebyo byonabyona ebimugemaku, eby'abalanzi boonaboona okuviira irala ku Musa." 
Luke24:28 Bwe baatuuka okumpi n'ekyalo mwe baali baja yaaboneka oti yeeyongerayo 
Luke24:29 aye baamughaliriza asigale agho nabo nga bamukoba bati: “Eigulo lituuse, obwire buzibye.” Kale yaaja nabo nga wa kusula." 
Luke24:30 Olwatyama ku kiiwulo yaatoola omugaati, yaagugha enkabi yeeyanza, yaagumegulamegulamu, yaabagha." 
Luke24:31 Olwo baazibuka amaiso baamutegeera, aye yaababuliraku agho." 
Luke24:32 Agho baakoba bati: “Titusuuyirirenga mule bw'abaire ng'ayogera n'ife mu ngira! Ng'atwinhonhola amakulu ag'Ebyaghandiikibwa?” 
Luke24:32 Agho baakoba bati: “Titusuuyirirenga mule bw'abaire ng'ayogera n'ife mu ngira! Ng'atwinhonhola amakulu ag'Ebyaghandiikibwa?” 
Luke24:33 Saawa eyo yeene baasituka bairayo e Yerusalemu baayagaana eikumi n'omulala, n'abandi bwe baabitanga, nga beesoloiza ghalala," 
Luke24:34 baabakobera bati: “Bwenebwene Musengwa azuukiire, era abonekeire Simoni.”" 
Luke24:35 Boona baabaghayiraku nga bwe byali mu ngira ni bwe baamutegeerera ku kumegulamegula mu mugaati. 
Luke24:36 Baali bakaabaghayiraku, Yesu mwene yaabeemereramu ghagati yaabakoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'imwe.”" 
Luke24:37 Baatya baadhugumira nga badhuubiriza bati bali kubona muzimu. 
Luke24:38 Yaabakoba ati: “Kiki ekibatabwire, lwaki muba n'ebidhuubo bityo mu myoyo gyaimwe?" 
Luke24:39 Mulinge ku ngalo dhange, n'ebigere byange, ninze mwenemwene mungemeku mubone kuba omuzimu tiguba na mubiri waire magumba nga bwe mubona bwendi nabyo.”" 
Luke24:40 Bwe yamala okukoba atyo, yaabalaga engalo dhe n'ebigere bye." 
Luke24:41 Aye bwe baali nga bakaali kwikiriza olw'eisanhu n'okwewuunhia, yaabakoba ati: “Muligho ghano n'ekintu kyonakyona ekiriibwa?”" 
Luke24:42 Baamugha ekimega eky'ekyenhandha ekitalike," 
Luke24:43 yaakitoola yaakirya nga babona. 
Luke24:44 Olumaliira yaabakoba ati: “Bino n'ebibono byange bye nabakoberanga nga nkaali n'imwe, nti buli kintu kyonakyona ekyampandiikibwaku mu Mateeka ga Musa n'abalanzi, ni mu Zabbuli kiri n'okutuukirizibwa.”" 
Luke24:45 Agho yaigula emyoyo gyaibwe okutegeera Ebyaghandiikibwa," 
Luke24:46 yaabakoba ati: “Kiti bwe kyaghandiikibwa nti Kurisito ali n'okudaagadaaga era ku lunaku olwokusatu azuukire okuva mu bafu," 
Luke24:47 era nti okwenenia n'okusoniyibwa ebibi, biri n'okukoberwa amaghanga goonagoona mu liina lye, okuviira irala ni mu Yerusalemu." 
Luke24:48 Niimwe abadhulizi ab'ebintu ebyo. 
Luke24:49 Era nze mwene ndidha kubagheereza oyo Lata wange ye yabasuubiza aye musigale mu kibuga okutuusa nga muvaaziibwa amaani okuva mu igulu.” 
Luke24:50 Yesu yaabakulemberamu baafuluma, baatambula okuja e Bethania. Agho yaagolola amakono ge yaabagha omukisa." 
Luke24:51 Era bwe yali abagha omukisa yaabavaaku yaatwalibwa mu igulu. 
Luke24:52 Baamusinza, baira mu Yerusalemu n'eisanhu lingi inho," 
Luke24:53 era baabanga mu isinzizo ebiseera byonabyona nga basaaka Katonda. 
John1:1 Mu kwinhama kwa byonabyona Kibono yali ng'aligho era Kibono ng'aba ghalala ni Katonda era Kibono nga ni Katonda. 
John1:2 Okuviira irala ku ntoolo Kibono yali ng'aba ghalala ni Katonda. 
John1:3 Ebintu byonabyona byatondebwa nga bibita mu oyo era ghazira kintu kyonakyona ekyatondebwa aghazira oyo. 
John1:4 Mu oyo nga n'omuli obulamu era obulamu obwo bwaba ekimuliikirira eky'abantu. 
John1:5 Ekimuliikirira ekyo kimulika mu nzikiiza, era enzikiiza tekisobola.]" 
John1:6 Ghaaligho omuntu Katonda ye yatuma, ng'ayetebwa Yoanne." 
John1:7 Oyo yaidha okukakasa ati ole n'ekimuliikirira, abantu boonaboona baghange okwikiriza." 
John1:8 Yoanne oyo ti n'eyali ekimuliikirira ekyo, aye yaidha okukakasa ebigema ku kimuliikirira. [" 
John1:9 Nga kino n'ekimuliikirira kyenekyene, ekyali nga kiri kwidha mu nsi okumuliikirira abantu boonaboona." 
John1:10 Kibono yali mu nsi. Era ensi yabita mu oyo okukolebwa, aye ensi tiyamumanha." 
John1:11 Yaidha mu babe, aye abantu be beene baaloba okumusangaalira." 
John1:12 Aye abo abaamusangaalira era abaamwikiriza yabagha obukumu okufuuka abaana ba Katonda. 
John1:13 Baafuuka abaana ba Katonda mu nsambo etali yabuliidho abantu ye bazaalibwamu ey'omubiri. Katonda mwene n'eyabafuula abaana be. 
John1:14 Kibono yaafuuka omuntu yaaba mu ife ng'aidhwire ekisa n'amazima. Twabona ekitiisa kye, ekitiisa ng'eky'Omwana wa Lata omulala bedengedenge." 
John1:15 Ono Yoanne y'ayogeraku, bw'alanga ati: “Ono ni ye nabakoberangaku bwe nabakoba nti, ‘Anandhiririra ansingira irala obuyinza kuba yabaagho nga nze nkaali na kuzaalibwa.’”]" 
John1:16 Olw'ekisa kye ekitawa, twenatwena atugha emikisa gye emikuzi kamaala." 
John1:17 Kuba, nga Katonda bwe yateeka Amateeka ng'abita mu Musa, ekisa n'amazima abibisa mu Yesu Kurisito." 
John1:18 Ghazira eyaali aboine ku Katonda. Aye Omwana we omulala bedengedenge aba aghalala n'Ise, n'amwoleka abantu ni bamumanha." 
John1:19 Yoanne ati bwe yakakasa Abayudaaya, bwe baatuma Bakabona n'Abalevi okuva e Yerusalemu okumubuuza bati: “Niiwe ani?”" 
John1:20 Yoanne tiyakibagisa, aye yakyogera nga talumamu ati: “Ti ninze Kurisito.”" 
John1:21 Baamubuuza bati: “Memale oli ani? Niiwe Eliya?” Yairamu ati: “Busa, ti ninze.” Baayongera okumubuuza bati: “Niiwe Omulanzi ole?” Yairamu ati: “Busa.”" 
John1:22 Agho baamukoba bati: “Niini tukobere, niiwe ani? Kuba abatutumye tunaabakoba tutya? Weeyogeraku ki?”" 
John1:23 Yaakozesa ebibono bya Isaia Omulanzi, yaakoba ati: “Ninze eiroboozi ly'oyo alangiriza mu irungu ati, ‘Mutereeze engira ya Musengwa.’ ”" 
John1:24 Abakwenda bano, baali Bafarisaayo." 
John1:25 Agho ni baamukoba bati: “Oba nga ti niiwe Kurisito, oba Eliya, oba Omulanzi ole, memale lwaki obatiza?”" 
John1:26 Yoanne yaabairamu ati: “Nze mbabatiza n'amaadhi aye mu imwe mulimu oyo ye mutaidhi," 
John1:27 anandhiririra era tisaanira naire okusibulula obukoba obw'engaito dhe.” 
John1:28 Bino byali Bethania, ng'osomoike omwiga Yorudani, Yoanne ye yali abatiriza." 
John1:29 Ku lunaku olwairirira, Yoanne yaabona Yesu ng'aidha y'ali yaakoba ati: “Mubone Entaama Ento eya Katonda etoolagho ebibi eby'ensi!" 
John1:30 Ono ni ye nabakoberanga, bwe nakoba nti, ‘Ghaligho omuntu ali kwidha oluvainhuma lwange ansingira aghala obukologho, kuba yabaagho ira nga nze nkaali kubaagho.’" 
John1:31 Zeena nali timwidhi aye ekyandeeta n'okubatizanga n'amaadhi memale ayolekebwe eri Isiraeli.” 
John1:32 Agho Yoanne yaakakasa ati: “Nabona Mwoyo ng'amwikaku ng'oti njiibwa okuva mu igulu era yaamusigalaku. 
John1:33 Era nali tiidhi nti n'oyo, aye oyo eyantuma okubatiza n'amaadhi yankoba ati, ‘Y'onaabona nga Mwoyo amwikaku era ng'amusigalaku, anaaba nga n'oyo abatiza ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu.’" 
John1:34 Ebyo nabibona era nkakasa nti oyo n'Omwana wa Katonda.” 
John1:35 Ku lunaku olwairirira Yoanne yali ayemereire agho n'abeegeresebwa be babiri, kabiri" 
John1:36 yaabona Yesu ng'atambula. Yaakoba ati: “Mubone Entaama Ento eya Katonda!” 
John1:37 Abeegeresebwa be abo ababiri baawulira ekyo baanonereza Yesu. 
John1:38 Yesu yaakyuka yaababona nga bali kumunonereza yaababuuza ati: “Muli kwagala ki?” Baamwiramu bati: “Rabbi”, amakulu gaakyo nti Mwegeresa, “otenduka gha?”" 
John1:39 Yaabakoba ati: “Mwidhe mubone.” Agho dhaali saawa ikumi edh'omusana, kale baaja baabona gh'atenduka era baaba agho naye olunaku olwo." 
John1:40 Owundi ku babiri abo abaawulira nga Yoanne ayogera, era ni banonereza Yesu, yali nga ni Anderea muganda wa Simoni Petero." 
John1:41 Ono yasooka kubona muganda we Simoni era yaamukoba ati: “Tuboine Messia,” amakulu gaakyo nti Kurisito." 
John1:42 Yaatwala Simoni eri Yesu. Yesu bwe yamubona yaamukoba ati: “Niiwe Simoni mutabane wa Yoanne? Oidha kwetebwanga Kefasi,” amakulu gaakyo nti Petero n'olubaale." 
John1:43 Ku lunaku olwairirira Yesu yaasalagho okuja e Galilaaya. Yaayagaana Filipo yaamukoba ati: “Nnonereza.” 
John1:44 Filipo yali ava mu Bethisaida, ekibuga Anderea ni Petero mwe baali baba." 
John1:45 Filipo yaayagaana Nathanaeli yaamukoba ati: “Tuboine oyo Musa ye yaghandiikaku mu kitabo ky'Amateeka, era n'abalanzi ye baaghandiikaku, Yesu ow'e Nazarethi, mutabane wa Yosefu.”" 
John1:46 Nathanaeli yaamukoba ati: “Ghaligho ekirungi ekighanga okuva e Nazarethi?” Filipo yaamukoba ati: “Idha obone.” 
John1:47 Yesu bwe yabona Nathanaeli ng'ali kwidha y'ali, yaamwogeraku ati: “Mubone Omuisiraeli keenekeene aziramu kwesubaayiriza kwonakwona.”" 
John1:48 Nathanaeli yaamubuuza ati: “Waamanhira gha?” Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Nkuboine ng'oli mu muti omutiini memale Filipo akwete.” 
John1:49 Nathanaeli yairamu ati: “Mwegeresa, niiwe Omwana wa Katonda! Niiwe Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli!”" 
John1:50 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Olw'okuba nkukobeire nti nkuboine mu muti omutiini n'okwikiriza? Oidha kubona n'ebisinga kino.” 
John1:51 Era yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, mulibona eigulu nga libwikwike era nga bamalaika ba Katonda abandi baniina, era ng'abandi baika ku Mwana w'Omuntu.”" 
John2:1 Ku lunaku olwokusatu yaabaayo embaga ey'abagole mu kibuga Kana eky'e Galilaaya. Inhina Yesu yaliyo. 
John2:2 Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be boona baayetebwa era baaliyo. 
John2:3 Omwenge ogw'emizabbibu bwe gwawaagho inhina Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Omwenge gw'emizabbibu gubawoireku.” 
John2:4 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Mukazi iwe, ombeereire ki? Ekiseera kyange kikaali kutuuka.”" 
John2:5 Aye inhina yaakoba abagheereza ati: “Ky'abakoba kyonakyona kye mube mukole.” 
John2:6 Mperaano agho ghaaligho ensugha edh'amaadhi mukaaga edhaakolebwa mu mabaale ng'Abayudaaya dhe bakozesa mu mpisa yaibwe ey'okwetukuza. Era buli ndala nga ejaamu lita nga kikumi. 
John2:7 Yesu yaakoba abagheereza ati: “Mwidhuze ensugha edho amaadhi.” Baadhiidhuza ni ku migo. 
John2:8 Yaakoba ati: “Mperaano museneku mutwalire omugabuzi omukulu.” Baasena baatwala. 
John2:9 Omugabuzi omukulu bwe yakomba ku maadhi nga gafuuse omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, tiyamanha ye guviire, aye abagheereza abaasena amaadhi baamanha. Agho yaayeta omugole omusaadha" 
John2:10 yaamukoba ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena asooka kugabula omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'endiko, abantu bwe bamala okunhwa ni baghezaamu memale yaabagha dhuule. Aye kabiri iwe omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'endiko gw'otereike okutuusa ni ye buli eno!”" 
John2:11 Yesu yakolera ekyewuunhio kino ekisooka e Kana mu Galilaaya. Atyo yaayoleka ekitiisa kye era Abeegeresebwa be baamwikiriza. 
John2:12 Olumaliira lw'ekyo yaaja e Kaperinaumu n'inhina, ni baganda be n'Abeegeresebwa be, baaba eyo enaku ntono." 
John2:13 Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa eky'Abayudaaya nga kiri kumpi okutuuka, Yesu yaaniinaniina e Yerusalemu." 
John2:14 Bwe yatuuka mu isinzizo yaayagaanamu abali kutunda ente, entaama n'enjiibwa, n'abafaana empiiya nga batyaime agho bali ku gwaibwe." 
John2:15 Yaatoola obugugha yaabukolamu akaswanhu, yaababingamu boonaboona n'entaama n'ente, era yaafundika emeeza edh'abaali bafaana empiiya, n'empiiya dhaibwe yaadhisansa." 
John2:16 Yaalagira abaali bali kutunda enjiibwa ati: “Bino mubitoole ghano. Era mulekere okufuula endhu ya Lata wange ekiya!” 
John2:17 Agho Abeegeresebwa be baidhukira ebyaghandiikibwa ebikoba biti: “Omwoyo gw'endhu yo guliimalagho.” 
John2:18 Agho Abayudaaya baamukoba bati: “Kamanhiso ki k'osobola okukola okutumanhisa ng'oli n'obukumu obukola bino?” 
John2:19 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mumenhegho eisinzizo lino ndidha kulizimba mu nnaku isatu.” 
John2:20 Abayudaaya baamukoba bati: “Kyatwala emyaka amakumi ana na mukaaga (46) okuzimba eisinzizo lino! Waakoba oti oghanga okuliizaagho mu nnaku eisatu?” 
John2:21 Aye eisinzizo Yesu lye yali ayogeraku n'omubiri gwe. 
John2:22 Kale bwe yazuukira mu bafu Abeegeresebwa be baidhukira nga yayogera kino, era baikiriza Ebyaghandiikibwa, ni Yesu bye yakoba." 
John2:23 Yesu bwe yali mu Yerusalemu, mu nnaku edh'Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa abantu kamaala baamwikiriza bwe baabona ebyewuunhio bye yakolanga." 
John2:24 Aye Yesu nga tabeeyalizaamu, kuba boonaboona yali abaidhi." 
John2:25 Kyali tikyetaagisa kubaagho amukobera ebifa ku muntu, kuba yali ng'aidhi ebiri mu myoyo egy'abantu." 
John3:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha eyali omukulu mu Bayudaaya ng'ayetebwa Nikodemo era nga wa mu kikunsu ky'Abafarisaayo. 
John3:2 Lwali lulala ono yaaja ye Yesu obwire yaamukoba ati: “Mwegeresa, twidhi tuti oli mwegeresa ava ewa Katonda, kuba ghazira aghanga kukola byewuunhio bino by'okola okutoolaku nga Katonda ali naye.”" 
John3:3 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Ka nkukobere bwenebwene, ezira aghanga kubona Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda okutoolaku ng'azaaliibwa omukuzi ogwokubiri.”" 
John3:4 Nikodemo yaamubuuza ati: “Omuntu aghanga atya okuzaalibwa omukuzi ogwokubiri bw'aba nga mukulu? Asobola okungira mu nda ya inhina omukuzi ogwokubiri yaazaalibwa?” 
John3:5 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Bwenebwene ka nkukobere, okutoolaku ng'omuntu azaaliibwa amaadhi ni Mwoyo, taghanga kwingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
John3:6 Omubiri guzaalibwa mubiri, ate omwoyo gwazaalibwa Mwoyo." 
John3:7 Oteewuunhia kye nkukobye nti muli n'okuzaalibwa omukuzi ogwokubiri. 
John3:8 Empewo efuuwa yaalaga y'eyenda, waawulira empiriito aye nga toidhi y'eva oba y'eja. Kityo bwekiri ku buli muntu azaalibwa Mwoyo.”" 
John3:9 Nikodemo yaamukoba ati: “Ebyo bighanga bitya okubaagho?” 
John3:10 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Waaba mwegeresa mukulu mu Isiraeli waaloba kumanha ekyo? 
John3:11 Bwenebwene ka nkukobere, ife twogera kye twidhi era tukakasa kye twabona, aye imwe muloba okwikiriza obudhulizi bwaife." 
John3:12 Bwe mbakobera eby'oku nsi timwikiriza, memale bwe nnaabakobera eby'omu igulu lwe munaikiriza?" 
John3:13 Ghazira yaali aniinieku mu igulu okutoolaku Omwana w'Omuntu eyaika okuva mu igulu.” 
John3:14 Kale nga Musa bwe yaghanika omusota mu irungu, mu nsambo n'endala n'Omwana w'Omuntu bw'ali n'okughanikibwa" 
John3:15 kiisi amwikiriza asobole okuba n'obulamu obutawaagho. 
John3:16 Atyo Katonda bwe yagonza abantu ab'oku nsi, yaaghaayo Omwana we omulala bedengedenge kiisi amwikiriza alobe kuzikirira aye afune obulamu obutawaagho." 
John3:17 Katonda tiyatuma Mwana we mu nsi kusalira bantu musango, aye abantu babite mu oyo okulokolwa." 
John3:18 Oyo amwikiriza tigulimusinga aye oyo atamwikiriza gwamala ira okumusinga, kuba taikiriza Mwana wa Katonda omulala bedengedenge." 
John3:19 Guno n'omusango: Ekimuliikirira kyaidha mu nsi, aye abantu baagonza enzikiiza mu kifo ky'okugonza ekimuliikirira olw'okuba ebikolwa byaibwe bibi." 
John3:20 Buli akola ebibi akyagha ekimuliikirira, era taidha ya kimuliikirira olw'okutya ati ebikolwa bye bighanga okumanhibwa." 
John3:21 Aye akola ekituufu aidha y'ekimuliikirira okwoleka ati mu by'akola agondera Katonda by'amukoba. 
John3:22 Ebyo olwawa, Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be baaja mu kiketezo eky'e Buyudaaya, yaaba eyo nabo okumala entangama ng'abatiza." 
John3:23 Yoanne yeena yali abatiriza mu Aenoni okumpi ni Salimu, kuba yaliyo amaadhi kyodo era ng'abantu baidha baabatizibwa." 
John3:24 Agho Yoanne baali bakaali kumuta mu ikomera. 
John3:25 Abeegeresebwa ba Yoanne abandi baatoolera okutakana n'Omuyudaaya ku mpisa ey'okutukuzibwa. 
John3:26 Baidha baakoba Yoanne bati: “Omwegeresa, ole ye wayogeraku, ye mwali naye eruuyi ere ng'osomoike Yorudani, yeena ali eyo abatiza era abantu boonaboona bali kuja y'ali!”" 
John3:27 Yoanne yaabairamu ati: “Ezira afuna kitone kyonakyona nga tikiviire mu igulu. 
John3:28 Imwe beene mundhulira nga nakoba nti, ‘Ti ninze Kurisito, aye natumibwa kumukulembereramu.’" 
John3:29 Omugole aba w'oyo amubayiiza. Mukagwa w'oyo abayiiza bw'ayemerera n'awulira eiroboozi ly'oyo abayiiza asangaala. Kale ni eisanhu lyange lituukiriire. 
John3:30 Oyo ali n'okweyongera okuja ghaigulu nze ndhike ghansi.” 
John3:31 Oyo ava ghaigulu n'asinga abantu boonaboona. Oyo ava ku nsi aba wa ku nsi era ayogera ku bya nsi, aye ava mu igulu, n'asinga boonaboona." 
John3:32 Akakasa ebyo bye yabona era bye yawulira, aye ghazira aikiriza by'akoba." 
John3:33 Oyo aikiriza by'akoba akakasa nga Katonda wa mazima. 
John3:34 Oyo Katonda ye yatuma ayogera ebibono bya Katonda, kuba Katonda tagaba Mwoyo we mu bipimo." 
John3:35 Lata w'Omwana amugonza era yata ebintu byonabyona mu buyinza bwe. 
John3:36 Oyo aikiriza Mwana ali n'obulamu obutawaagho aye aloba okwikiriza Mwana taja kufuna bulamu, era aja kusigala ng'abonerezebwa Katonda." 
John4:1 Abafarisaayo baawulira bati Yesu yali ali kufuna era yaabatiza abeegeresebwa kamaala. 
John4:2 (Yesu mwene ti n'eyabatizanga aye Abeegeresebwa be n'abaabatizanga). 
John4:3 Bwe yakimanha yaava mu Buyudaaya yairayo e Galilaaya. 
John4:4 Yali ng'ali n'okubita mu Samaria. 
John4:5 Yaatuuka mu Samaria mu kibuga ekyetebwa Sikaru nga kiri kumpi n'ekibandha Yakobo kye yagha mutabane we Yosefu. 
John4:6 Agho n'aghaali ensulo eyali emanhiibwa nga ensulo ya Yakobo. Kale Yesu eyali akooye n'olugendo yaatyama agho ku nsulo. Esaawa dhaali nga mukaaga. 
John4:7 Omukazi Omusamaria yaidha okusena amaadhi, Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mpa ku maadhi nhweku.”" 
John4:8 Abeegeresebwa be baali bajiire mu kibuga kugula mere. 
John4:9 Omukazi Omusamaria yaamukoba ati: “Iwe Omuyudaaya oghanga otya okusaba nze Omusamaria amaadhi okunhwa?” Kuba Abayudaaya tibaabanga na nkolagana yoonayoona n'Abasamaria. 
John4:10 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Nguli oidhi ekirabo Katonda ky'agha, n'omanha n'oyo ali kukusaba amaadhi okunhwa, wandimusabye yaakugha amaadhi agagha obulamu.”" 
John4:11 Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, memale iwe ozira mpendo ate n'ensulo ndeeyi, amaadhi agagha obulamu waaligafunie gha?" 
John4:12 Niiwe osinga dhaadha waife Yakobo eyatugha ensulo eno, ate era mwene ye yanhwangamu n'abaana be, n'ebyayo bye?”" 
John4:13 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Kiisi anhwa ku maadhi gano endiwo eiramu yaamugema," 
John4:14 aye kiisi anhwa ku maadhi ge mmugha, taliirayo kuba ndiwo. Amaadhi ago ge ndimugha, mu oyo galifuuka ensulo ey'amaadhi agagha obulamu era gaamugha obulamu obutawaagho.”" 
John4:15 Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa mpa ku maadhi ago ndobe kubanga ndiwo na kwidhanga kusena gano.” 
John4:16 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ja oyete balo oidhe naye.” 
John4:17 Omukazi yairamu ati: “Nze nzira baze.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oli mutuufu bw'okoba oti ozira balo 
John4:18 kuba waakabayira abasaadha bataanu era y'oli naye mperaano ti balo. Ky'okobye kituufu.” 
John4:19 Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa ombonekera ng'oti oli mulanzi. 
John4:20 Badhaadha baife baasinzanga Katonda ku lusozi luno aye imwe mukoba muti Yerusalemu n'ekifo ekiteekwa okusinzibwamu.” 
John4:21 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mukazi iwe, amazima gali gati, ekiseera kiidha kutuuka Lata abe nga takaasinzibwa ku lusozi luno waire e Yerusalemu." 
John4:22 Imwe musinza kye mutaidhi aye ife tusinza kye twidhi, kuba obulokozi buva mu Buyudaaya." 
John4:23 Aye ekiseera kiri kwidha era kituuse, abasinza mu nsambo entuufu basinze Lata mu Mwoyo era ni mu mazima, kuba abamusinza mu nsambo ng'oti n'eyo Lata oyo b'asiima." 
John4:24 Katonda Mwoyo, era abamusinza bagwaine okumusinza mu Mwoyo ni mu mazima.”" 
John4:25 Omukazi yaamukoba ati: “Ndidhi nga Messia, ayetebwa Kurisito, aidha kwidha. Era nga bw'aliidha alitukobera ebintu byonabyona.”" 
John4:26 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ninze ali kwogera n'iwe.” 
John4:27 Mangu ago Abeegeresebwa be ghe bairira era beewuunhia inho okumubona ng'ali kwogera n'omukazi. Aye ghazira yabuuza mukazi ati: “Oyenda ki?” Oba eyabuuza Yesu ati: “Lwaki oli kwogera n'omukazi?” 
John4:28 Agho omukazi yaaleka agho ensugha ye, yaaja mu kibuga yaakoba abantu ati:" 
John4:29 “Mwidhe mubone omuntu ankobeire byonabyona bye naali nkoze. Ataba nga ni Kurisito?” 
John4:30 Agho baava mu kibuga baaja ye Yesu. 
John4:31 Mu kiseera n'ekirala ekyo Abeegeresebwa be baali bali kumweghemba bati: “Mwegeresa, lya ku mere!”" 
John4:32 Aye yaabakoba ati: “Ndi n'emere ey'okulya ye mutaidhi.” 
John4:33 Abeegeresebwa be n'okwebuuza bati: “Oba ghaligho amuleeteire emere?” 
John4:34 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Emere yange n'okukola ebyo eyantuma by'ayenda, n'okumala omulimo gwe yampa." 
John4:35 Koodhi timuli na nsambo yaimwe mbu, ‘Ebula myezi ena nga tukungula.’ Aye ka mbakobere: Mulingirire ebiri mu musiri mubone bwe bituuse okukungula." 
John4:36 Akungula, asasulwa, era yaasoloza ebibala by'obulamu obutawaagho. Olwo ni, asimba n'akungula bombi baasagambira ghalala." 
John4:37 Agho ni ensambo eno ntuufu ekoba eti, ‘Owundi asimba owundi yaakungula.’" 
John4:38 Nabatuma okukungula bye mutaalima; bandi n'abaalima imwe mwaganhulwa olw'amaani gaibwe.” 
John4:39 Abasamaria kamaala ab'omu kibuga ekyo baamwikiriza olw'ebyo omukazi bye yabakobera ati: “Ankobeire byonabyona bye naali nkoze.” 
John4:40 Kale Abasamaria bwe baidha y'ali, baamweghemba abe ng'akaaliku nabo, era yaasigala nabo enaku ibiri." 
John4:41 Abantu abandi kamaala baamwikiriza olw'ebibono bye. 
John4:42 Era baakoba omukazi bati: “Twikiriza ti lwa kuba nga watukobera, aye mperaano twewuliriire beene, era mperaano twidhi ng'ono n'Omulokozi ow'ensi mwenemwene.”" 
John4:43 Enaku edho eibiri bwe dhaabita Yesu yaavaayo yaaja e Galilaaya. 
John4:44 Kuba Yesu mwene yali amaze okukakasa ati: “Omulanzi tateebwamu kinhagansi mu nsi ya waibwe.” 
John4:45 Bwe yatuuka e Galilaaya, ab'e Galilaaya baamusangaalira engeri ye baali baboine bye yakolera e Yerusalemu ku Kibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa, kuba boona baaliyo ku kibinuko ekyo." 
John4:46 Agho yaatuuka e Kana mu Galilaaya, ye yafuulira amaadhi omwenge ogw'emizabbibu. Ghaaligho omwami eyali ni mutabane we nga mulwaire inho e Kaperinaumu." 
John4:47 Bwe yawulira nga Yesu aviire mu Buyudaaya yaidha mu Galilaaya, yaaja y'ali, yaamweghemba aikirire e Kaperinaumu, awonie mutabane we eyali ng'ali kumpi na kufa." 
John4:48 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Okutoolaku nga muboine obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio timughanga kwikiriza.” 
John4:49 Omwami yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, ikirira ng'omwana akaali kunfaaku.”" 
John4:50 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ja mutabane wo mulamu.” Omusaadha yaikiriza ebibono Yesu bye yamukoba, yaaja." 
John4:51 Bwe yali aikirira yaayagaanana n'abagheereza be baamukoba bati: “Mutabane wo mulamu.” 
John4:52 Yaababuuza esaawa ye yatandiikiraku okuba obukalamu. Baamukoba bati: “Idho ku saawa musanvu edh'omusana, omusuudha ghe gwamulekeire.”" 
John4:53 Agho Ise yaamanha nga n'esaawa Yesu ye yamukobereraku ati: “Mutabane wo mulamu.” Oyo n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona baikiriza. 
John4:54 Kano n'akaali akamanhiso akokubiri Yesu ke yakola mu Galilaaya ng'amaze okuva mu Buyudaaya. 
John5:1 Ebyo olwawa, ghabaagho ekibinuko eky'Abayudaaya, era Yesu yaaniinaniina e Yerusalemu." 
John5:2 Mperaano, mu Yerusalemu, agho ku Mulyango gw'Entaama, ogwetebwa Bethizatha mu Luheburayi, ghaaligho ekidiba nga kiriku ebigangu bitaanu." 
John5:3 Mu bigangu bino n'omwali olukunkumuli lw'abalwaire aba buli nsambo abatulu, abalema n'abagogomu [nga balindirira amaadhi okwetaabuula." 
John5:4 Kuba ghaalingagho ebiseera malaika mwe yaikiranga mu kidiba n'ataabuula amaadhi, era nga kiisi asooka okwika mu maadhi nga gamaze okutaabuuka, awona kiisi bulwaire bwonabwona bw'aba ng'alwaire.]" 
John5:5 Ghaligho omuntu mulala eyali alwaliire emyaka amakumi asatu na munaana. 
John5:6 Yesu bwe yamubona ng'alambaire, n'amanha ng'abaire mulwaire okumala entangama, kyeyava n'amubuuza ati: “Oyenda okuwonezebwa?”" 
John5:7 Omulwaire yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa, nzira muntu andhisa mu kidiba amaadhi ghe gataabuukira ghe ngerezaaku okwikamu ng'owundi ansookamu.”" 
John5:8 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Situka, otoole endiri yo otambule.”" 
John5:9 Mangu ago omusaadha yaawona yaasitula endiri ye yaatambula. Olunaku olwo lwali lwa Sabbato. 
John5:10 Abayudaaya baakoba omusaadha eyali yaakawonezebwa bati: “Olwaleero lwa Sabbato era amateeka tigakuganha kutambula ng'ositwire endiri yo.” 
John5:11 Aye yaabairamu ati: “Amponiiza n'ankobye okusitula endiri yange ntambule.” 
John5:12 Baamubuuza bati: “Omuntu oyo akukobye ati situla endiri yo otambule, naani?”" 
John5:13 Aye omusaadha eyawonezebwa tiyamanha eyali amuwoniiza, kuba Yesu yali abuze olw'eikuukuubira eryali agho." 
John5:14 Ebyo olwawa Yesu yaayagaana ye yawonia mu isinzizo yaamukoba ati: “Bona eno mperaano oli bukalamu, lekera agho okukola ebibi, kuba oghanga okweyagaana nga ekisinga agho obubi kikutuuseeku.”" 
John5:15 Agho omusaadha yaaja yaakobera Abayudaaya ati ni Yesu eyamuwonia. 
John5:16 Agho ni Abayudaaya baakiriga Yesu, kuba yakola kino ku Sabbato." 
John5:17 Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Lata wange akaakola, era zeena nkola.”" 
John5:18 Ekyo Abayudaaya kyabongeramu okwenda okumwita, kuba tiyakoma ku kya kumenha iteeka lya Sabbato kyonka, aye yataaku n'eky'okweta Katonda lata we; nga mu kino yeefuula okuba ng'ayagayaga ni Katonda." 
John5:19 Agho Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Ka mbakobere, bwenebwene Omwana tasobola kukola kintu kyonakyona ku lulwe akola ebyo byonka by'abona Lata ng'akola. Kiisi Lata ky'akola n'Omwana ky'akola" 
John5:20 kuba Lata agonza Omwana era amulaga byonabyona by'akola. Era aidha kumulaga n'ebisinga n'agho mwasaamirire n'okwasaamirira. 
John5:21 “Nga Lata bw'azuukiza abafu era n'abagha obulamu, mu nsambo n'endala n'Omwana bw'agha obulamu abo b'ayenda okubugha." 
John5:22 Lata tasalira musango muntu yeenayeena. Okusalira omusango omuntu kwonakwona kuli mu buyinza bwa Mwana. 
John5:23 Abantu boonaboona bate mu Mwana ekinhagansi nga bwe bata mu Lata ekinhagansi. Kiisi atata mu Mwana kinhagansi, ni Ise eyamutuma tamutaamu kinhagansi." 
John5:24 “Bwenebwene mbakobera nti: Kiisi awulira kibono kyange n'aikiriza oyo eyantuma, ali n'obulamu obutawaagho era taja kusalirwa musango, aba amaze okusomoka okuva mu kufa okungira mu bulamu." 
John5:25 Bwenebwene mbakobera nti: Ekiseera kiri kwidha era n'okutuuka kyatuuka, abafu mwe bawulirira eiroboozi ery'Omwana wa Katonda, era abo abaliwulira bafuna obulamu." 
John5:26 “Kuba nga Lata mwene bw'ali n'obulamu, mu nsambo n'endala n'Omwana yamugha abe n'obulamu." 
John5:27 Era yaamugha obukumu obw'okusala emisango, kuba n'Omwana w'Omuntu." 
John5:28 Kino kitabaasaamiriza kuba ekiseera kiri kwidha, abali mu magombe boonaboona mwe baliwulirira eiroboozi lye," 
John5:29 era ni bavaamu. Abo abaakolanga obulungi balizuukira okufuna obulamu ate abaakolanga obubi balizuukira baasalirwa omusango okubasinga. 
John5:30 “Tisobola kukola kintu kyonakyona ku bwange; nsala omusango nga bwempulira aghazira kusaliriza, kuba tinuyirira kukola nga bwe nhenda aye nga Lata eyantuma bw'ayenda." 
John5:31 “Bwe neeghaaku obudhulizi mwene, obudhulizi obwo tibuba bwa mazima." 
John5:32 Aye ghaligho owundi andhulira era ndidhi ng'obudhulizi bw'agha ku nze bwa mazima. 
John5:33 Mwatumira Yoanne abakwenda era yaagha obudhulizi ku mazima. 
John5:34 Ti lwa kuba nga neetaaga inho obudhulizi obw'omuntu, ekyo nkikobye musobole okulokolwa." 
John5:35 Yoanne yali ng'oti itaala eryaka ni limulisa, aye okumulisa kwe kwabasangaazaaku kaseera buseera." 
John5:36 “Aye nze ndi n'obudhulizi obusinga n'obwa Yoanne bw'agha kuba ebintu bye nkola, Lata n'eyabimpa okubikola era bindhulira nga Lata n'eyantuma." 
John5:37 Ate era ni Lata mwene eyantuma, oyo yeena andhulira. Imwe timuwulirangaku bw'ayogera, waire okumubona bw'afaanana." 
John5:38 N'ekibono kye tikisigala mu myoyo gyaimwe, kuba timwikiriza ye yatuma." 
John5:39 “Mwagaaza mu Byaghandiikibwa nga mudhuuba muti mu ebyo mwe munaafunira obulamu obutawaagho, ate nga Ebyaghandiikibwa byene ebyo bindhulira," 
John5:40 aye imwe muloba okwidha ye ndi okufuna obulamu. 
John5:41 Nze tinoonia kusaakibwa bantu 
John5:42 aye ndidhi nga muzira kugonza kwa Katonda mu imwe. 
John5:43 Nze naidha mu liina lya Lata wange, aye muloba okunsangaalira owundi bw'aliidha ku bubwe mwene, muja kumusangaalira." 
John5:44 Memale katyo mughanga mutya okwikiriza, imwe abagonza okusaakagana ni mutanoonia kusaakibwa oyo Katonda yenka?" 
John5:45 “Mutadhuuba muti ninze ndibaseegha ye Lata. Aye Musa ye mutaamu eisuubi lyaimwe ni mwenemwene aja okubaseegha; 
John5:46 kuba nguli mwaikiriza Musa zeena mwandindhikiriiza, kuba yaghandiika ku nze." 
John5:47 Oba nga timwikiriza oyo bye yaghandiika, memale musobola mutya okwikiriza nze bye nkoba?”" 
John6:1 Ebyo bwe byawa Yesu yaasomoka enhandha Galilaaya, ey'e Tiberia." 
John6:2 Eikuukuubira ly'abantu lyamunonereza kuba baali bamaze okubona obumanhiso bwe yakola ku balwaire. 
John6:3 Yesu yaaniina ku lusozi yaatyama eyo n'Abeegeresebwa be. 
John6:4 Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa kyali kiseese kumpi. 
John6:5 Yesu yaja okulinga ati ng'abona eikuukuubira ery'abantu nga bali kwidha y'ali. Yaakoba Filipo ati: “Tunaagula gha emigaati abantu bano balye?” 
John6:6 Yakoba atyo kumuleba, kuba mwene yali aidhi kye yali aja okukola." 
John6:7 Filipo yaamwiramu ati: “Emigaati egy'edinari ebikumi ebibiri (200) tigimala kiisi muntu okulyaku akatono.” 
John6:8 Omwegeresebwa wa Yesu owundi ayetebwa Anderea, muganda wa Simoni Petero yaakoba ati:" 
John6:9 “Ghaligho ghano omwisuka ali n'emigaati etaanu egya sayiri n'ebyenhandha bibiri, aye katyo ebyo bikola ki ku bantu kamaala batyo!”" 
John6:10 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Mukobe abantu batyame.” Kale olw'okuba ghaaligho obusubi kamaala obusobola okutyamwaku, abantu boonaboona baatyama; abasaadha baali ng'oti enkumi itaanu (5,000)." 
John6:11 Yesu yaatoola emigaati yeeyanza Katonda, yaagabira abantu abaali batyaime ku busubi. Mu nsambo n'endala atyo bwe yakola n'ebyenhandha abantu boonaboona baafuna nga bwe baayenda." 
John6:12 Bwe baamala okwiguta boonaboona, yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Musoloze ebitundu byonabyona ebitaliiriibwa ghabule ekyonoonebwa.”" 
John6:13 Kale baasoloza, baidhuza ebiibo ikumi na bibiri eby'ebitundu eby'emigaati egya sayiri etaanu ebyalekebwagho, abantu bye bataalya." 
John6:14 Abantu bwe baabona akamanhiso ako Yesu ke yakola, baakoba bati: “Bwenebwene ono n'omulanzi Ole ow'okwidha mu nsi!”" 
John6:15 Yesu yaamanha ati baali bali kumpi okumugema bya ntaka bamufuule Kyabazinga. Yaavaagho kabiri yaaja eyo mu nsozi yenka. 
John6:16 Eiguloigulo, Abeegeresebwa be baikirira ku nhandha." 
John6:17 Baaniina mu lyato, baasomoka enhandha, baaja e Kaperinaumu. Obwire bwaziba aye nga Yesu akaali kwidha ye bali." 
John6:18 Empewo ey'amaani yaidha, enhandha yeefuukuula." 
John6:19 Abeegeresebwa be bwe baali bali kukuba enkasi, nga baakajaaku kilomita nga itaanu oba mukaaga, okulinga bati nga babona Yesu ali kutambula ku maadhi aidha y'eryato lyaibwe, era baatya inho." 
John6:20 Aye Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ninze, mutatya.”" 
John6:21 Agho baasangaalira Yesu okubeeyimbaku mu lyato, era mu kaseera keene ako eryato lyatuuka ku bukalu ghe baali baja." 
John6:22 Olunaku olwairirira, eikuukuubira ery'abantu abaali basigaire eruuyi ere ow'enhandha, baabona nga ghaligho eryato irala lyonka. Era baidhukira nga Abeegeresebwa baaja bonka, Yesu tiyali nabo mu lyato nga baja." 
John6:23 Ghaabaagho amaato agaava e Tiberia, gaidha okumpi n'ekifo abantu kamaala ghe baaliira emigaati nga Musengwa amaze okweyanza." 
John6:24 Mperaano abantu bwe bataabona Yesu waire Abeegeresebwa be, baaniina mu maato ago baaja e Kaperinaumu okumwagala." 
John6:25 Abantu bwe baayagaana Yesu ng'ali eruuyi ere ow'enhandha, baamubuuza bati: “Mwegeresa watuuse li eno?”" 
John6:26 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, muli kundhagala ti lwa kuba mwabona obumanhiso bwe nakola, aye muli kundhagala lwa kuba mwalya emigaati mwalekerera." 
John6:27 Mutakolereranga mere ewaagho, aye mukolererenga emere etawaagho, etuusa ku bulamu obutawaagho. Eyo n'emere Omwana w'Omuntu yaalibagha. Kuba oyo Katonda Lata yamutaaku akamanhiso.”" 
John6:28 Baamubuuza bati: “Tukole ki okukola Katonda by'ayenda tukole?” 
John6:29 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Katonda ky'ayenda mukole n'okwikiriza oyo ye yatuma.” 
John6:30 Baamukoba bati: “Kamanhiso ki k'onaakola tubone era tukwikirize? Oja kukola ki? 
John6:31 Badhaadha baife baalya mannu mu irungu era nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Yabagha omugaati oguva mu igulu baalya.’ ”" 
John6:32 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, Musa ti n'eyabagha omugaati oguva mu igulu. Lata wange n'agaba omugaati gwene oguva mu igulu" 
John6:33 kuba omugaati Katonda gw'agaba, n'omuntu oyo ava mu igulu era n'agabira ensi obulamu.”" 
John6:34 Agho ni baamukoba bati: “Musengwa, tughenga omugaati guno buliidho.”" 
John6:35 Yaabakoba ati: “Ninze omugaati ogugha obulamu, aidha ye ndi endhala terimuluma, era oyo andhikiriza taliwulira ndiwo." 
John6:36 “Aye nga bwe nabakoba, waire mumbona timwikiriza." 
John6:37 Buli muntu Lata y'ampa, aliidha ye ndi ate buli aidha ye ndi tija kumubingira ku luya." 
John6:38 Kuba naidha okuva mu igulu ti kukola nze kye nhenda, aye oyo eyantuma ky'ayenda." 
John6:39 Era kino, eyantuma ky'ayenda: ku be yampa ndobe kufiirwaku waire mulala aye mbazuukize ku lunaku olusembayo." 
John6:40 Lata wange ky'ayenda ni kino: buli abona Omwana era n'amwikiriza afune obulamu obutawaagho era mmuzuukize ku lunaku olusembayo.” 
John6:41 Abayudaaya baaduuduuma olw'okubakoba ati: “Ninze omugaati oguva mu igulu.” 
John6:42 Baakoba bati: “Ono ti ni Yesu, mutabane wa Yosefu? Ise n'inhina tubaidhi. Akoba atya mperaano ati, ‘Naika okuva mu igulu?’ ”" 
John6:43 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Muleke kuduuduumira eyo. 
John6:44 Ghazira aghanga kwidha ye ndi okutoolaku nga Lata eyantuma n'amutuusiiza ye ndi, era ndimuzuukiza ku lunaku olusembayo." 
John6:45 Kyaghandiikibwa mu balanzi kiti, ‘Boonaboona balyegeresebwa Katonda.’ Yeenayeena awulira ebya Lata n'ayega, aidha ye ndi." 
John6:46 Tikiri kiti ghaligho eyaali aboine ku Lata okutoolaku oyo ava ye Katonda, oyo n'eyabona ku Lata." 
John6:47 Bwenebwene, ka mbakobere aikiriza, ali n'obulamu obutawaagho." 
John6:48 “Ninze omugaati ogugha obulamu. 
John6:49 Badhaadha baimwe baalya mannu mu irungu era baafa. 
John6:50 Guno n'omugaati oguva mu igulu omuntu agulya alobe kufa. 
John6:51 Ninze omugaati oguleeta obulamu, ogwava mu igulu. Omuntu yeenayeena bw'alya ku mugaati guno aja kuba mulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Omugaati gwe ndighaayo olw'obulamu obw'ensi eno, n'omubiri gwange gwe nja okughaayo ku lw'ensi eno ebe n'obulamu.”" 
John6:52 Abayudaaya baatakana beene na beene nga bakoba bati: “Ono omusaadha aghanga atya okutugha omubiri gwe ife okugulya?” 
John6:53 Agho Yesu n'okubakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, okutoolaku nga mulya omubiri gw'Omwana w'Omuntu, era ni munhwa n'omusaayi gwe, timughanga kuba na bulamu." 
John6:54 Kiisi alya omubiri gwange era n'anhwa omusaayi gwange, ali n'obulamu obutawaagho, era ndimuzuukiza ku lunaku olusembayo." 
John6:55 Kuba omubiri gwange mere yeeneyeene ate omusaayi gwange kya kunhwa kyenekyene. 
John6:56 Kiisi alya omubiri gwange n'anhwa n'omusaayi gwange, aba mu nze zeena naamubaamu." 
John6:57 Nga Lata omulamu bwe yantuma nze ni mba omulamu olw'okuba oyo, mu nsambo n'endala oyo yeenayeena andya aba mulamu lwa kuba nze." 
John6:58 Guno ni, n'omugaati oguva mu igulu, ti nga badhaadha baimwe gwe baalya ni bafa. Ole alya ku mugaati guno aja kuba mulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda.”" 
John6:59 Yayogera bino ng'ali kwegeresa mu sinagoga e Kaperinaumu. 
John6:60 Abeegeresebwa be kamaala bwe baawulira ebyo, baakoba bati: “Ekibono kino nga kikalangafu! Naani aghanga okukiwulirisa?”" 
John6:61 Yesu yaakitegeera mule ng'Abeegeresebwa bwe bali kuduuduuma olwa kino. Agho yaabakoba ati: “Kino kibamazeemu amaani? 
John6:62 Memale nguli mubona Omwana w'Omuntu ng'aniinaniina eyo mu kifo ye yabanga? 
John6:63 Mwoyo n'agaba obulamu, omubiri ghazira kye guganhula. Ebibono bye mbakobye ni Mwoyo era n'obulamu." 
John6:64 Aye abandi ku imwe timwikiriza.” Kuba okuviira irala mu kwinhama Yesu yali aidhi abaali tibaikiriza, n'eyali aja okumulyamu olukwe." 
John6:65 Era yaakoba ati: “Kye nava ni mbakoba nti ghazira muntu aghanga kwidha ye ndi okutoolaku nga Lata akimughaire.” 
John6:66 Okuva ku olwo Abeegeresebwa be kamaala baira einhuma baalekera okutambula naye. 
John6:67 Kale Yesu yaabuuza Eikumi n'Ababiri ati: “Ate imwe, mwena mwandyenze okwirayo?”" 
John6:68 Simoni Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa, tunaaja y'ani? Niiwe ali n'ebibono eby'obulamu obutawaagho." 
John6:69 Twidhi era twikiriza nga niiwe Omutukuvu wa Katonda.” 
John6:70 Yesu yairamu ati: “Ti ninze eyabalonda imwe Eikumi n'Ababiri? Ate owundi ku imwe Sitaani!” 
John6:71 Mperaano yali ali kwogera ku Yuda mutabane wa Simoni Isikarioti. Kuba ono, omulala ku Ikumi n'Ababiri, yali n'aja okumulyamu olukwe." 
John7:1 Ebyo bwe byawa Yesu yaasigala mu Galilaaya nga tayenda kutambulira mu Buyudaaya, kuba Abayudaaya baali banoonia kumwita." 
John7:2 Ekibinuko ky'Abayudaaya eky'Entindi kyali kiri kumpi okutuuka. 
John7:3 Baganda be baamukoba bati: “Va ghano oje e Buyudaaya, Abeegeresebwa bo babone ku bino by'okola." 
John7:4 Ghazira agisa by'akola bw'aba ng'ayenda okumanhibwa. Kale nga iwe bw'okola ebintu bino, weeyoleke eri ensi ekumanhe.”" 
John7:5 Ekyo kyali kityo kuba ni baganda be abo, boona tibaamwikiriza." 
John7:6 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Ekiseera kyange kikaali kutuuka, aye imwe ekiseera kyaimwe buliidho kirigho." 
John7:7 Ensi tesobola kubakyagha, aye nze enkyagha, kuba mpa obudhulizi ku bikolwa byayo ebibi." 
John7:8 Imwe muje ku kibinuko aye nze tiri kuja ku kibinuko ekyo kuba ekiseera kyange kikaali kutuukira irala.” 
John7:9 Bwe yamala okubakoba ebyo yaasigala mu Galilaaya. 
John7:10 Baganda be nga bamaze okuja ku kibinuko, Yesu yeena yaaja aye tiyaja ng'abantu babona, yeiba bweibe." 
John7:11 Abayudaaya baamwagala ku kibinuko era baakoba bati: “Ono ali gha?” 
John7:12 Ghaabaagho okuduuduuma kungi mu biyindi eby'abantu nga bamwogeraku. Abandi nga bakoba bati: “Musaadha mukalamu.” Ate abandi bati: “Busa, akiidhamya bwa bantu.”" 
John7:13 Aye nga ghazira amwogeraku mu lwatu olw'okutya Abayudaaya. 
John7:14 Mperaano ekibinuko ghe kituukira ghagati, Yesu yaaja mu isinzizo yaatoolera okwegeresa." 
John7:15 Abayudaaya beewuunhia inho baakoba bati: “Omusaadha ono tabangaku amwegeresa! Bino byonabyona yabyega atya?” 
John7:16 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bye ndhegeresa ti byange aye by'oyo eyantuma. 
John7:17 Kiisi aganha okukola oyo by'ayenda, amanha oba nga bye ndhegeresa byange ku bwange oba biva eri Katonda." 
John7:18 Ayogera ebibye ku bubwe anoonia kumusaaka, aye ayenda basaake eyamutuma aba mwesigwa era tabaamu buguya bwonabwona." 
John7:19 Koodhi Musa tiyabagha Mateeka? Aye ghazira ku imwe agagondera. Lwaki musala amagezi okundhita?” 
John7:20 Eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyamwiramu liti: “Oliku omuzimu omubi! Naani ali kusala amagezi okukwita?” 
John7:21 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Nakola ekyewuunhio kirala mwenamwena mwayasaamirira. 
John7:22 Olw'okuba Musa yabalagira okukeketanga kiisi mwana mulenzi, ate nga n'okuba tikyava ku Musa aye kyava ku badhaadha, era mukeketa ku lwa Sabbato." 
John7:23 Oba nga omuntu aghanga okukeketebwa ku lwa Sabbato obutamenha Mateeka ga Musa, lwaki nze muunhiigira olw'okuwonia omuntu ku lwa Sabbato?" 
John7:24 Mutasalanga musango nga mujiira ku bya ku ngulu, aye musalenga nga mujiira ku kituufu.”" 
John7:25 Abandi ku bantu ab'omu Yerusalemu baakoba bati: “Ono ti ye baagala okwita? 
John7:26 Mubone, wuule yeetaire mu bwanga ali kwogera era ghaabula kye bamukobaku! Bwenebwene abakulu baghanga okuba nga bakiidhi bati yandiba Kurisito?" 
John7:27 Aye twidhi bulungi omusaadha ono y'ava, ate nga Kurisito bw'aliidha ghazira alimanha gh'ava.”" 
John7:28 Agho Yesu bwe yali ng'ali kwegeresa mu isinzizo yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Bwenebwene mundidhi era mwidhi ni ye nva? Nze tyaidha ku bwange mwene. Eyantuma yeesigika, aye era imwe timumwidhi." 
John7:29 Aye nze mmwidhi kuba y'ali ye nva era n'eyantuma.” 
John7:30 Agho baasala amagezi bamugeme aye ghaabula amugemaku kuba ekiseera kye kyali kikaali kutuuka. 
John7:31 Abantu kamaala mu baali agho baamwikiriza baakoba bati: “Kurisito bw'aliidha, alikola ebyewuunhio kamaala okusinga omusaadha ono by'akoze?”" 
John7:32 Abafarisaayo baawulira okuduuduuma mu ikuukuubira ku bigema ku Yesu. Era bano ni Bakabona Abakulu baasindika abakuumi baje bamugeme. 
John7:33 Yesu yaakoba ati: “Ndidha kubaaku n'imwe entangama ntonotono memale nje y'oyo eyantuma. 
John7:34 Mulindhagala aye timulimbona, nga ghe ndi timughanga kutuukagho.”" 
John7:35 Abayudaaya beebuuzagania bati: “Ategeka kuja gha ye tutalimubonera? Ategeka kuja mu bale abeetabika n'Abagureki, ayegerese Abagureki?" 
John7:36 Agho aba ali kukoba ki bw'akoba ati, ‘Mulindhagala aye timulimbona, nga ghe ndi timughanga kutuukagho?’ ”" 
John7:37 Ku lunaku lw'ekibinuko olusembayo era olusinga bukologho, Yesu yaayemerera yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Kiisi ali endiwo aidhe ye nze anhwe." 
John7:38 Era ng'Ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba, ‘Kiisi andhikiriza emiiga egy'amaadhi ag'obulamu giriviira mu mwoyo gwe.’ ”" 
John7:39 Agho Yesu yali ali kwogera ku Mwoyo abamwikiriza ye baali baja okufuna kuba mu kiseera ekyo Mwoyo yali akaali kugabibwa olw'okuba Yesu yali akaali kutuuka mu kitiisa kya Ise. 
John7:40 Abantu abandi abaali mu ikuukuubira bwe baawulira ebibono ebyo, baakoba bati: “Bwenebwene ono n'omulanzi.”" 
John7:41 Abandi baakoba bati: “Ni Kurisito.” Ate abandi baakoba bati: “Aye Kurisito aja kuva Galilaaya? 
John7:42 Ebyaghandiikibwa tibikoba biti Kurisito aja kuba ku baidhukulu ba Daudi? Era biti aja kuzaalibwa Bethelehemu ku butaka bwa Daudi.” 
John7:43 Kale abantu beeyawulamu ku bigema ku Yesu 
John7:44 era abandi baayenda bamugeme aye ghazira yamugemaku. 
John7:45 Agho abakuumi bairayo ye Bakabona Abakulu n'Abafarisaayo abaababuuza bati: “Lwaki timumuleese?” 
John7:46 Abakuumi babairamu bati: “Tebangayo ku muntu eyaali ayogeire ng'oti n'omusaadha oyo!” 
John7:47 Abafarisaayo baabakoba bati: “Mutakoba muti mwena abakiidhaimya? 
John7:48 Mwali muwuliireyooku Omuyudaaya omukulu oba Omufarisaayo amwikiriza? 
John7:49 Aye ekiyindi eky'abantu kino tikiidhi Mateeka ga Musa kale kiraame!” 
John7:50 Aye ku Bafarisaayo ghaabaagho omusaadha nga bamweta Nikodemo. Ono einhuma ere eyaja n'abona Yesu obwire, yaakoba baine ati:" 
John7:51 “Aye Amateeka gaife tigatuganha kusalira muntu musango okutoolaku nga tumaze okuwulirisa n'okumanha ky'akola.” 
John7:52 Baamwiramu bati: “Iwe weena oli wa Galilaaya? Kinoonereze mu byaghandiikibwa, oidha kubona oti e Galilaaya tesobola kuva mulanzi.” [" 
John7:53 Agho buli muntu yairayo ewuwe. 
John8:1 Aye Yesu yaaja ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva. 
John8:2 Olunaku olwairirira yaawuuna mu nkyonkyo yairayo mu isinzizo. Abantu boonaboona beesololeza gh'ali, yaatyama yaabeegeresa." 
John8:3 Abanamateeka n'Abafarisaayo baamuleetera omukazi ye baagema ng'ayenda, baamwemereza agho mu maiso gaibwe." 
John8:4 Baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa omukazi ono agemeibwa mu kikolwa kyene eky'obwenzi. 
John8:5 Mu Mateeka, Musa yatulagira ati omuntu ng'oti n'oyo ateekwa okukubwa amabaale afe. Mperaano iwe okoba otya?”" 
John8:6 Baakoba ebyo kumuleba nga benda akobe ekinaamuteesaaku omusango, aye Yesu yaakotaamirira bw'aghandiika ku itaka n'olwala lwe." 
John8:7 Bwe beeyongera okumubuuza, yaakotaamulukuka, yaabakoba ati: “Ku imwe azira kibi n'abe asooke okumukuba eibaale.”" 
John8:8 Agho kabiri yaakotaamirira yaaghandiika ku itaka. 
John8:9 Bwe yabakoba atyo baatoolera okuvaagho mulala mulala ng'abakaire n'abatoolereza. Yesu yaasigala agho n'omukazi ng'akaayemereire agho. 
John8:10 Bwe yakotaamulukuka yaabuuza ati: “Mukazi iwe, bali gha? Tighabairegho akusalira musango?”" 
John8:11 Omukazi yairamu ati: “Musengwa, ghazira.” Yesu yairamu ati: “Zeena ni tigukusalire. Golola, aye toirangayo kukola kibi.”]" 
John8:12 Yesu yaayongera yaakoba abantu ati: “Ninze ekimuliikirira eky'ensi kiisi annonereza taja kutambulira ghali nzikiiza era aja kuba n'obutangaavu obuleeta obulamu.” 
John8:13 Agho Abafarisaayo baamukoba bati: “Oli kweghaaku mwene obudhulizi, obudhulizi obubwo mwene tibuba bwa mazima.”" 
John8:14 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Waire neeghaaku obudhulizi mwene, obudhulizi bwange bwa mazima, kuba nze ndidhi ye nava, era ni ye nja aye imwe timwidhi ye nva, oba ye nja." 
John8:15 Musala emisango mu magezi ag'obuntu gonka. Nze ghazira ye nsalira musango. 
John8:16 Aye ate ni bwe mba nga ngusaze, okusalagho kwange kuba kutuufu, kuba tiba zenka mu kusalagho okwo Lata eyantuma aba ninze." 
John8:17 Ate kyaghandiikibwa ni mu Mateeka gaimwe kiti: Abadhulizi ababiri kasita baisania, obudhulizi bwaibwe buba butuufu." 
John8:18 Nze mwene neeghaaku obudhulizi ni Lata eyantuma yeena ampaaku obudhulizi.” 
John8:19 Agho baamubuuza bati: “Lata wo ali gha?” Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Nze timundidhi waire Lata wange, kuba nguli mundidhi ni Lata wange mwandibaire mumwidhi.”" 
John8:20 Yesu yakoba bino byonabyona ng'ali kwegeresa mu isinzizo agho mu kifo aghaateebwanga ebirabo. Era ghazira yamugema kuba ekiseera kye kyali kikaali kutuuka. 
John8:21 Yesu kabiri yaakoba ati: “Nze ndidha kuvaagho mulindhagala, era mwafiira mu kibi kyaimwe. Nze ye nja imwe timughanga kujaayo.”" 
John8:22 Abayudaaya baakoba bati: “Akobye ati titughanga kuja y'aja, aja kweita?”" 
John8:23 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Imwe muva ku nsi kuno, nze nva mu igulu. Imwe muli ba nsi eno, nze tiri wa nsi eno." 
John8:24 Kye nava ni mbakoba nti mulifiira mu bibi byaimwe kuba bwe mutaikiriza muti ninze, muja kufiira mu bibi byaimwe.”" 
John8:25 Baamubuuza bati: “Niiwe ani?” Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Kye mbaire mbakoberanga okuviira irala ku ntoolo. 
John8:26 Ndi n'ebintu kamaala eby'okuboogeraku era eby'okubasalira omusango aye eyantuma wa mazima, era nkobera ensi ebyo byonka bye mpulira okuva y'ali.”" 
John8:27 Ti baakitegeera nga yali ali kwogera nabo ku Lata. 
John8:28 Agho Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Bwe mulighanika Omwana w'Omuntu, olwo lwe mulimanha nga ninze, era nga ghazira kye nkola ku bwange, aye Lata by'andhegeresa bye nkoba." 
John8:29 Eyantuma ali ninze, tiyandeka kuba zenka, kuba buliidho nkola ebyo ebimusangaaza.”" 
John8:30 Yesu bwe yayogera ebyo, abantu kamaala bamwikiriza." 
John8:31 Yesu yaakoba Abayudaaya abaamwikiriza ati: “Bwe mukalangukira ku kibono kyange, ng'olwo muli beegeresebwa bange beenebeene." 
John8:32 Mulimanha amazima era amazima galibafuula ab'eidembe.” 
John8:33 Baamwiramu bati: “Ife tuli ku lulyo lwa Aburahamu era titubangaku bairu ba muntu yeenayeena. Kale okoba otya oti tulifuulibwa ab'eidembe?” 
John8:34 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, kiisi akola kibi, aba mugheereza wa kibi." 
John8:35 Omwana aba wa ghaka obulamu bwe bwonabwona, aye omwiru taba wa ghaka obulamu bwe bwonabwona." 
John8:36 Kale Omwana bw'alibafuula ab'eidembe muliba ba idembe beenebeene. 
John8:37 Ndidhi muli ku lulyo lwa Aburahamu. Aye musala amagezi okundhita olw'okuba timwikiriza kibono kyange. 
John8:38 Nze ndhogera ku ebyo Lata by'andaga ate imwe mukola ebyo lata waimwe by'abakoba.” 
John8:39 Baamwiramu bati: “Lata waife ni Aburahamu.” Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Nguli bwenebwene mwali baana ba Aburahamu mwandibaire mukola ebyo Aburahamu bye yakolanga. 
John8:40 Nze mbakobera ebituufu bye nawulira okuva eri Katonda. Aye mperaano musala magezi ga kundhita. Aburahamu takolangaku kintu ng'oti n'ekyo! 
John8:41 Mukola bikolwa bya lata waimwe.” Baamukoba bati: “Ife tituli baghambule, tuli ni lata waife mulala ni Katonda mwene.”" 
John8:42 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Nguli Katonda n'eyali Lata waimwe mwandibaire mungonza kuba ewa Katonda ye nava naidha. Tyaidha ku bwange aye mwene n'eyantuma. 
John8:43 Lwaki timutegeera bye mbakoba? Lwa kuba timughanga kuwulirisa kibono kyange. 
John8:44 Muli ba lata waimwe Sitaani, era mugonza kukola lata waimwe by'ayenda. Oyo okuviira irala ku ntoolo mutemo era tabangaku wa mazima, kuba era azira mazima. Bw'ayogera eky'obuguya aba ali kutuukiriza butuukirize kikula kye, kuba oyo muguya era ise w'obuguya." 
John8:45 Aye kuba nze mbakobera ekituufu, timundhikiriza." 
John8:46 “Naani ku imwe anumiriza ekibi kye naali nkoze? Oba nga mbakobera ekituufu lwaki timundhikiriza? 
John8:47 Ole bw'aba omuntu wa Katonda awulira ebibono bya Katonda, aye imwe timuwulira, kuba timuli bantu ba Katonda.”" 
John8:48 Abayudaaya baakoba Yesu bati: “Tituli batuufu okukoba tuti oli Musamaria era oliku omuzimu omubi?” 
John8:49 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Nziraku muzimu mubi. Lata wange mmutaamu ekinhagansi aye imwe mumudhuuluusa. 
John8:50 Tigezaaku kwenooneza mwene kitiisa, ghaligho akiinooneza era akimpa." 
John8:51 Bwenebwene, ka mbakobere yeenayeena akalangukira ku kibono kyange, taja kufa.”"
