John8:52 Agho Abayudaaya baamukoba bati: “Mperaano tukakaisa tuti oliku omuzimu omubi! Aburahamu yafa n'abalanzi boona baafa, aye iwe okoba oti yeenayeena akalangukira ku kibono ky'omugha talifa." 
John8:53 Niiwe osinga lata waife Aburahamu eyafa era n'abalanzi boona baafa? Weeyeta ki?” 
John8:54 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bwe neetaamu ekitiisa mwene, ekitiisa ekyo tikibaamu muzindo. Lata wange n'antaamu ekitiisa, imwe ye mwogeraku nga Katonda waimwe." 
John8:55 Timumumanhangaku aye nze mwidhi. Bwe nkoba nti timwidhi mba muguya ng'oti niimwe aye mmwidhi era ngema by'akoba. 
John8:56 Lata waimwe Aburahamu yeesumba okubona ebiseera by'okwidha kwange. Yabibona era yaasangaala.” 
John8:57 Agho Abayudaaya baamukoba bati: “Wabonera gha Aburahamu? Okaali na kugheza myaka makumi ataanu (50); egy'obukulu.” 
John8:58 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere Aburahamu yali akaali kubaagho, nze nga ndigho.”" 
John8:59 Agho baalonda amabaale nga benda bagamukube, aye Yesu yeegisa era yaava mu isinzizo." 
John9:1 Yesu bwe yali atambula yaabona omusaadha eyazaalibwa nga mutulu. 
John9:2 Abeegeresebwa be baamubuuza bati: “Mwegeresa, omusaadha ono okuzaalibwa nga mutulu naani eyayona? Mwene oba bazaire be?”" 
John9:3 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mwene ti n'eyayona waire abazaire be, aye yatuluwala amaani ga Katonda gamweyolekeremu." 
John9:4 Tuteekwa okukola eby'oyo eyantuma nga bukaali musana, kuba obwire buli kwidha nga ghazira aghanga kukola." 
John9:5 Nga ndi mu nsi muno, ninze ekimuliikirira eky'ensi.”" 
John9:6 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yaafuudha ku itaka, yaakola ekisoodo mu matanta n'enkungu yaakibbaaka ku maiso g'omusaadha." 
John9:7 Yaamukoba ati: “Ja onaabe mu maiso mu kidiba ky'e Siloamu.” (Eriina eryo litegeeza, “atumiibwa?”) Kale yaaja, yaanaaba, yaira ng'abona." 
John9:8 Ab'oku lulaalo lw'ewaibwe n'abantu abandi abaamubonanga ng'asabiriza, beebuuzagania bati: “Ono ti n'omusaadha eyatyamanga ghale ng'asabiriza?”" 
John9:9 Abandi baakoba bati: “N'oyo.” Ate abandi baakoba bati: “Busa, ti n'oyo, kumufaanana bufaanane.” Agho omusaadha mwene yaakoba ati: “Ninze.”" 
John9:10 Kyebaava ni bamubuuza bati: “Kiidha kitya okuba nga buti oghanga okubona?” 
John9:11 Yaabairamu ati: “Omusaadha ayetebwa Yesu akoze agho ekisoodo yaakimbaaka ku maiso, era yankoba nje nnaabe mu Siloamu. Kale naaja, naanaaba era naatoolera okubona.”" 
John9:12 Baamubuuza bati: “Oyo ali luuyi gha?” Yairamu ati: “Tiidhi.” 
John9:13 Agho baaleeta ole eyali omutulu eri Abafarisaayo. 
John9:14 Olunaku Yesu lwe yakola ekisoodo n'azibula omutulu amaiso lwali lwa Sabbato. 
John9:15 Kale Abafarisaayo boona baabuuza omusaadha ensambo ye yazibukamu amaiso. Yaabakoba ati: “Yambbaaka ekisoodo ku maiso, naanaabamu, era mbona.”" 
John9:16 Abafarisaayo abandi baakoba bati: “Omusaadha oyo ti wa Katonda, kuba tagondera mateeka ga Sabbato.” Aye abandi baakoba bati: “Omuntu omukozi ow'ebibi aghanga atya okukola ebyewuunhio oti ni bino?”" 
John9:17 Agho kabiri baabuuza omusaadha eyali omutulu bati: “Oyo omwogeraku ki, nga bwe yakuzibwire amaiso?” Yaakoba ati: “Mulanzi.”" 
John9:18 Aye Abayudaaya baali tibali kwikiriza ng'omusaadha oyo yali mutulu aye buti yaaba ng'abona, okutuusa bwe baayetesa abazaire be." 
John9:19 Baababuuza bati: “Ono mutabane waimwe ye muli kukoba muti yazaalibwa nga mutulu, kiidha kitya kiti mperaano abona?”" 
John9:20 Abazaire be bairamu bati: “Twidhi ng'ono mutabane waife era nga yazaalibwa nga mutulu. 
John9:21 Aye kye tutaidhi n'okuba nga mperaano abona, era titwidhi eyamuzibwire maiso. Aye mumubuuze mwene, ti mwana muto aghanga mwene okweyogerera.”" 
John9:22 Baayogera batyo lwa kutya Abayudaaya, kuba Abayudaaya baali bamaze okusalagho bati omuntu yeenayeena ayatula ati Yesu ni Kurisito wa kubingibwa mu sinagoga." 
John9:23 Kyebaava ni bakoba bati: “Mumubuuze mwene, ti mwana muto.”" 
John9:24 Kabiri baayeta omusaadha eyabanga omutulu baamukoba bati: “Mu ga Katonda yogera ekituufu twidhi ng'omusaadha oyo mukozi wa bibi!” 
John9:25 Omusaadha yaabairamu ati: “Oba mukozi wa bibi nze tiidhi. Ekintu kirala kye ndidhi, nti nali mutulu aye mperaano mbona.”" 
John9:26 Baamubuuza bati: “Kiki kye yakukolaku? Yakuzibula atya amaiso?” 
John9:27 Yaabairamu ati: “Mbakobeire nga timwenda kuwulira, mperaano lwaki kabiri mwenda okukiwulira, mwenda mwena kufuuka beegeresebwa be?”" 
John9:28 Baamuvuma, baamukoba bati: “Niiwe omwegeresebwa w'oyo omusaadha aye ife tuli beegeresebwa ba Musa." 
John9:29 Twidhi nga Katonda yayogera ni Musa aye oyo omusaadha titwidhi y'ava.” 
John9:30 Omusaadha yaabakoba ati: “E! Kino kinene! Timwidhi y'ava ate nga yanzibwire amaiso! 
John9:31 Twidhi tuti Katonda tawulira bakozi ba bibi, aye awulira oyo amutaamu ekinhagansi era akola by'ayenda." 
John9:32 Okuviira irala ku kwinhama okw'ensi tikiwulirwangaku nga ghaligho eyazibula amaiso ag'omuntu eyazaalibwa nga mutulu. 
John9:33 Nguli omusaadha ono ti wa Katonda, ghazira kye yandighanze kukola.”" 
John9:34 Agho baamukoba bati: “Wazaalirwa mu bibi era mw'okuliire, obwo weena waatwegeresa?” Baamubingira ku luya." 
John9:35 Yesu yaawulira nga bamubinze. Bwe yamubona yaamukoba ati: “Oikiriza Omwana ow'Omuntu?” 
John9:36 Omusaadha yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, naani mmwikirize.”" 
John9:37 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Omuboine era n'ali kwogera n'iwe.” 
John9:38 Omusaadha yaakoba ati: “Musengwa, ndhikiriza.” Yaasinza Yesu." 
John9:39 Era Yesu yaakoba ati: “Ekyandeeta mu nsi n'okusala omusango, abatulu babone ate ababona bafuuke batulu.”" 
John9:40 Abandi ku Bafarisaayo abaali agho naye, bwe baawulira ekyo baamukoba bati: “Otakoba oti ife tuli batulu?”" 
John9:41 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Nguli mwali batulu timwandibaire na kibi kyaimwe aye nga bwe mukoba muti mubona, ekibi kyaimwe kibasigalaku." 
John10:1 “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Ole atabita mu mulyango ng'angira mu kigo ky'entaama, aye n'aniinira aghandi, oyo aba mwibi era munhazi." 
John10:2 Oyo angira ng'abita mu mulyango, n'omwayi w'entaama edho." 
John10:3 Oyo omukuumi w'omulyango amwiguliragho. Entaama dhiwulira amamiro ge, ayeta kiisi ntaama ye eriina lyayo, yaadhifulumya." 
John10:4 Bw'amala okudhifulumya adhikulembereramu dhaamunonereza, kuba dhiidhi amamiro ge." 
John10:5 Oyo ye dhitaidhi ti dhimunonereza, dhimulumuka kuba tidhiidhi mamiro ge.”" 
John10:6 Yesu yabakobera olufumo luno, aye tibaamanha kiki kye yali ali kutegeeza." 
John10:7 Agho Yesu kabiri yaabakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, ninze omulyango gw'entaama." 
John10:8 Boonaboona abansooka okwidha baibi era banhazi, aye entaama ti dhaabawulira." 
John10:9 Ninze omulyango, yeenayeena abita mu nze ng'aingira, aliwona yaingira era yaafuluma, era yaafuna n'eby'okulya." 
John10:10 Omwibi taidhirira kindi okutoolaku okwiba, okwita n'okuzikiriza. Nze naidha dhibe n'obulamu ate nga bwa mwero." 
John10:11 “Ninze omwayi omulungi, omwayi omulungi aghaayo obulamu bwe olw'entaama dhe." 
John10:12 Oyo ayayira empeera nga ti n'omwayi mwene ntaama, bw'abona omusege nga gwidha aleka agho entaama yaalumuka, gwadhighalarira dheesasa." 
John10:13 Alumuka kuba ayayira mpeera, era tafaayo ku ntaama." 
John10:14 Ninze omwayi omulungi. Edhange ndiidhi era dhoona dhindidhi," 
John10:15 ng'oti ni Lata bw'andidhi zeena ni mmumanha. Era mpaayo obulamu bwange olw'entaama edho. 
John10:16 Ndi n'entaama edhindi, aye nga tidhiri mu kyayo kino. Nteekwa dhoona okudhireeta, dhiriwulira amamiro gange, era dhirifuuka dha mu kyayo kirala n'omwayi mulala." 
John10:17 “Kale Lata kyava angonza, kuba mpaayo obulamu bwange memale kabiri mbweirize." 
John10:18 Ezira abuntoolaku, ninze mwene mbughaayo ku lwange. Ndi n'obukumu okubughaayo ate kabiri naaba n'obukumu okubweiriza. Ekyo Lata n'eyandagira okukikola.”" 
John10:19 Kabiri ghaabaagho obutaisania mu Bayudaaya olw'ebibono ebyo. 
John10:20 Bangi ku abo baakoba bati: “Aliku omuzimu omubi era mulalu, muwulirisa wa ki?”" 
John10:21 Aye abandi baakoba bati: “Ebibono bino, ti bya muntu aliku muzimu mubi. Omuzimu gusobola gutya okuzibula amaiso ag'abatulu?”" 
John10:22 Ekibinuko eky'Okwidhukira Okutukuza Eisinzizo mu Yerusalemu bwe kyatuuka, ebiseera byali bya kiinhogogo." 
John10:23 Yesu yali ali kutambula mu isinzizo mu kigangu kya Solomoni. 
John10:24 Abayudaaya baidha beesololeza agho okumwezungulula, baamubuuza bati: “Olikomya li okutuwubania? Tukobere amazima niiwe Kurisito?”" 
John10:25 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Bye nkola mu liina lya Lata wange bikakasa ekyo. Nabakobera aye timwaikiriza. 
John10:26 Imwe timwikiriza kuba timuli ntaama dhange. 
John10:27 Entaama dhange dhiwulira amamiro gange, ndiidhi era dhiinonereza." 
John10:28 Ndhigha obulamu obutawaagho era tidhirifa. Ghazira muntu yeenayeena asobola kudhinswankulaku. 
John10:29 Lata wange eyadhimpa n'asinga byonabyona, era ghazira asobola kudhimuswankulaku." 
John10:30 Nze ni Lata tuli muntu mulala.” 
John10:31 Agho Abayudaaya kabiri baalonda amabaale bagamukube. 
John10:32 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mbalaze ebirungi kamaala Lata by'ampa okukola. Ku ebyo kye muli kwenda okunkubira amabaale n'ekiri gha?” 
John10:33 Baamwiramu bati: “Tituli kwenda kukukuba mabaale lwa birungi by'okola, aye lwa kuvuma Katonda! Iwe oli muntu aye weefuula Katonda!”" 
John10:34 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka gaimwe kiti, Katonda yakoba ati, ‘Muli bakatonda.’" 
John10:35 Oba nga abo Katonda be yagha ekibono kye yabeeta bakatonda, ate nga Ebyaghandiikibwa tibisobola kudiba," 
John10:36 memale mukoba mutya nze Lata ye yatukuza n'antuma mu nsi muti nvumye Katonda kuba nkobye nti ndi Mwana wa Katonda? 
John10:37 Oba nga bye nkola ti n'ebyo Lata by'ayenda kale mutandhikiriza. 
John10:38 Aye oba nga n'ebyo, ni bwemutandhikiriza nze kasinga mwikirize bye nkola, memale mumanhe era mutegeere nga Lata ali mu nze era zeena ndi mu Lata.”" 
John10:39 Agho kabiri baayenda bamugeme aye yaabanuuka. 
John10:40 Agho Yesu, kabiri yaasomoka omwiga Yorudani yaaja mu kifo Yoanne ye yabatirizanga yaaba eyo." 
John10:41 Abantu kamaala baidha y'ali era baakoba bati: “Yoanne tiyakola kyewuunhio kyonakyona aye byonabyona bye yakoba ku musaadha ono byali bituufu.” 
John10:42 Era eyo abantu kamaala baamwikiriza. 
John11:1 Ghaaligho omusaadha eyalwala nga bamweta Lazaro. Yali mu kibuga Bethania omwabanga Maria ni muganda we Maritha. 
John11:2 Maria ono n'eyasiiga ebigere bya Musengwa omuzigo ogwa kawoowo n'abisiimuuza enviiri dhe, era n'eyali mwanhina Lazaro eyali omulwaire." 
John11:3 Kale baanhina lazaro oyo baatuma ye Yesu nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa, mukagwa wo mulwaire.”" 
John11:4 Yesu bwe yakiwulira yaakoba ati: “Obulwaire obwo tibwakumwita, aye bwidhie okuleetera Katonda ekitiisa, era n'Omwana wa Katonda yeena afune ekitiisa.”" 
John11:5 Yesu yali mukagwa wa Maritha ni muganda we era ni Lazaro. 
John11:6 Bwe yawulira ati Lazaro mulwaire yaasigala mu kifo mwe yali enaku edhindi ibiri. 
John11:7 Ebyo bwe byawa, yaakoba Abeegeresebwa be ati: “Kabiri tuje mu Buyudaaya.”" 
John11:8 Abeegeresebwa baamukoba bati: “Mwegeresa, Abayudaaya baali benda kukukuba mabaale era y'oli kwenda okuja kabiri?”" 
John11:9 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Olunaku tirubaamu saawa ikumi na ibiri? Omuntu bw'atambula omusana taja nga yeewumya, kuba abona ekimuliikirira eky'ensi eno." 
John11:10 Aye bw'atambula obwire aja nga yeewumya kuba azira kimumuliikirira.” 
John11:11 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yaakoba ati: “Mukagwa waife Lazaro atendwike, aye ndi kuja kumuzuusa.”" 
John11:12 Abeegeresebwa be baamwiramu bati: “Musengwa oba atendwike, aidha kuwona.”" 
John11:13 Yesu yayogera ku kufa kwa Lazaro, aye baadhuuba bati ategeeza kutenduka ndoolo." 
John11:14 Agho Yesu yaakibakobera busimbalaala ati: “Lazaro afiire. 
John11:15 Aye ku lwaimwe nsangaire okuba nti tyaliyo, kibasobozese okwikiriza. Aye mukole tuje y'ali.”" 
John11:16 Agho Thomasi ayetebwa omulongo n'okukoba Abeegeresebwa baine ati: “Mukole tuje ni Musengwa tufiire ghalala naye!” 
John11:17 Yesu bwe yatuuka yayagaana nga Lazaro yaakamala enaku ina mu magombe. 
John11:18 Bethania kyali kilomita nga isatu okuva e Yerusalemu. 
John11:19 Era Abayudaaya kamaala baali baidhie okubona Maritha ni Maria n'okubasaasira olw'okufiirwa mwanhinaibwe. 
John11:20 Maritha bwe yawulira ati Yesu ali kwidha, yaaja okumusangaaza aye Maria yaasigala mu ndhu ng'atyaime." 
John11:21 Maritha yaakoba Yesu ati: “Musengwa nguli wali ghano mwanhinaze tiyandifiire! 
John11:22 Aye ni mperaano ndidhi nti Katonda aidha kwikiriza kyonakyona ky'onaamusaba.” 
John11:23 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Mwanhoko wa kuzuukira.” 
John11:24 Maritha yaamwiramu ati: “Ndidhi nti wa kuzuukira ku lunaku lule olusembayo.” 
John11:25 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ninze okuzuukira era ninze obulamu. Kiisi aikiriza nze ni bw'afa, aba mulamu" 
John11:26 era kiisi mulamu andhikiriza taja kufa. Bino obiikiriza?” 
John11:27 Yairamu ati: “Yii, Musengwa ndhikiriza nga niiwe Kurisito, Omwana wa Katonda, ow'okwidha mu nsi.”" 
John11:28 Maritha bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yaaja yaayeta muganda we kawola ati: “Musengwa atuuse era ali kukweta.” 
John11:29 Maria bwe yawulira ekyo yaasituka mangu yaaja y'ali. 
John11:30 Yesu yali akaali kwingira mu kibuga, ng'akaali mu kifo Maritha ghe yamwagaana." 
John11:31 Abantu abaali ni Maria mu ndhu nga baidhie okumusaasira baamunonereza, bwe baabona ng'asitukiramu nga badhuuba bati yali ali kuja ku magombe kugegengera eyo." 
John11:32 Maria yaatuuka Yesu ghe yali era olwamubona ati yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bye yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, nguli wali ghano mwanhinaze tiyandifiire!”" 
John11:33 Yesu yaamubona ng'ali kugegenga, n'abantu abaali bamunonereza boona nga bali kugegenga yaawulira enaku ku mwoyo era yeinhamira." 
John11:34 Yaababuuza ati: “Mwamuziika gha?” Baamukoba bati: “Musengwa, idha obone.”" 
John11:35 Yesu yaalira. 
John11:36 Abantu baakoba bati: “Mubone bw'abaire amugonza!” 
John11:37 Aye abandi baakoba bati: “Ono eyazibula omutulu yali taghanga kulobera musaadha ono kufa?” 
John11:38 Kabiri Yesu ng'aidhwire okweinhamira yaaja y'amagombe. Gaakolebwa mu ngeri ya mpuku nga ku mulyango gwayo ghaligho eibaale. 
John11:39 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mutoolegho eibaale!” Maritha mwanhina omufu yairamu ati: “Musengwa, ekiwunha kiidha kuba kinene kuba yaakaba mu magombe enaku ina!”" 
John11:40 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Tyakukobeire nti wandiboine ekitiisa kya Katonda nguli oikiriza?” 
John11:41 Baatoolagho eibaale. Yesu yaalinga ghaigulu yaakoba ati: “Nsiimye inho Lata kuba ompuliire. 
John11:42 Ndidhi nti buliidho ompulira aye ekyo nkikobye lwa bantu abali ghano baikirize nga niiwe wantuma.” 
John11:43 Bwe yamala okukoba ebyo yaayetera ghaigulu ati: “Lazaro, fuluma!”" 
John11:44 Yaafuluma ng'emikono gye n'ebigere bizingirire mu ngoye dhe baamuziikamu, n'ekighero mu maiso. Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mumusibule.”" 
John11:45 Bangi ku Bayudaaya abaali baidhie ewa Maria, bwe baabona Yesu bye yakola baamwikiriza." 
John11:46 Aye abandi baaja y'Abafarisaayo baabakobera ebyo Yesu bye yakola. 
John11:47 Agho Bakabona Abakulu n'Abafarisaayo, beesoloza mu lwekobaano era beebuuzagania bati: “Tukole tutya? Kuba omusaadha ono ali kukola ebyewuunhio kamaala." 
John11:48 Bwe tumuleka tutyo abantu boonaboona baidha kumwikiriza, era Abaroma baliidha baazikiriza ekifo kyaife ekitukuvu n'eighanga lyaife.”" 
John11:49 Aye mulala ku abo, nga bamweta Kayafa, eyali Omukulu wa Bakabona mu mwaka ogwo, yaabakoba ati: “Ghazira kye mwidhi." 
John11:50 Timubona ng'ekisinga n'omuntu omulala okufiiririra abantu, mu kifo ky'eighanga lyonalyona okuzikirizibwa?”" 
John11:51 Aye yali tali kukoba kino ku bubwe, aye okuva bwe yali nga n'Omukulu wa Bakabona mu mwaka ogwo, yali ali kulanga nga Yesu bwe yali aja okufiiririra eighanga eryo." 
John11:52 Ate nga tiikufiiririra ighanga kyonka aye n'okusoloza aghalala abantu ba Katonda abaali beeswireswire. 
John11:53 Okuva ni ku olwo baatanula lukwe lwa kumwita. 
John11:54 Kale ni Yesu yaalekera okweyaliza mu Bayudaaya, aye yaava agho yaaja mu kiketezo ekiri okumpi n'eirungu mu kibuga ekyetebwa Efuraimu, yaaba eyo n'Abeegeresebwa be." 
John11:55 Mperaano Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa eky'Abayudaaya kyali kiri kumpi okutuuka. Abantu kamaala baava mu byalo baaja e Yerusalemu okwetukuza ng'Ekibinuko ekyo kikaali kutuuka. 
John11:56 Kale baayagala Yesu, era beebuuzagania beene na beene nga beemereire agho mu isinzizo bati: “Mudhuuba mutya? Anaidha ku kibinuko?”" 
John11:57 Mperaano, Bakabona Abakulu n'Abafarisaayo, baali bamaze okugha ebiragiro bati, bweghabaagho omuntu yeenayeena amanha Yesu gh'ali, aja yaabamanhisa, baaja baamugema." 
John12:1 Kale ng'ekaabulayo enaku mukaaga okutuuka ku Kibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa, Yesu yaaja e Bethania, eyabanga Lazaro ye yazuukiza." 
John12:2 Eyo baamufumbirayo ekyeigulo era Maritha yaagheereza. Lazaro yaba mulala ku abo abaalya ni Yesu. 
John12:3 Maria yaatoola akadoome ak'omuzigo ogw'omughendo ogw'ekika kya narudo yaagusiiga ku bigere bya Yesu, era bwe yamala yaabisiimuuza enviiri dhe. Enhumba yaidhula akawoowo." 
John12:4 Agho Yuda Isikarioti owundi ku Beegeresebwa ba Yesu, eyali aja okumulyamu olukwe yaakoba ati:" 
John12:5 “Lwaki omuzigo guno tigutundiibwamu dinari ebikumi bisatu (300) ni dhigheebwa baavu.” 
John12:6 Aye yakoba atyo, ti kuba nga yali afaayo inho ku baavu, aye lwa kuba yali mwibi. Ate era ng'omukuumi w'endyanga, yatwalanga empiiya edhaateebwangamu." 
John12:7 Aye Yesu yaakoba ati: “Omukazi mumuleke omuzigo agutereke okutuuka ku lunaku olw'okuziikibwa kwange. 
John12:8 Abaavu muba nabo buliidho, aye nze ti muba ninze buliidho.”" 
John12:9 Abayudaaya kamaala baawulira bati Yesu ali Bethania. Baaja nga tibali kuja kubona Yesu yenka, aye n'okubona Lazaro Yesu ye yazuukiza mu bafu." 
John12:10 Olwo Bakabona Abakulu baasala olukwe okwita ni Lazaro. 
John12:11 Kuba olw'okuba oyo Abayudaaya kamaala baali bali kubavaaku baikiriza Yesu. 
John12:12 Ku lunaku olwairirira abantu kamaala abaali baidhie ku kibinuko baawulira nga Yesu ali kwidha mu Yerusalemu. 
John12:13 Baagema ensaga edh'emiti eminaazi baaja okumusangaaza, era baaleekaana bati: “Hosanna, wa nkabi oyo aidha mu liina lya Musengwa! Era wa nkabi Kyabazinga wa Isiraeli.”" 
John12:14 Yesu yaafunayo endogoyi ento yaagityamaku nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: 
John12:15 “Imwe abantu b'e Sioni, mutatya! Mubone, Kyabazinga waimwe ali kwidha ng'atyaime ku ndogoyi ento.”" 
John12:16 Ebyo Abeegeresebwa tibaabimanhiragho okutuusa nga Yesu amaze okutuuka mu kitiisa kya Ise, memale agho baidhukira ng'Ebyaghandiikibwa byamwogeraku bityo, era ng'ebyo baabimukolera." 
John12:17 Abantu abaaba ni Yesu bwe yayeta Lazaro okuva mu magombe n'amuzuukiza baakakasa ebyaligho. 
John12:18 Kale eikuukuubira ery'abantu lyaidha okumusangaaza, kuba baawulira nga yakola akamanhiso ako." 
John12:19 Agho Abafarisaayo baakoba bati: “Mubone, titukaasobola kuba ensi yoonayoona eri kuja y'ali!”" 
John12:20 Mperaano, ghaaligho abandi ku Bagureki abaaja ku kibinuko okusinza." 
John12:21 Kale abo baaja ye Filipo ow'e Bethisaida mu Galilaaya baamukoba bati: “Isebo, twenda kubona Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipo yaaja yaakobera Anderea era bombi baaja baakobera Yesu. 
John12:23 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ekiseera kituuse Omwana w'Omuntu agheebwe ekitiisa. 
John12:24 Bwenebwene, ka mbakobere: emuuma y'engaano bw'etagwa mu itaka n'efa esigala bedengedenge, aye bw'efa ereeta ebibala kamaala." 
John12:25 Oyo yeenayeena agonza obulamu bwe abufiirwa. Aye oyo akyagha obulamu bwe mu nsi muno abusigaza okutuuka mu bulamu obutawaagho. 
John12:26 Kiisi ayenda okumpeereza annonerezenga. Ghe mba n'omugheereza wange gh'anaabanga. Era Lata alita oyo yeenayeena ampeereza mu kifo eky'ekitiisa. 
John12:27 “Omwoyo gwange mweraliikirivu. Aye ate nkobe ntya? Nkobe nti: Lata mponia ekiseera kino? Aye ekyandeeta n'ekiseera kino okuntuukaku. 
John12:28 Lata, ta ekitiisa mu liina lyo!” Agho eiroboozi lyava mu igulu lyakoba liti: “Nalitaamu ekitiisa era kabiri ndidha kulitaamu.”" 
John12:29 Eikuukuubira ery'abaali beemereire agho bwe lyawulira lyakoba liti: “Lukuba n'oluli kutyabuka.” Abandi baakoba bati: “Malaika n'ayogeire naye.” 
John12:30 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Eiroboozi eryo liidhie ku lwaimwe aye ti ku lwange. 
John12:31 Kino n'ekiseera okusalira ensi omusango, mperaano abaire afuga ensi eno aja kubingibwa." 
John12:32 Bwe ndighanikibwa okuva ku nsi abantu boonaboona ndibaseesa ye ndi.” 
John12:33 Yayogera ebyo ng'ayoleka ensambo ye yali aja okufaamu. 
John12:34 Eikuukuubira lyamukoba liti: “Amateeka gatukoba gati Kurisito aja kuba mulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Aye iwe otukoba otya oti Omwana w'Omuntu ali n'okughanikibwa? Omwana w'Omuntu ono naani?” 
John12:35 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Ekimuliikirira kiriku mu imwe entangama. Mutambule nga mukaali n'ekimuliikirira, tomanha nzikiiza bw'ebaagaana. Kuba atambula mu nzikiiza tamanha y'aja." 
John12:36 Mwikirize ekimuliikirira nga mukaali n'ekimuliikirira memale mufuuke abaana ab'ekimuliikirira.” Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yavaagho yaaja yaabeegisaaku. 
John12:37 Waire yali akoze obumanhiso kamaala nga babona, tibaamwikiriza." 
John12:38 Isaia omulanzi kye yakoba kyatuukirira, bwe yakoba ati: “Musengwa, naani eyaikiriza obukwenda bwaife? Naani Musengwa ye yayoleka amaani ge?”" 
John12:39 Kale nga tibasobola kwikiriza, kuba era Isaia yakoba ati:" 
John12:40 “Katonda abatuluwaiza, era yaakalangusa emyoyo, balobe kubona na maiso gaibwe, waire kutegeera na myoyo gyaibwe. Ti kulwa nga bagaluka baira ye ndi naabawonia.”" 
John12:41 Isaia yakoba ebyo lwa kuba yabona ekitiisa kye era yaamwogeraku. 
John12:42 Waire ng'abafuzi kamaala baikiriza Yesu, ekyo tibaakyatula olw'okutya Abafarisaayo okubabinga mu sinagoga" 
John12:43 kuba nga bagonza okusiimibwa abantu okusinga okusiimibwa Katonda. 
John12:44 Yesu yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Oyo andhikiriza taikiriza nze, aye aikiriza n'oyo eyantuma," 
John12:45 oyo ambona, abona oyo eyantuma." 
John12:46 Nze naidha mu nsi ng'ekimuliikirira, kiisi andhikiriza alobe kusigala mu nzikiiza." 
John12:47 Omuntu yeenayeena awulira ebibono byange n'atabigema tigumusalira, kuba nze tyaidha kusalira nsi musango aye naidha kugirokola." 
John12:48 Oyo aloba nze era n'asambaadha ebibono byange, ali n'amusalira omusango. Ebibono bye ndhogera n'ebirimusalira omusango ku lunaku olw'ensembo." 
John12:49 Kuba tyayogeranga ku bwange aye Lata eyantuma n'eyampa eby'okwogera n'eby'okukoba. 
John12:50 Era ndidhi ng'ekiragiro kye kino kigha obulamu obutawaagho. Kale ni bye ndhogera mbyogera nga Lata bwe yankoba.” 
John13:1 Mperaano Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa kyali kiri kumpi okutuuka. Yesu yamanha ng'esaawa ye ey'okuva mu nsi okwirayo ye Ise yoona yali etuuse. Bwe yagonza ababe abaali mu nsi yabagonza okutuukiza irala ku nkomerero. 
John13:2 Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be baali balya ekyeigulo, era Sitaani yali amaze okuta mu mwoyo gwa Yuda Isikarioti mutabane wa Simoni ekidhuubo eky'okulya mu Yesu olukwe." 
John13:3 Yesu yali akiidhi nga Lata yata ebintu byonabyona mu buyinza bwe era yali akiidhi nga yava ye Katonda era ng'ali kuja ye Katonda. 
John13:4 Kale yaasituka ku kiiwulo yaisa ghale ebivaalo bye yaagema tawulo yaagyesiba mu nkende. 
John13:5 Agho yaafuka amaadhi mu benseni, yaatoolera okunaaza Abeegeresebwa be ebigere nga bw'abisiimuula n'etawulo ye yali yeesibye mu nkende." 
John13:6 Bwe yatuuka ku Simoni Petero, Petero yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, oja kunaaza nze bigere?”" 
John13:7 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Mperaano iwe totegeera nze kye ndi kukola aye olikitegeera nga bino bibise.” 
John13:8 Petero yairamu ati: “Tikiribaagho iwe okunaaza nze ebigere!” Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Bwe ntakunaaza ng'olwo tokaali mwegeresebwa wange.” 
John13:9 Simoni Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa niini otaannaaza bigere byonka, aye nnaaza n'emikono era n'omutwe!”" 
John13:10 Aye Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Omuntu yeenayeena bw'aba ng'amaze okunaaba aba yeenayeena atukwire era nga tiyeetaaga kabiri kunaaba, okutoolaku ebigere byonka era imwe mutukula, waire ti mwenamwena.”" 
John13:11 Yesu yali amaze okumanha aja okumulyamu olukwe, kyeyava n'akoba ati: “Imwe mutukula, waire ti mwenamwena.”" 
John13:12 Kale bwe yamala okubanaaza ebigere yaatoola ebivaalo bye era yaira ku kiiwulo. Yaababuuza ati: “Kye mbakoze mukitegeera? 
John13:13 Mundheta Omwegeresa era Musengwa, era muli batuufu okundheta mutyo kuba era ekyo kye ndi." 
John13:14 Kale oba nga nze Musengwa era Omwegeresa waimwe mbanaaziiza ebigere, mwena muli n'okunaazaganianga ebigere." 
John13:15 Kuba mbaghaire eky'okuboneraku, mwena mughange okukola nga nze bwe mbakoze." 
John13:16 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: omwiru tasinga Musengwa we, era omutume tasinga oyo amutuma." 
John13:17 Bino bwe muba mubiidhi, muli ba nkabi bwe mubikola." 
John13:18 “Aye tiri kwogera ku imwe mwenamwena, ndidhi abo be nalonda. Aye Ebyaghandiikibwa biri n'okutuukirira, ebikoba biti, ‘Omuntu mwene alya ku mugaati gwange n'anfuukiire omuzigu.’" 
John13:19 Ndi kubakobera bino mperaano nga bikaali kubaagho, lwe biribaagho mukakase muti ninze Oyo." 
John13:20 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: oyo yeenayeena asangaalira ye mba nga ntumye, aba asangaaliire nze. Ate oyo ansangaalira, aba asangaaliire oyo eyantuma.”" 
John13:21 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yaawulira obweraliikirivu mu mwoyo. Agho yaakakasa ati: “Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: ku imwe ghaligho anandyamu olukwe.” 
John13:22 Abeegeresebwa be baalingaganaku, nga beewuunhia naani ye yali ali kwogeraku." 
John13:23 Omwegeresebwa oyo Yesu ye yagonzanga einho yali atyaime kumpi naye. 
John13:24 Simoni Petero yaamusunaku, yaamukoba ati: “Mubuuze, naani y'ali kukoba.”" 
John13:25 Kale, oyo yaaseeta kumpi ni Yesu yaamubuuza ati: “Musengwa, naani?”" 
John13:26 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “N'oyo ye nja okukoleza ekitole kino nkimughe.” Kale bwe yamala okukoza ekitole yaakigha Yuda mutabane wa Simoni Isikarioti. 
John13:27 Yuda bwe yamala ati okufuna ekitole ekyo, Sitaani yamungiramu. Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Ky'oja okukola kikole mangu!”" 
John13:28 Ku baali ku kiiwulo ghazira yamanha lwaki Yesu yamukoba atyo. 
John13:29 Abandi baali badhuuba bati engeri Yuda ye yali omugemi w'endyanga, Yesu yali ali kumukoba kuja kugula bye beetaaga ku kibinuko, oba kubaaku ni ky'agha abaavu." 
John13:30 Kale Yuda bwe yamala okufuna ekitole ekyo yaafuluma ku luya mangu. Bwali bwire. 
John13:31 Yuda bwe yamala okufuluma, Yesu yaakoba ati: “Mperaano Omwana w'Omuntu agheereibwa ekitiisa era mu oyo Katonda agheereibwa ekitiisa." 
John13:32 Oba nga ekitiisa kya Katonda kyeyolekeire mu oyo, Katonda aidha kwolesa ekitiisa ky'oyo mu mwene, aghazira kulwa." 
John13:33 Baana bange, nkaali n'imwe akaseera katono. Mulindhagala, aye nga bwe nakoba Abayudaaya mwena bwe mbakoba buti, ‘Ye nja timughanga kwidhayo.’" 
John13:34 Mbagha ekiragiro ekiyaaka: Mugonzanienga. Nga nze bwe nabagonza, mwena mugonzanienga mutyo." 
John13:35 Kiisi muntu bw'agonzanga mwine, ku ekyo abantu boonaboona kwe balimanhira nga muli beegeresebwa bange.”" 
John13:36 Simoni Petero yaamubuuza ati: “Musengwa olaga gha?” Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Mperaano toghanga kuunonereza ye ndaga, aye oidha kuunonereza ye bwidha.”" 
John13:37 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa lwaki tighanga kukunonereza mperaano? Ndidha kughaayo obulamu bwange ku lulwo!” 
John13:38 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Onaaghaayo obulamu bwo ku lwange? Bwenebwene ka nkukobere: enkoko teidha kukolyoka ng'okaali kuneegaana emikuzi esatu.” 
John14:1 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mutabanga beeraliikirivu mu myoyo gyaimwe. Mwikirize Katonda, zeena mundhikirize." 
John14:2 Mu ndhu ya Lata wange mulimu ebifo kamaala era ndi kuja kubategekera kifo. Nguli ti bwekiri tyandibakobeire kino. 
John14:3 Bwe ndimala okuja n'okubategekera ekifo ndiira naabatwala ye ndi, mwena mwaba ghe ndi." 
John14:4 Engira mugiidhi etuuka ye nja.” 
John14:5 Thomasi yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, titwidhi y'olaga memale tughanga tutya okumanha engira etuukayo?”" 
John14:6 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Ninze engira, ninze amazima, era ninze obulamu. Ezira atuuka ye Lata okutoolaku ng'abise mu nze." 
John14:7 Nguli nze mundidhi ni Lata wange mwandimumanhie, era okuva ni mperaano mumwidhi era mumuboine.”" 
John14:8 Filipo yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, tulage Lata kinaatumala.”" 
John14:9 Yesu yairamu ati: “Filipo mbaire n'imwe okumala entangama, aye era waaba nga tondidhi? Oyo abona nze aba aboine Lata. Memale okoba otya oti, ‘Tulage Lata?’" 
John14:10 Toikiriza nga nze mba mu Lata era ni Lata yaaba mu nze? Ebibono bye mbakoba tibibakoba ku bwange, aye Lata oyo aba mu nze mwene n'akola." 
John14:11 Mwikirize kye mbakoba nti: nze mba mu Lata era ni Lata yaaba mu nze. Oba ng'ekyo tikimala mwikirize olw'ebyo bye nkola. 
John14:12 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: andhikiriza alikola bye nkola ate alikola n'ebisinga agho, kuba nze ndi kuja ye Lata." 
John14:13 Era kyonakyona kye munaasabanga mu liina lyange ndikikola, ekitiisa kya Lata kyeyolekere mu Mwana." 
John14:14 Bwe munaasabanga ekintu kyonakyona mu liina lyange, ndikikola." 
John14:15 “Oba nga mungonza, mugemenga ebiragiro byange." 
John14:16 Zeena ndisaba Lata, era alibagha Omubeezi owundi atalibavaaku ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
John14:17 Ni Mwoyo ow'amazima. Abantu ab'ensi tibasobola kumusangaalira, kuba tibamubona era tibamwidhi. Aye imwe mumwidhi kuba aba n'imwe, era aba mu imwe." 
John14:18 “Tiribaleka nga muli baghafu, ndiira ye muli." 
John14:19 Esigaire akaseera katono ensi erekere okumbona aye nga imwe mumbona. Olw'okuba nze ndi mulamu, mwena mwidha kubanga balamu." 
John14:20 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka mulimanha nga mba mu Lata wange, imwe mwaba mu nze, ate nze naaba mu imwe." 
John14:21 Oyo aganha ebiragiro byange era n'abigema, aba nga n'oyo angonza. Lata wange agonza oyo angonza, zeena naamugonza, era Lata wange oyo amweyolekeramu.”" 
John14:22 Yuda, atali Isikarioti, yaamubuuza ati: “Musengwa, olyeyoleka otya ye tuli n'oteeyoleka eri nsi?”" 
John14:23 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Oyo angonza agema ekibono kyange, oyo Lata wange alimugonza era Lata, ninze tulija y'ali twasiisira eyo." 
John14:24 Oyo atangonza tagema bibono byange. Ate ng'ekibono kye muwulira ti kyange aye kya Lata eyantuma. 
John14:25 “Mbakobeire ebintu bino nga nkaali n'imwe. 
John14:26 Aye omubeezi, Mwoyo Mutukuvu, Lata y'alituma mu liina lyange, alibeegeresa ebintu byonabyona, yaabaidhusa byonabyona bye nabakoba." 
John14:27 “Mbalekeire emiraala, emiraala gyange gyene gye mbaghaire ate tigibaghaire ng'ensi bw'egigaba. Muteeraliikirira mu myoyo gyaimwe waire okutya." 
John14:28 Muwuliire bwe mbakobye nti ndi kuja, aye ndi kwira ye muli. Nguli mubaire mungonza mwandibaire basangaavu olw'okuba ndi kuja ye Lata. Kuba oyo asinga nze." 
John14:29 Mbakobeire ebintu bino nga bikaali kubaagho, lwe biribaagho mwikirize." 
John14:30 Tiidha kwogera bintu kamaala n'imwe kuba omufuzi ow'ensi eno ali kwidha. Aye nze tanfuga. 
John14:31 Aye nkola nga Lata bw'andagira, ensi emanhe nga ngonza Lata. Musituke tuje, tuve ghano.”" 
John15:1 “Ninze omuzabbibu gwenegwene, ate Lata wange n'omulimi." 
John15:2 Kiisi lusaga oluli ku nze olutayama alukutulaku, ate kiisi lusaga olwama aluwoolera lwanhirira male lwayama inho.”" 
John15:3 “Imwe mperaano muli balongoofu olw'ebibono bye mbakoba. 
John15:4 Mube mu nze zeena mbe mu imwe nga tibavaamu. Ng'olusaga bwe lutaghanga kwama nga luli lwonka, okutoolaku nga luli ku muzabbibu, mwena timughanga kwama okutoolaku nga muli mu nze." 
John15:5 “Ninze omuzabbibu, niimwe ensaga. Oyo aba mu nze zeena ni mmubaamu, ayama inho kuba ghazira kye musobola ghe nzira." 
John15:6 Oyo atasigala mu nze asuulibwa ere ng'oti n'olusaga bwe lusuulibwa ere ni lukala ensaga ng'oti n'edho dhisolozebwa dhaasuulibwa mu muliro dhaaya. 
John15:7 Bwe muba mu nze n'ebibono byange ni biba mu imwe, musabenga kyonakyona kye mwenda kinaabakolerwanga." 
John15:8 Bwe mwama einho muba beegeresebwa bange era mwoleka ekitiisa kya Lata wange. 
John15:9 Nga Lata bw'angonza, zeena bwe mbagonza. Mwekalangulire mu mukwano gwange." 
John15:10 Bwe muwulira ebiragiro byange mwidha kwekalangulira mu mukwano gwange oti ninze bwe mpulira ebiragiro bya Lata wange ni neekalangulira mu mukwano gwe. 
John15:11 “Bino mbibakobeire eisanhu lyange libe mu imwe era eisanhu lyaimwe libe nga lituukiriire. 
John15:12 Ekiragiro kyange ni kino: mugonzanienga ng'oti ninze bwe mbagonza. 
John15:13 Ghazira ali na kugonza kusinga kw'oyo aghaayo obulamu bwe ku lwa bakagwa be. 
John15:14 Bwe mukola bye mbalagira muba bakagwa bange. 
John15:15 Tikaabeeta bagheereza, kuba omugheereza tamanha Musengwa we by'akola. Aye mbeeta bakagwa bange, kuba byonabyona bye nawulira okuva ewa Lata wange nabibamanhisa." 
John15:16 Ti niimwe abaanonda aye ninze eyabalonda era naabataagho okuja okwama ebibala, ebibala ebitawaagho. Era Lata anaabaghanga kyonakyona kye munaasabanga mu liina lyange." 
John15:17 Kino kye mbalagira: mugonzanienga.” 
John15:18 “Oba nga ensi ebakyagha, muteerabira nga ninze ensi ye yasooka okukyagha." 
John15:19 Nguli muli ba nsi, ensi yandibagonziiza ng'abaayo. Aye nabalonda okuva mu nsi era timukaali ba nsi, ensi ky'eva n'ebakyagha." 
John15:20 Mwidhukire kye mbakobye: omugheereza tasinga Musengwa we. Oba nga nze bankiriga, mwena balibakiriga; oba nga baawulira ebibono byange, ebyaimwe byona balibiwulira." 
John15:21 Aye balibakola bino byonabyona ku lwange, kuba tibaidhi oyo eyantuma." 
John15:22 Nguli tyaidha ni ndhogera nabo nguli bazira kibi, aye mperaano bazira kya kwegemya." 
John15:23 Akyagha nze, akyagha ni Lata wange yeena." 
John15:24 Nguli tyakola byewuunhio nga babona, omuntu owundi by'atakolangaku, nguli bazira kibi. Aye mperaano baabibona, era baatukyagha twembi nze ni Lata wange." 
John15:25 Kino kyali kiri n'okubaagho okutuukiriza ekyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka gaibwe ekikoba kiti: ‘Bankyayiire busa.’ 
John15:26 “Aye Omubeezi bw'aliidha ye ndibatumira okuva eri Lata, Mwoyo ow'amazima ava mu Lata, oyo alindhulira." 
John15:27 Era mwena mulindhulira kuba mubaire ninze okuviira irala ku ntoolo.” 
John16:1 “Mbakobeire ebintu bino mulobe kuwaamu maani. 
John16:2 Balibabinga mu sinagoga. Ate ekiseera kirituuka oyo abaita lw'alirowooza ati okukola ekyo aba ali kukola mulimo gwa Katonda. 
John16:3 Ebintu bino balibikola olw'okuba tibamanhanga Lata waire nze. 
John16:4 Aye mbakobeire ebintu bino ekiseera kyabyo kije okutuuka nga mwidhukira nga nabibakoberaku.” “Ebintu bino tyabibakobera mu kwinhama kuba nali ndi n'imwe. 
John16:5 Aye mperaano ndi kuja y'oyo eyantuma, era ghazira ku imwe ambuuza ati: ‘Olaga gha?’" 
John16:6 Era olw'okuba mbakobeire ebintu ebyo, enaku ebaidhwire ku mwoyo." 
John16:7 Aye mbakobera amazima: niimwe abaganhulwa bwe nja kuba bwe ntaja Omubeezi taliidha ye muli aye bwe ndija ndimubagheereza. 
John16:8 Era bw'aliidha alirumiriza ensi ku bigema ku kibi, ku butuufu era ni ku kusalirwa omusango." 
John16:9 Aligirumiriza ku bigema ku kibi, kuba tiyandhikiriza." 
John16:10 Aligirumiriza ku bigema ku butuufu, kuba ndi kuja ye Lata era timukairayo kumbona." 
John16:11 Aligirumiriza ku bigema ku kusalirwa omusango, kuba afuga ensi eno yamala ira okusalirwa omusango." 
John16:12 “Nkaali n'ebintu kamaala eby'okubakobera aye timughanga kubigumira mperaano. 
John16:13 Aye oyo bw'aliidha, Mwoyo ow'amazima, alibatuusa ku mazima goonagoona. Talyogera bibye ku bubwe aye by'awulira by'alyogera, era alibakobera eby'okubaagho." 
John16:14 Alyoleka ekitiisa kyange kuba alitoola ebyange yaabibakobera. 
John16:15 Ebya Lata wange byonabyona byange, kye nviire ni nkoba nti Mwoyo alitoola ebyange yaabibakobera." 
John16:16 “Mu ntangama ti ya ghala nga timukambona, ate mu ntangama ntono mulimbona.”" 
John16:17 Abandi ku Beegeresebwa be baatoolera okwebuuzagania bati: “Kiki kino ky'atukoba, ati, ‘Mu kiseera ekitali kya ghala nga timumbona, ate kabiri mu kiseera kitono mulimbona.’ Era ati, ‘Kuba nja ye Lata.’" 
John16:18 Agho baakoba bati, ‘Ategeeza ki bw'akoba ati entangama entono?’ Nga tituli kutegeera ky'akoba!”" 
John16:19 Yesu yaategeera nga bali kwenda kumubuuza, yaabakoba ati: “Muli kwenda kumanha kino kye mbakobye nti, ‘Mu ntangama ntono muliba nga timukambona, ate kabiri nti, mu ntangama ntono mulimbona?’" 
John16:20 Bwenebwene ka mbakobere, mulirira, mwagegenga, aye ensi erisagamba; muliwulira enaku, aye enaku yaimwe erifuuka eisanhu." 
John16:21 Omukazi bw'aba ng'aja okuzaala awulira obulumi kuba ekiseera kye kituuse, aye kasita amala okuzaala omwana, aba nga takaidhukira bulumi olw'eisanhu ery'okuzaala omuntu ku nsi." 
John16:22 Mperaano mwena muwulira, enaku aye ndidha kabiri kubabona era emyoyo gyaimwe gisagambe. Era okusagamba okwo ghazira muntu yeenayeena alikubatoolaku." 
John16:23 Olunaku olwo bwe lulituuka timulimbuuza kintu kyonakyona. Bwenebwene ka mbakobere: Lata alibagha kyonakyona kye mulisaba mu liina lyange. 
John16:24 Ni ye buli eno timusabangaku kintu kyonakyona mu liina lyange. Musabe muligheebwa, okusagamba kwaimwe kwatuukirira." 
John16:25 “Mbairenga nkozesa ndheso okubakobera ebintu bino aye ekiseera kiidha kutuuka mbe nga tikaayogera n'imwe mu ndheso, aye mbakobere busimbalaala ebigema ku Lata." 
John16:26 Ku lunaku olwo mulimusaba mu liina lyange. Era tibakoba nti ndibasabiragho ye Lata. 
John16:27 Lata mwene abagonza, kuba mwangonza era mwaikiriza nga nva wa Katonda." 
John16:28 Nava ewa Lata naidha mu nsi kabiri ndi kuva mu nsi nja ye Lata.” 
John16:29 Abeegeresebwa be baakoba bati: “Mperaano oboneka ni otooleire okwogera obusimbalaala nga tokozeisa ndheso. 
John16:30 Mperaano twidhi nga oidhi byonabyona era tikyetaagisa muntu yeenayeena kukubuuza. Kyetuva twikiriza nga ova wa Katonda.” 
John16:31 Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Mperaano mwikiriza? 
John16:32 Ekiseera kiri kwidha era kituuse musansaanire buli muntu ewuwe mundeke zenka. Ate nga tiri zenka, kuba Lata ali ninze." 
John16:33 Bino mbibakobeire mube miraala mu nze. Mu nsi muno mwidha kufuna ebizibu aye mugumenga, nze mpangwire ensi.”" 
John17:1 Yesu bwe yamala okukoba ebyo, yaalinga ghaigulu yaakoba ati: “Lata, ekiseera kituuse. Yoleka abantu ekitiisa ky'Omwana wo, n'Omwana asobole okubooleka ekitiisa kyo." 
John17:2 Wamugha obukumu ku bantu boonaboona aghe obulamu obutawaagho abo boonaboona be wamugha. 
John17:3 Era obulamu obutawaagho ni buno: Abantu okukumanha iwe wenka Katonda ow'amazima n'oyo ye watuma, Yesu Kurisito." 
John17:4 Ndholeike ekitiisa kyo mu nsi era mmaze okukola ekyo kye wampa okukola. 
John17:5 Era mperaano Lata, yoleka ekitiisa kyange mu maiso go, n'ekitiisa kye nali nakyo n'iwe ng'ensi ekaali kubaagho." 
John17:6 “Abo be wampa okuva mu nsi nabamanhisa eriina lyo. Baali babo, waabampa era baagema ebibono byo." 
John17:7 Mperaano bamanhie nga byonabyona bye wampa byava y'oli. 
John17:8 Kuba ebibono bye wampa mbibakobeire era baabisangaalira. Bamanhie bati bwenebwene nava y'oli era baikiriza nga niiwe owantuma. 
John17:9 “Abo be ndi kusabira. Tiri kusabira ba nsi, aye ndi kusabira abo be wampa, kuba babo." 
John17:10 Abange boonaboona babo era ababo boonaboona bange, era mu abo mwe nfunira ekitiisa." 
John17:11 Nze ndi kwidha y'oli, tikaali mu nsi, aye abo bakaali mu nsi. Lata Omutukuvu, abo be wampa bakuumenga ng'okozesa obukumu obw'eriina lyo eryo, babe kitole oti ninze n'iwe bwe tuli." 
John17:12 “Bwe nali nga ndi nabo, nali nga mbakuuma nga nkozesa obukumu bw'eriina lyo lye wampa. Nabakuuma era ghazira yaghaba okutoolaku oyo eyali ow'okuzikirira, Ebyaghandiikibwa bisobole okutuukirira." 
John17:13 Mperaano ndi kwidha y'oli era bino mbyogeire mu nsi babe n'eisanhu lyange mu myoyo gyaibwe, mu bwidhuvu." 
John17:14 Nze nabakoba ekibono ekyo, era ensi yaabakyagha, kuba ti ba nsi ng'oti ninze bwe ntali wa nsi." 
John17:15 Tiri kukusaba kubatoola mu nsi aye ndi kukusaba obawonie Omubi. 
John17:16 Bano ti ba nsi nga nze bwe ntali wa nsi. 
John17:17 Batukuze n'amazima ekibono kyo n'amazima. 
John17:18 Mbatuma mu nsi ng'oti niiwe bwe wantuma mu nsi. 
John17:19 Nze neeghaayo ku lwaibwe, memale boona beegheeyo mu mazima." 
John17:20 “Tiri kusabira bano bonka aye ndi kusabira n'abo boonaboona abandhikiriza olw'ebibono bya bano. 
John17:21 Boonaboona babe kitole, nga iwe Lata bw'oba mu nze zeena ni mba mu iwe, boona babe mu ife memale ensi eikirize eti niiwe owantuma." 
John17:22 Ekitiisa kye wampa nakibagha memale olwo babe ekitole, nga ife bwe tuli ekitole." 
John17:23 Nze mbabeemu weena obe mu nze memale olwo babeere irala ekitole, n'ensi emanhe nga niiwe owantuma era ng'obagonza nga bw'ongonza." 
John17:24 Lata, kye neegomba n'okuba n'abo be wampa ghe ndi, babone ekitiisa kyange kye wampa, kuba wangonza nga n'ensi ekaali kutondebwa." 
John17:25 Lata Omutukuvu, ensi tekumanhanga aye nze nkwidhi era bano baidhi nga niiwe owantuma." 
John17:26 Nabamanhisa eriina lyo era ndidha kwongera okulimanhisa, okugonza kw'ongonza kubabeemu era zeena mbabeemu.”" 
John18:1 Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaaja n'Abeegeresebwa be, baasomoka akaiga ka Kiduroni. Eyo yaliyo enimiro mwe yangira n'Abeegeresebwa be." 
John18:2 Mperaano, Yuda eyamulyamu olukwe yali aidhiyo bukalamu, kuba Yesu n'Abeegeresebwa be baateranga okujaayo emikuzi kamaala." 
John18:3 Kale Yuda yaaja mu kifo ekyo n'abaisirukale n'abakuumi abaatumibwa Bakabona Abakulu n'Abafarisaayo. Baaja nga bagemye eby'okulwanisa, amataala n'engada edhiri kwaka." 
John18:4 Yesu yamanha byonabyona ebyali bija okumutuukaku, yeesowolayo yaababuuza ati: “Muli kwagala ani?”" 
John18:5 Baamwiramu bati: “Yesu ow'e Nazarethi.” Yesu yaabairamu ati: “Ninze.” Yuda eyamulyamu olukwe yali ayemereire agho nabo. 
John18:6 Yesu bwe yabakoba ati: “Ninze,” beesenda baagwa ghansi." 
John18:7 Kabiri yaababuuza ati: “Muli kwagala ani?” Era bairamu bati: “Yesu ow'e Nazarethi.” 
John18:8 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mbakobeire nti ninze, era oba nga ninze ye muli kwagala bano mubaleke baje.”" 
John18:9 Ekibono kye yayogera ati: “Ku be wampa ghazira ye nabuza,” kyatuukirira." 
John18:10 Agho Simoni Petero eyali n'empiima yaagisowolayo, yaatema omwiru w'Omukulu wa Bakabona yaamukutulaku kutu ow'oku mukono omusaadha. Eriina ery'omwiru oyo nga ni Maluko." 
John18:11 Aye Yesu yaakoba Petero ati: “Empiima yo giize mu kiruutu kyayo. Ekikopo Lata ky'ampaire nnaaloba okukinhwa?” 
John18:12 Agho abaisirukale, n'omukulu waibwe, n'abakuumi b'Abayudaaya baagema Yesu baamusiba." 
John18:13 Baasooka baamutwala ye Anna. Ono n'eyali mukoirume wa Kayafa eyamuzaalira mukazi we, ate Kayafa n'eyali Omukulu wa Bakabona ow'omwaka ogwo." 
John18:14 Kayafa oyo n'eyagha Abayudaaya amagezi ati ekisinga n'omuntu omulala okufiiririra abantu boonaboona. 
John18:15 Simoni Petero yaanonereza Yesu, era ghaabaagho n'Omwegeresebwa owundi eyanonereza. Ono Omwegeresebwa owundi yali amanhiibwa Omukulu wa Bakabona. Kale yangira ni Yesu mu kisaagaati ky'Omukulu wa Bakabona." 
John18:16 Aye Petero yasigala ku luya ku mulyango. Omwegeresebwa ole owundi eyali amanhiibwa yairayo ku mulyango yaayogera n'omugheereza omughala eyali akuuma omulyango, era yaingiza Petero." 
John18:17 Omughala eyali akuuma omulyango yaakoba Petero ati: “Iwe toli Mwegeresebwa wa musaadha ole?” Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Busa, tiri.”" 
John18:18 Ebiseera byali bya kiinhogogo, kale abagheereza n'abakuumi baali bakozeegho omuliro ogw'amanda nga beemereire agho bali kwota. Petero yeena yali ayemereire nabo agho ng'ali kwota." 
John18:19 Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona yaabuuza Yesu ebigema ku Beegeresebwa be, ni ku bye yali ng'ayegeresa." 
John18:20 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Buliidho nayogeranga nga boonaboona babona. Mbairenga nga ndhegereseza mu sinagoga ni mu isinzizo, Abayudaaya boonaboona mwe beesololezanga. Ghazira kye nayogera mu ngiso." 
John18:21 Kale lwaki ombuuza? Buuza abo abaawulira bye nabakoba, baidhi bye nakoba.”" 
John18:22 Yesu bwe yakoba ebyo, omukuumi mulala ku baali beemereire agho yaamukuba oluyi ng'akoba ati: “Otyo bw'oiramu Omukulu wa Bakabona.”" 
John18:23 Yesu yairamu ati: “Oba nga ghaligho ekibi kye nkobye, numiriza. Aye oba nga ndhogeire kituufu, onkubiire ki?”" 
John18:24 Agho Anna yaamugheereza ye Kayafa Omukulu wa Bakabona era ng'akaali musibe. 
John18:25 Mperaano Simoni Petero yali akaayemereire agho ng'ali kwota omuliro. Baamubuuza bati: “Iwe toli Mwegeresebwa wa musaadha oyo?” Petero yeegaana ati: “Busa, tiri.”" 
John18:26 Omugheereza owundi ow'Omukulu wa Bakabona nga wa kika n'ole Petero ye yasalaku kutu yaakoba ati: “Tyakuboine naye mu nimiro?” 
John18:27 Kabiri Petero yeegaana era agho enkoko yaakolyoka. 
John18:28 Obwire nga bwakakya, baatoola Yesu mu ndhu ya Kayafa baamutwala mu kisaagaati ky'omufuzi Omuroma ekyetebwa Puraetorio. Aye beene tibangira mu kisaagaati ekisalirwamu emisango olw'obutenda kwereetaku mbiidhabiidha, basobole okulya ku Kibinuko eky'Okwidhukiriraku Okubitizibwa." 
John18:29 Kale Pilato yaafuluma yaaja ku luya ye baali yaababuuza ati: “Omusaadha ono mumulanga ki?” 
John18:30 Baamwiramu bati: “Nguli ti mukozi wa bibi titwandimughaireyo y'oli.” 
John18:31 Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Mumutwale mumuwozese imwe beene nga mujiira ku mateeka gaimwe.” Abayudaaya baamwiramu bati: “Ife titwikirizibwa kusalira muntu yeenayeena gwa kufa.” 
John18:32 Yesu kye yayogera ku kufa kwe kyatuukirira. 
John18:33 Agho Pilato yangira kabiri mu kisaagaati yaayeta Yesu yaamubuuza ati: “Niiwe Kyabazinga w'Abayudaaya?” 
John18:34 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Ekyo okyogeire ku lulwo, oba ghaligho abakukobeire ebinfaaku?”" 
John18:35 Pilato yaamukoba ati: “Nze ondhese Muyudaaya? Abantu b'eighanga lyo ni Bakabona Abakulu n'abakughaireyo ye ndi okoze ki?” 
John18:36 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwange ti bwa mu nsi muno. Nguli obwakyabazinga bwange bubaire bwa mu nsi muno, abasaadha bange baakalwaine naaloba kugheebwayo mu mikono gya Bayudaaya. Aye obwakyabazinga bwange ti bwa mu nsi muno.”" 
John18:37 Pilato yaamukoba ati: “Ekikoba oli kyabazinga?” Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Okyogeire, ndi kyabazinga. Kino kye nazaalirwa, era ekyandeeta mu nsi ni kino: okumanhisa amazima. Oyo yeenayeena ow'amazima, awulira eiroboozi lyange.”" 
John18:38 Pilato yaamukoba ati: “Amazima ni ki?” Pilato bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yaaja ku luya y'Abayudaaya kabiri yaabakoba ati: “Omuntu ono tibona musango gw'aiziiza. 
John18:39 Aye nga bwe muli n'empisa ey'okubalekulirayo omusibe mulala buli ku Kibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa, mwandyenze mbalekulire Kyabazinga w'abayudaaya?”" 
John18:40 Kabiri bairamu nga baasiikana bati: “Ti oyo, aye Barabba.” Barabba ono yali munhazi." 
John19:1 Agho Pilato yaatwala Yesu amukube enkoba. 
John19:2 Abaisirukale baatoola amawa baagalukamu engule baagamuvaaza ku mutwe era baamuvaaza ekivaalo kya langi ya nakasooma eky'abakungu. 
John19:3 Baatoolera okwidhanga bwe bamukoba bati: “Ghangaala, Kyabazinga w'Abayudaaya!” Era bwebamukuba empi." 
John19:4 Kabiri Pilato yaafuluma ku luya yaabakoba ati: “Wuuno mmubaleeteire ku luya, mubonere irala nga nze tibona musango gw'aiziiza.”" 
John19:5 Kale Yesu yaafuluma ku luya ng'avaire engule ey'amawa n'ekivaalo eky'erangi ya nakasooma eky'abakungu. Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Omuntu wuuno!” 
John19:6 Bakabona Abakulu n'abakuumi bwe baamubona baayasiikana bati: “Mukomerere ku musalaba! Mukomerere ku musalaba!” Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Imwe mumutwale mumukomerere ku musalaba, kuba nze tibona musango gw'aiziiza.”" 
John19:7 Abayudaaya baamwiramu bati: “Ife tuli n'eiteeka era olw'eiteeka eryo agwaine okufa kuba yeefuula okuba Omwana wa Katonda.” 
John19:8 Pilato bwe yawulira ekibono ekyo yeeyongeraku okutya. 
John19:9 Era yangira kabiri mu kisaagaati yaabuuza Yesu ati: “Oli wa gha?” Aye Yesu yaaloba okumwiramu. 
John19:10 Pilato yaamukoba ati: “Toyogera ninze? Toidhi nga ndi n'obukumu obukulekula era n'obukumu obukukomerera ku musalaba.” 
John19:11 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Tiwandibaire na bukumu ku nze nguli tibwakugheebwa Katonda. Kale ampaireyo mu ngalo dho n'ali n'ekibi ekisinga.” 
John19:12 Pilato bwe yawulira ekyo yaagezaaku okusala amagezi amulekule. Aye Abayudaaya baayongera okwasiikana bati: “Bw'olekula omusaadha oyo nga toli mukagwa wa Kaisari. Yeenayeena eyeefuula kyabazinga atakania Kaisari.” 
John19:13 Agho Pilato bwe yawulira ebibono ebyo yaafulumya Yesu era yaatyama ku kityamo eky'obulamuzi mu kifo ekyetebwa Amabaale Amataanhe, ate mu Luheburayi bakyeta Gabbatha." 
John19:14 Lwali lunaku lwa kutegeka Kibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa era esaawa dhaali mukaaga, Pilato yaakoba Abayudaaya ati: “Wuuno kyabazinga waimwe!”" 
John19:15 Bale baayasiikana bati: “Twala ere! Twala ere! Mukomerere ku musalaba!” Pilato yaabakoba ati: “Mwenda nkomerere kyabazinga waimwe ku musalaba?” Bakabona Abakulu baamwiramu bati: “Ife tuzira kyabazinga, okutoolaku Kaisari.”" 
John19:16 Kale agho Pilato yaamubagha baje bamukomerere ku musalaba. Agho ni baagema Yesu, baamutwala." 
John19:17 Yaabbeeda omusalaba gwe mwene, yaafuluma, yaaja mu kifo ekyetebwa eky'Ekighanga, ate mu Luheburayi nga bakyeta Gologotha." 
John19:18 Baamukomerera agho ku musalaba n'abandi babiri ku luuyi ni ku luuyi mwene yaaba ghagati. 
John19:19 Pilato yaakola ekighandiiko yaakita ku musalaba nga kikoba kiti: YESU OW'E NAZARETHI, KYABAZINGA W'ABAYUDAAYA." 
John19:20 Abayudaaya kamaala baakisomaku kuba ekifo kino kyali kumpi n'ekibuga, ate kyaghandiikibwa mu Luheburayi, ni mu Lulatini, ni mu Lugureki." 
John19:21 Bakabona Abakulu baakoba Pilato bati: “Otaghandiika oti, ‘Kyabazinga w'Abayudaaya’, aye ghandiika oti, ‘Ono yeeyeta Kyabazinga w'abayudaaya.’ ”" 
John19:22 Pilato yaabairamu ati: “Kye mpandiise nkighandiise.” 
John19:23 Abaisirukale bwe bamala okukomerera Yesu ku musalaba baatoola ebivaalo bye baabigabaniamu emiteeko ena, kiisi mwisirukale yaafunaku omuteeko. Baatoola n'ekanzu ye eyalukibwa obulukibwe yoonayoona okuva ghaigulu nga muzira lutungo naire." 
John19:24 Abaisirukale baakoba bati: “Tutagikanula aye tugikubeku akalulu tubone anaaba mwene yo.” Era baisania. Kino kyabaagho era okutuukiriza Ebyaghandiikibwa ebikoba biti: “Baagabana ebivaalo byange, era baakuba akalulu ku kidhuuba kyange.” Era ekyo abaisirukale kye baakola." 
John19:25 Inhina ni muganda wa inhina, Maria muka Kilopa, ni Maria Magadalene baali beemereire agho kumpi n'omusalaba kwe yali." 
John19:26 Yesu bwe yabona inhina n'Omwegeresebwa omugonzi nga ayemereire kumpi agho, yaakoba inhina ati: “Mukazi iwe, mutabane wo wuuyo.”" 
John19:27 Era yaakoba Omwegeresebwa oyo ati: “Inhoko wuuyo.” Era okuva ku olwo Omwegeresebwa oyo yaamutwala eka ewuwe. 
John19:28 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yesu ng'akiidhi bukalamu ng'ebintu byonabyona biwoire, era olw'okwenda okutuukiriza Ebyaghandiikibwa yaakoba ati: “Mpulira endiwo.”" 
John19:29 Agho ghaaligho ekidiita nga kiidhwire omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'endoota, kale bainhika ekyangu mu mwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogwo baakita ku luti olwetebwa hissopu, baakimuta ku munwa." 
John19:30 Yesu bwe yamala okugheebwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogwo yaakoba ati: “Biwoire.” Yaakoteka omutwe yaaghaayo omwoyo gwe. 
John19:31 Olunaku lwali lwa kwetegeka. Kale olw'okulobera emirambo okusigala ku misalaba ku lunaku lwa Sabbato ate nga Sabbato eyali eidha yali nkologho, Abayudaaya baaja baasaba Pilato, amagulu g'abaakomererwa ku misalaba gamenhebwe batoolebweku." 
John19:32 Agho ni abaisirukale baidha baamenha amagulu ag'eyasooka n'ag'owokubiri, abaakomererwa ni Yesu." 
John19:33 Aye bwe baatuuka ku Yesu ni babona ng'amaze okufa, baaloba kumumenha magulu." 
John19:34 Aye omwisirukale owundi yaatoola eifumo yaalifumita Yesu mu mbavu, era olwamufumita ati ghaavaagho omusaayi n'amaadhi." 
John19:35 Oyo eyabona kino n'akikakasa era obudhulizi bwe bwa mazima. Aidhi nga by'ayogera bya mazima weena oikirize. 
John19:36 Kuba ebintu bino byabaagho okutuukiriza Ebyaghandiikibwa ebikoba biti: “Talimenhebwa igumba.” 
John19:37 Era kabiri ekyaghandiikibwa ekindi kikoba kiti: “Baliringa ku ole ye baafumita.” 
John19:38 Ebyo bwe byawa, Yosefu ow'Arimathea, eyali omwegeresebwa wa Yesu ow'omu ngiso, olw'okuba yali atya Abayudaaya, yaaja yaasaba Pilato amuganhe okutoolagho omulambo gwa Yesu, era Pilato yaamuganha. Kale yaaja okugutoolagho." 
John19:39 Ni Nikodemo yeena, ole eyaja okubona Yesu obwire, yaaja ni kilo edhighera ng'oti makumi asatu entabule edh'obuwoowo bwa mirra ni alowe." 
John19:40 Agho nga batoola mulambo gwa Yesu, nga baguzinga mu ngoye endheru ghalala n'obuwoowo, ng'empisa ey'Abayudaaya mu kuziika bwe yali." 
John19:41 Mperaano, agho mu kifo ghe baakomerera Yesu ghaaligho enimiro omwali amagombe amayaaka agaali tigateebwangamuuku mufu yeenayeena." 
John19:42 Kale, nga bwe lwali olw'okwetegeka okw'Abayudaaya, ate nga ago amagombe gaali agho kumpi, Yesu baamuta omwo." 
John20:1 Mu nkyonkyo, ku lunaku olwiririra Sabbato, era nga n'enzikiiza ekaaliku, Maria Magadalene yaawuuna ku magombe, yaabona ng'eibaale litooleibwagho ku magombe." 
John20:2 Kale, yaalumuka yaaja ye Simoni Petero n'ole Omwegeresebwa Yesu ye yagonzanga, yaabakobera ati: “Batoire Musengwa mu magombe era titwidhi ghe bamutaire!”" 
John20:3 Agho Petero n'Omwegeresebwa ole owundi baasituka baaja ku magombe. 
John20:4 Bombi baalumuka aye Omwegeresebwa ole owundi yaalumuka inho okusinga Petero, era yaamwesooka okutuuka ku magombe." 
John20:5 Yaakutama, yaalengeza mu magombe, yaabona engoye endheru nga dhiri agho, aye yaaloba kungira." 
John20:6 Simoni Petero yaidha ng'amunonereza, yangira mu magombe era yaabona engoye endheru nga dhiri agho," 
John20:7 n'ekitambaala ekyali ku mutwe gwa Yesu. Tikyali ghalala na ngoye ndheru aye kyali kizinge kyonka. 
John20:8 Agho Omwegeresebwa ole owundi eyasooka Petero okutuuka ku magombe yeena yangira yaabona era yaikiriza. 
John20:9 Kuba mu kiseera ekyo baali bakaali kutegeera Byaghandiikibwa ebikoba biti: “Ali n'okuzuukira mu bafu.” 
John20:10 Agho Abeegeresebwa bairayo eka. 
John20:11 Aye Maria yaayemerera ku luya okw'amagombe ng'ali kulira. Era bwe yali ng'ali kulira yaakutama yaalengeza mu magombe. 
John20:12 Yaabona bamalaika babiri nga bavaire ebyeru nga batyaime aghaali ghateereibwa omulambo gwa Yesu, ng'owundi ali emintwetwe ate ng'owundi ali y'ebigere." 
John20:13 Baamukoba bati: “Mukazi iwe, olirira ki?” Yaabairamu ati: “Batoiremu Musengwa wange era tiidhi ghe bamutaire.”" 
John20:14 Bwe yamala okwogera atyo, yaagaluka yaalinga einhuma we, yaabona Yesu ng'ayemereire agho aye tiyamumanha nga ni Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu yaamubuuza ati: “Mukazi iwe, olirira ki? Naani y'oli kwagala?” Maria yaamudhuubiriza okuba omukuumi w'omu nimiro eyo, kale yaamukoba ati: “Isebo, oba nga niiwe omutoiremu nkobera gh'omutaire, ndidha kumutoolagho.”" 
John20:16 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Maria.” Agho Maria yaagaluka yaamukoba mu Luheburayi ati: “Rabboni,” ekitegeeza, “Omwegeresa!”" 
John20:17 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Otangemaku, kuba nkaali kwirayo ye Lata aye ja ye baganda bange obakobere oti ndi kwirayo ye Lata wange era Lata waibwe, Katonda wange era Katonda waibwe.”" 
John20:18 Kale Maria Magadalene yaaja yaakobera Abeegeresebwa ati aboine Musengwa. Era yaabakobera obukwenda bwe yamukoba okubakoba. 
John20:19 Eigulo ly'olunaku lwene olwo, olwiririra Sabbato, endhigi dhaali nga nsibe Abeegeresebwa ghe baali beesololeiza kuba baali bali kutya Abayudaaya. Yesu yaidha yaabeemereramu ghagati yaabakoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'imwe.”" 
John20:20 Bwe yamala okubakoba atyo yaabooleka obwala bwe n'embavu dhe. Abeegeresebwa be baasangaala bwe baabona Musengwa. 
John20:21 Kabiri Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'imwe. Nga Lata bwe yantuma zeena mbatuma.” 
John20:22 Bwe yamala okubakoba ekyo yaabafuuwaku omuuka yaabakoba ati: “Mufune Mwoyo Mutukuvu. 
John20:23 Kiisi ye munaasonighanga, ebibi bye nga bisoniyiibwa. Ate kiisi ye munaalobanga okusonigha, ebibi bye nga tibisoniyiibwa.”" 
John20:24 Mperaano, owundi ku Ikumi n'Ababiri, Thomasi ayetebwa omulongo, tiyaba nabo Yesu lwe yaidha." 
John20:25 Kale baine baamukobera bati: “Tuboine Musengwa.” Aye yaabairamu ati: “Okutoolaku nga mboine ku nkovu mu bwala bwe mwe baafumita emisumaali, era ni ntaaku olwala lwange mu nkovu omwo, era ni ntaaku omukono gwange mu mbavu dhe, tighanga era tija kwikiriza naire.”" 
John20:26 Bwe ghaabitagho enaku omunaana, kabiri Abeegeresebwa be baali mu ndhu nga ni Thomasi ali nabo era nga n'endhigi ndhigale. Agho Yesu yaidha yaabeemereramu ghagati, yaakoba ati: “Emiraala gibe n'imwe.”" 
John20:27 Agho yaakoba Thomasi ati: “Ta ghano olwala lwo, era obone engalo dhange ogemeku ghano, era leeta omukono gwo ogute mu mbavu dhange. Leka kuba ataikiriza, aye ikiriza.”" 
John20:28 Thomasi yaamwiramu ati: “Musengwa wange era Katonda wange!” 
John20:29 Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Oikiriiza lwa kuba omboine. Ba nkabi abaikiriza nga tibaboineeku.” 
John20:30 Eriyo ebyewuunhio ebindi kamaala Yesu bye yakola ng'Abeegeresebwa be babona ebitaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino. 
John20:31 Aye bino byaghandiikibwa ku lwaimwe, mwikirize nga Yesu ni Kurisito, Omwana wa Katonda, era olw'okwikiriza okwo, mufune obulamu mu liina lye." 
John21:1 Ebyo bwe byawa Yesu yaabonekera kabiri Abeegeresebwa be ku nhandha ey'e Tiberia. Biti bwe byali: 
John21:2 Simoni Petero, ni Thomasi ayetebwa omulongo, ni Nathanaeli eyava e Kana mu Galilaaya, ni batabane ba Zebedaayo, n'Abeegeresebwa abandi babiri, baali bali ghalala." 
John21:3 Simoni Petero yaabakoba ati: “Nja kuvuba.” Bale baamwiramu bati: “Twena ka tuje n'iwe.” Olwo baaniina mu lyato baaja. Aye obwire obwo ghazira kye baagemya. 
John21:4 Bwe bwali bukya Yesu yaayemerera ku mbali okw'enhandha aye baaloba kumumanha bati ni ye. 
John21:5 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Abaana muligho n'eky'okulya?” Bairamu bati: “Busa.” 
John21:6 Yaabakoba ati: “Muwolobe akatimba kaimwe ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha okw'eryato mwidha kugemya.” Kale baawoloba akatimba aye okukaghaluzaayo okukaiza mu lyato kwabakaya olw'ebyenhandha kamaala bye baagemya. 
John21:7 Omwegeresebwa Yesu ye yagonzanga yaakoba Petero ati: “Ni Musengwa.” Petero olwawulira ati ni Musengwa yeesuulaku ekidhuuba, kuba yali madu, yaatuumira mu nhandha." 
John21:8 Aye Abeegeresebwa abandi kuba ti baali ghala n'obukalu, mita ng'oti kikumi, baajiira mu lyato okutuuka ku bukalu nga baghaluza akatimba ak'ebyenhandha." 
John21:9 Bwe baatuuka ku bukalu baabona omuliro ogw'amanda nga kuliku ebyenhandha n'omugaati. 
John21:10 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Muleete ku byenhandha, bye mwakagemya.”" 
John21:11 Simoni Petero yaaja yaaghaluliza akatimba ku bukalu nga kaidhwire ebyenhandha ebibba kikumi n'ataanu na bisatu (153), aye waire byali kamaala bityo akatimba tikaakanuka." 
John21:12 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Mwidhe mulye.” Ghazira ku Beegeresebwa yakana kumubuuza ati: “Niiwe ani?” Kuba baamanha nga ni Musengwa. 
John21:13 Yesu yaidha yatoola omugaati yaagubagha n'ebyenhandha atyo. 
John21:14 Guno n'ogwali omukuzi ogwokusatu Yesu okubonekera Abeegeresebwa be ng'amaze okuzuukira mu bafu. 
John21:15 Bwe baamala okulya, Yesu yaakoba Simoni Petero ati: “Simoni mutabane wa Yoanne, ongonza okusinga bano?” Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Yii, Musengwa oidhi nga bwe nkugonza.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Liisanga entaama dhange ento.”" 
John21:16 Kabiri Yesu yaamukoba omukuzi ogwokubiri ati: “Simoni mutabane wa Yoanne, ongonza?” Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Yii, Musengwa oidhi nga bwe nkugonza.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Yayanga entaama dhange.”" 
John21:17 Kabiri Yesu yaamubuuza omukuzi ogwokusatu ati: “Simoni mutabane wa Yoanne, ongonza?” Petero yaanakughala olwa Yesu okumubuuza omukuzi ogwokusatu ati: “Ongonza?” Era yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, oidhi byonabyona, oidhi nga nkugonza.” Yesu yaamukoba ati: “Liisanga entaama dhange." 
John21:18 Bwenebwene ka nkukobere: bwe wali omwisuka, weesibanga waaja ye wayendanga aye bw'olikairigha olighanika amakono go, owundi yaakusiba yaakutwala y'otayenda.”" 
John21:19 Yayogera atyo okwoleka okufa kw'alifa n'ayolesa ekitiisa kya Katonda. Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaamukoba ati: “Nnonereza.”" 
John21:20 Petero yaagaluka yaabona Omwegeresebwa ole Yesu ye yagonzanga ng'ali kunonereza. Ono n'ole eyaseeta okumpi ni Yesu ku kyeigulo ekyasembayo n'amubuuza ati: “Musengwa, naani aja okukulyamu olukwe?”" 
John21:21 Petero bwe yamubona yaakoba Yesu ati: “Musengwa, ate ono aliba atya?”" 
John21:22 Yesu yaamwiramu ati: “Bwe nhenda abeegho okutuusa lwe ndiidha, ofaayo ki? Iwe nnonereza.”" 
John21:23 Ekibono kino kyasansaanira mu baikiriza ng'abantu bakoba bati Omwegeresebwa oyo ti wa kufa, ate nga Yesu ti yakoba ati ti wa kufa, aye yakoba ati: “Bwe nhenda abeegho okutuusa lwe ndiidha, ofaayo ki?”" 
John21:24 Ono n'Omwegeresebwa omudhulizi w'ebintu bino era eyabighandiika era twidhi ng'obudhulizi bwe bwa mazima. 
John21:25 Era eriyo n'ebintu ebindi kamaala Yesu bye yakola era nguli byonabyona byaghandiikibwa, ndowooza ng'ebitabo ebyandighandiikiibwa tibyandisuze ku nsi kuno." 
Acts1:1 Mukagwa Theofilo, mu kitabo ekisooka nayogera ku byonabyona Yesu bye yatoolera okukola n'okwegeresa" 
Acts1:2 okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yatwalibwa mu igulu, ng'amaze okugha Abatume be yali alonze ebiragiro ku bwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Acts1:3 Abo era be yabonekera mu ngeri kamaala okukakasa nga mulamu, ng'amaze okudaazibwadaazibwa. Yamala enaku amakumi ana (40) nga bamubona era yaabakobera ebigema ku Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
Acts1:4 Bwe baali balya yaabalagira obutava mu Yerusalemu, aye bateegerere Lata kye yasuubiza kye yali abamanhiisaaku ati:" 
Acts1:5 “Yoanne yabatizanga na maadhi aye mu nnaku edhitali dha ghala, mulibatizibwa na Mwoyo Mutukuvu.”" 
Acts1:6 Kale ni, Abatume bwe baali beesoloiza agho, baamubuuza bati: “Musengwa, koodhi mu biseera bino gh'onairizaagho obwakyabazinga bwa Isiraeli?”" 
Acts1:7 Yesu yaabakoba ati: “Ti kyaimwe okumanha entangama n'ekiseera Lata bye yata mu buyinza bwe. 
Acts1:8 Aye mulifuna amaani Mwoyo Mutukuvu lw'alibaidhaku, mwaba badhulizi bange mu Yerusalemu, ni mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, ni mu Samaria, n'okutuusa ensi y'ekoma.”" 
Acts1:9 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaatwalibwa mu igulu nga balingiriire, era ekire kyamutwala okutuusa lwe baalekera okumubona." 
Acts1:10 Bwe baali nga bakaalingiriire engeri yaaniinamu mu igulu, ghaabaagho abasaadha babiri abaayemerera agho ghe baali, nga bavaire byeru," 
Acts1:11 era baakoba bati: “Abasaadha Abagalilaaya, lwaki mwemereire mwalingirira eigulu? Yesu ono abatooleibwaku n'atwalibwa mu igulu, atyo era bw'aliira nga bwe mumuboine ng'aja mu igulu.”" 
Acts1:12 Agho bairayo e Yerusalemu nga bava ku Lusozi olw'Emiti Emyoliva, kumpi ni Yerusalemu, olugendo olugheza kilomita ng'oti ndala." 
Acts1:13 Bwe bangira, baaniina mu kisenge ekya ghaigulu mwe baabanga: Petero ni Yoanne, Yakobo ni Anderea, Filipo ni Thomasi, Barutholomayo ni Matayo, Yakobo mutabane wa Alufaayo ni Simoni Omuzeloti, ni Yuda owa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Bano boonaboona beemalira ku kusaba n'omwoyo mulala, ghalala n'abakazi, ni Maria mukaire wa Yesu, ni baganda be." 
Acts1:15 Mu kiseera n'ekirala, Petero yaayemerera ghagati gh'aboluganda, ekikunsu kyalimu abantu nga kikumi n'abiri, yaakoba ati:" 
Acts1:16 “Baganda bange, ekyaghandiikibwa, Mwoyo Mutukuvu kye yayogeza Daudi ku Yuda, eyakulemberamu abo abaagema Yesu, kigwaine okutuukirizibwa." 
Acts1:17 Yali mulala ku ife ng'agabaine ku mulimo gwaife guno. 
Acts1:18 Ono ni empeera ey'ekibi yagigulamu ekibandha, mwe yagwa n'ayabikamu aghabiri n'ebyenda ni biyuyika." 
Acts1:19 Era abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu boonaboona baakimanha. Ekibandha ekyo kyekyava ni kyetebwa mu lulimi olwaibwe: Akeledama, ekitegeeza ekibandha eky'omusaayi" 
Acts1:20 kuba kyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya Zabbuli kiti, ‘Amaka ge gafuuke ekifulukwa, ghabule agasengamu. Obukulu bwe bugheebwe owundi.’" 
Acts1:21 “Kale ni, mu basaadha bano abaabanga n'ife ekiseera kyonakyona Musengwa Yesu bwe yabanga n'ife," 
Acts1:22 okuviira irala ku kubatizibwa kwa Yoanne okutuuka ku lunaku lwe yatutoolebwaku ng'atwalibwa mu igulu, tufunemu mulala abe n'ife mu kudhulira okuzuukira kwe.”" 
Acts1:23 Ng'agho ni bataagho abantu babiri: Yosefu ayetebwa Barusabba, era eyatuumibwa erya Yusito, ni Matthia." 
Acts1:24 Agho baasaba bati: “Musengwa, oidhi ebiri mu myoyo egy'abantu boonaboona, ku bano bombi tulage y'olonze," 
Acts1:25 atwale ekifo eky'obugheereza n'obutume Yuda kye yaleka memale n'aja mu kifo kye.” 
Acts1:26 Baakuba obululu, akalulu kaagwa ku Matthia, yaabalirwa ku Batume eikumi n'omulala." 
Acts2:1 Agho olunaku lwa Pentekote bwe lwatuuka, Abeegeresebwa boonaboona baali beesololeiza mu kifo kirala." 
Acts2:2 Mu kiseera ekyo kyene, ghaabaagho okuwuuma okuva mu igulu nga kuli ng'oti kwa kiwunga ow'amaani, era kwaidhuza endhu yoonayoona mwe baali batyaime." 
Acts2:3 Baabona enimi ng'edh'omuliro, nga dheetengeike ku buli mulala" 
Acts2:4 era boonaboona baidhula Mwoyo Mutukuvu baatoolera okwogera mu nnimi edhindi, nga Mwoyo bwe yabaghanga okwogera." 
Acts2:5 Mperaano, mu Yerusalemu mwalimu Abayudaaya, n'abaava mu maghanga goonagoona agali ghansi gh'eigulu, nga basaadha baidhumbize ba idiini." 
Acts2:6 Kale ni okuwuuma okwo bwe kwabaagho, eikuukuubira lyesoloza era batabulwa inho, kuba buli mulala yabawulira nga boogera mu lulimi lwe lwene." 
Acts2:7 Baayasaamirira era beewuunhia nga bakoba bati: “Bano boonaboona aboogera ti Bagalilaaya? 
Acts2:8 Kisoboka kitya ife buli mulala, okubawulira mu lulimi lwe oluzaaliranwa?" 
Acts2:9 Abaparithi, Abamedi, Abelami ab'omu Mesopotamia, ni mu Buyudaaya, ni mu Kappadokia, ni mu Ponto, ni mu Asia." 
Acts2:10 Ni mu Furugia, ni mu Panfilia, ni mu Misiri, ni mu biketezo bya Libya ebiriinaine Kurene, ng'otaireku n'Abaroma abageni" 
Acts2:11 Abayudaaya n'abamaghanga agandi abaakyuka, Abakurete n'Abawarabu, twenatwena twabawulira nga boogera eby'amaani Katonda by'akoze mu nnimi dhaife!”" 
Acts2:12 Baayasaamirira boonaboona era baasoberwa, beebuuzagania bati: “Kino kitegeeza ki?”" 
Acts2:13 Aye abandi baakoba bati: “Abo batamiire mwenge musu!” 
Acts2:14 Agho Petero yaayemerera, ng'ali ghalala n'eikumi n'omulala, yaakangula ku mamiro yaabakoba ati: “Imwe abasaadha Abayudaaya n'imwe mwenamwena ababa mu Yerusalemu, mumanhe kino era muntegere ku matu." 
Acts2:15 Bano ti batamiivu nga bwe mudhuuba, kuba dhiri bwa saawa isatu edh'enkyo." 
Acts2:16 Aye kino Yoeli omulanzi kye yalanga ati," 
Acts2:17 ‘Katonda akoba ati ku nkomerero kino n'ekiribaagho: Ndiyugha ku bantu boonaboona Mwoyo wange. Batabane baimwe ni baghala baimwe baliranga ekiribaagho, n'abaisuka baimwe balibonekerwa, n'abakaire mu imwe baliroota ebirooto." 
Acts2:18 Mu nnaku edho, abagheereza bange abasaadha n'abakazi, ndibayughaku Mwoyo wange, baalanga eby'okubaagho." 
Acts2:19 Ndiraga ebyewuninkiriza eyo ghaigulu mu igulu, n'ebyewuunhio ghansi ku nsi. Ghalibaagho omusaayi, omuliro, n'omwosi ogunioka." 
Acts2:20 Endhuba erizikira, Omwezi gwamyuka oti musaayi, memale olunaku lwa Musengwa olukulu era olw'ekitiisa lwatuuka." 
Acts2:21 Era buli alyeta eriina lya Musengwa alirokolwa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Imwe abasaadha Abaisiraeli, muwulire ebibono bino: Yesu ow'e Nazarethi, n'omusaadha Katonda ye yakakalisa mu imwe n'eby'amaani, n'ebyewuninkiriza, n'obumanhiso, bye yamukozesanga mu imwe, era nga beene imwe bwe mwidhi." 
Acts2:23 Ono yabagheebwa nga Katonda amaze okukiteesa n'okukimanha, era imwe mwakozesa ababi okumwita nga bamukomerera ku musalaba." 
Acts2:24 Aye oyo Katonda yamuzuukiza yaamutoola mu bulumi obw'okufa, nga tikisoboka oyo kusigala mu maani ga kufa" 
Acts2:25 kuba Daudi yamwogeraku ati, ‘Musengwa namulingiriranga buli lunaku, kuba andi ku mukono gwange omusaadha ndobe kulugaaluga." 
Acts2:26 Agho ni omwoyo gwange gwasangaala, n'olulimi lwange lwasagamba n'omubiri gwange guwuumuliire mu kusuubira;" 
Acts2:27 kuba oyo talireka mwoyo gwange mu kuzikirira, waire okuleka omutuukirivu we okuvundira mu magombe." 
Acts2:28 Wandhegeresa engira edh'obulamu, ndisangaala nga nkuli mu maiso.’" 
Acts2:29 “Baganda bange, ndidha kwogera ku dhaadha Daudi nga titya. Yafa yaaziikibwa n'amagombe ge gali ghano n'okutuusa olwaleero." 
Acts2:30 Kale ni yali mulanzi yaamanha Katonda kye yeelayirira mwene ng'amusuubiza ati mulala ku baidhukulu be beene alityama ku kityamo kye. 
Acts2:31 Kye yalengera naayogeraku, kwali kuzuukira kwa Kurisito, kuba tiyalekebwa mu magombe waire omubiri gwe okuvunda." 
Acts2:32 Yesu ono, Katonda yamuzuukiza, era twenatwena tuli badhulizi b'ekyo." 
Acts2:33 Mperaano, bwe yamala okuniinisibwa ku mukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda, era n'okufuna Mwoyo Mutukuvu, eyamusuubizibwa Katonda Lata, n'okutugha ekirabo kino kye muli kubona era kye muli kuwulira." 
Acts2:34 Kuba Daudi tiyaniina mu igulu, aye mwene oyo n'eyakoba ati: ‘Musengwa Katonda yakoba Musengwa wange ati: Tyama ku mukono gwange omusaadha," 
Acts2:35 okutuusa bwe ndita abazigu bo ghansi gh'ebigere byo.’ 
Acts2:36 “Kale ni, endhu ya Isiraeli yoonayoona emanhe aghazira kubuusabuusa, nga Katonda yafuula, Yesu oyo ye mwakomerera ku musalaba, Musengwa era Kurisito.”" 
Acts2:37 Ebyo bye baawulira byabafumita ku myoyo, baakoba Petero n'Abatume abandi bati: “Baganda baife, tukole ki?”" 
Acts2:38 Petero yaabakoba ati: “Mwenenie, buli muntu abatizibwe mu liina lya Yesu Kurisito, ebibi byaimwe bisoniyibwe, era mwidha kufuna ekirabo kya Mwoyo Mutukuvu" 
Acts2:39 kuba ekisuubizo kya Katonda kyaimwe n'abaana baimwe, n'abo boonaboona abali eghala, boonaboona Musengwa Katonda waife oyo b'aba ng'ayese.”" 
Acts2:40 Era yaayongera okubakobera ebindi kamaala, yaabakubiriza ng'abakoba ati: “Mwewonie ebikolwa eby'oluse luno olubi.”" 
Acts2:41 Abo abaasangaalira ebibono bye, baabatizibwa, era ku lunaku olwo, ku baikiriza kweyongeraku abantu ng'enkumi isatu." 
Acts2:42 Beekalangulira mu kwegeresebwa kw'Abatume, ni mu kwisa ekirala, mu kumegula omugaati, ni mu kusaba." 
Acts2:43 Abatume baakola ebyewuunhio kamaala n'obumanhiso, era buli muntu yaatya Katonda." 
Acts2:44 Abaikiriza boonaboona baabanga ghalala, n'ebyaibwe byonabyona nga babita ghalala." 
Acts2:45 Baatundanga eitaka n'ebyaibwe, ebyavangamu baabigabananga boonaboona, nga bajiira ku bwetaavu bwa buli muntu." 
Acts2:46 Baafubanga buli lunaku okuba aghalala mu isinzizo, era baajanga mu ndhu dhaibwe okumegula omugaati. Emere nga bagiriisa isanhu na kwisania" 
Acts2:47 nga basaaka Katonda, era abantu boonaboona nga babenda. Buli lunaku, Musengwa yaaja ng'abongeraku abaalokolwanga." 
Acts3:1 Agho olwatuuka Petero ni Yoanne baaniinaniina okuja mu isinzizo ku saawa omwenda, esaawa ey'okusaba." 
Acts3:2 Ghaabaagho omusaadha ye baali basitwire, nga mulema okuva lwe yava mu nda ya inhina, era buli lunaku yabanga agho ku mulyango ogw'eisinzizo, ogwetebwa Omulungi, ng'asabiriza empiiya ku bangira mu isinzizo." 
Acts3:3 Ono bwe yabona Petero ni Yoanne nga bali kumpi okwingira mu isinzizo, yaabasaba bamufunireyo ku mpiiya." 
Acts3:4 Petero yaamwekalirisa ni Yoanne. Agho Petero yaamukoba ati: “Tulingirire.” 
Acts3:5 Yeena yaabalingirira, ng'asuubira okufunayo akantu." 
Acts3:6 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Feeza ni zaabu nzira aye kye ndi nakyo kye nkugha. Mu liina lya Yesu Kurisito ow'e Nazarethi situka otambule.” 
Acts3:7 Yaamugema ku mukono omusaadha, yaamusitula. Era mangu ago nga ebigere bye n'enhingo bikakata." 
Acts3:8 Olwasituka yaayemerera, yaatambula yangira nabo mu isinzizo ng'ali kutambula bw'atuumatuuma era ng'asaaka Katonda." 
Acts3:9 Abantu boonaboona baamubona ng'atambula ng'asaaka Katonda. 
Acts3:10 Baamumanha nga n'oyo eyatyamanga ku Mulyango Omulungi ogw'eisinzizo ng'asabiriza empiiya. Beewuunhia inho era baayasaamirira olw'ekyali kimukoleibwaku. 
Acts3:11 Bwe yali ng'akeegemye ku Petero ni Yoanne, abantu boonaboona baalumuka baidha ghe baali ku lubalaza olwetebwa olwa Solomoni, nga bayasaamiriire." 
Acts3:12 Petero bwe yabona abantu abo yaabakoba ati: “Abasaadha Abaisiraeli, lwaki kino mukyewuunhia? Lwaki mutulingirira mutyo ng'oti maani gaife na butuukirivu bwaife n'ebitambwiza ono?" 
Acts3:13 Katonda wa Aburahamu, Katonda wa Isaaka, Katonda wa Yakobo, Katonda wa badhaadha baife, n'agulumiiza Omwana we Yesu, oyo ye mwaghaayo era ni mumwegaana mu maiso ga Pilato, bwe yali asazeegho okumulekula." 
Acts3:14 Imwe mwegaana omutuukirivu era ow'amazima, mwasaba babalekulire omutemo." 
Acts3:15 Mwaita mwene bulamu, oyo Katonda ye yazuukiza mu bafu, era ife tuli badhulizi b'ekyo." 
Acts3:16 Ate olw'okwikiriza, eriina lye kye liviire liwonia ono ye mubona era ye mwidhi. Okwikiriza oyo, n'okumughaire okuwonera irala nga mwenamwena bwe mubona." 
Acts3:17 “Kale aboluganda, ndidhi nga imwe n'abafuzi baimwe ekyo mwakikola mu butamanha." 
Acts3:18 Aye Katonda kye yalangirira ng'abita mu balanzi be boonaboona ati Kurisito we, yali waakudaagadaaga, yakituukiriza atyo." 
Acts3:19 Kale mwenenie, mukyuke memale ebibi byaimwe bisoniyibwe." 
Acts3:20 Mufune obwire obw'okwesiima mu maiso ga Musengwa, era olwo abasindikire Kurisito Yesu oyo ye yabategekera okuva eira." 
Acts3:21 Waire nga kimugwaniire oyo buti okuba ng'akaali mu igulu okutuusa ekiseera eky'okwiza byonabyona obuyaaka nga Katonda bwe yayogerera mu balanzi be abatuukirivu okuviira irala mu mainhama. 
Acts3:22 Kuba Musa bwenebwene yakoba ati, ‘Katonda Musengwa alibafunira omulanzi mu baganda baimwe, nga nze. Mumuwuliranga mu byonabyona by'abakoba." 
Acts3:23 Era kiisi muntu atawulira mulanzi oyo alitoolebwa mu bantu yazikirizibwa.’ 
Acts3:24 Era n'abalanzi boonaboona abaayogera, okuva ku Samueli, n'abaamwiririra, enaku dhino baadhiranga." 
Acts3:25 Niimwe abaana ab'abalanzi era ab'endagaano Katonda ye yakola ni badhaadha baife ng'ekoba Aburahamu eti ‘Mu izaire lyo amaghanga goonagoona mwe galifunira enkabi.’ 
Acts3:26 Agho ni, Katonda bwe yalonda Omwana we, yasooka kumutuma ye imwe abaghe enkabi nga buli mulala akyuka yaaleka ebibi bye.”" 
Acts4:1 Baali nga bakaayogera eri abantu, bakabona n'omukulu ow'abakuumi ab'eisinzizo, n'Abasaddukaayo baatuuka" 
Acts4:2 nga basungughavu inho, kuba bano baali bali kusomesa abantu nga bw'eriyo okuzuukira mu bafu, nga babakobera ku kuzuukira kwa Yesu." 
Acts4:3 Agho ni baabagema baabata mu ikomera okutuusa ku lunaku olwairirira, kuba obwire bwali buzibye." 
Acts4:4 Aye abantu kamaala ku baawulira ebibono ebyayegeresebwa baikiriza. Omughendo ogw'abasaadha gwali ng'enkumi itaanu (5,000)." 
Acts4:5 Agho bwakya abafuzi baibwe, n'abakulu ab'ebika, n'Abanamateeka beesololeza mu Yerusalemu" 
Acts4:6 okwo taaku Anna Omukulu wa Bakabona, ni Kayafa ni Yoanne ni Alekisandero, ni boonaboona ab'omu kika kya Bakabona." 
Acts4:7 Bwe baamala okubeemereza ghagati, baababuuza bati: “Maani g'ani ge mukozesa, era naani eyabagha okukola ekyo?”" 
Acts4:8 Agho Petero ng'aidhwire Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaabairamu ati: “Imwe abafuzi ab'eighanga n'abakulu ab'ebika," 
Acts4:9 oba nga tuli kuwozesebwa olwaleero olw'ekikolwa ekikalamu kye tukoleire omuntu omulema, n'ensambo ye y'awonezeibwamu," 
Acts4:10 imwe mwenamwena n'abantu ba Isiraeli boonaboona, kino mugwaine mukimanhe nga mu liina lya Yesu Kurisito Omunazarethi, ye mwakomerera ku musalaba, Katonda yamuzuukiza mu bafu, ono n'okwemerera ghano mu maiso gaimwe nga mulamu yeenayeena." 
Acts4:11 Yesu ono n'eibaale imwe abazimbi lye mwaloba muti lizira mugaso, eryafuuka empango ey'omusingi mu nsonda." 
Acts4:12 Okulokolebwa kufunirwa mu oyo yenka, ghazira wundi asobola kulokolerwamu, kuba naire mu maina agagheebwa abantu ghansi gh'eigulu, ghazira lye tusobola kulokolerwamu.”" 
Acts4:13 Bwe baabona obugumu bwa Petero ni Yoanne, nga bamaze okumanha bati baali bantu abataasoma era ababuliidho, beewuunhia inho era baabategeera bati baali baba ni Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Era bwe baabona omusaadha eyawonezebwa ng'ayemereire ghe bali, baabulwa kye bakoba." 
Acts4:15 Bwe baamala okubalagira ni bava mu mbuga, beene baasigala beegeyaamu." 
Acts4:16 Baakoba bati: “Abantu bano tubakolere ki? Kuba bwenebwene ekyewuunhio ekyaga agho bakikoze, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu boonaboona bakiboine, era ekyo titusobola kukiroba." 
Acts4:17 Aye tomanha bwe bakisansaania mu bantu bandi. Ka tubatiise nga bukaali balobe kwiramu kwogera na muntu yeenayeena mu liina eryo.” 
Acts4:18 Agho baabeeta, baabakoba obutairayo kwogera oba okwegeresa mu liina lya Yesu." 
Acts4:19 Aye Petero ni Yoanne bairamu baakoba bati: “Imwe beene musalegho: Oba nga kituufu mu maiso ga Katonda ife okuwulira imwe ni tutawulira Katonda. 
Acts4:20 Kuba ife titughanga naire butayogera bye twabona ni bye twawulira.” 
Acts4:21 Bwe baamala okwongera okubatiisatiisa baabalekula, nga tibabona ngeri yaakubabonereza, olw'abantu kuba abantu boonaboona baali bagha Katonda ekitiisa olw'ekyo ekyali kibairegho." 
Acts4:22 Omusaadha eyakolerwa ekyewuunhio ekyo eky'okuwonezebwa, yali aswisiiza mu myaka amakumi ana (40) egy'obukulu." 
Acts4:23 Petero ni Yoanne bwe baalekulwa, baaja ye banaibwe baabakobera ebyo Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika bye baakoba." 
Acts4:24 Abaikiriza boonaboona olwabiwulira, baasaba Katonda nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa, niiwe eyakola eigulu, n'ensi, n'enhandha, ni byonabyona ebirimu." 
Acts4:25 Niiwe ku bwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu eyayogerera mu dhaadha waife Daudi omugheereza wo oti, ‘Lwaki abamaghanga agandi beenhiinkaire n'abantu ni baalowooza ebiziramu?" 
Acts4:26 Bakyabazinga ab'ensi baasituka, n'abafuzi beesoloza ghalala okulwanisa Musengwa ni Kurisito we.’" 
Acts4:27 Bwenebwene Herode, ni Pilato, n'abamaghanga agandi, n'abantu ba Isiraeli, mu kibuga kino mwe beesololeza okulwanisa Yesu Omwana wo omutukuvu ye wasiiga omuzigo." 
Acts4:28 Baakola, ebyo bye watereeza mu maani go n'amagezi go nga biri n'okubaagho." 
Acts4:29 Mperaano ni, Musengwa, bona okutiisatiisa kwaibwe, era gha abagheereza bo okwogera ekibono kyo n'obugumu bwonabwona." 
Acts4:30 Golola omukono gwo owonie, era obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio bikolebwe mu liina lya Yesu Omugheereza wo omutukuvu.”" 
Acts4:31 Bwe baamala okusaba, ekifo ghe baali beesololeiza kyatengeesebwa, boonaboona baidhula Mwoyo Mutukuvu, baayogera ekibono kya Katonda nga bagumu." 
Acts4:32 Abo boonaboona abaali baikiriza, baali n'omutima n'omwoyo mulala. Era nga ghazira akoba ku ebyo bye yabanga nabyo ati kuliku ekikye ku bubwe. Aye nga byonabyona byaibwe ghalala." 
Acts4:33 Abatume baakakasa okuzuukira kwa Musengwa Yesu n'amaani mangi, ni Katonda yaabagha boonaboona enkabi kamaala." 
Acts4:34 Tibaabanga na muntu ateesobola, kuba abaabanga n'ebibandha oba n'endhu nga babitunda, baaleeta ebyavangamu" 
Acts4:35 baabigemya Abatume, buli mulala baamugabira nga bajiira ku bwetaavu bwe yabanga nabwo." 
Acts4:36 Ni Yosefu, Abatume ye baatuuma erya Barunaba (ekitegeeza: “Omwana aizaamu amaani”) Omulevi, nga wa mu ighanga ly'e Kupuro," 
Acts4:37 yali n'ekibandha yaakitunda yaaleeta ebyavaamu yaabigemya Abatume. 
Acts5:1 Aye ghaaligho omusaadha nga eriina lye ni Anania ng'ali ni mukazi we Safira, yaatunda ekibandha." 
Acts5:2 Ekimega ku byavaamu yaakisigaza nga mukazi we aidhi, yaaleetaku ekimega yaakigemya Abatume." 
Acts5:3 Aye Petero yaakoba ati: “Lwaki oganhie Sitaani okukufuga waasubagha Mwoyo Mutukuvu, waasigaza ekitundu ku by'otunze mu kibandha kyo?" 
Acts5:4 Bw'obaire okaali kutunda kibandha kyo, tikibaire kikyo? Ate bw'omaze okukitunda, ebiviiremu tibibaire bibyo? Memale lwaki ekintu ng'oti n'ekyo kikwidhie mu mwoyo gwo? Tosubaighe bantu, osubaighe Katonda.”" 
Acts5:5 Anania olwawulira ebibono ebyo, yaagwa yaafa. Boonaboona abaakiwulira baatya inho." 
Acts5:6 Abaisuka baasituka baazinga omulambo baagutwala baaguziika. 
Acts5:7 Nga ghabiseegho esaawa ng'oti isatu, mukazi we yangira, aye nga taidhi bibairegho." 
Acts5:8 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Bino ni byonka bye mwatunze mu kibandha?” Yairamu ati: “N'ebyo.” 
Acts5:9 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Ekikoba mwaisania okuleba Mwoyo wa Musengwa? Oli kuwulira, abaziise balo bali ku mulyango, weena baidha kukutwala.”" 
Acts5:10 Mangu ago yaagwa aghali Petero yaafa. Abaisuka bwe baidha baayagaana nga mufu, baamutwala baamuziika okuliiraana n'iba." 
Acts5:11 Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito n'abandi boonaboona abaawulira bino baatya inho. 
Acts5:12 Abatume baakola ebyewuunhio kamaala n'ebyewuninkiriza mu bantu. Boonaboona beesololezanga ku lubalaza olwetebwa olwa Solomoni. 
Acts5:13 Waire ng'abantu boonaboona baali babaisaamu ekitiisa, ng'ezira akana kubeeyimbaku." 
Acts5:14 Aye abaikiriza mu Musengwa, abasaadha n'abakazi, baaja nga beeyongera." 
Acts5:15 Baaleetanga abalwaire ku nguudo abali ku ndiri ni ku mikeeka, bwe kiba nga kisoboka ekinsense kya Petero bw'aba ng'abita, kibatuukeku." 
Acts5:16 Abantu okuva mu bibuga ebyezungulwire Yerusalemu beesoloza nga baleeta abalwaire, n'abaliku emizimu emibi, era boonaboona baawonezebwa." 
Acts5:17 Omukulu wa Bakabona ni baine, ab'ekikunsu ky'Abasaddukaayo, baagemwa ensaalwa," 
Acts5:18 baagema Abatume baabata mu ikomera ery'abantu boonaboona. 
Acts5:19 Aye obwire, malaika wa Musengwa yaigulagho endhigi edh'eikomera yaabafulumya ng'abakoba ati:" 
Acts5:20 “Muje mugheereze mu isinzizo mukobere abantu ebibono byonabyona eby'Obulamu buno.”
