Acts5:21 Bwe baawulira bino, baaja mu isinzizo mu nkyonkyo baayegeresa. Mperaano Omukulu wa Bakabona n'abo be yali nabo baatyamya olwekobaano n'abakulu ab'ebika ebya Isiraeli, baatuma banone Abatume mu ikomera." 
Acts5:22 Abaatumibwa bwe baaja, baaloba kubaagaanayo mu ikomera, bairayo baakobera abaabatuma bati:" 
Acts5:23 “Twagaine eikomera nga isibe bukalamu era nga n'abakuumi beemereire agho ku miryango, aye bwe twigwiregho titwagainemu muntu naire.”" 
Acts5:24 Omukulu ow'abakuumi ab'eisinzizo ni Bakabona Abakulu bwe baawulira ebibono bino byabasobera era baasigala nga beewuunhia kino kye kitegeeza. 
Acts5:25 Ghaabaagho eyaidha yaabakoba ati: “Abasaadha be mwataire mu ikomera baabale mu isinzizo bali kwegeresa abantu.” 
Acts5:26 Agho omukulu ow'abakuumi yaaja n'abasaadha be, baaleeta Abatume, aye nga tibakozeisa maani, kuba baatya abantu okubakuba amabaale." 
Acts5:27 Bwe baabatuusa, baabasimba mu maiso g'olwekobaano. Omukulu wa Bakabona yaabakoba ati:" 
Acts5:28 “Twabasikirira obuteegeresa bibono bya musaadha oyo, aye mperaano mubone kye mukoze! Mwegereisa mu Yerusalemu mwonamwona era mwenda na kututaaku musango gwa kwita musaadha oyo.”" 
Acts5:29 Petero n'Abatume bairamu bati: “Tuli na kuwulira Katonda, ti bantu." 
Acts5:30 Katonda wa badhaadha baife yazuukiza Yesu ye mwakomerera ku musalaba n'afa. 
Acts5:31 Katonda yamuta ku luuyi olw'omukono gwe omusaadha yaamufuula omufuzi era omununuzi, okusobozesa Abaisiraeli okwenenia basoniyibwe ebibi byaibwe." 
Acts5:32 Ife, ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu Katonda y'agha abo abamuwulira, tuli badhulizi ba bintu bino.”" 
Acts5:33 Abakiise bwe baawulira kino baasungughala inho era baayenda na kubaita. 
Acts5:34 Aye ghaabaagho Omufarisaayo ku lwekobaano ayetebwa Gamalieli. Ono yali Mwegeresa wa Mateeka nga musaadha wa kitiisa mu bantu boonaboona. 
Acts5:35 Yaayemerera yaakoba ati: “Baganda bange Abaisiraeli, mwegendereze kye mukola abantu bano." 
Acts5:36 Kuba mwidhukire nga ghaaligho Theudasi eyeeyeta ow'amaani era abantu ng'ebikumi bina (400) baamweyimbaku, aye yaitibwa n'abo abaali bamunonereza baasansaana, yaazikirira." 
Acts5:37 Ghaidhagho Yuda Omugalilaaya mu byanda eby'okweghandiisa, abantu kamaala baamunonereza. Yeena yaazikirira, era boonaboona abaali bamunonereza baasansaana." 
Acts5:38 Kale ni ku kino, ka mbakobere: Muleke abasaadha bano, mubaviireku irala. Bino bye bali kukola bwe biba bya bantu buntu, biidha kufaagho," 
Acts5:39 aye bwe biba bya Katonda timuusobole kubaghangula. Mughanga okweyagaana nga muli kutakania Katonda.” Baaganha amagezi ge. 
Acts5:40 Baayeta Abatume, baabakuba, baabasikirira obutairayo kwogera ku Yesu, baabalekula." 
Acts5:41 Abatume baava mu lwekobaano nga basangaavu kuba Katonda yabona nga bagwaine okudaazibwadaazibwa ku lwa Yesu. 
Acts5:42 Era buli lunaku tibaalekeranga kwegeresa na kulangirira mu isinzizo ni mu maka nga Yesu ni Kurisito. 
Acts6:1 Ebiseera byatuuka abeegeresebwa baaja nga beeyongera obungi. Ghaabaagho obutaisania ghagati w'abayudaaya aboogera Olugureki n'Abayudaaya aboogera Oluyudaaya. Kuba Abayudaaya aboogera Olugureki baali baduuduuma bati banamwandu baibwe baali tibafiibwaku mu ngabania ey'ebyetaago ebyabuliidho. 
Acts6:2 Agho Eikumi n'Ababiri baayeta ekikunsu kyonakyona eky'abeegeresebwa baakoba bati: “Ti kituufu ife okuleka okwegeresa ekibono kya Katonda, twaira ku gwa kugaba mere." 
Acts6:3 Kale ni baganda bange, mwerondemu abasaadha musanvu abatuufu, abaidhwire Mwoyo Mutukuvu, ab'amagezi, be tughanga okugemya omulimo ogwo." 
Acts6:4 Ife twidha kusigala ku kusaba na kwegeresa kibono kya Katonda.” 
Acts6:5 Ekidhuubo kino boonaboona baakisemba, baalonda Sitefano, omusaadha aidhwire okwikiriza ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu, ni Filipo, ni Purokoro, ni Nikanori, ni Timoni, ni Parumena, ni Nikolao ow'e Antiokia eyali akyuse n'asoma Ekiyudaaya." 
Acts6:6 Bano baabaleeta y'Abatume abaabasabira ni babaisaaku n'emikono. 
Acts6:7 Ekibono kya Katonda kyayongera okusansaana, abeegeresebwa beeyongera obungi mu Yerusalemu, ni bakabona kamaala baikiriza." 
Acts6:8 Sitefano ng'aidhwire enkabi n'amaani ga Katonda yaakola ebyewuunhio n'ebyamagero mu bantu. 
Acts6:9 Kale abantu abandi ku b'omu sinagoga ey'abaaliku abairu ab'omu Kurene n'ab'omu Alekisanderia, n'abaava mu Kilikia ni mu Asia, baatoolera okutakana ni Sitefano." 
Acts6:10 Aye tibaamusobola olw'amagezi aga Mwoyo eyamwogererangamu. 
Acts6:11 Agho baaba n'abasaadha, be baapikiriza abaakoba bati: “Twamuwulira ng'avuma Musa ni Katonda.”" 
Acts6:12 Kale baasasamaza abantu, n'abakulu ab'ebika, n'Abanamateeka, era baamugema baamuleeta mu lwekobaano." 
Acts6:13 Baamusimbaku abadhulizi abaguya abaakoba bati: “Omusaadha ono talekera kwogera bibono bivumirira kifo kitukuvu n'Amateeka 
Acts6:14 kuba twamuwulira ng'akoba ati: Yesu ow'e Nazarethi aidha kuzikiriza ekifo kino, akyuse n'empisa Musa ye yatwegeresa.”" 
Acts6:15 Abo boonaboona abaali batyaime mu lwekobaano bwe baalingirira Sitefano, baabona nga mu maiso ali ng'oti malaika." 
Acts7:1 Agho Omukulu wa Bakabona yaakoba ati: “Bityo bwe biri?” 
Acts7:2 Sitefano yaakoba ati: “Balata ni baganda bange mumpulirise. Katonda ow'ekitiisa yabonekera dhaadha waife Aburahamu bwe yali mu Mesopotamia ng'akaali kuja kuba mu Harani," 
Acts7:3 yaamukoba ati, ‘Leka ensi yo n'abantu bo oje mu nsi ye nnaakulaga.’" 
Acts7:4 Kale yaava mu nsi ey'Abakaladea yaaja yaaba mu Harani. Lata we ng'amaze okufa, Katonda yaamutoola agho yaamuleeta mu nsi eno mwe muli." 
Acts7:5 Katonda ti yamugha nsi eyo kuba yiye waire akatundu akatono kati, aye yamusuubiza okugimugha ebe eyiye n'eizaire lye, waire yali nga aziraku mwana." 
Acts7:6 Katonda yaamukoba ati, ‘Eizaire lyo liriba mu nsi etali yaalyo. Baaba bairu era baabisibwa bubi okumala emyaka ebikumi bina (400).’" 
Acts7:7 Era Katonda yaakoba ati, ‘Aye ensi eyo ndigisalira omusango, era ebyo nga biwoire baliidha bansinziza mu kifo kino.’" 
Acts7:8 Agho Katonda yaamukolera endagaano ey'okukeketa. Aburahamu yaazaala Isaaka era yaamukeketa ku lunaku olwomunaana. Isaaka yaazaala Yakobo, Yakobo eyazaala badhaadha baife eikumi n'ababiri." 
Acts7:9 “Batabane ba Yakobo abo baagemerwa muganda waibwe Yosefu ensaalwa baamutunda e Misiri, aye era Katonda ng'ali naye." 
Acts7:10 Katonda yaamubisa mu bizibu byonabyona yaamugha amagezi n'okugonga eri Farao, kyabazinga wa Misiri eyamugha obwami mu Misiri n'okufuga ebintu bye byonabyona." 
Acts7:11 Ghaagwagho endhala n'okudaagadaaga einho mu Misiri mwonamwona ni mu Kanaani, badhaadha baife baabulwa emere ye balya." 
Acts7:12 Aye Yakobo bwe yawulira ati mu Misiri eriyo emere, yaatumayo batabane omukuzi ogwasooka." 
Acts7:13 Ku mukuzi ogwokubiri Yosefu yaamanhibwa baganda be, era ni Farao yaamanha ekika kya Yosefu." 
Acts7:14 Yosefu yaayetesa Yakobo, lata we, n'ab'ekika kye boonaboona, abantu nsanvu na bataanu." 
Acts7:15 Yakobo yaikirira e Misiri ye yafiira ni badhaadha baife. 
Acts7:16 Baabatwala e Shekemu baabaziika mu magombe Aburahamu ge yagula n'empiiya ku baana ba Hamori e Shekemu. 
Acts7:17 “Ebiseera eby'okutuukiriza Katonda bye yasuubiza Aburahamu byaja nga biseeta, era abantu baaja nga baala mu Misiri." 
Acts7:18 Ghaidhagho kyabazinga ataamanha Yosefu. 
Acts7:19 Yaasalira abantu baife amagezi, yaadaazadaaza badhaadha baife ng'abasuuza abaana baibwe bafe." 
Acts7:20 Mu kiseera kino Musa yaazaalibwa, era yaaba mulungi ewa Katonda. Yaakulira mu ndhu ya ise okumala emyezi esatu." 
Acts7:21 Bwe yasuulibwa, mughala wa Farao yaamulonda, yaamukuza nga mutabane we." 
Acts7:22 Musa yaayegeresebwa amagezi ag'Abamisiri, yaaba wa maani mu bibono ni mu bikolwa." 
Acts7:23 “Musa bwe yagheza emyaka amakumi ana (40), yaafuna mule ekirowoozo eky'okukyalira baganda be Abaisiraeli." 
Acts7:24 Bwe yabona Omumisiri ng'ali kudaazadaaza Omuisiraeli, yaaja yaabeeraku Omuisiraeli yaakuba Omumisiri yaamwita." 
Acts7:25 Yali adhuuba ati baganda be banaamanha bati Katonda amutairegho okubanunula, aye tibaakimanha." 
Acts7:26 Olunaku olwairirira, yaabona Abaisiraeli babiri nga balwana, yaagezaaku okubagaya ng'akoba ati, ‘Muli baluganda, ekibalwania ni ki.’" 
Acts7:27 Aye eyali ali kudaazadaaza mwine yaasindika ere Musa ng'akoba ati: ‘Naani eyakufuula omwami era omulamuzi waife? 
Acts7:28 Otaba ng'oyenda kundhita nga idho bwe waise Omumisiri!’ 
Acts7:29 Musa olwawulira ebyo yaalumukira e Midia, yaazaalira eyo abaana abalenzi ababiri." 
Acts7:30 “Emyaka amakumi ana (40) bwe gyabitagho, malaika yaabonekera Musa mu nnimi edh'omuliro ogwali gwakira mu kisaka eyo mu irungu okumpi n'olusozi Sinai." 
Acts7:31 Musa yeewuunhia kye yali abona, era yaaseeta okwekalirisa. Yaawulira Musengwa ng'akoba ati," 
Acts7:32 ‘Ninze Katonda wa badhaadha bo: Katonda wa Aburahamu, ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo.’ Aye Musa yaadhugumira era tiyakana kwekalirisa." 
Acts7:33 Musengwa yaamukoba ati, ‘Toolamu engaito mu bigere byo, kuba gh'oyemereire kifo kitukuvu." 
Acts7:34 Mboine abantu bange abali mu Misiri bwe badaazibwadaazibwa, naawulira n'okulira kwaibwe, era ndidhie okubanunula. Mperaano idha, nkutume e Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 “Musa oyo abantu ye baaloba nga bakoba bati, ‘Naani eyakufuula omwami era omulamuzi.’ Oyo Katonda ye yatuma okubafuga era okubanunula ng'abita mu malaika eyamubonekera mu kisaka." 
Acts7:36 Yaabakulembera yaaja ng'akola ebyewuunhio n'obumanhiso, e Misiri, mu Nhandha Emyufu, ni mu irungu, okumala emyaka amakumi ana (40)." 
Acts7:37 Musa ono n'eyakoba Abaisiraeli ati: ‘Katonda aidha kubatumira omulanzi okuva mu imwe beene, nga nze bwe yantuma.’" 
Acts7:38 N'oyo eyali n'Abaisiraeli nga beesoloiza mu irungu. Yali ni malaika yaayogera naye ku lusozi Sinai. Yali ni badhaadha baife era n'eyafuna ebibono bya Katonda eby'obulamu asobole okubitukobera. 
Acts7:39 “Aye badhaadha baife baaloba okumuwulira baamusambaadha, ebirowoozo byaibwe nga bibali Misiri." 
Acts7:40 Baakoba Aaroni bati, ‘Tukolereyo bakatonda abanaatukulemberangamu, kuba Musa oyo eyatutoola mu Misiri titwidhi bw'abaire.’" 
Acts7:41 Agho, mu nnaku edho, baakola ekifaananie eky'ente ento. Baagheereza ekisinzibwa ekyo ekitali Katonda omusengo era baasagambya olw'ekintu ekyo kye baakola obukole." 
Acts7:42 Aye Katonda yaabavaaku yaabaleka okusinzanga emuunienie edh'omu igulu nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo ky'abalanzi kiti, ‘Imwe abantu ba Isiraeli, ensolo dhe mwaitanga n'emisengo gye mwagheerezanga emyaka amakumi ana (40) mu irungu, timwabikolera nze." 
Acts7:43 Mwabbeedanga ntindi ya Moleki na muunienie ya musambwa Refani, ebisinzibwa ebyo ebitali Katonda bye mwakola ni mubisinzanga. Kale ni ndidha kubabinga mbatuumye ni Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Badhaadha baife nga bali mu irungu baali n'eweema eraga nga Katonda ali nabo. Eweema eyo yakolebwa nga Katonda bwe yakoba Musa okugikola, era yagikola nga Katonda bwe yagimulaga." 
Acts7:45 Badhaadha baife era baaleeta eweema eyo ni Yoshua bwe bangira okutwala ensi Katonda ye yabingamu abantu abandi, nga badhaadha baife babona. Eweema eyo yaaba mu nsi muno okutuukiza irala mu byanda bya Daudi." 
Acts7:46 Daudi oyo yaasiimibwa Katonda era yaasaba Katonda amuganhe azimbire Katonda wa Yakobo oyo endhu. 
Acts7:47 Aye Solomoni n'eyamuzimbira endhu. 
Acts7:48 “Aye Katonda oyo Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, tasula mu ndhu dhizimbibwa bantu, ng'omulanzi bw'akoba ati," 
Acts7:49 ‘Eigulu n'ekityamo kyange, ate n'ensi, okwo kwe nta ebigere byange. Kale mulinzimbira ndhu nabaki? Oba kifo ki mwe ndiwuumulira?" 
Acts7:50 Ti ninze eyakola ebyo byonabyona?’ 
Acts7:51 “Imwe ab'empwitu, ab'emyoyo emikalangufu era abaloba okuwulira ekibono kya Katonda! Buliidho mutakania Mwoyo Mutukuvu. Nga badhaadha baimwe bwe baali, mwena bwe muli." 
Acts7:52 Mulanzi ki badhaadha baimwe ye bataakiriga? Baita abo abaalanga okwidha kw'omugheereza we omutuufu, imwe ye mwalyamu olukwe ni mumwita." 
Acts7:53 Niimwe abaafuna Amateeka bwe gaalangirirwa ba malaika, ate mwaloba okugagema.”" 
Acts7:54 Bwe baawulira ebyo, baidhula obusungu, baaluma emba." 
Acts7:55 Aye Sitefano nga aidhwire Mwoyo Mutukuvu, yaalingirira mu igulu era yaabona ekitiisa kya Katonda, ni Yesu nga ayemereire ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda." 
Acts7:56 Sitefano yaakoba ati: “Bona ndi kubona eigulu nga libwikwike n'Omwana w'Omuntu nga ayemereire ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda.” 
Acts7:57 Aye bale baayasiikana nga basembye amatu gaibwe, boonaboona baamunhaagaana." 
Acts7:58 Baamufulumya mu kibuga, baamukuba amabaale. Abadhulizi baata engoye dhaibwe gha bigere by'omwisuka eriina lye Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Bwe baali nga bamukuba amabaale, Sitefano yaasaba ati: “Musengwa Yesu, twala omwoyo gwange.”" 
Acts7:60 Yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaaleekaana ati: “Musengwa ekibi kino tokibavunaana.” Bwe yamala okwogera atyo yaafa." 
Acts8:1 Saulo yaaganha Sitefano aitibwe. Mu kiseera ekyo Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, mu Yerusalemu, kyakirigibwa inho. Boonaboona, okutoolaku Abatume, baasansaanira mu biketezo eby'e Buyudaaya ni Samaria." 
Acts8:2 Abantu abaisaamu Katonda ekitiisa baaziika Sitefano era baamulira inho. 
Acts8:3 Aye Saulo yaazikiriza Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito nga angira kiisi nhumba yaagemamu abasaadha n'abakazi yaabata mu ikomera. 
Acts8:4 Agho ni abo abaasansaana baaja nga bakobera abantu ekibono kya Katonda. 
Acts8:5 Filipo yaikirira mu kibuga ky'e Samaria, yaakobera abantu Kurisito." 
Acts8:6 Abantu kamaala baisaayo inho Omwoyo ku ebyo Filipo bye yabeegeresa, bwe baamuwulirisa era baabona ebyewuunhio bye yali ali kukola." 
Acts8:7 Kuba emizimu emibi gyava ku bantu kamaala nga gyasiikanira ghaigulu, era abagongobavu n'abalema kamaala baawonezebwa." 
Acts8:8 Ghaabaagho okusagamba kunene mu kibuga ekyo. 
Acts8:9 Aye mu kibuga omwo mwalimu omusaadha eyayetebwanga Simoni, nga mulaguzi. Yeeyetanga muntu wa kitalo era yaayasaamirizanga Abasamaria." 
Acts8:10 Abantu boonaboona okuva ku muto okutuuka ku mukulu baamuwuliranga baakoba bati: “Ono n'amaani ga Katonda ow'ekitiisa.” 
Acts8:11 Baamuwuliranga, kuba yamala entangama ng'abaasaamiriza n'obulogo bwe." 
Acts8:12 Aye Filipo bwe yakobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi agagema ku Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda ni ku liina lya Yesu Kurisito, baikiriza, era abasaadha n'abakazi, baabatizibwa." 
Acts8:13 Ni Simoni mwene yeena yaikiriza era bwe yamala okubatizibwa, yaaba ghalala ni Filipo. Bwe yabona obumanhiso n'ebyewuninkiriza Filipo bye yakola, yeewuunhia inho." 
Acts8:14 Agho Abatume abaali mu Yerusalemu bwe baawulira ng'ab'e Samaria baikiriza ekibono kya Katonda, baabatumira Petero ni Yoanne." 
Acts8:15 Bwe baatuukayo, baabasabira bafune Mwoyo Mutukuvu" 
Acts8:16 kuba Mwoyo Mutukuvu yali akaali kwika ku waire mulala ku bo. Baali nga bamaze kubatizibwa kwonka mu liina lya Musengwa Yesu. 
Acts8:17 Agho Petero ni Yoanne baabaisaaku emikono, baafuna Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Acts8:18 Aye Simoni bwe yabona nga Abatume bwe baisa emikono gyaibwe ku bantu, abantu ni bafuna Mwoyo Mutukuvu, yaaleetera Petero ni Yoanne empiiya." 
Acts8:19 Yaakoba ati: “Zeena mumpe obukumu obwo kiisi ye naisangaku emikono gyange afunenga Mwoyo Mutukuvu.” 
Acts8:20 Aye Petero yaamwiramu ati: “Zikirira n'empiiya dho, kuba odhuuba okufuna ekirabo kya Katonda ng'okigula n'empiiya dho!" 
Acts8:21 Tosobola kwetaba waire okugabana ku kino, kuba omwoyo gwo tiimutuufu mu maiso ga Katonda." 
Acts8:22 Kale ni weenenie ekirowoozo kyo ekyo ekibi, weeghembe Katonda tomanha bw'akusonigha ekidhuubo ekyo ekiri mu mwoyo gwo." 
Acts8:23 Kuba mbona nga oidhwire enge era oli musibe wa kibi.” 
Acts8:24 Simoni yaakoba Petero ati: “Munsabire ye Musengwa, ebibono ebyo bye mwogeire ghalobe kubaagho kintuukaku.”" 
Acts8:25 Bwe baamala okukakasa n'okukobera abantu ekibono kya Musengwa, bairayo e Yerusalemu, nga baja bakobera abantu ab'omu byalo kamaala eby'e Samaria Amawulire Amalungi." 
Acts8:26 Agho, malaika wa Musengwa yaakoba Filipo ati: “Situka oje n'engira ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba, ogeme engira ebita mu irungu eva e Yerusalemu okuja e Gaza.”" 
Acts8:27 Filipo yaasituka yaaja. Mperaano ni mu kiseera kyene ekyo ghaabaagho omufuzi Omwethiopia omulaawe eyali ng'ali kwirayo mu Ethiopia, ng'ava okusinza Katonda mu Yerusalemu. Omusaadha ono yali mufuzi mukulu, era nga mukuumi wa ndyanga wa kyabazinga omukazi Kandake ow'e Ethiopia." 
Acts8:28 Yali ali kwirayo mu Ethiopia ng'atyaime mu kigaali kye, ng'ali kusoma ekitabo eky'omulanzi Isaia." 
Acts8:29 Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaakoba Filipo ati: “Ja otuuke ku kigaali ekyo.” 
Acts8:30 Agho Filipo yaalumuka yaatuuka ku kigaali era yaamuwulira nga asoma ekitabo ky'omulanzi Isaia, yaamubuuza ati: “By'osoma obitegeera?”" 
Acts8:31 Omwethiopia yaamwiramu ati: “Mpanga ntya okubitegeera, okutoolaku nga ghaligho abiinhinhongoire?” Agho yaasaba Filipo aniine atyame naye mu kigaali." 
Acts8:32 Ekitundu ky'ebyaghandiikibwa kye yali asoma kikoba kiti: “Yali ng'oti n'entaama ye batwala okwita. Oba ng'oti n'entaama etalira nga bagisalaku ebiviiri; tiyabumbula munwa naire. 
Acts8:33 Baamufeebya, n'omusango gwe baagusaliriza. Ghazira alisobola kwogera bigema ku bantu ba ku luzi lwe, kuba obulamu bwe butooleibwa mu nsi.”" 
Acts8:34 Omulaawe yaakoba Filipo ati: “Nkobera, omulanzi ayogera ku ani? Yeeyogeraku mwene oba ayogera ku muntu wundi?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipo yaatoolera okwogera ng'ainhamira ku kyaghandiikibwa ekyo, yaamukobera Amawulire Amalungi agagema ku Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Bwe baali nga bali mu ngira bali kuja, baatuuka aghaali amaadhi, omulaawe yaakoba Filipo ati: “Bona amaadhi gaagano! Ekindobera okubatizibwa ni ki?” [" 
Acts8:37 Filipo yaamukoba ati: “Oghanga okubatizibwa bw'oba nga oikiriza n'omwoyo gwo gwonagwona.” Omulaawe yairamu ati: “Ndhikiriza nga Yesu Kurisito n'Omwana wa Katonda.”] 
Acts8:38 Agho yaalagira okwemereza ekigaali, era bombi Filipo n'omulaawe baika mu maadhi, Filipo yaamubatiza." 
Acts8:39 Bwe baava mu maadhi, Mwoyo wa Musengwa yaatwala Filipo. Omulaawe tiyairayo kumubona aye yeeyongerayo mu lugendo lwe nga musangaavu." 
Acts8:40 Filipo yaaboneka mu Azoto, yaabitabita mu bibuga byonabyona ng'aja ng'akobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi okutuuka e Kaisaria." 
Acts9:1 Aye Saulo yali ng'ali kutuubatuuba n'obusungu obw'okwita abeegeresebwa ba Musengwa. Yaaja ew'Omukulu wa Bakabona," 
Acts9:2 yaamusaba embaluwa emwandhula mu sinagoga edh'e Damasiko, nga bw'ayagaanayo abasaadha n'abakazi abatambulira mu ngira ya Musengwa, aghange okubaleeta mu Yerusalemu nga basibe." 
Acts9:3 Mperaano, bwe yali ng'ali kuja ng'ali kumpi okutuuka e Damasiko, mangu ago ghaabaagho okumyansa okwava mu igulu kwamwezungulula." 
Acts9:4 Yaagwa ghansi era yaawulira eiroboozi nga limukoba liti: “Saulo, Saulo! Lwaki onkiriga?”" 
Acts9:5 Yairamu ati: “Niiwe ani Musengwa?” Yaakoba ati: “Ninze Yesu y'okiriga. 
Acts9:6 Aye situka oje mu kibuga. Eyo ye banaakukoberera ky'ogwaine okukola.” 
Acts9:7 Abasaadha abaali batambula ni Saulo, baayemerera nga beewuunhia kuba baawulira eiroboozi aye baaloba kubona muntu." 
Acts9:8 Saulo yaasituka okuva ghansi, yaakanula amaiso aye nga tasobola kubona. Baamugema ku mukono, baamutwala mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:9 Yaamalira irala enaku isatu nga tabona era nga talya waire okunhwa. 
Acts9:10 Mu Damasiko mwalimu Omwegeresebwa nga ayetebwa Anania. Musengwa yaamubonekera yaamweta ati: “Anania.” Yairamu ati: “Ndi ghano Musengwa.” 
Acts9:11 Musengwa yaakoba ati: “Situka ogeme Engira eyetebwa Entereevu, onoonie mu nhumba ya Yuda omuntu ayetebwa Saulo ow'e Taruso.” Saulo yali ali kusaba." 
Acts9:12 Era yabonekerwa omuntu ayetebwa Anania nga aidha okumwisaaku emikono, aghange okwiramu okubona." 
Acts9:13 Anania yairamu ati: “Musengwa, nawulira abantu kamaala nga boogera ku musaadha oyo ebibi kamaala bye yakola abantu bo ab'e Yerusalemu," 
Acts9:14 era ni ghano ng'ali n'obuyinza obumugheereibwa Bakabona Abakulu ageme abo abakusinza.” 
Acts9:15 Musengwa yaakoba Anania ati: “Ja, kuba oyo nze mmwerondeire okumanhisa eriina lyange mu bamaghanga agandi, ni bakyabazinga, n'abantu ba Isiraeli." 
Acts9:16 Era ndimwoleka nga bw'aja okudaagadaaga einho ku lwange.” 
Acts9:17 Agho Anania yaasituka yaaja mu nhumba yaamwisaaku emikono yaamukoba ati: “Owoluganda Saulo, Musengwa Yesu mwene eyakubonekera, bwe wali mu ngira ng'oidha, antumye oghange okwiramu okubona era oidhule Mwoyo Mutukuvu.”" 
Acts9:18 Mangu ago, ku maiso ge kwava ebintu ebiri ng'oti bigalagamba, yairamu okubona. Yaayemerera, yaabatizibwa," 
Acts9:19 era yaalya emere, yairamu amaani. Saulo yamala enaku ng'ali n'abeegeresebwa mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:20 Tibwalwa yaayegeresa mu sinagoga ati: “Yesu n'Omwana wa Katonda.” 
Acts9:21 Boonaboona abaamuwulira beewuunhia inho, bakoba bati: “Ono ti n'omusaadha eyakiriganga ab'omu Yerusalemu abaasinzanga Yesu oyo? Era ti yaidha eno abageme abatwale ye Bakabona Abakulu?”" 
Acts9:22 Aye Saulo yeeyongera bweyongere okuba n'amaani mu kwegeresa kwe. Yaasirisa Abayudaaya abaali mu Damasiko ng'akakasa ati Yesu ni Kurisito. 
Acts9:23 Enaku kamaala bwe dhaabitagho, Abayudaaya beekobaana okwita Saulo," 
Acts9:24 aye Saulo yaamanha olukwe lwaibwe. Omusana n'obwire baamweteega ku miryango egingira mu kibuga, bamwite." 
Acts9:25 Lwali lulala obwire, abeegeresebwa be baamutwala baamubisa mu kituli, baamwikiza ku kimante nga bamutaire mu kiibo." 
Acts9:26 Saulo bwe yatuuka e Yerusalemu, yaagezaaku okweyimba n'abeegeresebwa aye boonaboona baamutya nga tibaikiriza bati yeena mwegeresebwa." 
Acts9:27 Aye Barunaba yaamugemaku yaamutwala y'Abatume yaabakobera nga Saulo bwe yali mu ngira n'abona Musengwa era Musengwa n'ayogera naye. Era yaabakobera nga Saulo bwe yayogera nga tatya e Damasiko mu liina lya Yesu. 
Acts9:28 Yaaba nabo mu Yerusalemu nga wa idembe, yaayogeranga nga tatya mu liina lya Musengwa." 
Acts9:29 Yaayogeranga era yaatakananga n'Abayudaaya aboogera Olugureki, aye baayenda okumwita." 
Acts9:30 Aboluganda bwe baakimanha, baamugherekeraku okumutuusa e Kaisaria, baamugheereza e Taruso." 
Acts9:31 Agho Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'omu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, Galilaaya ni Samaria, kyaba miraala. Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kyakakata nga kiisa mu Musengwa ekitiisa, era kyagazigha nga Mwoyo Mutukuvu bw'akiyamba." 
Acts9:32 Agho, lwali lulala Petero bwe yali ng'atambulatambula, yaikirira eri abaikiriza ba Katonda abaali mu Ludda." 
Acts9:33 Eyo yaayagaanayo omusaadha nga eriina lye ni Ayenea eyagongobala n'agogomera ku ndiri okumala emyaka munaana. 
Acts9:34 Petero yaamukoba ati: “Ayenea, Yesu Kurisito akuwonia. Situka ogoloze obuliri bwo.” Mangu ago, Ayenea yaasituka." 
Acts9:35 Abantu boonaboona ab'omu Ludda ni mu Sharoni baamubona baikiriza Musengwa. 
Acts9:36 Mu Yoppa mwalimu omukazi nga eriina lye ni Tabitha oba Dorukasi, ekitegeeza, empongo. Omukazi ono, yakolanga ebikolwa ebirungi era n'eby'ekisa." 
Acts9:37 Mu nnaku edho yaalwala yaafa, baanaaza omulambo gwe baaguta mu kisenge ekya ghaigulu." 
Acts9:38 Mperaano Yoppa kyali kumpi ni Ludda. Kale abeegeresebwa abaali e Yoppa bwe baawulira bati Petero ali e Ludda, baamutumira abasaadha babiri baamukoba bati: “Tukweghembye tezaaku oidhe ye tuli.”" 
Acts9:39 Agho Petero yaasituka yaaja nabo. Bwe yatuuka baamutwala mu kisenge ekya ghaigulu. Banamwandu boonaboona baayemerera gh'ali nga balira era nga bwe bamulaga ebivaalo n'engoye edhindi Dorukasi bye yakola ng'akaali mulamu. 
Acts9:40 Petero yaabafulumya ku luya boonaboona, yaakuba amakiryaivu yaasaba era yaakyukira omulambo yaakoba ati: “Tabitha, situka.” Agho Tabitha yaazibula amaiso, era bwe yabona Petero, yaatyama." 
Acts9:41 Petero yaamugema ku mukono yaamwemereza. Agho yaayeta abaikiriza ni banamwandu yaamubalaga nga mulamu. 
Acts9:42 Kino kyamanhibwa mu Yoppa yoonayoona, abantu kamaala baikiriza Musengwa." 
Acts9:43 Petero yaamala enaku kamaala mu Yoppa ewa Simoni omughazi ow'amawu. 
Acts10:1 Mu Kaisaria mwalimu omusaadha eriina lye nga ni Korunelio, eyali omwisirukale omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'eigye ekyali kyetebwa Italike." 
Acts10:2 Yali muntu wa idiini era nga mwene n'ab'omu maka ge baisa mu Katonda ekitiisa. Yaghanga abantu obuyambi kamaala era nga talekera kusaba Katonda. 
Acts10:3 Lwali lulala, esaawa ng'oti mwenda edh'omusana malaika wa Katonda yaamubonekera bukalamu era yaamweta ati: “Korunelio.”" 
Acts10:4 Korunelio yaamulingirira era ng'atya, yaamukoba ati: “Musengwa, kiki?” Malaika yaamwiramu ati: “Katonda aidhukiire okusaba kwo n'okutona kwo." 
Acts10:5 Mperaano ni, tuma abasaadha e Yoppa baleete Simoni ayetebwa Petero." 
Acts10:6 Asula ewa Simoni omughazi w'amawu ali n'enhumba ku nhandha.” 
Acts10:7 Malaika wa Musengwa eyali ayogera naye bwe yaja, Korunelio yaayeta babiri ku bagheereza be n'omwisirukale mulala ku abo abamukuuma, eyali omuntu ow'eidiini." 
Acts10:8 Yaabakobera byonabyona ebibairegho era yaabatuma e Yoppa. 
Acts10:9 Ku lunaku olwairirira, bwe baali nga bakaali mu ngira era nga banaatera okutuuka mu kibuga, ku saawa nga mukaaga edh'omusana, Petero yaaniina ghaigulu ku nhumba okusaba Katonda." 
Acts10:10 Endhala yaamuluma yaayenda okubaaku ni ky'alya aye bwe baali nga bakaakitegeka, yaabonekerwa." 
Acts10:11 Yaabona eigulu nga libwikwike era ekintu kyaika ghansi nga kiri ng'oti n'eisuuka einene lye bagemye ku nsonda eina ni baliisa ku nsi. 
Acts10:12 Mu isuuka omwo mwalimu buli kisolo eky'amagulu ana, ebyekulula n'enhonhi edh'omu nsiko." 
Acts10:13 Yaawulira eiroboozi nga limukoba liti: “Petero, situka, oite, olye.”" 
Acts10:14 Aye Petero yairamu ati: “Busa, Musengwa. Nze tiryangaku kintu kya muziro waire ekitali kirongoofu.”" 
Acts10:15 Eiroboozi lyamukoba kabiri liti: “Katonda kye yalongoosa tokyetanga kya muziro.” 
Acts10:16 Ekintu kino kyabaagho emikuzi esatu era mangu ago kyatwalibwa mu igulu. 
Acts10:17 Agho Petero yaaba agho ng'akaasobeirwa nga yeewuunhia ky'aboine. Mu kiseera ekyo, abasaadha Korunelio be yatuma baali bamaze okubuuliriza enhumba ya Simoni ghe yali era baali beemereire ku mulyango." 
Acts10:18 Baayeta baabuuza oba nga Simoni ayetebwa Petero yali aba agho. 
Acts10:19 Agho Petero bwe yali ng'akaadhuuba ku ekyo ky'aboine, Mwoyo yaamukoba ati: “Bona, abasaadha basatu bali kukwagala." 
Acts10:20 Aye situka oike oje nabo, otabeekengeera kuba ninze mbatumye.”" 
Acts10:21 Agho Petero yaika y'abasaadha yaabakoba ati: “Ndi ghano ye muli kwagala. Nsonga ki ebaleese?” 
Acts10:22 Bairamu bati: “Korunelio, omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale n'atutumye. Omusaadha ono mutuufu, atya Katonda, era Abayudaaya boonaboona bamwogeraku bukalamu. Kale, malaika omutukuvu yamukoba akwete, oje ewuwe, awulire by'oyegeresa.”" 
Acts10:23 Agho Petero yaabangiza mu nhumba yaabasuza. Bwe bwakya enkyo Petero yaasituka yaaja nabo era n'abandi ku boluganda baava e Yoppa baamugherekeraku. 
Acts10:24 Olunaku olwairirira baatuuka e Kaisaria, Korunelio yali abalindiriire ng'asoloiza ab'ekika kye ni bakagwa be einho." 
Acts10:25 Agho Petero bwe yali ng'ali kwingira, Korunelio yaidha y'ali yaakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere bye yaamusinza." 
Acts10:26 Aye Petero yaamusitusa nga bw'amukoba ati: “Yemerera, kuba zeena ndi muntu buntu.”" 
Acts10:27 Petero ni Korunelio bangira nga baja bwe boogera. Yaayagaana abantu kamaala nga beesoloiza. 
Acts10:28 Yaabakoba ati: “Imwe beene mwidhi nga bwe kimenha amateeka Omuyudaaya okukolagana n'ow'eighanga erindi waire okumukyalira. Aye Katonda andaze nga tikigwaine kweta muntu yeenayeena mubi oba atali mulongoofu. 
Acts10:29 Kale bwe nayetebwa kyenava ndidha aghazira kwekengeera. Mperaano mbabuuza: Mwandhetera ki?” 
Acts10:30 Korunelio yairamu ati: “Enaku ina edhibiseegho, nali ndi mu nhumba yange nga ndi kusaba ku saawa eyomwenda. Mangu ago, naabona omusaadha ng'avaire engoye edhimesunkana ng'ayemereire mu maiso gange." 
Acts10:31 Era yankoba ati, ‘Korunelio, Katonda awuliire okusaba kwo era aidhukiire n'okugaba kwo." 
Acts10:32 Kale tuma e Yoppa oyetese Simoni ayetebwa Petero asula mu nhumba ya Simoni omughazi ow'amawu eri ku nhandha.’ 
Acts10:33 Agho ni n'okukutumira mangu ago, era okoze bukalamu okwidha. Kale mperaano twenatwena tuli ghano mu maiso ga Katonda, okuwulira byonabyona Musengwa by'akulagiire.”" 
Acts10:34 Agho Petero yaatoolera okwogera, yaakoba ati: “Bwenebwene mperaano ntegeereire irala nga Katonda taboola mu bantu." 
Acts10:35 Aye mu buli ighanga, asiima kiisi amwisaamu ekitiisa era n'akola ekituufu." 
Acts10:36 Katonda yagha abantu ba Isiraeli ekibono ng'abakobera Amawulire Amalungi agaleeta emiraala ng'abita mu Yesu Kurisito. Oyo ni Musengwa ow'abantu boonaboona. 
Acts10:37 Mwidhi ebyabaagho mu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, ebyatandiikira e Galilaaya, nga Yoanne amaze okukoba abantu babatizibwe." 
Acts10:38 Katonda yayugha ku Yesu ow'e Nazarethi Mwoyo Mutukuvu n'amaani. Yaatambulanga woonawoona, yaajanga ng'akola ebikolwa ebirungi, ng'awonia boonaboona abadaazibwadaazibwa Sitaani, kuba Katonda yali naye." 
Acts10:39 Niife abakakasa ebyo byonabyona bye yakola mu nsi ey'Abayudaaya ni mu Yerusalemu. Baamukomerera ku musalaba, baamwita." 
Acts10:40 Aye Katonda yaamuzuukiza ku lunaku olwokusatu era yaamusobozesa okweyoleka. 
Acts10:41 Tiyeeyolekera bantu boonaboona okutoolaku ife Katonda be yali amaze okulonda okukikakasa. Niife otwalya era ni tunhwa naye nga amaze okuzuukira mu bafu. 
Acts10:42 Yaatulagira okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi era n'okubakakasa tuti oyo ni Katonda ye yataagho okuba omulamuzi ow'abalamu era n'abafu. 
Acts10:43 Oyo abalanzi boonaboona ye boogeraku nga bakoba bati, ‘Kiisi amwikiriza asoniyibwa ebibi olw'amaani ag'eriina lye.’ ”" 
Acts10:44 Agho Petero yali akaayogera ebyo, Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaika ku boonaboona abaali bawulirisa bye yali ayogera." 
Acts10:45 Abakekete abaikiriza, boonaboona abaidha ni Petero okuva e Yoppa baayasaamirira, kuba n'abamaghanga agandi boona Katonda yabagha ekirabo ekya Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Acts10:46 Baabawulira nga boogera mu nnimi era nga basaaka ekitiisa kya Katonda. Agho Petero yaakoba ati: 
Acts10:47 “Abantu bano bafunie Mwoyo Mutukuvu nga ife bwe twamufuna. Naani asobola okubalobera okubatizibwa n'amaadhi?” 
Acts10:48 Kale ni yaalagira babatizibwe mu liina lya Yesu Kurisito. Agho baamusaba asigale nabo enaku ntonotono. 
Acts11:1 Agho Abatume n'aboluganda abaali mu Buyudaaya baawulira nga n'abamaghanga agandi baikiriza ekibono kya Katonda. 
Acts11:2 Petero bwe yaniinaniina e Yerusalemu, abo abasemba eky'okukeketa, baamunenia nga bakoba bati:" 
Acts11:3 “Lwaki wakyalira abatali bakekete n'okulya n'olya nabo.” 
Acts11:4 Agho Petero yaabainhonhola byonabyona, yaabisengeka ati:" 
Acts11:5 “Nali mu kibuga Yoppa nga nsaba Katonda naabonekerwa ekintu ekiri ng'oti isuuka einene lye bagemye ku nsonda eina, kyaika okuva mu igulu, kyaidha ye ndi." 
Acts11:6 Bwe nakiringirira ni nkyekalirisa, naabona ensolo edh'amagulu ana enfuge n'edh'omu nsiko, n'ebyekulula n'enhonhi." 
Acts11:7 Naawulira eiroboozi nga likoba liti, ‘Petero, situka, oite, olye.’" 
Acts11:8 Aye nairamu nti, ‘Busa Musengwa. Kuba tiryangaku kintu kya muziro waire ekitali kirongoofu.’" 
Acts11:9 Eiroboozi lyairamu kabiri nga liva mu igulu liti, ‘Katonda kye yalongoosa, tokyetanga kya muziro.’" 
Acts11:10 Ekintu kino kyabaagho emikuzi esatu, olumaliira kyaizibwayo mu igulu kyonakyona." 
Acts11:11 Mangu ago okuja okubona ng'abasaadha basatu abaatumibwa okuva e Kaisaria okwidha ye ndi, beemereire emberi y'enhumba mwe twali." 
Acts11:12 Mwoyo Mutukuvu yankoba okuja nabo nga tibeekengeera. Aboluganda bano omukaaga boona baaja ninze era twangira mu nhumba ya Korunelio. 
Acts11:13 Yaatukobera nga bwe yabona malaika ng'ayemereire mu nhumba ye eyamukoba ati, ‘Tuma omuntu e Yoppa ayete Simoni ayetebwa Petero" 
Acts11:14 akukobere ebibono ebinaakulokola iwe n'ab'enhumba yo boonaboona.’ 
Acts11:15 Agho bwe natoolera okwogera, Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaabaikaku boonaboona nga bwe yaika ku ife mu mainhama." 
Acts11:16 Agho ni naidhukira ekibono kya Musengwa bwe yakoba ati, ‘Yoanne yabatizanga na maadhi aye imwe mulibatizibwa na Mwoyo Mutukuvu.’" 
Acts11:17 Kale ni oba nga Katonda yabagha ekirabo n'ekirala nga twena bwe yakitugha bwe twaikiriza Musengwa Yesu Kurisito, ninze ani eyandighanze okulobera Katonda.”" 
Acts11:18 Bwe baawulira ebyo, baawola baagha Katonda ekitiisa nga bakoba bati: “Agho ni Katonda aghaire n'abamaghanga agandi, okwenenia bafune obulamu.”" 
Acts11:19 Mperaano abo abaasansaana olw'okukirigibwa okwaligho, Sitefano mwe yaitirwa, baatambula baatuuka mu Foenikia ni mu Kupuro ni mu Antiokia. Tibaakobera muntu yeenayeena kibono kya Katonda okutoolaku Abayudaaya bonka." 
Acts11:20 Aye ghaaligho abandi ku abo ab'e Kupuro n'e Kurene, bwe baali nga baja mu Antiokia baayogera n'abatali Bayudaaya nga babeegeresa ku Musengwa Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Baali n'amaani ga Musengwa era abantu kamaala baikiriza, baira ye Musengwa." 
Acts11:22 Ekibono kino bwe kyagwa mu matu ag'ab'omu Kikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ab'omu Yerusalemu, baatuma Barunaba mu Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 Bwe yatuukayo n'abona Katonda bw'aghaire abantu abo enkabi, yaasangaala. Yaabakubiriza boonaboona bakalangukire ku Musengwa n'omwoyo mulala." 
Acts11:24 Yali muntu mukalamu, ng'aidhwire Mwoyo Mutukuvu n'okwikiriza era abantu kamaala baasenga Musengwa." 
Acts11:25 Agho Barunaba yaaja e Taruso okwagala Saulo. 
Acts11:26 Bwe yamubona yaamuleeta mu Antiokia, baamala omwaka mulamba nga bali n'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito era baayegeresa abantu kamaala inho. Mu Antiokia abeegeresebwa ye baasookera okwetebwa Abakurisito." 
Acts11:27 Mu nnaku edho abalanzi baikirira okuva e Yerusalemu baidha mu Antiokia. 
Acts11:28 Owundi ku abo, eriina lye Agabo, yaasituka mu maani ga Mwoyo yaalanga ati: “Ghaja kubaagho endhala ey'amaani mu nsi yoonayoona.” Endhala eyo yaligho mu bufuzi bwa Kilaudio." 
Acts11:29 Aboluganda baasalagho kiisi muntu agheeyo nga bw'aghanga olw'okulumuukirira aboluganda abaali mu Buyudaaya. 
Acts11:30 Baakola batyo era baatuma Barunaba ni Saulo okutwala obuyambi obwo y'abakulembeze ab'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito. 
Acts12:1 Mu nnaku edho, kyabazinga Herode yaagema abandi ku b'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, yaabakiriga." 
Acts12:2 Era yaakozesa empiima yaita Yakobo muganda wa Yoanne. 
Acts12:3 Bwe yabona nga Abayudaaya bakisiimye yeeyongera, yaagema ni Petero. Kino kyabaagho mu nnaku edh'emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa." 
Acts12:4 Bwe yamala okumugema, yaamuta mu ikomera, yaamugemya ebikunsu bina eby'abaisirukale bana bana bamukuumenga mu ngobo, nga kye yali ayenda n'okumuleeta mu maiso g'abantu nga Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa kiwoire." 
Acts12:5 Kale ni, Petero yaakuumirwa mu ikomera, aye Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kyekalangula okumusabira ye Katonda." 
Acts12:6 Obwire obwakyesa olunaku Herode lwe yali ategeike okutwalayo Petero y'ekikunsu ky'abantu, Petero yali atendwike ghagati gh'abaisirukale babiri. Yali asibiibwa endhegere ibiri era nga n'abakuumi bali ku lwigi bakuuma eikomera." 
Acts12:7 Malaika wa Musengwa yaidha, obutangaavu bwayakira mu ikomera. Malaika yaasiinha ku Petero, yaamuzuusa yaamukoba ati: “Situka mangu.” Agho endhegere dhaalekuka ku mikono gya Petero, dhaagwa." 
Acts12:8 Malaika yaamukoba ati: “Weesibe olusibiro lwo era ovaale engaito.” Yaakola atyo. Agho yaamukoba ati: “Vaala ekivaalo kyo onnonereze.” 
Acts12:9 Petero yaafuluma yaanonereza malaika. Aye tiyamanha oba nga malaika bye yali akola byali bituufu. Yalowooza ati aloota buloote. 
Acts12:10 Bwe baabita ku bakuumi abasookerwaku ni ku bokubiri, baatuuka ku mulyango ogw'ekyuma ogwingira mu kibuga. Omulyango gweigulagho gwene, era bwe baafuluma baatambulaku akata mu luguudo. Mangu ago, malaika yava gh'ali." 
Acts12:11 Agho Petero bwe yamanha ebibairegho yaakoba ati: “Mperaano ntegeereire irala nga Musengwa n'atumye malaika we okuntoola mu mikono gya Herode n'amponia ebyo byonabyona Abayudaaya bye babaire beesumba.” 
Acts12:12 Ekyo bwe yakimanha, yaaja ku nhumba ya Maria, inhina Yoanne ayetebwa Mariko. Eyo abantu kamaala baali beesoloiza nga bali kusaba." 
Acts12:13 Petero bwe yakonkona ku lwigi olw'oku mulyango ogw'oku luya, omwiru omukazi eriina lye Rooda yaidha abone akonkona." 
Acts12:14 Bwe yamanha amamiro ga Petero tiyaigulagho lwigi, olw'eisanhu, aye yairayo mbiro yaakoba nga Petero bwe yali ayemereire ku luya, ku lwigi." 
Acts12:15 Baamukoba bati: “Olalwike.” Aye omughala yeekalangula ati ky'akoba kituufu. Aye bale baakoba bati: “Oyo malaika we.” 
Acts12:16 Aye Petero yaayongera okukonkona, era bwe baigulagho ni bamubona, baayasaamirira." 
Acts12:17 Yaabaghemya basirike, yaabakobera nga Musengwa bw'amuwoniiza eikomera. Era yaabakoba ati: “Bino mubikobere Yakobo n'aboluganda.” Yaavaayo yaaja aghandi." 
Acts12:18 Agho, bwe bwakya enkyo, ghaabaagho akeegugungo ka maani mu baisirukale nga beebuuza ekyali kigwire ku Petero." 
Acts12:19 Herode bwe yamwagala n'atamubona yaawozesa abaisirukale, yaalagira babaite. Agho Herode yaava e Buyudaaya yaikirira e Kaisaria yaaba eyo." 
Acts12:20 Agho Herode yaanhiigira abantu ab'e Tiro ni Sidoni. Aye beene baisa kirala baje bamubone. Nga bamaze okwikirizisa Bulasito eyakuumanga ekisaagaati kye, baasaba ghabeegho okwisania, kuba ensi ya Herode n'eyasakiranga eyaibwe." 
Acts12:21 Agho ku lunaku lwe baalagaana, Herode yaavaala ebivaalo bye eby'obwakyabazinga, yaatyama ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga, yaayogera y'abantu." 
Acts12:22 Baaleekaana bati: “Ali kwogera ti muntu aye musambwa n'oguli kwogera.” 
Acts12:23 Mangu ago malaika wa Musengwa yaakuba Herode, kuba Herode tiyagha Katonda kitiisa. Enhengere dhaamulya yaafa." 
Acts12:24 Ekibono kya Katonda kyeyongera okuguma n'okubuna mu bantu. 
Acts12:25 Agho Barunaba ni Saulo bwe baamala omulimo gwaibwe baava e Yerusalemu bairayo baatwala Yoanne ayetebwa Mariko. 
Acts13:1 Mu Kikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'omu Antiokia mwalimu abalanzi n'abeegeresa: Barunaba ni Simeoni, eyayetebwanga Omwirugavu, Lukio ow'e Kurene, Menayeni eyakulira aghalala n'omufuzi Herode, ni Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Bwe baali nga bagheereza Musengwa era nga basiiba, Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaabakoba ati: “Mundhawulire Barunaba ni Saulo bankolere omulimo gwe mbeeteire.”" 
Acts13:3 Agho bwe baamala okusiiba n'okusaba, baabaisaaku emikono, baabatuma." 
Acts13:4 Agho Barunaba ni Saulo bwe baamala okutumibwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu, baikirira e Seleukia, era okuva agho, baaseeyeeya baaja e Kupuro." 
Acts13:5 Nga bali e Salami baayegeresa ekibono kya Katonda mu sinagoga edh'Abayudaaya, era nga baali ni Yoanne eyabayambangaku." 
Acts13:6 Bwe baabitabita mu kizinga kyonakyona okutuuka e Pafo, baayagaana Omuyudaaya omulogo, era omulanzi ow'obuguya nga eriina lye ni Bari Yesu." 
Acts13:7 Ono yabanga ew'omufuzi w'ekizinga ekyo, omusaadha eyali omugezi eyayetebwanga Serugio Paulo. Omufuzi ono yaayeta Barunaba ni Saulo, kuba yayenda okuwulira ekibono kya Katonda." 
Acts13:8 Aye Eluma, omulogo ng'eriina lye bwe likoba, yaabatakania nga ayenda omufuzi alobe kwikiriza." 
Acts13:9 Agho Saulo, era amanhiibwa nga Paulo yaidhula Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaasimba Eluma amaiso," 
Acts13:10 yaamukoba ati: “Iwe omwana wa Sitaani! Iwe aidhwire obuguya n'obukupankupania, omuzigu w'obutuukirivu bwonabwona! Tolirekera kugodagoda magira ga Musengwa amatereevu?" 
Acts13:11 Aye mperaano bona eno, Musengwa akusonseemu olwala, oidha kuba mutulu nga tobona ndhuba okumala entangama.” Mangu ago ekifu n'enzikiiza byamugwa ku maiso, yaaghaamanta ng'ayagala ow'okumugema ku mukono." 
Acts13:12 Agho omufuzi bwe yabona ebyaligho yaikiriza nga yeewuunhia inho endhegeresa ya Musengwa. 
Acts13:13 Agho Paulo ni baine baaseeyeeya okuva e Pafo baatuuka e Peruga eky'omu Panfilia, era Yoanne yaabavaaku yairayo e Yerusalemu." 
Acts13:14 Aye baava e Peruga beeyongerayo baatuuka mu Antiokia eky'omu Pisidia. Era ku lunaku lwa Sabbato bangira mu sinagoga baatyama. 
Acts13:15 Ebyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ni mu balanzi bwe byawa okusomebwa, abakulu ba sinagoga baabeeta nga babakoba bati: “Aboluganda, oba nga muli n'ekibono eky'okulamba abantu mukyogere.”" 
Acts13:16 Paulo yaasituka yaabaghemya basirike, yaakoba ati: “Baisiraeli banange n'imwe abatya Katonda, muwulire." 
Acts13:17 Katonda w'abantu bano Abaisiraeli, yalonda badhaadha baife yaabafuula eighanga eikologho, bwe baali mu buwanganguse e Misiri, era yaabatoolayo n'amaani ge agataloodheka." 
Acts13:18 Yaabaguminkiriza mu irungu okumala emyaka nga makumi ana (40). 
Acts13:19 Yaazikiriza amaghanga omusanvu agaali mu nsi ey'e Kanaani, yaabagha ensi eyo okuba obutaka bwaibwe," 
Acts13:20 okumalira irala emyaka nga bikumi bina n'ataanu. “Ebyo bwe byawa, yaabagha abalamuzi okutuusa mu byanda by'omulanzi Samueli." 
Acts13:21 Agho baasaba okugheebwa kyabazinga, Katonda yaabagha Saulo mutabane wa Kishi ow'omu kika kya Benjamini, yaabafugira emyaka amakumi ana (40)." 
Acts13:22 Katonda bwe yamutoolagho, yaabateeragho Daudi okuba kyabazinga waibwe. Ono ni Katonda ye yayogereraku ati: ‘Nzwire mu Daudi omwana wa Yesse omusaadha ye nsiima, anaakolanga byonabyona ebinsangaaza.’" 
Acts13:23 Katonda ng'atuukiriza kye yasuubiza, afuniire Isiraeli Omulokozi Yesu nga amutoola mu izaire lya Daudi ono." 
Acts13:24 Yesu ng'akaali kwidha, Yoanne yalangirira eri abantu ba Isiraeli boonaboona beenenie era babatizibwe." 
Acts13:25 Era Yoanne bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okumaliriza omulimo gwe, yaakoba abantu ati: ‘Mudhuuba muti ninze ani? Ti ninze Oyo. Aye mubone eno, ghaligho aidha okwidha, ye ntagwaine na kutoola ngaito mu bigere bye.’" 
Acts13:26 “Imwe aboluganda baidhukulu ba Aburahamu n'imwe abandi mwenamwena abatya Katonda, obukwenda buno obw'obulokozi bwagheebwa ife." 
Acts13:27 Kuba abantu ab'omu Yerusalemu aghalala n'abafuzi baibwe, tibaamanha Yesu nga n'Omulokozi, waire okutegeera ebibono eby'abalanzi ebisomebwa kiisi lwa Sabbato. Aye baatuukiriza ebibono eby'abalanzi bwe baasalira Yesu omusango ogw'okufa." 
Acts13:28 Waire tibaazuula nsonga emwisa, baasaba Pilato okwita Yesu." 
Acts13:29 Bwe baamala okutuukiriza nga byonabyona ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bimwogeraku, baamughanula ku musalaba baamuta mu magombe." 
Acts13:30 Aye Katonda yaamuzuukiza mu bafu. 
Acts13:31 Yaamala enaku kamaala ng'abonekera abo abaaniinaniina naye e Yerusalemu nga bava e Galilaaya. Abo buti n'abadhulizi be, eri abantu." 
Acts13:32 Kale ni, Amawulire Amalungi ge tubaleetera ni gano nti Katonda yatuukiriza kye yasuubiza badhaadha baife," 
Acts13:33 bwe yazuukiza Yesu ku lwaife baidhukulu be, era nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa mu Zabbuli eyokubiri kiti, ‘Oli Mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzaire.’" 
Acts13:34 Okukakasa nga yamuzuukiza nga takairayo kufa, Katonda kyeyava n'akoba ati, ‘Ndibagha emikisa emitukuvu egitawaagho gye nagha Daudi.’" 
Acts13:35 Ni Zabbuli eyindi ekoba eti, ‘Toliganha mugheereza wo omutukuvu kuvunda.’" 
Acts13:36 Kuba Daudi yamala okukola emirimo gye yamutegekera mu bulamu bwe, yaafa, yaaziikibwa aghali badhaadha be, yaavunda." 
Acts13:37 Aye oyo Katonda ye yazuukiza, tiyavunda." 
Acts13:38 Kale ni aboluganda, mukimanhe muti ghazira asobola kubakobera ku kusoniyibwa bibi nga tabise mu oyo, oba okubawonia ebyo byonabyona ebibalobera okuba abatukuvu okusinziira ku Mateeka ga Musa." 
Acts13:39 Mu oyo, omuntu yeenayeena aikiriza atukuzibwa." 
Acts13:40 Kale mwerinde kirobe kubabaaku abalanzi kye baayogera nga bakoba bati," 
Acts13:41 ‘Mubone eno imwe abanhoomi, mwewuunhie era muzikirire! Kuba nkola omulimo mu biseera byaimwe, omulimo gwe mutaliikiriza, waire nga ghaligho agubainhonhola.’”" 
Acts13:42 Bwe baali bafuluma mu sinagoga, abantu baabasaba baire babakobere ebibono ebyo ku Sabbato eiririra." 
Acts13:43 Abantu nga baviire mu sinagoga, Abayudaaya kamaala n'abamaghanga agandi abaakyuka ni baasoma Ekiyudaaya, baanonereza Paulo ni Barunaba. Paulo ni Barunaba baayogera nabo, baabakubiriza okugumira mu maiso ga Katonda." 
Acts13:44 Ku lwa Sabbato olwairirira, kumpi abantu boonaboona abaali mu kibuga baidha okuwulira ekibono kya Katonda." 
Acts13:45 Aye Abayudaaya bwe baabona eikuukuubira ery'abantu, ensaalwa yaabagema, baatakania Paulo bye yayogera era baamuvuma." 
Acts13:46 Aye Paulo ni Barunaba, baayogera nga bagumu, baakoba bati: “Kibaire kigwaine okusooka okukobera imwe ekibono kya Katonda. Aye nga bwe mukirobye era ni mwesaliragho beene nga bwe mutagwaine kufuna bulamu obutawaagho, kale twidha kubaleka tuje y'abamaghanga agandi" 
Acts13:47 kuba ekyo Musengwa kye yatulagira, bwe yatukoba ati, ‘Nkutairegho obe ekimuliikirira eri abamaghanga agandi, obe obulokozi bw'ensi yoonayoona.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Abamaghanga agandi bwe baawulira ebyo, baasangaala, ekibono kya Katonda baakitaamu ekitiisa. Abo abaali balondeibwa okufuna obulamu obutawaagho baikiriza." 
Acts13:49 Ekibono kya Katonda kyabuna woonawoona mu kiketezo ekyo. 
Acts13:50 Aye Abayudaaya baapikiriza abakazi ab'ekitiisa era abaidhumbiranga eidiini, n'abasaadha abakulu ab'ekibuga, baatoolereza okukiriga Paulo ni Barunaba era baababinga mu kiketezo kyaibwe." 
Acts13:51 Aye Paulo ni Barunaba baakunkumulira abantu abo enkungu ey'omu bigere byaibwe, baaja mu Ikonio," 
Acts13:52 era abeegeresebwa baidhula eisanhu ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu. 
Acts14:1 Agho olwatuuka, Paulo ni Barunaba bangira mu sinagoga y'Abayudaaya mu Ikonio baayegeresa, era Abayudaaya n'Abagureki kamaala inho baikiriza." 
Acts14:2 Aye Abayudaaya abaaloba okwikiriza, baata omwoyo omubi mu bamaghanga agandi okukyagha aboluganda." 
Acts14:3 Eyo baamalayo entangama nga boogera ebya Musengwa nga bagumu. Musengwa yaakakasa bye baayogera ku kisa kye, ng'abakozesa obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio." 
Acts14:4 Abantu mu kibuga beesalamu. Abandi baaba ku luuyi olw'Abayudaaya, abandi baaba ku luuyi olw'Abatume." 
Acts14:5 Agho abamaghanga agandi n'Abayudaaya, ghalala n'abafuzi baibwe baagezaaku okuvuma n'okukuba Abatume amabaale." 
Acts14:6 Aye Abatume bwe baakimanha, baalumukira mu Lisitura ni Derube ebibuga eby'e Lukaonia ni mu biketezo ebikiriinaine" 
Acts14:7 era eyo baakobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi. 
Acts14:8 Mu Lisitura mwalimu omusaadha eyagongobala ebigere, nga mulema okuva mu nda ya inhina era nga tatambulangaku naire. Yali ali agho ng'atyaime." 
Acts14:9 Yaawulirisa Paulo bye yayogera. Paulo bwe yamwekalirisa, yaabona ng'aikiriza era nga asobola okuwonezebwa," 
Acts14:10 yaakangula ku mamiro yaamukoba ati: “Situka oyemerere busimbalaala ku bigere byo.” Omusaadha yaatuuma, yaatambula." 
Acts14:11 Eikuukuubira ery'abantu bwe lyabona Paulo kye yakola, lyaleekaana mu lulimi Olukaonio liti: “Emisambwa egifaanana ng'oti bantu giise ye tuli!”" 
Acts14:12 Barunaba baamweta Dia ate Paulo baamweta Herume, kuba n'eyabanga omwogezi omukulu." 
Acts14:13 Era kabona w'omusambwa Dia eyali n'eisabo lye agho emberi w'ekibuga, yaaleeta ente enume n'ebimuli ku miryango gy'ekibuga, ng'ayenda abantu bamweyimbeku bagheeyo omusengo." 
Acts14:14 Aye Abatume Barunaba ni Paulo bwe baawulira ekyo, baakanula ebivaalo byaibwe, baalumuka, beekuba mu bantu baayasiikana bati:" 
Acts14:15 “Basaadha imwe, lwaki mukola ebyo? Twena tuli bantu buntu nga imwe. Tubaleeteire Amawulire Amalungi, musobole okuleka ebyo ebitaganhula, mwire ye Katonda omulamu eyakola eigulu, n'ensi, n'enhandha ni byonabyona ebibirimu." 
Acts14:16 Mu byanda eby'eira Katonda yaleka abantu boonaboona baakolanga nga bwe baayendanga. 
Acts14:17 Ate nga Katonda tiyeegisa, yeeyoleka mu ebyo ebikalamu by'akola: Abagha amaadhi, okuva mu igulu, abaza ebibala mu biseera byabyo, abagha emere era aidhuza emyoyo gyaimwe okusagamba.”" 
Acts14:18 Waire baayogera ebyo, baabulaku katono balemwe okulobera abantu okughaayo emisengo ye bali." 
Acts14:19 Agho ghaabaagho Abayudaaya abaava mu Antiokia ni mu Ikonio baasendasenda abantu baakuba Paulo amabaale, baamukulula, baamufulumya mu kibuga nga badhuuba bati afiire." 
Acts14:20 Aye abeegeresebwa bwe baamwezungulula, yaasituka yairayo mu kibuga. Ku lunaku olwairirira Paulo ni Barunaba baaja e Derube." 
Acts14:21 Paulo ni Barunaba bwe baamala okukobera abantu b'e Derube Amawulire Amalungi, ni bafuna abeegeresebwa kamaala, kabiri bairayo mu Lisitura, ni mu Ikonio, ni mu Antiokia." 
Acts14:22 Baagumya emyoyo gy'abeegeresebwa era nga babasikirira okunhweza okwikiriza, nga babakoba bati: “Tuli n'okubita mu bizibu kyodo okwingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda.”" 
Acts14:23 Bwe baamala okutaagho, abakulembeze mu kiisi Kikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito baabagemya Musengwa ye baikiriza, nga basaba era nga basiiba." 
Acts14:24 Baabitira mu Pisidia baatuuka mu Panfilia. 
Acts14:25 Nga bamaze okukobera ab'e Peruga ekibono kya Katonda baikirira mu Attalia. 
Acts14:26 Bwe baavaayo, baaseeyeeya baaja mu Antiokia. Eno ye baasooka okufunira obuyambi bwa Katonda, bwe baali nga baja okwinhama omulimo guno gwe baali nga baakafundikira." 
Acts14:27 Bwe baatuuka mu Antiokia baasoloza Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, baabakobera byonabyona Katonda bye yabakozesa era nga bw'alaze abamaghanga agandi engira ey'okwikiriza." 
Acts14:28 Baamalayo entangama nga bali n'abeegeresebwa. 
Acts15:1 Agho, abantu abandi baava e Buyudaaya baaja mu Antiokia baayegeresa aboluganda bati: “Bwe mutakeketebwa nga Musa bwe yalagira, timughanga kulokolebwa.”" 
Acts15:2 Paulo ni Barunaba baayawukana nabo ku kino era baatakana inho nabo. Kale Paulo ni Barunaba n'abandi baatumibwa okuja e Yerusalemu y'Abatume n'abakulembeze ab'abaikiriza, bababone ku nsonga eyo." 
Acts15:3 Agho ab'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito bwe baamala okubatuma, bano baabita mu Foenikia ni mu Samaria nga baja bainhonhola okukyuka kw'abamaghanga agandi ni baikiriza. Era kino kyasangaaza inho aboluganda." 
Acts15:4 Bwe baatuuka e Yerusalemu, ab'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ghalala n'Abatume n'abakulembeze b'abaikiriza, baabasangaalira. Paulo ni Barunaba baabakobera byonabyona Katonda bye yabakozesa." 
Acts15:5 Aye abandi ku baikiriza ab'omu kikunsu ky'Abafarisaayo baasituka baakoba bati: “Abamaghanga agandi bateekwa okukeketebwa n'okulagirwa okugemanga Amateeka ga Musa.” 
Acts15:6 Abatume n'abakulembeze b'abaikiriza beesoloza okulinga mu nsonga eyo. 
Acts15:7 Bwe baamala okukubagania ebidhuubo einho, Petero yaayemerera, yaakoba ati: “Aboluganda, mwidhi muti mu nnaku edhaabita Katonda yaanonda mu imwe, nkobere abamaghanga agandi Amawulire Amalungi basobole okwikiriza." 
Acts15:8 Katonda aidhi ebiri mu myoyo gy'abantu, yakakasa ekyo yaabagha Mwoyo Mutukuvu nga twena bwe yamutugha." 
Acts15:9 Tiyataagho ndhawulo ghagati waife nabo, kuba yayamula emyoyo gyaibwe na kwikiriza." 
Acts15:10 Kale mperaano, lwaki muleba Katonda nga mutwika abaikiriza emigugu badhaadha baife, waire ife, gye tutaghanga kwetwika?" 
Acts15:11 Aye twikiriza tuti ife tulokolebwa lwa kisa kya Musengwa Yesu nga boona bwe balokolebwa.” 
Acts15:12 Agho abaali mu lwekobaano boonaboona baasirika baawulirisa Barunaba ni Paulo nga babalomboodhera obumanhiso n'ebyewuninkiriza byonabyona Katonda bye yabakozesa mu bamaghanga agandi. 
Acts15:13 Bwe baamala okwogera ni basirika Yakobo yaakoba ati: “Aboluganda, mumpulirise." 
Acts15:14 Simoni ainhonhoire nga Katonda bwe yasooka okwoleka ng'alumirwa abamaghanga agandi, yaabalondamu abantu ab'okuba ababe." 
Acts15:15 Ekyo kiikirizagania bukalamu n'eby'abalanzi ebyaghandiikibwa biti," 
Acts15:16 ‘Ebyo nga biwoire, ndiira era ndizimba enhumba ya Daudi eyagwa. Ndigizimba mu kyanhe kyayo, naagiizaagho." 
Acts15:17 Abantu abandi boonaboona n'abamaghanga agandi boonaboona, be nayeta okuba abantu bange, basobole okunoonia Musengwa." 
Acts15:18 Musengwa atyo bw'akoba eyakola ebintu bino ni bimanhibwa okuva eira n'eira.’ 
Acts15:19 “Kale, nze nkoba tulobe kudaaza bamaghanga gandi abaira ye Katonda." 
Acts15:20 Aye tubaghandiikire tubakobe beeghale okutwalirizibwa ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, obwenzi, ebitugiibwa waire omusaayi." 
Acts15:21 Kuba Amateeka ga Musa okuva eira n'eira gasomebwa ku buli Sabbato mu sinagoga era googerebwaku mu buli kibuga.” 
Acts15:22 Agho Abatume n'abakulembeze ab'abaikiriza, ghalala n'Ekikunsu kyonakyona eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, baakibona nga kikalamu okwerondamu abasaadha babatume mu Antiokia, baje ni Paulo ni Barunaba. Baalonda Yuda ayetebwa Barusabba ni Sila, abaali abakulembeze mu boluganda." 
Acts15:23 Baabagha embaluwa ekoba eti: “Ife aboluganda, Abatume n'abakulembeze b'abaikiriza, tubalamwisa imwe aboluganda abamaghanga agandi ab'omu Antiokia ni Siria ni Kilikia." 
Acts15:24 Tuwuliire tuti ghaligho abaava mu ife baidha baabadaaza n'ebibono ebyabatabula ebidhuubo, waire nga ife titubatumanga." 
Acts15:25 Kale nga tweyimbye ghalala, tuboine nga kikalamu okulonda abasaadha tubatume ye muli. Bano baidha kwidha ni bakagwa baife Barunaba ni Paulo," 
Acts15:26 abasaadha abeeghaayo olw'okugheereza Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito. 
Acts15:27 Kale tutumye Yuda ni Sila abaidha beene okubakobera ebyo. 
Acts15:28 Mwoyo Mutukuvu ng'ali ghalala n'ife, kitubonekeire nga kikalamu obutabatwika mugugu gundi, okutoolaku bino ebigwaniire:" 
Acts15:29 Mweghalenga okughangayo emisengo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, mweghalenga okulya omusaayi, mweghalenga okulya ebitugiibwa, mweghalenga n'obwenzi. Bwe muneeghala ebintu ebyo munaaba mukoze bukalamu.”" 
Acts15:30 Agho abaatumibwa baikirira mu Antiokia baasoloza Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, baabagha embaluwa." 
Acts15:31 Baasoma embaluwa era baasangaala olw'obukwenda obugumya obwagirimu. 
Acts15:32 Yuda ni Sila boona nga bwe baali abalanzi, baalamba aboluganda mu bibono kamaala era baabagumya." 
Acts15:33 Bwe baamalayooku entangama, aboluganda baabasiibula, baje miraala nga bairayo y'abaabatuma. [" 
Acts15:34 Aye Sila yaakibona nga kikalamu okusigalayo.] 
Acts15:35 Paulo ni Barunaba baamalayooku entangama mu Antiokia ni banaibwe abandi, nga bakobera era nga beegeresa abantu ekibono kya Musengwa." 
Acts15:36 Enaku bwe dhaabitagho, Paulo yaakoba Barunaba ati: “Twireyo tulambuule aboluganda mu kiisi kibuga ye twakobera abantu ekibono kya Katonda, tubone nga bwe bali.”" 
Acts15:37 Barunaba yaayenda baje ni Yoanne ayetebwa Mariko. 
Acts15:38 Aye Paulo yaaloba kukisiima okuja n'omuntu eyabaleka mu Panfilia n'ataba nabo ku mulimo. 
Acts15:39 Ghaabaagho okutakana okw'amaani ghagati waibwe, n'okwawukana baayawukana. Barunaba yaaja ni Mariko baasomoka baalaga e Kupuro." 
Acts15:40 Aye Paulo yaalonda Sila, baaja, era nga n'aboluganda babasabira babe n'enkabi dha Musengwa." 
Acts15:41 Yaabita mu Siria ni mu Kilikia ng'agumya Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito. 
Acts16:1 Agho Paulo yaikirira e Derube n'e Lisitura. Eyo yaliyo omwegeresebwa eyayetebwanga Timotheo. Inhina yali Muyudaaya aikiriza mu Kurisito, aye nga ise Mugureki." 
Acts16:2 Aboluganda boonaboona ab'omu Lisitura ni Ikonio nga boogera bukalamu ku Timotheo ono. 
Acts16:3 Paulo yaayenda okuja naye, kale yaamukeketa, kuba Abayudaaya abaali mu biketezo ebyo boonaboona baali baidhi nga ise yali Mugureki." 
Acts16:4 Baabita mu bibuga nga basikirira abaikiriza okugema ebyasalibwagho Abatume n'abakulembeze b'abaikiriza mu abaali mu Yerusalemu. 
Acts16:5 Agho Ebikunsu by'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byakalangulwa era n'omughendo gwabyo gweyongera buli lunaku. 
Acts16:6 Baabita mu kiketezo eky'e Furugia ni Galatia, Mwoyo Mutukuvu ng'abalobera okukobera abantu ekibono kya Katonda mu Asia." 
Acts16:7 Bwe baatuuka okumpi ni Musia, baagezaaku okuja mu kiketezo eky'e Bithunia, aye Mwoyo wa Yesu yaaloba kubaganha." 
Acts16:8 Kale baabita ku Musia baikirira e Turoa. 
Acts16:9 Obwire Paulo yaabonekerwa. Yaabona omuntu ow'omu Makedonia ng'ayemereire nga amweghemba ati: “Somoka e Makedonia otubeere.” 
Acts16:10 Bwe yamala okubonekerwa, mangu ago twasala amagezi okuja e Makedonia nga tukakaisa tuti Katonda atwese okukobera abaayo Amawulire Amalungi." 
Acts16:11 Twaseeyeeya okuva e Turoa, twaja busimbalaala e Samothirakia, era ku lunaku olwairirira twatuuka e Neapoli." 
Acts16:12 Bwe twavaayo, twatuuka e Filippi, ekibuga ekikulu eky'e Makedonia era eitwale ery'Abaroma. Era twaba mu kibuga kino okumala enaku." 
Acts16:13 Ku lunaku lwa Sabbato twafuluma mu kibuga twaja ku mwiga ye twadhuuba ng'esobola okubaayo ekifo eky'okusabiramu. Twatyama twayogera n'abakazi abaali beesoloiza. 
Acts16:14 Ghaabaagho omukazi mulala ng'eriina lye ni Ludia nga ava mu kibuga Thuyatira. Yali atundanga bivaalo ebya nakasooma era nga atya Katonda. Ono Musengwa yamugha omwoyo omugonvu, yaikiriza ebyo Paulo bye yayogera." 
Acts16:15 Ono n'ab'omu ndhu ye bwe baamala okubatizibwa, yaatusaba ng'akoba ati: “Oba nga muboine nga ndhikiriza Musengwa bwenebwene, mwidhe mube ewange.” Yaatwikirizisa twaja." 
Acts16:16 Olunaku lulala twali tuja mu kifo ekisabirwamu, twayagaana omughala omwiru eyali abandwa omuzimu ogulagula era eyafuniranga basengwa be ebintu ekyodo ng'alagula." 
Acts16:17 Yaanonereza Paulo n'ife bw'ayasiikana ati: “Abantu bano bagheereza ba Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene, abali kubakobera nga bwe mughanga okulokolebwa.”" 
Acts16:18 Kino yakikola okumala enaku kamaala. Aye kino kyanhiiza Paulo, yaakyuka yaakoba omuzimu omubi ogwo ati: “Mu liina lya Yesu Kurisito nkulagira muveeku.” Mangu ago omuzimu gwamuvaaku." 
Acts16:19 Basengwa b'omughala bwe baabona nga eisuubi ery'okufuna ebintu liwoiregho, baagema Paulo ni Sila baabakwekwebya baabatwala mu kiya mu maiso ag'abafuzi." 
Acts16:20 Bwe baabatuusa y'abalamuzi baakoba bati: “Abantu bano Bayudaaya era batabulatabula ekibuga kyaife. 
Acts16:21 Beegeresa empisa edhikontana n'amateeka gaife dhe tutaghanga kuganha waire okudhikoleraku.” 
Acts16:22 Eikuukuubira lyeyimba mu kubalumba. Abalamuzi baabakanulaku ebivaalo byaibwe, baalagira okubakuba emiigo." 
Acts16:23 Bwe baamala okubakubira irala emiigo, baabata mu ikomera, baalagira omukuumi okubakuumira irala." 
Acts16:24 Omukuumi w'eikomera ng'amaze okulagirwa atyo, yaabata mu kaduukulu n'amagulu gaibwe ng'agasibiire mu nkoligo." 
Acts16:25 Agho nga mu bwire ghagati, Paulo ni Sila baali basaba Katonda era nga bamusaaka mu nhembo, era n'abasibe nga bali kuwulirisa." 
Acts16:26 Mangu ago ghaabaagho musisi ow'amaani einho, yaatengeesa eikomera n'emisingi gyalyo. Agho endhigi edh'eikomera dhaiguka dhoonadhoona, n'endhegere edhaali dhisibye abasibe dhaasibulukuka." 
Acts16:27 Omukuumi w'eikomera bwe yazuuka n'abona endhigi edh'eikomera nga ndhigule, yaasowolayo empiima ye era yali aja kweita ng'adhuuba ati abasibe beibye." 
Acts16:28 Aye Paulo yaayasiikana ati: “Oteita! Twenatwena tuligho!” 
Acts16:29 Agho omukuumi ow'eikomera yaayetesa eitaala, yangira mangu, yeeyala gh'ebigere bya Paulo ni Sila ng'adhugumira." 
Acts16:30 Yaabafulumya ku luya yaababuuza ati: “Baisebo nteekwa kukola ki okughanga okulokolebwa?” 
Acts16:31 Baakoba bati: “Ikiriza Musengwa Yesu oidha kulokolebwa, iwe n'ab'omu ndhu yo boonaboona.”" 
Acts16:32 Agho baamukobera ekibono kya Musengwa n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona. 
Acts16:33 Ku saawa yeene eyo, ey'obwire, omukuumi w'eikomera yaabatwala, yaabanhiga ebibwa, era mangu ago yaabatizibwa ghalala n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona." 
Acts16:34 Agho yaatwala Paulo ni Sila mu ndhu ye, yaabagha eby'okulya. Yaasangaala ghalala n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona, olw'okuba baikiriza Katonda." 
Acts16:35 Obwire bwe bwakya, abalamuzi baatuma abaisirukale nga bakoba bati: “Abantu abo mubalekule.”" 
Acts16:36 Agho omukuumi w'eikomera yaakoba Paulo ati: “Abalamuzi balagiire okubalekula. Kale mperaano mufulume muje bwera.” 
Acts16:37 Aye Paulo yaabairamu ati: “Baamaze okutukubira mu maiso g'abantu nga tituwoziiza na kuwoza, baatuta ni mu ikomera ate nga tuli Baroma, mperaano batulekula batya mu kyama? Busa, beene abo n'ababe baidhe batulekule.”" 
Acts16:38 Abaisirukale baakobera abalamuzi ebibono ebyo. Abalamuzi bwe baawulira bati Paulo ni Sila Baroma, baatya." 
Acts16:39 Baaja baabeeghemba, baabafulumya mu ikomera era baabasaba bave mu kibuga." 
Acts16:40 Agho Paulo ni Sila baava mu ikomera baaja ewa Ludia. Bwe baamala okubona aboluganda n'okubagumya, beeyongerayo." 
Acts17:1 Baatambula, baabita mu Anfipoli ni mu Apollonia, baatuuka e Thessalonika eyali sinagoga ey'Abayudaaya." 
Acts17:2 Agho ng'empisa ya Paulo bwe yali, yaaja mu sinagoga. Yaamala Sabbato isatu ng'akubagania ebidhuubo n'abantu okuva mu Byaghandiikibwa." 
Acts17:3 Yainhonholanga era yaalaga nga Kurisito bwe yali ateekwa okudaazibwadaazibwa era n'okuzuukira. Era yaabakoba ati: “Yesu ono ye mbakobera, ni Kurisito.”" 
Acts17:4 Abandi ku abo baikiriza, beeyimba ku Paulo ni Sila n'Abagureki kamaala abatya Katonda, n'abakazi kamaala ab'ekitiisa boona baabeeyimbaku." 
Acts17:5 Aye Abayudaaya ensaalwa yaabagema, baasoloza abantu ababi abaali mu kiya. Abantu abo baatabangula ekibuga, baalumba enhumba ya Yasoni nga baagala Paulo ni Sila babaleete y'abantu." 
Acts17:6 Era bwebataababona, baakwekwebya Yasoni n'aboluganda abandi baabatwala y'abalamuzi nga bwe baasiikana bati: “Abantu bano abaleeta ebizibu woonawoona, baidhie ni ghano," 
Acts17:7 era ni Yasoni yaabasangaalira. Boonaboona bali kudheemera amateeka ga Kaisari nga bakoba bati, ‘Ghaligho kyabazinga owundi ayetebwa Yesu.’ ”" 
Acts17:8 Ekiyindi ky'abantu kyonakyona ghalala n'abakulu b'ekibuga, bwe baawulira ebyo, beegugunga." 
Acts17:9 Yasoni ni baine nga bamaze okweyimirirwa, baabalekula." 
Acts17:10 Amangu ng'obwire buzibye, aboluganda baasindika Paulo ni Sila e Beroa. Bwe baatuuka eyo baaja mu sinagoga ey'Abayudaaya." 
Acts17:11 Abayudaaya baayo baali bakalamu okusinga ab'e Thessalonika, kuba baayangugha okwikiriza ekibono kya Katonda. Era buliidho nga beekebeedha Ebyaghandiikibwa okubona oba nga bityo bwe biri." 
Acts17:12 Kale ni kamaala ku abo baikiriza, abakazi Abagureki ab'ekitiisa n'abasaadha kamaala boona baikiriza." 
Acts17:13 Aye Abayudaaya ab'e Thessalonika bwe baawulira nga Paulo yakobera ab'e Beroa ekibono kya Katonda, baaja eyo yoona era baatoolera okusiikuula n'okudhagalaza abantu." 
Acts17:14 Mangu ago aboluganda baagheereza Paulo ku nhandha, aye Sila ni Timotheo baasigala." 
Acts17:15 Abo abaagherekeraku Paulo baamutuusa mu Athene. Era bwe yamala okubalagiriza okukoba Sila ni Timotheo okuja y'ali amangu, bairayo." 
Acts17:16 Agho Paulo bwe yali mu Athene ng'ateegerera Sila ni Timotheo, omwoyo gwe gwamuluma olw'okubona nga ekibuga kiidhwire ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda." 
Acts17:17 Kale yaatakananga n'Abayudaaya, n'abantu abandi abata mu Katonda ekitiisa, era buliidho yaatakananga n'abantu abaalinga baidhie mu kiya." 
Acts17:18 Abandi ku bakabwidhibwidhi abeetebwa Abepikuro n'Abasitoiki boona baatakana naye. Abandi baakoba bati: “Ono alabankana naki?” Abandi baakoba bati: “Ali oti ayegeresa ku bakatonda ba maghanga gandi.” Kuba yali ayegeresa ku Yesu n'okuzuukira. 
Acts17:19 Agho baamugemaku baamutwala mu Areopago, ekisenge eky'olwekobaano, baamukoba bati: “Tukobere ku kwegeresa kuno okuyaaka kw'oyogeraku," 
Acts17:20 kuba ghaligho by'oli kwogeraku bye tutawulirangaku, kale twenda tubitegeere.”" 
Acts17:21 Kuba abantu abaabanga mu Athene, abatyamye n'abatali batyamye, baamalanga ebiseera byaibwe byonabyona mu kwogera na kuwulirisa biyaaka." 
Acts17:22 Agho Paulo yaayemerera mu Areopago, ekisenge eky'olwekobaano, yaakoba ati: “Abasaadha ab'e Athene, mbona nga mwenda inho okusinza" 
Acts17:23 kuba bwe mbaire nga ntambulatambula mu kibuga kyaimwe, naabona ebintu bye musinza era naayagaana alutaari eyaghandiikibwaku eti, ‘Ya katonda atamanhiibwa.’ Oyo ye musinza nga timumwidhi, n'oyo nze ye mbakobera." 
Acts17:24 Katonda eyakola ensi n'ebigirimu byonabyona, oyo ni Musengwa w'eigulu n'ensi era oyo taba mu masabo gazimbibwa bantu." 
Acts17:25 Era oyo ghazira kye yeetaaga bantu kumukolera, kuba oyo n'abagha obulamu na buli kintu." 
Acts17:26 Mu muntu omulala Katonda ye yatonda, n'omwava amaghanga goonagoona ag'abantu agabunia ensi. Yasooka okubateeragho ebiseera ebigere, n'ensalo edh'ebifo mwe banaabanga." 
Acts17:27 Olwo bamwagale nga bali n'eisuubi ery'okumubona, waire nga tali ghala na kiisi mulala ku ife" 
Acts17:28 kuba, ‘Ku lulwe tuba balamu, tutambula era tubaagho.’ Era nga ku bandi abayesa endheso dhaimwe bwe bakoba bati: ‘Tuli izaire lye lyene.’" 
Acts17:29 Agho ni nga bwe tuli eizaire lya Katonda, titugwaine kudhuuba tuti Katonda afaanana ebintu ebikolebwa mu zaabu, oba mu feeza, oba mu mabaale, mu magezi ni mu kutetenkania kw'abantu." 
Acts17:30 Katonda tiyafanga ku ebyo abantu bye baakolanga olw'obutamanha bwaibwe, aye mperaano alagira abantu boonaboona ghe bali, beenenie" 
Acts17:31 kuba yataagho olunaku, lw'aja okusaliraku ensi yoonayoona omusango mu mazima ng'abita mu muntu ye yalonda, era kino yakikakasa abantu boonaboona bwe yazuukiza omuntu oyo.”" 
Acts17:32 Bwe baawulira Paulo ng'ayogera ku kuzuukira abandi baamusekerera aye abandi baakoba bati: “Olitukoberaku kino kabiri olundi.” 
Acts17:33 Agho Paulo yaava ghe baali yaaja. 
Acts17:34 Aye abasaadha abandi baamweyimbaku baikiriza, mu bano mwalimu Dionusio Omwareopago era n'omukazi Damari era ghalala n'abandi abaali nabo." 
Acts18:1 Ebyo nga biwoire, Paulo yaava mu Athene yaaja e Korintho" 
Acts18:2 Eyo yaayagaanayo Omuyudaaya eriina lye nga ni Akwila, eyazaalibwa e Ponto, ni mukazi we Purisikilla. Baali baakava mu Italia kuba Kilaudio yali alagiire Abayudaaya boonaboona okuva mu Roma. Paulo yaaja ye bali," 
Acts18:3 yaaba nabo, era yaakola nabo, kuba boona baakolanga omulimo n'omulala ng'ogwa Paulo ogw'okukola weema." 
Acts18:4 Ku buli Sabbato Paulo yatakananga n'Abayudaaya n'Abagureki nga agezaaku okubaikirizisa. 
Acts18:5 Sila ni Timotheo bwe baatuuka okuva e Makedonia, Paulo nga yeemaliire ku kwogera Kibono kya Katonda na kukakasa Abayudaaya ati Yesu ni Kurisito." 
Acts18:6 Bwe baamutakania ni bamuvuma, yaakunkumula ebivaalo bye yaakoba ati: “Bwe mulizikirira ogwo musango gwaimwe. Nze nziraku musango. Okuva ni buti ndidha kuja y'abamaghanga agandi.”" 
Acts18:7 Agho yaavaayo yaaja mu ndhu y'omuntu eriina lye nga ni Titio Yusito, ng'ataamu Katonda ekitiisa. Ono yali n'endhu okumpi ni sinagoga." 
Acts18:8 Kurisipo omukulu wa sinagoga n'ab'omu ndhu ye boonaboona baikiriza mu Musengwa. N'ab'e Korintho kamaala bwe baawulira ekibono kya Katonda baikiriza, baabatizibwa." 
Acts18:9 Lwali lulala, Musengwa yaabonekera Paulo obwire yaamukoba ati: “Otatya aye yogera era otasirika." 
Acts18:10 Kuba ndi n'iwe, ghazira aidha kukukola kabi, kuba ndi n'abantu kamaala mu kibuga muno.”" 
Acts18:11 Agho Paulo yaamalagho omwaka mulamba n'emyezi mukaaga ng'ayegeresa abantu ekibono kya Katonda. 
Acts18:12 Gallio bwe yali nga n'afuga Akaia, Abayudaaya beeyimba ghalala, baagema Paulo baamutwala mu mbuga." 
Acts18:13 Baakoba bati: “Omusaadha ono, aikirizisa abantu okusinza Katonda mu nsambo emenha amateeka.”" 
Acts18:14 Aye Paulo bwe yali oti aja kwinhama okwogera, Gallio yaakoba Abayudaaya ati: “Abayudaaya imwe nguli ghabairegho ekisobyo oba omusango omunene nandibawuliriisa." 
Acts18:15 Aye ng'okutakana kwaimwe bwe kuli ku bibono, ni ku maina, ni ku mateeka gaimwe, ebyo imwe mubikoleku. Tiidha kuba mulamuzi mu bintu oti n'ebyo.”" 
Acts18:16 Yaababinga mu mbuga. 
Acts18:17 Boonaboona baagema Sosithene omukulu wa sinagoga baamukubira mu maiso g'embuga aye Gallio tiyabalaadha. 
Acts18:18 Paulo yaabaayooku enaku edhindi kamaala mu Korintho, memale yaasiibula aboluganda. Yaaseeyeeya ni Purisikilla ni Akwila baaja e Siria. Ng'ali mu Kenkerea yaamwaku enviiri dhe nga bwe yali yeeyamye." 
Acts18:19 Baatuuka mu Efeso yaaleka agho Purisikilla ni Akwila, mwene yangira mu sinagoga yaatakana n'Abayudaaya." 
Acts18:20 Abantu baamusaba abeeku nabo entangama, aye yaaloba," 
Acts18:21 yaabakoba ati: “Katonda bw'alyenda ndiira ye muli.” Yaaseeyeeya yaava mu Efeso. 
Acts18:22 Bwe yatuuka e Kaisaria yaaniinaniina, yaaja yaalamusa ab'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito memale, yaikirira mu Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Nga amazeeyooku entangama, yaavaayo, yaaja ng'abita mu biketezo eby'e Galatia n'eby'e Furugia ng'agumya abeegeresebwa boonaboona." 
Acts18:24 Agho Omuyudaaya ayetebwa Apollo, eyazaalibwa mu Alekisanderia, yaidha mu Efeso. Yali mwogezi mukalamu era nga aidhi inho Ebyaghandiikibwa." 
Acts18:25 Yali ayegereseibwa Engira ya Musengwa. Yaafubanga inho n'obumalirivu okwogera n'okwegeresa obukalamu ebigema ku Yesu, waire nga yali aidhi kubatizibwa kwa Yoanne kwonka." 
Acts18:26 Yaatoolera okwogera mu sinagoga nga tatya. Aye Purisikilla ni Akwila bwe baamuwulira, baamutwala baayongera okumwinhonhola bukalamu Engira ya Katonda." 
Acts18:27 Apollo bwe yaayenda okuja mu Akaia, aboluganda ab'omu Efeso baamugumya era baaghandiikira abeegeresebwa bamusangaalire. Bwe yatuukayo yaayamba inho abo abaafuuka abaikiriza olw'ekisa kya Katonda." 
Acts18:28 Kuba yatakananga inho n'Abayudaaya era yaabasingiranga mu maiso g'abantu, ng'akozesa Ebyaghandiikibwa okukakasa ati Yesu, ni Kurisito." 
Acts19:1 Apollo bwe yali mu Korintho, Paulo yaabita mu kiketezo eky'eitale yaatuuka mu Efeso, yaayagaanayo abandi ku baikiriza," 
Acts19:2 yaababuuza ati: “Mwafuna Mwoyo Mutukuvu bwe mwaikiriza?” Baamwiramu bati: “Tituwuliranga naku tuti eriyo Mwoyo Mutukuvu.” 
Acts19:3 Yaabakoba ati: “Kale okubatizibwa kwaimwe kwali kwa nsambo ki?” Baamwiramu bati: 
Acts19:4 “Okubatizibwa kwa Yoanne.” Paulo yaabakoba ati: “Yoanne yabatiza n'okubatizibwa okw'okwenenia, yaakoba abantu baikirize oyo amuvaaku einhuma, oyo nga ni Yesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Bwe baawulira ekyo baabatizibwa mu liina lya Musengwa Yesu. 
Acts19:6 Paulo bwe yabaisaaku emikono, Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaabaikaku baayogera mu nnimi era baayogera ekibono kya Katonda." 
Acts19:7 Boonaboona aghalala baali abantu nga ikumi na babiri. 
Acts19:8 Agho Paulo yangira mu sinagoga yaayogeranga nga tatya okumala emyezi esatu. Yaatakananga nabo ng'agezaaku okubaikirizisa ebigema ku Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda. 
Acts19:9 Aye abandi baali bakakanhavu, baaloba okwikiriza era baavuma Engira ya Musengwa mu maiso g'ekikunsu. Paulo yaabavaaku, yaaja n'abeegeresebwa yaayogereranga mu isomero lya Turanno, buli lunaku." 
Acts19:10 Yaakolanga atyo okumala emyaka ebiri, era abantu boonaboona ab'omu Asia, Abayudaaya n'Abagureki, baawulira ekibono kya Musengwa." 
Acts19:11 Katonda yaakozesa Paulo ebyewuunhio ebitaloodheka 
Acts19:12 ng'ebitambaala n'ebivaalo ebyavanga ku mubiri gwe baabitwaliranga abalwaire baawonezebwanga era n'abalingaku emizimu emibi gyabavaaku. 
Acts19:13 Agho abandi ku Bayudaaya, abaatambulanga ghano ni ghale nga babinga emizimu emibi ku bantu, beetulinkiriza baakozesa eriina lya Musengwa Yesu okugibinga nga bagikoba bati: “Nkulagira mu liina lya Yesu Paulo y'akobera abantu.”" 
Acts19:14 Agho ghaaligho Omukulu wa Bakabona Omuyudaaya eriina lye Sukewa yali ni batabane be musanvu abaakolanga batyo. 
Acts19:15 Aye omuzimu omubi gwabairamu guti: “Yesu mmwidhi, ni Paulo mmwidhi, aye imwe n'imwe baani?”" 
Acts19:16 Agho omuntu eyaliku omuzimu omubi yaabatuumiraku yaabakalangula, yaabasinza amaani, baalumuka mu ndhu ng'abataireku ebibwa era nga n'ebivaalo byaibwe abikanwirekanwire." 
Acts19:17 Ekintu kino kyamanhibwa abantu boonaboona ab'omu Efeso. Abayudaaya aghalala n'Abagureki boonaboona baatya inho, n'eriina lya Musengwa Yesu lyagheebwa ekitiisa." 
Acts19:18 Abantu kamaala abaali nga buti bafuuse abaikiriza, baidha beenenia ebibi byaibwe ng'abantu boonaboona babona." 
Acts19:19 Era abantu kamaala ku abo abaakolanga eby'obulogo, baasololeza ghalala ebitabo byaibwe, baabyokya ng'abantu boonaboona babona. Omughendo gw'ebitabo bino bwe gwabalirirwa gwaba ebitundu bya feeza emitwalo etaanu (50,000)." 
Acts19:20 Kale ekibono kya Musengwa kyeyongera okubuna n'okusimba emizi. 
Acts19:21 Ebyo nga bimaze okubaagho, Paulo yaamalirira mu mwoyo gwe okubita mu Makedonia ni mu Akaia era aje e Yerusalemu era yaakoba ati: “Nga mmaze okutuuka eyo, nteekwa n'okuja e Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Bwe yamala okutuma Timotheo ni Erasito, ababiri ku abo abaamuyambangaku, mwene yaaba ng'akaasigaireku entangama mu Asia." 
Acts19:23 Mu kiseera ekyo ghaabaagho akeegugungo akanene mu Efeso olw'Engira ya Musengwa. 
Acts19:24 Omusaadha eyayetebwanga Demetirio, omugheesi w'ebintu bya feeza, eyakolanga obusabo obwa feeza obwa Aritemi, yaleeteranga abagheesi obukombe bungi." 
Acts19:25 Yaasoloza abagheesi abo boonaboona ghalala n'abo abaakolanga omulimo ogufaananaku oti n'ogwo, yaabakoba ati: “Bakagwa, mwidhi ng'obukombe bwaife buva mu mulimo guno." 
Acts19:26 Aye mubona era muwulira Paulo ono bw'aikiriziisa era bw'akyusiisa abantu kamaala, ti mu Efeso mwonka aye kumpi Asia yoonayoona ng'akoba ati ebintu ebyetebwa bakatonda ebikolebwa abantu obuntu, ti Katonda." 
Acts19:27 Era ghaligho akabi, ti lwa mulimo gwaife kunhoomebwa kyonka, aye n'eisabo lya Aritemi, omusambwa omukazi, okutwalibwa ng'eritagasa.”" 
Acts19:28 Bwe baawulira ebyo baidhula obusungu baayasiikana bati: “Aritemi ow'ab'Efeso mukulu.” 
Acts19:29 Era ekibuga kyaidhula akeegugungo. Ekiyindi ky'abantu kyeyuna mu kifo kye bazaanhirangamu emizaanho, nga kighaluza Gayo ni Arisitaruko ab'e Makedonia ababiri ku abo abaatambulanga ni Paulo." 
Acts19:30 Paulo yaayenda okuja y'ekiyindi ky'abantu aye abeegeresebwa baaloba kumuganha. 
Acts19:31 Abandi ku bakungu ab'omu Asia abaali bakagwa be, boona baamutumira nga bamweghemba alobe kugezaaku kuja mu kifo kye bazaanhiramu emizaanho." 
Acts19:32 Mu kiseera ekyo olwekobaano lwonalwona lwali lutabwike nga baasiikana, ng'abandi boogera kino ng'ate, abandi boogera kire, era ng'abasinga obungi tibaidhi nsonga lwaki beesoloiza." 
Acts19:33 Baatoola Alekisandero mu kiyindi, Abayudaaya baamusindiikiriza baamwemereza emberi. Agho Alekisandero yaabaghemya ng'ayenda abeeku kyainhonhola abantu." 
Acts19:34 Aye bwe baamanha nga Muyudaaya baayasiikanira ghalala boonaboona okumala esaawa ibiri nga bakoba bati: “Aritemi ow'Abefeso mukulu.” 
Acts19:35 Olumaliira, omughandiisi w'ekibuga yaasirisa abantu yaabakoba ati: “Abasaadha ab'Efeso, naani ataidhi ng'ekibuga ky'ab'Efeso n'omuli eisabo ly'omukulu Aritemi, aghalala n'eibaale eitukuvu eryava mu igulu?" 
Acts19:36 Kale ekyo nga bwe ghazira asobola kukitakania, mugwaine okuwoleera, mulobe kwanguyiriza kukola kintu kyonakyona." 
Acts19:37 Mpegaano muleese abantu bano ghano waire nga tibanhaze bya mu isabo, oba okuvuma omusambwa gwaife omukazi." 
Acts19:38 Oba nga Demetirio ni bagheesi baine bali ni ye baghaghabira, embuga erigho n'abalamuzi baligho, baje bawoleze eyo." 
Acts19:39 Oba nga ghaligho ekindi kye mumuvunaana mu kitwale mu lwekobaano nga boonaboona beesoloiza. 
Acts19:40 Kuba tughanga okuvunaanwa olw'akeegugungo kano aka leero. Tuzira nsonga ye tusobola kugha olw'akeegugungo kano.” 
Acts19:41 Bwe yamala okwogera ebyo, yaasiibula olwekobaano." 
Acts20:1 Akeegugungo nga kamaze okuwaagho, Paulo yaayeta abeegeresebwa ghalala, yaabasiibula ng'abagumya, yaavaayo yaaja e Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Yaabitabita mu biketezo ebyo yaaja ng'abagumya yaatuuka e Bugureki. 
Acts20:3 Eyo yaamalayo emyezi esatu. Bwe yali ng'anaatera okungira mu lyato okuja e Siria, yaakizuula nga Abayudaaya baali bamweteeze, kyeyava asalagho okwirayo ng'abita mu Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Sopateri, mutabane wa Purro ow'e Beroa, ni Arisitaruko, ni Sekundo ab'e Thessalonika, ni Gayo ow'e Derube, ni Timotheo, ni Tukiko, ni Turofimo ab'omu Asia baagherekeraku Paulo." 
Acts20:5 Abo baajanga emberi baatuteegera mu Turoa. 
Acts20:6 Enaku edh'emigaati egitazimbulukusiibwa bwe dhaabita, twaseeyeeya okuva e Filippi era olumaliira lw'enaku itaanu twabaagaana mu Turoa. Eyo twamalayo enaku musanvu." 
Acts20:7 Agho olunaku olusooka mu Sabbato, bwe twali nga twesoloiza okumegulamu omugaati, Paulo yaayogera n'abantu era yaalwagho ng'akaayogera okutuusa mu bwire ghagati; kuba yali ng'asuubira okuja ku lunaku olwiririra." 
Acts20:8 Mu kisenge ekya ghaigulu mwe twesololeza mwalimu amataala kamaala. 
Acts20:9 Aye Paulo bwe yalwagho ng'akaayogera, omulenzi ayetebwa Eutuko, eyali atyaime mu dinisa, endoolo nhingi einho dhaamugema, yaava mu kalina eyokusatu, yaagwa ghansi baamutoolagho ng'afiire." 
Acts20:10 Aye Paulo yaika ghansi yaakutama gh'ali yaamwevumba, yaakoba ati: “Mutatya, akaalimu obulamu.”" 
Acts20:11 Agho yairayo ghaigulu, yaamegulamu omugaati, yaalya, yaaghaya nabo okutuukiza irala obwire okukya memale yaaja." 
Acts20:12 Baatoolagho omulenzi nga mulamu, bairamu emyoyo." 
Acts20:13 Agho twesookangayo Paulo nga tusomokera mu lyato, twaja mu Asso ye twali tuli n'okumutoolera, kuba mwene atyo bwe yali ategeike okujaayo ng'abita ku bukalu." 
Acts20:14 Bwe yatwagaana mu Asso, yaaniina mu lyato mwe twali twaja naye e Mitulene." 
Acts20:15 Twaseeyeeya twavaayo era olunaku olwairirira twatuuka agho ng'olingiriire Kio. Ate olunaku olwairirira twatuuka e Samo, ku lunaku olwaira ku olwo twatuuka e Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Paulo yali asazeegho abitegho bubite alobe kulwa mu Asia. Yayenda ayangugheku, bwe kiba kisoboka Pentekote emwagaane mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts20:17 Agho Paulo ng'ali mu Mileto yaatuma mu Efeso okweta abakulembeze b'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, bamubone." 
Acts20:18 Bwe baatuuka, yaabakoba ati: “Mwidhi bwe neebisa nga ndi n'imwe okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe naniina mu Asia." 
Acts20:19 Naagheereza Musengwa n'obugonvu bwonabwona era n'amaziga, n'okulebwa okwantuukaku olw'Abayudaaya okuneeteega." 
Acts20:20 Mwidhi nga ghazira kiisi kintu kyonakyona kiganhula, kye nabagisa. Nakibeegeresanga ghalala era naabeegeresa ndhu ku ndhu." 
Acts20:21 Naalabulanga Abayudaaya n'Abagureki bakyuke okuva mu bibi byaibwe baire ye Katonda era baikirize Musengwa Yesu Kurisito. 
Acts20:22 Mperaano ndi kuja e Yerusalemu olw'okugondera Mwoyo Mutukuvu, nga tiidhi birintuukaku." 
Acts20:23 Aye Mwoyo Mutukuvu ankakasa ati mu buli kibuga okusibibwa n'okudaazibwadaazibwa, biinindiriire." 
Acts20:24 Aye titwala bulamu bwange ng'ekintu eky'omughendo ye ndi. Ekikulu n'okutuukiriza olugendo lwange n'omulimo Yesu gwe yangemya ogw'okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi ag'ekisa kya Katonda. 
Acts20:25 Mperaano nze ndidhi nga imwe mwenamwena be nabitangamu nga mbakobera Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, timukairayo kumbona." 
Acts20:26 Kyenva mbakakasa olwaleero nti bweghabaagho alizikirira, tiguliba musango gwange." 
Acts20:27 Ghazira kye nabagisa, nabakobera Katonda by'abendeza." 
Acts20:28 Mwekuume imwe beene, mukuume n'abantu boonaboona Mwoyo Mutukuvu be yabagemya. Mulabirirenga Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, Katonda kye yeefunira olw'okufa kw'Omwana we." 
Acts20:29 Nze ndidhi nga bwe ndija, abantu abali oti misege mikambwe baliidha mu imwe era tibalisaasira byayo." 
Acts20:30 Era ni mu imwe mulivaamu abantu abalyegeresa eby'obuguya okufuna abeegeresebwa ab'okubanonereza. 
Acts20:31 Kale ni mwekuume era mwidhukire nga namala emyaka esatu nga tiyosa omusana n'obwire okubalabula, kiisi mulala mu imwe nga bwe ndira n'amaziga." 
Acts20:32 “Era mperaano, mbagemya Katonda n'ekibono eky'ekisa kye, ekisobola okubazimba n'okubafunisa omugabo aghalala n'abo boonaboona abatukuzibwa." 
Acts20:33 Tyegombanga feeza oba zaabu oba kivaalo kya muntu yeenayeena. 
Acts20:34 Nga mwena bwe mwidhi nakozesanga mikono gyange okufuna bye neetaaga n'eby'abo be nalinga nabo. 
Acts20:35 Nabooleka mu ebyo byonabyona bye nakola nti tuteekwa okufaabiikana okuyamba abanafu nga twidhukira ebibono bya Musengwa Yesu eyakoba ati, ‘Okugaba kwesiimisa okusinga okugheebwa.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Paulo bwe yamala okwogera ebyo yaakuba amakiryaivu nabo, yaasaba nabo boonaboona." 
Acts20:37 Boonaboona baalira, baamwevumba, baamunhwegera." 
Acts20:38 Ekyasinga okubanakughaza n'okubakoba ati tibakairayo kumubona. Baamugherekeraku okumutuusa ku lyato. 
Acts21:1 Agho bwe twamala okubasiibula, twavaayo twaseeyeeya butereevu twatuuka e Kosi. Olunaku olwairirira, twatuuka e Rode era bwe twava eyo twatuuka e Patara." 
Acts21:2 Twayagaanayo eryato eryali lija e Foenikia, twaliniina twaseeyeeya twaja." 
Acts21:3 Bwe twalengera ekizinga Kupuro, twakireka ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda, twaja e Siria. Twasomoka okutuuka e Tiro kuba eyo eryato lyali liri n'okutoolwamu ebintu." 
Acts21:4 Eyo twazuulayo abeegeresebwa era twamalayo enaku musanvu. Mwoyo Mutukuvu yaabalabula bakobe Paulo alobe kuja Yerusalemu. 
Acts21:5 Bwe twamalayo enaku edho, twavaayo twaja ku lugendo lwaife. Boonaboona ghalala n'abakazi baibwe, n'abaana baatugherekeraku baatufulumya mu kibuga. Twenatwena twakuba amakiryaivu ku mbali kw'enhandha twasaba." 
Acts21:6 Twasiibulagana, ife twaniina mu lyato, boona bairayo ewaibwe." 
Acts21:7 Bwe twamala okusomoka okuva e Tiro ni tutuuka e Putolemai, twalamusa aboluganda era twamala nabo olunaku lulala." 
Acts21:8 Ku lunaku olwairirira twavaayo twatuuka e Kaisaria twangira mu nhumba ya Filipo, owundi ku bale omusanvu, eyakoberanga abantu Amawulire Amalungi." 
Acts21:9 Yali ni baghala be bana abaali bakaali kubayira, abaakoberanga abantu ekibono kya Katonda." 
Acts21:10 Nga tumazeyooku enaku edhighera, omulanzi ayetebwa Agabo yaatuuka ng'ava e Buyudaaya."
