Acts21:11 Yaidha ye tuli, yaatoola olukoba lwa Paulo yaalwesiba amagulu n'amakono yaakoba ati: “Mwoyo Mutukuvu akoba ati, batyo Abayudaaya abali mu Yerusalemu bwe balisiba mwene lukoba luno ni bamughaayo y'abamaghanga agandi.”" 
Acts21:12 Bwe twawulira ekyo ife n'abandi boonaboona abaligho, tweghemba Paulo alobe kuja Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:13 Aye Paulo yairamu ati: “Mukola ki ekyo okulira n'okunafuya omwoyo gwange? Nze tiri mwetegefu kusibwa kyonka aye era n'okufiira mu Yerusalemu olw'eriina lya Musengwa Yesu.” 
Acts21:14 Bwe twalemwa okumwikirizisa twamuleka, twakoba tuti: “Musengwa ky'asiima kikolebwe.”" 
Acts21:15 Bwe twamalayooku enaku, twetegeka twaja e Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:16 Abandi ku beegeresebwa ab'omu Kaisaria baatugherekeraku baatutuusa ew'omusaadha ayetebwa Munasoni ow'e Kupuro eyali ow'okutusuza, omulala ku beegeresebwa abaasooka." 
Acts21:17 Bwe twatuuka e Yerusalemu, aboluganda baatusangaalira inho." 
Acts21:18 Olunaku olwairirira, Paulo yaaja n'ife okubona Yakobo, era abakulembeze boonaboona baaliyo." 
Acts21:19 Paulo bwe yamala okubalamusa, yaabakobera byonabyona Katonda bye yamukozesa mu bamaghanga agandi." 
Acts21:20 Bwe baakiwulira, baasaaka Katonda era baakoba Paulo bati: “Owoluganda, obona nga bwe ghaligho Abayudaaya enkumi n'enkumi abafuuse abaikiriza era nga boonaboona beekalangulira ku Mateeka." 
Acts21:21 Bawulira mbu iwe oyegeresa Abayudaaya boonaboona abali mu maghanga agandi okuleka Amateeka ga Musa ng'obakoba obutakeketanga baana baibwe waire okugemanga empisa edh'Ekiyudaaya. 
Acts21:22 Mperaano tukole ki? Tibaalobe kumanha ng'oidhie. 
Acts21:23 Kale kola kye tukukoba. Tuli ghano n'abasaadha bana abeeyama. 
Acts21:24 Batwale, weetukuze nabo era obasasulire bamwe enviiri. Agho abantu boonaboona baidha kumanha nga bye bakuwuliraku ti bituufu, era nga iwe mwene ogema Amateeka." 
Acts21:25 Aye abo abamaghanga agandi abaikiriza twabaghandiikira, twabakoba kye twasalagho balobe okulyanga ebigheereibwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, waire okulya omusaayi, waire okulya ekyo ekitugiibwa era beeghalenga obwenzi.”" 
Acts21:26 Agho Paulo yaatwala abasaadha abo, era ku lunaku olwairirira yeetukuza nabo. Yangira mu isinzizo okumanhisa enaku dhe banaamala mu kutukuzibwa, era n'ekiseera eky'okugheerayo ekirabo ku lwa buli mulala." 
Acts21:27 Agho enaku omusanvu bwe dhaali dhiri kumpi kuwaaku, Abayudaaya abaava mu Asia baabona Paulo mu isinzizo. Baapikiriza abantu boonaboona, baamugema," 
Acts21:28 nga bwe bawowoigana bati: “Abasaadha Abaisiraeli, mutuyambe. Ono n'omusaadha aja ng'ayegeresa buli ghantu okunhoomanga eighanga lyaife n'Amateeka n'ekifo kino. Era mperaano aleese n'Abagureki mu isinzizo, yaayonoona ekifo kino ekitukuvu.”" 
Acts21:29 Kuba baabona Turofimo ow'e Efeso ng'ali ni Paulo mu kibuga, baadhuubiriza bati Paulo amwingiiza mu isinzizo." 
Acts21:30 Ekibuga kyonakyona kyatabanguka, abantu boonaboona bagugumuka, baagema Paulo, baamughaluza baamufulumya mu isinzizo era mangu ago endhigi dhaigalwagho." 
Acts21:31 Bwe baali basala amagezi okumwita, amawulire gatuuka ku mukulu w'abaisirukale gati Yerusalemu kyonakyona kitabangwike." 
Acts21:32 Mangu ago yaatwala ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale n'abakulu babyo, baikirira mangu y'ekiyindi eky'abantu. Abantu bwe baabona ng'ali n'abaisirukale, baalekera agho okukuba Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Omukulu w'abaisirukale yaaja yaagema Paulo, era yaalagira asibwe n'endhegere ibiri. Yaabuuza ati: “Omusaadha ono naani, era akoze ki?”" 
Acts21:34 Abandi mu kiyindi baayasiikana nga bakoba kino, n'abandi nga bakoba kire. Bweyalemwa kumanha ekituufu olw'okwasiikana kwaibwe, yaalagira okutwala Paulo mu nkambi." 
Acts21:35 Bwe yatuuka ku madaala, abaisirukale baamubbeeda bubbeede, kuba abantu baali basungughaire." 
Acts21:36 Boonaboona baali bali kumunonereza nga bwe baasiikana bati: “Mumwite.” 
Acts21:37 Paulo bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okwingizibwa mu nkambi, yaakoba omukulu w'abaisirukale ati: “Nsaba kwogeraku n'iwe.” Omukulu w'abaisirukale yaamubuuza ati: “Oidhi Olugureki?" 
Acts21:38 Ti niiwe Omumisiri ole eyaleeta akatabanguko mu nnaku edho, n'akulembera abantu abatemo enkumi eina mu irungu?”" 
Acts21:39 Paulo yairamu ati: “Nze ndi Muyudaaya, eyazaalibwa mu Taruso eky'omu Kilikia, ekibuga ekimanhiibwa einho. Nkweghembye nganha mbeeku ni kye nkoba abantu.”" 
Acts21:40 Omukulu w'abaisirukale yaamuganha. Paulo yaayemerera ku madaala yaaghemya abantu. Bwe baasirika yaayogera nabo mu lulimi Oluheburayi, yaakoba ati:" 
Acts22:1 “Baganda bange ni balata, muwulire okuwoza kwange.”" 
Acts22:2 Bwe baawulira ng'ayogera Oluheburayi beeyongera okusirika era Paulo yeeyongera yaakoba ati: 
Acts22:3 “Ndi Muyudaaya, eyazaalibwa mu Taruso eky'omu Kilikia, aye eyakulira mu kibuga kino. Gamalieli yansomesa okukalangukira ku Mateeka ga badhaadha baife era neegheerayo irala ku bya Katonda era nga mwena bwe mukola buti." 
Acts22:4 Naakiriga abantu ab'Engira eyo, naabatuusa ni ku kubaita. Naagema abasaadha n'abakazi naabata mu ikomera." 
Acts22:5 Omukulu wa Bakabona n'akeekobaano ak'abantu abakulu mu ighanga lino, kino bakikakasa. Abo n'abampa embaluwa edhaanhandhula ye baganda baibwe ab'omu Damasiko. Kale naaja okugema abantu abo mbaleete e Yerusalemu nga basibe babonerezebwe.”" 
Acts22:6 “Agho bwe nali ntambula nga ndi kumpi okutuuka e Damasiko ku saawa nga mukaaga edh'omusana, okumyansa okw'amaani kwava mu igulu kwamulisa okuneezungulula." 
Acts22:7 Naagwa ghansi era naawulira eiroboozi erinkoba liti, ‘Saulo, Saulo, lwaki onkiriga.’" 
Acts22:8 Nairamu nti, ‘Niiwe ani Musengwa.’ Yankoba ati, ‘Ninze Yesu ow'e Nazarethi y'okiriga.’" 
Acts22:9 Abantu abaali ninze baabona okumyansa okw'amaani aye baaloba kuwulira iroboozi ly'oyo eyayogera ninze. 
Acts22:10 Naakoba nti, ‘Nkole ntya Musengwa?’ Era Musengwa yaakoba ati, ‘Situka oje e Damasiko era eyo oidha kukoberwa byonabyona by'onaalagirwa okukola.’" 
Acts22:11 Naalekera okubona olw'okumyansa okwo okw'amaani, abaali ninze bangema ku mukono bantuusa mu Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 “Agho mu Damasiko mwalimu omusaadha ng'ayetebwa Anania, atya Katonda mu kugema Amateeka, era ng'Abayudaaya baayo boonaboona bamwisaamu ekitiisa." 
Acts22:13 Yaidha, yaayemerera ghe ndi, yankoba ati: ‘Owoluganda Saulo, iramu okubona.’ Mangu ago nairamu okubona, naamubona," 
Acts22:14 yaakoba ati: ‘Katonda wa badhaadha baife akulonze omanhe ky'ayenda, obone Omutukuvu we era owulire eiroboozi lye." 
Acts22:15 Kuba oidha kuba mudhulizi we y'abantu boonaboona ow'ebyo by'oboine ni by'owuliire. 
Acts22:16 Kale mperaano olinda ki? Situka obatizibwe onaazibweku ebibi byo ng'osinza Katonda.’ 
Acts22:17 “Bwe nali nga ndhize e Yerusalemu nga ndi mu isinzizo nsaba, naabonekerwa." 
Acts22:18 Musengwa yankoba ati, ‘Yangugha ove mangu mu Yerusalemu, kuba abantu ghano tibaidha kwikiriza by'obakobera ku lwange.’" 
Acts22:19 Nairamu nti, ‘Musengwa, beene baidhi nga nakubiranga abakwikiriza mu sinagoga era naabatanga mu ikomera." 
Acts22:20 Era n'omudhulizi wo Sitefano bwe yaitibwa zeena mwene naligho, naasemba abo abaamwita era naakuuma ebivaalo byaibwe.’" 
Acts22:21 Yankoba ati, ‘Ja kuba ndidha kukutuma eghala mu bamaghanga agandi.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Abantu baamuwulirisa okutuusa bwe yayogera ekibono ekyo. Agho bainhama okwasiikana nga bakoba bati: “Mumutoolegho, kuba omuntu ng'oti n'oyo tagwaine kuba mulamu.”" 
Acts22:23 Baayasiikana, nga bwe basuula n'ebivaalo byaibwe ghaigulu era nga bwe bafuumuula enkungu mu ibbanga." 
Acts22:24 Omukulu w'abaisirukale yaalagira batwale Paulo mu nkambi era bamukubise enkoba, bazuule kye bamulanga nga baasiikana batyo." 
Acts22:25 Aye bwe baamala okumusiba n'enkoba, Paulo yaabuuza omukulu w'ekikunsu ky'abaisirukale eyali ayemereire agho ati: “Mwikirizibwa okukuba omuntu Omuroma ng'akaali kusalirwa musango kumusinga?”" 
Acts22:26 Omukulu w'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale olwawulira ekyo, yaaja y'omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaamukoba ati: “Oja kukola ki? Omusaadha ono Muroma!”" 
Acts22:27 Agho omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaaja ye Paulo yaamubuuza ati: “Nkobera, oli Muroma?” Paulo yairamu ati: “Yii.”" 
Acts22:28 Omukulu ow'abaisirukale yairamu ati: “Nze okufuna Oburoma kyantwalaku ebintu kamaala.” Paulo yaamwiramu ati: “Aye nze nazaalibwa nga ndi Muroma.” 
Acts22:29 Mangu ago abo abaali baja okumukuba baamuleka era n'omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaatya bwe yamanha nga Paulo ye yasiba Muroma. 
Acts22:30 Ku lunaku olwairirira, omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaayenda okumanha ensonga yeene Abayudaaya ye bavunaana Paulo. Kyeyava amusibulula, era yaalagira Bakabona Abakulu n'abatyama mu lwekobaano boonaboona okwesoloza. Yaatwala Paulo, yaamwemereza mu maiso gaibwe." 
Acts23:1 Agho Paulo yeekalirisa abaali mu lwekobaano yaakoba ati: “Aboluganda, okutuukiza irala buti mpulira ng'omwoyo gwange ghazira kye gunvunaana ku ngeri ye neebisiisaamu mu maiso ga Katonda.”" 
Acts23:2 Omukulu wa Bakabona Anania yalagira abo abaali okumpi ni Paulo okumukuba omunwa. 
Acts23:3 Paulo yaakoba ati: “Iwe ekisenge ekyabbaakibwa erangi endheru, Katonda alikukuba. Otyaime okunsalira omusango ng'Amateeka bwe gakoba, kabiri waalagira okunkuba Amateeka kye gatakoba!”" 
Acts23:4 Abo abaali beemereire okumpi ni Paulo baamukoba bati: “Oli kuvuma Omukulu wa Bakabona owa Katonda!” 
Acts23:5 Paulo yairamu ati: “Baganda bange, mbaire timanhie nga n'Omukulu wa Bakabona, kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti, ‘Toyogeranga bubi ku mukulu wa ighanga lyo.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Paulo bwe yamanha ng'abali mu lwekobaano abandi Basaddukaayo ate ng'abandi Bafarisaayo, yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Baganda bange, nze ndi Mufarisaayo, omwana ow'Abafarisaayo. Ndi ghano ku musango olw'eisuubi lye ndi nalyo mu kuzuukira kw'abafu.”" 
Acts23:7 Bwe yakoba atyo, ghaidhagho okusoola ghagati w'Abafarisaayo n'Abasaddukaayo era olwekobaano lwekutulamu" 
Acts23:8 kuba Abasaddukaayo bakoba bati ezira kuzuukira, ezira bamalaika waire emizimu. Aye Abafarisaayo baikiririza mu ebyo byonsatuli." 
Acts23:9 Ghaabaagho okukaabuka kunene era abandi ku Banamateeka ab'omu kikunsu eky'Abafarisaayo, baayemerera, baatakana n'amaani baakoba bati: “Titubona kibi ku muntu ono. Tomanha omwoyo oba malaika bw'aba ng'ayogeire naye.”" 
Acts23:10 Okusoola bwe kweyongera okuba okw'amaani, omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaatya ati Paulo baidha kumukutulamu. Agho ni n'okulagira abaisirukale baje batooleyo Paulo mu bantu lwa maani, bamutwale mu nkambi." 
Acts23:11 Mu bwire obwairirira, Musengwa yaayemerera aghaali Paulo yaamukoba ati: “Guma omwoyo, kuba nga bwe waammanhisa mu Yerusalemu, era otyo bw'oteekwa okuumanhisa ni mu Roma.”" 
Acts23:12 Bwe bwakya enkyo, Abayudaaya beekobaana, beefuugha nga bakoba bati tibaja kulya waire okunhwa okutoolaku nga bamaze okwita Paulo." 
Acts23:13 Abeekobaana batyo baali baswika abantu amakumi ana (40). 
Acts23:14 Agho baaja ye Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu ab'ebika, baakoba bati: “Twesoomeire obutakomba ku kantu koonakoona okutoolaku nga tumaze okwita Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Mperaano imwe n'olwekobaano, mutume y'omukulu ow'abaisirukale amubaleetere nga mwefuula ng'abenda okwongera okwetegereza ebimugemaku. Ife tumaliriire okumwita ng'akaali kubatuukaku.”" 
Acts23:16 Aye mutabane wa mwanhina Paulo, yaiguka mu lukwe lwaibwe, yaaja mu nkambi yaakobera Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Paulo yaayeta owundi ku bakulu ab'ebikunsu eby'abaisirukale yaamukoba ati: “Twala omwisuka ono y'omukulu ow'abaisirukale, ali ni ky'ayenda okumukobera.”" 
Acts23:18 Yaamutwala yaamutuusa y'omukulu ow'abaisirukale, yaakoba ati: “Omusibe Paulo andhese, yansaba ndeete omwisuka ono y'oli mbu ali ni ky'ayenda okukukoba.”" 
Acts23:19 Omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaagema omwisuka ku mukono, yaamwiza ku mbali yaamubuuza ati: “Kiki ekyo ky'oyenda okunkoba?”" 
Acts23:20 Omwisuka yairamu ati: “Abayudaaya baisainia okukusaba otwale Paulo mu lwekobaano enkyo nga beefuula ng'abenda okwongera okwetegereza ebimugemaku. 
Acts23:21 Aye otaganha, kuba ghaligho abasaadha abasinga mu makumi ana (40) abaja okumweteega. Beesoomeire obutalya waire okunhwa okutoolaku nga bamaze okumwita era mperaano beetegeike nga bateeze ky'onaabakoba.”" 
Acts23:22 Omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaamusiibula nga bw'amusikirira ati: “Tokobera muntu yeenayeena oti onkobeire ebibono bino.” 
Acts23:23 Omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaayeta babiri ku bakulu ab'ebikunsu, yaakoba ati: “Mutegekeyo abaisirukale ebikumi bibiri (200), n'ab'embalaasi nsanvu (70), n'ab'amafumo ebikumi bibiri (200), baje e Kaisaria ku saawa isatu edh'obwire." 
Acts23:24 Era mufuneyo n'embalaasi edhinaabeekaku Paulo atuusibwe bukalamu y'omufuzi Felikisi.” 
Acts23:25 Era omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaaghandiika embaluwa ekoba eti: 
Acts23:26 “Ninze Kilaudio Lisia, nnamusa omufuzi ow'ekitiisa einho Felikisi." 
Acts23:27 Abayudaaya baagema omusaadha ono era baali baja kumwita. Bwe namanha nga Muroma, naaja n'abaisirukale bange, naamubatoolaku." 
Acts23:28 Olw'okwenda okumanha kye baali bamulanga, naamutwala mu lwekobaano lwaibwe." 
Acts23:29 Naazuula nga baali bamulanga bigema bwa ku mateeka gaibwe era nga ghazira kye yakola ekyali kimugwaniza okufa waire okusibibwa mu ikomera. 
Acts23:30 Bwe namanhisibwa nga Abayudaaya baali beekobaine okumwita, naasalagho okumugheereza y'oli mangu, naalagira abaamughaghabira baidhe eyo bamughaghabire mu maiso go.”" 
Acts23:31 Abaisirukale baakola nga bwe baalagirwa, baatwala Paulo obwire obwo baamutuusa mu Antipatiri." 
Acts23:32 Ku lunaku olwairirira abaisirukale ab'ebigere bairayo mu nkambi, baaleka ab'embalaasi nga baja naye." 
Acts23:33 Bwe baatuuka e Kaisaria baagha omufuzi embaluwa era baamugemya Paulo. 
Acts23:34 Bwe yagisoma yaabuuza ekiketezo Paulo yaava. Bwe yamanha ati Kilikia," 
Acts23:35 yaakoba ati: “Omusango gwo ndiguwulira ng'abakughaghabira baidhie.” Era yaalagira Paulo akuumirwe mu kisaagaati kya Herode. 
Acts24:1 Nga ghabiseegho enaku itaanu, Omukulu wa Bakabona Anania yaidha n'abandi ku bakulu b'ebika, n'omwogezi ayetebwa Terutullo, baaghaghabira Paulo y'omufuzi Felikisi." 
Acts24:2 Paulo bwe yayetebwa, Terutullo yaatoolera okumughaghabira ati: “Ow'ekitiisa Felikisi, obufuzi bwo obw'amagezi butuleeteire emiraala okubaagho, era enkyukakyuka kamaala dhikoleibwa olw'obukalamu obw'eighanga lyaife." 
Acts24:3 Kino tukisiima woonawoona buliidho n'okweyanza kwonakwona. 
Acts24:4 Aye obutenda inho kukukooya, nkweghemba oganhe olw'ekisa kyo, okutuwulirisa, mu bibono bino ebitono." 
Acts24:5 Omusaadha ono twamubona nga wa kabi, adheemesa Abayudaaya boonaboona abali mu nsi era nga n'omukulembeze ow'ekikunsu ky'Abanazarethi." 
Acts24:6 Yagezaaku n'okwonoona eisinzizo aye twamugema. [Era nguli twamusalira omusango ng'amateeka gaife bwe gali. 
Acts24:7 Aye Lisia omukulu ow'abaisirukale yaidha yaamututoolaku lw'amaani. 
Acts24:8 Yaalagira abaamughaghabira okwidha y'oli.] Iwe mwene bw'onaamubuuza oidha kukakasa byonabyona bye tumughaghabiire.” 
Acts24:9 Abayudaaya boona baamusemba nga baakoba bati bino byonabyona byali bituufu. 
Acts24:10 Agho omufuzi yaagereza Paulo n'omukono okwogera. Paulo yaakoba ati: “Ndidhi ng'omaze emyaka kamaala ng'olamula eighanga lino, ndidha kuwoza nga titya." 
Acts24:11 Nga iwe mwene bw'oghanga okukizuula, bukyanga nja e Yerusalemu okusinza, ghakaali kubita nnaku dhiswika ikumi na ibiri." 
Acts24:12 Tibandhagaana nga ntakana na muntu yeenayeena oba okusasamaza abantu mu isinzizo, waire mu sinagoga, waire mu kifo ekindi kyonakyona mu kibuga." 
Acts24:13 Waire ni mperaano, tibaghanga kukugha bukakafu bw'ebyo bye bampaghabira." 
Acts24:14 Aye kino nkyatula mu maiso go nti, nsinza Katonda wa badhaadha baife nga ntambulira mu Ngira abo ye bakoba mbu nkyamu, era ndhikiriza ebyo byonabyona eby'omu Mateeka n'ebyaghandiikibwa abalanzi." 
Acts24:15 Ndi n'eisuubi mu Katonda ng'abo beene bwe bali nalyo, ng'abalungi n'ababi balizuukira." 
Acts24:16 Kyenva nfuba buliidho okuba n'omwoyo omunaabuufu ye Katonda ni y'abantu. 
Acts24:17 “Nga ghabiseeghooku emyaka, naidha okuleetera ab'omu ighanga lyange obuyambi n'okughaayo ebirabo." 
Acts24:18 Agho bwe nali nga ndi kukola ekyo, bandhagaana mu isinzizo nga mmaze okukola akalombolombo ak'okutukuzibwa. Tyali na kiyindi waire okuba mu kasasamalo." 
Acts24:19 Aye ghaaligho Abayudaaya ab'omu Asia, abo n'abandibaire ghano mu maiso go okuunumiriza, bwe baba nga bali ni kye bampaghabira." 
Acts24:20 Bwe kitaba kityo, abo beene abali ghano bakobe omusango gwe bambonaku bwe bampozesa mu lwekobaano lwaibwe." 
Acts24:21 Okutoolaku kino ekirala kyonka kye nakoba bwe nayemerera mu maiso gaibwe nti, ‘Ndi kuwozesebwa olwaleero olw'okwikiriza okuzuukira okw'abafu.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Aye kuba Felikisi yali aidhi eby'Engira eyo, yaayemereza omusango yaakoba ati: “Lisia omukulu ow'abaisirukale bw'aliidha, ndisala omusango gwaimwe.”" 
Acts24:23 Yaalagira omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale okukuuma Paulo nga musibe, aye Paulo abe ng'alikuuku n'eidembe era ghalobe kubaagho ku bakagwa be waire mulala ati aloberwa okumugheereza." 
Acts24:24 Nga ghabiseeghooku enaku, Felikisi ni mukazi we Durusilla eyali Omuyudaaya, baidha. Felikisi yaayeta Paulo era yaamuwulirisa ng'ayogera ku bibono by'okwikiriza Kurisito Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Aye Paulo bwe yayogera ku butuukirivu, ni ku muntu okufuga omubiri gwe, era ni ku lunaku olw'okusaliraku omusango, Felikisi yaatya, yaakoba ati: “Mperaano ja ndidha kufunayo ekiseera nkwetese.”" 
Acts24:26 Ate yali asuubira nga Paulo aidha kumugha empiiya. Kale yaamwetesanga emikuzi kamaala, baaghaya." 
Acts24:27 Nga ghabiseegho emyaka ebiri, Porukio Fesito yaasikira Felikisi ku bukulu, aye Felikisi olw'okwenda okusiimya Abayudaaya yaaleka Paulo nga musibe." 
Acts25:1 Fesito bwe yatuuka mu kiketezo kye, yaamala enaku isatu yaava e Kaisaria yaaja e Yerusalemu." 
Acts25:2 Bakabona Abakulu n'abakulu b'Abayudaaya baidha y'ali okughaghabira Paulo. Baamweghemba 
Acts25:3 abayambe agheereze Paulo e Yerusalemu, bamweteege bamwitire mu ngira." 
Acts25:4 Fesito yairamu ati: “Paulo ali kukuumirwa mu Kaisaria, era nze mwene ndidha kwirayo mangu." 
Acts25:5 Kale ab'obukumu mu imwe baidhe tuje nabo balumirize omusaadha ono, oba nga ghaligho ekibi kyonakyona kye yakola.”" 
Acts25:6 Fesito bwe yamalayo enaku oti munaana oba ikumi, yaikirira e Kaisaria era olunaku olwairirira, yaatyama ku kityamo eky'obulamuzi, yaalagira baleete Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Bwe baamuleeta, Abayudaaya abaava e Yerusalemu baamwezungulula, baamutaaku emisango eminene kamaala egiziraku budhulizi." 
Acts25:8 Paulo yeeyogeraku yaakoba ati: “Timenhangaku Mateeka ga Bayudaaya, waire okunhooma eisinzizo, waire okudheemera Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:9 Aye Fesito olw'okwenda Abayudaaya bamusiime yaakoba Paulo ati: “Wandyenze okuja e Yerusalemu owozesebwe emisango gino mu maiso gange?” 
Acts25:10 Aye Paulo yairamu ati: “Nhemereire mu maiso g'ekityamo kya Kaisari eky'obulamuzi ghe nteekwa okuwozesebwa. Tisobyanga ku Bayudaaya nga bw'okiidhi obukalamu. 
Acts25:11 Oba nga namenha eiteeka naakola ekintu kyonakyona ekingwaniza okwitibwa, tiroba kufa. Aye oba nga bye baanumiriza bya buguya, ghazira aghanga kumpaayo ye bali. Ndhulira ewa Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:12 Fesito bwe yamala okwebuuzaaku ku b'olwekobaano lwe, yairamu ati: “Odhuliire ewa Kaisari, kale oidha kuja ewa Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:13 Nga ghabiseeghooku enaku, kyabazinga Agurippa ni Berunike baidha e Kaisaria, okusangaaza Fesito." 
Acts25:14 Nga bwe baaliyo enaku kamaala, Fesito yaayogera ku Paulo ye kyabazinga ati: “Ghano ghaligho omusaadha Felikisi ye yaleka nga musibe," 
Acts25:15 era bwe naja e Yerusalemu, Bakabona Abakulu, n'abakulu b'Abayudaaya, baamughaghabira era bansaba mmusalire omusango gumusinge." 
Acts25:16 Naabairamu nti, ‘Ti mpisa y'Abaroma okusalira omuntu omusango okumusinga ng'akaali kuwoza n'abamughaghabira maiso ku maiso, ni yeeyogeraku ku bye bamughaghabira.’" 
Acts25:17 Kale bwe baidha ghano tyalwa naire, ku lunaku olwairirira naatyama ku kityamo eky'obulamuzi naalagira okuleeta omusaadha oyo." 
Acts25:18 Abaamughaghabira bwe baasituka, mu bye baamughaghabira timwali bibi ebyo, nga nze bwe nali ndhuuba." 
Acts25:19 Okutoolaku okutakana naye ku bintu ebindi ebigema ku nsinza yaibwe ni ku muntu ayetebwa Yesu eyafa, aye Paulo y'akoba mbu mulamu." 
Acts25:20 Bwe nasoberwa ku ky'okusalagho ku nsonga dhino, naamubuuza oba nga yandyenze aje e Yerusalemu awokeze eyo." 
Acts25:21 Aye Paulo yaadhulira era yaasaba akuumibwe okutuusa Kaisari lw'alimusalira omusango. Kale naalagira akuumibwe okutuusa lwe ndimugheereza ewa Kaisari.” 
Acts25:22 Agho Agurippa yaakoba Fesito ati: “Nze mwene nandyenze okuwulira omuntu oyo.” Fesito yairamu ati: “Onaamuwulira enkyo.” 
Acts25:23 Enkyo bwe lwatuuka, Agurippa ni Berunike baidhira mu kitiisa kinene inho bangira mu kisenge omwesololezanga abantu, nga bali n'abakulu ab'abaisirukale n'abantu abakulu mu kibuga. Fesito yaalagira Paulo aleetebwe." 
Acts25:24 Era yaakoba ati: “Kyabazinga Agurippa, n'imwe mwenamwena abali ghano, mubona omusaadha ono, Abayudaaya boonaboona ab'omu Yerusalemu ni ghano, ye bansaba nga baasiikana bati, ‘Tagwana kuba mulamu?’" 
Acts25:25 Aye nze nabona nga ghazira kye yakola kimugwaniza kwitibwa era bwe yadhulira Kaisari naasalagho okumugheereza. 
Acts25:26 Aye nzira kikakafu kye naaghandiikira musengwa wange. Kye nviire mmuleeta ghano mu maiso gaimwe, era n'okusingira irala mu maiso go kyabazinga Agurippa. Bwe tunaamala okumubuuza nsobole okufuna kye naaghandiika." 
Acts25:27 Kuba kimbonekera nga ti kya magezi okugheereza omusibe ng'emisango egimughaghabirwa tigiragiibwa.” 
Acts26:1 Agurippa yaakoba Paulo ati: “Oikirizibwa okuwoza.” Agho Paulo yaagolola omukono yaatoolera okuwoza ati: 
Acts26:2 “Kyabazinga Agurippa ndi wa nkabi okuwoza mu maiso go olwaleero ebyo byonabyona Abayudaaya bye bampaghabira. 
Acts26:3 Kuba iwe oidhi bukalamu empisa edh'Abayudaaya n'ebibatakania, kyenva nkweghemba ompulirise n'okuguminkiriza." 
Acts26:4 “Abayudaaya boonaboona baidhi obulamu bwange okuva mu buto. Baidhi nga bwe nali, okusooka nga ndi mu bantu bange era nga ndi mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts26:5 Okuva eira babaire bakiidhi era bwe benda bakikakasa, nga okusooka nali mu kikunsu ekisinga bukalangafu okugema eby'ensinza yaife. Neebisa ng'Omufarisaayo." 
Acts26:6 Era mperaano, nhemerera ghano okuwozesebwa kuba nsuubira ekyo Katonda kye yasuubiza badhaadha baife" 
Acts26:7 era ebika byaife eikumi n'ebibiri kye birindirira nga bisinza Katonda omusana n'obwire. Isebantu kyabazinga, olw'okusuubira okwo, Abayudaaya kye baviire bampaghabira." 
Acts26:8 Lwaki timukiikiriza naire nga Katonda aghanga okuzuukiza abafu? 
Acts26:9 “Nze mwene nadhuubanga nti nteekwa okukola kyonakyona kye mpanga okukiriga eriina lya Yesu Omunazarethi. 
Acts26:10 Era ekyo naakikola mu Yerusalemu. Naasiba abaikiriza kamaala mu ikomera, olw'obukumu obwampeebwa Bakabona Abakulu, era naasembanga abaikiriza abo okwitibwa." 
Acts26:11 Emikuzi kamaala naababonererezanga mu sinagoga dhoonadhoona nga ngezaaku okubakaka okwegaana endhikiriza yaibwe. Bangemya inho ekiruyi, naabakirigiranga ni mu bibuga eby'omu maghanga agandi." 
Acts26:12 “Kale ni bwe nali nga nja e Damasiko nga mmaze okufuna obukumu n'ebiragiro okuva ye Bakabona Abakulu," 
Acts26:13 Isebantu kyabazinga, nga ndi mu ngira, esaawa mukaaga edh'omusana, naabona okumyansa okwava mu igulu nga kusinga okwaka okw'endhuba, kwaneezungulula n'abo be twali tutambula nabo." 
Acts26:14 Twenatwena twagwa ghansi era naawulira eiroboozi eryankoba mu lulimi Oluheburayi liti: ‘Saulo, Saulo! Lwaki onkiriga? Niiwe oweerumya mwene okusamba ekiti ekisongovu.’" 
Acts26:15 Naakoba nti: ‘Niiwe ani Musengwa?’ Musengwa yairamu ati: ‘Ninze Yesu y'okiriga. 
Acts26:16 Aye situka oyemerere ku bigere byo kuba nkubonekeire okukufuula omugheereza aghanga okukakasa olw'ebyo by'oboine ni mu ebyo mwe nnaakubonekeranga. 
Acts26:17 Ndidha kukuwonianga abantu ab'eighanga lyo n'abantu abamaghanga agandi ye ndi kukutuma. 
Acts26:18 Olibazibula amaiso, bagaluke okuva mu nzikiiza baire mu butangaavu, era bave mu buyinza bwa Sitaani baire ye Katonda, basoniyibwe ebibi byaibwe era bafune omugabo n'abo abatukuzibwa olw'okundhikiriza.’" 
Acts26:19 “Kale kyabazinga Agurippa, tyadheemera kubonekerwa okwava mu igulu." 
Acts26:20 Aye natoolera n'ab'omu Damasiko, n'ab'omu Yerusalemu, n'ab'omu Buyudaaya yoonayoona, era n'ab'omu maghanga agandi, naabakobera beenenie, bakyuke baire ye Katonda, bakole ebikolwa ebyoleka nga beeneniiza." 
Acts26:21 Abayudaaya n'okungema nga ndi mu isinzizo, baagezaaku okundhita." 
Acts26:22 Aye Katonda ankuumye okutuusa n'olwaleero, era nhemereire nga nkobera abakulu n'abato, ebyo byene abalanzi ni Musa bye baakoba bati bija kubaagho." 
Acts26:23 Baakoba bati Kurisito ateekwa kudaazibwadaazibwa abe asooka mu kuzuukira, memale atuuse ku Bayudaaya ni ku bamaghanga agandi obutangaavu obw'obulokozi.”" 
Acts26:24 Paulo bwe yawoza atyo, Fesito yaayogerera ghaigulu ati: “Paulo olalwike! Okwegeresebwa einho kukulalwisa!”" 
Acts26:25 Paulo yairamu ati: “Ow'ekitiisa Fesito, tiralwike. Ebibono bye nkoba bya mazima meereere" 
Acts26:26 ni kyabazinga abiidhi, era mbimukobera nga titya Ndidhi bukalamu nga ghazira ku ebyo waire kirala ekyakolwa nga taidhi, kuba tibyakolebwa mu ngiso." 
Acts26:27 Kyabazinga Agurippa oikiriza mu balanzi? Ndidhi obaikiriza.” 
Acts26:28 Agurippa yaakoba Paulo ati: “Mu kaseera kano akatono odhuuba okunfuula Omukurisito?” 
Acts26:29 Paulo yairamu ati: “Akaseera ni bwekaba akatono oba akanene kye nsaba Katonda ni kino nti, ti iwe wenka aye n'abo boonaboona abampulirisa olwaleero, bafuuke nga nze, okutoolaku okusibibwa kuno n'endhegere.”" 
Acts26:30 Agho kyabazinga, n'omufuzi, ni Berunike n'abandi boonaboona abaali batyaime nabo, baasituka." 
Acts26:31 Bwe bairayo baakobagana beene na beene bati: “Omusaadha ono azira ky'akoze kimugwaniza kufa oba okusibibwa.” 
Acts26:32 Agurippa yaakoba Fesito ati: “Omuntu ono yandirekwirwa nguli tiyadhulira Kaisari.” 
Acts27:1 Agho bwe kyasalibwagho kiti tuli n'okusomoka mu Italia, Paulo n'abasibe abandi baabagemya Yulio omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale ekya Agusito." 
Acts27:2 Twasomokera mu lyato ery'e Aduramutio eryali lija okubita ku luuyi lwa Asia, twasomoka nga tuli ni Arisitaruko Omumakedonia ow'e Thessalonika." 
Acts27:3 Ku lunaku olwairirira twatuuka e Sidoni. Yulio yaabisa bukalamu Paulo, yaamuganha okuja ye bakagwa be okumulabirira." 
Acts27:4 Twavaayo twabita ku mbali kwa Kupuro, kuba kiwunga yali ali kutuva mberi." 
Acts27:5 Twasala enhandha ey'e Kilikia ni Panfilia, twatuuka e Mura eky'omu Lukia." 
Acts27:6 Eyo omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale ye yayagaana eryato ery'e Alekisanderia nga lija mu Italia, yaatuta omwo." 
Acts27:7 Twaseeyeeya mpolampola enaku kamaala okutuusa bwe twasomoka okumpi ni Kunido, nga tubise mu buzibu bungi. Kiwunga bwe yatulobera okweyongerayo, twabita ku mbali kwa Kurete emberi wa Salumone." 
Acts27:8 Twabitira irala kumpi nakyo mu buzibu bunene inho, okutuusa bwe twatuuka mu kifo ekyetebwa Emyalo Emikalamu, ekiriiraine n'ekibuga Lasea." 
Acts27:9 Enaku kamaala bwe dhaabitagho era nga n'olugendo lufuuse lwa kabi, kuba enaku edh'okutoolebwaku ebibi dhaali dhibise, Paulo yaabalabula yaakoba ati:" 
Acts27:10 “Baisebo, mbona nga olugendo luno luja kuba lwa kabi era luja kuba lwa kufiirwa, ti bintu byonka na lyato aye era n'obulamu bwaife.”" 
Acts27:11 Aye omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale yaawulirisa inho omuvuzi ow'eryato ni mwene lyo okusinga Paulo bye yakoba. 
Acts27:12 Era kuba omwalo ti gwali mukalamu gwa kubaamu mu biseera eby'ekiinhogogo, abasinga obungi baateesa baje, oba nga kisoboka batuuke e Foenikia, omwalo ogw'e Kurete, ogulingiriire e buvandhuba, nga weekubiireku ku luuyi lw'omukono omugooda n'omusaadha, babe eyo mu biseera eby'ekiinhogogo." 
Acts27:13 Kiwunga yaatoolera okukunta mpolampola nga ava ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba. Baadhuuba nga bafunie kye babaire benda. Kale baasitulayo ekizito ekyemereza eryato, era baasimbula eryato baaja nga babitira irala kumpi ni ku bukalu bwa Kurete." 
Acts27:14 Aye tibwalwa, kiwunga ow'amaani ava e buvandhuba, nga weekubiireku ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda, yaakunta ng'ava ku kizinga." 
Acts27:15 Eryato lyalemwa okuja mu maiso olwa kiwunga. Bwe twalemwa, twaleka eryato lyatwalibwa kiwunga." 
Acts27:16 Twatwalibwa ku mbali okw'ekizinga ekyetebwa Kauda. Oluvainhuma olw'okudaaga einho twawonia akaato akatono akaali kasibiibwa ku lyato. 
Acts27:17 Baakasika, baakaniinia mu lyato, baamala baalyezunguluza emigugha. Bwe baatya nga baghanga okulobera mu musenho ogw'e Suriti, baisa amatanga baaleka eryato litwalibwe kiwunga." 
Acts27:18 Kiwunga yaaja bwa mu maiso kukunta, olwo ni ku lunaku olwairirira bainhama okusuula ebintu ebindi mu nhandha." 
Acts27:19 Era ku lunaku olwairirira olwo, baasuula ebindi ku bintu bye bavugisa eryato." 
Acts27:20 Ghaabitagho enaku kamaala nga titubona ku ndhuba waire emuunienie ate nga ni kiwunga bw'aja mu maiso, eisuubi ery'okuwona lyonalyona, lyatuwaamu." 
Acts27:21 Bwe baamala entangama nga tibalya, Paulo yaayemerera yaabakoba ati: “Bakagwa nguli mwampulirisa ni mutava mu Kurete, okwonoonekerwa n'okufiirwa kuno tibyandibairegho." 
Acts27:22 Aye mperaano mbeeghembye mugume omwoyo. Ghazira na muntu ku imwe aidha kufiirwa bulamu bwe, okutoolaku eryato n'eriidha okuzikirira" 
Acts27:23 kuba obwire obwabise malaika wa Katonda wange ye mpeereza yayemereire ghe ndi 
Acts27:24 era yankoba ati, ‘Paulo, otatya, oteekwa okwemerera mu maiso ga Kaisari. Era olwa iwe Katonda aidha kukuuma n'abo boonaboona abali n'iwe mu lyato.’" 
Acts27:25 Kale bakagwa mugume emyoyo kuba neesiga Katonda nga kiidha kuba kityo nga bwe yankobye. 
Acts27:26 Aye tuja kusuulibwa ku kizinga.” 
Acts27:27 Obwire obweikumi n'eina, mu bwire nga ghagati, kiwunga nga atusundasunda eruuyi n'eruuyi mu nhandha ya Aduria, abavuga eryato baateebereza nga bali kumpi okutuuka ku bukalu." 
Acts27:28 Bwe baasuula ekipimo baabona ng'obuleeyi obw'amaadhi buli nga ebifuba amakumi abiri. Ate bwe twaseetayooku mu maiso ni bapima, baabona nga ebifuba biri ikumi na bitaanu." 
Acts27:29 Era bwe baatya nga basobola okubanda amabaale, baira einhuma w'eryato baisa mu maadhi ebizito bina ebyemereza eryato, baasaba obwire bukye." 
Acts27:30 Abavuga eryato bwe baali benda okulumuka bave mu lyato, nga bamaze n'okwisa akaato akatono mu nhandha nga beefuula abaja okwisa ebizito ebyemereza eryato emberi w'eryato," 
Acts27:31 Paulo yaakoba omukulu ow'abaisirukale n'abaisirukale, ati: “Okutoolaku ng'abasaadha bano basigala mu lyato, imwe timwidha kuwona.”" 
Acts27:32 Agho abaisirukale baaketa emigugha egy'akaato, baakaleka kaaja." 
Acts27:33 Bwe bwali nga buli kumpi okukya, Paulo yaabeeghemba boonaboona okulya ku mere ng'abakoba ati: “Luno olunaku lwa ikumi na ina nga mweghenenka timulya kantu." 
Acts27:34 Mbeeghembye, mulye ku mere mulobe kufa ndhala, kuba ghazira kabi kanaabatuukaku.”" 
Acts27:35 Bwe yamala okwogera atyo, yaatoola omugaati, yeebaza Katonda nga boonaboona babona, yaagumegulamu, yaatoolera okulya." 
Acts27:36 Boonaboona baaguma emyoyo, boona baalya." 
Acts27:37 Twenatwena abaali mu lyato twali abantu bikumi bibiri na nsanvu na mukaaga. 
Acts27:38 Nga bamaze boonaboona okulya ni baiguta, baakendeeza ku buzito mu lyato nga basuula engaano mu nhandha." 
Acts27:39 Obwire bwe bwakya abavuzi b'eryato, baaloba kumanha bukalu bwe batuuseeku aye baabona ekikono ekyenhandha aghaali omwalo oguliku omusenho, beebuuzagania oba basobola okutuusa okwo eryato." 
Acts27:40 Baakutulaku ebizito ebyemereza eryato baabireka mu nhandha era mu kiseera kyene ekyo baasibulula emigugha egy'enkasi etereeza eryato era baaghanika eitanga ery'emberi empewo esobole okufuuwa eryato baje ku bukalu. 
Acts27:41 Aye bwe baatuuka ku kigulumo eky'omusenho, eryato lyalaalira. Ekitundu eky'emberi kyeziinha mule kyalaalira nga tikivaamu, ate ekitundu eky'einhuma kyamenhekamenheka olw'amaani g'amayengo." 
Acts27:42 Abaisirukale baasalagho okwita abasibe boonaboona, nga bakoba bati tomanha abandi ku basibe bwe beewuga, ni beiba." 
Acts27:43 Aye omukulu ow'ekikunsu eky'abaisirukale yaabalobera olw'okwenda okuwonia Paulo. Yaalagira abo abasobola okwewuga basooke okwesuula mu maadhi, beewuge batuuke ku bukalu." 
Acts27:44 Abasigalagho bajiire ku mbaawo ni ku bikutukutu by'eryato. Batyo boonaboona bwe baatuuka ku bukalu nga balamu. 
Acts28:1 Bwe twamala okuwona, memale twamanha nga ekizinga ekyo kyetebwa Melita." 
Acts28:2 Abataka ab'oku kizinga baatulaga ekisa ekitaloodheka. Baatusangaalira twenatwena baatukumira omuliro, kuba amaadhi gaali gatooleire okugwa era nga n'obwire bwa kiinhogogo." 
Acts28:3 Aye Paulo bwe yagherera omuganda gw'obuku n'abuta mu muliro, omusota ogw'obusagwa gwava mu buku obwo olw'olwota, gwamweriipa ku mukono." 
Acts28:4 Abataka bwe baabona ng'omusota gulengeedhera ku mukono gwe baakoba bati: “Bwenebwene omuntu ono mwisi. Waire awonie enhandha Omusango gumunonereiza.” 
Acts28:5 Aye Paulo yaakunkumulira omusota mu muliro era yaaloba kubaaku kabi koonakoona. 
Acts28:6 Baali badhuuba nga anaazimba oba ng'aidha kugwa agho afiiregho. Aye bwe baalinda ekiseera ni batabona kabi koonakoona kamubaireku, baakyusa baakoba bati: “Guno musambwa.”" 
Acts28:7 Okumpi n'ekifo ekyo, ghaaligho ebibandha by'omusaadha omwami w'ekizinga ekyo, ng'eriina lye ni Pubulio, eyatusangaaza era n'atulabirira obukalamu okumala enaku isatu." 
Acts28:8 Agho ise wa Pubulio yaalwala omusuudha n'ekighaluko eky'omusaayi. Paulo yaaja y'ali, yaamusabira. Bwe yamwisaaku emikono, yaamuwonia." 
Acts28:9 Kino bwe kyakolebwa, abantu abandi abalwaire abaali ku kizinga ekyo, boona baasomboka baawonezebwa." 
Acts28:10 Baatugha ebirabo kamaala era bwe twatuusa ekiseera okuvaayo baatugha byonabyona ebyali byetaagisa mu lugendo. 
Acts28:11 Nga ghabiseegho emyezi esatu, twaniina eryato ery'e Alekisanderia eryaliku ekifaananie eky'Abalongo. Eryato lino lyali limaze ebiseera eby'ekiinhogogo ku kizinga ekyo." 
Acts28:12 Twatuuka mu Surakusa, twamalayo enaku isatu." 
Acts28:13 Twavaayo, twezungulula twatuuka e Reegio. Nga ghabiseegho olunaku lulala, empewo eva ku bukiika lw'omukono omusaadha ng'olingiriire e buvandhuba, yaasituka era ku lunaku olwairirira twatuuka e Puteoli." 
Acts28:14 Eyo twayagaanayo aboluganda era baatusaba tumale nabo enaku musanvu. Olumaliira twatuuka e Roma. 
Acts28:15 Aboluganda ab'omu Roma bwe baamanha baidha ku katale ka Appio ni ku Bisulo Ebisatu, okutusangaalira. Paulo bwe yababona yeebaza Katonda, yaaguma omwoyo." 
Acts28:16 Bwe twatuuka mu Roma, yaikirizibwa okuba yenka, ng'ali n'omwisirukale amukuuma." 
Acts28:17 Agho, nga ghabiseegho enaku isatu, Paulo yaayeta abakulu ab'Abayudaaya ab'omu Roma. Bwe baamala okwesoloza yaabakoba ati: “Aboluganda, waire nga nze nzira kibi kye nakola bantu oba okusobya empisa dha badhaadha baife, nasibibwa naagheebwayo mu mikono egy'Abaroma mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts28:18 Bwe bampozesa, baayenda okundekula kuba baabona nga tikolanga kintu kyonakyona ekingwaniza okwitibwa." 
Acts28:19 Aye Abayudaaya bwe baaloba, naakakibwa okudhulira Kaisari, waire tyali ni kye nvunaana ighanga lyange." 
Acts28:20 Kyenviire ni mbeeta, mbabone era ndhogereku n'imwe, kuba nsibiibwa n'oludhegere luno, olw'oyo abantu ba Isiraeli ye basuubira.”" 
Acts28:21 Baamwiramu bati: “Titufunanga mbaluwa dhiva Buyudaaya edhikwogeraku era ghazira waire owoluganda eyaidha okutukobera oba okwogera ekibi ku iwe. 
Acts28:22 Aye twandyenze okumanha iwe ky'odhuuba ku kikunsu ekyo, kuba twidhi nga kiisi ghantu woonawoona, bakitakania.”" 
Acts28:23 Baamulaga olunaku era ku olwo baidha kamaala mu ndhu mwe yasulanga. Era okuva enkyo okutuusa eigulo yaabainhonholanga era ng'abakobera eby'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda. Yaafubanga okubaikirizisa Yesu nga adhuliza eby'omu Mateeka ga Musa n'ebyaghandiikibwa abalanzi. 
Acts28:24 Abandi baikiriza olw'ebyo bye yayogera aye abandi baaloba kwikiriza. 
Acts28:25 Bwe bataisania beene na beene, baagolola nga Paulo amaze okubakoba ekibono kino ati: “Mwoyo Mutukuvu yali mutuufu bwe yakoba badhaadha baimwe ng'abita mu mulanzi Isaia, eyakoba ati," 
Acts28:26 Ja y'abantu bano obakobe oti: ‘Bwenebwene muliwulira, aye timulitegeera. Bwenebwene mulibona, aye nga timubona." 
Acts28:27 Kuba emyoyo gy'abantu bano gikalangwike n'amatu gaibwe bagasembye, n'amaiso gaibwe bagazibye, balobe okubona n'amaiso gaibwe okuwulira n'amatu gaibwe era okutegeera n'emyoyo gyaibwe, era n'okukyuka ni mbawonia.’ ”" 
Acts28:28 “Kale mukimanhe ng'obulokozi bwa Katonda buno bugheerezeibwa mu b'amaghanga agandi. Abo baliwulirisa.” [ 
Acts28:29 Paulo bwe yamala okwogera kino Abayudaaya baagolola nga batakana inho beene na beene.] 
Acts28:30 Paulo yaamala emyaka emiramba ebiri ng'ali mu ndhu ye yapangisa yaasangaaliranga boonaboona abaidhanga y'ali. 
Acts28:31 Yaabakoberanga eby'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda era yaabeegeresanga ebigema ku Musengwa Yesu Kurisito nga ghazira amulobera. 
Romans1:1 Ninze Paulo omugheereza wa Yesu Kurisito eyayetebwa okuba omutume. Era eyalondebwa Katonda okukobera abantu Amawulire ge Amalungi," 
Romans1:2 ge yasuubiza eira ng'abita mu balanzi mu Byaghandiikibwa ebitukuvu. 
Romans1:3 Amawulire Amalungi gano gafa ku Mwana we, Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito. Mu mubiri yali wa mu luzi lwa Daudi" 
Romans1:4 aye mu butukuvu obuva mu Bwakatonda bwe, bwe yazuukizibwa mu bafu, yaboneka ng'ali n'amaani mangi ng'Omwana wa Katonda." 
Romans1:5 Ku lw'oyo, Katonda yampa omukisa ogw'okuba omutume olwa Kurisito. Nsobole okutuusa abantu abamaghanga goonagoona ku kwikiriza ni ku kuba abagonvu," 
Romans1:6 ng'omwo mw'otwaliire n'imwe Katonda be yayeta okuba aba Yesu Kurisito. 
Romans1:7 Kale ni mbaghandiikira imwe mwenamwena ab'e Roma, Katonda b'agonza era be yayeta okuba abantu be. Katonda Iseife ni Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito abaghe enkabi n'emiraala." 
Romans1:8 Nga ntoolera, neeyanza Katonda wange ku lwaimwe mwenamwena nga mbita mu Yesu Kurisito, kuba okwikiriza kwaimwe kwogerwaku mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Romans1:9 Katonda n'omudhulizi nga bye nkoba bituufu, kuba oyo ye mpeereza n'omwoyo gwange gwonagwona nga nkobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi agagema ku Mwana we. Katonda oyo akiidhi nga buliidho mbaidhukira buli lwe nsaba," 
Romans1:10 nga mmweghemba bw'aba ng'asiimye, nsobole okwidha okubakyalira." 
Romans1:11 Kuba neegomba inho okubabona, mwena mughange okufunaku ekirabo eky'omwoyo okubagumya." 
Romans1:12 Kye nkoba ni kino, nti imwe ninze tuganhulirwe ghalala; imwe olw'okwikiriza kwange ate nze olw'okwikiriza kwaimwe." 
Romans1:13 Nhenda mukimanhe aboluganda, ng'emikuzi kamaala nga ntegeka okwidha eyo okubabona, aye ghaabangagho ekindobera. Nhenda okufuna abaikiriza okuva mu imwe nga bwendi n'abaikiriza okuva mu bamaghanga agandi." 
Romans1:14 Nvunaanizibwa abantu boonaboona, abagundhufu n'abatali bagundhufu, abeegerese n'abatali beegerese." 
Romans1:15 Kale ni mwena ab'e Roma, neegomba inho okubakobera Amawulire Amalungi." 
Romans1:16 Amawulire Amalungi tigangemya nsoni, kuba n'amaani ga Katonda agalokola buli aikiriza, okusookera ku Bayudaaya memale oizeeku abamaghanga agandi." 
Romans1:17 Kuba mu Mawulire ago obutuufu bwa Katonda mwe bubonekera. Obutuufu obwo Katonda abutugha lwa kwikiriza, era butoolerera mu kwikiriza bweyongerera mu kwikiriza. Era nga bwekyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Omutuufu anaabanga mulamu lwa kwikiriza.”" 
Romans1:18 Katonda alaga obusungu bwe okuva mu igulu ku bantu abatamutya era abakozi b'ebibi abataganha mazima kuboneka olw'ebikolwa byaibwe ebibi. 
Romans1:19 Ebyo ebisoboka okumanhibwa ku Katonda babibona bukalamu, kuba Katonda mwene yabibooleka." 
Romans1:20 Kasookanga ensi etondebwa, embeera ye etaboneka, era n'obukumu bwe obutawaagho, n'Obwakatonda bwe, bibonekera irala bukalamu nga bimanhikira mu bintu bye yatonda. Kale bazira kya kuwoza naire." 
Romans1:21 Waire baamanha Katonda aye tibaamwisaamu kitiisa nga Katonda, oba okumwebaza. Aye baira mu kulowooza bitagasa n'emyoyo gyaibwe egizira kye giidhi gyaidhula enzikiiza." 
Romans1:22 Bwe beeyeta abagezi baafuuka basiru. 
Romans1:23 Mu kifo eky'okusinza Katonda atawaagho, basinza ebifaananie eby'abantu obuntu, oba eby'enhonhi, oba eby'ensolo, oba ebyekulula." 
Romans1:24 Kale ni kyova Katonda yabalekera okwegomba okw'emyoyo gyaibwe okukola eby'eiko nga baghemula emibiri gyaibwe beene na beene. 
Romans1:25 Baira mu busubayi mu kifo eky'okugema amazima agagema ku Katonda, baasinza era baagheereza ebitonde, mu kifo eky'okugheereza Omutonzi, asaakibwa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Romans1:26 Kyova Katonda yabaleka okufugibwanga okwegomba kwaibwe okubi. Abakazi baibwe mu kifo eky'okukozesa emibiri gyaibwe ng'obutonde bwe buli, bagikozesa bindi ebitajiira ku butonde." 
Romans1:27 Mu nsambo n'endala abasaadha baalekayo okwebisa n'abakazi ng'obutonde bwe buli, beegombanga basaadha banaibwe era baadankaananga nabo, era beereetaku ekibonerezo ng'okwonoona kwaibwe bwe kwali." 
Romans1:28 Olw'okuba baaloba okumanha Katonda, kyova Katonda yabaleka ni badankaana mu myoyo, ni bakola ebitasaana." 
Romans1:29 Baidhwire obubi obwa buli nsambo: okukola ebibi, obuluvu, n'eitima. Baidhwire ensaalwa, okutemula abantu, okulwana, obuguya, enge, n'okugeya." 
Romans1:30 Batema ku banaibwe ebibono, bakyagha Katonda, bavumagana, ba lunkulu, beesuuta, bayiiya amagezi ag'okukola ebibi, era batengugha abazaire baibwe." 
Romans1:31 Basirusiru, tibeesigwa, tibagonzania era bazira kusaasira." 
Romans1:32 Waire nga baidhi nga eiteeka lya Katonda likoba liti abo abakola ebyo bagwaniire kufa, aye babikola. Ate tibakoma ku kubikola, kyonka aye basiima n'abo ababikola." 
Romans2:1 Kale mukagwa wange asalira abandi omusango, ni bw'oba ani ozira kya kwegemya, kuba bw'okola ebintu ng'oti n'abandi bye bakola, weesingisa mwene omusango." 
Romans2:2 Twidhi nga Katonda bw'asalira abantu abo abakola ebintu ebyo omusango, aba mutuufu." 
Romans2:3 Kale iwe mukagwa wange asalira abakola ebintu ebyo omusango, aye n'okola ebintu ebifaanana ng'oti n'ebyo bye bakola, odhuuba nga oliwunuka Katonda okukusalira omusango okukusinga?" 
Romans2:4 Oba, onhooma ekisa kye ekingi, n'okugema empola kwe, n'okuguminkiriza kwe? Toidhi nga ekisa kya Katonda kikuleetera okwenenia?" 
Romans2:5 Aye nga bw'oli n'omwoyo omukalangufu ogutenda kwenenia, weereeteire mwene omusango n'obukambwe ku lunaku Katonda lw'aliragiraku obusungu bwe, nga asala omusango aghazira kusaliriza." 
Romans2:6 Kuba aligha empeera kiisi muntu nga ajiira ku bikolwa bye. 
Romans2:7 Abo abanoonia ekitiisa, okusaakibwa n'obutafa nga banhiinkiira okukola obukalamu, alibagha obulamu obutawaagho" 
Romans2:8 Aye abo ab'entaka era abatenda mazima era abakola ebibi, Katonda alibasungughalira, yaabakambughalira." 
Romans2:9 Abantu boonaboona abakola ebibi balifuna okudaagadaaga n'obulumi, okwinhamira ku Bayudaaya memale kwireku abamaghanga agandi." 
Romans2:10 Aye abo abakola obukalamu Katonda alibagha ekitiisa, okusaakibwa n'emiraala, okwinhamira ku Bayudaaya memale kwireku abamaghanga agandi" 
Romans2:11 kuba Katonda taboola bantu. 
Romans2:12 Abamaghanga agandi abaayonoona nga tibaidhi Mateeka, balizikirira nga tibavunaanibwa Mateeka, ate Abayudaaya abaali nga baidhi Amateeka balizikirira nga bavunaanibwa Amateeka;" 
Romans2:13 kuba abatuufu n'abo abakola Amateeka bye galagira, aye ti abo abagawulira obuwulire." 
Romans2:14 Abamaghanga agandi abazira Mateeka ago, bwe bakolera mu kutegeera kwaibwe ni batuusa ebyo Amateeka bye gakoba, beene baba batuuse ku Mateeka, waire baba nga bazira Mateeka gale." 
Romans2:15 Ebikolwa byaibwe byoleka ng'Amateeka kye galagira kighandiikibwa mu myoyo gyaibwe. Kino emyoyo gyaibwe gyona gikikakasa nga kituufu, kuba ebidhuubo byaibwe, emikuzi egindi bibavunaana omusango ate emikuzi egindi bibawolereza." 
Romans2:16 Era okusinziira ku Mawulire Amalungi ge nkobera abantu ku lwa Kurisito Yesu, kiti bwe kiriba ku lunaku Katonda lw'alisaliraku abantu omusango olw'ebyo bye bagisa." 
Romans2:17 Aye iwe weeyeta Omuyudaaya, weesiga Amateeka, era weesuutira mu Katonda." 
Romans2:18 Oidhi Katonda by'ayenda okole era Amateeka gakwegeresa okumanha ekituufu. 
Romans2:19 Weidhi ng'oli mukulembeze wa batulu era niiwe omuliikirira abo abali mu nzikiiza. 
Romans2:20 Omugalazi w'abo abazira magezi, era omwegeresa w'abaana abato ali n'Amateeka omuli okumanha n'amazima." 
Romans2:21 Kale iwe ayegeresa abandi, lwaki tiweeyegeresa mwene? Iwe akoba abandi obutaibanga, aye iwe mwene toiba?" 
Romans2:22 Iwe akoba abandi obutayendanga, iwe mwene toyenda? Iwe okyagha ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, tomala n'onhaga bya mu masabo?" 
Romans2:23 Iwe oweesuutira mu Mateeka ga Katonda, tomuswaza ng'omenha Amateeka ge?" 
Romans2:24 Kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Ku lwaimwe Abayudaaya eriina lyange livumibwa abamaghanga agandi.” 
Romans2:25 Okukeketa kukugasa bw'oba ng'ogema Amateeka, aye bw'odheemera Amateeka oba ng'atali mukekete." 
Romans2:26 Kale omuntu oyo atali mukekete bw'agema ebiragiro ebiri mu Mateeka, waire nga ti mukekete, talitwalibwa ng'omukekete?" 
Romans2:27 Era oyo ataakeketebwa mu mubiri, aye n'agema Amateeka bye gakoba, talikusingisa musango iwe omumenhi w'Amateeka waire ng'oli n'ebyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka era ng'oli mukekete?" 
Romans2:28 Kuba Omuyudaaya mwene era omukekete naani? Ti n'oyo abonekera ku by'oku ngulu ng'akeketebwa mu mubiri. 
Romans2:29 Aye Omuyudaaya mwene, n'Omuyudaaya munda eyafuna okukeketebwa okw'amazima okutali kwa ku ngulu ku mubiri aye okw'omu mwoyo. Omuntu ng'oyo tasiimibwa bantu aye asiimibwa Katonda." 
Romans3:1 Kale Omuyudaaya asinga ki abamaghanga agandi? Oba okukeketa kuli ni kye kugasa? 
Romans3:2 Kugasa inho mu buli nsambo. Ekisooka, Abayudaaya Katonda be yasooka okugemya ekibono kye." 
Romans3:3 Memale bwe kiba ng'abandi ku abo tibaali beesigwa, kitegeeza nti Katonda taliba mwesigwa?" 
Romans3:4 Busa, ti bwekiri. Katonda asigala nga wa mazima waire buli muntu aba nga muguya nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “By'oyogera byoleka nga toguya era bwebakuwozesa niiwe osinga.”" 
Romans3:5 Aye tunaakoba ki bwe kiba nga ife olw'okuba ababi kyolekera irala nga Katonda bw'asala mu mazima? Ka ndhogere ng'abantu bwe boogera. Tunaakoba tuti Katonda mukyamu bw'atubonereza? 
Romans3:6 Busa, ti bwekiri kuba Katonda bw'ataba wa mazima aghanga atya okusalira ensi omusango?" 
Romans3:7 Aye oba nga obuguya bwange bwongera okwoleka nga Katonda wa mazima era yaagheebwa ekitiisa, lwaki nze mba nga nkaasalirwa omusango ng'omwonooni?" 
Romans3:8 Kale lwaki titusooka kukola bibi memale ebikalamu biidhe? Kuba era abandi bampaayiriza mbu ntyo bwe nkoba! Abo bagwaine okusalirwa omusango okubasinga. 
Romans3:9 Kale ife Abayudaaya tuli ni kye tusinga abamaghanga agandi? Busa, tuzira kye tubasinga kuba mmaze okubalaga nti Abayudaaya n'abamaghanga agandi boonaboona bafugibwa ekibi," 
Romans3:10 nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Ghazira mutuukirivu waire mulala. 
Romans3:11 Ghazira ategeera Katonda waire okumusinza. 
Romans3:12 Boonaboona baaghaba, boonaboona baakola ebitagwana. Ghazira akola bukalamu. Ghazira naire omulala ati." 
Romans3:13 Ebibono byaibwe magombe geene. Enimi dhaibwe badhoogeza bya buguya. Ebibono byaibwe bya kabi ng'obusagwa obw'omusota. 
Romans3:14 Endhegeresa yaibwe eidhwire okufuugha n'ebibono eby'obukambwe. 
Romans3:15 Bangu mu kuja okwita abantu. 
Romans3:16 Buli ghe baja baleetera abantu okuzikirira era n'enaku. 
Romans3:17 Tibaidhi kuleetera bantu miraala," 
Romans3:18 waire okwega okutya Katonda.” 
Romans3:19 Twidhi nga buli kyonakyona ekiri mu Mateeka kigema ku abo abafugibwa Amateeka, ghalobe kubaagho eyeewolereza, era abantu ab'omu nsi boonaboona Katonda abasalire omusango." 
Romans3:20 Mu maiso ga Katonda ghazira muntu ni bw'aba mulala ati alibalwa kuba mutuukirivu olw'okukola ebiri mu Mateeka, kuba ku Mateeka abantu kwe bamanhira nga boonooni." 
Romans3:21 Aye mperaano obutuukirivu obuva ewa Katonda nga tibubise mu Mateeka buboneike, waire nga bwakakasibwa Amateeka n'abalanzi" 
Romans3:22 buno n'obutuukirivu Katonda bw'agha abantu boonaboona olw'okwikiriza Yesu Kurisito. Kuba mu boonaboona ghazira ndhawulo 
Romans3:23 boonaboona baayonoona, baalemwa okutuuka ku kitiisa Katonda kye yabategekera." 
Romans3:24 Aye olw'ekisa kya Katonda, baagheebwa obutuukirivu ng'ekirabo mu Kurisito Yesu eyabanunula." 
Romans3:25 Olw'okufa kwe Katonda yamutaagho okuba omutango ogw'ebibi by'abaikiriza. Katonda yakola kino olw'okwoleka obutuufu bwe, kuba olw'okuguminkiriza kwe, ebibi by'abantu eby'eira tiyabiringiriza." 
Romans3:26 Aye mu biseera bino, abonereza abantu olw'ebibi byaibwe olw'okwoleka obutuukirivu bwe era nga bw'agha obutuukirivu buli muntu aikiriza Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Kale ekikuleetera okwesuuta kiri gha? Kiziragho. Lwaki kiziragho? Olw'okuba nga tugema Amateeka? Busa naire, aye lwa kuba twikiriza" 
Romans3:28 kuba tukakalisa irala ng'omuntu abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu lwa kwikiriza, ti lwa kugema Mateeka." 
Romans3:29 Koodhi Katonda aba Katonda wa Bayudaaya bonka? Abamaghanga agandi boona taba Katonda waibwe? Bwene, boona waibwe" 
Romans3:30 kuba Katonda mulala era Abayudaaya alibagha obutuukirivu ng'ajiira ku kwikiriza kwaibwe, n'abamaghanga agandi alibagha obutuukirivu lwa kwikiriza kwaibwe." 
Romans3:31 Mperaano okwikiriza kitegeeza kudibya Mateeka? Busa naire, tugagumya bugumye." 
Romans4:1 Kale tunaakoba ki ku dhaadha waife Aburahamu? Kiki kye tumwegeraku? 
Romans4:2 Nguli yafuna obutuukirivu olw'ebikolwa bye yakola, yandibaire ng'agwaine okwesuuta, aye mu maiso ga Katonda azira kye yeesuuta." 
Romans4:3 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Aburahamu yaikiriza Katonda era olw'okwikiriza, Katonda yaamubala okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Romans4:4 Omukozi asasulwa empeera ye, era tetwalibwa ng'ekirabo obulabo, aye aba agikolereire." 
Romans4:5 Aye oyo atakola bwa bikolwa, aye n'aikiriza Katonda oyo atukuza aboonooni n'abafuula abatuukirivu, okwikiriza kwe okwo Katonda kw'asinziiraku okumufuula omutuukirivu." 
Romans4:6 Kino Daudi kye yali akoba bwe yayogera ku mukisa gw'omuntu Katonda y'abala okuba omutuukirivu nga ghazira ky'akoze, ng'akoba ati:" 
Romans4:7 “Ba nkabi abo abasoniyibwa ebyonoono byaibwe, era ebibi byaibwe ni bibatoolebwaku." 
Romans4:8 Wa nkabi oyo Musengwa y'abala nga aziraku kibi.” 
Romans4:9 Kale okuba n'enkabi kuno, kwa bakekete bonka oba n'abatali bakekete boona kwaibwe? Kuba tukoba tuti: “Aburahamu yaikiriza Katonda era olw'ekyo Katonda yaamubala okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Romans4:10 Kino kyabaagho nga Aburahamu amaze okukeketebwa oba ng'akaali? Tikyaligho ng'amaze okukeketebwa, aye ng'akaali kukeketebwa." 
Romans4:11 Olumaliira yakeketebwa, okukeketebwa kwe kaaba akamanhiso akakakasa obutuukirivu, bwe yagheebwa olw'okwikiriza kwe, ng'akaali kukeketebwa memale yaaba dhaadha w'abo boonaboona abaikiriza Katonda, ababalibwa okuba abatuukirivu ni bwe baba nga ti bakekete." 
Romans4:12 Ate era oyo ni dhaadha w'abakekete abatakoma ku kya kuba bakekete kyonka, aye abatambulira ni mu bulamu obw'okwikiriza, obuli ng'obwa dhaadha waife Aburahamu bwe yali nabwo ng'akaali kukeketebwa." 
Romans4:13 Katonda yasuubiza Aburahamu n'eizaire lye okubagha ensi. Ekisuubizo kino kyagheebwa Aburahamu ti lwa kuba nga yali agema Amateeka, aye olw'okwikiriza, Katonda yamubala okuba omutuukirivu." 
Romans4:14 Kuba nguli abo abagema Amateeka n'abagheebwa ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza bonka, okwikiriza kwandibaire kwa busa, n'ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza tibyandigasiisa." 
Romans4:15 Amateeka galeeta obusungu bwa Katonda, aye aghazira Mateeka, tighaba kwonoona." 
Romans4:16 Kale ni ebyo Katonda bye yasuubiza byesigaime ku kwikiriza, bisobole okubonekera irala nga byali kirabo bulabo Katonda kye yagha obughe eizaire lya Aburahamu lyonalyona. Ekirabo kino ti ky'abo bonka abagema Amateeka, aye n'abo boonaboona abali n'okwikiriza nga Aburahamu kwe yali nakwo. Kuba Aburahamu ni dhaadha waife abaikiriza twenatwena" 
Romans4:17 ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Nkutairegho obe dhaadha ow'amaghanga kamaala.” Ekisuubizo kino kyali kituufu mu maiso ga Katonda, Katonda oyo azuukiza abafu era alagira ebiziragho ni bibaagho." 
Romans4:18 Aburahamu yaikiriza era yasuubirira ni gh'atandisuubiriire, kyeyava afuuka dhaadha ow'amaghanga kamaala, kuba era n'ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Eizaire lyo lityo bwe liriba.”" 
Romans4:19 Okwikiriza kwe tikwakendeeraku waire yali agheziiza emyaka nga kikumi egy'obukulu, era nga omubiri gwe guboneka ng'oti guzira kye gukaaghanga, era ng'okwo ni kw'otaire n'ekya Sara okuba omugumba." 
Romans4:20 Tiyalekayo kwikiriza era ti yabuusabuusa Katonda kye yamusuubiza. Yeeyongera mu kwikiriza, yaagha Katonda ekitiisa" 
Romans4:21 ng'akakalisa irala nga Katonda aghanga okukola ekyo kye yasuubiza. 
Romans4:22 Olw'okwikiriza Aburahamu kyeyava abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu. 
Romans4:23 Aye ebibono ebikoba biti: “Yabalibwa okuba omutuukirivu”, tibyaghandiikibwa ku lulwe yenka," 
Romans4:24 aye era ni ku lwaife abaikiriza mu oyo eyazuukiza Yesu Musengwa waife, tulibalibwa okuba abatuukirivu." 
Romans4:25 Yesu oyo yaitibwa olw'ebibi byaife, yaazuukira tusobole okutoolebwaku omusango." 
Romans5:1 Kale oba nga mu maiso ga Katonda tubalibwa okuba abatuukirivu lwa kwikiriza, tuba n'emiraala ku lwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito." 
Romans5:2 Ku lulwe twafuna okusaasirwa kwa Katonda kuno kwe tulimu, era tusagamba nga twesunga okugabana ku kitiisa kya Katonda." 
Romans5:3 Era tusagamba ni mu kudaagadaaga kwaife kuba twidhi tuti okudaagadaaga kuvaamu okuguminkiriza," 
Romans5:4 okuguminkiriza kwavaamu okusiimibwa Katonda, era okusiimibwa okwo kwavaamu eisuubi." 
Romans5:5 Eisuubi lino tirituswaza, kuba Katonda ayugha okugonza kwe mu myoyo gyaife ku lwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu ye twagheebwa." 
Romans5:6 Bwe twali nga tukaali mu bibi byaife, Kurisito yafiirira aboonooni, mu kiseera Katonda kye yalonda." 
Romans5:7 Kiba kikalangafu ole okufiirira omuntu akola ebituufu, waire nga ghasobola okubaagho akana okufiirira omuntu omukalamu." 
Romans5:8 Aye Katonda ayolekera irala nga bw'atugonza, kuba bwe twali nga tukaali mu bibi byaife, Kurisito yatufiirira." 
Romans5:9 Mperaano nga bwe tubalibwa okuba abatuukirivu olw'okufa kwe, tuja kulokolebwa tuwone obusungu bwa Katonda" 
Romans5:10 kuba bwe twali nga tukaali bazigu ba Katonda, okufa kw'Omwana we kwatuleetera okwisania naye. Mperaano nga bwe twisania naye, obulamu obw'Omwana we bwidha kutulokolera irala." 
Romans5:11 Aye ti ekyo kyonka, aye tusagambira mu Katonda ku lwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito atusobozeisa okwisania ni Katonda." 
Romans5:12 Ng'ekibi bwe kyaidha mu nsi olw'omuntu omulala ni kireeta okufa, okufa kwabuna abantu boonaboona kuba baayonoona." 
Romans5:13 Ekibi kyaligho mu nsi ng'Amateeka gakaali kugheebwa, aye aghazira Mateeka ghazira avunaanwa kibi." 
Romans5:14 Aye okuviira irala ku Adamu okutuukiza irala ku Musa, okufa kwafuga abantu boonaboona ng'omwo mw'otwaliire abataayonoona ng'oti ni Adamu eyadheemera Katonda. Adamu yali afaananaku n'oyo eyali aja okwidha." 
Romans5:15 Aye ekirabo kya Katonda tikyagayaga na kibi kya Adamu. Kuba oba nga abantu kamaala baafa olw'ekibi eky'omuntu omulala, ekisa kya Katonda n'ekirabo kye, kye yagha ng'abita mu muntu omulala Yesu Kurisito kibuna abantu kamaala okusingagho." 
Romans5:16 Ekirabo kya Katonda, n'ebyava mu kibi eky'omuntu oyo omulala tibifaanana kuba ebyava mu kibi ekyo byali bantu kusalirwa musango kubasinga. Aye kye baafuna olumaliira olw'ebibi kamaala, kwali kugheebwa butuukirivu." 
Romans5:17 Oba nga olw'ekibi eky'omuntu omulala, okufa kwaligho nga kufuga olw'omuntu oyo omulala, memale abo abafuna okusaasirwa kwa Katonda okungi einho n'ekirabo eky'obutuukirivu, tibalisingagho inho okufugira mu bulamu, olw'omuntu omulala Yesu Kurisito?" 
Romans5:18 Kale ng'ekibi eky'omuntu omulala bwe kyasingisa abantu boonaboona omusango, mu nsambo n'endala ekikolwa eky'obutuufu ekyakolebwa omuntu omulala, kyaleetera abantu boonaboona okutoolebwaku omusango n'okugheebwa obulamu." 
Romans5:19 Era ng'okudheema okw'omuntu omulala bwe kwaleetera abantu kamaala okuba aboonooni, n'obuwulize obw'omuntu omulala butyo bwe bulireetera abantu kamaala okuba abatuukirivu." 
Romans5:20 Amateeka gaidha ekibi kyeyongere. Aye ekibi ye kyakoma okweyongera, n'ekisa kya Katonda ye kyakoma okweyongera." 
Romans5:21 Kale ng'ekibi bwe kyafugira mu kufa, n'ekisa kya Katonda kityo bwe kyafugira mu butuufu, okutuusa ku bulamu obutawaagho, ku lwa Yesu Kurisito Musengwa waife." 
Romans6:1 Kale tunaakoba tutya? Tweyongere okukola ebibi memale ekisa kya Katonda kyeyongere? 
Romans6:2 Busa naire. Oba nga olw'ekibi twafa, kabiri tughanga tutya okuba nga tukaali balamu mu kibi?" 
Romans6:3 Bwenebwene ife abaabatizibwa mu Kurisito Yesu, twabatizibwa ni mu kufa kwe." 
Romans6:4 Bwe twabatizibwa, twaziikibwa naye era twagabana ku kufa kwe. Kale nga Kurisito bwe yazuukizibwa mu bafu olw'ekitiisa kya Lata, twena tubenga mu bulamu obuyaaka." 
Romans6:5 Kale oba nga twafiira ghalala naye, bwenebwene tulizuukirira ghalala naye." 
Romans6:6 Twidhi ng'obulamu bwaife obw'eira bwakomererwa ghalala ni Kurisito ku musalaba, omubiri ogukola ebibi gusobole okuzikirizibwa, tulobe kwirayo kabiri kuba bairu ba kibi." 
Romans6:7 Omuntu bw'afa aba takaafugibwa kibi. 
Romans6:8 Twena oba nga twafiira ghalala ni Kurisito, twikiriza nga tuliba balamu ghalala naye." 
Romans6:9 Kuba twidhi tuti nga Kurisito bwe yazuukira mu bafu taja kufa kabiri, okufa tikukaamufuga." 
Romans6:10 Okufa kwe yafa kwali kufa olw'ekibi yafa omukuzi mulala byawa, mperaano mulamu mu bulamu bwa Katonda." 
Romans6:11 Mu nsambo n'endala mwena muteekwa okwetwala ng'abaafa olw'ekibi, aye atenga muli balamu mu bulamu bwa Katonda mu Kurisito Yesu." 
Romans6:12 Kale ni timuganhanga kibi kufuga mu mibiri gyaimwe egifa, ni mugondera okwegomba kwagyo okubi." 
Romans6:13 Timughangayo bitundu bya mibiri gyaimwe y'ekibi okubikozesa mu kwonoona. Aye mweghengayo ye Katonda oti n'abantu abaviire mu kufa ni baira mu bulamu, era mwegheereyo irala ye Katonda abakozesenga ebikolwa eby'obutuufu." 
Romans6:14 Ekibi kitairangayo kubafuga, kuba Amateeka ti n'agabafuga, aye ekisa kya Katonda." 
Romans6:15 Kale tukole tutya? Tukole ekibi kuba tufugibwa ekisa kya Katonda? Busa naire. 
Romans6:16 Timwidhi nga bwe mweghaayo ng'abairu abawulize, muba bairu b'ekyo kye mugondera? Bwe mutaba bairu ba kibi ekireeta okufa, muba bairu ba buwulize obubaleetera okuba abatuukirivu ye Katonda." 
Romans6:17 Aye Katonda yeekaza, kuba mwali nga muli bairu ba kibi, aye mwaganha n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona ebyo ebyali mu kwegeresebwa kwe mwagheebwa." 
Romans6:18 Mwava mu kibi mwafuuka abairu b'obutuufu bwa Katonda. 
Romans6:19 Ndhogera ng'omuntu obuntu, olw'obunafu obw'okutegeera kwaimwe. Ng'era bwe mweghangayo ni muba abairu mu kukola eby'eiko ni mu kwonoona, ni mukola ebibi, kale ni mperaano mwegheereyo irala ng'abairu ab'obutuufu, musobole okutukuzibwa." 
Romans6:20 Bwe mwali nga muli bairu ba kibi mwali nga timufugibwa butuufu. 
Romans6:21 Aye mwaganhulwamu ki okukola ebintu ebyo ebibagemya n'ensoni mperaano? Kuba enkomerero y'ebintu ebyo kufa. 
Romans6:22 Aye mperaano mwava mu kibi mwafuuka abairu ba Katonda. Kino kibaleeteire okutukuzibwa n'okufuna obulamu obutawaagho. 
Romans6:23 Empeera y'ekibi kufa, aye ekirabo kya Katonda n'obulamu obutawaagho bwe tufuna mu Kurisito Yesu Musengwa waife." 
Romans7:1 Aboluganda, bwenebwene mwidhi kye nja okubakoba, kuba mwenamwena mwidhi ng'amateeka gafuga omuntu ng'akaali mulamu." 
Romans7:2 Eky'okuboneraku, omukazi omufumbo eiteeka limusiba ku iba, iba oyo bw'aba ng'akaali mulamu, aye iba bw'afa, omukazi oyo aba nga takaafugibwa iteeka eryo." 
Romans7:3 Kale ni omukazi oyo bw'abayira omusaadha owundi nga iba akaali mulamu ayetebwa mwenzi aye iba bw'afa aba takaasibibwa iteeka eryo, era bw'abayira omusaadha owundi taba mwenzi." 
Romans7:4 Kale ni aboluganda, bwekiri kityo ye imwe. Mwafa mwayawukanira irala n'Amateeka kuba muli bitundu bya mubiri gwa Kurisito. Kale ni mperaano muli ba Kurisito oyo eyazuukira tusobole okukola obukalamu mu kugheereza Katonda." 
Romans7:5 Bwe twali nga tufugibwa omubiri, Amateeka gaasiikuulanga okwegomba kwaife okubi, okwegomba okwo kwakola mu mibiri gyaife, kwaleeta okufa." 
Romans7:6 Aye mperaano titukaafugibwa Mateeka, kuba twafa twayawukana n'Amateeka agaali gatufiire abasibe. Titukaagheereza mu nsambo ey'eira ekolera ku mateeka amaghandiike, aye tugheereza mu nsambo empyaka eya Mwoyo." 
Romans7:7 Kale tukobe tutya? Tukobe tuti Amateeka kibi? Busa naire, kuba Amateeka n'agaamanhisa ekibi. Tyandimanhie ng'okwegomba kubi, ngoli Amateeka tigaakoba gati: “Tiweegombanga.”" 
Romans7:8 Aye ekibi nga kibita mu kiragiro ekyo, kyandeetera okwegomba okubi okwa buli nsambo, kuba amateeka bwe gatabaagho ekibi kiba kifiire." 
Romans7:9 Nze nali mulamu ng'amateeka gaziragho, aye ekiragiro bwe kyaidha, ekibi kyasituka" 
Romans7:10 era kyandeetera okufa. Kale ekiragiro ekyandibaire nga kindeetera obulamu, kyanviiramu kufa." 
Romans7:11 Ekibi bwe kyabita mu kiragiro, kyanguyaguya kyandhita nga kikozesa ekiragiro ekyo." 
Romans7:12 Kale ni Amateeka ku bwago matukuvu n'ekiragiro kitukuvu kya mazima era kikalamu. 
Romans7:13 Olwo kino kitegeeza kiti ekikalamu n'ekyandeetera okufa? Busa naire. Aye ekibi n'ekyandeetera okufa nga kibita mu kikalamu, ekibi kisobole okweyoleka nga bwekiri ekibi era olw'ekiragiro, ekibi kyeyongere okulagira irala obubi bwakyo." 
Romans7:14 Twidhi nga Amateeka galigho ku lwa bya mwoyo, aye nze nfugibwa mubiri era ndi mwiru wa kibi." 
Romans7:15 Titegeera kye nkola kuba tikola kye nhenda kukola, kye ntayenda kukola kye nkola." 
Romans7:16 Bwe nkola kye ntayenda nkakasa nga Amateeka makalamu. 
Romans7:17 Kale mba nga ti ninze akikoze aye ekibi ekiri mu nze n'ekiba kikikoze. 
Romans7:18 Ndidhi nga olw'obuntu obuli mu nze ghazira kikalamu kyonakyona ekindimu, kuba ni bwenandyenze okukola ekituufu tighanga kukikola." 
Romans7:19 Tikola kikalamu kye nhenda kukola, aye ekibi kye ntayenda kukola kye nkola." 
Romans7:20 Bwe nkola kye ntandyenze nkole, ekyo kyoleka nga ti ninze mba nkikoze aye ekibi ekiri mu nze n'ekiba kikikoze." 
Romans7:21 Kale kino kyanfuukira iteeka mu nze, bwe nhenda okukola ekituufu ate nnondagho kukola kibi." 
Romans7:22 Mu mwoyo gwange nsangaalira eiteeka lya Katonda. 
Romans7:23 Aye mu mubiri gwange mulimu eiteeka erindi erirwana n'eiteeka eryo amagezi gange lye gabona nga n'eituufu. Kino kinfuula okuba omusibe w'eiteeka ery'ekibi ekikolera mu mubiri gwange. 
Romans7:24 Ye nze okudaaga! Naani alimponia omubiri guno oguntwala mu kufa? 
Romans7:25 Katonda yeebazibwe, oyo alimponia ng'abita mu Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito. Nze mu mwoyo mule ndi mugheereza wa mateeka ga Katonda, aye mu buntu ngondera iteeka lya kibi." 
Romans8:1 Kale ni abo abali mu Kurisito Yesu tibakaali na musango. 
Romans8:2 Eiteeka lya Mwoyo eritugha ife obulamu abali mu Kurisito Yesu, lyamponia eiteeka ery'ekibi era n'okufa." 
Romans8:3 Amateeka kye gataasobola kukola olw'obunafu bw'obuntu Katonda yakikola. Yaasingisa ekibi ekiri mu mubiri omusango, bwe yatuma Omwana we mwene ng'ali n'omubiri ogufaananira irala n'omubiri ogukola ebibi, aidhe aghangule ekibi." 
Romans8:4 Katonda yakola kino, ife abatafugibwa mubiri, aye abafugibwa Mwoyo, tughange okutuukiriza eby'obutuufu Amateeka bye gatukoba okukola." 
Romans8:5 Abo abafugibwa omubiri, ebidhuubo byaibwe byonabyona biri ku bya mubiri, aye abo abafugibwa Mwoyo, ebidhuubo byaibwe byonabyona biri ku bya Mwoyo." 
Romans8:6 Okwemalira ku by'omubiri kuleeta okufa, aye okwemalira ku bya Mwoyo kuleeta obulamu n'emiraala." 
Romans8:7 Okwemalira ku by'omubiri kuleetera omuntu okuba omuzigu wa Katonda, nga tawulira mateeka ga Katonda, era bwene taghanga ku gawulira." 
Romans8:8 Era abo abafugibwa omubiri, tibaghanga kusiimya Katonda." 
Romans8:9 Aye oba nga bwene Mwoyo wa Katonda ali mu imwe timufugibwa mubiri aye mufugibwa Mwoyo. Kiisi azira Mwoyo wa Kurisito ti wa Kurisito. 
Romans8:10 Aye oba nga Kurisito ali mu imwe, emibiri gyaimwe ni bwe gifa olw'ekibi, emyoyo gyaimwe gisigala nga miramu kuba Katonda yabatukuza ni Mwoyo." 
Romans8:11 Oba nga Mwoyo wa Katonda eyazuukiza Yesu ali mu imwe, kale oyo eyazuukiza Kurisito Yesu, emibiri gyaimwe egifa gyona aligigha obulamu ku bwa Mwoyo we ali mu imwe." 
Romans8:12 Kale ni aboluganda, tuli n'eibandha. Omubiri ti n'ogutubandha okukola ebyo bye gwenda." 
Romans8:13 Kuba bwe mujiira ku mubiri bye gwenda, muja kufa, aye bwe mujiira ku bya Mwoyo n'abayamba okulekerayo irala ebikolwa byaimwe ebibi, muja kuba balamu." 
Romans8:14 Abo abakolera ku Mwoyo wa Katonda n'ababa abaana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:15 Katonda ti yabagha Mwoyo wa kubasibira mu bwiru na kubaleetera kutya, aye mwagheebwa mwoyo abafuula abaana ba Katonda abasobola okweta Katonda “Abba”, ekitegeeza kiti “Iseife”." 
Romans8:16 Mwoyo wa Katonda mwene akakasiza ghalala n'emyoyo gyaife nga tuli baana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:17 Nga bwe tuli abaana be, tulifuna ebirungi bye yasuubiza abantu be, era tuligabanira ghalala ni Kurisito ebyo Katonda bye yamuterekera. Kuba bwe tudaagiradaagira aghalala ni Kurisito, tulifunira ghalala naye ekitiisa." 
Romans8:18 Tidhuuba nga okudaagadaaga buti kwe tulimu kughanga okwagayaga n'ekitiisa ekiritwolekebwa. 
Romans8:19 Ebitonde byonabyona birindirira nga byesumba okubona Katonda ng'ayoleka abaana be. 
Romans8:20 Kuba ebitonde ebyo tibyeyendera kufuuka bitali bya mugaso, aye byali bityo ku bw'oyo eyayenda bibe bityo. Aye ghaligho eisuubi," 
Romans8:21 nga ebitonde byene biriwona okufugibwa okuvunda, byafuna eidembe ery'ekitiisa eky'abaana ba Katonda." 
Romans8:22 Kuba twidhi nga okutuukiza irala buti, ebitonde byonabyona bisinda era byonabyona birumwa ng'oti n'omukazi alumwa okuzaala." 
Romans8:23 Aye ti bitonde byonka, aye n'ife beene abali ni Mwoyo ng'ekirabo kya Katonda ekisookera irala mu birabo ebindi, tusinda mu myoyo gyaife nga tuteegerera Katonda okutufuula abaana be n'okununula emibiri gyaife." 
Romans8:24 Kuba twalokolwa lwa kusuubira, aye nguli kye tusuubira tukibonaku, okwo tikuba kusuubira. Kuba naani asuubira ekyo ky'abonaku?" 
Romans8:25 Aye bwe tusuubira ekyo kye tutabonaku, tulindirira n'okuguminkiriza." 
Romans8:26 Mu nsambo n'endala Mwoyo atuyamba mu bunafu bwaife, kuba titwidhi kusaba nga bwe kitugwanira, aye Mwoyo mwene atwogererayo mu kusinda okutaloodheka." 
Romans8:27 Era Katonda akebera emyoyo gy'abantu era aidhi Mwoyo ky'adhuuba, kuba Mwoyo n'ayogererayo abantu ba Katonda, nga Katonda bw'asiima." 
Romans8:28 Twidhi nga mu buli kintu Katonda akola olw'obukalamu bw'abo abamugonza, era abaayetebwa nga bwe yayenda." 
Romans8:29 Kuba abo be yalonda yabaawula era yaabategeka okufaanana Omwana we, Omwana we oyo abe omuberi mu baganda be kamaala." 
Romans8:30 Abo Katonda be yategeka, yabeeta, era abo be yayeta be yafuula abatuukirivu era abo be yafuula abatuukirivu, yabagha ekitiisa." 
Romans8:31 Kale ebyo tunaabikobaku ki? Katonda bw'aba ku luuyi lwaife, aghanga okutulwanisa naani?" 
Romans8:32 Oyo ataasaasira na mwana we mwene, aye n'amughaayo ku lwaife twenatwena, aliroba atya okutugheera aghalala n'Omwana we oyo ebintu byonabyona?" 
Romans8:33 Naani alivunaana abalondemu ba Katonda, Katonda mwene bw'aba nga tabavunaana?" 
Romans8:34 Ghazira aghanga kubasingisa musango, kuba Kurisito Yesu mwene eyafa ate n'azuukira, era atyaime ku mukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda n'atwogererayo." 
Romans8:35 Kale naani asobola okututoola ku kugonza kwa Kurisito? Kudaagadaaga oba bulumi oba kukirigibwa, oba ndhala, oba bwavu, oba kabi, oba kufa?" 
Romans8:36 Nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Ku lulwo, tuli mu kabi ak'okufa olunaku lwonalwona. Tutwalibwa ng'entaama edhija okwitibwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Aye mu ebyo byonabyona tughangulira irala ku lw'oyo eyatugonza 
Romans8:38 kuba nkakasa nti waire kufa, waire bulamu, waire bamalaika, waire abafuzi n'ab'obukumu obundi, waire ebirigho, waire ebiribaagho," 
Romans8:39 waire obugungumavu, waire okwika ghansi, waire ekitonde ekindi kyonakyona, tibirisobola kututoola ku kugonza kwa Katonda okuli mu Kurisito Yesu Musengwa waife." 
Romans9:1 Ndhogera mazima mu Kurisito tiguya, era n'omwoyo gwange gundhulira mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Romans9:2 Ndi n'enaku nnene n'okulumwa kunene mu mwoyo gwange. 
Romans9:3 Kuba kasinga nze mwene Kurisito yandiinaamye olwa baganda bange, ab'eighanga eirala ninze." 
Romans9:4 Bano n'Abaisiraeli abaafuna omukisa okufuuka abaana ba Katonda, ni bagabana ku kitiisa kye, n'akola nabo endagaano, n'abagha Amateeka, n'ensambo ey'okusinzangamu, era n'ebisuubizo." 
Romans9:5 Abo ni beene badhaadha abakulu era beene ighanga omwava Kurisito ng'omuntu, Katonda afuga byonabyona asaakibwe ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Romans9:6 Kino tikitegeeza nti ebisuubizo bya Katonda byalemwa okutuukirizibwa, kuba Abaisiraeli boonaboona ti n'abantu ba Katonda abalonde." 
Romans9:7 Waire baidhukulu ba Aburahamu boonaboona, ti n'abaana ba Katonda, aye nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Mu Isaaka n'omuliva abalyetebwa baidhukulu bo.”" 
Romans9:8 Kino kitegeeza nti abaana abazaalibwa mu mubiri ti n'abaana ba Katonda, aye abo abazaalibwa olw'okusuubiza kwa Katonda n'abatwalibwa okuba baidhukulu ba Aburahamu abatuufu." 
Romans9:9 Kuba ekisuubizo kya Katonda kyakoba kiti: “Mu biseera oti ni bino ndiira era Sara aliba aliku omwana omulenzi.” 
Romans9:10 Era ti n'ekyo kyonka, kuba abaana ba Rebekka bombi, baali ni Iseibwe mulala, Isaaka dhaadha waife." 
Romans9:11 Waire baali nga bakaali na kuzaalibwa era nga bakaali na kukolaku kibi oba kikalamu, aye olw'okutuukiriza entegeka ya Katonda ey'okulondaku omwana omulala, nga tajiira ku bikolwa aye nga ajiira ku kweta kwe mwene," 
Romans9:12 yaakoba Rebekka ati: “Omukulu aligheereza omuto.” Kino kyali kityo okukakasa nti Katonda alonda y'aba ayese nga tajiira ku bikolwa bya bantu. 
Romans9:13 Kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Nagonza Yakobo aye naakyagha Esau.” 
Romans9:14 Kale tunaakoba tutya? Tuti Katonda asaliriza? Busa naire 
Romans9:15 kuba yakoba Musa ati: “Ndisaasira oyo ye nsaasira, ndigemerwa ekivunika oyo ye ngemerwa ekivunika.”" 
Romans9:16 Kale Katonda tajiira ku muntu by'ayenda oba by'akola, aye ku kusaasira kwe mwene kwonka." 
Romans9:17 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba Farao biti: “Nakufuula omukulu, mu iwe obukumu bwange bwolekebwe era eriina lyange limanhibwe mu nsi yoonayoona.”" 
Romans9:18 Kale ni Katonda asaasira oyo y'aba ayenze okusaasira era yaakalangusa omwoyo gw'oyo y'aba ayenze okukalangusa. 
Romans9:19 Agho mwidha kunkoba muti, oba nga kiri kityo, lwaki Katonda anenia omuntu? Naani asobola okulobera Katonda ky'ayenda?" 
Romans9:20 Aye iwe omuntu niiwe ani atakania Katonda? Ekiwumbe kisobola okukoba eyakiwumba kiti: “Lwaki wampumba oti?” 
Romans9:21 Omuwumbi ti wa idembe okukola ky'ayenda mu itosi? Tasobola kutoola ku itosi eirala eryo, erindi n'aliwumbamu ekibya eky'ebbeeyi, n'erindi n'aliwumbamu ekibya ekyabuliidho?" 
Romans9:22 N'ekyo Katonda kye yakola kifaananaku ni kino. Yayenda okwoleka obusungu bwe n'okumanhisa obukumu bwe. Kyeyava n'aguminkiriza einho abo be yasungughalira abaali bateegereire okuzikirira. 
Romans9:23 Era yayenda okwoleka ekitiisa kye ekinene einho y'abo be yagemerwa ekisa, abo be yategekera ekitiisa okuva eira n'eira." 
Romans9:24 Kuba niife be yayeta, ti kuva mu Bayudaaya mwonka aye n'okuva mu bamaghanga agandi," 
Romans9:25 nga bw'akoba mu kitabo kya Hosea ati: “Abantu abataali bange ndibeeta ‘Abantu bange.’ Ye nali tigonza, ndimweta ‘Mukagwa wange.’" 
Romans9:26 Mu kifo gheene ghe bayeterwa ‘Abatali bange’, agho gheene ghe balyeterwa abaana ba Katonda omulamu.”" 
Romans9:27 Isaia yeena yalangirira ku Isiraeli ati: “Abantu ba Isiraeli ni bwe balyaga omusenho ogw'enhandha obungi, aye batono bati abaliwonagho ni balokolebwa" 
Romans9:28 kuba Musengwa taliroba kutuukiriza mangu kye yakoba okukola ku nsi.” 
Romans9:29 Kiri nga Isaia bwe yalanga ati: “Nguli Musengwa Afuga Amagye tiyatulekeragho izaire, twandibaire ng'oti n'ab'e Sodoma, era twafaanana ng'oti n'ab'e Gomorra.”" 
Romans9:30 Kale tunaakoba tutya? Ka tukobe tuti abamaghanga agandi abataakolerera butuukirivu, baafuna obutuukirivu obuva mu kwikiriza." 
Romans9:31 Aye ng'Abaisiraeli abaanoonia obutuukirivu obujiira ku Mateeka, tibaasobola kutuukiriza Mateeka ago." 
Romans9:32 Lwaki? Kuba tibaabunoonia nga bajiira ku kwikiriza, aye nga bajiira ku bikolwa. Beekontola ku ibaale eryo eryekontolwaku," 
Romans9:33 nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Bona ndi kuta mu Sioni eibaale eryekontolwaku abantu, olubaale olulibagwisa. Aye kiisi aikiriza oyo taliswazibwa.”" 
Romans10:1 Aboluganda, omwoyo gwange kye gwenda era kye nsabira Abaisiraeli ye Katonda ni kino nti balokoke." 
Romans10:2 Nkakasa nti benda inho okukola Katonda by'ayenda aye okwenda kwaibwe kuziramu kumanha kutuufu. 
Romans10:3 Kuba bwe bataamanha nsambo Katonda y'aghaamu abantu obutuukirivu, baagundhagho ensambo eyaibwe ku bwaibwe, baaloba kujiira ku nsambo Katonda y'aghaamu obutuukirivu." 
Romans10:4 Kuba Kurisito n'eyadibya Amateeka, olwo kiisi aikiriza aghange okuba omutuukirivu." 
Romans10:5 Kino Musa kye yaghandiika ku butuukirivu obujiira ku Mateeka ati: “Kiisi akola ebyo Amateeka bye galagira, aliba mulamu.”" 
Romans10:6 Ebyaghandiikibwa byogera ku butuukirivu obuva mu kwikiriza biti: “Tokoba mu mwoyo gwo oti naani aliniina mu igulu?” Ekitegeeza okwisa Kurisito ku nsi. 
Romans10:7 “Waire okukoba oti naani aliika e magombe?” Ekitegeeza okutoola Kurisito mu bafu. 
Romans10:8 Aye ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Ekibono kya Katonda kiri kumpi n'iwe, mu kanwa mwo ni mu mwoyo gwo.” Kino n'ekibono eky'okwikiriza kye tubakobera." 
Romans10:9 Kuba bw'oyatula n'omunwa gwo oti Yesu ni Musengwa, n'oikiriza mu mwoyo gwo nga Katonda yamuzuukiza, olirokolwa." 
Romans10:10 Kuba omuntu aikiriza na mwoyo gwe okugheebwa obutuukirivu, era ayatula na munwa gwe okulokoka." 
Romans10:11 Ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Kiisi amwikiriza taja kugemwa nsoni”," 
Romans10:12 tibiboola kuba Abayudaaya n'abamaghanga agandi ghazira ndhawulo. Katonda ni Musengwa waibwe boonaboona era agabira abamusaba ebirungi kamaala 
Romans10:13 nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Kiisi asaba Katonda alirokoka.” 
Romans10:14 Aye balisaba batya oyo ye bataikirizanga? Era baliikiriza batya oyo ye batawulirangaku? Era baliwulira batya nga ghazira muntu abakobeire? 
Romans10:15 Era balikoberwa batya, nga ghazira batumiibwa? Nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Okwidha kw'abo abaleeta Amawulire Amalungi nga kusangaaza!”" 
Romans10:16 Aye ti boonaboona abaikiriza Amawulire Amalungi, kuba Isaia akoba ati: “Musengwa, naani aikiriza obukwenda bwaife?”" 
Romans10:17 Kale ni okwikiriza kuva mu kuwulira bukwenda, era obukwenda buli mu kukobera abantu ebigema ku Kurisito." 
Romans10:18 Aye mbuuza: Kituufu tibaawulira bukwenda? Bwenebwene baabuwulira, ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Amamiro gaibwe gaatuuka mu nsi yoonayoona. Ebibono byaibwe byawulirwa ensi y'ekoma.”" 
Romans10:19 Kabiri ka mbuuze: Abantu Abaisiraeli tibaamanha? Musa n'asooka okukoba ati: “Ndibaleetera okugemerwa ensaalwa abantu abatali ighanga; ndibaleetera okusungughalira eighanga erizira magezi.” 
Romans10:20 Era ni Isaia akana yaakoba ati: “Abataanoonianga bandhagaana; naabonekera abatandhagalanga.” 
Romans10:21 Aye ng'ayogera ku Isiraeli akoba ati: “Olunaku lwonalwona nayandhuluza emikono gyange ku lw'abantu abatawulira era abadheemu.” 
Romans11:1 Kale ni ka mbabuuze: Katonda yazira abantu be? Busa naire, kuba zeena ndi Muisiraeli, mwidhukulu wa Aburahamu ow'ekika kya Benjamini." 
Romans11:2 Katonda taziranga bantu be abo be yamanha eira. Mwidhi ebyaghandiikibwa bwe byogera ku Eliya bwe yasaba Katonda olwa Isiraeli ati: 
Romans11:3 “Musengwa, baise abalanzi bo, baakontakonta alutaari dho. Ninze zenka nsigairegho era zeena bali kundhagala benda kundhita.”" 
Romans11:4 Aye Katonda yamwiramu atya? Yamwiramu ati: “Neekuumiiregho abasaadha kasanvu (7,000) abatakubirangaku Baali makiryaivu.”" 
Romans11:5 Kityo bwekiri ni buti. Ghaligho abawonagho ni balondebwamu olw'ekisa kya Katonda. 
Romans11:6 Okulondebwamu kwaibwe kujiira ku kisa kya Katonda aye ti ku bikolwa byaibwe. Kuba nguli okulonda kwa Katonda kujiira ku bikolwa byaibwe, ekisa kye tikyandibaire nga kikaali kisa kyene." 
Romans11:7 Kale tunaakoba tutya? Abaisiraeli tibaafuna ekyo kye baanuyirira? Abalondemu n'abaakifuna, aye abandi baakalanguka emyoyo," 
Romans11:8 nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Katonda yabagha emyoyo emisirusiru, yabagha amaiso agatabona n'amatu agatawulira okutuukiza irala ni ye buli eno.”" 
Romans11:9 Era Daudi akoba ati: “Ebibigiya byaibwe leka bibafuukire omutego n'eigu ebibagemya; bibafuukire ekitimuguunha, era babonerezebwe." 
Romans11:10 Amaiso gaibwe gazibibwe balobe kubona; n'emigongo gyaibwe gifunhibwe enaku dhoonadhoona.” 
Romans11:11 Kyenva mbuuza nti: Abaisiraeli beekontola kugwa kuzikirira? Busa naire. Aye bwe baayonoona baaleetera abamaghanga agandi okulokolebwa, baagemya Abaisiraeli ensaalwa." 
Romans11:12 Oba nga okwonoona okw'Abaisiraeli kwagheesa ensi yoonayoona emikisa, era oba nga obunafu bwaibwe buleetera abamaghanga agandi emikisa mingi, kale boonaboona bwe balingira mu kulokolebwa emikisa giryaga gha!" 
Romans11:13 Mperaano ka mbakobere imwe abamaghanga agandi ekiseera kye nnaamala nga nkaali mutume waimwe ndidha kutanga mu mulimo gwange ekitiisa. 
Romans11:14 Tomanha mu kukola ekyo bwe ngemya Bayudaaya banange nsaalwa ni ndokolaku abandi 
Romans11:15 kuba oba nga ekya Katonda okubalekulira agho kyaleetera ensi okwizaagho omukago ni Katonda, memale okwizibwa kwaibwe tikulireeta bulamu okuva mu kufa!" 
Romans11:16 Omugaati gwonagwona guba mutukuvu kasita akatundu kaagwo kagheebwayo ng'ekibala ekisooka. Era emizi egy'omuti bwe giba emitukuvu, n'ensaga dhoona dhiba ntukuvu." 
Romans11:17 Aye oba nga ensaga edhindi edh'omuti omwoliva ogw'omu nimiro dhaawogolwaku, iwe ng'olusaga olw'omuti omwoliva ogw'omu nsiko, waateebwa mu kifo kyadho okugabana ku bugimu bwa gwo," 
Romans11:18 kale ni tiweesuutiranga ku nsaga edho. Bw'obanga weesuuta oidhukiranga nga ti niiwe ogemereire ekikolo, aye ekikolo n'ekikugemereire." 
Romans11:19 Aye oidha kukoba oti, ensaga dhaawogolwaku, nze nteebwe mu kifo kyadho." 
Romans11:20 Kino kituufu. Dhaawogolwaku olw'obutaikiriza bwadho era iwe kwikiriza n'okukubeesiisaagho. Kale oteesuuta, weekuume." 
Romans11:21 Kuba oba Katonda tiyasaasira Bayudaaya, ensaga edhaatonderwa ku muti ogwo, olowooza nga iwe alikusaasira?" 
Romans11:22 Kale ni weekalirise ekisa n'obukambwe bwa Katonda. Akambughalira abo abaagwa, aye yaasaasira iwe kasita ogumira ku kisa kye. Aye bw'otagumira ku kisa kye, weena alikuwogolaku." 
Romans11:23 Ate Abayudaaya bwe bava mu butaikiriza bwaibwe baliizibwa ku kikolo, kuba Katonda ali n'obuyinza okubaizaaku." 
Romans11:24 Oba nga iwe olusaga olw'omuti omwoliva ogw'omu nsiko, wawogolwa waateebwa ku muti omwoliva ogw'omu nimiro kw'otaatonderwa, memale ensaga edhaatonderwa ku muti ogwo tidhirisingagho kuba nhangu okwizibwa ku muti gwadho gwene?" 
Romans11:25 Aboluganda, nhenda mumanhe ekyama kino mulobe kwesuuta kuba bagezi, kuba abandi ku Baisiraeli baidha kusigala nga bakalangafu ba myoyo okutuusa omughendo ogw'abamaghanga agandi lwe gulimala okwidha ye Katonda." 
Romans11:26 Olwo ni Isiraeli yeenayeena alirokolebwa nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Omulokozi aliva mu Sioni, oyo n'alitoola baidhukulu ba Yakobo mu kwonoona kwaibwe." 
Romans11:27 Era eno n'eriba endagaano nabo, bwe ndibatoolaku ebibi byaibwe.”" 
Romans11:28 Bwe twogera ku by'Amawulire Amalungi, Abaisiraeli baba bazigu ba Katonda imwe musobole okugasibwa, aye bwe twogera ku kulondebwamu, Abaisiraeli baba bagonzi ye Katonda, olwa badhaadha baibwe." 
Romans11:29 Kuba Katonda tiyeidhusa bw'alondamu, oba bw'agabira abantu." 
Romans11:30 Mwena eira mwadheemera Katonda, aye mperaano mwasaasirwa olw'obudheemu obw'Abayudaaya." 
Romans11:31 Mu nsambo n'endala, olw'okusaasirwa kwe mwafuna, Abayudaaya boona buti badheemera Katonda basobole okusaasirwa nga imwe;" 
Romans11:32 kuba Katonda yaleka abantu boonaboona nga badheemu asobole boonaboona okubasaasira. 
Romans11:33 Bwenebwene ekisa kya Katonda n'amagezi ge, n'okumanha kwe, nga tibikoma! By'asalagho tibirowoozeka! Enkola ye nga temanhikana!" 
Romans11:34 Ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Naani aidhi Katonda by'alowooza? Naani asobola okuba omuwi w'amagezi y'ali? 
Romans11:35 Naani amughangaku ekirabo, memale amwirizeegho?”" 
Romans11:36 Kuba byonabyona n'eyabitonda, n'abibeesaagho, era bibaagho ku lulwe. Agheebwe ekitiisa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Romans12:1 Kale ni aboluganda mbeeghemba olw'ekisa kya Katonda, mwegheeyo ng'omusengo omulamu omutukuvu era ogwikirizibwa Katonda. Okwo n'okumusinza okw'amazima."
