Romans12:2 Muteebisanga ng'abantu ab'ensi eno bwe beebisa, aye mukyuse ebirowoozo byaimwe musobolenga okumanha ebyo Katonda by'ayenda ebikalamu, ebiikirizibwa era ebituufu." 
Romans12:3 Olw'ekisa Katonda kye yampa, nkoba kiisi mulala ku imwe obuteetwala nga wa kitalo. Aye yeebisenga bukalamu ng'ajiira ku kigero eky'okwikiriza Katonda kye yamugha." 
Romans12:4 Tuli n'omubiri mulala aye nga guli n'ebitundu kamaala, era nga ebitundu ebyo byonabyona tibikola mulimo mulala." 
Romans12:5 Twena abaikiriza tutyo bwe tuli. Tuli kamaala, aye tuli mubiri mulala mu Kurisito, era tuyimbibwa ghalala ng'ebitundu eby'omubiri omulala." 
Romans12:6 Kale nga bwe tuli n'ebirabo eby'endhawulo olw'ekisa kya Katonda, tubikozesenga. Oba twagheebwa kya bulanzi, tukoberenga abantu ekibono kya Katonda ng'okwikiriza kwaife bwe kuli." 
Romans12:7 Oba twagheebwa kugheereza tugheerezenga, oba kwegeresa twegeresenga." 
Romans12:8 Oba kulamba tulambenga, oba kugaba tugabenga n'omwoyo mulala; omufuzi abenga munhinkiivu, n'oyo akolera abandi eby'ekisa akolenga atyo nga musangaavu." 
Romans12:9 Okugonza kwaimwe kubenga kwa mazima, mulekenga kukola kibi, mukalangukirenga ku kikalamu." 
Romans12:10 Mugonzanienga ng'aboluganda mu Kurisito. Kiisi mulala afubenga okugha mwine ekitiisa. 
Romans12:11 Mufubenga okukola era mutabanga bagayaavu. Mugheerezenga Musengwa n'omwoyo omumalirivu. 
Romans12:12 Okusuubira kwaimwe kubakuumenga nga musagamba, mubenga baguminkiriza mu bizibu byaimwe era musabenga buliidho." 
Romans12:13 Mutoolenga ku byaimwe mughenga abantu ba Katonda. Musangaalirenga abageni. 
Romans12:14 Musabirenga ababakiriga aye mutabakolimiranga. 
Romans12:15 Musagambirenga ghalala n'abo abasagamba, munakughalirenga ghalala n'abo abali mu nnaku." 
Romans12:16 Mwisanienga mwenamwena. Muteekudumbazanga aye mubitenga n'abaghafu. Mulobe kwetwalanga ng'abagezi. 
Romans12:17 Mutasasulanga kibi na kibi, aye mukolenga ekyo abantu kye babona nga kikalamu." 
Romans12:18 Ku luuyi lwaimwe mukolenga kyonakyona ekisoboka mwisanienga n'abantu boonaboona. 
Romans12:19 Aboluganda, muteesasuulizanga ku muntu. Muleke Katonda mwene yeesasuuzenga, kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Okulwana enzigu kwange; ndyesasuuza, Musengwa atyo bw'akoba.”" 
Romans12:20 Kale ni omuzigu wo endhala bw'emulumanga mughenga eky'okulya, era bw'abanga endiwo mughenga eky'okunhwa; kuba bw'okola otyo olimuswaza." 
Romans12:21 Ekibi kitakughangulanga, aye iwe kighangulenga ng'okola ebikalamu." 
Romans13:1 Kiisi muntu agonderanga abafuzi, kuba ghazira bufuzi butava wa Katonda era abafuzi abaligho baateebwagho Katonda." 
Romans13:2 Kale ni kiisi adheemera abafuzi, aba adheemeire abo Katonda be yataagho, era aba yeereeseeku mwene omusango" 
Romans13:3 kuba abafuzi baba babi y'abo abakola ebibi, aye ti y'abo abakola ebikalamu. Oyenda omufuzi obutakutiisa? Kale kola ebikalamu era aidha kukusiima," 
Romans13:4 kuba oyo mugheereza wa Katonda olw'okukugasa iwe. Aye bw'okola ebibi, mutye, kuba obufuzi bwe ti bwa busa, mugheereza wa Katonda era abonereza abo abakola ebibi." 
Romans13:5 Kale ni mugwaine okugondera abafuzi ti lwa kutya kubonerezebwa kyonka, aye n'olw'okugondera omwoyo gwaimwe." 
Romans13:6 Eno n'ensonga lwaki mugha omusolo, kuba abafuzi baba bagheereza ba Katonda bwe batuukiriza emirimo gyaibwe." 
Romans13:7 Kale ni boonaboona mubaghenga kye muteekwa okubagha. Asoloza omusolo mugumughenga, asoloza empooza mugimughenga, agwaine okutiibwa mumutyenga, era n'ow'ekitiisa mukimughenga." 
Romans13:8 Timubanga na ibandha lya muntu yeenayeena okutoolaku ery'okugonza, kuba kiisi agonza muntu mwine aba atuukiriiza Amateeka." 
Romans13:9 Ebiragiro ebikoba biti: “Otayendanga, otaitanga, otaibanga, otabanga na kwegomba bya beene”, n'ebiragiro ebindi byonabyona biri mu iteeka eirala erikoba liti: “Gonzanga muntu mwino nga bwe weegonza mwene.”" 
Romans13:10 Kiisi agonza muntu mwine tamukola kibi. Kale okugonza kye kuva ni kuba okutuukiriza Amateeka. 
Romans13:11 Ebyo nga bikaali agho, mwidhi nga esaawa n'eno, ekiseera kituuse imwe okuzuuka mu ndoolo. Kuba mperaano okulokolebwa kwaife kutuli kumpi inho okusinga ghe twainhamira okwikiriza." 
Romans13:12 Obwire bujiire olunaku lunaatera okutuuka. Kale tuve mu bikolwa eby'enzikiiza, tugeme eby'okulwanisa eby'obutangaavu." 
Romans13:13 Twebise bukalamu ng'abaana abali mu butangaavu. Tutaja mu binhumo ni mu kutamiira waire mu bwenzi, oba obukaba. Tutasoola oba okuba n'ensaalwa." 
Romans13:14 Aye tugeme eby'okulwanisa bya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito. Mutaganhanga mubiri kukola kye gwenda. 
Romans14:1 Atali mugumu mu kwikiriza mumusangaazenga, aye mutatakananga naye mu ebyo by'adhuuba." 
Romans14:2 Omugumu mu kwikiriza azira ky'atalya, aye atali mugumu mu kwikiriza alya iva lyonka." 
Romans14:3 Oyo alya kiisi kiriibwa kyonakyona atanhoomanga oyo atakirya. Ate oyo atakirya atanenianga ole akirya, kuba n'oyo Katonda yamusangaaza." 
Romans14:4 Niiwe ani asalira omusango omugheereza atali wuwo? Musengwa we mwene n'asalagho oba akola bukalamu, oba akola bubi, era aidha kukola bukalamu, kuba Musengwa we n'amwemerezaagho." 
Romans14:5 Omuntu owundi akitwala ng'olunaku olundi lusinga edhindi obukulu, ate owundi yaakitwala nga enaku dhoonadhoona dhaagayaga. Kiisi muntu agumirenga ku ky'atwala nga n'ekituufu." 
Romans14:6 Kiisi akuza lunaku, akikola lwa kugheesa Musengwa kitiisa. Kiisi alya kiriibwa kyonakyona, akikola lwa kugheesa Musengwa kitiisa, kuba yeeyanza Katonda olw'emere eyo. Kiisi atakirya, akola atyo lwa kugheesa Musengwa kitiisa, era yeeyanza Katonda." 
Romans14:7 Ghazira ku ife asobola kuba mulamu ku bubwe yenka, era ghazira afa ku bubwe yenka." 
Romans14:8 Bwe tuba abalamu, tuba balamu ku bwa Musengwa era bwe tufa, tufa ku bwa Musengwa. Kale ni oba tuba balamu oba tufa, tusigala nga tuli ba Musengwa" 
Romans14:9 kuba Kurisito yafa era yaazuukira, olwo ni abe Musengwa w'abalamu era n'abafu." 
Romans14:10 Kale iwe lwaki onenia mwino? Twenatwena Katonda n'aja okutusalira omusango. 
Romans14:11 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Musengwa akoba ati nga bwendi omulamu, kiisi muntu alinkubira amakiryaivu. Era kiisi lulimi lulisaaka nze Katonda.”" 
Romans14:12 Kale kiisi muntu ku ife alyeyogeraku mu maiso ga Katonda. 
Romans14:13 Kale ni tukange agho buli muntu okunenianga mwine. Era tutaleeteranga waluganda kugwa mu kibi. 
Romans14:14 Ndidhi era nkikakasa mu Musengwa waife Yesu, nti ghazira kya kulya kitali kirongoofu, ku bwakyo. Aye omuntu bw'aikiriza nga tiikirongoofu, olwo kifuuka ekitali kirongoofu." 
Romans14:15 Bw'onakughaza owoluganda olw'eky'okulya, oba nga tokaakolera ku kugonza. Eky'okulya ky'olya kitaleeteranga muntu Kurisito ye yafiirira kuzikirira." 
Romans14:16 Ekyo kye mweta ekikalamu, kirobenga kuvumibwa" 
Romans14:17 kuba Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda tibuva mu kulya na kunhwa, aye buva mu butuufu, mu miraala na mu kusangaala, Mwoyo Mutukuvu by'atugha." 
Romans14:18 Kiisi agheereza Kurisito atyo, asanhusa ni Katonda, era n'abantu bamusiima." 
Romans14:19 Kale ni tunoonienga ebyo ebireeta emiraala, na kiisi muntu okugumya mwine." 
Romans14:20 Otayonoonanga mulimo gwa Katonda olw'eby'okulya. Kiisi kya kulya kighanga okuliibwa, aye ti kikalamu okulya ekintu kyonakyona ekireetera omuntu owundi okugwa mu kibi." 
Romans14:21 Kituufu obutalyanga mamba oba obutanhwanga omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, oba obutakolanga ekintu kyonakyona ekireetera owoluganda okugwa mu kibi." 
Romans14:22 Ky'oikiriza kikuume nga kimanhiibwa iwe wenka ni Katonda wo. Wa nkabi omuntu oyo ateesalira musango kumusinga mu ebyo by'atwala okuba ebituufu. 
Romans14:23 Aye oyo abuusabuusa ky'alya, Katonda amusalira omusango bw'akirya. Kuba ekikolwa kye tikijiira ku kwikiriza, era kiisi ekitajiira ku kwikiriza kiba kibi." 
Romans15:1 Ife ab'amaani mu kwikiriza tugwaine okuyambanga abo abanafu mu kwikiriza, aye ti kwefaaku twenka." 
Romans15:2 Kiisi muntu afubenga okukola ekisanhusa mwine olw'okumuzimba mu kwikiriza 
Romans15:3 kuba ni Kurisito tiyefaaku yenka, era kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Ebivumo by'abo abakuvuma, byaira ku nze.”" 
Romans15:4 Byonabyona Ebyaghandiikibwa eira, byaghandiikibwa olw'okutwegeresa tusobole okubanga n'eisuubi olw'okuguminkiriza n'olw'amaani, ebiva mu Byaghandiikibwa." 
Romans15:5 Era Katonda ensimuko y'okuguminkiriza era atwizaamu amaani, abaghe okwisania nga Kurisito Yesu bw'asiima." 
Romans15:6 Musaake Katonda Lata wa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito nga mwogera n'omwoyo mulala. 
Romans15:7 Buli muntu asangaazenga mwine nga Kurisito bwe yabasangaaza, olwo Katonda agheebwe ekitiisa." 
Romans15:8 Ka mbakobere, Kurisito yafuuka omugheereza w'abayudaaya, ayoleke nga Katonda bw'ali omwesigwa, era atuukirize ebisuubizo Katonda bye yasuubiza badhaadha baife," 
Romans15:9 era abamaghanga agandi basobole okusaaka Katonda olw'okusaasira kwe. Nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Kale ni nnaakwebazanga mu bamaghanga agandi; nnaayemba nga nsaaka eriina lyo.” 
Romans15:10 Ate kabiri ekyaghandiikibwa kikoba kiti: “Imwe abamaghanga agandi, musagambire ghalala n'abantu be.”" 
Romans15:11 Era kabiri kiti: “Mwenamwena abamaghanga agandi musaake Musengwa. Era abantu boonaboona bamusaake.” 
Romans15:12 Era ni Isaia akoba ati: “Mwidhukulu wa Yesse aliidha, baamutaagho okufuga abamaghanga agandi. Era mu oyo eisuubi lyaibwe mwe liriba.”" 
Romans15:13 Katonda, ensimuko ey'okusuubira, abaidhuze eisanhu n'emiraala olw'okumwikiriza, mughange okweyongeranga okuba n'eisuubi olw'amaani ga Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Romans15:14 Zeena mwene, aboluganda, nkakasa nga mwidhwire empisa enkalamu era n'okumanha okwidhuvu, era nga musobola okulambagana." 
Romans15:15 Aye mu mbaluwa eno, aghandi mpandiise n'obugumu nga ndiku ni bye mbaidhukiza. Kino nkikoze kuba Katonda yansaasira" 
Romans15:16 okuba omugheereza we mu bamaghanga agandi. Nkola omulimo ogw'obwakabona nga nkobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi agava ewa Katonda, abamaghanga agandi babe ng'ekirabo ky'asiima nga kitukuziibwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Romans15:17 Kale ni mu Kurisito Yesu mpanga okwesuuta olw'omulimo gwe nkoleire Katonda. 
Romans15:18 Ndidha kuguma ndhogere ku ebyo byonka Kurisito bye yankolera okusobozesa abamaghanga agandi okugondera Katonda. Yakozesa ebibono byange n'ebikolwa byange 
Romans15:19 mu maani ag'obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio, ni mu maani aga Mwoyo Mutukuvu. Kale ntyo okuviira irala e Yerusalemu okutuukira irala mu Iluriko, nkobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito." 
Romans15:20 Kye nuyirira buliidho n'okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi mu bifo ebyo Kurisito y'atawulirwangaku, ndobe kuzimba ku musingi gwa muntu wundi." 
Romans15:21 Aye nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Abo abatakoberwanga bimugemaku balimubona, era n'abatamubonangaku balimutegeera.”" 
Romans15:22 Eno n'ensonga eyandobera emikuzi kamaala okwidha okubakyalira. 
Romans15:23 Aye, mperaano nga bwe nfundikiire emirimo gyange mu biketezo bino, nga mmaze emyaka kamaala nga neegomba okwidha okubabonaku," 
Romans15:24 bwe ndiba nga nja mu Supania, nsuubira okubitiraku ewaimwe eyo mbaboneku enaku edhigheraku. Bwe ndiba mmaze okusanhukiraku aghalala n'imwe, nhenda munhambe okuntuusa mu Supania." 
Romans15:25 Aye mperaano nja Yerusalemu okutwalira abantu ba Katonda obuyambi," 
Romans15:26 kuba ab'omu Bikunsu by'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eby'e Makedonia n'eby'omu Akaia, baasiima ku bwaibwe okuyamba abantu ba Katonda abaavu abali mu Yerusalemu." 
Romans15:27 Ekyo beene n'abaasalagho okukikola, aye era baali n'eibandha okuyamba abaavu abo kuba Abayudaaya baagabiraku amaghanga agandi ku birungi byaibwe eby'omwoyo. Kale abamaghanga agandi boona bateekwa okuyamba Abayudaaya mu by'omubiri." 
Romans15:28 Kale bwe ndimala okukola omulimo ogwo era nga mmaze okubagemya byonabyona ebyabagheerezebwa, ndivaayo, naabitira e waimwe nga nja e Supania." 
Romans15:29 Bwe ndiidha, ndidhi nga ndiidha n'emikisa gya Kurisito gyonagyona." 
Romans15:30 Aboluganda, mbeeghemba ku bwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito era n'olw'okugonza kwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu mweyimbe ghalala ninze mu kunsabira." 
Romans15:31 Munsabire mpone abataikiriza abali mu Buyudaaya, era n'abantu ba Katonda abali mu Yerusalemu basiime bye mbatwalira." 
Romans15:32 Olwo ni Katonda bw'aliba nga asiimye ndiidha okubakyalira nga ndi n'eisanhu lingi, mpuumulireku e waimwe." 
Romans15:33 Katonda mwene kugaba miraala, abe n'imwe mwenamwena. Amiina." 
Romans16:1 Mbandhulira mwanhinaife Foebe omugheereza ow'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekiri mu Kenkerea. 
Romans16:2 Mumusangaaze mu liina lya Musengwa ng'abantu ba Katonda bwe basangaaza, era mumuyambe mu kiisi ky'ayenda, kuba ye mwene yayamba abantu kamaala era nga zeena mwe ndi." 
Romans16:3 Muunamukize Purisikilla ni Akwila bakozi banange mu Kurisito Yesu be tugheereza nabo," 
Romans16:4 abaikiriza okufa ku lwange. Ti ninze zenka mbeebaza, aye era n'Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eby'amaghanga agandi byona bibeebaza." 
Romans16:5 Muunamukize n'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'omu ndhu yaibwe. Muunamukize mukagwa wange Epaeneto eyasooka okwikiriza Kurisito mu Asia. 
Romans16:6 Muunamukize Maria eyakola einho emirimo mu imwe. 
Romans16:7 Muunamukize Anduroniko ni Yunia ab'eighanga lyange be nali nabo mu ikomera. Bano Abatume babaidhi bukalamu era n'abansooka okuba aba Kurisito. 
Romans16:8 Mulamuse Ampuliato mukagwa wange bwe twisania mu Musengwa. 
Romans16:9 Mulamuse Urubano mukozi munaife mu Kurisito ye tugheereza naye. Mulamuse ni Sitaku mukagwa wange. 
Romans16:10 Mulamuse Apelle omwesigwa mu Kurisito. Mulamuse ab'omu ndhu ya Arisitobulo. 
Romans16:11 Muunamukize ni Herodioni muganda wange. Mulamuse aboluganda ab'omu ndhu ya Narukisso. 
Romans16:12 Muunamukize Torufaina ni Tirufosa abakola omulimo gwa Musengwa. Muunamukize ni mukagwa wange Perusi eyakolera Musengwa emirimo ekyodo. 
Romans16:13 Mulamuse Rufo eyakola einho omulimo gwa Musengwa, era n'inhina antwala buliidho oti ndi mwana we." 
Romans16:14 Mulamuse Asunkerito, Filegoni, Heruma, Paturoba, Herume, n'aboluganda be b'aba nabo." 
Romans16:15 Mulamuse Filologo ni Yulia, Nereo ni mwanhina, ni Olumpa, n'abantu ba Katonda boonaboona be baba nabo." 
Romans16:16 Mulamusaganie n'okunhwegeragana. Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona bibalamwisa. 
Romans16:17 Aboluganda, mbeeghembye mwekuumenga abo abaleeta okwawukana n'okutabuka nga batakania ebyo bye mwayegeresebwa. Mubeeghalenga" 
Romans16:18 kuba abantu abakola ebintu oti n'ebyo tibagheereza Musengwa waife Kurisito aye bakolerera nda dhaibwe. Bakozesa ebibono ebinhoonha era ebisaakiriza, baaguya abantu abazira kabi." 
Romans16:19 Kuba obuwulize bwaimwe mu kugondera Amawulire Amalungi bumanhiibwa woonawoona, era kyenva nsangaala ku lwaimwe. Nhenda mubenga bagezi mu kukola ekikalamu aye nga timwidhi kukola kibi." 
Romans16:20 Kale ni Katonda ensimuko ey'emiraala gyaife, mangu inho aja kutyankirira Sitaani ghansi gh'ebigere byaimwe. Enkabi dha Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito dhibenga n'imwe." 
Romans16:21 Timotheo mukozi munange abalamwisa, okwo nga kw'otaire Lukio, Yasoni ni Sosipateri ab'eighanga lyange." 
Romans16:22 Nze Terutio omughandiisi w'embaluwa eno mbalamwisa ng'owoluganda mu Musengwa. 
Romans16:23 Gayo ansuza era nga mu ndhu ye, Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kyonakyona mwe kyesololeza, abalamwisa. Erasito omukuumi w'endyanga y'ekibuga n'owoluganda Kwaruto babalamwisa. [" 
Romans16:24 Enkabi dha Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, dhibe n'imwe mwenamwena. Amiina.]" 
Romans16:25 Ka tusaake Katonda oyo asobola okubagha amaani mu kwikiriza agava mu Mawulire Amalungi agagema ku Yesu Kurisito ge nkobera abantu. Ekyo n'ekyama ekyagisibwa okuva eira n'eira. 
Romans16:26 Aye buti ekyama ekyo kimanhisiibwa mu Byaghandiikibwa abalanzi. Katonda atawaagho yalagira kimanhibwe amaghanga goonagoona, abantu baghange okwikiriza Katonda era n'okumugonderanga." 
Romans16:27 Kale Katonda oyo omulala yenka, ate omugezi, agheebwenga ekitiisa mu Yesu Kurisito ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
1Corinthians1:1 Ninze Paulo, eyayetebwa olw'okwenda kwa Katonda, okuba omutume wa Kurisito Yesu, n'owoluganda Sosithene." 
1Corinthians1:2 Tughandiikira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda ekiri mu Korintho abo boonaboona abaayetebwa okuba abatuukirivu mu Kurisito Yesu, ghalala n'abantu boonaboona abali buli ghantu, abeeghemba mu liina lya Yesu Kurisito Musengwa waibwe era owaife." 
1Corinthians1:3 Enkabi n'emiraala ebya Katonda Lata waife, ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito bibe n'imwe." 
1Corinthians1:4 Buliidho nsiima Katonda olwaimwe, olw'ekisa kye yabagemerwa mu Kurisito Yesu." 
1Corinthians1:5 Kuba olw'okuba mu Kurisito, Katonda yabafuula abakombe mu bintu byonabyona, mu ndhogera ni mu kumanha." 
1Corinthians1:6 Obukwenda obugema ku Kurisito bwasimba emizi mu imwe. 
1Corinthians1:7 Olwo ghaabula ekitone eky'omwoyo kyonakyona kye muzira, nga bwe muteegerera okweyoleka kwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito." 
1Corinthians1:8 Ono n'alibagemerera mwaba bagumu okutuusa ku nkomerero, mulobe kuba na musango gwonagwona ku lunaku lwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito." 
1Corinthians1:9 Katonda mwesigwa, oyo eyabeeta okwisa ekirala n'Omwana we Yesu Kurisito Musengwa waife." 
1Corinthians1:10 Aboluganda, mbeeghembye mu liina lya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito mwisanie, mulobe kweyawulayawulamu aye mube kitole mu kulowooza ni mu kukola." 
1Corinthians1:11 Kuba, aboluganda abandi ku bantu ab'omu ndhu ya Kuloe bankobera bukalamu, mbu ghaligho okusoolasoola mu imwe." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kye ndi kukoba ni kino, mbu abandi bakoba bati: “Nze ndi wa Paulo,” n'abandi bati: “Nze ndi wa Apollo,” n'abandi bati: “Nze ndi wa Petero,” ate abandi bati: “Nze ndi wa Kurisito.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Obwo Kurisito ayawiirwayawiirwamu? Paulo n'eyabafiirira ku musalaba? Oba mwabatizibwa kuba beegeresebwa ba Paulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Neebaza Katonda okuba nga ghazira ku imwe ye nabatiza okutoolaku Kurisipo ni Gayo. 
1Corinthians1:15 Kale ghazira aghanga kukoba ati yabatizibwa kuba mwegeresebwa wange. 
1Corinthians1:16 Otyo, ndidhukiire, nabatiza ni Sitefana n'amaka ge goonagoona, aye tiidhukira nga nabatizayooku omuntu owundi yeenayeena." 
1Corinthians1:17 Kurisito tiyantuma kubatiza aye yantuma okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi, era ngabakobere nga tikozesa magezi ga bantu, olwo okufa kwa Kurisito ku musalaba kulobe kuwaamu maani gaakwo." 
1Corinthians1:18 Abo abali kuzikirira tibabona makulu mu kibono kya kufa kwa Kurisito ku musalaba, aye ife abali kulokolebwa tukibona nga n'amaani ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians1:19 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Ndizikiriza amagezi g'abagezi, era naamaliragho irala okumanha kw'abeegerese.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Kale olwo omugezi ali gha? Oba omwegerese ali gha? Oba kabwidhibwidhi ow'ensi eno mu kutakana ali gha? Katonda ayoleike ng'amagezi ag'ensi eno gaaga busiru," 
1Corinthians1:21 kuba Katonda mu magezi ge yalemesa abantu okumumanha mu magezi gaibwe beene. Era yaasalagho okulokola abo abamwikiriza ng'abita mu kibono kye tubakobera, abandi kye beeta “obusiru”." 
1Corinthians1:22 Kuba Abayudaaya benda bumanhiso, ate Abagureki baagala magezi." 
1Corinthians1:23 Aye ife tubakobera ku Kurisito ye baakomerera, eyafuuka ekitimuguunha eri Abayudaaya, ate ekizira makulu eri abamaghanga agandi." 
1Corinthians1:24 Aye eri Abayudaaya n'abamaghanga agandi abaayetebwa Katonda, ekibono kino ni Kurisito, amaani era amagezi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians1:25 Kuba obwandiboneike ng'oti n'obusiru bwa Katonda, bugezi okusinga amagezi ag'abantu, ate obwandibaire obunafu bwa Katonda, n'amaani agasinga ag'abantu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Aboluganda, mwidhukire bwe mwali Katonda lwe yabeeta. Batono ku imwe ensi be yali etwala ng'abagezi, batono abaali ab'obukumu oba abakungu." 
1Corinthians1:27 Katonda yasalagho okulonda abo ensi b'etwala nga basiru, aswaze abagezi. Era yaalonda abo ensi b'etwala okuba abanafu, aswaze ab'amaani." 
1Corinthians1:28 Yalonda abo ensi b'etwala nga ba ghansi, nga baziramu mugaso era abanhoomebwa, olwo ayoleke ng'abo ensi b'etwala ng'abalimu omugaso, muzira." 
1Corinthians1:29 Era ghabule omuntu aghanga okwesuuta mu maiso ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:30 Katonda oyo n'ensimuko ey'obulamu bwe muli nabwo mu Kurisito Yesu. Kurisito oyo Katonda ye yafuula amagezi gaife, era oyo n'atufuula abatuufu eri Katonda, era n'atutukuza, era oyo n'okununulibwa kwaife." 
1Corinthians1:31 Kale nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa: “Oyo eyeesuuta, yeesuutenga ku lwa Musengwa.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Aboluganda, bwe naidha ye muli okubakobera amazima ag'ekyama kya Katonda, tyakozesa bibono bikalangafu waire okukozesa amagezi ag'ekikugu." 
1Corinthians2:2 Kuba nasalagho okuleka ebindi byonabyona okutoolaku Yesu Kurisito n'okufa kwe ku musalaba. 
1Corinthians2:3 Kale bwe naidha ye muli nali munafu nga ntya era nga ndhugumira zeenazeena 
1Corinthians2:4 era mu ndhegeresa yange ni mu bukwenda bwange timwalimu magezi ga nsi agasendasenda, aye mwalimu kwoleka maani ga Mwoyo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:5 Olwo kyaba nti okwikiriza kwaimwe tikuva mu magezi ga nsi, aye kuva mu maani ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:6 Waire nkobye ntyo, abo abakuze mu mwoyo mbakobera amagezi, aye nga amagezi ago ti n'ag'ensi eno oba ag'abo ab'obukumu abagifuga, abali n'okuwaagho." 
1Corinthians2:7 Aye mbakobera amagezi ag'ekyama kya Katonda amagise, ge yataagho ng'ensi ekaali kutondebwa olw'okutugheesa ekitiisa." 
1Corinthians2:8 Ghazira naire ku bafuzi ab'ensi eyakimanha, kuba nguli baali bakiidhi, tibandikomereire Musengwa ow'ekitiisa." 
1Corinthians2:9 Aye nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa: “Katonda kye yategekera abo abamugonza, ghazira muntu yaali akiboineku waire okukiwuliraku, oba eyaali alowooziizaaku nga kisobola okubaagho.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Aye niife Katonda be yamanhisa ekyama kye ng'abita mu Mwoyo we. Kuba Mwoyo aidhi buli kintu, era n'entegeka dha Katonda edh'omunda." 
1Corinthians2:11 Kuba naani aidhi ebidhuubo by'omuntu okutoolaku omwoyo gwe gwene ogumulimu? Kale ni ghazira aidhi bidhuubo bya Katonda okutoolaku Mwoyo wa Katonda. 
1Corinthians2:12 Mwoyo ye twafuna ti wa nsi eno aye ni Mwoyo ava ye Katonda, tusobole okumanha ebirabo Katonda bye yatugha." 
1Corinthians2:13 Kale bwe tuba nga twinhonhola abo abali ni Mwoyo, titukozesa bibono bya magezi ga bantu buntu, aye tukozesa bibono bya Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:14 Buli ataba ni Mwoyo taghanga kufuna birabo biva ya Mwoyo wa Katonda, kuba tabitegeera era abitwala ng'obusiru, kuba bimanhibwa ni mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:15 Omuntu aba ni Mwoyo oyo asobola okumanha buli kintu, aye mwene ghazira asobola kumwekebeedha." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Naani aidhi okulowooza kwa Musengwa? Naani asobola okumugalagira?” Aye ife tuli n'okulowooza kwa Kurisito. 
1Corinthians3:1 Aboluganda, nali nga tighanga kwogera n'imwe nga bwe nandyogeire n'abantu abali ni Mwoyo. Nali nga ndi n'okwogera n'imwe nga bwe nandyogeire n'ab'ensi, ate abaana abaghere mu kwikiriza Kurisito." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nali n'okubanhwesa amata mu kifo ky'emere olw'okuba mwali mukaali kutuuka kugirya. Era waire ni mperaano mukaali kutuuka kugirya 
1Corinthians3:3 kuba mukaali ba nsi. Kuba oba mu imwe mukaalimu ensaalwa n'okusoolasoola, kino tikyoleka nga mukaali ba nsi era ng'abantu abandi bwe bali?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Owundi ku imwe bw'akoba ati: “Nze ndi wa Paulo”, ate owundi ati: “Nze ndi wa Apollo”, agho muba nga timwebisiisa ng'oti n'abantu ab'ensi?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Kuba bwenebwene Apollo naani? Era Paulo naani? Tuli bagheereza bugheereza ba Katonda, be yakozesa okutuusa imwe ku kwikiriza. Buli muntu ku ife akola omulimo Katonda gwe yamugha okukola." 
1Corinthians3:6 Nze nasimba ensigo, Apollo yaafukirira, aye Katonda n'eyakuza." 
1Corinthians3:7 Bwenebwene oyo asimba oba afukirira ti n'ekikulu, aye ekikulu, ni Katonda akuza." 
1Corinthians3:8 Oyo asimba ayagayaga n'oyo afukirira era Katonda alisasula buli muntu olw'omulimo gwe yakola. 
1Corinthians3:9 Kuba ife, Katonda tuli bakozi baine era imwe muli nimiro ya Katonda. Kabiri muli kizimbe kya Katonda." 
1Corinthians3:10 Nga nkozesa ekirabo Katonda kye yampa, nataagho omusingi ng'omuzimbi omukugu, era omuntu owundi kw'ali kuzimbira. Kale buli azimbaku yeegendereze ensambo y'azimbiraku." 
1Corinthians3:11 Kuba Katonda yamala okutaagho Yesu Kurisito nga n'omusingi guti gwonka, era nga ghazira musingi gundi gusobola kuteebwagho." 
1Corinthians3:12 Ole asobola okuzimbira ku musingi ogwo: zaabu, oba feeza, oba amabaale ag'omughendo, oba emiti, oba eisubi oba eisandha." 
1Corinthians3:13 Aye omulimo gwa buli muntu guliboneka ku lunaku lwa Kurisito, kuba olwo gulyolekebwa mu muliro, era mu muliro omwo, obulungi obwa buli mulimo gwa muntu, bwamanhika." 
1Corinthians3:14 Omuzimbi aligheebwa empeera, kye yazimbira ku musingi bwe kirisigala nga tikyokeibwa muliro." 
1Corinthians3:15 Aye omulimo gw'omuntu yeenayeena bwe gulyokebwa alifiirwa, waire mwene ng'aliwona aye era aliba oti n'atuumye mu muliro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Timwidhi nga muli isinzizo lya Katonda, era nga Mwoyo wa Katonda aba mu imwe?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Kale buli muntu azikiriza eisinzizo lya Katonda, Katonda alimuzikiriza kuba eisinzizo lya Katonda itukuvu era imwe beene niimwe eisinzizo eryo." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ghatabangagho muntu yeesubagha mwene. Omuntu yeenayeena mu imwe bwe yeerowooza okuba omugezi, mu magezi ag'ensi, afuuke musiru memale aghange okufuuka omugezi" 
1Corinthians3:19 kuba ensi ky'edhuuba okuba amagezi, kiba busiru mu maiso ga Katonda. Era kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Atega abagezi ng'abita mu magezi gaibwe geene”" 
1Corinthians3:20 era n'aghandi kiti: “Musengwa aidhi ng'ebidhuubo by'abagezi tibigasa.” 
1Corinthians3:21 Kale omuntu yeenayeena ateesuutanga olw'ebyo abantu bye bakoba, kuba ebintu byonabyona byaimwe." 
1Corinthians3:22 Oba Paulo, oba Apollo, oba Petero, oba nsi, oba bulamu, oba okufa, oba ebirigho, oba ebiribaagho, byonabyona byaimwe." 
1Corinthians3:23 Ate imwe muli ba Kurisito, ate Kurisito wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:1 Agho ni mukimanhe nga tuli bagheereza ba Kurisito abaateebwagho okuba abakuumi ab'amazima g'ekyama kya Katonda. 
1Corinthians4:2 Ekintu ekyendebwa ku mugheereza oti n'oyo, n'okuba omwesigwa ye Musengwa we." 
1Corinthians4:3 Nze ku bwange tifaayo imwe okunsalira omusango, oba omuntu owundi yeenayeena. Ninze mwene, tyesalira musango." 
1Corinthians4:4 Nze tiidhi ng'eriyo ekibi kye naali nkoze, aye ekyo tikitegeeza nti nziraku musango. Musengwa n'asalagho." 
1Corinthians4:5 Kale mutasaliranga muntu yeenayeena musango nga ekiseera kikaali kutuuka ekya Musengwa waife okwidha. Oyo alita mu butangaavu ebintu ebigise mu nzikiiza, era alitoolayo ebidhuubo ebigise mu myoyo gy'abantu byamanhibwa. Olwo ni buli muntu yaasiimibwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:6 Aboluganda, ku lwaimwe nkozeisa Apollo ninze nga eky'okuboneraku, musobole okumanha amakulu ag'endhogera ekoba eti: “Otaswika kyaghandiikibwa.” Memale olwo mulobe kwesuutira mu ono, na kunhooma ole." 
1Corinthians4:7 Naani eyakufuula ow'ekitiisa okusinga abandi? Katonda ti n'eyakugha byonabyona by'oli nabyo? Kale byonabyona by'oli nabyo bwe biri birabo bulabo, ozira nsonga lwaki weesuuta." 
1Corinthians4:8 Mwamala okufuna buli kye mwetaaga! Mwamala ira okufuuka abakombe! Mufuuse bakyabazinga, aye nga ife tukaali! Kyandibaire kikalamu nguli bwene mubaire bakyabazinga ni tufugira aghalala n'imwe." 
1Corinthians4:9 Kimbonekera oti ife Abatume Katonda atughaire ekifo ekisembayo, okufaanana ng'oti n'abantu abasaliirwa ogw'okufa kuba tufuuse ekyerolerwa eri ensi, eri bamalaika era n'eri abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Ku lwa Kurisito ife tuli basiru, aye imwe muli bagezi mu Kurisito oyo! Ife tuli banafu, aye imwe muli ba maani! Ife tunhoomebwa, aye imwe muteebwamu ekitiisa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Okutuukiza irala ku saawa ya mperaano tuja ndhala nga n'endiwo etuluma, tuvaala biziina, tukubibwa, tuzira maka tuwuunzuuma buwuunzuume," 
1Corinthians4:12 era tukola inho twakoogha. Bwe batukolimira, ife tubendeza nkabi bwe batukiriga, tuguminkiriza." 
1Corinthians4:13 Bwe batwogeraku obubi, ife tuboogeraku bukalamu. Twafuuka era tuli ng'oti n'ebikaba eby'ensi eno mu buli kintu tuli ng'oti iseedha buseedha." 
1Corinthians4:14 Bino mbighandiise ti lwa kwenda kubaswaza, aye lwa kwenda kubeegeresa ng'abaana bange abagonzi." 
1Corinthians4:15 Kuba waire muli n'ababeegeresa kamaala, mu Kurisito muli ni Lata waimwe mulala. Kuba nze nafuuka Lata waimwe bwe nabakobera Amawulire Amalungi." 
1Corinthians4:16 Kale mbeeghembye muntwale ng'eky'okuboneraku. 
1Corinthians4:17 Olwa kino ndi kubatumira Timotheo, omwana wange omugonzi era omwesigwa, abaidhukizenga enkola yange mu bulamu buno obuyaaka mu Kurisito Yesu, era ye ndhegeresa mu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona." 
1Corinthians4:18 Abandi ku imwe beetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, kuba balowooza bati tiriidhaku eyo." 
1Corinthians4:19 Aye Musengwa bw'aliba ng'ayenze ndidha kwidha mangu, olwo mmanhe amaani ag'abantu abo abeetwala okuba aba ghaigulu, ng'otoireku bye boogera obwogere" 
1Corinthians4:20 kuba obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda tibubonekera mu bibono bubono, aye bubonekera mu maani." 
1Corinthians4:21 Mwenda ki ku bino? Ndidhe eyo na lwigo, oba na kugonza mu mwoyo omukalamu?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Bakoba mbu mu imwe mulimu obwenzi obubi einho obutaagaanibwa na mu bataikiriza Katonda ng'omuntu okweiriza muka ise! 
1Corinthians5:2 Kale musobola mutya okwetwala ng'aba ghaigulu? Mwandibaire nga munakughala bunakughale, era omusaadha eyakola ekintu oti n'ekyo abingibwe mu imwe abantu ba Katonda." 
1Corinthians5:3 Waire tiri n'imwe mu mubiri, ndi n'imwe mu mwoyo, era ndi ng'oti ndi n'imwe eyo, kuba mu liina lya Musengwa waife Yesu, namala ira okusalira omusango omusaadha eyakola ekibi ekyo. Bwe muliba nga mwesoloiza, zeena nga ndi n'imwe mu mwoyo, nga mukozesa amaani ga Musengwa waife Yesu," 
1Corinthians5:4  
1Corinthians5:5 omusaadha oyo mumugheeyo mu maani ga Sitaani omubiri gwe guzikirizibwe, memale omwoyo gwe gulokolebwe ku lunaku lwa Musengwa waife Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Timuli batuufu okwetwala okuba aba ghaigulu. Timwidhi ng'ekizimbulukusa ekitono kizimbulukusa engaano yoonayoona mwe kiteereibwa? 
1Corinthians5:7 Mwetoolemu ekizimbulukusa ekikaire eky'ekibi, olwo mube engaano empyaka omuzira kizimbulukusa nga bwe muli bwenebwene. Kuba Kurisito, entaama yaife ey'Ekibinuko eky'Okubitizibwa yamala okwitibwa." 
1Corinthians5:8 Kale ka tufumbe embaga, ti na mugaati ogulimu ekizimbulukusa ekikaire eky'eitima n'obubi, aye n'omugaati oguziramu kizimbulukusa, omugaati gwenegwene ogw'amazima." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mu mbaluwa ye nabaghandiikira nabakoba obutakolagananga na benzi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Tyakoba benzi ba nsi eno, oba ab'amairu, oba abanhazi, oba abasinza ebitali Katonda, kuba ekyo kyandibaire ng'okubakoba okuviira irala mu nsi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kye nali nkoba n'obutakolagananga na muntu yeeyeta waluganda aye ate nga mwenzi, oba nga wa mairu, oba asinza ebitali Katonda, oba omuvumagani, oba omutamiivu, oba omwibi; omuntu ng'oti n'oyo n'okulya mutalyanga naye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kwona ti mulimo gwange kusalira abataikiriza musango. Abo abaikiriza be mube musalire omusango. 
1Corinthians5:13 Katonda alisalira abo abataikiriza omusango ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Mubinge omuntu omubi abaveemu.” 
1Corinthians6:1 Owundi ku imwe bw'aba n'ensonga ku woluganda, akana atya okutwala ensonga ye eri abalamuzi abatali baikiriza, mu kifo eky'okugitwala eri abantu ba Katonda?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Timwidhi ng'abantu ba Katonda n'abalisalira ensi omusango? Kale oba nga niimwe abalisalira ensi omusango, timusobola kusala busango butono obwo?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Timwidhi nga niife abaja okusalira bamalaika omusango? Memale tulemwa tutya okusala emisango egy'omu bulamu buno? 
1Corinthians6:4 Lwaki bwe muba n'emisango oti ni gino mugitwalira abantu abanhoomebwa Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito okugisala? 
1Corinthians6:5 Timuswala? Bwenebwene mu imwe muzira muntu mugezi asobola kusala musango ghagati gh'aboluganda? 
1Corinthians6:6 Owoluganda yaawoza n'owoluganda mwine, era yaaganha abataikiriza okubasalira omusango?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Okughaghabiragana ku mbuga beene na beene, kwoleka ng'okwebisa ng'Abakurisito kubalemye. Lwaki timumala gaguminkiriza bisobyo bya banaimwe? Lwaki timumala gaganha banaimwe kubatwalaku byaimwe?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Aye imwe beene musobya, era mwatwala ebitali byaimwe ni bwekuba ku boluganda beene." 
1Corinthians6:9 Timwidhi ng'abakozi b'ebibi tibalingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda? Mulobe kwerimba ghazira badankaanu, waire abasinza ebitali Katonda, waire abenzi, waire abatamiivu, waire abasaadha abadankaana ni basaadha banaibwe, oba abakazi abadankaana ni bakazi banaibwe, abalingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:10 Era ghazira baibi, oba ab'amairu, oba abatamiivu, oba abavumagani, oba abanhazi, abalingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:11 Era abandi ku imwe mutyo bwe mwali, aye mwanaazibwa mwafuulibwa bantu ba Katonda era abatuufu eri Katonda, mu liina lya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, ni mu Mwoyo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:12 Owundi akoba ati: “Ndhikirizibwa okukola buli kintu kyonakyona.” Aye ti kiri nti buli kintu kikuyamba. Nsobola okukoba nti: “Ndhikirizibwa okukola buli kintu kyonakyona,” aye tija kuganha kuba mwiru afugibwa kintu kyonakyona." 
1Corinthians6:13 Owundi yaakoba ati: “Emere yakolerwa mabunda, ate amabunda gaakolerwa mere.” Aye Katonda alibitoolagho byombi. Omubiri tigwakolerwa bwenzi aye gwakolerwa okugheereza Musengwa, era Musengwa ni mwene mubiri." 
1Corinthians6:14 Era Katonda eyazuukiza Musengwa twena alituzuukiza mu maani ge. 
1Corinthians6:15 Timwidhi ng'emibiri gyaimwe bitundu bya mubiri gwa Kurisito? Memale obwo ntoole ebitundu by'omubiri gwa Kurisito mbifuule ebitundu eby'omubiri gw'omwenzi? Busa naire! 
1Corinthians6:16 Oba timwidhi nga eyeeyimba n'omwenzi bafuuka mubiri mulala naye? Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Ababiri banaafuukanga mubiri mulala.” 
1Corinthians6:17 Aye oyo eyeeyimba ku Musengwa afuuka mulala naye mu mwoyo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Mweghalenga obwenzi. Ebibi ebindi omuntu by'akola tabikola ku mubiri gwe, aye omwenzi ayonoona ku mubiri gwe gwene." 
1Corinthians6:19 Timwidhi ng'emibiri gyaimwe n'eisinzizo lya Mwoyo Mutukuvu ali mu imwe era eyabagheebwa Katonda? Timuli baimwe ku bwaimwe, aye muli ba Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:20 Katonda yamala okubagula, kale mugheese Katonda ekitiisa n'emibiri gyaimwe." 
1Corinthians7:1 Mperaano nga ndhira mu ebyo bye mwampandiikiraku, kiba kikalamu omusaadha obutaba na mukazi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Aye olw'okweghala obwenzi, buli musaadha abenga n'omukazi we, ate buli mukazi abenga n'iba." 
1Corinthians7:3 Omusaadha atuukirizenga ebimusabibwa mu bufumbo era n'omukazi akolenga atyo. 
1Corinthians7:4 Omukazi ti n'afuga omubiri gwe mwene, aye iba n'agufuga. N'omusaadha ti n'afuga mubiri gwe mukazi we n'agufuga." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ole atalobanga mwine, okutoolaku nga musoose kwisania mwataagho ekiseera eky'okusabiramu Katonda. Aye ekiseera ekyo nga kiwoireku mwirengamu nga buliidho, kuba Sitaani asobola okubasendasenda mwaloba kwekuuma." 
1Corinthians7:6 Kino ti kiragiro aye mbagha bwa magezi. 
1Corinthians7:7 Abantu boonaboona nguli baba oti ninze kyandibaire kikalamu, aye buli muntu ali n'ekitone kye eky'endhawulo Katonda ky'amugha. Ono amugha kino, ole yaamugha kire." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kale abo abakaali kubayiza oba kubayira, ni banamwandu, mbakoba nti kiba kikalamu bwe basigala abalangasa ng'oti ninze bwendi." 
1Corinthians7:9 Aye bwe baba nga tibasobola kwekuuma babayire oba babayize, kuba okubaiza oba okubayira kusinga okusiriira n'amairu." 
1Corinthians7:10 Eri abafumbo, ndi n'ekiragiro, ekitali kyange, aye ekya Musengwa, ekiragira omukazi obutanobanga." 
1Corinthians7:11 Aye bw'anobanga, asigalenga nga mulangasa. Bwe kitaba kityo airengayo ewa iba baisanie, era omusaadha atabinganga mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:12 Abandi nze mbakoba, aye ti ni Musengwa abakoba, nti owoluganda omusaadha bw'aba n'omukazi atali mwikiriza, omukazi oyo n'aganha okuba naye aghalala, atamubinganga." 
1Corinthians7:13 Era owoluganda omukazi bw'aba n'omusaadha atali mwikiriza, aye n'aganha okuba naye aghalala, atanobanga." 
1Corinthians7:14 Omusaadha atali mwikiriza aba muntu wa Katonda ku lwa mukazi we, ate omukazi atali mwikiriza yeena yaaba muntu wa Katonda ku lwa iba. Nguli tikyali kityo abaana baibwe bandibairenga ng'abataidhi Katonda. Aye nga bwekiri kityo, boona baba bantu ba Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:15 Aye atali mwikiriza bw'aba nga ayenda okuleka owoluganda, aje. Agho owoluganda omusaadha oba omukazi ghazira kimusiba, kuba Katonda yatweta tube n'eidembe." 
1Corinthians7:16 Iwe owoluganda omukazi, oidhi otya oba niiwe olikyusa balo? Oba iwe owoluganda omusaadha, oidhi otya oba niiwe olikyusa mukazi wo?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Buli muntu asigale mu bulamu Musengwa bwe yamugha, Katonda mwe yamwetera. Ntyo bwe ndhegeresa mu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona." 
1Corinthians7:18 Oyo eyayetebwa nga mukekete atagezangaku kwetoolaku nkovu dha bukekete, n'oyo eyayetebwa nga ti mukekete atakeketebwanga." 
1Corinthians7:19 Ekikulu tikukeketa oba butakeketa, aye kugondera mateeka ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:20 Buli muntu agwaine asigale nga bwe yali ng'akaali kwetebwa. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wali mwiru nga Katonda akaali kukweta? Tofaayo. Aye oba nga ghaligho omukisa ogw'okufuuka ow'eidembe, gukozese." 
1Corinthians7:22 Omwiru eyayetebwa Musengwa, aba muntu wa Musengwa ow'eidembe eyatoolebwa mu bwiru, mu nsambo n'endala ow'eidembe atabangaku mwiru eyayetebwa Musengwa, aba mwiru wa Kurisito." 
1Corinthians7:23 Katonda yamala okubagula, kale mutafuuka bairu ba bantu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Kale aboluganda, buli muntu agheerezenga Katonda mu bulamu bwe yalimu, Katonda bwe yali ng'akaali kumweta." 
1Corinthians7:25 Mperaano nga ndhira mu ebyo ebigema ku batafumbirwangaku, nzira kiragiro kiva wa Musengwa, aye mpa bwa magezi ng'omuntu asobola okwesigibwa olw'ekisa kya Musengwa." 
1Corinthians7:26 Ndhuuba nti olw'ebiseera ebizibu ebirigho, kikalamu omuntu okusigala nga bw'ali." 
1Corinthians7:27 Oli ni mukazi wo? Kale otagezangaku kumwetoolaku. Okaali kubayiza? Kale otagezangaku kubayiza. 
1Corinthians7:28 Aye bw'obayiza oba tokoze kibi, era n'omughala omwegha bw'abayira aba takoze kibi. Aye abafumbo baba n'ebizibu kamaala, era nandyenze okubawonia ebizibu oti n'ebyo." 
1Corinthians7:29 Aboluganda, kye nkoba ni kino nti ekiseera kisigaireyo kitono, era okuva ni mperaano abali n'abakazi beebise ng'oti bazira" 
1Corinthians7:30 ate abo abali n'enaku, babe ng'oti bazira nnaku, abo abaseka babe ng'oti tiibasangaavu abo abagula babe ng'oti bye bagula ti byaibwe." 
1Corinthians7:31 Abo abajiira ku bintu eby'omu nsi, babe ng'oti tibabijiiraku. Kuba ensi eno nga bw'eri mperaano, eri kumpi kukoma." 
1Corinthians7:32 Nhenda mulobe kweraliikirira. Omusaadha atali mufumbo yeeraliikirira bya Musengwa, kuba ky'agezaaku n'okumusiimya." 
1Corinthians7:33 Aye omusaadha omufumbo yeeraliikirira eby'ensi eno, kuba afuba okusiimya mukazi we," 
1Corinthians7:34 omwoyo gwe guba ghano ni ghale. Omukazi atali mufumbo oba omughala omwegha yeeraliikirira bya Musengwa, kuba ayenda okwegha Musengwa yeenayeena mu mubiri ni mu mwoyo. Aye omukazi ali mu bufumbo yeeraliikirira eby'omu nsi, kuba ayenda okusiimya iba." 
1Corinthians7:35 Kino ndi kukikoba olw'obulungi bwaimwe. Tirikugezaaku kubakaluubiriza, aye nhenda mukole ekintu ekituufu era ekikalamu, era mwegheereyo irala okukola omulimo gwa Musengwa n'omwoyo omulala." 
1Corinthians7:36 Oyo eyamala okwandhula bw'akibona nga tikikola bukalamu omughala ye yamala okwandhula, ng'amairu ali na mangi, era ng'awulira ng'ateekwa okubayiza omughala oyo, akole nga bw'ayenda, amubayize aba takoze kibi." 
1Corinthians7:37 Aye oyo atakakiibwa bukakibwe era amaliriire mu mwoyo gwe obutabayiza, era ng'asobola bukalamu okufuga amairu ge, era ng'amaze okusalagho mu mwoyo gwe eky'okukola, kiba kikalamu obutabayiza mughala oyo." 
1Corinthians7:38 Kale oyo abayiza mwine ye yamala okwandhula akola bukalamu, aye asinga n'oyo atabayiriza irala." 
1Corinthians7:39 Omukazi omufumbo tasobola kuba wa busa iba bw'aba ng'akaali mulamu. Aye iba bw'afa asobola okubayira omusaadha owundi, aye omusaadha oyo ateekwa kuba nga Mukurisito." 
1Corinthians7:40 Aye mu kubona okwange, okusigala nga bw'ali mwe yandisinze kwesiimira, era ndowooza nga zeena ndi ni Mwoyo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians8:1 Mperaano nga ndhira mu ebyo bye mwampandiikiraku ebigema ku by'okulya ebigheebwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, twidhi nga “twenatwena tuli n'okumanha”. “Okumanha” okwo kuleetera omuntu okwebona nga wa ghaigulu, aye okugonza kuzimba omuntu." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ole bw'alowooza ati ali ni ky'aidhi, aba akaali kumanha nga bw'agwaine kumanha." 
1Corinthians8:3 Aye omuntu bw'agonza Katonda, Katonda amumanha." 
1Corinthians8:4 Kale ku bigema ku by'okulya ebigheebwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, twidhi nga mu butuufu ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda biziramu makulu, era nga Katonda ali mulala ati, ezira wundi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Waire ebaayo ebyetebwa “bakatonda” mu igulu oba mu nsi, era nga bw'eriyo “bakatonda” ni “basengwa” abangi," 
1Corinthians8:6 ife tuli ni Katonda mulala, Lata, eyatonda ebintu byonabyona, era tuligho ku lw'oyo. Era ghaligho Musengwa mulala, Yesu Kurisito, ebintu byonabyona mwe byabita okutondebwa, era mwe tubita okuba abalamu." 
1Corinthians8:7 Aye okumanha kuno tikwa bantu boonaboona. Abandi olw'okumanhirira ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, ni ye buli eno bwe balya eby'okulya oti n'ebyo, bawulirira irala mule nga bigheereibwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda. Era olw'omwoyo gwaibwe okuba omunafu, bawulira nga eby'okulya ebyo biboonoine." 
1Corinthians8:8 Aye eby'okulya ghazira kye bitwongereku mu maiso ga Katonda. Katonda tatubona ng'abalungi, bwe tulya, oba okutubona ng'ababi, bwe tutalya." 
1Corinthians8:9 Aye mwegendereze eidembe lino lirobe kusuula banafu mu kibi. 
1Corinthians8:10 Omuntu ali n'omwoyo omunafu bw'akubona iwe oli n'okumanha ng'otyaime okulya mu isabo, kino tikireetera muntu oyo kufuna maani kulya eby'okulya ebigheebwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Kale olw'okumanha kwo oba ozikiriiza owoluganda oyo omunafu, Kurisito ye yafiirira." 
1Corinthians8:12 Kale bwe mukola ekibi ku boluganda ni mukosa emyoyo gyaibwe eminafu, muba mukoze ekibi ku Kurisito." 
1Corinthians8:13 Kale oba nga eby'okulya bireetera muganda wange okugwa mu kibi, tiireyo kubirya ndobe kuleetera muganda wange kugwa." 
1Corinthians9:1 Tiri wa idembe? Tiri mutume? Tyabona Yesu Musengwa waife? Imwe timwava mu mulimo gwe nakolera Musengwa waife? 
1Corinthians9:2 Waire abandi tibantwala ng'omutume, aye ndi mutume ye muli, kuba imwe beene niimwe akamanhiso akakakasa obutume bwange mu Musengwa." 
1Corinthians9:3 Abo abantakania mbairamu nti: 
1Corinthians9:4 Titugwanira kugheebwa bya kulya olw'omulimo gwe tukola? 
1Corinthians9:5 Titugwanira kukola ng'Abatume abandi, era nga baganda ba Musengwa, era nga Petero, abatambula ni bakazi baibwe?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Barunaba ninze, niife twenka abali n'okukola okweyemerezaagho?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Mwisirukale ki eyeesasulira mwene ng'ali mu igye? Naani asimba enimiro y'emizabbibu n'atalya ku bibala byayo? Mwayi ki atanhwa ku mata ga mu kyayo kye? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ni bwentakoma ku bya kuboneraku bino byonka ebyabuliidho, Amateeka ga Musa goona bwe gakoba." 
1Corinthians9:9 Kyaghandiikibwa mu Mateeka ga Musa kiti: “Tosibanga nte munwa bw'eba ng'emulungula engaano.” Obwo agho Katonda aba alumirwa nte? 
1Corinthians9:10 Bwene yali tategeeza ife? Kyaghandiikibwa ku lwaife, kuba alima agwana okulima ng'asuubira, ate asekula agwana okusekula nga asuubira okugheebwa ku by'asekula." 
1Corinthians9:11 Kale oba mu kubakobera ekibono twabasigamu ebibaganhula omwoyo, kiba kibi ife okubakungulamu ebituganhula omubiri?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Oba abandi bagwaniire okusuubira bino okuva ye imwe, ife titugwaniire inho n'okubasinga ni tubasinga? Aye tukaali kubasaba kintu kyonakyona nga bwe tugwaine. Tuguminkiriza buli kintu olw'obutenda kutaagho kirobera Mawulire Malungi aga Kurisito kusansaana." 
1Corinthians9:13 Timwidhi ng'abo abakola mu isinzizo balya ku bya mu ndhu ya Katonda, era n'abo abagheereza ku alutaari ya Katonda bafuna omugabo gwaibwe okuva ku bigheebwayo ku alutaari?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Mu nsambo n'endala Musengwa yalagira ati abo abakobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi bateekwa okwemerezebwagho olw'omulimo ogwo. 
1Corinthians9:15 Aye nkaali kubasaba kintu kyonakyona, era waire mperaano tiri kubaghandiikira lwa kubasaba kintu kyonakyona. Kasinga mmala gafa ntaganhie muntu yeenayeena kuntoolaku ekyo ekindeetera okwenhumiriza." 
1Corinthians9:16 Bwe nkobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi ekyo tikindeetera kwenhumiriza, kuba era nteekwa buteekwe okubakobera, era mba nga nkagwireku bwentakobera bantu Mawulire Amalungi." 
1Corinthians9:17 Ekyo bwe nkikola olw'okwenda kwange mba ndi n'okugheebwa empeera, aye olw'okuba Katonda yakingemya, nteekwa buteekwe okukikola." 
1Corinthians9:18 Kale mpeera ki ye nfuna? N'eno: okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi ku bwereere nga tisaba kusasulwa olw'omulimo ogwo. 
1Corinthians9:19 Waire nga tiri mwiru wa muntu yeenayeena, nafuuka omwiru wa boonaboona nsobole okuleetera Kurisito abantu kamaala." 
1Corinthians9:20 Mu Bayudaaya, nafuuka ng'Omuyudaaya nsobole okuleeta Abayudaaya. Mu abo abafugibwa Amateeka, nafuuka ng'afugibwa Amateeka nsobole okuleeta abo abafugibwa Amateeka, waire nga nze tifugibwa Mateeka." 
1Corinthians9:21 Mu bamaghanga agandi nafuuka ng'abamaghanga agandi abatafugibwa Mateeka, nsobole okuleeta abamaghanga agandi. Kino tikitegeeza kiti tigondera mateeka ga Katonda. Mu butuufu ngondera eiteeka lya Kurisito." 
1Corinthians9:22 Mu banafu mu kwikiriza, nafuuka ng'omunafu nsobole okuleeta abanafu. Kale nafuuka ebintu byonabyona mu bantu boonaboona, bwe kiba nga kisoboka mbeeku ni be ndokola." 
1Corinthians9:23 Olw'okwenda okugabana ku bikalamu ebiva mu Mawulire Amalungi, kyenva nkola ebyo byonabyona." 
1Corinthians9:24 Bwenebwene mukiidhi ng'ababa mu ntaka edh'okulumuka baba kamaala, aye aghangula ekirabo aba mulala. Kale mulumuke mu nsambo ebasobozesa okughangula ekirabo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Buli muzaanhi azaanha emizaanho egy'entaka, yeegendereza inho asobole okufuna ekirabo eky'ekiseera obuseera, aye ife twegendereza inho tufune ekirabo ekitawaagho." 
1Corinthians9:26 Nze kyenva numuka butereevu ku kagugha, tiri ng'oti n'omukubi w'ebifunsi akuba eibanga." 
1Corinthians9:27 Nfuntira irala omubiri gwange era naagufugira irala, nze ndobe kutoolebwa mu ntaka nga mmaze okukobera abandi Amawulire Amalungi." 
1Corinthians10:1 Aboluganda, nhenda mwidhukire ebyatuuka ku badhaadha baife abaanonereza Musa, boonaboona ekire kyabakulemberamu, era boonaboona baabita mu nhandha." 
1Corinthians10:2 Boonaboona mu kire, era ni mu nhandha baabatizibwa mu kwisa ekirala ni Musa." 
1Corinthians10:3 Boonaboona baalyanga ku mere ndala ey'omwoyo," 
1Corinthians10:4 era baanhwanga eky'okunhwa kirala eky'omwoyo. Baanhwanga ku lubaale olw'omwoyo olwatambulanga nabo, era olubaale olwo ni Kurisito." 
1Corinthians10:5 Aye waire kyali kityo abasinga obungi ku abo, Katonda tiyabasiima, era baafiira mu irungu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Mperaano ebintu bino bya kutulabula tulobe okwegomba ebintu ebibi ng'abo bwe baakola. 
1Corinthians10:7 Mutasinzanga bitali Katonda ng'abandi ku abo bwe baakola, era nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Abantu baatyama okulya n'okunhwa era baira mu makina amabi.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Tulobenga kukola bikolwa bya bwenzi ng'abandi ku abo bwe baakola, ni bafa emitwalo ebiri n'enkumi eisatu (23,000) ku lunaku olulala." 
1Corinthians10:9 Tulobenga kuleba Musengwa ng'abandi ku abo bwe baakola, emisota ni gibaita." 
1Corinthians10:10 Era tutaduuduumanga ng'abandi ku abo bwe baakola, Malaika ow'okufa n'abaita." 
1Corinthians10:11 Bino byonabyona byabatuukaku bibe eby'okuboneraku eri abandi, era byaghandiikibwa olw'okutwegeresa ife abaligho mu biseera bino ng'ensi eri kumpi okutuuka ku nkomerero." 
1Corinthians10:12 Kale buli adhuuba ng'ali n'okwikiriza okugumu yeegendereze alobe kugwa. 
1Corinthians10:13 Ghazira kulebwa kubatuukaku, okutatuuka ku bantu bandi. Aye Katonda tasubagha, taja kuganha kulebwa kwe mutasobola kubatuukaku. Mu kiseera eky'okulebwa aidha kubaghanga amaani ag'okubigumira era n'amagezi ag'okubighangula." 
1Corinthians10:14 Kale bakagwa mutaseetanga ya kusinza bintu ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda. 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndi kwogera n'imwe ng'ayogera n'abantu abategeera, mwesaliregho beene ku bye ndi kwogera." 
1Corinthians10:16 Ekikopo ekyo kye twebalizaaku Katonda ti n'okwisa ekirala mu musaayi gwa Kurisito? Era omugaati gwe tumegulamegulamu ti n'okwisa ekirala mu mubiri gwa Kurisito? 
1Corinthians10:17 Kuba waire tuli kamaala, tuli mubiri mulala, kuba tulya omugaati mulala." 
1Corinthians10:18 Kale mubonere ku Baisiraeli abo abalya ebigheebwayo eri Katonda baba tibagabaniire ghalala mu kugheereza Katonda ku alutaari? 
1Corinthians10:19 Ndi kukoba ki? Nti ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, oba eby'okulya ebigheebwayo, birimu amakulu?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Busa! Kye ndi kukoba ni kino nti, ebyo ebigheebwayo mu masabo, ebyo babigha mizimu mibi aye ti Katonda, era tyenda imwe mwise kirala na mizimu mibi." 
1Corinthians10:21 Timusobola kunhwa ku kikopo kya Musengwa, era ni munhwa na ku kikopo kya mizimu mibi. Timusobola kulya ku kiiwulo kya Musengwa era ni mulya na ku kiiwulo kya mizimu mibi." 
1Corinthians10:22 Twenda kuleetera Katonda kuba wa nkikidi? Niife tumusinga amaani? 
1Corinthians10:23 Abandi bakoba mbu: “Twikirizibwa okukola buli kintu,” aye omuganhulo ti guli mu byonabyona “Twikirizibwa okukola buli kintu,” aye tikiri nti buli kintu kizimba." 
1Corinthians10:24 Omuntu atakoleranga lwa bulungi bwe mwene, aye akolerenga lwa bulungi bwa bandi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Kiisi mamba etundibwa mu kiya, mulyenga bulye na mwoyo mulala aghazira kubuuliriza" 
1Corinthians10:26 kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Ensi n'ebigirimu byonabyona bya Musengwa.” 
1Corinthians10:27 Atali mwikiriza bw'abeetanga ku kiiwulo ni muganha okuja, mulyenga buli ky'abagha nga timubuuziiza kibuuzo kyonakyona ekiva mu kudhuubiriza okw'omu myoyo gyaimwe." 
1Corinthians10:28 Aye ole bw'akukobera ati: “Kino kyagheebwayo eri ekisinzibwa ekitali Katonda,” otakiryanga ku lw'oyo akukobeire, ni ku lw'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians10:29 Nkoba omwoyo gwe, aye ti ogugwo. Kale lwaki okudhuuba okw'omuntu owundi kundobera okukola nze kye ndidhi nga kituufu?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Bwe mba nga mpaireyo okusaba kwange okw'okwebaza olw'emere, lwaki omuntu annenia olw'okulya emere ye neebaliiza Katonda?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Kale buli kye mukolanga, oba kulya oba kunhwa, mukikolenga olw'okugheesa Katonda ekitiisa." 
1Corinthians10:32 Mutakolanga kintu ekireetera Abayudaaya, oba abamaghanga agandi, oba Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda okugwa mu kibi." 
1Corinthians10:33 Mukole nga nze bwenkola ngezaaku okusiimya abantu boonaboona mu buli kye nkola nga tikolera lwa bulungi bwange mwene, aye lwa boonaboona basobole okulokolebwa." 
1Corinthians11:1 Mukolenga nga nze, era nga zeena bwe nkola nga Kurisito bye yakola." 
1Corinthians11:2 Mukola bukalamu kuba buliidho mundidhukira, era mwagema butiribiri ebyo bye nabeegeresa." 
1Corinthians11:3 Aye nhenda mumanhe nga Kurisito n'afuga buli musaadha, omusaadha n'afuga mukazi we, era Katonda n'afuga Kurisito." 
1Corinthians11:4 Kale omusaadha asaba, oba akobera abantu ekibono kya Katonda nga yeeghembye ku mutwe aswaza Kurisito." 
1Corinthians11:5 Aye omukazi yeenayeena asaba oba akobera abantu ekibono kya Katonda nga tiyeeghembye ku mutwe aswaza iba kuba omukazi oyo azira ndhawulo na mukazi amweireku nviiri. 
1Corinthians11:6 Omukazi bw'ateeghemba ku mutwe kiba kikalamu okusalaku enviiri dhe. Aye nga bwe kiswaza omukazi okusalaku, oba okughalagata omutwe, ateekwa okweghemba ku mutwe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Omusaadha tikimwetaagisa kweghemba ku mutwe, kuba omusaadha n'ekifaananie era n'ekitiisa kya Katonda, aye omukazi n'ekitiisa ky'omusaadha." 
1Corinthians11:8 Kuba omusaadha tiyatondebwa ng'ava mu mukazi, aye omukazi n'eyava mu musaadha." 
1Corinthians11:9 Era omusaadha tiyatondebwa ku lwa mukazi, aye omukazi n'eyatondebwa ku lw'omusaadha." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ku lwa bamalaika omukazi agwaine okweghembanga ku mutwe kyoleke ng'afugibwa iba. 
1Corinthians11:11 Aye mu Musengwa omukazi tabaagho yenka nga ghazira musaadha, n'omusaadha tabaagho yenka nga ghazira mukazi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Ng'omukazi bwe yatondebwa ng'ava mu musaadha, mu nsambo n'endala omusaadha azaalibwa mukazi, era ebintu byonabyona biva ye Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:13 Imwe beene mukibone. Kikalamu omukazi okusaba Katonda nga tiyeeghembye ku mutwe? 
1Corinthians11:14 Obutonde bwonka tibubalaga ng'omusaadha okupiita enviiri kimuswaza," 
1Corinthians11:15 aye ng'omukazi okupiita enviiri kimubonesa bukalamu? Kuba omukazi dhaamugheebwa ng'ebyokweghemba. 
1Corinthians11:16 Aye omuntu yeenayeena bw'ayenda okukitakania, akimanhe nga ife n'Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ebya Katonda, tuzira ngeri yindi mu kusaba okutoolaku eno." 
1Corinthians11:17 Mu kino kye nja okubeegeresa nhenda okubakobera nti timukola bukalamu mu kwesoloza kwaimwe, kuba ebivaamu ti biba bikalamu aye bibi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Okusookera irala, mpulira mbu bwe mwesoloza ng'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, mwekutulakutulamu obukunsu, era zeena kino ndi oti nkikakasa." 
1Corinthians11:19 Aye era okwekutulakutulamu kuli n'okubaagho, memale abatuufu mu imwe bamanhike." 
1Corinthians11:20 Bwe mwesoloza, bye mulya ti n'ekyeigulo kya Musengwa." 
1Corinthians11:21 Kuba bwe muba nga mulya buli muntu atoolera bwa kulya mere ye nga tateeze bandi, abandi baasigala ndhala, ate nga abandi batamiire." 
1Corinthians11:22 Ki? Muzira maka gaimwe mwe musobola kuliira na kunhwera? Oba munhooma bunhoome Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda, na kuswaza abo abazira ke bali nako? Munsuubira kubakoba ki ku nsonga eno? Munsuubira kubasiima? Bbe, tiidha kubasiima." 
1Corinthians11:23 Okwegeresebwa kwe nafuna okuva ye Musengwa zeena kwe nabagha. Obwire Musengwa Yesu bwe baamugheerayo, yagema omugaati," 
1Corinthians11:24 era bwe yamala okusiima Katonda, yaagumegulamu era yaakoba ati: “Guno n'omubiri gwange oguligho ku lwaimwe. Mukolenga kino olw'okundidhukiranga.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Mu nsambo n'endala, bwe baamala okulya ekyeigulo yaagema ekikopo yakoba ati: “Ekikopo kino n'endagaano empyaka ekakasibwa n'omusaayi gwange. Buli lwe munaakinhwangaku, mukikolenga olw'okundidhukira.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Kino kitegeeza kiti buli lwe mulya ku mugaati guno, era ni munhwa ku kikopo kino, munaabanga muli kumanhisa okufa kwa Musengwa okutuusa lw'aliira." 
1Corinthians11:27 Kale buli alya omugaati oba anhwa ku kikopo mu nsambo etagheesa Musengwa kitiisa, aiza omusango ku mubiri n'omusaayi gwa Musengwa." 
1Corinthians11:28 Agho ni, buli muntu ateekwa kwebona oba nga agwaine, memale yaalya ku mugaati, era yaanhwa ku kikopo" 
1Corinthians11:29 kuba buli alya ku mugaati, era n'anhwa ku kikopo nga tategeire makulu ga mubiri gwa Musengwa, yeereetera mwene omusango okumusinga." 
1Corinthians11:30 Eno n'ensonga lwaki bangi ku imwe muli balwaire, era banafu, era n'abandi baafa." 
1Corinthians11:31 Aye ife beene nkuli tusooka twebona oba nga tugwaine, Katonda tiyanditusaliire musango." 
1Corinthians11:32 Aye Musengwa bw'atusalira omusango n'atukangaivula, atwegeresa tulobe kusalirwa musango kutusinga aghalala n'ensi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Kale aboluganda, bwe mwesolozanga okuliira aghalala, mulindengaku banaimwe." 
1Corinthians11:34 Bwe ghabangagho endhala y'eruma, asookenga kulya ka ewuwe memale olwo okwesoloza kwaimwe kulobe kubaviirangamu Katonda kubasalira musango. Ebindi ndibibakobera nga ndidhie." 
1Corinthians12:1 Aboluganda, nhenda mumanhe bukalamu ebigema ku birabo Mwoyo Mutukuvu by'agha." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mwidhi nga bwe mwali nga mukaali kufuuka ba Kurisito, mwabuzibwabuzibwanga, mwajanga okusinza ebintu ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ebitoogera." 
1Corinthians12:3 Kale nhenda mukimanhe nga ghazira muntu ayogera ng'ali ni Mwoyo wa Katonda, n'akoba ati: “Yesu akolimirwe!” Era ghazira asobola kukoba ati: “Yesu ni Musengwa,” okutoolaku ng'ali ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
1Corinthians12:4 Ghaligho ebika kamaala eby'ebitone, aye Mwoyo ali mulala abigaba." 
1Corinthians12:5 Era ghaligho ensambo edh'okugheereza kamaala, aye Musengwa agheerezebwa ali mulala." 
1Corinthians12:6 Ghaligho ensambo kamaala edh'okukoleramu emirimo, aye era Katonda n'asobozesa buli muntu okugikola." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mwoyo abonekera mu buli muntu olw'obukalamu bwa boonaboona. 
1Corinthians12:8 Mwoyo agha owundi okwogera ebiidhwire amagezi, ate owundi yaamugha okwogera ebiidhwire okumanha." 
1Corinthians12:9 Mwoyo n'omulala agha owundi okwikiriza, ate owundi n'amugha amaani ag'okuwonia." 
1Corinthians12:10 Owundi Mwoyo amugha okukolanga ebyewuunhio, owundi obulanzi, ate owundi okwawulanga ebirabo ebya Mwoyo Mutukuvu n'ebitali bya Mwoyo Mutukuvu. Owundi amugha okwogeranga mu nnimi, ate owundi yaamugha okuvuunulanga enimi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Aye akola bino byonabyona, ni Mwoyo omulala ati era n'agha buli muntu ekikye nga Mwoyo mwene bw'aba ng'ayenze." 
1Corinthians12:12 Kurisito ali ng'oti n'omubiri gw'omuntu oguba n'ebitundu kamaala. Aye waire nga guli n'ebitundu kamaala, gusigala nga guli mulala." 
1Corinthians12:13 Mu nsambo n'endala twenatwena, ka tube Bayudaaya, oba bamaghanga gandi, oba bairu, oba abatali bairu, Mwoyo yatubatiza mu mubiri mulala, era twenatwena twagheebwa Mwoyo mulala oyo." 
1Corinthians12:14 Kuba omubiri tiguba kitundu kirala, aye guba ebitundu kamaala." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ekigere bwe kikoba kiti, “Olw'okuba tiri mukono, n'olw'ekyo tiri kitundu kya mubiri”, ekyo tikikitoolaku kusigala nga kikaali kitundu kya mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:16 Era ni kutu bw'akoba ati, “Olw'okuba tiri liiso n'olw'ekyo tiri kitundu kya mubiri,” ekyo tikimutoolaku kusigala ng'akaali kitundu kya mubiri." 
1Corinthians12:17 Nguli omubiri gwonagwona gwali liiso, gwandiwuliire gutya? Era nguli gwonagwona gwali kutu, gwandiwunhiiza gutya?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Aye nga bwekiri, Katonda yata mu mubiri ebitundu eby'endhawulo nga bwe yayenda." 
1Corinthians12:19 Omubiri tigwandibairegho nguli ebitundu byonabyona byali kitundu kirala. 
1Corinthians12:20 Aye nga bwekiri, ebitundu biri kamaala aye omubiri guli mulala." 
1Corinthians12:21 Kale, eriiso tirisobola kukoba mukono liti, “Tikwetaaga”, waire omutwe okukoba ebigere guti, “Imwe tibeetaaga.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Aye ate ebitundu eby'omubiri ebiboneka oti binafu n'ebyetaagibwa einho," 
1Corinthians12:23 era ebitundu ebyo eby'omubiri bye tutwala obutaba bya kitiisa inho, bye tusinga kutaamu kitiisa. Ebyo ebitagwaine kwolekebwa bye tusinga okwegendereza einho, mu nsambo ye tuteegenderezaamu" 
1Corinthians12:24 ebyo ebirungi. Atyo Katonda bwe yakola omubiri, yaagha ekitiisa ekinene bitundu ebisinga kunhoomebwa." 
1Corinthians12:25 Memale olwo omubiri gulobe kwekutulakutulamu, aye ghabeegho okulumirwagana mu bitundu byagwo." 
1Corinthians12:26 Bwe ghabaagho ekitundu eky'omubiri ekirumizibwa, ebitundu ebindi birumizibwa ghalala nakyo. Era bweghabaagho ekitundu ekigheebwa ekitiisa, ebitundu ebindi bisagambira ghalala nakyo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Imwe mwenamwena muli mubiri gwa Kurisito, era buli muntu kitundu kyagwo" 
1Corinthians12:28 era mu Kikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, Katonda yategeka emirimo ng'asookera ku batume, yaizaaku abalanzi, abokusatu n'abeegeresa olwo yaizaaku abakola ebyewuunhio, yaizaaku abawonia, ababeezi, abafuzi, n'aboogera mu nnimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Tikiri nti boonaboona batume, oba balanzi, waire boonaboona okuba abeegeresa. Era ti boonaboona abakola ebyewuunhio." 
1Corinthians12:30 Ti boonaboona abali n'ekirabo eky'okuwonia, oba eky'okwogera mu nnimi, oba eky'okudhivuunula." 
1Corinthians12:31 Kale mufubenga okufuna ebirabo ebisinga obukulu, era nja kubooleka engira esingira irala bukalamu." 
1Corinthians13:1 Ni bwe ndhogera enimi edh'abantu n'edha bamalaika, aye nga tigonza bantu banange, mba ng'oti n'endege edhiwoloma, oba endongo edhiwaala." 
1Corinthians13:2 Era ni bwe mba n'amaani ag'obulanzi, ni ntegeera ebyama bya Katonda byonabyona, era ni mmanha ebintu byonabyona, era ni bwe mba n'okwikiriza okusobola okusimulagho ensozi, aye ni mba nga tigonza bantu banange, tiba na muganhulo." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ni bwe mpaayo ebyange byonabyona okuliisa abanaku, era ni bwe mpaayo omubiri gwange okwokebwa ghazira kye nganhulwa, bwe mba nga tigonza bantu banange." 
1Corinthians13:4 Omuntu agonza baine aba n'okuguminkiriza, n'ekisa, taba na nsaalwa, tiyeebona yenka era tiyeesaaka mwene," 
1Corinthians13:5 tiyeebisa bubi, taba wa nkikidi, tasungughala mangu era tiyeegemerera." 
1Corinthians13:6 Agonza baine tasangaalira kibi, aye asangaalira mazima." 
1Corinthians13:7 Agonza baine agumira ebintu byonabyona, tairirira mu kusuubira, era aguminkiriza ebintu byonabyona." 
1Corinthians13:8 Eby'obulanzi birikoma, okwogera mu nnimi kulikoma, n'okumanha kulikoma, aye okugonza tikuliwaagho." 
1Corinthians13:9 Kuba okumanha kwaife n'obulanzi bwaife bwakitundu. 
1Corinthians13:10 Era ekituukiriire bwe kiriidha, eby'ekitundu birikoma." 
1Corinthians13:11 Bwe nali nga ndi muto nayogeranga ng'omuto, era naalowoozanga ng'omuto, aye bwe nakula naaleka eby'ekito." 
1Corinthians13:12 Mperaano tubonera mu mbonerwamu, twaloba kubona bukalamu. Aye ku lule tulibonagana maiso ku maiso. Mperaano ndidhiku kitundu butundu, aye ku lule ndimanhira irala mu bwidhuvu, era oti ni Katonda bw'andidhi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Mperaano ghaligho ebintu bisatu: okwikiriza, okusuubira n'okugonza aye ekisinga bino obukulu, kugonza." 
1Corinthians14:1 Munuyirirenga okugonza banaimwe, era mufubenga okufuna ebirabo Mwoyo by'agha, era nga ekisinga bukulu n'eky'obulanzi." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ayogera mu nnimi tayogera na bantu aye ayogera na Katonda, kuba by'ayogera ghazira abiteegera, aye ayogera ebyama bya Katonda n'amaani ga Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians14:3 Aye oyo ayogera eby'obulanzi ayogera na bantu, abakobera ebibazimba, abagumya era abaizaamu amaani." 
1Corinthians14:4 Oyo ayogera mu nnimi yeezimba yenka, aye oyo ayogera eby'obulanzi azimba Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kyonakyona." 
1Corinthians14:5 Nandyenze mwenamwena mwogere mu nnimi, aye okusingira irala nandyenze mwogere eby'obulanzi. Kuba oyo ayogera eby'obulanzi asinga oyo ayogera mu nnimi, okutoolaku nga ghaligho aghanga okuvuunula, memale Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kyaganhulwa." 
1Corinthians14:6 Kale aboluganda bwe ndidha ye muli nga ndhogera mu nnimi muganhulwamu ki? Ghazira naire, okutoolaku nga mbakoberayooku Katonda by'andholeike, oba okumanha, oba obulanzi oba okugalaga." 
1Corinthians14:7 Ni bwe biba ebivuga ebizira bulamu, ka tukobe ng'endere oba entongooli, bwe bitavuga bukalamu naani aghanga okumanha ekifuuyiibwa oba ekikubiibwa?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Era oyo afuuwa endeka bw'atafuuwa bukalamu, naani aghanga okwetegekera olutalo?" 
1Corinthians14:9 N'ekirala n'imwe mwena. Bwe mwogera mu nnimi ebitategeerekeka, omuntu owundi yeenayeena alimanha atya ekikobwa? Kuba muba muli kwogerera bwereere." 
1Corinthians14:10 Ghaligho enimi kamaala mu nsi, aye ghazira lulimi luzira makulu." 
1Corinthians14:11 Aye bwe mba tiidhi lulimi muntu lw'ayogera, mba mugwira y'ali, era yeena aba mugwira ye ndi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Mwena nga bwe mwegomba okufuna ebirabo ebya Mwoyo, mufubenga inho okukozesa ebyo ebizimba Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
1Corinthians14:13 Agho ni, oyo ayogera mu nnimi, asabenga Katonda amughenga n'ekirabo eky'okudhivuunula," 
1Corinthians14:14 kuba bwe nsaba mu nnimi edhitategeerekeka omwoyo gwange guba gusabye aye okumanha kwange kuba kuzirayo. 
1Corinthians14:15 Olwo ndi na kukola ki? Ndidha kusabanga n'omwoyo gwange, era nsabenga n'okumanha kwange kwona. Ndidha kwembanga n'omwoyo gwange, era nhembenga n'okumanha kwange kwona." 
1Corinthians14:16 Kuba bw'osiima Katonda mu mwoyo, omuntu atategeera ky'okoba aghanga atya okwiramu ati, “Amiina” ng'omaze okusaba?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Ni bw'oba ng'osiimye bukalamu otya, omuntu oyo taganhulwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Nsiima Katonda kuba mwenamwena mbasinga okwogera mu nnimi. 
1Corinthians14:19 Aye nga ndi mu Kikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, mmala googera bibono bitaanu ebitegeerekeka naayegeresa abandi, okusinga okwogera ebibono olukumi (1,000) mu nnimi edhitategeerekeka." 
1Corinthians14:20 Aboluganda, mutabanga na bidhuubo ng'oti bya baana bato. Bwe kuba mu bya kukola bubi, mube ng'oti baana bato abaziraku musango. Aye mu kudhuuba mube bakulu." 
1Corinthians14:21 Mu mateeka kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Ndyogera n'abantu bange, nga nkozesa abantu aboogera enimi edhindi, era nga nkozesa eminwa egy'abagwira, aye era abantu bange tibalimpulira. Atyo Musengwa bw'akoba.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Agho ni okwogera mu nnimi kamanhiso ka bataikiriza aye ti ka baikiriza, ate obulanzi kamanhiso ka baikiriza aye ti ka bataikiriza." 
1Corinthians14:23 Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kyonakyona bwe kyesoloza, boonaboona ni batoolera okwogera mu nnimi, memale ni ghaidhagho ab'endha oba abataikiriza, tibabeeta bwa balalu?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Aye boonaboona bwe baba nga bali kulanga, memale ataikiriza oba ow'endha naingira, by'awulira byonabyona bimulumiriza olw'ebibi bye, era byamusalira omusango." 
1Corinthians14:25 Ebyo by'adhuuba mu mwoyo gwe eby'engiso byerulwa, yaakuba amakiryaivu, yaasinza Katonda ng'akoba ati: “Bwenebwene Katonda ali mu imwe.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Kye nkoba ni kino aboluganda: Bwe mwesoloza okusinza, owundi aba n'olwembo olusaaka Katonda, ole yaaba ni ky'ayegeresa. Ole yaaba ni Katonda ky'amwoleike, ole yaaba n'okwogera mu nnimi, ate ole owundi yaaba n'okuvuunula ebyogerwa. Buli ekikolebwa kibe nga kigasa Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
1Corinthians14:27 Bwe ghabaagho aboogera mu nnimi, babenga babiri oba obutaswika basatu. Boogerenga mulala mulala, era ghabengagho avuunula." 
1Corinthians14:28 Aye bweghaba nga ghazira aghanga kuvuunula, oyo ayogera mu nnimi, atayogeranga mu kusinza, koodhi ayogerenga bibye yenka, na kwogera na Katonda." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ghabengagho babiri oba basatu abali n'obulanzi babwogerenga, abandi nga bwe bagerangerania ebyo ebyogeirwa." 
1Corinthians14:30 Aye bweghabaagho atyaime agho, Katonda n'amwoleka ekintu, oyo abaire ali kwogera asookenga alekere." 
1Corinthians14:31 Kuba mwenamwena musobola okulanga omulala omulala, memale boonaboona baasobola okwega era bairamu amaani." 
1Corinthians14:32 Abo abali n'ekirabo eky'obulanzi bateekwa okukifuga," 
1Corinthians14:33 kuba Katonda tayenda tube mu kudoobaana, aye ayenda tube miraala, nga bwekiri mu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona." 
1Corinthians14:34 Bwe mwesolozanga mu Kikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, abakazi basirikenga busirike. Kuba tibaikirizibwa kwogera, era ng'Amateeka bwe gakoba babenga bawulize." 
1Corinthians14:35 Bwe ghabangagho ekintu kyonakyona kye benda okumanha, babuuzenga baibaibwe eka kuba kiswaza omukazi okwogera mu Kikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito nga beesoloiza." 
1Corinthians14:36 Ki! Mudhuuba muti ekibono kya Katonda kyava mu imwe, oba muti kyatuuka ku imwe mwenka?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Omuntu yeenayeena bwe yeetwala okuba omulanzi, era n'okuba ng'ali n'ekirabo Mwoyo ky'agha, amanhe nga bye ndi kubaghandiikira, kiragiro kya Musengwa." 
1Corinthians14:38 Atakiisaaku mwoyo yeena balobenga kumwisaaku mwoyo. 
1Corinthians14:39 Kale aboluganda mwemalirenga ku kya kulanga, aye mutaloberanga bantu kwogera mu nnimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Byonabyona bikolebwenga bukalamu era nga bisengeke. 
1Corinthians15:1 Aboluganda, nhenda okubaidhusa Amawulire Amalungi ge nabakobera ni mugaikiriza, era okwikiriza kwaimwe kwe kwemereire." 
1Corinthians15:2 Gano n'ag'okubalokola bwe mugajiiraku, okutoolaku ng'okwikiriza kwaimwe tikwali kwa mazima." 
1Corinthians15:3 Nabagha ekibono ekisinga bukulu, zeena kye nagheebwa, ekikoba kiti Kurisito yafa olw'ebibi byaife nga bwekiri mu Byaghandiikibwa." 
1Corinthians15:4 Era yaaziikibwa, ku lunaku olwokusatu yaazuukira, era nga bwekiri mu byaghandiikibwa." 
1Corinthians15:5 Era yaabonekera Kefasi, kabiri yaabonekera Abatume eikumi n'ababiri." 
1Corinthians15:6 Olwo yaabonekera aboluganda abasinga mu bikumi ebitaanu boonaboona nga bali ghalala. Bangi ku bantu abo bakaaligho waire ng'abandi baafa. 
1Corinthians15:7 Kabiri yaabonekera Yakobo, era yaabonekera n'Abatume boonaboona." 
1Corinthians15:8 Bwe yamala okubonekera boonaboona, olwo yaabonekera ninze, nga ndi oti n'omwana azaalibwa ng'akaabulaku;" 
1Corinthians15:9 kuba mu Batume boonaboona ninze asembayo atagwaine na kwetebwa mutume, olw'okukiriga Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda." 
1Corinthians15:10 Aye olw'ekisa kya Katonda, kye nva ni mba nga bwendi buti. Era ekisa ekyo tikyafa busa. Nakola inho okusinga abatume abandi, waire nga mu butuufu ti ninze eyali akola, aye ekisa kya Katonda nga n'ekikolera mu nze." 
1Corinthians15:11 Kale oba yali nze oba baali abo, ekyo kye twabakobera era mwena kye mwaikiriza." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kale oba nga obukwenda bwe tubakobera n'obwo obugema ku Kurisito eyazuukira mu bafu, lwaki abandi ku imwe mukoba muti ezira kuzuukira?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Bw'eba ng'ezira kuzuukira kwa bafu, ekyo kiba kitegeeza nga ni Kurisito tiyazuukira." 
1Corinthians15:14 Era oba nga Kurisito tiyazuukira, bye tubakobera muzira, era ni bye mwikiriza muzira." 
1Corinthians15:15 Era ni Katonda tuba tumusibaku by'ataakola, kuba twakakasa nga Katonda yazuukiza Kurisito, y'ataazuukiza bwe kiba ekituufu ng'abafu tibazuukira." 
1Corinthians15:16 Kuba oba nga abafu tibazuukira ekikoba Kurisito tiyazuukira. 
1Corinthians15:17 Oba nga Kurisito tiyazuukira, bye mwikiriza muzira era mukaali mu bibi byaimwe." 
1Corinthians15:18 Era n'abo abaafa nga baikiriza mu Kurisito baazikirira. 
1Corinthians15:19 Oba nga eisuubi lye tuli nalyo mu Kurisito lya mu bulamu buno bwonka, tugwaine okusaasirwa okusinga abantu abandi boonaboona mu nsi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Aye mu butuufu bwene Kurisito yazuukira mu bafu okukakasa ng'abafu balizuukira 
1Corinthians15:21 kuba ng'okufa bwe kwaleetebwa omuntu, era n'okuzuukira kwaleetebwa muntu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Era ng'abantu boonaboona bwe bafa mu Adamu, mu nsambo n'endala boonaboona balizuukira mu Kurisito." 
1Corinthians15:23 Aye nga buli muntu alizuukira ng'olugobo lwe bwe luliba. Okusooka, Kurisito memale lw'aliira, ababe boonaboona bairaku." 
1Corinthians15:24 Olwo enkomerero yaatuuka. Kurisito ng'amaze okughangula obufuzi bwonabwona, n'obukumu bwonabwona, era n'amaani goonagoona, aligemya Katonda Lata Obwakyabazinga." 
1Corinthians15:25 Kuba Kurisito ateekwa okufuga okutuusa lw'alityankirira abazigu be boonaboona. 
1Corinthians15:26 Omuzigu y'alisembyayo okuzikiriza, ni kufa." 
1Corinthians15:27 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Katonda yamugha okufuga ebintu byonabyona.” Aye kyeyoleka kyene ng'okukoba ati: “Ebintu byonabyona” tikitwalizaamu Katonda oyo eyagha Kurisito okufuga ebintu byonabyona. 
1Corinthians15:28 Aye ebintu byonabyona nga bimaze okuteebwa mu bufuzi bwa Kurisito, olwo mwene ng'Omwana, alifugibwa oyo Katonda eyamugha okufuga byonabyona, era olwo Katonda abe byonabyona eri boonaboona." 
1Corinthians15:29 Lwaki abantu babatizibwanga olw'abafu? Basuubira kufuna ki oba nga abafu tibazuukira? 
1Corinthians15:30 Era ni bwe tuba ife, lwaki twandyetaire mu kabi buli kaseera?" 
1Corinthians15:31 Aboluganda, olw'okuba mbeesiimiramu era nga tuli muntu mulala mu Kurisito Yesu Musengwa waife, nhenda okubakobera nti buli lunaku okufa kuuningiriire." 
1Corinthians15:32 Nganhulwamu ki ng'omuntu obuntu, bwe nwana n'ebisolo ebikambwe ghano mu Efeso? Aye oba nga abafu tibazuukira “leka tulye era tunhwe, kuba enkyo tuja kufa”, ng'abandi bwe bakoba." 
1Corinthians15:33 Batabasubaghanga: “Emikwano emibi gyonoona empisa enkalamu.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Mweireku mulekere agho okukola ebibi, kuba abandi ku imwe timwidhi Katonda. Kino nkyogeire mbagemye ensoni." 
1Corinthians15:35 Aye omuntu aghanga okubuuza ati: “Abafu bazuukira batya? Baliba na mubiri nabaki?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Musiru iwe! Mu kusiga, ensigo y'osiga emala kufa memale yaamera." 
1Corinthians15:37 Era ky'osiga eba nsigo busigo, oba ya ngaano oba ya kintu ekindi, aye ti kimera nga bwe kiriba nga kikuze." 
1Corinthians15:38 Katonda agigha omubiri nga bw'ayenda, era buli kika kya nsigo akigha omubiri gwakyo." 
1Corinthians15:39 Emibiri gy'ebintu byonabyona tigiba gya nsambo ndala; ghaligho ogw'abantu, ogundi gwa nsolo, ogundi gwa nhonhi, ate ogundi gwa byanhandha." 
1Corinthians15:40 Era ghaligho emibiri egy'omu igulu, n'emibiri egy'omu nsi. Aye ekitiisa eky'egyo egy'omu igulu kindi, n'ekitiisa eky'egyo gy'oku nsi kyona kindi." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ekitiisa eky'endhuba kindi, n'eky'omwezi kindi, era n'eky'emuunienie kindi, ate emuunienie dhaawukana mu kitiisa." 
1Corinthians15:42 N'okuzuukira kutyo bwe kuli. Omubiri bwe gufa guziikibwa, aye bwegulizuukizibwa guliba ogutafa." 
1Corinthians15:43 Mu kuziikibwa guba gunhoomebwa, aye mu kuzuukizibwa guliba gwa kitiisa. Mu kuziikibwa guba munafu, aye mu kuzuukizibwa guliba gwa maani." 
1Corinthians15:44 Mu kuziikibwa guba mubiri bubiri, aye mu kuzuukizibwa guliba mubiri gwa mwoyo. Nga bwe ghaligho omubiri obubiri, era ghaligho n'omubiri ogw'omwoyo." 
1Corinthians15:45 Kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Adamu omuntu eyasooka yatondebwa yaaba n'obulamu” aye Adamu ow'enkomerero yafuuka omwoyo ogugaba obulamu. 
1Corinthians15:46 Eky'omwoyo ti n'ekisooka, aye eky'omubiri n'ekisooka, memale olwo eky'omwoyo kyairaku." 
1Corinthians15:47 Adamu eyasooka yava mu itaka, era yakolebwa mu nkungu: Adamu owokubiri yava mu igulu." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ng'eyakolebwa mu nkungu bwe yali, n'abo abaakolebwa mu nkungu boona bwe bali. Era ng'eyava mu igulu bw'ali, n'abo ab'omu igulu boona bwe bali." 
1Corinthians15:49 Nga bwe twawumbibwa ni tufaanana Adamu eyakolebwa mu nkungu, era tutyo bwetuliwumbibwa ni tufaanana ni Adamu ole eyava mu igulu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Aboluganda, kye nkoba ni kino omubiri obubiri n'omusaayi obusaayi tibisobola kugheebwa mugabo mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, n'ekifa tikighanga kugheebwa butafa." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ka mbakobere ekyama: tituja kufa twenatwena, aye endeka ey'enkomerero bw'erivuga, twenatwena tulifuuka" 
1Corinthians15:52 mu kaseera akatonioli ng'oti kutemya na kuzibula. Endeka bw'erivuga n'abafu balizuukizibwa nga tibakairayo kufa kabiri, olwo ife twafuuka bufuuke." 
1Corinthians15:53 Kuba ekikula kino ekiwaagho kiteekwa okufuuka ekitawaagho, era ekikula kino ekifa kiteekwa okufuuka ekitafa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Ekiwaagho bwe kirifuuka ekitawaagho, n'ekifa ni kifuuka ekitafa, olwo ekyaghandiikibwa kirituukirira ekikoba kiti: “Okufa kumiriibwa, obughanguzi butuukiriire." 
1Corinthians15:55 Iwe kufa obughanguzi bwo buli gha? Iwe kufa okulumya kwo kuli gha?” 
1Corinthians15:56 Okulumya okw'okufa kuva mu kibi, n'amaani g'ekibi gava mu Mateeka." 
1Corinthians15:57 Aye Katonda yeekaza atugha obughanguzi mu Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito. 
1Corinthians15:58 Agho ni aboluganda abagonzi, mwekalangule era mube bagumu. Mukolenga buliidho omulimo gwa Musengwa waife nga mwidhi nti ghazira kye mufaabiikanira Musengwa kifa busa." 
1Corinthians16:1 Mperaano nga ndhira mu ebyo bye mwampandiikira ebigema ku kwesondamu eby'okutonera abatuukirivu, mbakoba nti mwena mukole ng'oti bwe nakoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ebiri mu Galatia." 
1Corinthians16:2 Buli lunaku olusooka mu wiiki, buli muntu ku imwe abengaku ni ky'abiika ng'ajiira ku by'afunie, mulobe kwesondanga nga ndidhie." 
1Corinthians16:3 Era bwe ndituuka, ndigha abantu abo be muliba musembye embaluwa, naabatuma okutwala ebirabo byaimwe e Yerusalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Bwe kiriboneka nga kikalamu zeena okuja, balija ninze." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ndibakyalira nga mmaze okukyala e Makedonia, kuba e Makedonia ye ndibita nga ndidha." 
1Corinthians16:6 Nsuubira okubaaku n'imwe oba katyo mu kiseera eky'ekiinhogogo kyonakyona, musobole okwanguya olugendo lwange buli ye ndija." 
1Corinthians16:7 Kuba tyenda kubabona bubone nga mbita, aye ndhuuba okumalaku n'imwe entangama egheraku, Musengwa bw'aliba ng'aganhie." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ndidha kuba mu Efeso okutuusa ku kibinuko kya Pentekote 
1Corinthians16:9 kuba nfuniire irala akaghagaanhia okukolerayo omulimo ogw'omugaso, waire nga eriyo abazigu kamaala." 
1Corinthians16:10 Timotheo nga aidhie, mumusangaaze bukalamu, kuba yeena akolera Musengwa ng'oti ninze." 
1Corinthians16:11 Ghatabangagho amunhooma, aye mumwanguyize olugendo lwe lube lukalamu aire ye ndi, kuba ndi kumusuubira okwira n'aboluganda." 
1Corinthians16:12 Aye owoluganda Apollo namukoba inho aidhe abakyalire ghalala n'aboluganda abandi, aye tiyayenda kwidha buti. Aliidha nga afunie akaghagaanhia." 
1Corinthians16:13 Mumogenga butatemya, munhwere mu kwikiriza, mube bagumu era ba maani." 
1Corinthians16:14 Byonabyona bye mukola mubikolenga n'omwoyo ogugonza. 
1Corinthians16:15 Aboluganda, mwidhi nga Sitefana n'ab'omu maka ge n'abasooka okukyuka mu Akaia, era beeghaayo okugheereza." 
1Corinthians16:16 Aboluganda, mbeeghemba mugonderenga abantu ng'oti n'abo, era mugonderenga n'oyo yeenayeena afuba okukolera aghalala nabo." 
1Corinthians16:17 Kyansangaaza inho Sitefana ni Forutunato ni Akaiko bwe baidha, kuba baaligho mu kifo kyaimwe." 
1Corinthians16:18 Bandhizaamu amaani era nga mwena bwe baabaizaamu. Abantu oti n'abo mubaisengaku inho omwoyo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito mu Asia bibalamwisa. Akwila ni Purisikilla aghalala n'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekyesololeza mu ndhu yaibwe babalamwisa inho mu Musengwa. 
1Corinthians16:20 Aboluganda boonaboona babalamwisa. Mulamusaganie nga munhwegeragana. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ninze Paulo aghandiise okulamusa kuno n'omukono gwange gwene. 
1Corinthians16:22 Oyo yeenayeena atagonza Musengwa alaamibwe. Musengwa idha! 
1Corinthians16:23 Enkabi dha Musengwa Yesu dhibe n'imwe," 
1Corinthians16:24 Okugonza kwange kube n'imwe mwenamwena mu Kurisito Yesu. Amiina. 
2Corinthians1:1 Ninze Paulo eyafuuka omutume wa Kurisito Yesu olw'okwenda kwa Katonda, n'owoluganda Timotheo. Tughandiikira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda mu Korintho, n'abatuukirivu boonaboona abali mu Akaia yoonayoona." 
2Corinthians1:2 Enkabi n'emiraala ebya Katonda Lata waife, ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito bibe n'imwe." 
2Corinthians1:3 Katonda era Ise wa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito agheebwe ekitiisa, oyo Lata ow'okusaasira okungi era atubeera buliidho." 
2Corinthians1:4 Mu kudaagadaaga kwaife okwa buli nsambo atugumya, memale twena tughange okugumya abali mu kudaagadaaga okwa buli nsambo, nga tubagumya nga ife beene Katonda bw'atugumya." 
2Corinthians1:5 Kuba, nga bwetugabana ku kudaagadaaga einho okwa Kurisito, tutyo bwetugabana ni mu kugumizibwa einho Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:6 Bwe tudaazibwadaazibwa, imwe mufuna okugumizibwa n'okulokolebwa, ate bwe tugumizibwa era mwafuna amaani ag'okuguminkiriza, n'okubita mu kudaagadaaga nga ife kwe tubitamu." 
2Corinthians1:7 Tubeesiga inho buliidho, kuba twidhi tuti nga bwe mugabana ku kudaagadaaga kwaife, mugabana ni ku kugumizibwa kwaife." 
2Corinthians1:8 Aboluganda, twenda mumanhe okudaagadaaga okwatutuukaku mu Asia. Twanhigirizibwa ebitaloodheka, era nga titulowooza nga tusobola okuba abalamu." 
2Corinthians1:9 Bwene twawulira mule nga tusaliirwa gwa kufa. Aye kino kyatutuukaku tulobe kwesiga maani gaife, aye twesige Katonda yenka azuukiza abafu." 
2Corinthians1:10 Oyo eyatuwonia mu kabi akanene akaaga agho ak'okufa era n'alituwonia, era oyo ye tusuubira okutuwonia kabiri." 
2Corinthians1:11 Mwena mutubeere nga mutusabira, ng'abantu kamaala bwebatusabira Katonda n'atugha enkabi, era abantu kamaala ni batwebalizaaku Katonda olw'enkabi dhe tufuna olw'okusaba kwaibwe." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ensonga etwesiimisa n'eno nti munda mule twekakasa nga mu nsi muno, n'okusingira irala mu imwe, twebisiiza bukalamu mu mazima ni mu butuukirivu, ti lwa magezi ga bantu aye lwa kisa kya Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:13 Tubaghandiikira ebyo byonka bye musobola okusoma era n'okutegeera. Ka nsuubire nti mulibitegeera mu bwidhuvu 
2Corinthians1:14 nga bwe mwabitegeeraku akatono, mughange okwesiima olwaife, oti niife bwe tulyesiima olwaimwe ku lunaku lwa Musengwa waife Yesu."
