2Corinthians1:15 Olw'okuba kino nali nkikakasa, nayenda nsooke okukyalira imwe musobole okufuna enkabi edh'emikuzi ebiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 Nayenda mbakyalire nga nja e Makedonia, ate kabiri mbakyalire nga nva e Makedonia, mungemereku ku by'olugendo lwange olw'e Buyudaaya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Mu ntegeka yange nayenda okukola ntyo. Mudhuuba muti nali n'emyoyo ebiri? Muti entegeka dhange ndhikola oti n'omuntu ow'ensi akoba ati “Yii” ni “Busa” mu kaseera n'akalala ako? 
2Corinthians1:18 Nga Katonda bw'ali, ow'amazima era atakyukakyuka, twena titubakobangaku tuti “Yii” ate kabiri ni tubakoba tuti “Busa”." 
2Corinthians1:19 Kuba Yesu Kurisito Omwana wa Katonda, Siluvano, Timotheo, ninze ye twabakobera, tiyali “Yii” ni “Busa”, aye oyo buliidho ni “Yii.” wa Katonda." 
2Corinthians1:20 Kuba oyo ni “yii” wa kiisi Katonda kye yasuubiza. Eyo n'ensonga lwaki kubwa Kurisito Yesu tukoba tuti “Amiina” nga tugha Katonda ekitiisa. 
2Corinthians1:21 Katonda n'atukakasa ife n'imwe nga mu Kurisito mwe tufunira obulamu, era mwene oyo n'eyatulobolamu." 
2Corinthians1:22 Yatutaaku akamanhiso ke ng'ababe, era yatugha Mwoyo Mutukuvu mu myoyo gyaife ng'omusingo olw'ebyo by'atuterekera." 
2Corinthians1:23 Katonda aidhi ebiri mu mwoyo gwange n'omudhulizi wange, nti olw'obutenda kubataghaania n'ekyandobera okwidha e Korintho." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ti twenda kubalagira bulagire bye muteekwa kwikiriza kuba twidhi nga muli bagumu mu kwikiriza, aye twenda tukolere ghalala memale musangaale." 
2Corinthians2:1 Olw'obutenda kubalumya nasalagho obutabakyalira kabiri. 
2Corinthians2:2 Kuba bwe mbalumya naani owundi alinsangaaza, okutoolaku imwe beene be mba nga numiiza?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Eyo n'ensonga lwaki nabaghandiikira embaluwa eyo. Tyayenda kwidha kulumizibwa abo abandinsangaaziiza. Kuba ndidhi nga bwe nsangaala mwenamwena musangaala. 
2Corinthians2:4 Nabaghandiikira nga ndi n'enaku nnene inho ku mwoyo, era nga ndi bwa mu maziga. Ekigendererwa kyange tikyali kubalumya, aye kubooleka nga bwe mbagonza einho." 
2Corinthians2:5 Oba nga ghaligho omuntu eyaleetagho okulumwa, tiyakuleetera nze, aye mu nsambo eyindi yakuleetera imwe mwenamwena. Kino nkikobye olw'obutenda kumumalamu." 
2Corinthians2:6 Ng'omuntu oyo bwe yabonerezebwa abantu kamaala batyo, kimala." 
2Corinthians2:7 Kale mperaano mugwaine mumusonighe era mumugumye, alobe kunakughala bujiiririire, na kuwaamu maani." 
2Corinthians2:8 Mbeeghembye mumwoleke nga bwe mumugonza einho. 
2Corinthians2:9 Nabaghandiikira embaluwa eyo lwa kubaleba, era na lwa kumanha oba nga muli bawulize mu buli kye mbalagira." 
2Corinthians2:10 Buli ye musonigha zeena mmusonigha. Buli kye nsonigha, oba nga bwene ghaligho kyonakyona kye nasonigha, nakisonigha ku lwaimwe mu maiso ga Kurisito" 
2Corinthians2:11 Olwo Sitaani alobe kutuzingiza, kuba twidhi entegeka ye yoonayoona." 
2Corinthians2:12 Bwe natuuka mu Turoa okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito, nayagaana nga Musengwa ampaire omukisa ogw'okumukolerayo omulimo." 
2Corinthians2:13 Aye nali mweraliikirivu inho, kuba tyayagaanayo waluganda Tito. Kale naasiibula mangu ab'eyo naaja e Makedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Aye Katonda yeekaza kuba buliidho ng'abita mu Kurisito atutuusa ku kugabana ku bughanguzi bwa Kurisito oyo, era yaatukozesa mu kubunisa amawulire ga Kurisito woonawoona, ng'oti n'akawoowo bwe kabuna woonawoona." 
2Corinthians2:15 Kuba ife tuli ng'oti n'obubbaani Kurisito bw'aniosa, Katonda awulire akawoowo akabuna mu b'okulokolebwa n'ab'okuzikirira." 
2Corinthians2:16 Eri abo ab'okuzikirira tuli kivundu ekiita, aye eri abo ab'okulokolebwa tuli kawoowo akaleeta obulamu. Kale naani asobola omulimo oti ni guno?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Tituli oti n'abantu abandi kamaala abakozesa ekibono kya Katonda okufunamu kye banaalya, aye tuli bantu Katonda be yatuma, era twogera mazima mu maiso ge, ng'abagheereza mu Kurisito." 
2Corinthians3:1 Tuboneka ng'abatooleire okwesuuta kabiri? Oba mukoba muti twena kitwetaagisa okuba n'embaluwa edhiva ye muli okutwandhula aghandi ng'oti n'abandi bwe kibeetaagisa? 
2Corinthians3:2 Imwe beene muli oti n'embaluwa etwandhulayo eyaghandiikibwa ku myoyo gyaife, emanhibwe era esomebwe abantu boonaboona." 
2Corinthians3:3 Kyeyoleka nga muli oti mbaluwa eva ye Kurisito, ife ye twaleeta, etaaghandiikibwa na bwino aye eyaghandiikibwa ni Mwoyo wa Katonda omulamu. Era etaaghandiikibwa ku bipande bya mabaale, aye eyaghandiikibwa ku bipande eby'emyoyo gy'abantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Twogera tuti kuba tuli n'obwesige mu Katonda, Kurisito bw'atugha." 
2Corinthians3:5 Ife ku bwaife tuzira bughanzi butusobozesa kukola kintu kyonakyona, obughanzi bwaife buva wa Katonda." 
2Corinthians3:6 Oyo n'eyatusobozesa okuba abagheereza ab'endagaano empyaka, etali ya mateeka maghandiike aye ey'amateeka aga Mwoyo. Amateeka amaghandiike galeeta kufa, aye Mwoyo aleeta bulamu." 
2Corinthians3:7 Amateeka amaghandiike gaabaadhibwa mu nukuta ku bipande eby'amabaale, era bwe gaali gagheebwa ghaaligho okumesunkana kunene. Amaiso ga Musa gaaliku okumesunkana okwo, era waire kwali nga kuli kukendeera, Abaisiraeli baali nga tibasobola kumwekalirisa mu maiso. Kale oba nga Amateeka agaleeta okufa gaagheebwa mu kumesunkana okwaga agho," 
2Corinthians3:8 okugheebwa kwa Mwoyo tikulibaaku kumesunkana kusinga okwo? 
2Corinthians3:9 Oba nga okugha ekyo ekireetera abantu okusalirwa omusango okubasinga, kwaliku okumesunkana, memale okugha ekyo ekireetera abantu obutuukirivu tikulisingagho mu kumesunkana?" 
2Corinthians3:10 Mu butuufu ekyo ekyaliku okumesunkana, mperaano tikikaaliku kumesunkana naire, olw'okumesunkana kule okubitamu einho." 
2Corinthians3:11 Kuba oba nga ekyawaagho kyaliku okumesunkana, memale ekyo ekitawaagho tikiteekwa kubaaku kumesunkana okusinga agho?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Nga bwe tuli n'obwesige oti n'obwo, tuli bagumu inho." 
2Corinthians3:13 Tituli oti ni Musa eyali n'okweghemberera ekitambaala mu maiso, Abaisiraeli balobe kubona okumesunkana okusembayo okw'amaiso ge nga kuwaagho." 
2Corinthians3:14 Aye emyoyo gyaibwe gyakalanguka, kuba n'okutuukiza irala buti, bwe basoma endagaano enkaire, ekitambaala kyene ekyo kikaabaghembereire. Kurisito yenka n'asobola okutoolagho ekitambaala ekyo." 
2Corinthians3:15 Bwene ni ye buli eno buli lwe basoma ebyaghandiikibwa bya Musa, emyoyo gyaibwe giba mighembe gyaku ekitambaala." 
2Corinthians3:16 Aye omuntu bw'agalukira ye Musengwa ekitambaala kitoolebwagho. 
2Corinthians3:17 Musengwa ni Mwoyo, era Mwoyo wa Musengwa gh'aba, ghaba eidembe." 
2Corinthians3:18 Era ife twenatwena bwe tutoolebwaku ekitughembye ku maiso, tubonerwamu okumesunkana kwa Musengwa ng'oti mbonerwamu. Okumesunkana okuva ye Musengwa era nga ni Mwoyo, kutufuula twafaanana nga mwene mu kumesunkana okuja nga kweyongera." 
2Corinthians4:1 Katonda mu kusaasira kwe yatugha omulimo guno okugukola, kale tutawaamu maani." 
2Corinthians4:2 Ebikolwa ebikolebwa mu ngiso era ebiswaza twabyevuma, tituguyaguya oba okufuulaniafuulania ekibono kya Katonda, aye twogera mazima gonka, twaleka buli muntu ow'omwoyo omukalamu okutulowoozaaku nga bw'atubona mu maiso ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians4:3 Era oba nga Amawulire Amalungi ge tukobera abantu maghembe gaaku, gaba maghembe gaaku eri abo bonka ab'okuzikirira." 
2Corinthians4:4 N'abo abataikiriza, kuba Sitaani omufuzi ow'ensi eno yabaghemba emyoyo, yaabalobera okubona obutangaavu obw'Amawulire Amalungi ag'ekitiisa kya Kurisito, oyo abonerwamu Katonda nga bw'afaanana." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ife titweyogeraku beene aye tukobera abantu tuti Yesu Kurisito ni Musengwa, era nga ife tuli bagheereza baimwe olwa Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Katonda eyakoba ati, “Ekimulika kyake mu nzikiiza!” N'eyaleeta ekimulika kye okwakira mu myoyo gyaife, okutumanhisa ekitiisa kya Katonda ekyakira ku maiso ga Kurisito." 
2Corinthians4:7 Aye ife abali oti nsugha dha itosi, niife abali n'obukombe buno, kino kisobole okwoleka ng'amaani amabitirivu ag'Amawulire Amalungi bwe gali aga Katonda se ti agaife." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tudaazibwadaazibwa mu buli nsambo aye ti tuwaamu maani, tusoberwa aye ti tuwaamu isuubi." 
2Corinthians4:9 Abantu batukiriga, aye Katonda tatwerabira. Tukubibwa ghansi, aye tituzikirizibwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Buli ghe tuja tuli mu kabi ak'okufa nga Yesu bwe yafa, olwo obulamu bwa Yesu bughange okubonekera mu mibiri gyaife." 
2Corinthians4:11 Buliidho obulamu bwaife buli mu kabi ak'okufa ku lwa Yesu, olwo obulamu bwe bubonekere mu mibiri gyaife egifa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Kale okufa kuli mu ife, aye kino kitegeeza bulamu ye muli." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Nayogera kuba naikiriza”, twena olw'okuba tuli n'okwikiriza n'okulala, twogera kuba twaikiriza." 
2Corinthians4:14 Twidhi nga Katonda eyazuukiza Musengwa Yesu, twena alituzuukiza ni Yesu, yaatutwala mu maiso ge ghalala n'imwe." 
2Corinthians4:15 Bino byonabyona birigho ku lwaimwe, olwo ekisa kya Katonda ye kinaakoma okweyongera okutuuka ku bantu, n'abamusiima ye banaakoma okweyongeraku. Olwo Katonda agheebwe ekitiisa." 
2Corinthians4:16 Kale ni tituwaamu maani. Kuba waire mu mubiri tuja nga tunafugha, mu mwoyo tuja nga twiramu amaani buli lunaku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Okudaagadaaga kuno okutonioli era okw'akaseera, kuli kututegekera ekitiisa ekinene era ekitawaagho ekisinga ebintu byonabyona." 
2Corinthians4:18 Tujiira ku bintu ebitaboneka, aye ti ebyo ebiboneka kuba ebyo ebiboneka bya kaseera buseera, aye ebyo ebitaboneka tibiwaagho." 
2Corinthians5:1 Kuba twidhi ng'entindi yaife eno ey'oku nsi ye tulimu, omubiri guno gwe tulimu, bw'erisansulwa, Katonda alitugha endhu mu igulu etawaagho etaazimbwa bantu." 
2Corinthians5:2 Mperaano tusinda era twegomba okuvaazibwa endhu eyo ey'omu igulu. 
2Corinthians5:3 Bwe tuligivaala tulobe kwagaanibwa nga tuli kidu. 
2Corinthians5:4 Bwe tuba nga tukaali mu ntindi eno ey'oku nsi tusinda olw'okuzitooghererwa, ti lwa kuba nga twenda okwetoolaku omubiri guno, aye lwa kuba twenda okuvaazibwa omubiri ogw'omu igulu, olwo omubiri ogutafa gumire ogufa." 
2Corinthians5:5 Katonda n'eyatutegekera kino, era yaatugha Mwoyo ng'omusingo." 
2Corinthians5:6 Kale ni buliidho tuba bagumu kuba twidhi nga bwe tuba mu mubiri guno, tituba ghalala ni Musengwa." 
2Corinthians5:7 Tubaagho lwa kwikiriza se ti lwa kubona. 
2Corinthians5:8 Tuli bagumu era kasinga tulekayo okuba mu mubiri guno aye twaba ni Musengwa. 
2Corinthians5:9 Kale ni oba tuba mu mubiri guno oba tuguvaamu, kye twenda n'okumusangaaza." 
2Corinthians5:10 Kuba twenatwena tuteekwa okuboneka mu maiso ga Kurisito atusalire omusango. Buli muntu alimusasula ng'ajiira ku bikalamu, oba ku bibi bye yakola ng'ali mu mubiri guno." 
2Corinthians5:11 Nga bwe twidhi nga kituufu okutya Musengwa, abantu tugezaaku okubaghangula. Katonda atwidhi bukalamu era ndhuuba nga mu myoyo gyaimwe mwena mutwidhi bukalamu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ti tuli kwesuuta ye muli kabiri, aye tuli kubagha kye munaavangaku okwesiima ku lwaife, memale olwo mughange okwirangamu abo abeesuutiriza mu by'oku ngulu okw'omuntu aghazira kulinga ku bya mu mwoyo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Oba tuli ng'oti balalu, tuli tutyo ku bwa Katonda, aye oba ti tuli balalu, ti tuli tutyo ku lwaimwe." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ife tufugibwa kugonza kwa Kurisito, era twidhi nga yafiirira boonaboona, ekikoba nti boonaboona bagabana ku kufa kwe." 
2Corinthians5:15 Yafiirira boonaboona, olwo abalamu babe nga tibakaali balamu ku lwaibwe, aye babenga balamu ku lulwe oyo eyabafiirira era n'azuukizibwa." 
2Corinthians5:16 Mperaano titukaabonera muntu yeenayeena mu magezi ga buntu. Waire nga ghaaligho ghe twaboneranga Kurisito mu magezi ag'obuntu, mperaano titukaamubona tutyo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Agho ni buli muntu aba mu Kurisito aba kitonde kiyaaka, ekikaire kivaagho ekiyaaka kyaidha." 
2Corinthians5:18 Akola bino byonabyona ni Katonda eyabita mu Kurisito n'atuleetera okwisania naye, era n'atugha omulimo ogw'okuleetera abantu abandi boona okwisania naye." 
2Corinthians5:19 Kye tukoba ni kino nti Katonda yaleetera abantu boonaboona okwisania naye ng'abita mu Kurisito, nga tababalira bibi bye baakola naire. Era twena yatugemya obukwenda obubaleetera okwisania naye." 
2Corinthians5:20 Kale tuli bakwenda ba Kurisito, Katonda b'abitamu okubeeta. Tubeeghembye mu liina lya Kurisito muganhe Katonda abaghe okwisania naye." 
2Corinthians5:21 Kurisito tiyali na kibi, aye ku lwaife Katonda yamutaaku ebibi byaife tusobole okubita mu oyo okugabana ku butuufu bwa Katonda." 
2Corinthians6:1 Nga tukolera ghalala ni Katonda, tubeeghembye ekisa Katonda kye yabagemerwa mutakireka kufa busa." 
2Corinthians6:2 Katonda akoba ati: “Nakuwulira mu kiseera kyange eky'okukugemerwa ekisa, era naakubeera ku lunaku lwange olw'okukulokola.” Bona eno! Kino n'ekiseera eky'okugemerwaku ekisa, olwaleero n'olunaku olw'okulokolebwa." 
2Corinthians6:3 Titwenda kuta kitimuguunha mu ngira ya muntu yeenayeena, olwo ghalobe kubaagho muntu ayagaana kisobu mu mulimo gwaife." 
2Corinthians6:4 Aye mu byonabyona bye tukola twoleka nga tuli bagheereza ba Katonda nga tugumira n'obuguminkiriza okudaazibwadaazibwa, ebizibu, ebibamba," 
2Corinthians6:5 okukubibwa, okusibibwa mu makomera, obwegugungo, okufaabiikana, okusula nga tumoga, n'okulumwa endhala." 
2Corinthians6:6 Era twoleka nga tuli bagheereza ba Katonda, mu bwamufu, mu kumanha, mu kuguminkiriza, mu kuba ab'ekisa, mu kuba ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu, era ni mu kugonza kwenekwene." 
2Corinthians6:7 Twogera amazima n'amaani ga Katonda, era twakozesa obutuufu ng'eky'okulwanisa kyaife mu kulumba ni mu kwetaasa." 
2Corinthians6:8 Abandi batutaamu ekinhagansi, abandi baatunhooma, abandi batwogeraku bubi, abandi baatwogeraku bukalamu. Tutwalibwa okuba abasubayi, waire nga twogera mazima." 
2Corinthians6:9 Tutwalibwa ng'abatamanhiibwa se nga boonaboona batwidhi, tuli ng'abafu aye nga tuli balamu. Tubonerezebwa aye titwitibwa." 
2Corinthians6:10 Tunakughazibwa aye tuba basangaavu buliidho, tuboneka ng'abaavu ate nga tukombaghaza abantu kamaala, tutwalibwa ng'abazira kantu ate nga bwenebwene byonabyona tuli nabyo." 
2Corinthians6:11 Bakagwa baife ab'e Korintho, tubakobeire byonabyona nga bwe biri, ghazira kiri mu myoyo gyaife kye tubagisiisa." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ife tukaali kukendeezaaku ku kugonza kwe tubagonzaamu, aye niimwe abakendeeziiza ku kutugonza." 
2Corinthians6:13 Mperaano ndhogera n'imwe ng'abaana bange, mwena mutugonzenga." 
2Corinthians6:14 Timweyimbanga kukola kintu na bataikiriza Kurisito, kuba obutuufu n'obubi busobola butya okwisania? Oba obutangaavu bwisania butya n'enzikiiza?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Kurisito aisania atya ni Beliali? Oba omwikiriza aisania atya n'atali mwikiriza? 
2Corinthians6:16 Eisinzizo lya Katonda liisania litya n'ebyo ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda? Kuba ife, niife eisinzizo lya Katonda Omulamu, era nga Katonda mwene bw'akoba ati: “Ndidha kubanga mu bantu bange, era mu abo mwe naatambuliranga Ndidha kubanga Katonda waibwe, boona baidha kubanga bantu bange.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Kale Musengwa akoba ati: “Mweyawule ku bataikiriza Kurisito, mubaveemu. Era mutagemanga ku kitali kirongoofu, memale olwo zeena mbasangaaze." 
2Corinthians6:18 Ndiba lata waimwe, era mwena muliba batabane bange ni baghala bange. Atyo Musengwa Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona bw'akoba.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Bakagwa, nga bwe tuli n'ebisuubizo bino, ka twenaazeeku buli kintu kyonakyona ekyonoona omubiri n'omwoyo, tube mu bulamu obutuukiriire nga tutya Katonda." 
2Corinthians7:2 Mutulage nga bwe mutugonza, kuba ghazira ye twabisa bubi, ghazira ye twaitaitana, era ghazira ye twatoolaku kikye mu kubuzaabuza." 
2Corinthians7:3 Tyogera ntyo lwa kubanenia aye nga bwe nabakoberaku eira muli bagonzi ye tuli, era buliidho tuli ghalala n'imwe, oba mu bulamu oba mu kufa." 
2Corinthians7:4 Mbeesiga inho era muneesiimisa inho. Mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kwaife kwonakwona nsigala nga nkaali mugumu era naasagamba inho. 
2Corinthians7:5 Ni bwe twatuuka e Makedonia titwawuumula naire. Ebizibu byali buli ghantu eby'okusoola n'abantu abandi ate n'eby'okweraliikirira. 
2Corinthians7:6 Aye Katonda agumya buli awoiremu maani, yatugumya n'okwidha kwa Tito." 
2Corinthians7:7 Aye okwidha kwe ti n'ekitugumya kyonka, aye n'okutukobera ensambo ye mwamwizaamu amaani kyona kyatugumya. Yatukobera nga bwe mwenda einho okumbonaku, nga bwe mweidhusa olw'ebyo bye mwankola, era nga bwe muli abeetegefu okuunwanirira. Kino kyandeetera inho okusagamba." 
2Corinthians7:8 Waire ng'embaluwa yange yabalumya, tyeidhusa olw'okugighandiika. Aye neidhusaaku kuba mbona nga yabalumya, waire ng'okubalumya kwali kwa kaseera buseera." 
2Corinthians7:9 Aye mperaano ndi musangaavu ti lwa kuba nga nabalumya, aye lwa kuba ng'okulumwa kwaimwe kwabaviiramu okwenenia. Mwalumwa nga Katonda bwe yayenda, kale ghazira kibi kye twabakola" 
2Corinthians7:10 kuba okulumwa nga Katonda bw'ayenda, kuvaamu okwenenia omuva okulokolebwa, era tikubaamu kweidhusa. Aye okulumwa okw'ensi kuvaamu kufa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Kale mwena mubone okulumwa kwaimwe nga Katonda bwe yayenda bye kwabaleetera: Mufuba inho okugondhoola ensonga, mwawulira enaku olw'okusobya kwaimwe, mutya inho, mwenda inho okumbonaku, munuyirira okugheereza Katonda, era mwamalirira okubonereza buli akola ekibi. Mu byonabyona mweyoleike nga muziraku musango gwonagwona." 
2Corinthians7:12 Kale waire nabaghandiikira embaluwa eyo, tyakikola lw'oyo eyakola ekibi oba lw'oyo eyakolwaku ekibi, aye nagighandiika okwoleka mu maiso ga Katonda nga mutulumirwa." 
2Corinthians7:13 Kale ni kyatwizaamu amaani. Okwongereza ku ky'okutwizaamu amaani, twasagamba olw'okusangaaza mwenamwena kwe mwasangaazaamu Tito, ni mumalagho ebyali bimweraliikiriza." 
2Corinthians7:14 Nakobera Tito nti muneesiimisa era tyaswala, kuba nga mu byonabyona bye twabakoba bwe tutaabaguya, n'okwesiima kwaife kwe twakobera Tito kwakakasibwa nga tikwali kuguya." 
2Corinthians7:15 Era bw'aidhukira obuwulize bwaimwe mwenamwena, okutya n'okumutengeetera nga mumusangaaza, yeeyongera okubagonza." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndi musangaavu inho kuba mbeesiga inho. 
2Corinthians8:1 Aboluganda, ka tubakobere ekisa kya Katonda kye kikoze mu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eby'e Makedonia." 
2Corinthians8:2 Baabita mu kulebwa okunene nga badaazibwadaazibwa, aye baasigala nga basangaavu inho. Era baali baavu inho, aye baaba bagabi inho." 
2Corinthians8:3 Mbakakasa nti baagaba nga bwe basobola, ate n'okusinga baasinzaagho nga ghazira kukakibwa." 
2Corinthians8:4 Baatweghemba inho tubaghe akaghagaanhia babeeku ni kye bagha abatuukirivu ab'omu Buyudaaya. 
2Corinthians8:5 Baakola kye twali titubasuubira kukola. Okusooka beeghaayo ye Musengwa era n'eri ife, olw'okwenda kwa Katonda." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kale kye twava tukoba Tito nga bwe yainhama omulimo guno ogw'okugaba mu imwe, agumalirize." 
2Corinthians8:7 Mperaano musinga abandi mu byonabyona mu kwikiriza, mu kwogera, mu kumanha, mu kufuba kwonakwona era ni mu kutugonza. Kale twenda mubasinge ni mu mulimo guno ogw'okugaba." 
2Corinthians8:8 Kino tikikoba ng'ekiragiro, aye nhenze okubalaga obufubi obw'abandi, mukakase oba nga okugonza kwaimwe kutuufu." 
2Corinthians8:9 Mwidhi ekisa kya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, waire yali mukombe yafuuka omwavu olwaimwe, memale olwo obwavu bwe bubafuule abakombe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ku kino amagezi ge mbagha, n'okumaliriza ekyo kye mwatoolereza okukola omwaka oguwoire. Niimwe abaatoolereza. Ate nga ti kukola bukole, aye nga kye mukola mukyenda." 
2Corinthians8:11 Obumalirivu bwe mwali nabwo mu kwenda okukikola, bwe mube mube nabwo ni mu kukimaliriza, nga mukozesa ebyo bye muli nabyo buti." 
2Corinthians8:12 Kuba omuntu ayenda okugaba, asiimibwa Katonda olw'okugaba ekyo ky'ali nakyo se ti ekyo ky'azira." 
2Corinthians8:13 Tikoba nti mu kubeera abandi imwe mwekaluubirize," 
2Corinthians8:14 aye kye nkoba n'okubaagho okwazayaza. Nga mperaano bwe muli n'ebintu kamaala, mu bayambe mu bwetaavu bwaibwe. Mwena bwe muliba mu bwetaavu, era nga bali n'ebintu kamaala, balibayamba, olwo ghabeegho okwazayaza." 
2Corinthians8:15 Oti n'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Eyasoloza ebingi tiyasigazaagho, ate eyasoloza ebitono tiyadhulirira.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Katonda yeekaza, eyagha Tito omwoyo ogubalumirwa ng'ogwaife." 
2Corinthians8:17 Kuba tiyakanga ku kuganha buganhe kye twamukoba, aye n'okuba yali mwetegefu, era aidha kwidha ye muli nga yeetuma mwene." 
2Corinthians8:18 Aghalala n'oyo tuli kubatumira owoluganda amanhiibwa einho mu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, olw'okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi." 
2Corinthians8:19 Ate ti n'ekyo kyonka, aye era Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito bimulonze okubita n'ife ku mulimo ogw'okugaba, gwe tukola olw'okugheesa Musengwa ekitiisa n'okwoleka nga bwe twenda okuyamba." 
2Corinthians8:20 Tuli kwegendereza ghalobe kubaagho muntu atwogeraku bubi olw'okwona ebirabo bino ebigheebwayo n'omwoyo omugabi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Ekiruubirirwa kyaife n'okukola ekituufu, ti mu maiso ga Katonda gonka aye ni mu maiso g'abantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Aghalala n'abo, tubatumiire owoluganda owundi ye tulebye emikuzi kamaala era ni tumubona nga mufubi mu bintu kamaala. Ate era mperaano yeeyongera okuba omufubi einho, kuba abeesiga inho." 
2Corinthians8:23 Tito oyo, ni mukozi munange bwetubagheereza, ate aboluganda bale, bakwenda ba Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, olw'okugheesa Kurisito ekitiisa." 
2Corinthians8:24 Kale mu maiso g'Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona, mubalage okugonza okutuufu okukakasa nga tuli batuufu okukoba tuti twesiimye n'imwe." 
2Corinthians9:1 Tikineetaagisa kubaghandiikira ku bigema ku kuyamba abatuukirivu ab'omu Buyudaaya. 
2Corinthians9:2 Ndidhi nga muli beetegefu okuyamba era mbesiimiramu inho mu bantu ab'e Makedonia nga mbakoba nti: “Okuviira irala omwaka oguwoire aboluganda mu Akaia babairenga beetegefu okuyamba.” Obufubi bwaimwe buleeteire abantu kamaala boona okwenda okukola batyo. 
2Corinthians9:3 Mperaano ndi kubatumira aboluganda bano, olwo okubeesimiramu kwaife kwe tubalimu kulobe kuba kwa bwereere. Aye nga bwenakoba nti mwidha kuba beetegefu, mube beetegefu." 
2Corinthians9:4 Kuba bweghabaagho ku b'e Makedonia abaidha ninze, ni babaagaana nga timuli beetegefu, tuliswala inho olw'obwesige obungi bwe twabataamu, waire nga mwena muliswala." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kale nakibona nga kikalamu okukoba aboluganda bano bansooke okwidha eyo, bategekere irala ekirabo kye mwasuubiza. Nze nje okwidha nga kirigho, kino kyoleke nga mugaba lwa kweyendera aye ti lwa nnaakola ntya." 
2Corinthians9:6 Mwidhukire nti oyo alima ebitono era afuna bitono, ate oyo alima ebingi era afuna bingi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Kale buli muntu ateekwa okukola nga bw'asazeegho mu mwoyo gwe, era nga ti lwa nnaakola ntya, oba lwa kukakibwa kuba Katonda ayenda oyo agaba nga musangaavu." 
2Corinthians9:8 Era Katonda aghanga okubagha ebintu kamaala okusinga bye mwetaaga, olwo musobole buliidho okubanga ni bye mwetaaga, era mugabenga ebintu kamaala olwa buli mulimo omukalamu" 
2Corinthians9:9 nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Omuntu ow'omwoyo omugabi agabira abaavu; obugabi bwe bubaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.” 
2Corinthians9:10 Katonda oyo agha omulimi ensigo n'emere ey'okulya, anaabaghanga era yaayazanga ensigo dhaimwe, obugabi bwaimwe bweyongerengaku." 
2Corinthians9:11 Aidha kubakombaghaza mu byonabyona mweyongere okugaba, olwo abantu kamaala basiimenga Katonda olw'ebirabo byaimwe bye tubatwalira." 
2Corinthians9:12 Okugheereza kuno kwe mukola tikukanga ku kwiruukirira bwetaavu bwa batuukirivu kwonka, aye kuleetera n'abantu okweyanza einho Katonda." 
2Corinthians9:13 Okugheereza kwaimwe kuno kukakasa abantu nga bwe muli. Olwo abantu kamaala baagha Katonda ekitiisa olw'okwikiriza n'okwatula Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito, era n'olw'obugabi bwaimwe eri abantu abo, era n'eri abandi boonaboona." 
2Corinthians9:14 Kale banaabasabiranga n'okusiima kunene, olw'ekisa Katonda kye yabagha imwe." 
2Corinthians9:15 Katonda yeekaza olw'ekirabo kye ekitaloodheka. 
2Corinthians10:1 Ninze Paulo mwene, abandi mu imwe ye bakoba okuba omugonvu nga ndi n'imwe, aye abakambughalira nga tiri n'imwe. Olw'obuguminkiriza n'obwikaikamu bwa Kurisito," 
2Corinthians10:2 mbeeghembye nti bwe ndiba nga ndidhie eyo mutandeetera kubakambughalira, kuba nkakasa nti nsobola okukambughalira abo abakoba bati tujiira ku bya nsi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kituufu tuli mu nsi, aye olutalo lwe tuliku ti lwa nsi." 
2Corinthians10:4 Eby'okulwanisa mu lutalo lwaife ti bya nsi, aye n'ebyo ebiri n'amaani ga Katonda okuzikiriza amaani ag'omuzigu." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tuzikiriza buli kutakana kwonakwona, n'ebitimuguunha ebyekudumbaza mu ngira okulobera Katonda okumanhibwa, era twakyusa buli ndowooza ey'ekidheemu yaagondera Kurisito." 
2Corinthians10:6 Era nga mumaze okulaga obuwulize obutuukiriire, tuli beetegefu okubonereza buli kikolwa kyonakyona eky'obudheemu." 
2Corinthians10:7 Mubone ebintu nga bwe biri. Omuntu yeenayeena bwe yeekakasa nga wa Kurisito, aidhukire nga twena tuli ba Kurisito nga oyo bw'ali." 
2Corinthians10:8 Tikingemya nsoni kwesaaka okusingaku bwe ngwaine, olw'obukumu bwe tuli nabwo. Musengwa n'eyabutugha olw'okubazimba, nga ti bwa kubazikiriza." 
2Corinthians10:9 Tyenda kuboneka ng'abatiisa n'embaluwa dhange 
2Corinthians10:10 kuba bakoba bati: “Embaluwa dhe nkambwe era dha maani, aye bw'aba n'ife aba munafu era ataidhi na kwogera!”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Abantu ng'oti n'abo bateekwa okumanha nga bye tukoba mu mbaluwa nga tituli n'imwe, bye tukola nga tuli n'imwe." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ife titughanga kweta, oba okwegeza ku abo abeesuuta. Bwe baba nga beegeza, beegeza ku beene na beene nga bwe bafaanana. Baziramu magezi." 
2Corinthians10:13 Aye ife titwidha kwesaaka kuswisa agho ghe tuteekwa kukanga. Twesaaka lwa mulimo Katonda gwe yatugha gwonka, nga mw'otwaliire n'okukola mu imwe." 
2Corinthians10:14 Kuba era, mu kusookera irala nga twidha ye muli okubaleetera Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito, twali tituli kutuumagho agho ghe twagererwa." 
2Corinthians10:15 Kale titwesaaka kusinga ghaatugererwa, ni twingira na mu mulimo gwa bandi, aye tusuubira tuti ng'okwikiriza kwaimwe bwe kuja nga kweyongera, era n'omulimo gwaife mu imwe bwe gunaaja nga gweyongera okugazigha, nga buliidho twekuumira agho aghaatugererwa." 
2Corinthians10:16 Olwo tulighanga okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi abali mu biketezo ebindi eby'eghalaku okusinga imwe, aghazira kwesaaka olw'omulimo ogwawa okukolebwa mu kiketezo eky'owundi." 
2Corinthians10:17 Nga ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba: “Oyo eyeesuuta, yeesuutenga ku lwa Musengwa.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Omuntu eyeesaaka ti n'aikirizibwa Katonda, aye oyo Katonda y'asaaka." 
2Corinthians11:1 Nandyegombye munguminkirize ni bwemba nga ndimuuku obusiru. Bwenebwene munguminkirize. 
2Corinthians11:2 Mbawubira era nga Katonda bw'abawubira, kuba nabandhula ye Kurisito ng'omughala omwegha ye baja okugha iba omulala ati." 
2Corinthians11:3 Aye ntya nti ng'omusota bwe gwakozesa olugezigezi lwagwo ni gusubagha Eva, ebirowoozo byaimwe bisobola okudaaliimizibwa, mwaloba kwegheerayo irala ye Kurisito mu mazima." 
2Corinthians11:4 Kuba muganha mangu omuntu bw'aidha n'abakobera Yesu owundi ife ye tutabakoberangaku, oba bwe mufuna mwoyo owundi atali Mwoyo Mutukuvu ye mwafuna, oba ole bw'abakobera amawulire amalungi agandi agatali ago ge twabakobera." 
2Corinthians11:5 Tirowooza nti abo be mweta okuba abatume abakulu einho ghaligho kye bansinga naire. 
2Corinthians11:6 Waire nga tiri mwogezi mulungi, ghazira kye ntaidhi, era ekyo mwakibona bukalamu mu byonabyona ni mu buli nsambo." 
2Corinthians11:7 Bwe nabakobera Amawulire Amalungi aga Katonda tyabasasuza kintu kyonakyona. Neefeebya imwe mugheebwe ekifo ekya ghaigulu. Ekyo nakola kibi? 
2Corinthians11:8 Bwe nali mu imwe, Ebikunsu ebindi eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito n'ebyangemerera mu byetaago nsobole okubagheereza. Mu kino naba ng'oti ndi kunhaga bale, nhambe imwe." 
2Corinthians11:9 Bwe nali n'imwe, ni mba ni bye nhenda, tyakaluubiriza muntu yeenayeena, kuba aboluganda abaava e Makedonia bandeetera buli kye nali nhenda. Neekuuma era ndidha kwekuumanga, ndobe kubakaluubiriza mu nsambo yoonayoona." 
2Corinthians11:10 Olw'amazima ga Kurisito agali mu nze ghazira muntu alighanga kundobera kwesaaka mu biketezo byonabyona eby'omu Akaia. 
2Corinthians11:11 Kino nkyogera lwa kuba nga tibagonza? Katonda aidhi nga mbagonza. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kye nkola buti ndidha kweyongera okukikola, nsobole okulemya abo abeesaaka nga bakoba mbu bye bakola n'ife bye tukola biri ku musingi mulala." 
2Corinthians11:13 Abantu oti n'abo ti batume beene, aye batume ba buguya, era abakolera mu buguya ni beefuula abatume ba Kurisito." 
2Corinthians11:14 Era ekyo tikyewuunhisa, kuba ni Sitaani yeefuula okuba malaika ow'obutangaavu." 
2Corinthians11:15 Kale tikyewuunhisa n'abagheereza be bwe beefuula okuba abagheereza ab'obutuufu. Ku nkomerero balifuna ekituukana n'ebikolwa byaibwe. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndhiramu okukoba nti ghatabangagho muntu yeenayeena adhuuba ati ndi musiru. Aye ni bwe muba nga mudhuuba mutyo, mumale gandekera agho ng'omusiru, zeena nsobole okwesaakaku akatono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Kye ndi kwogera buti, ti ni Musengwa kye yandyenze ndhogere, aye ndi kwogera ng'omusiru mu bino eby'okwesaaka." 
2Corinthians11:18 Aye nga bwe ghaligho abantu kamaala abeesaaka olw'eby'ensi, zeena ka neesaake." 
2Corinthians11:19 Nga imwe bwe muli abagezi einho, muguminkiriza abasiru n'eisanhu." 
2Corinthians11:20 Muguminkiriza omuntu bw'abatwala okuba abairu, oba bw'abanhaga, oba bw'abatega, oba bwe yeekudumbaza, oba bw'abakuba mu maiso." 
2Corinthians11:21 Mu buswavu nganha nga ife twali bati inho okukola ekyo. Aye omuntu yeenayeena bw'akana ni yeesaaka olw'ekintu kyonakyona, zeena ndidha kukana neesaake olw'ekintu ekyo, ng'omusiru bwe yandikoze." 
2Corinthians11:22 Abo Baheburayi? Zeena bwendi. Abo Baisiraeli? Zeena bwendi. Abo baidhukulu ba Aburahamu? Zeena bwendi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Abo bagheereza ba Kurisito? Nze mbasinga. Nga ndhogera ng'omulalu, mbasinga okukola einho. Nsibiibwa mu ikomera emikuzi kamaala okubasinga. Nkubiibwa emikuzi kamaala okubasinga, era emikuzi mingi naabulaku katono n'okufa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Emikuzi etaanu Abayudaaya bankuba embooko amakumi asatu n'omwenda (39). 
2Corinthians11:25 Emikuzi esatu nakubwa emiigo olundi bankuba amabaale. Emikuzi esatu eryato lyatudimiraku, naasula era naasiiba mu nhandha." 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu ngendo dhange kamaala nfunie obuzibu obw'emiigo, obw'abanhazi, obuva mu Bayudaaya banange n'obuva mu bamaghanga agandi. Mbaire mu buzibu mu bibuga ni mu malungu, ku nhandha, era n'okuva y'abo abeeyeta aboluganda ate nga tibali." 
2Corinthians11:27 Mbaire n'okukola einho n'amaani era emikuzi kamaala nga nsula titendwike, ndi ndhala, n'endigho enuma ate nga nzira na mere ya kulya, naaba mu mpewo nga nzira na kya kwebwika." 
2Corinthians11:28 Era ku ebyo, naataaku buli lunaku obuzito obw'okweraliikirira olw'Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona." 
2Corinthians11:29 Bwe ghabaagho anafughaire, zeena nnafughala bweghabaagho agwisiibwa mu kibi, nsiriira omwoyo." 
2Corinthians11:30 Bwe mba nga ndi wa kwesaaka ndidha kwesaaka olw'ebyo ebyoleka obunafu bwange. 
2Corinthians11:31 Katonda era Lata wa Musengwa waife Yesu, asaakibwa ebyanda n'ebyanda, aidhi nga tiri kuguya." 
2Corinthians11:32 Bwe nali mu Damasiko, omufuzi eyateebwagho kyabazinga Areta, yakuuma ekibuga Damasiko angeme." 
2Corinthians11:33 Aye bambisa mu dinisa nga bantaire mu kiibo bandhikiza ku kisenge naamuwona. 
2Corinthians12:1 Nteekwa okwesaaka, waire ng'okwesaaka kuziramu muganhulo. Aye mperaano ka ndhogere ku kubonekerwa n'okwolekebwa Musengwa." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndidhiyo Omukurisito eyatwalibwa mu igulu erya ghaigulu einho, buti emyaka ikumi n'ena egibiseegho. Tiidhi oba nga bwene kino kyaligho, oba kwali kubonekerwa. Tiidhi, Katonda yenka n'aidhi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Era ndidhi nga omuntu oyo yatwalibwa mu kifo eky'okwesiima. Aye era tiidhi oba nga bwene ekyo kyaligho oba kwali kubonekerwa, Katonda n'aidhi." 
2Corinthians12:4 Era eyo yawulirayo ebintu omuntu by'ataghanga kwogera, era nga ghazira aikirizibwa kubyogera." 
2Corinthians12:5 Kale ndidha kwesaaka olw'omuntu oyo, aye ku lwange tiidha kwesaaka, koodhi olw'ebyo ebyoleka obunafu bwange." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ni bwe nandyenze okwesaaka tyandibaire musiru, kuba nandibaire ndi kwogera mazima. Aye tiidha kwesaaka, kuba tyenda muntu yeenayeena andowoozeeku bintu bisinga ebyo by'amboinemu n'ebyo by'ampuliireku." 
2Corinthians12:7 Aye olw'okundobera okwekudumbaza olw'okuba nafuna okwolekebwa okutali kwa buliidho, nafumitibwa eiwa mu mubiri erikola ng'omukwenda wa Sitaani okunkubanga, olwo ndobenga kwekudumbaza." 
2Corinthians12:8 Emikuzi esatu nga neeghemba Musengwa antoolemu eiwa eryo. 
2Corinthians12:9 Aye yandhiramu ati: “Ekisa kyange kikumala, kuba amaani gange gabonekera mu bunafu bwo.” Kale kinsangaaza inho okwesaaka olw'obunafu bwange, amaani ga Kurisito gabe mu nze." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ku lwa Kurisito ndi musangaavu okuba n'obunafu, okuvumibwa, okuba n'ebizibu, okukirigibwa n'okukaluubirizibwa. Kuba bwe mba omunafu, olwo bwe mba ow'amaani." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndi oti musiru aye niimwe mundeeteire okuba ntyo, kuba mbaire ngwaniire okusaakibwa imwe. Waire tiri kintu, abo be mweta okuba abatume abakulu einho ghazira ni kye bansingamu naire." 
2Corinthians12:12 Mu kuguminkiriza okunene einho, obumanhiso kamaala n'ebyewuunhisa ebyoleka nga bwene ndi mutume, byakolebwa mu imwe." 
2Corinthians12:13 Kale Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ebindi nabikolera ki kye ntaakolera imwe, okutoolaku okuba nga nze tyabakaluubiriza imwe? Munsonighe ekisobyo ekyo." 
2Corinthians12:14 Mperaano guno n'omukuzi ogwokusatu nga neetegekanga okwidha eyo era tiidha kubakaluubiriza, kuba imwe beene niimwe be nhenda, se ti bintu byaimwe. Kuba era abaana ti n'abagwaine okulabirira abazaire, aye abazaire n'abali n'okulabirira abaana baibwe." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndidha kughaayo ebyange byonabyona n'obusangaavu, era ninze mwene neegheereyo irala olw'emyoyo gyaimwe. Bwe neeyongera okubagonza kiba kitegeeza nti imwe muli nakukendeeza kungonza?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ghaligho abakoba mbu waire tyabakaluubiriza, nali mugezigezi, naabatega nga timwidhi era naabagemya." 
2Corinthians12:17 Nabatega nga mbita mu abo be nabatumira? 
2Corinthians12:18 Nakoba Tito aidhe eyo aghalala n'owoluganda owundi. Tito n'eyabatega? Nze ni Tito titukolera mu Mwoyo mulala? Titugema ngira ndala? 
2Corinthians12:19 Mutaba ng'agho woonawoona mubaire mulowooza nga tuli kwewozaaku mu maiso gaimwe. Busa naire, bakagwa. Ife twogeire nga Kurisito bwe yandyenze twogere mu maiso ga Katonda olw'okubazimba." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ekintiisa, n'okwidha ni mbaagaana nga timuli nga bwe nandyenze mube, oba imwe okumbona nga tiri nga bwe mwandyenze mbe. Ntya okwagaanayo okusoola, ensaalwa, obusungu, okweyendeza buli kintu, okusalaganaku ebibono, olubono, okwekudumbaza, era n'okutabukatabuka." 
2Corinthians12:21 Era ntya nti bwe ndiidha kabiri, Katonda alinfeebya mu maiso gaimwe, naalira olw'abantu kamaala abaakola eira ebibi, aye ni bateiraku olw'ebikolwa eby'obwenzi n'obudankaanu bye baakola." 
2Corinthians13:1 Guno omukuzi gwe ndi kwidha okubakyalira guja kuba gwa kusatu. “Buli kulumiriza kulikakasibwa nga ghaligho abadhulizi babiri oba basatu”, ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba." 
2Corinthians13:2 Bwe nali n'imwe ku mukuzi ogwokubiri, nalabula abo abaayona eira, era naalabula n'abandi boonaboona. Ni mperaano waire nga tiri n'imwe ndhiramu okubalabula nti bwe ndiidha ghazira ye ndisaasira." 
2Corinthians13:3 Ndikola kino mukakase nga Kurisito ayogerera mu nze. Kurisito ti munafu bw'aba ng'akolagana n'imwe, era ayoleka amaani ge mu imwe." 
2Corinthians13:4 Kuba waire yakomererwa ku musalaba mu bunafu, aye mulamu olw'amaani ga Katonda. Twena nga tuli mu Kurisito tuli banafu, aye nga tukolagana n'imwe, twidha kuba naye mu maani ga Katonda." 
2Corinthians13:5 Mweringemu beene mubone oba nga mukaagumiire ku kwikiriza. Mwerebe beene. Aye bwene timwidhi nga Yesu Kurisito ali mu imwe? Okutoolaku koodhi nga mugwire mu kwereba kwaimwe. 
2Corinthians13:6 Ndhuuba nga mwidha kukibona nga ife titwagwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Aye tusaba Katonda mulobe kukola kikyamu, ti lwa kwoleka nga bwe tutaagwa, lwe twalebwa, aye mukole ekituufu, ni bwe tuba nga tunaaboneka ng'abaagwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Kuba titusobola kukola kintu kyonakyona ekitakania amazima, okutoolaku okugalwanirira." 
2Corinthians13:9 Kitusangaaza ife bwe tuba abanafu imwe ni muba ab'amaani, era tubasabira ye Katonda, mutuukirire." 
2Corinthians13:10 Bino mbighandiise nga tiri n'imwe, bwe ndiidha ndobe kuba mukambwe, nga nkozesa obukumu Musengwa bwe yampa obw'okuzimba, se obutali bwa kumenhagho." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ekisembayo aboluganda: Tukaali! Mufube okuba abatuukiriire, mujiire ku kugalaga kwange, mwisanie, mube n'emiraala, ni Katonda mwene kugonza era mwene miraala anaabanga n'imwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Mulamusaganie nga munhwegeragana. Abatuukirivu boonaboona babalamwisa. 
2Corinthians13:13 Enkabi dha Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, n'okugonza kwa Katonda, era n'okwisa ekirala okwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu bibe n'imwe mwenamwena." 
Galatians1:1 Ninze Paulo omutume, obutume buno tibwampeebwa muntu waire okubisibwa mu muntu, aye bwampeebwa Yesu Kurisito mwene, ni Katonda Lata waife eyamuzuukiza." 
Galatians1:2 Nze n'aboluganda boonaboona be ndi nabo ghano, tughandiikira Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona mu Galatia." 
Galatians1:3 Enkabi n'emiraala ebiva ye Katonda Lata waife, ni ye Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito bibenga n'imwe." 
Galatians1:4 Yesu Kurisito ono n'eyeeghaayo olw'okwona kwaife atununule mu byanda bino bye tulimu buti ebyonooni, nga Katonda Lata waife bwe yayenda." 
Galatians1:5 Katonda oyo agheebwenga ekitiisa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina. 
Galatians1:6 Mbeewuunhiiza, mu kaseera akatono kati muli kuva ku oyo eyabeeta mu kisa kya Kurisito, mwakyukira ku kintu ekindi kye muli kweta amawulire amalungi!" 
Galatians1:7 Bwenebwene ghazira Mawulire Malungi gandi, aye ghaligho ababatabula nga benda okukiidhamya Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito." 
Galatians1:8 Aye ka tube nga niife, oba abe malaika ava mu igulu, abakobera ky'ayeta Amawulire Amalungi agataisania n'ago ge twabakobera, akolimirwe." 
Galatians1:9 Nga bwe twakoba, ni mperaano ka nkiiremu nti omuntu yeenayeena bw'abakoberanga mwene g'ayeta amawulire amalungi aye nga tigaisania n'ago ge mwaikiriza, akolimirwe." 
Galatians1:10 Mudhuuba muti ndi kunuyirira kusiimibwa bantu aye ti Katonda? Oba ndi kugezaaku kusangaaza bantu? Bwemba nga nkaagezaaku okusangaaza abantu mba tiri mugheereza wa Kurisito. 
Galatians1:11 Ka mbakobere aboluganda, Amawulire Amalungi ge mbakobera tigaava mu bantu buntu." 
Galatians1:12 Ghazira muntu yagankobera oba okugandhegeresa; Yesu Kurisito mwene n'eyagandholeka. 
Galatians1:13 Mwawulira eby'obulamu bwange obwasooka, nga bwe neemalira ku nsinza ey'Ekiyudaaya, ni nkiriganga Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda nga nziramu na ntete naire, era ni ngezaaku okukisaaniagho." 
Galatians1:14 Bayudaaya banange bwe twaisuka, nabaswikirira inho mu kugema empisa edh'endhikiriza ey'Ekiyudaaya, era ni mu kwekalangulira ku mpisa dha badhaadha baife." 
Galatians1:15 Aye Katonda yali yamala ira okuunonda nga nkaali na kuzaalibwa, yandhawula era yantaagho okumukolera omulimo olw'ekisa kye." 
Galatians1:16 Era bwe yasalagho okundholeka Omwana we nsobole okukobera abamaghanga agandi Amawulire Amalungi agamufaaku, tyebuuzaaku ku muntu yeenayeena," 
Galatians1:17 waire okuja e Yerusalemu y'abo abansooka okuba abatume aye najiiragho mu Buwarabu, kabiri naira e Damasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Ghaabitagho emyaka esatu memale olwo naaja e Yerusalemu okukyaliraku Kefasi era naabaayo enaku ikumi na itaanu. 
Galatians1:19 Aye ghazira ku batume bandi ye nabonaku okutoolaku Yakobo muganda wa Musengwa. 
Galatians1:20 Ndayira mu maiso ga Katonda nga bye ndi kubaghandiikira, tiri kusubagha!" 
Galatians1:21 Olwo naaja mu biketezo by'e Siria n'e Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Era nali nkaali kumanhibwa bikunsu bya baikiriza mu Kurisito ab'e Buyudaaya. 
Galatians1:23 Okutoolaku okukoberwa obukoberwe bati: “Eyali atukiriga buti ali ku gwa kukobera abantu ku kwikiriza kwe yagezaaku okusaaniagho.” 
Galatians1:24 Era baasaaka Katonda ku lw'ekyo ekyantuukaku. 
Galatians2:1 Bwe ghaabitagho emyaka eikumi n'ena, memale kabiri naaja e Yerusalemu, twaja ni Barunaba era naatwala ni Tito." 
Galatians2:2 Najaayo kuba Katonda yakindholeka nga kingwaniire okujaayo. Era nga tuli twenka n'abakulu, nayandha mu maiso gaibwe Amawulire Amalungi ge nalinga nga nkobera abamaghanga agandi. Ekyo nakikola omulimo gwe nali nkoze, ni gwe nali nja okukola gulobe kunfa busa." 
Galatians2:3 Era waire Tito ye naja naye yali Mugureki, tiyakakibwa kukeketebwa." 
Galatians2:4 Ghaligho abaakyogeraku nga beefuula okuba abaikiriza, beibirira baatweyimbaku. Kye baayenda n'okubona eidembe lye tuli nalyo mu Kurisito Yesu era n'okutwiza mu bwiru." 
Galatians2:5 Aye olw'okukuuma obutuufu obw'Amawulire Amalungi ku lwaimwe ti twaganha kye baali bakoba naire. 
Galatians2:6 Aye era abo abaaboneka ng'oti n'abakulu, oba bwenebwene bwe baali ekyo ku nze ti kya nsonga, kuba Katonda taboola mu bantu abakulu abo, nga bwe nkobye, mpaagho kiyaaka kye baanhongeraku." 
Galatians2:7 Aye baakibona bubone nga Katonda yampa omulimo ogw'okukobera abatali bakekete Amawulire Amalungi, ng'oti ni bwe yagha Petero ogw'okugakobera abakekete" 
Galatians2:8 kuba olw'amaani ga Katonda nafuulibwa omutume eri abamaghanga agandi, ng'oti ni Petero bwe yafuulibwa omutume eri abakekete." 
Galatians2:9 Yakobo, Petero ni Yoanne, abaabonekanga okuba nga n'abakulembeze, baakibona nga Katonda yangemya omulimo omukulu guno. Kale baatugema mu ngalo, nze ni Barunaba, ng'akamanhiso akooleka nga tuli bakozi banaibwe ku mulimo n'omulala. Era twaisania ife tuje mu bamaghanga agandi, ate beene baje mu bakekete." 
Galatians2:10 Kirala kyonka kye baatukoba, buteerabira baghafu ab'omu kikunsu kyaibwe, era nga n'ekintu kyene ekyo kye mbaire ntangaku omwoyo gwange." 
Galatians2:11 Kefasi bwe yaidha mu Antiokia namukobaku nga twenatwena tuli agho, kuba kye yakola nga kyeyoleka kyene nga kisobu:" 
Galatians2:12 Abantu abaava ye Yakobo bwe baali bakaali kutuuka Kefasi yaliiranga ghalala n'abamaghanga agandi abaikiriza Yesu, aye olwatuuka bati yeefuula era yaabeeyawulaku olw'okutya abo abeekalangulira ku ky'okukeketa." 
Galatians2:13 Abayudaaya abandi abaikiriza Yesu boona baatoolera okukola ekisobu ng'oti ni Kefasi, era ekyo kyaviiramu ni Barunaba yeena okujiira okwo." 
Galatians2:14 Aye nze bwe nabona nga tibali kujiira ku mazima g'Amawulire Amalungi naakoba Kefasi nga boonaboona bali agho nti: “Iwe oli Muyudaaya, aye weebisa ng'oti n'abamaghanga agandi, ate ng'oli Muyudaaya. Kale osobola otya okukaka abamaghanga agandi okwebisa ng'oti Bayudaaya?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ife twazaalibwa mu mubiri nga tuli Bayudaaya nga tituli bamaghanga gandi aboonooni. 
Galatians2:16 Aye twidhi ng'omuntu abalibwa okuba omutuukirivu lwa kuba na kwikiriza mu Yesu Kurisito, aye ti lwa kukola nga Mateeka bwe galagira. N'ife twena twali n'okwikiriza mu Kurisito Yesu, olwo tubalibwe okuba abatuukirivu lwa kwikiriza Kurisito aye ti lwa kukola ng'Amateeka bwe galagira. Ghazira abalibwa kuba mutuukirivu lwa kukola ebyo amateeka bye galagira." 
Galatians2:17 Aye mu kwefubiriza kwaife okubalibwa okuba abatuukirivu mu Kurisito, bwe twagaanibwa nga tuli boonooni, olwo Kurisito atwalibwa nga mugheereza wa kibi? Busa naire." 
Galatians2:18 Aye bwe nzimba kabiri ekintu kye nasansula, olwo neeyolekera irala nga ndi mwonooni." 
Galatians2:19 Kuba nze, mu Mateeka ntwalibwa nga ndi mufu, nga ndhitibwa Amateeka olwo mbe omulamu eri Katonda. Naitirwa ghalala ni Kurisito ku musalaba gwe," 
Galatians2:20 era tiri mulamu ku bwange aye Kurisito n'omulamu mu nze. Obulamu buno bwe ndi nabwo mperaano mu mubiri, ndi nabwo lwa kwikiriza Mwana wa Katonda eyangonza n'aghaayo obulamu bwe ku lwange." 
Galatians2:21 Tidibya kisa kya Katonda. Aye oba omuntu asobola okubalibwa okuba omutuukirivu olw'okugema Amateeka, olwo Kurisito aba yafiira busa." 
Galatians3:1 Imwe abantu ab'e Galatia abazira magezi, muli baloge? Abantu abainhonholwa obukalamu, ni mubona Yesu Kurisito nga bwe yakomererwa ku musalaba!" 
Galatians3:2 Ka mbabuuzeeku kino kyonka: Mwafuna Mwoyo lwa kukola ng'Amateeka bwe galagira oba lwa kuwulira nakwikiriza bya Yesu? 
Galatians3:3 Musobola okuba abasiru okwaga agho? Mwatoolera na Mwoyo wa Katonda, mperaano mwenda kufundikira na maani gaimwe imwe beene?" 
Galatians3:4 Okubita kwaimwe mu bintu ebingi bityo, bwene kwali kudaagira bwereere? Aye tirowooza nga bwene kwali kudaagira bwereere!" 
Galatians3:5 Katonda oyo abagabira Mwoyo era n'akola ebyewuunhio mu imwe, akola atyo lwa kuba mukola ng'Amateeka bwe galagira oba lwa kuba muwulira era mwaikiriza?" 
Galatians3:6 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba ku Aburahamu biti: “Yaikiriza Katonda, yaabalibwa okuba omutuukirivu.”" 
Galatians3:7 Kale agho mubona ng'abali n'okwikiriza ni baidhukulu ba Aburahamu beene. 
Galatians3:8 Era ebyaghandiikibwa byakirengera nga Katonda aligha abamaghanga agandi obutuukirivu olw'okwikiriza, kye byava ni birangirira eri Aburahamu Amawulire Amalungi nga n'ebiseera bikaali ghala biti: “Mu iwe amaghanga goonagoona mwe galigheerwa omukisa.”" 
Galatians3:9 Agho ni, abo boonaboona abali n'okwikiriza kyebava ni bagheebwa omukisa nga Aburahamu yeena bwe yagheebwa olw'okwikiriza." 
Galatians3:10 Abo abeesigama ku kukola ng'Amateeka bwe galagira bakolimirwe, kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Omuntu yeenayeena ataatuusenga buliidho ebyo byonabyona ebyaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kino eky'Amateeka, akolimirwe!”" 
Galatians3:11 Mperaano, kyeyoleka bukalamu nga ghazira aba mutuukirivu lwa Mateeka, kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Oyo aba omutuukirivu olw'okwikiriza aliba mulamu.”" 
Galatians3:12 Aye Amateeka tigeesigama ku kwikiriza, kuba ebyaghandiikibwa era bikoba biti: “Oyo akola ebyo byonabyona bye galagira aliba omulamu olw'Amateeka.”" 
Galatians3:13 Aye ife Kurisito yatununula okuva mu kikolimo ekireetebwa Amateeka mwene bwe yakolimirwa ku lwaife kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Omuntu yeenayeena aghanikibwa ku muti, akolimirwa.”" 
Galatians3:14 Kurisito yakola atyo, olw'omukisa Katonda gwe yasuubiza Aburahamu gugheebwe n'abamaghanga agandi mu Kurisito Yesu, era olw'okwikiriza tusobole okufuna Mwoyo Katonda ye yasuubiza." 
Galatians3:15 Aboluganda, ka mbaghe eky'okuboneraku eky'omu bulamu obwabuliidho: Ghazira aghanga kudibya oba kukookera mu ndagaano emaze okukakasibwa." 
Galatians3:16 Ebisuubizo byasuubizibwa Aburahamu ni mwidhukulu we. Ebyaghandiikibwa tibikoba “baidhukulu” ekitegeeza abantu abangi, aye “mwidhukulu” ekitegeeza omuntu omulala yenka era nga ni Kurisito." 
Galatians3:17 Kino ni kye nkoba, Amateeka agaateebwagho nga ghabiseegho emyaka bikumi bina n'asatu (430), tigaadibya ndagaano yamala kukakasibwa Katonda, era tigaadibya kisuubizo kye." 
Galatians3:18 Kale oba Katonda agha omuntu ekirabo lwa kutuusa Mateeka, agho kiba nga tikikaali kisuubizo aye ekirabo Katonda kye yagha Aburahamu kyava mu kisuubizo." 
Galatians3:19 Olwo kiki ekyateesaagho Amateeka? Gaateebwagho okwoleka okwona, era gaali nga ga kubaagho okutuusa ku kwidha kwa mwidhukulu wa Aburahamu. Omwidhukulu oyo n'oyo ayogerwaku mu kisuubizo ekyasuubizibwa Aburahamu. Amateeka bamalaika baagaleeta nga gabita mu muntu eyagemagania Katonda n'abantu." 
Galatians3:20 Aye omuntu agemagania okubaagho, kyoleka nga ghaligho endhuyi ibiri aye ate Katonda ali mulala." 
Galatians3:21 Tukobe tuti Amateeka gakontana n'ebisuubizo bya Katonda? Busa naire. Kuba nguli abantu baagheebwa Amateeka agasobola okuleeta obulamu, nguli mu kutuukiriza bye galagira n'omuva obutuukirivu." 
Galatians3:22 Aye ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba, ensi yoonayoona esibiibwa mu maani ag'ekibi, olwo ekirabo ekyasuubizibwa olw'okwikiriza mu Yesu Kurisito kibe nga kigheebwa abo abaikiriza." 
Galatians3:23 Aye ng'okwikiriza kuno kukaali kutuuka, Amateeka gaatukuumanga butiribiri ng'abasibe, okutuusa okwikiriza kuno lwe kwayolekebwa." 
Galatians3:24 Kale Amateeka gaatukuumanga ng'omukuza okutuusa Kurisito lwe yaidha olwo tugheebwe okuba abatuukirivu olw'okwikiriza. 
Galatians3:25 Aye nga mperaano okwikiriza bwe kwaidha, titukaakuumibwa mukuza." 
Galatians3:26 Kuba mu Kurisito Yesu, mwenamwena muli buti baana bakulu aba Katonda olw'okwikiriza." 
Galatians3:27 Kuba mwenamwena abaabatizibwa mu Kurisito, Kurisito oyo mwamuvaala oti kivaalo." 
Galatians3:28 Mperaano ghazira ati ono Muyudaaya ate ole Mugureki, ono mwiru ate ole yeetaaya, oba ati ono musaadha ate ole mukazi kuba mwenamwena mwafuuka muntu mulala mu Kurisito Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Era oba nga muli ba Kurisito, agho ni muli baidhukulu ba Aburahamu era mulifuna Katonda kye yasuubiza." 
Galatians4:1 Aye omusika bw'aba ng'akaali muto, ni bw'aba ng'asise ebintu byonabyona aba ng'omwiru;" 
Galatians4:2 kuba aba mu mikono gya bakuza na basigire okutuusa ekiseera lata we kye yataagho. 
Galatians4:3 Kityo bwe kyali n'ife, bwe twali tuli baana bato twali bairu ba misambwa gyonagyona egy'oku nsi kuno." 
Galatians4:4 Aye ekiseera ekironde bwe kyatuuka, Katonda yaatuma Omwana we mwene. Yaazaalibwa omukazi era yaafugibwa Amateeka," 
Galatians4:5 anunule abo abaali bafugibwa Amateeka ago, era twena olwo tusobole okufuuka abaana ba Katonda." 
Galatians4:6 Era olw'okuba muli baana be, Katonda kyeyava n'atuma Mwoyo w'Omwana we angire mu myoyo gyaife. Mwoyo oyo ayeta ati: “Abba!” Ekitegeeza “Iseife.”" 
Galatians4:7 Kale olw'ekyo, timukaali bairu ba misambwa aye abaana ba Katonda. Era nga bwemuli abaana ba Katonda, Katonda oyo aja kubagha byonabyona by'agha abaana be." 
Galatians4:8 Eira, bwe mwali nga mukaali kumanha Katonda, mwali bairu ba bintu, mu butuufu ebitali bakatonda." 
Galatians4:9 Aye mperaano nga bwe mwidhi Katonda, oba ka nkobe nga Katonda bw'abaidhi, musobola mutya kabiri okwiramu okufugibwa emisambwa egy'oku nsi kuno, eminafu era egizira kye gigasa? Mwenda kabiri mube bairu ba bintu ng'oti n'ebyo?" 
Galatians4:10 Mukuza enaku, emyezi, n'ebiseera eby'endhawulo eby'omwaka, era n'emyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Mpulira okutya nti omulimo gwe nabakolamu gwandiba nga gwafa bwereere. 
Galatians4:12 Mbeeghembye aboluganda mufuuke ng'oti ninze, kuba era zeena nafuuka ng'oti niimwe. Mu butuufu bwene muzira kisobu kye mwankola" 
Galatians4:13 kuba bwe muba mwidhukira, yali nsonga ya bulwaire bwange n'eyandeetera okubakobera Amawulire Amalungi omukuzi ogwasooka." 
Galatians4:14 Aye waire engeri omubiri gwange ye gwalimu yabakaluubiriza, timwannhooma oba okuneekanansa. Mwansangaalira ng'oti ndi malaika wa Katonda, kabiri oti ninze Kurisito Yesu mwene." 
Galatians4:15 Okusangaala okwo kwaja gha? Kuba nkakasa nti nguli mwali musobola mwanditunduiremu n'amaiso gaimwe mwagampa naabonesa. 
Galatians4:16 Olwo mperaano nfuuse muzigu waimwe olw'okubakobera ekituufu? 
Galatians4:17 Abantu abo beefuula okuba ng'ababalumirwa einho, aye ng'ate ensonga ebakoza ekyo ti nkalamu. Kye benda n'okubatangira olwo mujiire ku byaibwe." 
Galatians4:18 Okulumirwa okwo buliidho ti kubi ensonga bw'eba nga nkalamu, nze ni bwe mbaayo oba ni bwe ntabaayo." 
Galatians4:19 Bwana bwange obugonzi, ng'omukazi bw'alumwa ng'azaala, zeena bwenumwa ku lwaimwe okutuusa Kurisito lw'alitondebwa mu myoyo gyaimwe." 
Galatians4:20 Neegombye inho okuba n'imwe buti nsobole okukyusaamu ku ndhogera yange. Nga muneeraliikiriiza inho! 
Galatians4:21 Munkobere, imwe abenda okufugibwa Amateeka, timuwulira Mateeka kye gakoba?" 
Galatians4:22 Kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti Aburahamu yali ni batabane babiri, nga owundi yamuzaala mu mukazi mwiru, ate owundi yaamuzaala mu mukazi waagho." 
Galatians4:23 Mutabane we ow'omwiru omukazi yazaalibwa mu nsambo yabuliidho, aye ow'omukazi waagho yazaalibwa ng'ekisuubizo kya Katonda bwe kyali." 
Galatians4:24 Amakulu ga bino gali nga ga lufumo: Abakazi abo bombi obageza ku ndagaano eibiri. Owundi ava ku lusozi Sinai yaazaala abaana abairu, era oyo nga ni Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Hagari oyo, n'olusozi Sinai oluli mu Buwarabu era afaanana ni Yerusalemu ekya mperaano, ekiri mu bwiru n'abantu baakyo boonaboona." 
Galatians4:26 Aye Yerusalemu eky'omu igulu kiziramu bwiru era ni inhaife. 
Galatians4:27 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Sagamba, iwe omugumba atazaala. Timbuka oseke era okube emirali iwe atawulirangaku ku bisa bya mwana! Kuba omukazi ye baaleka agho aliba n'abaana kamaala okusinga omukazi owa iba atavangaghooku.”" 
Galatians4:28 Kale ife, aboluganda, tuli baana ba Katonda olw'ekisuubizo kye, ng'oti ni Isaaka bwe yali." 
Galatians4:29 Nga mu biseera ebyo bwe kyali, omulenzi eyazaalibwa mu nsambo yabuliidho bwe yakiriga ole eyazaalibwa ku bwa Mwoyo wa Katonda, ni mperaano bwekiri." 
Galatians4:30 Aye ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba ki? Bikoba biti: “Binga omukazi omwiru n'omwana we, kuba omwana w'omwiru taliba ni ky'agabana ku bintu bya ise n'omwana w'omukazi waagho.”" 
Galatians4:31 Kale aboluganda, ife tituli baana ba mukazi mwiru, tuli ba mukazi waagho." 
Galatians5:1 Okutuuka ku kwetaaya kuno, Kurisito n'eyatuteekuza okuva mu bwiru. Kale ni mwekalangule mulobe kweiza kabiri mu bwiru obwo." 
Galatians5:2 Nze mwene Paulo mbakobera nti, bwe muganha okubakeketa, kiba kitegeeza nga Kurisito azira muganhulo ye muli." 
Galatians5:3 Era kabiri nhenda okubalabula, nti kiisi muntu aganha okumukeketa ateekwa okutuukiriza Amateeka goonagoona." 
Galatians5:4 Era abo ku imwe abenda okuba abatuukirivu olw'okutuukiriza Amateeka, mwekutwire ku Kurisito beene era muviire mu kisa kya Katonda." 
Galatians5:5 Aye ife nga tubita mu Mwoyo olw'okwikiriza, tuteegerera nga tuli n'eisuubi ery'okugheebwa obutuukirivu;" 
Galatians5:6 kuba bwe tweyimba mu Kurisito Yesu, okukeketebwa n'obutakeketebwa byaga. Ekikulu n'okwikiriza okweyolekera mu kugonza." 
Galatians5:7 Ate ni, mwali mukola bukalamu naani eyabalekeza okugondera amazima?" 
Galatians5:8 Okusendasenda okwo tikwava eri oyo eyabeeta. 
Galatians5:9 Aye nga bwe bakoba: “Kaba kazimbulukusa katono kaazimbulukusa ogutole ogw'engaano gwonagwona.” 
Galatians5:10 Mu Musengwa nkakasa nti timwidha kuja na birowoozo bindi bitafaanana na byange era nti oyo abatabula ni bw'aliba ani alibonerezebwa. 
Galatians5:11 Aye aboluganda, oba nga mu kwegeresa kwange nkaakoba abantu okukeketebwa, lwaki bakankiriga? Era nguli ekyo kityo bwekiri, nguli bye ndhegeresa ku musalaba tibikaali kitimuguunha." 
Galatians5:12 Abantu abo ababatabula, kye mbendeza kweketeraku irala!" 
Galatians5:13 Aye imwe aboluganda, mwayetebwa kwetaaya. Aye mutaganha kwetaaya kwaimwe okwo kubaviiramu kufugibwa kwegomba kwa mibiri gyaimwe. Aye mu kugonzania mugheerezaganie" 
Galatians5:14 kuba Amateeka goonagoona gatuukirizibwa lino eirala erikoba liti: “Ogonzanga muntu mwino oti ni bwe weegonza mwene.” 
Galatians5:15 Aye bwe munaira agho okumoodhagana n'okudaazadaaza banaimwe mugwaine mwekuume, kuba musobola okwezikiriza beene na beene." 
Galatians5:16 Kino ni kye nkoba, muleke obulamu bwaimwe bufugibwe Mwoyo, mulobe kugondera kwegomba kwa mubiri." 
Galatians5:17 Kuba omubiri bye gwenda Mwoyo by'atenda, ate Mwoyo by'ayenda omubiri bye gutenda. Kiisi kirala kitakania kiinaakyo, waaloba kusobola kukola nga bw'oyenda." 
Galatians5:18 Aye Mwoyo bw'aba nga n'akugalagira oba tofugibwa Mateeka ago. 
Galatians5:19 Omubiri bye gukola tibyegisa era ni bino: Okwenda, obudankaanu, okughemula," 
Galatians5:20 okusinza ebitali Katonda, okuloga, enzigu, okukanamuka, ensaalwa, okudhuunadhuuna, okwebitiriza, okuba n'obutaisania, okweyawulamu," 
Galatians5:21 okweyendeza eby'abandi, okutamiira, okwemalira mu bibinuko, n'ebindi ebiri ng'oti n'ebyo. Mbalabula ng'oti bwe nabalabulaku eira, nti abantu abakola ebintu ebyo tibaliba na mugabo mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda." 
Galatians5:22 Aye Mwoyo aleeta kugonzania, kusagamba, kwisania, kuguminkiriza, kisa, kubisa bandi bukalamu, kwesigibwa," 
Galatians5:23 buwombeefu, na kwefuga. Ebyo biziraku iteeka libitakania." 
Galatians5:24 Era abo aba Kurisito Yesu, baakomerera ku musalaba omubiri gwaibwe, n'empisa dhaagwo n'amairu gaagwo." 
Galatians5:25 Oba nga Mwoyo yatugha obulamu, tuleke afuge obulamu bwaife." 
Galatians5:26 Tulobe kwegungumaza, waire owundi okwesonsa ku mwine, oba okumugemerwa ensaalwa." 
Galatians6:1 Aboluganda, omuntu yeenayeena bw'ayagaanibwa ng'akoze ekisobyo kyonakyona, abo abafugibwa Mwoyo mu imwe mugwaine okumugoloza, aye nga timukozesa bukambwe. Aye mwekuumenga mwena mulobe kukemebwa." 
Galatians6:2 Buli muntu ayambenga mwine, olwo mube nga mutuukiriiza eiteeka lya Kurisito." 
Galatians6:3 Kuba oyo eyeebona nga kintu kikulu ate nga tali, yeesubagha mwene." 
Galatians6:4 Aye buli muntu alinge mu by'akola abone oba nga mulimu ebikalamu, yeesiime mu mwoyo gwe, aye ti lwa kuba nga by'akola bikalamu okusinga eby'owundi." 
Galatians6:5 Kuba buli muntu ali n'okubbeeda omugonero gwe. 
Galatians6:6 Oyo ayegeresebwa ekibono, atoole ku bibye byonabyona agheeku oyo amwegeresa." 
Galatians6:7 Muteesubaghanga: Katonda, ghazira asobola kumusirughaza. Kiisi muntu ky'asiga ky'alikungula." 
Galatians6:8 Kuba asiga mu kwegomba kw'omubiri gwe, mu mubiri alikungula kufa aye asiga mu Mwoyo wa Katonda, mu Mwoyo oyo alikungula obulamu obutawaagho." 
Galatians6:9 Kale ka tulobe kukoogha mu kukola obukalamu; kuba bwe tutawaamu maani, ekiseera eky'okukungula bwe kirituuka tulifuna okukungula okw'omwero." 
Galatians6:10 Agho ni buli lwe tunaafunanga akaghagaanhia, tugwaine tukolerenga abantu boonaboona ebirungi n'okusingira irala abo be tuli nabo mu kika ekirala mu kwikiriza." 
Galatians6:11 Mubone obunene obw'enukuta dhe mpandiise n'omukono gwange mwene! 
Galatians6:12 Abantu abo abagezaaku okubakaka okukeketebwa, n'abo abenda okwesuuta mu by'oku ngulu. N'ekindi, benda kweghala kukirigibwa olw'omusalaba gwa Kurisito." 
Galatians6:13 Kuba n'abo beene abajiira ku ky'okukeketebwa tibagema Mateeka, aye benda imwe mukeketebwe olwo beesuute olw'okubapikiriza ni muganha omukolo obukolo ogwo ogukolebwa ku mubiri." 
Galatians6:14 Aye nze neesuuta lwa musalaba gwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito gwonka kuba ku musalaba okwo ensi ngibona nga kwe yakomererwa, yoona yambona nga kwe nakomererwa." 
Galatians6:15 Kuba ekikulu n'okufuuka ekitonde ekiyaaka, aye ti kukeketebwa oba obutakeketebwa." 
Galatians6:16 Emiraala n'okusaasira bibe ku abo boonaboona abajiira ku iteeka lino ni ku bantu ba Katonda boonaboona. 
Galatians6:17 Nga mmaliriza mbakoba nti: ghatabanga kabiri ayongera kundaaza, kuba ku mubiri gwange ndiku enkovu olwa Yesu." 
Galatians6:18 Aboluganda, enkabi dha Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito dhibe n'imwe. Amiina." 
Ephesians1:1 Ninze Paulo omutume wa Kurisito Yesu eyafuuka omutume olw'okwenda kwa Katonda. Mpandiikira abatuukirivu boonaboona abali mu Efeso, abaikiriza mu Kurisito Yesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Katonda Iseife ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito abaghe enkabi n'emiraala. 
Ephesians1:3 Katonda era Lata wa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, eyatugha mu Kurisito kiisi mukisa gwa Mwoyo oguva mu igulu, agheebwe ekitiisa." 
Ephesians1:4 Katonda ng'abita mu Kurisito, yali yamala ira okutulonda nga n'ensi ekaali kutondebwa, tube batuukirivu abaziraku musango mu maiso ge." 
Ephesians1:5 Olw'okutugonza, yatufuula baana be ng'abita mu Yesu Kurisito, nga bwe yakitutondera mu kusiima kwe." 
Ephesians1:6 Olwo tumusaake olw'okutwoleka ekisa mu kitiisa kye, kye yatugheera mu Mwana we omugonzi ng'ekirabo." 
Ephesians1:7 Olw'okufa kwa Kurisito ng'omusengo, tufuna okununulwa nga tusoniyibwa ebibi byaife olw'ekisa kya Katonda ekyodo," 
Ephesians1:8 kye yatugemerwa. Katonda mu magezi ge goonagoona ni mu kumanha kwe," 
Ephesians1:9 yatumanhisa ekyama eky'ebyo bye yayenda, bye yali yategeka eira okutuukiririza mu Kurisito." 
Ephesians1:10 Entegeka eyo aligituukiriza ng'ekiseera kyayo kituuse, ng'ayimba ghalala mu Kurisito ebintu byonabyona ebiri mu igulu n'ebiri mu nsi." 
Ephesians1:11 Katonda akola byonabyona nga bw'ayenda ng'ajiira ku ntegeka ye, mu Kurisito oyo" 
Ephesians1:12 mwe yatulondera. Ife abaasooka okuba n'eisuubi mu Kurisito, tubeegho nga tusaaka ekitiisa kya Katonda." 
Ephesians1:13 Era mu Kurisito oyo, n'imwe mwena abaawulira ekibono eky'amazima eky'Amawulire Amalungi ag'okulokolebwa kwaimwe era ni mwikiriza Kurisito, Katonda yabasibaku akamanhiso ng'abagha Mwoyo Mutukuvu ye yasuubiza." 
Ephesians1:14 Mwoyo Mutukuvu oyo n'omusingo okukakasa nga tulifuna ebyo Katonda bye yatusuubiza, tusaake ekitiisa kye." 
Ephesians1:15 Olw'ebyo, zeena okuva bwe nawulira nga bwe mwikiriza Musengwa Yesu, era nga bwe mugonza abatuukirivu boonaboona," 
Ephesians1:16 tirekeranga kweyanza Katonda ku lwaimwe. Mbaidhukira, naabasabira," 
Ephesians1:17 Katonda wa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, Lata ow'ekitiisa, abaghe Mwoyo ow'amagezi era ayoleka, mumumanhe." 
Ephesians1:18 Abazibule amaiso ag'omwoyo mubone ebyo bye yasuubiza bwe yabeeta, mumanhe obukombe obuli mu ebyo eby'ekitiisa by'abiikira abatuukirivu." 
Ephesians1:19 Era mumanhe amaani ge agataloodheka agakolera mu ife abaikiriza. Amaani ago 
Ephesians1:20 n'ago geene agaazuukiza Kurisito, ni gamutyamya mu igulu ku mukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda," 
Ephesians1:21 n'afuga obufuzi, n'obukumu, n'amaani eby'omu ibbanga. Era mumanhe ng'ali n'ekitiisa ekisinga ebitiisa byonabyona, ti mu byanda bino byonka aye ni mu biriiragho." 
Ephesians1:22 Katonda yata ebintu byonabyona mu bufuzi bwa Kurisito, yaamufuula omutwe ogw'ekikunsu eky'abamwikiriza mu byonabyona." 
Ephesians1:23 Ekikunsu ekyo n'omubiri gwa Kurisito. Kurisito oyo n'akifuula ekiramba, oyo afuula byonabyona ebiramba buli ghantu woonawoona." 
Ephesians2:1 Eira mwali bafu olw'empwitu n'ebibi 
Ephesians2:2 bye mwalimu nga mujiira ku bantu b'ensi nga bwe bakola, nga mufugibwa omukulu ow'emizimu egy'omu ibbanga, buti egikolera mu abo abatawulira Katonda." 
Ephesians2:3 N'ife twenatwena twebisanga oti n'abo, mu kwegomba okw'omubiri nga tujiira ku kwenda okw'omubiri n'omwoyo, era okufaanana abantu boonaboona nga tuteekwa okubonerezebwa Katonda." 
Ephesians2:4 Aye Katonda olw'ekisa kye ekyodo n'olw'okugonza einho kw'atugonzaamu," 
Ephesians2:5 waire twali tufiiriire mu bibi byaife, yatwizaamu obulamu ghalala ni Kurisito. Mwalokolebwa lwa kisa kya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:6 Mu Kurisito Yesu, Katonda yatuzuukiza ghalala ni Kurisito oyo, era yaatutyamya mu igulu." 
Ephesians2:7 Yakola ekyo okutwoleka mu byanda ebija okwidha ekisa kye ekitakeruka eri ife, ng'abita mu Kurisito Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Mwalokolebwa lwa kisa kya Katonda mu kwikiriza tikyava mu maani gaimwe, aye kyali kirabo kya Katonda." 
Ephesians2:9 Tikyava mu bikolwa byaimwe, ghalobe kubaagho yeetuusa." 
Ephesians2:10 Kuba ife tuli bitonde bya Katonda, twatondebwa mu Kurisito Yesu tukole ebikolwa ebikalamu Katonda bye yatutegekera okuva eira." 
Ephesians2:11 Mwidhukire nga mwazaalibwa nga muli bamaghanga gandi mu by'omubiri, Abayudaaya baabeeta abatali bakekete, kuba beene beeyeta abakekete, ekintu ekikolebwa abantu n'engalo dhaibwe." 
Ephesians2:12 Olwo mwali muzira kye mwidhi ku Kurisito, nga muli ba ndha era nga timubalibwa mu ba ighanga lya Isiraeli. Era mwali muzira mugabo mu bisuubizo ebiri mu ndagaano dha Katonda. Mwali mu nsi nga muzira kye musuubira, era nga muzira Katonda." 
Ephesians2:13 Aye mperaano mu Kurisito Yesu, imwe abaali nga timumwidhi yabaseesa olw'okufa kwa Kurisito ng'omusengo." 
Ephesians2:14 Oyo n'eyatuleetera emiraala ng'amenha ekimante ekyatwawulangamu buli muntu okweta mwine omuzigu, yaatufuula muntu mulala mu mubiri gwe." 
Ephesians2:15 Yaadibya eiteeka ni byonabyona bye lyalagiranga, atondegho mu mwene, omuntu mulala mu kifo ky'ababiri, olwo aleete emiraala." 
Ephesians2:16 Yaafiira ku musalaba aghange okumalagho enzigu, era atwize eri Katonda nga tuli muntu mulala." 
Ephesians2:17 Kurisito yaidha yaabakobera Amawulire Amalungi ag'emiraala, imwe abaali eghala n'abo abaali okumpi." 
Ephesians2:18 Twenatwena tubita mu mwene nga tuli mu Mwoyo mulala, twaghanga okutuuka ye Lata." 
Ephesians2:19 Agho ni timukaali bagwira oba basenze, aye muli ba nsi ndala n'abatuukirivu, era muli ba mu ndhu ya Katonda" 
Ephesians2:20 kuba mwazimbibwa ku musingi ogw'Abatume n'abalanzi, nga Kurisito Yesu mwene n'eibaale eikulu ery'omu nsonda." 
Ephesians2:21 Ku oyo ekizimbe kyonakyona kwe kiyungirwa, era ni kifuuka eisinzizo lya Musengwa eitukuvu." 
Ephesians2:22 Era mu oyo mwena muzimbibwa mwafuuka endhu ya Katonda mu Mwoyo. 
Ephesians3:1 Ekyo kindeetera nze Paulo, omusibe olwa Kurisito Yesu ku lwaimwe abamaghanga agandi, okubasabira eri Katonda." 
Ephesians3:2 Ndhuuba nti mwawulira nga Katonda olw'ekisa kye yangemya omulimo guno ku lwaimwe. 
Ephesians3:3 Katonda yandholeka naamanha ekyama kye nga bwe nabaghandiikira mu bumpimpi. 
Ephesians3:4 Bwe munaabisoma munaaghanga okubona nga nze bwe ntegeera ekyama eky'entegeka ya Kurisito. 
Ephesians3:5 Mu byanda eby'eira ghazira muntu yeenayeena eyamanhisibwaku ku kino mu nsambo oti n'eno Mwoyo y'akyolekamu Abatume be n'abalanzi be abatukuvu. 
Ephesians3:6 Ekyama ni kino: olw'Amawulire Amalungi, abamaghanga agandi boona baagabana ku birungi ebyo Katonda by'agha Abayudaaya. Baafuuka omuntu mulala mu Kurisito Yesu, era baagabana ku ebyo Katonda bye yabasuubiza mu Kurisito oyo." 
Ephesians3:7 Katonda olw'ekisa kye, yampa ekirabo eky'okubunisa Amawulire Amalungi, ng'amaani ge gakola mu nze." 
Ephesians3:8 Waire nga ninze asembayo mu batuukirivu boonaboona, Katonda yampa omukisa okukobera abamaghanga agandi Amawulire Amalungi, ag'obukombe obuli mu Kurisito obutaloodheka." 
Ephesians3:9 Era n'okumanhisa abantu boonaboona ebifa ku ntegeka, Katonda eyatonda byonabyona ye yali agisiiza okumala ebyanda." 
Ephesians3:10 Mperaano ng'abita mu Kikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, Katonda ayenda amanhise abafuzi n'ab'obukumu abali mu igulu amagezi ge agatakoma." 
Ephesians3:11 Katonda yakola kino ng'ajiira ku kigendererwa eky'ebyanda n'ebyanda era kye yatuukiriza mu Kurisito Yesu Musengwa waife. 
Ephesians3:12 Nga tubita mu Kurisito oyo, olw'okumwikiriza, tuguma twaseeta ye Katonda nga titutya." 
Ephesians3:13 Kyenva mbeeghemba, mulobe kuwaamu maani olw'okubona nga ndaagadaaga ku lwaimwe, kuba ekyo kibagheesa ekitiisa." 
Ephesians3:14 Kyenva ni nkuba amakiryaivu mu maiso ga Lata," 
Ephesians3:15 ebika byonabyona eby'omu igulu n'eby'oku nsi mwe bisimuka. 
Ephesians3:16 Naamusaba olw'ekitiisa ekyodo, abagumye ng'abagha amaani, mule munda, ng'abita mu Mwoyo we," 
Ephesians3:17 Kurisito abe mu myoyo gyaimwe olw'okwikiriza kwaimwe. Musimbire irala emizi mu kugonza era mukalangukiremu. 
Ephesians3:18 Olwo imwe, aghalala n'abatuukirivu boonaboona, musobole okumanha okugonza kwa Kurisito bwe kuli okunene, ate nga kuleeyi, mu bugungumavu, ni mu kwika ghansi." 
Ephesians3:19 Mbasabira mumanhe okugonza okwo okulemye abamanhi boonaboona okumanha, olwo mwidhulire irala Katonda." 
Ephesians3:20 Katonda oyo asobola okukola ebisinga n'ebyo bye tusaba, oba ebyo bye tutegeera, olw'amaani ge agakolera mu ife," 
Ephesians3:21 agheebwe ekitiisa mu Kikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, ni mu Kurisito Yesu, ni mu nse dhoonadhoona, ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Ephesians4:1 Kale nze eyasibwa olw'okugheereza Musengwa, mbeeghemba mwebise mu nsambo egwanira obulamu bwe mwayeterwa." 
Ephesians4:2 Mube bawombeefu, abatali ba ikabyo era abaguminkiriza. Mulage okugonzania kwaimwe, nga buli muntu aguminkiriza mwine." 
Ephesians4:3 Mufube okukalangula okwisa ekirala Mwoyo kw'abagheera mu miraala egibayunga aghalala. 
Ephesians4:4 Omubiri guli mulala, ni Mwoyo mulala, ng'era ekisuubizo kye mwayeterwa bwekiri ekirala." 
Ephesians4:5 Musengwa mulala, okwikiriza kulala n'okubatizibwa kulala" 
Ephesians4:6 Katonda mulala, Lata w'abantu boonaboona, afuga byonabyona, akolera mu byonabyona, era aba mu byonabyona." 
Ephesians4:7 Aye buli mulala mu ife yagheebwa ekirabo eky'endhawulo nga Kurisito bwe yamugerera. 
Ephesians4:8 Ebyaghandiikibwa kye biva ni bikoba biti: “Bwe yaniina eyo ghaigulu, yaatwala abanhage kamaala era yaagha abantu ebirabo.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Okukoba tuti, “yaniina”, kitegeeza ki? Kitegeeza kiti yasooka kwika ghansi mu nsi." 
Ephesians4:10 Oyo eyaika ghansi n'oyo era eyaniina ghaigulu irala, olwo abe ng'aba buli ghantu." 
Ephesians4:11 Era n'oyo eyagha abandi okuba abatume, abandi okuba abalanzi, abandi okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi, abandi okulabirira abantu ba Katonda, n'abandi okuba abeegeresa." 
Ephesians4:12 Ekyo yakikola olw'okutegeka abatuukirivu basobole okukola omulimo ogw'okugheereza, era n'okuzimba omubiri gwa Kurisito," 
Ephesians4:13 okutuusa twenatwena lwe tulituuka okuba omuntu mulala mu kwikiriza ni mu kumanha Omwana wa Katonda. Olwo tukakate mu by'omwoyo, era tube abatuukiriire mu bulamu bwa Kurisito." 
Ephesians4:14 Era tube nga titukaali baana bato abayuuzibwayuuzibwa era abatwalibwa kiisi mpewo ey'endhegeresa y'abantu abaguya, abakiidhamya abandi n'obuguya bwaibwe." 
Ephesians4:15 Aye tube ba mazima mu kugonzania, tukakate mu byonabyona okutuuka ku kubeera irala abatuukiriire mu bulamu bwa Kurisito, omutwe gwaife." 
Ephesians4:16 Kurisito oyo n'aleetera omubiri gwonagwona okuyungibwa, obuyungiro bwonabwona obugulimu bwagugemerera, kiisi kitundu kyagwo kyakola omulimo gwakyo bukalamu. Olwo omubiri gwakula, era gwazimbibwa mu kugonzania." 
Ephesians4:17 Kye nhenda okubakobera, era nga mbasikirira mu Musengwa, ni kino: Mukange agho okwebisa ng'abamaghanga agandi bwe beebisa, nga bajiira ku birowoozo byaibwe ebiziramu." 
Ephesians4:18 Emyoyo gyaibwe giidhwire nzikiiza. Bazira mugabo mu bya bulamu Katonda bw'agaba, kuba baidhwire obutamanha, era emyoyo gyaibwe mikalangafu." 
Ephesians4:19 Tibakaali na nsoni beemaliire mu bya budankaanu, balulunkanira okukola ebibi ebya buli nsambo." 
Ephesians4:20 Aye imwe Kurisito ti bwe mwamwega mutyo. 
Ephesians4:21 Nkakasa nga mwamuwuliraku, era imwe ng'ababe, mwayegeresebwa amazima agali mu Yesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Kale mwesambe obulamu obw'eira bwe mwalimu, obwayoneka n'okwegomba kwabwo okuguya." 
Ephesians4:23 Mwizibwe buyaaka mu myoyo ni mu bidhuubo byaimwe. 
Ephesians4:24 Mufuuke bantu bayaaka, abaatondebwa mu kifaananie kya Katonda mu bwesimbu ni mu butukuvu obw'amazima." 
Ephesians4:25 Agho ni mulekere okuguya buli muntu akobere mwine amazima, kuba tuli bitundu bya mubiri mulala." 
Ephesians4:26 Bwe musungughala, obusungu butabasindikanga mu kwona. Mutagwisanga ndhuba nga mukaasibye obusungu ku mwoyo," 
Ephesians4:27 era mutaghanga Sitaani kaghagaanhia. 
Ephesians4:28 Abaire aiba akange agho, aye afube kukola ng'akozesa emikono gye asobole n'okugabiraku abaavu." 
Ephesians4:29 Eminwa gyaimwe girobenga kwogera bibono bitasaana, aye gyogerenga ebyo byonka ebikalamu ebizimba era ebisaine, bisobole okuleetera ababiwulira emikisa." 
Ephesians4:30 Era mutanakughazanga Mwoyo Mutukuvu wa Katonda, kuba Mwoyo n'akamanhiso ke mwateebwaku okutuuka ku lunaku olw'okununulibwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Mulekeyo enge, ekiruyi, obusungu, okwereega, okuvumagana n'okukyaghagana kwonakwona." 
Ephesians4:32 Aye mubenga ba kisa, buli muntu alumirwenga mwine, era musonighaganenga nga Katonda bwe yabasonigha mu Kurisito." 
Ephesians5:1 Agho ni, nga bwe muli abaana ba Katonda abagonzi, mugezengaku okumufaanana mu bikolwa." 
Ephesians5:2 Era mugonzanienga nga Kurisito bwe yatugonza ni yeeghaayo ye Katonda ku lwaife ng'ekigheebwayo era ng'omusengo oguwunha akawoowo. 
Ephesians5:3 Ng'abatuukirivu bwe bandibaire, bino tibigwaine na kwogerebwa mu imwe: okwenda, obudankaanu, n'okwegomba okubi." 
Ephesians5:4 Era timugwaine kwogera bya buwemu, oba bya busiru, oba ebitabisika mu kanwa, aye mweyanzenga Katonda." 
Ephesians5:5 Mumanhire irala kino muti omwenzi, omudankaanu, oba ali n'okwegomba okubi, azira mugabo mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Kurisito era obwa Katonda; kuba okwegomba okubi kwona kuba kusinza bitali Katonda." 
Ephesians5:6 Batabaguyanga na bibono biziramu, kuba byene ebyo n'ebireetera obusungu bwa Katonda okwidha ku batamuwulira." 
Ephesians5:7 Agho ni muteeyimbanga nabo naire 
Ephesians5:8 kuba eira mwali mu nzikiiza, aye okuva lwe muli bantu ba Musengwa, muli ba butangaavu. Kale mutambule ng'abantu abali mu butangaavu," 
Ephesians5:9 omuva ebirungi byonabyona, obutuufu n'amazima." 
Ephesians5:10 Mufubenga okumanha ekisangaaza Musengwa. 
Ephesians5:11 Muteeyimbanga mu kukola bintu bya mu nzikiiza ebiziramu nsa abantu bye bakola, aye mubyatuukirizenga." 
Ephesians5:12 Kuba ebyo bye bakola mu ngiso bigemya ensoni n'okubyogeraku. 
Ephesians5:13 Aye ekintu kyonakyona bwe kireetebwa mu butangaavu, kibonekera irala nga bwekiri, kuba ekyo kyonakyona ekiboneka kiba kiri mu butangaavu." 
Ephesians5:14 Kyebava bakoba bati: “Zuuka iwe atendwike, zuukira ove mu bafu, Kurisito aidha kukwakira.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Kale mwegendereze bwe mwebisa mulobe kuba ng'abazira magezi aye mube ng'abagezi. 
Ephesians5:16 Buli kaseera ke muli nako mukakozese bukalamu, kuba enaku dhino mbi." 
Ephesians5:17 Kale mutabanga basiru aye mumanhenga Musengwa ky'ayenda mukole. 
Ephesians5:18 Mutairanga mu kutamiira mwenge ogwidha okubaitaitana, aye mwidhule Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Ephesians5:19 Mu kughaya mukozesenga Zabbuli, n'enhembo, edhisaaka Katonda, nga mwembera Musengwa n'omwoyo mulala." 
Ephesians5:20 Buliidho mweyanzenga Katonda Iseife olwa byonabyona, nga mubita mu Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito." 
Ephesians5:21 Buli muntu awulirenga mwine olw'okwisaamu Kurisito ekitiisa. 
Ephesians5:22 Abakazi muwulirenga baibaimwe ng'oti ni bwe muwulira Musengwa," 
Ephesians5:23 kuba omusaadha n'omutwe gwa mukazi we, nga Kurisito bw'ali omutwe ogw'ekikunsu eky'abamwikiriza ekyo n'omubiri gwe, era mwene oyo n'Omulokozi waakyo." 
Ephesians5:24 Ng'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito bwe kiwulira Kurisito, n'abakazi bwe bagwaine okuwuliranga baibaibwe mu byonabyona." 
Ephesians5:25 Imwe abasaadha mugonzenga bakazi baimwe, nga Kurisito bwe yagonza Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ni yeeghaayo ku lwa kyo." 
Ephesians5:26 Yaakitukuza ng'akinaaza n'amaadhi n'ekibono," 
Ephesians5:27 olwo yeefunira Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'ekitiisa ekiri ng'omuntu aziraku kamyamya na nkokyo waire ekintu ekindi ekiri ng'oti n'ebyo, aye ekitukuvu era ekiziraku kikibulaku." 
Ephesians5:28 N'abasaadha batyo bwe bagwaniire okugonza bakazi baibwe, nga bwe bagonza emibiri gyaibwe. Omusaadha agonza mukazi we aba yeegonza mwene." 
Ephesians5:29 Kuba ghazira muntu akyagha mubiri gwe, aye aguliisa, agulabirira, nga Kurisito bw'alabirira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito," 
Ephesians5:30 kuba tuli bitundu bya mubiri gwe. 
Ephesians5:31 Ng'ebyaghandiikibwa bwe bikoba biti: “Omusaadha ky'anaavanga aleka ise n'inhina n'ayimbibwa ni mukazi we, bombi ni bafuuka muntu mulala.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Ekyama kino kikulu, era nze nkoba nti kyogera ku Kurisito n'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
Ephesians5:33 Aye n'imwe mwena, buli musaadha agonzenga mukazi we, nga bwe yeegonza mwene, era n'omukazi atenga mu iba ekinhagansi." 
Ephesians6:1 Abaana, abazaire baimwe mubawulirenga mu Musengwa, kuba ekyo n'ekigwaine." 
Ephesians6:2 “Lata wo n'inhoko obatangamu ekinhagansi.” Kino n'ekiragiro ekisooka ekirimu ekisuubizo ekikoba kiti: 
Ephesians6:3 “Lw'onaasobola okuba obukalamu era n'okughangaala ku nsi.” 
Ephesians6:4 Imwe abazaire, mutasoononkerezanga baana baimwe kubaleetera kunakughala, aye mubakuze nga mubagalagira era nga mubeegeresa ebya Musengwa." 
Ephesians6:5 Abairu mwisenga inho ekitiisa mu basengwa baimwe ab'oku nsi, era mubawulirenga mu mwoyo oguziramu buguya, nga bwe mwandiwuliire Kurisito." 
Ephesians6:6 Ekyo mutakikolanga lwa bantu kubabona, babasiime, aye mukolenga nga Katonda bw'ayenda n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona, ng'abagheereza ba Kurisito." 
Ephesians6:7 Mukolerenga mu mwoyo mukalamu ng'oti n'abakolera Musengwa, aye ti ng'abakolera abantu." 
Ephesians6:8 Mumanhe muti buli muntu, oba mwiru oba ti mwiru, Musengwa alimusasula buli kikalamu ky'akola." 
Ephesians6:9 N'imwe basengwa b'abairu, mwena mubisenga mutyo abairu baimwe, nga timubeesoomera. Mumanhe muti oyo Musengwa waibwe era owaimwe, ali mu igulu era oyo tasaliriza." 
Ephesians6:10 Ekisembayo, mube bagumu mu Musengwa, n'obuyinza bwe obw'amaani." 
Ephesians6:11 Mukozesenga eby'okulwanisa bya Katonda, musobole okutala nga Sitaani abalumbye n'obukodyo bwe;" 
Ephesians6:12 kuba tituli kulwana na bantu buntu aye tuli kulwana n'emizimu emibi egy'omu ibbanga kamaala. Tuli kulwana n'abafuzi n'ab'obukumu, n'emisambwa egy'omu luse luno olw'ekizikiiza." 
Ephesians6:13 Kale ni mutoole eby'okulwanisa byonabyona ebya Katonda, mughange okuguma ku lunaku omuzigu lw'abalumba, era bwe mulimaliriza okulwana okutuuka ku nkomerero, musigale nga muli bagumu." 
Ephesians6:14 Mwemerere nga muli bagumu, ng'amazima n'olusibiro lwe mwesibye mu nkende, ate obutuufu nga n'ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba eky'ekyuma." 
Ephesians6:15 Okuba abeetegefu okulangirira Amawulire Amalungi, agaleeta emiraala, kubabeere ng'engaito mu bigere byaimwe." 
Ephesians6:16 Mugemerere okwikiriza kubabeere engabo, musobole okuzimya obusaale bwonabwona obw'omuliro obulasibwa Omubi." 
Ephesians6:17 Muvaale obulokofu ng'enkuufiira ey'ekyuma, mugeme ekibono kya Katonda ng'empiima Mwoyo y'abagha." 
Ephesians6:18 Buliidho musabenga, nga Mwoyo bw'anaabanga abagalagiire. Mubenga beetegefu nga timwiririra, musabirenga abatuukirivu boonaboona." 
Ephesians6:19 Zeena munsabire, bwe naabanga nga ndhogera, mpeebwe eby'okwogera, era mbyogere nga titya, nga mmanhisa abantu ekyama eky'Amawulire Amalungi." 
Ephesians6:20 Ndi mukwenda wa Mawulire ago Amalungi waire ndi mu ikomera. Munsabire ndobe kutya mu kugamanhisa abantu nga bwe kigwaniire. 
Ephesians6:21 Tukiko, owoluganda omugonzi era omugheereza omwesigwa mu Musengwa, aidha kubakobera byonabyona, mumanhe ebinfaaku ni bye ndi kukola." 
Ephesians6:22 Kye nviire ni mmutuma ye muli, mumanhe bwe tuli, era abagumye emyoyo." 
Ephesians6:23 Katonda Iseife ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito, aghe aboluganda boonaboona emiraala n'okugonza n'okwikiriza." 
Ephesians6:24 Enkabi dha Katonda dhibe n'abo boonaboona abagonza Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito n'okugonza okutakoma. 
Philippians1:1 Ninze Paulo ni Timotheo abagheereza ba Kurisito Yesu. Tughandiikiire abatuukirivu boonaboona abaisa ekirala mu Kurisito Yesu abali e Filippi, n'abalabirizi n'abagheereza." 
Philippians1:2 Katonda Lata waife ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito abaghe enkabi n'emiraala. 
Philippians1:3 Nsiima Katonda wange kiisi lwe mbadhuuba. 
Philippians1:4 Kiisi lwe mba nga mbasabira mwenamwena, nsaba nga ndi musangaavu" 
Philippians1:5 olw'ensambo ye mumbeeraku mu kukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi, okuviira irala ku lunaku lwe natoolera, okutuusa ni ye buli eno." 
Philippians1:6 Era nkakasa bukalamu ng'oyo eyatoolera omulimo guno omukalamu mu imwe aligutuusa ku kumalirizibwa ku lunaku lwa Yesu Kurisito. 
Philippians1:7 Ndi mutuufu okubalowoozaaku ntyo mwenamwena kuba mundi ku mwoyo, ate era kuba mugabanira ghalala ninze ku kisa kya Katonda, ka kibe mu busibe bwange mu ikomera, oba mu kulwanirira n'okukakasa Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philippians1:8 Katonda n'omudhulirwa wange akakasa nga bwe mbalumirwa omwoyo mwenamwena mu kugonza kwa Kurisito Yesu. 
Philippians1:9 Era mbasabira okugonza kwaimwe kuje nga kweyongera, era mube n'amagezi n'okumanha kwonakwona." 
Philippians1:10 Olwo mube nga musobola okulondagho ekyo ekisinga bukalamu, mube abaamufu era abaziraku musango ku lunaku lwa Kurisito." 
Philippians1:11 Obulamu bwaimwe bwidhule ebikolwa ebikalamu ebiidha nga bibita mu Yesu Kurisito olw'okugheesa Katonda ekitiisa n'olw'okumusaaka. 
Philippians1:12 Aboluganda, nhenda mumanhe ng'ebyo ebintuuseeku byongeire okuyamba Amawulire Amalungi okusansaana." 
Philippians1:13 Kuba abaisirukale boonaboona ab'omu kisaagaati n'abandi boonaboona, kibaleeteire okumanha ng'okusibwa kwange baananga Kurisito." 
Philippians1:14 Era aboluganda kamaala bongeire okwekakasa mu Katonda olw'okusibwa kwange, era beeyongera okuguma okwogera ekibono kya Musengwa nga tibatya." 
Philippians1:15 Mu butuufu ghaligho abakobera abantu ebigema ku Kurisito olw'ensaalwa n'okwenda okusinganwa ninze, aye abandi bakikola mu mwoyo mukalamu." 
Philippians1:16 Bano babikola mu kugonza nga baidhi nga nateebwa ghano lwa kulwanirira Amawulire Amalungi. 
Philippians1:17 Aye bale ab'ensaalwa bakobera abantu ebigema ku Kurisito mu buguya, olw'ebyo bye bafunamu beene nga badhuuba bati baidha kwongera okuunumya mu busibe bwe ndimu."
