Philippians1:18 Aye ekyo tikiinumya! Ndi musangaavu kuba abantu bakoberwa ebigema ku Kurisito mu nsambo yoonayoona ebaagho, k'ebe mu buguya oba mu butuufu." 
Philippians1:19 Era ndidha kuja mu maiso n'okuba omusangaavu, kuba ndidhi nga olw'okusaba kwaimwe n'olw'okuyambibwa kwa Mwoyo wa Yesu Kurisito ndidha kulekulwa." 
Philippians1:20 Kye nandyenze einho era kye nsuubira n'ekyo nti ndobe kuswala naire, aye mpeesenga Kurisito ekitiisa mu bulamu bwange nga ndi mugumu inho, mperaano ni buliidho, ni bwe mba omulamu, oba ni bwe nfa." 
Philippians1:21 Ku lwange, obulamu ni Kurisito, ate okufa gaba magoba." 
Philippians1:22 Aye oba nga okuba n'obulamu mu mubiri kitegeeza kwongera kukola mirimo giganhula, agho timanha bukalamu kya kulondaku." 
Philippians1:23 Endhuyi dhombi dhimpaluza. Aye nga kye nhenda einho, n'okuva mu bulamu buno nje mbe ni Kurisito, kuba ekyo n'ekisingira irala bukalamu." 
Philippians1:24 Aye okusigala mu mubiri n'ekisinga kuganhula ye imwe. 
Philippians1:25 Nga nkakasa nti kino kityo bwekiri, ndidhi nti ndidha kusigala n'imwe mu mubiri mughange okusangaala n'okuja mu maiso mu kwikiriza Kurisito." 
Philippians1:26 Bwe ndiba nga ndi n'imwe kabiri, mulighanga okwenhumiriza mu Kurisito Yesu ku lwange." 
Philippians1:27 Ekikulu kiri nti mu bulamu bwaimwe mwebise nga bwe kigwaniire ababunia Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito. Agho ni oba ndidha okubabona oba tiidha, mbe nga mpulira nti mwekalangwire, muli muntu mulala, era nga kye munuyirira kiri kirala okulwanirira okwikiriza Amawulire Amalungi" 
Philippians1:28 aghazira kutiisibwa bazigu baimwe mu nsambo yoonayoona. Kano n'akamanhiso ka Katonda akabooleka nga baja kuzikirizibwa, ate akooleka imwe nga muja kulokolebwa." 
Philippians1:29 Kuba mwagheebwa enkabi okwikiriza Kurisito era n'okudaagadaaga ku lulwe. 
Philippians1:30 Mwena mube ku lutalo n'olulala nga lwe mwambona nga nwana, era lwe muwulira nga nkaaluliku." 
Philippians2:1 Okuba mu Kurisito kibagumya? Okugonza kwe kubagha amaani? Mwisa ekirala ni Mwoyo wa Kurisito? Buli muntu agemerwa mwine ekisa era yaamusaasira? 
Philippians2:2 Agho ni mwidhuulirize irala eisanhu lyange nga mulowooza bulala, nga mugonzania bulala, era mube muntu mulala mu mwoyo ni mubigendererwa." 
Philippians2:3 Timukolanga kintu kyonakyona nga mwefaaku mwenka oba olw'okwenda bababone babasaake. Aye mu kwefeebya buli muntu atwale abandi nga n'abamusinga. 
Philippians2:4 Omuntu tagwaine kukola ku byetaago bibye byonka, aye agwaine akole ni ku by'abandi." 
Philippians2:5 Mube n'omwoyo ng'oti ni Kurisito Yesu gwe yali nagwo: 
Philippians2:6 “Mu nkula ye yoonayoona yali Katonda, aye tiyakitwala ng'ateekwa okwekakadika ku kwagayaga ni Katonda." 
Philippians2:7 Mu kifo ky'ekyo, mwene yeetoolaku ekitiisa kye kyonakyona kyeyendere, yaafuuka mugheereza. yaazaalibwa ng'omuntu, yaaba mu kifaananie eky'omuntu." 
Philippians2:8 Ng'amaze okufuuka omuntu, yeefeebya era yaaba muwulize okutuuka ku kufa, ate okufiira ku musalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Katonda kyeyava n'amugha ekitiisa ekya ghaigulu, era n'amugha eriina erisinga amaina goonagoona." 
Philippians2:10 Olwo kiisi kiri mu igulu, ni mu nsi, ni mu itaka, kikubire eriina lya Yesu amakiryaivu." 
Philippians2:11 Era kiisi lulimi lwatule luti: Yesu Kurisito ni Musengwa. Olwo Katonda era Lata agheebwe ekitiisa.” 
Philippians2:12 Agho ni bakagwa, nga bwe mwali abawulize buliidho nga ndi n'imwe, ni mperaano nga tiri n'imwe musingegho okuba abawulize, olwo mube nga mukolerera okulokolebwa kwaimwe nga mutya era nga mudhugumira." 
Philippians2:13 Kuba Katonda n'akolera mu imwe memale mwaganha era mwasobola okukola by'ayenda. 
Philippians2:14 Buli kye mukola mukikole nga timutolooma oba okutakana," 
Philippians2:15 olwo mubuleku omusango oba ekintu kyonakyona ekiboogezaaku obubi. Mube abaana ba Katonda abatuukiriire nga muli mu bantu ab'oluse luno ababi era abaayonooneka. Mubaakiremu ng'oti mataala mu nsi muno. 
Philippians2:16 Mukalangule ekibono eky'obulamu memale ku lunaku lwa Kurisito nsobole okwenhumiriza nti amaani n'okufaabiikana kwange tibyafa busa. 
Philippians2:17 Omusaayi gwange ni bwe guyuyibwa ni gutabulwa n'omusengo gwe mughaayo olw'okwikiriza kwaimwe, nsangaala era nsagambira ghalala n'imwe mwenamwena." 
Philippians2:18 Mu nsambo n'endala, mwena mugwaine okusangaala n'okusagambira aghalala ninze." 
Philippians2:19 Musengwa Yesu bw'aliba ng'ayenze, ndhuuba okutuma Timotheo aidhe ye muli mangu ankobere ebibafaaku, omwoyo guntereere." 
Philippians2:20 Oyo ni yenka ali n'omwoyo ng'ogwange, abalumirwa mu buli nsambo." 
Philippians2:21 Abandi bafa ku byaibwe byonka, tibafa ku bya Yesu Kurisito." 
Philippians2:22 Aye omugaso gwa Timotheo mugwidhi bukalamu, mwidhi bwe tubairenga nga tusansaania naye Amawulire Amalungi, ng'oti n'omwana n'ise bwe bandikoze." 
Philippians2:23 Kale kyenva ndi kusuubira okumutuma amangu, nga mmaze okumanha bino bwe binanjiira." 
Philippians2:24 Era nga neesiga Musengwa nsuubira nti zeena mwene ndidha kwidha mu ntangama etali ya ghala. 
Philippians2:25 Nkiboine nga kyetaagisa okutuma Epafurodito ye muli, muganda wange, mukozi munange era mulwani munange, ye mwampeereza okuunhambangaku mu byetaago byange." 
Philippians2:26 Kuba omwoyo gubaire gumuluma inho okubabonaku mwenamwena, era abairenga n'enaku ku mwoyo olw'okuba mwawulira bwe yalwala." 
Philippians2:27 Bwenebwene yalwalira irala na kumpi kufa. Aye Katonda yamusaasira ate tiyasaasira mwene yenka aye ninze, kuba enaku yange yandyeyongeireku." 
Philippians2:28 Kye nviire ni nhenda einho okumutuma ye muli musobole kabiri okusangaala olw'okumubonaku, ate zeena enaku yange ekendeere." 
Philippians2:29 Kale mumusangaalire inho ng'owoluganda mu Musengwa. Era abantu abali ng'oti n'oyo mubatengamu ekinhagansi," 
Philippians2:30 kuba yeeghaayo olw'omulimo gwa Kurisito, era kata afe ng'ali kugezaaku okutuukiriza ekyo kye mwamuntumira." 
Philippians3:1 Ekisembayo baganda bange, musagambirenga mu Musengwa. Tifaayo kwiramu kubaghandiikira ku bintu byene ebyo, era muganhulwa bwe nkikola." 
Philippians3:2 Mwekuume abakozi ab'ebibi abeesala omubiri, edho mbwa dheene." 
Philippians3:3 Kuba niife abaafuna okukeketebwa okutuufu, abasinza Katonda nga Mwoyo we bw'atugalagira, abasagambira mu kwisa ekirala mu Kurisito Yesu, era abatata bwesige mu bya mubiri." 
Philippians3:4 Nze mwene ndi n'ensonga entuufu edhandinteesiiza obwesige mu bikolebwa ku mubiri guno. Oba nga eriyo alowooza okuba n'ensonga edhimuteesa obwesige mu bikolebwa ku mubiri guno, edhange n'edhisinga" 
Philippians3:5 kuba nze nakeketebwa nga naakamala enaku munaana. Ndi Muisiraeli, ndi mu kika kya Benjamini Omuheburayi mwene. Mu kugema amateeka ndi Mufarisaayo." 
Philippians3:6 Nali nga nhiinkiira okukiriga Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ate mu butuufu obuva mu kugema amateeka, nga nziraku nsobi." 
Philippians3:7 Aye oba nga nafunamu eigoba lyonalyona, eigoba eryo buti ndibala nti kwali kufiirwa ku lwa Kurisito." 
Philippians3:8 Bwenebwene ebintu byonabyona mbibona ng'okufiirwa, olw'omuganhulo ogubisinga einho oguli mu kumanha Kurisito Yesu Musengwa. Ku lulwe naleka ebintu byonabyona, era mbibona ng'ebitagasa olw'okufuna Kurisito ng'empeera yange," 
Philippians3:9 olwo nsobole okumweyimbiraku irala. Tikaali na butuufu bwange ku bwange obuva mu kugema amateeka. Mperaano ndi n'obutuufu obuva mu kwikiriza Kurisito, obutuufu obuva ye Katonda era obuva mu kwikiriza." 
Philippians3:10 Era nhenda okumumanha amaani ag'okuzuukira kwe, n'okudaazibwadaazibwa nga mwene bwe yadaazibwadaazibwa, era n'okumufaanana mu kufa kwe." 
Philippians3:11 Era nga nsuubira zeena okuzuukira mu bafu. 
Philippians3:12 Tikoba nti naghangula, oba nti namala okutuukirira aye neekalangula okufuna ekyo Kurisito Yesu kye yavaaku okunfuula owuwe." 
Philippians3:13 Aboluganda, ndidhi nga nkaali kukifuna, aye kye nkola n'okwerabira ebiri einhuma wange naanuyirira ebyo ebindi emberi." 
Philippians3:14 Neekalangula okutuuka ku kigendererwa, nfune ekirabo eky'obulamu obw'omu igulu Katonda kye yandhetera mu Kurisito Yesu." 
Philippians3:15 Twenatwena abakuze mu by'omwoyo tugwaine okuba n'ebidhuubo oti n'ebyo. Aye oba ng'abandi ku imwe muli n'ebidhuubo ebindi, Katonda aja kukibooleka bukalamu." 
Philippians3:16 Aye ekikulu tweyongere okujiira ku nkola ye tubairengaku okutuusa mperaano. 
Philippians3:17 Aboluganda, mukolenga nga nze bwe nkola, era mugenderere abo abajiira ku by'okuboneraku ebituufu bye twabateeragho." 
Philippians3:18 Kuba, nga bwe mbaire ntera okubakoberaku, era ni mperaano ndhiramu okubakobera nga ndira n'amaziga. Ghaligho abantu kamaala abafuuse abazigu ab'okufa kwa Kurisito ku musalaba olw'ensambo ye beebisaamu." 
Philippians3:19 Ekirisembayo eky'abantu abo kuliba kuzikirira, kuba katonda ye basinza, n'enda dhaibwe. Beesaaka olw'ebyo ebyandibaswaziiza era balowooza bya ku nsi kuno byonka." 
Philippians3:20 Aye ife obutaka bwaife buli mu igulu, era tulindirira nga twesunga Omulokozi alivaayo, Musengwa Yesu Kurisito." 
Philippians3:21 Ono n'alikyusa emibiri gyaife eminafu era egifa n'agifuula ng'oti n'ogugwe ogw'ekitiisa, ng'akozesa amaani agamusobozesa okuta ebintu byonabyona mu bufuzi bwe." 
Philippians4:1 Agho ni aboluganda abagonzi era abatanva ku mwoyo, neegomba inho okuba n'imwe aghalala, kuba niimwe eisanhu lyange era niimwe okwenhumiriza kwange. Bakagwa, obwo n'obulamu bwe mube mwekalanguliremu mu Musengwa." 
Philippians4:2 Ewodia ni Suntuke, mbeeghembye mwisanie mu kuwulira Musengwa." 
Philippians4:3 Era weena mukozi munange omwesigwa nkweghemba oyambe abakazi abo, kuba baakola inho ninze mu kusansaania Amawulire Amalungi. Era nga batyo bwe baali ni Kelementi, era ni bakozi banange abandi, beene maina agali mu kitabo kya Katonda eky'obulamu." 
Philippians4:4 Buliidho musagambirenga mu Musengwa. Era kabiri nkiiramu nti Musagambe! 
Philippians4:5 Mutabanga baghaaghaavu ya muntu yeenayeena. Musengwa ali kumpi. 
Philippians4:6 Muteeraliikiriranga olw'ekintu kyonakyona, aye buli lwe musabanga mumanhise Katonda ebyetaago byaimwe byonabyona, era buli kiseera mumusabenga n'emyoyo egisiima." 
Philippians4:7 Era n'emiraala gya Katonda egiswikiriire okumanha kwonakwona gikuume emyoyo n'amagezi gaimwe mu Kurisito Yesu. 
Philippians4:8 Ekisembayo, aboluganda, ebidhuubo byaimwe mubite ku bintu ebikalamu era ebigwaine okusaakibwa bino: ebituufu, ebigwaine okugheebwa ekitiisa, ebigwaine okukolebwa, ebitukuvu, ebigonzebwa era ebyegombebwa." 
Philippians4:9 Era mukolenga ebyo bye nabeegeresa, era ni bye nabagemya mu bibono byange era ni mu bye nakolanga. Era Katonda mwene kugha miraala aidha kubanga n'imwe." 
Philippians4:10 Ndi musangaavu inho mu Musengwa okubona nti olumaliira olw'ekiseera ekireeyi, kabiri mwizeemu okwoleka nga bwe muunumirwa. Ndidhi nti bwene mubaire muunumirwa nga aye muzira bwa kaghagaanhia kakyoleka." 
Philippians4:11 Tiri kukoba ntyo lwa kuba ndi mu bwetaavu, kuba kiisi mbeera yoonayoona ye mbaamu, nayega okwenaliza." 
Philippians4:12 Ndidhi okuba omwavu ni ki, era n'okuba omukombe ni ki. Nayega ekyama eky'okwenaliza mu buli kintu era na buli ghantu, ka kube kwiguta oba kulumwa ndhala, kuba na bintu kyodo oba kubula kantu naire." 
Philippians4:13 Nsobola okugumira byonabyona olw'amaani Kurisito g'ampa. 
Philippians4:14 Aye mwakola bukalamu okundhiruukirira mu bizibu byange. 
Philippians4:15 Era imwe beene ab'e Filippi mukiidhi bukalamu nti bwe nava e Makedonia mu kwinhama okubunia Amawulire Amalungi mu Bikunsu by'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, ghazira kikunsu kindi kyampa buyambi bwonabwona ni mbufuna, okutoolaku imwe mwenka." 
Philippians4:16 Kuba ni bwe nali mu Thessalonika era mwampeereza obuyambi emikuzi egisinga omulala. 
Philippians4:17 Ekigendererwa kyange ti kya kufuna bwa birabo aye kya kubona ng'ebikalamu bye mukoze byeyongeraku obungi. 
Philippians4:18 Ebintu byonabyona mbifunie mu bwidhuvu, bisingaku ni bye neetaaga. Mperaano buli kintu kye neetaaga ndi nakyo okuva Epafurodito bwe yampa ebyo bye mwantonera nga biri ng'omusengo oguwunhira Katonda akawoowo, gw'asiima era ogumusangaaza." 
Philippians4:19 Era Katonda wange aidha kubagha buli kintu kyonakyona kye mwetaaga, ng'atoola ku bukombe bwe obw'ekitiisa bw'agaba ng'abita mu Kurisito Yesu." 
Philippians4:20 Ekitiisa kibenga kya Katonda waife era Lata waife ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina. 
Philippians4:21 Mulamuse buli mutuukirivu mu Kurisito Yesu. Aboluganda abali ghano ninze babalamwisa. 
Philippians4:22 Abatuukirivu boonaboona babalamwisa, okusingira irala abo abali mu kisaagaati kya Kaisari." 
Philippians4:23 Enkabi dha Musengwa Yesu Kurisito dhibe n'imwe. 
Colossians1:1 Ninze Paulo omutume wa Kurisito Yesu olw'okwenda kwa Katonda, aghalala n'owoluganda Timotheo." 
Colossians1:2 Mpandiikira abatuukirivu n'aboluganda abeesigwa mu Kurisito ab'e Kolosai. Enkabi n'emiraala ebya Katonda Iseife bibe n'imwe. 
Colossians1:3 Buli kaakyeire twebaza Katonda Lata wa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito nga tubasabira," 
Colossians1:4 kuba twawulira okwikiriza kwe muli nakwo mu Kurisito Yesu, n'okugonza kwe mugonzaamu abatuukirivu boonaboona" 
Colossians1:5 olw'ebyo bye musuubira, ebyabakuumirwa mu igulu. Bino mwabiwuliraku mu bibono eby'amazima, Amawulire Amalungi." 
Colossians1:6 Amawulire gano agaabakoberwa era agaakoberwa ensi yoonayoona, galeese ebibala ng'oti ni bwe gabaire gakola mu imwe okuva ku lunaku lwe mwawulira era ni mumanha ekisa kya Katonda mu mazima." 
Colossians1:7 Mwakyega okuva ku Epafura mugheereza munaife era ye tugonza einho, omugheereza wa Kurisito omwesigwa ku lwaife." 
Colossians1:8 Era n'eyatukobera okugonza kwe muli nakwo, Mwoyo kw'abagha." 
Colossians1:9 Olw'ekyo, kyetuva ni tubasabira buliidho okuva lwe twawulira ebibafaaku, nga tusaba Katonda abaghe mu bwidhuvu okumanha by'ayenda era abaghe amagezi n'okutegeera byonabyona Mwoyo we by'agaba." 
Colossians1:10 Agho musobole okwebisa nga Musengwa bw'ayenda era nga mukola ebimusangaaza mu buli nsambo nga kiisi kye mukola kikalamu era nga kyania ebibala, era mweyongere n'okumanha Katonda." 
Colossians1:11 Mukalanguke olw'amaani goonagoona agaabagheebwa okuva mu bukumu bwe obw'ekitiisa, mughange okugumira buli kintu n'obuguminkiriza era n'okusagamba." 
Colossians1:12 Mweyanzenga Lata eyatugwaniza okuba aghalala n'abatuukirivu mu butangaavu. 
Colossians1:13 Yatutoola mu bufuge obw'ekizikiiza yaatwiza mu Bwakyabazinga obw'Omwana we omugonzi. 
Colossians1:14 Mu oyo mwe tufunira okununulibwa era n'okusoniyibwa ebibi. 
Colossians1:15 Kurisito ye tuboneramu Katonda ataboneka, omwana omuberi akulira ebitonde byonabyona." 
Colossians1:16 Mu oyo ebintu byonabyona mwe byatonderwa: Ebiri mu igulu, ebiri mu nsi, ebiboneka, n'ebitaboneka. Ka bibe bityamo bya bakyabazinga oba bakyabazinga beene, oba abaami oba ab'obuyinza ebintu byonabyona byatonderwa mu oyo, era ku lulwe." 
Colossians1:17 Oyo yaligho ng'ebintu byonabyona bikaali kubaagho era mu oyo ebintu byonabyona bibaagho. 
Colossians1:18 Oyo n'omutwe ate Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito n'omubiri gwe, oyo n'entoolerezo era n'omwigula nda mu kuzuukira memale abe emberi wa byonabyona." 
Colossians1:19 Kuba Katonda mwene yasiima mu kwenda kwe Obwakatonda bwe bube mu oyo mu bwidhuvu," 
Colossians1:20 era abite mu oyo okwiza ebintu byonabyona y'ali ka bibe ebiri mu igulu oba ebiri ku nsi. Katonda atyo bwe yaleeta emiraala ng'abita mu kufa kw'Omwana we ku musalaba. 
Colossians1:21 Eira mwali ghala ni Katonda, era nga muli bazigu be olw'ebidhuubo byaimwe n'ebikolwa ebibi bye mwakolanga." 
Colossians1:22 Aye mperaano olw'okufa kwa Kurisito mu mubiri, yabafuula bakagwa be, musobole okuba mu maiso ge nga muli batukuvu, abaziraku kimyamya kyonakyona era waire kibi kyonakyona." 
Colossians1:23 Aye niini, muli n'okuba n'okwikiriza nga mwekalangwire aghazira kwekyusa, era nga timuviire ku kusuubira okw'Amawulire Amalungi ge mwawulira. Zeena Paulo nafuuka mugheereza w'Amawulire gano agaakoberwa buli kitonde kyonakyona ekiri ghansi gh'eigulu." 
Colossians1:24 Ndi musangaavu buti olw'okudaaga kwe ndaaga ku lwaimwe, era mu mubiri gwange nhambaku okumaliriza ebyo ebyasigalira mu kudaazibwadaazibwa kwa Kurisito ku lw'omubiri gwe. Omubiri gwe guno n'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
Colossians1:25 Katonda yanfuula omugheereza ow'ekikunsu kino ku lwaimwe mbaleetere ekibono kye mu bwidhuvu. 
Colossians1:26 Okubamanhisa ekyama ekyali kigisiibwa ebyanda n'ense, aye buti ekyabwikulirwa abatuukirivu be." 
Colossians1:27 Abo Katonda be yasiima okumanhisa obukombe obw'ekitiisa obuli mu kyama ekyo, mu bamaghanga agandi. Ekyama ekyo ni Kurisito ali mu imwe era eisuubi ery'ekitiisa ekiri kwidha." 
Colossians1:28 Oyo, ife ye tukobera buli muntu. Tulabula era twegeresa buli muntu mu magezi goonagoona tughange okuleeta buli muntu ewa Katonda ng'atuukiriire mu Kurisito." 
Colossians1:29 Kino kye ntakabanira era ni nfaabiikana, mwene nga n'akolera mu nze n'amaani ge." 
Colossians2:1 Nhenda mumanhe bwe nfaabiikana einho, ku lwaimwe era ni ku lw'abo abali e Laodikea, ni ku lw'abo abatambonangaku boonaboona." 
Colossians2:2 Kino nkikola bairemu amaani mu myoyo gyaibwe era babe mu kugonzania, bamanhire irala era bategeerere irala ekyama kya Katonda. Ekyama ekyo nga ni Kurisito." 
Colossians2:3 Oyo n'atumanhisa amagezi goonagoona n'okumanha kwonakwona ebiri ng'oti n'eky'obukombe ekyagisibwa. 
Colossians2:4 Ndi kubakobera ebyo ghabule abaguya ng'abakobera ebibono ebisendasenda. 
Colossians2:5 Waire tiri n'imwe mu mubiri, aye ndi n'imwe mu mwoyo, era okusangaala kwange kuli mu kubona nga mwegemye kimonte, mwekalangula ku kuba n'okwikiriza mu Kurisito." 
Colossians2:6 Kale nga bwe mwaikiriza Kurisito Yesu okuba Musengwa waimwe, mube naye mu bulamu bwaimwe." 
Colossians2:7 Mwegemere irala ku oyo, era obulamu bwaimwe mubuzimbe ku oyo, era mwongeremu amaani mu kwikiriza kwaimwe, nga bwe mwayegeresebwa nga timukoogha kwebaza." 
Colossians2:8 Mubone nga tighabaagho muntu yeenayeena abafuula bairu, ng'akozesa ebidhuubo eby'abagezigezi n'obuguya obuli mu mpisa dh'abantu, ni mu mizimu egitwalibwa nga n'egifuga ensi eno. Ebintu bino tibiva wa Kurisito." 
Colossians2:9 Kuba mu Kurisito n'omuli Obwakatonda bwonabwona mu buntu," 
Colossians2:10 era imwe mwe mwagheerwa obulamu obwidhuvu. Kurisito oyo n'omukulu w'obufuzi era n'obukumu bwonabwona. 
Colossians2:11 Era mu Kurisito oyo mwakeketebwa, ti n'okukeketebwa kuno okukolebwa abantu, aye n'okukeketebwa kwa Kurisito okuleetera omuntu okuva mu kufugibwa ekibi." 
Colossians2:12 Mu kubatizibwa mwaziikibwa ghalala naye, era mwazuukizibwa ghalala naye, olw'okwikiriza kwaimwe kwe muli nakwo mu maani ga Katonda eyamuzuukiza okuva mu bafu." 
Colossians2:13 Era imwe abaali abafu olw'okuba mu bibi byaimwe, era n'olw'obutaba bakekete mu mibiri gyaimwe, Katonda yabafuula abalamu ni Kurisito, nga amaze okutusonigha twenatwena ebibi byaife." 
Colossians2:14 Ng'amaze okusazaamu endagaano ey'ebitubandhibwa, ni byonabyona ebyali bitusiba mu ndagaano eyo eyali etuli obubi, yaagitoolagho yaagikomerera ku musalaba." 
Colossians2:15 Era ku musalaba okwo byonabyona ebyali n'obukumu era n'obufuzi yabitutoolaku, era yaayoleka obughanguzi bwe mu lwatu." 
Colossians2:16 Kale ole atabasaliranga musango olw'ekyo kye mulya oba kye munhwa, oba ku lw'ebyo ebigema ku bibinuko eby'eby'ensinza, oba eby'Okuboneka kw'Omwezi, oba Sabbato." 
Colossians2:17 Ebyo byonabyona binsense bunsense eby'ebyo ebyali biri n'okubaagho mu maiso, aye ekirimu omuganhulo ni Kurisito." 
Colossians2:18 Ghatabangagho ababuza ng'akozesa okwewooya n'okusinza bamalaika. Omuntu ng'oti n'oyo yeefuula okuba ng'abasinga, mbu kuba yabonekerwa. Yeetuusa aghazira na nsonga, okutoolaku ebirowoozo bye ebiziramu." 
Colossians2:19 Oyo aba aviire ku Kurisito, omutwe. Ate ng'omutwe n'ogugemerera omubiri gwonagwona, nga gukozesa enkusakusa mu buli buyungiro, era omutwe n'oguliisa omubiri ni gukula nga Katonda bw'aba asiimye." 
Colossians2:20 Oba nga bwe mwafa ni Kurisito mwawona okufugibwa emizimu egifuga ensi, memale lwaki muba oti mukaali ba nsi? Lwaki muwulira ebiragiro ng'oti ni bino:" 
Colossians2:21 “Kino tokigemangaku. Kire tokikombangaku. Ate kire n'okukyekuusaaku obwekuuse bbe.” 
Colossians2:22 Nga byonabyona bigema ku bintu ebikozesebwa ni biwaagho, era ng'ebyo byonabyona bya kugalaga na kwegeresa kwa bantu buntu." 
Colossians2:23 Kituufu mu biragiro oti n'ebyo mubonekera okubaamu amagezi, kuba bikaka omuntu okusinza n'okwewooya, n'okwebonereza mu mubiri. Aye bizira muganhulo mu kufuga omubiri mu kwegomba kwagwo." 
Colossians3:1 Oba nga mwazuukizibwa ni Kurisito mudhuube ku bintu ebiri mu igulu, Kurisito y'atyaime ku luuyi lw'omukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda." 
Colossians3:2 Mulowooze ku bintu ebiri mu igulu, aye ti ku bintu eby'oku nsi." 
Colossians3:3 Kuba mwafa era obulamu bwaimwe bwagisibwa ghalala ni Kurisito mu Katonda. 
Colossians3:4 Kurisito n'obulamu bwaife era bw'aliboneka olwo mwena mulibonekera ghalala naye mu kitiisa. 
Colossians3:5 Kale mwite okwegomba okubi okuli mu imwe: obwenzi obudankaanu, okwegomba okw'ensoni, okuwugaawugana, obutaiguta, kuba kino kiri ng'oti kusinza ebitali Katonda." 
Colossians3:6 Kuba olw'ebintu ebyo, obusungu bwa Katonda buli kwidha." 
Colossians3:7 Eira mwena mwakolanga ebintu oti n'ebyo, era ng'obulamu bwaimwe bubijiiraku inho." 
Colossians3:8 Aye mperaano muteekwa okulekayo ebintu ebyo byonabyona: obusungu, ekiruyi, enge, okuvuma, era n'okughemula kutabitanga mu kanwa mwaimwe." 
Colossians3:9 Mutasubaghagananga kuba mwalekayo obulamu obw'eira n'ebikolwa byabwo ebibi. 
Colossians3:10 Mwaira mu bulamu obuyaaka. Buno buja nga bwizibwa buyaaka omutonzi, mughange okumumanhira irala." 
Colossians3:11 Olwo ghabe nga tighakaali kuboola oti ono Mugureki, ono Muyudaaya, ono mukekete, ate ono ti mukekete, ono wa ighanga lindi, ono ti mugundhufu, ono mwiru, ate ono ti mwiru. Kurisito n'ali byonabyona era n'ali mu byonabyona." 
Colossians3:12 Kale nga bwe muli abantu ba Katonda be yalondamu era abagonzi, mubenga n'omwoyo ogw'okusaasira, ekisa, obuteekulumbaza, obugonvu n'okuguminkiriza." 
Colossians3:13 Mutabanga ba ikabyo, buli muntu asonighe mwine bweghabaagho asobiiza. Musonighe oti ni Musengwa bwe yabasonigha." 
Colossians3:14 Ku ebyo muteereku okugonza nga n'okusiba byonabyona aghalala, ni biisania obukalamu." 
Colossians3:15 Era emiraala gya Kurisito Katonda, gye yabeetera okuba aghalala ng'ebitundu eby'omubiri omulala, gifuge emyoyo gyaimwe. Ate era mwoleke okusiima kwaimwe." 
Colossians3:16 Ekibono kya Kurisito n'obukombe bwakyo kibenga mu myoyo gyaimwe. Buli muntu ayegeresenga era agalagirenga mwine mu magezi goonagoona. Mwembenga zabbuli n'enhembo edhisaaka Katonda, n'enhembo edh'omwoyo nga mwoleka okusiima kwaimwe mu myoyo gyaimwe eri Katonda." 
Colossians3:17 Era kiisi kye mukolanga, ka kibe mu bibono oba mu bikolwa, mu kikole mu liina lya Musengwa Yesu, era nga mubita mu oyo okweyanza Katonda Lata nga musiimye." 
Colossians3:18 Abakazi, mugonderenga baibaimwe, kuba abaikiriza mu Musengwa bwe bagwaine okukola." 
Colossians3:19 Abasaadha, mugonzenga bakazi baimwe era ti mubakambughaliranga." 
Colossians3:20 Abaana, mugonderenga ababazaala buliidho, kuba ekyo Musengwa ky'asangaalira." 
Colossians3:21 Abazaire, mutasonsoonianga baana baimwe okubajiirajiiraku n'okubakambughalira, kuba kisobola okubamalamu amaani baabivaaku." 
Colossians3:22 Abairu mugonderenga basengwa baimwe ab'oku nsi kuno mu buli kintu. Kino mutakikolanga nga bali kubabona, olw'okwenda okubafunaku obwende. Aye mukikolenga mu mwoyo oguziramu buguya era mu kutya Musengwa." 
Colossians3:23 Kiisi kye mukola mukikole n'omwoyo gwaimwe gwonagwona ng'abakolera Musengwa, ti ng'abakolera abantu," 
Colossians3:24 nga mwidhi muti Musengwa n'alibagha empeera, kuba Kurisito ni Musengwa ye mugheereza." 
Colossians3:25 Omuntu yeenayeena akola ekibi alisasulwa olw'ekibi kye aghazira kusaliriza. 
Colossians4:1 Imwe basengwa b'abairu, mubisenga abairu baimwe bukalamu nga bwe kigwaine, nga mwidhukira nga mwena muli ni Musengwa waimwe mu igulu." 
Colossians4:2 Mwekalangulenga mu kusaba, era nga mwisangayo omwoyo ku bye musaba, era nga mweyanza." 
Colossians4:3 Ate twena mutusabire, Katonda atusobozese okukobera abantu ekibono kye, tubamanhise ekyama ekiri mu Kurisito ekyansibisa mu ikomera." 
Colossians4:4 Kale munsabirenga nkyogere nga bwe nteekwa, kitegeerekeke bukalamu." 
Colossians4:5 Mwegenderezenga nga mukolagana n'abo abakaali kwikiriza Kurisito, kiisi kaghagaanhia ke muba nako mukakozese bukalamu." 
Colossians4:6 Mu kwogera mukozesenga ebibono ebiwooma era ebigwaine, nga kiisi abuuza mwidhi eky'okumwiramu." 
Colossians4:7 Tukiko owoluganda waife omugonzi, omukozi wa Kurisito omwesigwa era mugheereza munaife mu mirimo gya Musengwa, aidha kubakobera byonabyona ebinfaaku." 
Colossians4:8 Era kyenva ndi kumubatumira abakobere twenatwena bwe tuli, mwiremu emyoyo." 
Colossians4:9 Ali kwidha ni Onesimo, owoluganda omugonzi era omwesigwa, ate nga era w'eyo ewaimwe. Baidha kubakobera byonabyona ebifa eno." 
Colossians4:10 Arisitaruko musibe munange abalamwisa ni Mariko omwiwa wa Barunaba. Mariko ono ni ye nabakoberaku nti bw'aidhanga ye muli mumusangaaliranga. 
Colossians4:11 Owundi abalamwisa ni Yesu abandi ye beeta Yusito. Mu bantu be nkola nabo ku lw'Obwakyabazinga bwa Katonda, abo ni bonka abakekete era bandhizaamu inho amaani." 
Colossians4:12 Epafura, owundi ku abo ab'ewaimwe, ate era omugheereza wa Kurisito Yesu, abalamwisa. Buliidho abasabira n'omwoyo gwe gwonagwona mwekalangule ng'abantu abakulu abeekakasa mu ebyo Katonda by'ayenda." 
Colossians4:13 Nze mwene nkighaaku obudhulirwa nti akoze inho ku lwaimwe ni ku lw'abantu b'e Laodikea n'e Hierapoli. 
Colossians4:14 Mukagwa waife Luka omuyigha ni Dema babalamwisa. 
Colossians4:15 Muunamukize aboluganda abali e Laodikea, muunamukize Nunfa n'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito abeesololeza mu ndhu ye." 
Colossians4:16 Embaluwa eno bw'emala okubasomerwa, mubone nga esomerwa n'Ekikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekiri e Laodikea. Era mwena musome eyo ab'e Laodikea ye balibagheereza." 
Colossians4:17 Mukobere Arikippo muti: “Oteekwa okumaliriza omulimo gwe wagheebwa mu bugheereza bwa Musengwa.” 
Colossians4:18 Ninze Paulo mpandiise okulamusa kuno n'omukono gwange gwene. Mundidhukirenga mu busibe bwange. Enkabi dha Katonda dhibe n'imwe. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Ninze Paulo, ni Siluvano ni Timotheo. Tughandiikira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito abali e Thessalonika, aba Katonda Lata ni mu Musengwa Yesu Kurisito. Katonda abaghe enkabi n'emiraala." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Buliidho tusiima Katonda olwa imwe mwenamwena nga titwosa kubasabira. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Twidhukira mu maiso ga Katonda era Lata waife, nga bwe mwoleka okwikiriza n'okugonza kwaimwe mu bye mukola, era twidhukira nga bwe mwoleka eisuubi lyaimwe eritakoma mu Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Aboluganda abadingu ba Katonda, twidhi nga Katonda yabalonda," 
1Thessalonians1:5 kuba Amawulire Amalungi ge twabakobera tigaali bwa mu kwogera bibono aye gaabatuukaku mu maani ni mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu era nga tukakalisa irala bye twogera. Mwidhi nga bwe twebisanga nga tuli mu imwe ku lw'obulungi bwaimwe. 
1Thessalonians1:6 Era n'imwe bwemwebisanga nga mubonera ku ife ni ku Musengwa, kuba waire mwadaazibwadaazibwa inho olw'ekibono, mwakiikiriza n'eisanhu eriva mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Kale mwaba eky'okuboneraku eri abaikiriza boonaboona ab'omu Makedonia ni mu Akaia. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Olw'ensambo ye mwebisangamu, ekibono kya Musengwa kyaja nga kiwulirwa mu Makedonia ni mu Akaia, era n'okwikiriza kwaimwe mu Katonda kwatuuka buli ghantu. Kale ghazira kye twetaaga kwogera," 
1Thessalonians1:9 kuba abantu abo beene bwe baba batughayaku bakoba nga bwe mwatusangaalira einho bwe twali mu imwe. Era nga bwe mwakyuka okuva ku bisinzibwa ebitali Katonda ni mwira ku kugheereza Katonda mwene omulamu. 
1Thessalonians1:10 Era n'okulindirira Omwana we Yesu okuva mu igulu oyo ye yazuukiza okuva mu bafu, atuwonia ekiruyi kya Katonda ekiri kwidha." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Aboluganda, imwe beene mwidhi ng'okwidha kwaife ye muli ti kwafa busa." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Waire twali tumaze okudaazibwadaazibwa era n'okuswazibwaswazibwa bwe twali e Filippi, nga bwe mwidhi, twaguma ku lwa Katonda waife twabakobera Amawulire ge Amalungi mu kutakanizibwa okunene." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Bye tubakoba ti biva mu buguya, oba mu mwoyo mubi, oba okwenda okubawubisa." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Aye nga Katonda bwe yatwesiga n'atugemya Amawulire Amalungi, era twena tugakobera abantu nga bw'ayenda. Titugezaaku kusiimya bantu aye tusiimya Katonda akebera emyoyo gyaife," 
1Thessalonians2:5 kuba nga bwe mwidhi, titukozesangaku bibono bya kusuutiriza waire ebibono ebighemba ku mairu ag'eby'okufuna, Katonda nga n'omudhulirwa." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Era titukolererangaku kusaakibwa bantu, ka babe imwe oba abandi, waire nga twandisoboire okubakaluubiriza ng'Abatume ba Kurisito." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Aye twegendereza nga tuli mu imwe, twaba ng'oti n'omulezi ow'abaana nga alera abaana be." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Kale nga bwe twabagonza einho, nga titusobola kukanga ku kubagha Mawulire Malungi aga Katonda gonka, aye era n'okubeegha ife beene, kuba mwali badingu ye tuli." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Aboluganda, mwidhukira bwe twakolanga nga tufaabiikana omusana n'obwire, tulobe kukaluubiriza muntu yeenayeena ku imwe nga tubakobera Amawulire Amalungi aga Katonda." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imwe abaikiriza muli badhulirwa baife era ni Katonda atudhulira, nga twebisanga eri mwe ng'abatukuvu, abatuufu era abaziraku musango." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Mwidhi nga buli muntu ku imwe twamubisanga ng'omuzaire bw'abisa abaana be. Twabaizaamu amaani, twabagumya era twaloba kulekera agho kubakubiriza" 
1Thessalonians2:12 okuba mu bulamu Katonda bw'asiima, oyo abeeta okwingira mu Bwakyabazinga bwe era mu kitiisa kye." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Era titulekera kweyanza Katonda kuba bwe mwawulira ekibono kye, kye twabakobera mwakisangaalira ti ng'ekibono eky'abantu aye ng'ekibono ekya Katonda, nga era bwenebwene bwekiri ekibono kya Katonda ekikolera mu imwe abaikiriza." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Aboluganda, mwaba oti n'ab'omu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito Yesu ebya Katonda eby'omu Buyudaaya. Mwena mwadaazibwadaazibwa ab'eighanga lyaimwe nga bale bwe badaazibwadaazibwa Bayudaaya banaibwe." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Abayudaaya abo n'abaita Musengwa Yesu n'abalanzi, era n'ife baatubingira ku luya. Baleetera Katonda okudhuunia era bazigu ba buli muntu," 
1Thessalonians2:16 nga batwekiika emberi tulobe kukobera abamaghanga agandi ebibono eby'okubalokola. Ekyo buliidho kyaidhuuliriza ebibi bye bakola. Aye ekiviire mu ebyo ni Katonda okubamaliraku ekiruyi kye. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Aboluganda, akaseera akatono ako kasookanga tukakibwa kuva eyo, waire nga timutuvanga mu myoyo gyaife, tubaire nga twegomba inho era nga tugezaaku inho okwidha okubabona maiso ku maiso." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Twayenda inho twire tubaboneku, era nze mwene Paulo nagezaaku emikuzi kamaala aye nga Sitaani tatuganha." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Kuba eisuubi lyaife, eisanhu lyaife, n'okwesaaka olw'obughanguzi mu maiso ga Musengwa waife Yesu lw'aliira, biri mu ani? Tibiri mu imwe?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Bwenebwene okwesaaka kwaife n'eisanhu lyaife biri mu imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Kale twabona nga titukaaghanga kuguminkiriza, twasalagho okusigala mu Athene twenka." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Twatuma muganda waife Timotheo, omugheereza wa Katonda mu kukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi aga Kurisito, aidhe abalambe era abagumye mu kwikiriza kwaimwe," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ghalobe kubaagho awaamu maani olw'okukirigibwa. Mukiidhi bukalamu ng'ebyo bye tuli n'okubitamu. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Kuba lwe twali n'imwe twabakobereragho nga bwe tuli n'okudaazibwadaazibwa era nga bwe mwidhi obukalamu ebyo ni byenebyene ebibairegho. 
1Thessalonians3:5 Kyova bwe nabona nga tikaasobola kuguminkiriza, natuma Timotheo mmanhe okwikiriza kwaimwe bwe kuli, nga ntya nti tomanha mulebi bw'aba nga yabaleba, okufaabiikana kwaife ni kufa busa." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Mperaano Timotheo aize ng'ava eyo, yaatuleetera amawulire amalungi agagema ku kwikiriza kwaimwe n'okugonza kwaimwe. Era atukobeire nga buliidho bwe mutwidhukira einho, era nga bwe mwegomba okutubonaku oti niife bwe twegomba okubabonaku." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Kale ni aboluganda okwikiriza kwaimwe kutwiziizaamu amaani waire nga tuli mu buzibu n'okudaazibwadaazibwa," 
1Thessalonians3:8 kuba mperaano tuba balamu bwe mwekalangula ku Musengwa. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ye tunaakola ki, okwoleka Katonda nga bwe tuli abasiimu olwa imwe n'olw'okusagamba kwe tuwulira mule olwa imwe mu maiso ge?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Tumweghemba omusana n'obwire atuganhe okubonaganaku n'imwe maiso ku maiso, olwo twidhuulirize ebikaabulaku mu kwikiriza kwaimwe." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Tusaba Katonda waife era Lata waife, mwene ni Musengwa waife Yesu, atusobozese okwidha ye muli." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Era Musengwa abongeremu okugonzanianga beene na beene, n'okugonzanga abantu boonaboona oti niife bwe tubagonza." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Olwo abagumye emyoyo gyaimwe, mube nga muziraku musango, era mube abatukuvu mu maiso ga Katonda waife era Lata, ku lule Musengwa waife Yesu lw'aliidha n'abatuukirivu be boonaboona." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Aboluganda, mwatwegeraku nga bwe mugwaine okwebisa memale musobole okusiimya Katonda, era ekyo kye mubaire mukola. Mperaano tubeeghembye era tubakubiriza mu liina lya Musengwa Yesu, mukole mutyo ate era mwongeremu n'amaani," 
1Thessalonians4:2 kuba mwidhi bye twabagalagira ku lwa Musengwa Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Katonda ayenda, mube batukuvu, era mulekere irala obwenzi." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Kiisi mulala ku imwe amanhe okwebisanga mu butukuvu era ni mu kitiisa ye mukazi we. 
1Thessalonians4:5 Mutafugibwanga mairu ga mubiri ng'oti n'abantu ab'ensi abatatya Katonda bwe bakola. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Ku nsonga eno ey'okwebisa mu butukuvu, ghatabangagho muntu akola Mukurisito mwine bubi. Kuba nga bwe twabalabuliragho, Katonda abonereza abakola ebintu ng'oti n'ebyo." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Katonda atweta tube batukuvu aye ti kuba badankaanu. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Kale, aloba bino aba talobye bya bantu buntu, aye aba alobye bya Katonda oyo abagha Mwoyo we Omutukuvu." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Tikyetaagisa muntu kubaghandiikira ku bigema ku kugonzania ng'abaikiriza. Katonda mwene n'eyabeegesa okugonza. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Era kino kye mubaire mukola, nga mugonza aboluganda boonaboona abali mu Makedonia mwonamwona. Aye era aboluganda, tubeeghembye mweyongere bweyongere." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Mufubenga okuba emiraala nga timwengiza mu bya bandi, era mufubenga okweyemerezaagho n'emikono gyaimwe nga bwe twabakoba." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Olwo abatali baikiriza balibataamu ekinhagansi, era timulyetaaga muntu yeenayeena kubeemerezaagho." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Aboluganda, twenda mumanhe ebigema ku abo abaafa, mulobe kunakughala kwagayaga n'abo abazira isuubi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Nga bwe twikiriza nga Yesu yafa memale yaazuukira, era tutyo bwe twikiriza nga Katonda aliiza ghalala ni Yesu abo abaafa nga bamwikiriza." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Kino kye tuli kubakobera n'ekibono kya Musengwa tuti: Ife abalamu, Musengwa b'alyagaana nga tukaasigairegho lw'aliidha, titulyesooka abo abaafa." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Musengwa mwene aliika ng'ava mu igulu, ekiragiro kyawulirwa mu iroboozi ery'amaani, isebamalaika yaayeta era endeka ya Katonda yaavuga. Abo abaafa nga baikiriza mu Kurisito n'abalisooka okuzuukira," 
1Thessalonians4:17 memale ife abalamu, abaliba bakaasigairegho twatwalibwa ghalala nabo mu bire okwagaanana ni Musengwa mu ibbanga. Era olwo tubenga eyo ni Musengwa buliidho." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Agho ni buli muntu agumye mwine n'ebibono ebyo. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Aboluganda, tikyetaagisa na kubaghandiikira ku bigema ku bwire, na ku biseera ebyo ghe biribeeragho." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Kuba mwidhi bukalamu nga olunaku lwa Musengwa luligwa bugwe oti n'omwibi bw'aidha obwire. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Abantu balikoba bati: “Ghaligho emiraala era ghazira kabi,” aye balija okubona bati ng'okuzikirira kubatuuseeku. Kulibazindula ng'oti n'ebisa eby'omwana bwe bizindula omukazi ali kumpi okuzaala, era tighaliba gha kuwonera." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Aye imwe aboluganda, ti muli mu nzikiiza memale olunaku olwo lubazinduukirize oti mwibi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Imwe mwenamwena muli bantu ab'obutangaavu era ab'omusana. Tituli bantu ba bwire oba ba nzikiiza. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Agho ni tulobe kutenduka ng'oti n'abandi bwe bakola, aye tube agho tumoge era nga titutamiire." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Kuba abatenduka batenduka bwire n'abatamiira batamiira bwire. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Aye nga ife bwe tuli ab'omusana tulobe kutamiira, aye tube n'okwikiriza n'okugonza ng'ekivaalo eky'omu kifuba eky'ekyuma. Tube n'eisuubi ery'okulokoka ng'enkuufiira ey'ekyuma ku mutwe." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Kuba Katonda tiyatutaagho kutumaliraku kiruyi kye; yatutaagho kulokolwa nga tubita mu Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito. 
1Thessalonians5:10 Ono n'eyatufiirira memale olwo tube naye lw'aliira, oba tuli balamu oba bafu." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Agho ni buli muntu agumye mwine, era buli muntu abeereku mwine nga bwemukola buti." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Tubeeghembye aboluganda, mutenga ekinhagansi mu abo abakola omulimo mu imwe era ababalabirira mu Musengwa era ababalabula." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Mubatengamu inho ekinhagansi era mubagonzenga olw'omulimo gwe bakola. Emiraala gibenga mu imwe. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Aboluganda, tubakubiriza okulabulanga abagayaavu, mugumyenga abatali bagumu mu myoyo, mubeerenga abanafu, era muguminkirizenga abantu boonaboona." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ghatabangagho mu imwe eyeesasuuza ng'akoleibwa ekibi, aye buliidho buli muntu afubenga okukolera mwine obukalamu, era n'okukoleranga obukalamu abantu boonaboona." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Mubenga basangaavu buliidho," 
1Thessalonians5:17 musabenga buliidho 
1Thessalonians5:18 era mu byonabyona mweyanzenga. Kuba ekyo Katonda ky'abendaku mu bulamu bwaimwe mu Kurisito Yesu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Mutaloberanga Mwoyo Mutukuvu kukola. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Mutagayiriranga bya bulanzi. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Byonabyona mubyekebeedhenga, ebikalamu mubigemenga," 
1Thessalonians5:22 aye mulobenga kukola kibi kyonakyona. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Tusaba Katonda mwene kutugha miraala, abatukuze mwene mu bwidhuvu era akuume emyoyo n'emibiri gyaimwe nga mikalamu. Mubuleku omusango gwonagwona Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito lw'aliira." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Oyo abeeta aidha kukikola kuba yeesigibwa. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Aboluganda, mutusabire." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Mulamusaganienga n'okunhwegeragana ng'aboluganda. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Mbasikirira mu liina lya Musengwa nti embaluwa eno esomerwe aboluganda boonaboona. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Enkabi dha Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito dhibe n'imwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Ninze Paulo, ni Siluvano, ni Timotheo. Tughandiikira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito abali e Thessalonika, aba Katonda Lata ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Katonda Lata waife ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito abaghe enkabi n'emiraala. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Aboluganda, tuli n'okusiima Katonda buli kaseera olwa imwe, era nga bwe tugwaine kuba okwikiriza kwaimwe kuli kweyongera inho. Era n'okugonza kiisi mulala ku imwe kw'agonzaamu abandi kwona kweyongera inho." 
2Thessalonians1:4 N'ife beene kye tuva ni tuwulira nga twesiimye n'imwe, mu Bikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ebya Katonda, olw'okuguma n'okwikiriza bye muli nabyo mu kukirigibwa n'okudaazibwadaazibwa." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Kino kyoleka nga Katonda bw'asalira abantu omusango mu butuufu. Ng'era olumaliira muligwanira okuba mu Bwakyabazinga bwa Katonda bwe muli kudaagirira. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Era Katonda aja kukola ekituufu: aja kuleetera abo ababadaazadaaza badaagedaage," 
2Thessalonians1:7 era ife ghalala n'imwe abadaagadaaga alitugha okwesiima. Kino alikikola, Yesu lw'aliva mu igulu ni yeeyoleka ni bamalaika be abakola eby'amaani." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Aliidha n'omuliro ogwaka, yaaleetera abatatya Katonda n'abatagondera Mawulire Malungi aga Musengwa waife Yesu, okudaagadaaga." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Ekibonerezo kye balifuna kya kuzikirira, na kubingibwa mu maiso ga Musengwa aghali ekitiisa kye eky'amaani." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Kino kiribaagho ku lunaku olwo lw'aliidha, abatuukirivu be ni bamugha ekitiisa, ni boonaboona abamwikiriza bamusaaka. Mwena muliba mu abo kuba mwaikiriza ebyo bye twabakobera." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Kye tuva ni tubasabira buliidho ye Katonda waife, mu buyinza bwe abafuule abagwaniire okwetebwa kwe, atuukirize ebirungi byonabyona bye muba musazeegho okukola era n'ebikolwa byonabyona eby'okwikiriza." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Olwo eriina lya Musengwa waife Yesu ligheebwe ekitiisa mu imwe, era mwena mufunire ekitiisa mu oyo, olw'ekisa kya Katonda waife ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Mperaano, aboluganda, ka tubakobere ku bigema ku kwira kwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, ni ku ky'okusololezebwa gh'ali. Tubakubiriza," 
2Thessalonians2:2 mulobe kuwubisibwa mangu mutyo mu birowoozo byaimwe, oba okutabulwa muti oba katyo olunaku lwa Musengwa lutuuse kuba musobola okuba nga mulowooza muti oba katyo twakikoba mu kulanga, oba mu kulamba oba mu mbaluwa." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ghatabangagho muntu yeenayeena abaguya mu nsambo yoonayoona, kuba olunaku olwo tiruja kutuuka okutuusa ng'okudheema okusembayo kumaze okutuuka, n'omuntu Omubi Isaababi ow'okuzikirira ng'amaze okweyoleka." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Oyo n'atakania era ni yeegungumaza okusinga kiisi kyetebwa katonda, oba ekintu kyonakyona ekisinzibwa. Aja ni mu isinzizo lya Katonda yeetyebeka omwo nga yeeyeta mwene okuba Katonda." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Timwidhukira nga lwe nali n'imwe nabakobera ebintu bino? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Era mwidhi bukalamu ekikaamulobera okweyoleka buti, memale ekiseera kye kituuke yeeyoleke." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Obudheemu obukolera mu kyama buligho era bukola ogwabwo. Aye ekija okubaagho tikiribaagho okutuusa oyo akirobera okubaagho lw'alitoolebwagho. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Olwo ni ng'Omubi Isaababi oyo yeeyoleka. Aye Musengwa Yesu lw'aliidha aja kumwita n'omuuka gwe ogw'omu kanwa, era aja kumuzikiriza n'okumesunkana okw'okwidha kwe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Omubi Isaababi oyo aliidha n'amaani ga Sitaani era alikola obumanhiso n'ebyewuunhio eby'obuguya ebya buli nsambo. 
2Thessalonians2:10 Alikozesa obuguya bwa Sitaani obwa buli nsambo ku abo ab'okuzikirira, kuba baaloba okusangaalira n'okugonza amazima balokolebwe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Katonda kyava abaleetera okudobana ni baikiriza eby'obuguya. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Ekirivaamu n'abo boonaboona abaaloba okwikiriza amazima ni basangaalira ekibi, okusalirwa omusango okubasinga." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Aboluganda abadingu ba Musengwa, tuli n'okusiima Katonda buli kaseera olwa imwe kuba Katonda yabalobolamu okuviira irala mu kwinhama, mulokolebwe nga mutukuzibwa Mwoyo era nga mwikiriza amazima." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Kino kye yabeetera ng'abita mu Mawulire Amalungi ge twabakobera, mufune ekitiisa kya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Agho ni, aboluganda, mwekalangulire ku by'amazima bye twabeegeresa, mu bibono bye twayogera ni mu mbaluwa yaife." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito mwene, era ni Katonda Lata eyatugonza olw'ekisa kye n'atugha eisanhu eritawaagho n'okusuubira ebirungi," 
2Thessalonians2:17 abagumye emyoyo era abaghe amaani mu birungi byonabyona bye mukola ni bye mwogera. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ekisembayo baganda bange, mutusabirenga ekibono kya Musengwa kyeyongere okusansaana amangu, ate abakiwulira bakiteemu ekitiisa ng'oti bwe kyali mu imwe." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Era mutusabire tuwone abantu ababi kuba okwikiriza ekibono tikwa boonaboona. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Aye Musengwa mwesigwa, era alibagumya yaabawonia Omubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tubeesiga mu Musengwa era tukakasa nga mukola, era nga mwidhanga kukola nga bwe tubalagira." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Musengwa abatuuse ku kugonza kwa Katonda ni ku kuguminkiriza kwa Kurisito. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Aboluganda, tuli kubalagira mu liina lya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, obutakolagananga na waluganda yeenayeena omugayaavu era atajiira ku bye twabeegeresa." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Kuba beene imwe mwidhi bukalamu nga bwe muteekwa okujiira ku bye tukola. Titwali bagayaavu nga tuli n'imwe. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Era titwakozesa kintu kya muntu yeenayeena nga titukisasuliire. Aye twakolanga inho obutagheera, era twafubanga omusana n'obwire tulobe kuzitoogherera muntu yeenayeena ku imwe." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Ti lwa kuba nga twali titugwaniire kubasaba bye twetaaganga, aye twayenda okubagha eky'okuboneraku kye mube mujiirengaku." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ate ni bwe twali n'imwe twabagha ekiragiro kino tuti: “Oba ng'ole tayenda kukola, n'okulya alekere.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Kuba tuwulira mbu abandi ku imwe muli bagayaavu abatenda kukola, okutoolaku okwengiza mu bitabagemaku." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Mu liina lya Musengwa Yesu Kurisito, abantu abali ng'oti n'abo tuli kubalagira era nga tubalamba bakolenga emirimo gyaibwe nga bwe bagwaine, beeyemerezeegho beene." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Aboluganda, mutakooghanga kukola bikalamu." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ole bw'aloba okujiira ku kye tukobye mu mbaluwa eno, mumwekalirise bukalamu era mulobe kukolagana naye mu kintu kyonakyona, olwo aswale." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Mutamutwala ng'omuzigu aye mumulabule nga muganda waimwe. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Musengwa omugabi w'emiraala, mwene abaghenga emiraala buliidho era ni mu buli nsambo. Musengwa abenga n'imwe mwenamwena." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ninze Paulo mpandiise okulamusa kuno n'omukono gwange gwene. Kano n'akamanhiso kange mu kiisi mbaluwa yange; ntyo bwe mpandiika. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Enkabi dha Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito dhibe n'imwe mwenamwena. 
1Timothy1:1 Ninze Paulo omutume wa Kurisito Yesu, olw'ekiragiro kya Katonda Omulokozi waife, n'ekya Kurisito Yesu ye tulimu n'eisuubi." 
1Timothy1:2 Mpandiikira Timotheo, omwana wange mwenemwene mu kwikiriza. Katonda Lata, ni Kurisito Yesu Musengwa waife akughe enkabi n'emiraala, era akusaasire." 
1Timothy1:3 Nkusaba osigale mu Efeso nga bwe nakusaba nga nja e Makedonia, olobere abo abeegeresa eby'obuguya." 
1Timothy1:4 Bakobe bakange agho okwemalira ku nfumo, ni ku kunoonenkereza endyo edh'abantu endeeyiriri edhitakutuka. Ebyo bivaamu bwa kutakana, mu kifo ky'okwegeresa abantu ebya Katonda ebiri mu kwikiriza." 
1Timothy1:5 Mu kiragiro kino tugendereramu okuleetagho okugonza okusimuka mu mwoyo omunaabuufu ogutansalira musango, n'okwikiriza okuziramu buguya." 
1Timothy1:6 Ebyo abantu abandi baabivaaku, baira mu kutakana okuziramu muganhulo." 
1Timothy1:7 Benda okuba Abeegeresa b'amateeka ga Katonda, ate nga bye boogera tibabiidhi, waire byenebyene bye boogera nga beekakasa." 
1Timothy1:8 Twidhi ng'amateeka gaba malungi, kasita omuntu agakozesa mu nsambo entuufu." 
1Timothy1:9 Tugwaine tukimanhe ng'amateeka tigateebwagho lwa bantu batuufu, aye lwa abo abagamenha n'abadheemu abatatya Katonda, n'aboonooni abatali batukuvu, n'abatatya bitukuvu, n'abatemula baiseibwe ni bainhaibwe, n'abatemo abandi." 
1Timothy1:10 Gaateebwagho lwa benzi, lwa badankaanu, abawuuyi, abaguya era abalayira ebiziramu, n'abo boonaboona abakola ebitajiira ku ndhegeresa ntuufu." 
1Timothy1:11 Endhegeresa eyo entuufu, n'eyo ejiira ku Mawulire Amalungi era ag'ekitiisa, aga Katonda asaakibwa, agampeebwa okulangirira." 
1Timothy1:12 Neeyanza Kurisito Yesu musengwa waife, eyampa amaani okukola omulimo guno, era n'abona nga ngwaniire, n'anonda okumugheereza." 
1Timothy1:13 Eira namuvumanga, naamukiriga, era naamwogeraku bubi, aye yansaasira, kuba ebyo nabikolanga mu butamanha, nga nkaali kumwikiriza." 
1Timothy1:14 Musengwa waife yansaasira inho, yampa okwikiriza n'okugonza, bye tufunira mu Kurisito Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Ekibono kino kituufu kyene era kigwaine okwikiriza, ekikoba kiti: Kurisito Yesu yaidha mu nsi okulokola aboonooni. Era mu abo nze ndi mberi wa boonaboona." 
1Timothy1:16 Aye Katonda yansaasira, olwo Yesu Kurisito aghange okubita mu nze, omwonooni asinga boonaboona, alage okusaasira kwe okutakoma. Era mbe eky'okuboneraku y'abo abalimwikiriza, ni bafuna obulamu obutawaagho." 
1Timothy1:17 Kyabazinga oyo atakoma, atafa era ataboneka, Katonda omulala yenka, asaakibwenga era agheebwenga ekitiisa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
1Timothy1:18 Mwana wange Timotheo, bye nkulagira bijiira ku bibono eby'abalanzi bye baakwogeraku eira. Idhukiranga ebibono ebyo, memale oghange okulwana obukalamu," 
1Timothy1:19 ng'oli n'okwikiriza era n'omwoyo omwamufu; kuba abandi abaaloba okuba n'omwoyo ogwo bafiirwa okwikiriza kwaibwe. 
1Timothy1:20 Mu abo n'omuli Himenao ni Alekisandero be naghaayo ye Sitaani beege obutavumanga Katonda. 
1Timothy2:1 Ekisookera irala kye mbakubiriza ni kino: Mweghembenga Katonda mumusabenga, mwewolerezenga era mweyanzenga ku lw'abantu boonaboona." 
1Timothy2:2 Era musabirenga abafuzi ni boonaboona abali mu buyinza, olwo tube bukalamu nga tuli miraala, nga tutya Katonda era nga twebisa bukalamu." 
1Timothy2:3 Ekyo kikalamu, ni Katonda Omulokozi waife akisiima" 
1Timothy2:4 era ayenda abantu boonaboona balokolebwe bamanhe amazima; 
1Timothy2:5 kuba ghaligho Katonda mulala ati, era oyo agemagania abantu ni Katonda ali mulala, n'oyo Omuntu Kurisito Yesu." 
1Timothy2:6 Oyo yeeghaayo olw'okununula abantu boonaboona. Ekyo kyakakasibwa mu kiseera kyakyo ekituufu. 
1Timothy2:7 Era ekyo n'ekyanteesaagho mbe omutume era omwegeresa ow'abamaghanga agandi, mbakobere eby'okwikiriza n'eby'amazima. Ndi kwogera mazima, tiri kuguya." 
1Timothy2:8 Kale, nhenda abasaadha, buli ghantu woonawoona beeghembenga Katonda, nga baghanika emikono gyaibwe emitukuvu, nga bazira busungu oba ntaka." 
1Timothy2:9 Era nhenda abakazi bavaalenga ebivaalo ebigwaniire, balobe kwemalira ku misono gya nviiri, na ku kwewoomya nga bavaala ebya zaabu oba amabaale ag'omughendo, oba ebivaalo eby'omughendo einho." 
1Timothy2:10 Mu kifo ky'ebyo, bakole ebikolwa ebikalamu, nga bwe kigwanira abakazi abaisa mu Katonda ekitiisa." 
1Timothy2:11 Mu kwegeresebwa, omukazi ayegenga kasirise nga yewombeese." 
1Timothy2:12 Tiganha mukazi yeenayeena kwegeresa, oba okulagira omusaadha, okutoolaku okuba agho ng'asiriike busirike." 
1Timothy2:13 Kuba Adamu n'eyasooka okutondebwa, memale kwairaku Eva." 
1Timothy2:14 Era Adamu ti n'eyasendebwasendebwa, aye omukazi n'eyasendebwasendebwa, n'agwa mu kibi." 
1Timothy2:15 Aye omukazi alilokolerwa mu kuzaala, kasita akalangukira mu kwikiriza, ni mu kugonza, ni mu butuukirivu, ni mu kwebisa obukalamu." 
1Timothy3:1 Ekibono kino kituufu kyene ekikoba kiti: Kiisi eyeegomba okuba alabirira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, aba yeegombye omulimo ogw'ekitiisa," 
1Timothy3:2 Omulabirizi tateekwa kubaaku ni kye bamwogeraku. Ateekwa okuba n'omukazi mulala, ateekwa okuba nga yeefuga, ataamu amagezi mu by'akola, yeebisa bukalamu, asangaalira abageni, ate aidhi okwegeresa." 
1Timothy3:3 Ateekwa okuba nga ti mutamiivu, ti mukambwe, aye nga muwombeefu atakanamuka, era azira mairu ga kufuna." 
1Timothy3:4 Ateekwa okuba ng'aghanga bukalamu amaka ge, ng'akuuma abaana be nga bawulize era nga ba mpisa." 
1Timothy3:5 Kuba omuntu ataghanga kufuga maka ge, asobola atya okulabirira Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda?" 
1Timothy3:6 Omulabirizi ateekwa okuba omuntu akakaite mu kwikiriza, alobe kweghanika nakusalirwa musango nga bwe gwasalirwa Sitaani ni gumusinga." 
1Timothy3:7 Era ateekwa okuba omuntu ateebwamu ekinhagansi, n'abo abatali mu Kikunsu ky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito, alobe kubaaku ky'anenezebwa, na kugwa mu mutego gwa Sitaani." 
1Timothy3:8 Abagheereza mu Kikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito boona bateekwa okuba abantu abakalamu, ti baguya, ti batamiivu, era abatagwidhubanira bya kufuna." 
1Timothy3:9 Bateekwa okukalangula eby'endhikiriza ey'Ekikurisito n'omwoyo omunaabuufu. 
1Timothy3:10 Era basookenga kwekebeedhebwa, kikakasibwe nga baziraku kibanenezebwa, memale bakolenga ng'abagheereza." 
1Timothy3:11 N'abakazi boona batyo bateekwa okuba abantu abakalamu, abatasalagania bibono, abasobola okwefuga, era abeesigwa mu buli kintu." 
1Timothy3:12 Omugheereza ateekwa okuba n'omukazi mulala yenka, era ateekwa okuba ng'aghanga okufuga abaana be n'amaka ge bukalamu." 
1Timothy3:13 Kuba abakola obukalamu ng'abagheereza, bafuna ekifo kya ghaigulu, era baba bagumu mu kwikiriza kwaibwe mu Kurisito Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Ndi kukughandiikira bino nga nsuubira okwidha amangu y'oli. 
1Timothy3:15 Aye bwenaaba nga ndwire, bino binaakumanhisa bwetugwaine okwebisa nga bwe tuli abantu ba Katonda, ekyo nga n'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekya Katonda omulamu, era ng'ekyo n'empango n'omusingi ogw'amazima." 
1Timothy3:16 Bwenebwene ekyama eky'endhikiriza yaife kikologho: “Yaboneka nga muntu mwene, yaakakasibwa Mwoyo, yabonebwa bamalaika. Yaalangirirwa mu maghanga, yaikirizibwa mu nsi yoonayoona, era yaatwalibwa mu igulu mu kitiisa.”" 
1Timothy4:1 Mwoyo akoba busimbalaala ati mu biseera ebija okwiririra abantu abandi baliva ku ndhikiriza ey'Ekikurisito, baajiira ku by'emizimu egiguya n'ebyo emizimu emibi bye gyegeresa." 
1Timothy4:2 Bino bisansaanizibwa abantu abaguya, abaafa emyoyo ng'oti n'egyasiriizibwa ekyuma ekyengereire." 
1Timothy4:3 Abo n'abalobera abantu okubayiza oba okubayira, era ni babalobera eby'okulya ebindi Katonda bye yagha abaikiriza era abaidhi amazima, okubiryanga nga bamweyanza." 
1Timothy4:4 Kiisi kitonde ekya Katonda kikalamu era ghazira kya muziro, kasita kiriibwa n'okweyanza;" 
1Timothy4:5 kuba olwo kitukuzibwa ekibono kya Katonda n'okusaba. 
1Timothy4:6 Ebibono ebyo bw'onaabituusa ku boluganda, onaaba mugheereza wa Kurisito Yesu mukalamu, aliisibwa ebibono eby'amazima eby'endhikiriza n'endhegeresa enungi y'ojiiraku." 
1Timothy4:7 Weesambenga enfumo edhiziramu kutya Katonda, edhitagwanira na kughayaku. Wemanhirize okutyanga Katonda." 
1Timothy4:8 Kuba okumanhiriza omubiri eby'okukola kuganhula katono, aye okutya Katonda kuganhula mu buli nsambo. Kuba kuleeta eisuubi ery'omu bulamu buno, n'ery'obwo obuliidha." 
1Timothy4:9 Ekibono kino kituufu kyene, era kigwaine okwikiriza." 
1Timothy4:10 Kye tuva ni tufaabiikana era ni tufuba einho, lwa kuba eisuubi lyaife liri mu Katonda omulamu Omulokozi w'abantu boonaboona, aye okusingira irala ow'abo abaikiriza." 
1Timothy4:11 Ebyo by'obe okubirizenga, era oyegeresenga abantu." 
1Timothy4:12 Ole atakufuginkirizanga lwa buto bwo, aye oba nga kya kuboneraku eri abaikiriza, mu ndhogera, mu kwebisa, mu kugonza, mu kwikiriza, ni mu bwamufu." 
1Timothy4:13 Weemalire ku kusomeranga abantu Ebyaghandiikibwa, n'okubalambanga, n'okubeegeresa, okutuusa lwe ndiidha." 
1Timothy4:14 Otagayaalira kitone ky'oli nakyo, ekyakugheebwa bwe waisibwaku emikono abakulembeze b'abaikiriza ng'abalanzi bwe baalanga." 
1Timothy4:15 Ebyo bikolenga era obiisengaku omwoyo, olwo boonaboona babone nga bwe weeyongera okukola obukalamu." 
1Timothy4:16 Weekuume mu nsambo ye weebisaamu, era ni mu by'oyegeresa, era weekalangulire ku ebyo, kuba bw'okola otyo, olyerokola iwe mwene, era n'abo abakuwulira." 
1Timothy5:1 Otadhuukanga musaadha mukaire, aye mulambenga nga lata wo, ate abaisuka batwalenga nga baganda bo." 
1Timothy5:2 Abakazi abakaire batwalenga nga bainhoko, ate abaguna batwalenga nga baanhoko. Ebyo bikolenga n'omwoyo omunaabuufu." 
1Timothy5:3 Banamwandu beene liina, batengamu ekinhagansi." 
1Timothy5:4 Bwe ghabaagho namwandu ali n'abaana oba abaidhukulu, bano basookenga okumanha endhikiriza yaibwe ky'ebakoba okukoleranga amaka ag'ewaibwe, n'okusasulaku abazaire baibwe kuba ekyo Katonda ky'asiima." 
1Timothy5:5 Oyo aba namwandu mwene liina asigaire yenka, eisuubi lye liba mu Katonda. Afuba okweghembanga n'okusaba Katonda omusana n'obwire." 
1Timothy5:6 Aye namwandu oyo ajiira ku by'amasanhu aba mufu, waire aba ng'akaatambula." 
1Timothy5:7 Bakobe otyo, balobe kubaaku kibi kye baboogeraku." 
1Timothy5:8 Oyo atafa ku babe, n'okusingira irala ab'omu ndhu ye, aba yeegaine okwikiriza, era aba mubi okusinga ataikiriza." 
1Timothy5:9 Namwandu okughandiikibwa mu banamwandu, ateekwa okuba ng'agheza emyaka nkaaga egy'obukulu. Era ateekwa okuba nga yabayiraku omusaadha mulala yenka." 
1Timothy5:10 Namwandu oyo ateekwa okuba nga amanhiibwa olw'ebikolwa ebikalamu: nga yakuza bukalamu abaana be, nga yasangaaliranga abageni, nga yanaazanga ebigere eby'abantu ba Katonda, nga yayambanga abali mu buzibu, era nga yeeghaayo inho okukola obukalamu mu buli nsambo." 
1Timothy5:11 Aye toganhanga kughandiika banamwandu abakaali abato, kuba amairu ag'okubayira bwe gabatanuka, bava ku Kurisito." 
1Timothy5:12 Olwo nga beetaaku omusango ogw'obutatuukiriza ekyo kye baasooka okumusuubiza. 
1Timothy5:13 N'ekindi beenazaaku omuze ogw'okuba agho nga bazira kye bakola, baayengeeta okubuna amayumba. Ate tibakoma ku kuba agho nga bazira kye bakola, aye bongeraku n'okuba n'olugambo, nga bengiza mu bitabagemaku, baayogera n'ebitagwaniire kwogera." 
1Timothy5:14 Kyenva nhenda banamwandu abato babayirenga bazaale abaana, era balabirirenga amaka gaibwe. Olwo lwe bataaleetere muzigu kuba na kaghagaanhia ka kutwogeraku bubi." 
1Timothy5:15 Kuba banamwandu abandi baagonhoka ira, baanonereza Sitaani." 
1Timothy5:16 Aye bweghabaagho omukazi yeenayeena Omukurisito ali n'abantu be nga banamwandu, oyo mwene n'abe abalabirirenga, Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito kirobe kuzitooghererwa, kisobole okulabiriranga banamwandu beene liina abaziraku abayamba." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakulembeze b'abaikiriza abakola obukalamu, bagwaniire empeera ya mikuzi ebiri, ng'abasinga n'abo abakalabatana okukobera n'okwegeresa abantu ekibono kya Katonda." 
1Timothy5:18 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Tosibanga nte munwa bw'eba ng'emulungula engaano”. Era biti: Omukozi agwana okusasulwa enkemba ye. 
1Timothy5:19 Towulirisanga bye boogera ku mukulembeze wa baikiriza, okutoolaku nga biriku abadhulizi babiri oba basatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Aye abo aboonoonanga obakobangaku ng'abantu boonaboona babona, abandi baasobola okutya." 
1Timothy5:21 Nkusikirira mu maiso ga Katonda, ni Kurisito Yesu, ni bamalaika abatukuvu, ojiirenga ku biragiro bino buliidho, aghazira kwekubira oba okusaliriza." 
1Timothy5:22 Toyanguyirizanga kwisa mikono ku muntu yeenayeena. Tiweetabanga mu bibi bya bandi. Weekuumenga ng'oli mwamufu. 
1Timothy5:23 Otanhwanga maadhi gonka aye onhwangaku ni ku twenge otw'emizabbibu olw'enda yo n'olw'okulwalalwala kwo. 
1Timothy5:24 Ebibi by'abantu abandi biboneka mangu nga bakaali nakusalirwa musango, aye eby'abandi bizuuka lumaliira." 
1Timothy5:25 N'ebikolwa ebikalamu bityo biboneka mangu. Ni bwe bitaboneka mangu, birwa eira byaboneka." 
1Timothy6:1 Abo abairu bagwaine okuta einho mu basengwa baibwe ekinhagansi, eriina lya Katonda, n'endhegeresa ey'Ekikurisito birobe kwogerwaku bubi." 
1Timothy6:2 Abairu abo abali ni basengwa baibwe nga Bakuristo, batabeemanhirizanga olw'okuba baganda baibwe. Beeyongerenga bweyongere okubagheereza obukalamu, kuba abo be bagheereza Bakuristo era bagonzi. Ebyo by'obe obeegeresenga era obakubirizenga okukola." 
1Timothy6:3 Omuntu yeenayeena ayegeresa mu nsambo eyindi nga taisania na bibono bituufu ebya Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito era nga taisania na ndhegeresa ya kutya Katonda," 
1Timothy6:4 yeepanka era azira ky'aidhi. Yeemalira mu kutakana na kusoola olw'ekibono kino oba kire. Omwo n'omutanuka ensaalwa, obutaisania, okuvumagana, okulowookeza abandi ebiziragho" 
1Timothy6:5 n'okughaghaana. Ebyo byonabyona bikolebwa abantu ab'omwoyo omubi, abaawaamu amazima, abatwala okwikiriza ng'engira ey'okukombaghala." 
1Timothy6:6 Kituufu okwikiriza kulimu obukombe kamaala, kasita ole n'awulira ng'ebyo by'ali nabyo bimumala." 
1Timothy6:7 Kuba mu nsi muno twaidhamu bakaya, era tulivaamu bakaya." 
1Timothy6:8 Agho ni, bwe tuba ni kye tulya, ni kye tuvaala, ekyo kitumala" 
1Timothy6:9 Aye abo abenda okukombaghala tibalwa kukemebwa ni bagwa mu mutego ogw'amairu amangi ag'obusirusiru, ag'akabi era agasuula abantu mu kufafaagana ni mu kuzikirira." 
1Timothy6:10 Kuba okwenda einho empiiya, n'ekikolo okusibuka ebibi byonabyona. Era okuba n'amairu gaadho amangi kuleeteire abandi okudaaliima n'okuva ku kwikiriza, beereetera okudaagadaaga okw'amaani." 
1Timothy6:11 Aye iwe omuntu wa Katonda, ebyo byonabyona bireke, ojiirenga ku butuufu, okutya Katonda, okwikiriza, okugonza, okuguminkiriza n'okuba omwikaikamu." 
1Timothy6:12 Lwana bukalamu olutalo olw'okwikiriza, ogheebwe obulamu obutawaagho, Katonda bwe yakwetera, lwe weeyatulira obukalamu mu maiso ag'abadhulizi abangi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndi kukusikirira mu maiso ga Katonda agha byonabyona obulamu, n'aga Kurisito Yesu eyayatula okwikiriza mu maiso ga Pontio Pilato," 
1Timothy6:14 okuumenga ekiragiro kalemberera nga ghazira kibi kyonakyona kikwogerwaku, okutuusa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito lw'aliidha." 
1Timothy6:15 Katonda asaakibwa era afuga byonabyona, Kyabazinga wa bakyabazinga era Musengwa wa basengwa, alyoleka okwidha okwo mu kiseera kyakwo ekituufu." 
1Timothy6:16 Ni yenka atafa era aba mu butangaavu obutaseetekaku, ghazira yaali amuboine, era ghazira aghanga kumubona. Aisibwengamu ekitiisa era afugenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
1Timothy6:17 Labula abakombe ab'oku nsi kuno, balobe kweghanika, waire okwesiga obukombe obutali bwa lubeerera, aye beesige Katonda atugha byonabyona ebitusangaaza." 
1Timothy6:18 Bagwaine okukola obulungi, babe bakombe mu bikolwa ebirungi, aby'ekisa era eby'obugabi." 
1Timothy6:19 Olwo banaaba beeterekeire obukombe obulibagasa mu biseera ebiriidha, bw'abafunisa obulamu bwene." 
1Timothy6:20 Timotheo, kuumanga bukalamu bye wagemesebwa. Oteeyimbanga mu mpayo edh'abatatya Katonda, ni mu kutakana ebiziramu, abandi kwe beeta amagezi" 
1Timothy6:21 kuba abandi abakoba bati bali nago badaaliima baava mu kwikiriza. Katonda abagemerwenga ekisa mwenamwena. 
2Timothy1:1 Ninze Paulo omutume wa Kurisito Yesu olw'okwenda kwa Katonda. Natumibwa okukobera abantu eky'obulamu Katonda bwe yasuubiza abo abaisa ekirala mu Kurisito Yesu. 
2Timothy1:2 Mpandiikira Timotheo omwana wange omugonzi. Katonda Lata, ni Kurisito Yesu Musengwa waife akughe enkabi n'emiraala, era akusaasire." 
2Timothy1:3 Neeyanza Katonda oyo ye mpeereza n'omwoyo omunaabuufu, era nga badhaadha bange bwe baakolanga. Kiisi lwemba nga nsaba nkwidhukira era naamusiima." 
2Timothy1:4 Ndidhukira bukalamu amaziga go, era buli kaseera naayenda inho nkuboneku memale nsangaale." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndidhukira okwikiriza kwo okw'amazima okwatoolerera mu dhaadha wo Loi, ni kuja ni mu inhoko Eunike, era buti kwe nkakasa nti kuli ni mu iwe." 
2Timothy1:6 Kyenva nkwidhusa okukuumanga ekirabo ekiri mu iwe Katonda kye yakugha lwe nakwisaaku emikono, kirobe kuzikirira" 
2Timothy1:7 kuba Mwoyo Katonda y'atugha ti wa kutya, aye n'oyo atwidhuza amaani, okugonzania, n'okwefuga." 
2Timothy1:8 Agho ni mutagemebwanga nsoni kugha budhulirwa ku Musengwa waife, oba ku nze ye baata mu ikomera olw'eriina lye, aye mudaagirenga ghalala n'ife olw'Amawulire Amalungi nga mukozesa amaani Katonda g'abagha." 
2Timothy1:9 Ono yatulokola era yaatweta okuba ababe. Kino tiyakikola lwa bikolwa bye twakola, aye olw'ekigendererwa kye mwene era n'olw'ekisa, kye yatulaga mu Kurisito Yesu okuva eira n'eira." 
2Timothy1:10 Era buti twakibonera mu kwidha kw'Omulokozi waife Kurisito Yesu eyatoolagho okufa, n'atwoleka obulamu obutawaagho obubita mu Mawulire Amalungi." 
2Timothy1:11 Nalondebwa okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi ng'omutume era omwegeresa," 
2Timothy1:12 era kyenva ni ndaagadaaga nti. Aye ekyo tikingemya nsoni kuba ndidhi bukalamu oyo ye naikiriza, era nkakasa nti asobola bukalamu okukuuma ekyo kye yanteresa okutuusa ku lunaku lule." 
2Timothy1:13 Ojiiranga ku bibono byange ebituufu nga bwe wampuliranga nga mbyogera. Kino kikolenga ng'oli mu kwikiriza ni mu kugonza ebiri mu kuba ekirala mu Kurisito Yesu. 
2Timothy1:14 Okuumanga bukalamu ekyo eky'omughendo ekyakuteresebwa ng'okozesa amaani ga Mwoyo Mutukuvu ali n'ife. 
2Timothy1:15 Oidhi bukalamu ng'abali mu Asia boonaboona bwe baaneeyawulaku, nga mw'otwaliire Fugelo ni Herumogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Aye nsaba, Musengwa ayoleke ab'omu ndhu ya Onesiforo okusaasira, kuba emikuzi kamaala ng'andhizaamu amaani nga nze okuba mu ikomera ti kimugemya nsoni." 
2Timothy1:17 Era olwatuuka mu Roma ati yandhagala era yambona. 
2Timothy1:18 Era oidhukira bukalamu bye yankolera nga tuli mu Efeso. Musengwa amugemerwe ekisa kye ku lunaku lule. 
2Timothy2:1 Iwe niini mwana wange, weekalangule ng'oyambibwa amaani agali mu kwisa ekirala mu Kurisito Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Ebyo bye wawulira nga nkoba mu maiso g'abadhulirwa abangi, bigemye abantu abo abeesigwa abalisobola boona okubyegeresa abandi." 
2Timothy2:3 Ganha okudaazibwadaazibwa ng'omwisirukale wa Kurisito Yesu omutuufu. 
2Timothy2:4 Ghazira mwisirukale aba ku mulimo kabiri amala n'aira mu midoobaano gya bantu babuliidho. Ekiseera kyonakyona aba ayenda kukolera ku biragiro by'omuduumizi. 
2Timothy2:5 Ole angira mu mizaanho egy'entaka taghanga kugheebwa kirabo nga tajiiriire ku mateeka ga mizaanho egyo, ni bw'aba nga n'asinze baine." 
2Timothy2:6 Omulimi eyafuba n'asooka okulya ku bibala. 
2Timothy2:7 Isanga omwoyo ku bye ndi kukoba, Musengwa aidha kukugha okutegeera byonabyona." 
2Timothy2:8 Idhukira Yesu Kurisito, mwidhukulu wa Daudi eyazuukizibwa mu bafu ng'Amawulire Amalungi ge mbakobera bwe gakoba." 
2Timothy2:9 Ndaazibwadaazibwa olw'okuba mbakobera Amawulire Amalungi, era naasibwa endhegere ng'oti ndi mukozi wa bibi. Aye kasita ekibono kya Katonda tiikisibe kya ludhegere." 
2Timothy2:10 Kyenva ngumira buli kintu olw'obulungi bw'abalonde, olwo bafune okulokolebwa n'ekitiisa ekitawaagho ebiri mu Kurisito Yesu." 
2Timothy2:11 Ekibono kino kituufu ekikoba kiti: “Oba nga twafiira ghalala naye, era tuliba balamu ghalala naye." 
2Timothy2:12 Bwe tuguma tulifugira ghalala naye; bwe tumwegaana yeena alitwegaana. 
2Timothy2:13 Bwe tutaba beesigwa, mwene asigala nga mwesigwa; kuba tasobola kwegaana kye yakoba.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Baidhuse kino era obasikirire mu maiso ga Musengwa, balobenga kutakana lwa bibono bubono. Kino kiziramu muganhulo okutoolaku okwitaitana abawulira." 
2Timothy2:15 Kola kyonakyona ky'osobola osiimibwe Katonda, obe mukozi atagemerwa mulimo gwe nsoni, era ayegeresa obukalamu ekibono eky'amazima." 
2Timothy2:16 Oteeyimbanga mu mpayo dhiziramu kutya Katonda, edhongera obwongere abantu obutatya Katonda." 
2Timothy2:17 Ate ebibono byaibwe bisansaana ng'oti ibwa lya kokolo. Mu abo n'omuli Himenao ni Fileto," 
2Timothy2:18 abaadaaliima ni bava ku mazima nga bakoba mbu okuzuukira kwamala ira okubaagho, mu kukola batyo baakiidhamya okwikiriza kw'abantu abandi." 
2Timothy2:19 Aye omusingi gwa Katonda mugumu era gughandiikiibwaku ebibono ebikoba biti: “Musengwa aidhi ababe,” era ni biti “Kiisi ayatula eriina lya Musengwa ateekwa okuva mu bibi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Mu ndhu enkologho timubaamu bibya bya zaabu na feeza byonka, aye mubaamu n'eby'omuti n'eby'eitosi ebindi bikozesebwa ku mirimo egy'ebbeeyi, ate ebindi byakozesebwa ku mirimo egyabuliidho." 
2Timothy2:21 Omuntu bwe yeetukuza n'ava mu bibi byonabyona, afuuka ekibya ekikozesebwa emirimo egy'ebbeeyi, ng'atukuziibwa era nga wa mugaso ye Musengwa era eyeetegeike okukola omulimo gwonagwona omukalamu." 
2Timothy2:22 Agho ni lekanga ebitwaliriza abaisuka byonabyona, okolererenga obutuufu, okwikiriza, okugonza, n'emiraala nga weeyimbye n'abo abasinza Musengwa n'omwoyo omunaabuufu." 
2Timothy2:23 Oteeyimbanga mu kutakana kuziramu makulu oidhi ng'omwo n'omuva okusoolasoola. 
2Timothy2:24 Ate nga omugheereza wa Musengwa tateekwa kuba asoolasoola, ateekwa kuba wa kisa eri kiisi muntu, omwegeresa omutuufu, ateegania," 
2Timothy2:25 era agalagira abamutakania aghazira ikabyo, kuba tomanha Katonda bw'abagha kwenenia ni beiraku ni bamanha mazima." 
2Timothy2:26 Agho baasobola okuwunuka omutego gwa Sitaani ogwabagemya n'abakoza by'ayenda. 
2Timothy3:1 Aye kino kimanhe, nga mu nnaku edhirisembayo ghalibaagho ebiseera eby'akabi." 
2Timothy3:2 Abantu balyefaaku bonka, baliba n'amairu ag'empiiya, balyetuusa, balyesaakiriza, baliba bavumagani, baliroba okuwulira ababazaala, baliba abatasiima, abatali batukuvu," 
2Timothy3:3 abatalumirwa banaibwe, abatasaasira, abasala ku banaibwe ebibono, abatasobola kwefuga, abakambwe, abakyagha kiisi kikalamu," 
2Timothy3:4 abateesigika, abagwidhubana, abaghaganhala olw'okwebona nga ba ghaigulu, abagonza eby'amasanhu mu kifo ky'okugonza Katonda," 
2Timothy3:5 abeeyeta Abakurisito aye nga tibenda Bukurisito kubafuga. Weesambenga abantu ng'oti n'abo. 
2Timothy3:6 Mu abo n'omuli abaja mu maka ag'abantu ni baagaanamu abakazi abanafu mu myoyo, ni babatwala ng'abairu. Bano n'abakazi abaidhwire ebibi era abatwalirizibwa ebintu kamaala." 
2Timothy3:7 Abakazi bano beetegefu okwega, aye tibaghanga kutuuka ku kumanha mazima." 
2Timothy3:8 Nga Yanne ni Yambure bwe baatakania Musa, n'abantu abo batyo bwe batakania amazima. Bano n'abantu abaafa emyoyo era abatakaali na kwikiriza." 
2Timothy3:9 Aye tibaidha kutuuka ghala, kuba buli muntu aidha kubona obusiru bwaibwe ng'oti n'obwa Yanne ni Yambure bwe bweyoleka." 
2Timothy3:10 Aye iwe obaire olondoola bukalamu bye mbaire nga ndhegeresanga, ensambo ye neebisaamu, ekigendererwa kyange mu bulamu, okwikiriza kwange, okugumira ebizibu kwange, okugonza kwange, okuguminkiriza kwange," 
2Timothy3:11 okukirigibwa kwange, okudaagadaaga kwange, ebyantuukaku nga ndi mu Antiokia ni mu Ikonio ni mu Lisitura. Nga nakirigibwa inho! Aye byonabyona Musengwa yabimbisaamu bukalamu." 
2Timothy3:12 Bwenebwene kyo kiri nti kiisi ayenda okuba mu bulamu obutya Katonda mu Kurisito Yesu wa kukirigibwa," 
2Timothy3:13 eno ng'abakozi b'ebibi n'abaguya bwe beeyongera okuba ababi, nga baguya ate nga beene boona babaguya." 
2Timothy3:14 Aye iwe weeyongere okugumira ku ebyo bye wayega, era n'obiikiririza irala, olw'okumanha abo be wabyegeraku." 
2Timothy3:15 Era oidhukira ng'okuva mu buto bwo obaire oyegeresebwa Ebyaghandiikibwa Ebitukuvu ebisobola okukugalagira okukutuusa ku kulokolebwa olw'okuba n'okwikiriza mu Kurisito Yesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Ebyaghandiikibwa byonabyona byava mu buyinza bwa Katonda era bya muganhulo mu kwegeresa, mu kunenia, mu kugondhoola ebidobaine, ni mu kugalagira omuntu abe mutuukirivu." 
2Timothy3:17 Olwo omuntu wa Katonda abe mwetegefu ng'ali n'ebyetaagisa byonabyona okukola kiisi mulimo omukalamu. 
2Timothy4:1 Nkusikirira mu maiso ga Katonda ni Kurisito Yesu, aja okusalira abalamu n'abafu omusango, era aja okwira okufuga nga Kyabazinga." 
2Timothy4:2 Koberanga abantu ekibono, badeebe oba bakisiima oba tibakisiima, bainhonhole, obanenie era obagumye, obeegerese n'obuguminkiriza." 
2Timothy4:3 Kuba ekiseera kiri kwidha abantu balekere okuwulira okwegeresa okw'amazima, aye olw'okwenda einho okuwulira ababeegeresa ebibanhoonha, balyagala abeegeresa aba buli nsambo." 
2Timothy4:4 Balirekera okuwulirisa eby'amazima, beemalira mu kuwulirisa nfumo." 
2Timothy4:5 Aye iwe banga mwetegefu buliidho, gumiranga okudaagadaaga, kolanga omulimo ogw'okukobera abantu Amawulire Amalungi ng'omugheereza wa Katonda." 
2Timothy4:6 Kuba nze ndi kumpi okugheebwayo ku alutaari ng'omusengo, esaawa yange ey'okuva mu bulamu buno teri ghala." 
2Timothy4:7 Nwaine bukalamu olutalo, embiro ndhimaliriiza, ngumiire ku kwikiriza." 
2Timothy4:8 Era mperaano Katonda ambiikiire eyo obutuufu ng'ekirabo eky'obughanguzi, Musengwa era omulamuzi omutuufu ky'alimpa ku Lunaku lule. Taligha nze zenka aye aligha abo boonaboona abeesunga okwira kwe." 
2Timothy4:9 Kola kyonakyona ky'oghanga oidhe eno mangu 
2Timothy4:10 kuba Dema olw'okugonza einho eby'oku nsi kuno yandekulira agho, yaaja e Thessalonika. Kuresike yaja Galatia ate Tito yaaja e Dalumatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ghano ndigho ni Luka yenka. Yagala Mariko gh'ali oidhe naye kuba anhamba inho mu kugheereza. 
2Timothy4:12 Tukiko namutuma mu Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Bw'oba ng'oidha ondeetera ekivaalo kyange kye nalekera Karupo e Turoa, n'ebitabo, okusingira irala ebyo eby'empu." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekisandero omugheesi yankola bubi inho, aye Musengwa alimwesasuulizaaku olw'ebyo bye yankola." 
2Timothy4:15 Weena mwegendereze inho kuba yatakania inho obukwenda bwaife. 
2Timothy4:16 Lwe neewozaaku olwasooka ghazira yali ku luuyi lwange, boonaboona bandekulira agho. Aye Katonda mmusaba alobe kubalanga ekyo!" 
2Timothy4:17 Aye Musengwa yali ninze, era yampa amaani naakobera mu bwidhuvu abamaghanga agandi ekibono kya Katonda, baakiwulira. Olwo yamponia okunsalira ogw'okufa." 
2Timothy4:18 Era Musengwa oyo aidha kumponia kiisi kibi kyonakyona, antuuse bukalamu mu Bwakyabazinga bwe obw'omu igulu. Agheebwenga ekitiisa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
2Timothy4:19 Namukiza Purisikilla ni Akwila n'ab'omu ndhu ya Onesiforo. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasito yasigala mu Korintho, ate Turofimo naamuleka e Mileto nga mugodhe." 
2Timothy4:21 Fuba nga bw'osobola oidhe ng'ebiseera eby'ekiinhogogo bikaali kutuuka. Eubulo, Pudente, Lino, Kilaudia n'Abakurisito abandi boonaboona bakulamwisa." 
2Timothy4:22 Musengwa abe n'omwoyo gwo. Enkabi dha Katonda dhibe n'imwe mwenamwena. 
Titus1:1 Ninze Paulo omugheereza wa Katonda era omutume wa Yesu Kurisito. Natumibwa okugaziya okwikiriza okw'abantu ba Katonda abalonde, n'okubamanhisa amazima ag'endhikiriza etya Katonda," 
Titus1:2 ageemereire ku kusuubira obulamu obutawaagho. Katonda oyo ataguya n'eyatusuubiza obulamu obwo okuva eira n'eira. 
Titus1:3 Era mu kiseera ekituufu yaabutwolekera mu bukwenda bwe. Obukwenda buno bwampeebwa, era Katonda Omulokozi waife yampa ekiragiro mbukobere abantu." 
Titus1:4 Mpandiikira Tito omwana wange mwenemwene bwe twikiriza obulala. Katonda lata ni Kurisito Yesu Omulokozi waife akughe enkabi n'emiraala. 
Titus1:5 Nakuleka mu Kurete omalirize ebyali bikaali kugondhooka, era oteegho abakulembeze ab'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito mu kiisi kibuga nga bwe nakulagira." 
Titus1:6 Oyo y'olonda ateekwa okuba ng'aziraku ky'anenezebwa era ng'ali n'omukazi mulala yenka. Abaana be bateekwa kuba abaikiriza mu Kurisito, era nga tibabalirwa mu balalulalu waire mu badheemu." 
Titus1:7 Omulabirizi nga bw'ali nti n'alabirira emirimo gya Katonda, tateekwa kuba na kimunenezebwa. Tateekwa kuba mudhoozi, waire asungughala amangu, waire omutamiivu, oba omukambwe, era nga tagwidhubanira bya kufuna." 
Titus1:8 Aye ateekwa okuba ng'asangaalira abageni, agonza okukola ebikalamu, aghanga okwefuga, akola ekituufu, omutukuvu era aghanga okwekugira." 
Titus1:9 Ateekwa okunhweza endhegeresa entuufu nga bw'eyegeresebwa, memale aghange okugumya abantu mu ndhegeresa entuufu era n'okwoleka obukyamu bw'abo abagitakania." 
Titus1:10 Ghaligho abadheemu kamaala aboogera ebiziramu era abaguya, era ng'okusingira irala bali mu abo abasemba eky'okukeketa." 
Titus1:11 Abantu abo bateekwa okusirisibwa, kuba bali kukiidhamya okwikiriza okw'amaka amalambirira kamaala, nga beegeresa ebyo bye batagwaniire kwegeresa olw'okwenda okugwidhubanira eby'okufuna." 
Titus1:12 Owundi ku beene abo era omulanzi waibwe mwene yakoba ati: “Abakurete baguya babuliidho, bali ng'oti nsolo dha mu nsiko, bagayaavu era balyalya.”" 
Titus1:13 Olw'ensonga eyo oteekwa okubadhuukira irala memale babe n'okwikiriza okutuufu," 
Titus1:14 mu kifo eky'okwemalira mu nfumo edh'Ekiyudaaya oba ku biragiro ebigundhe eby'abantu abaaloba amazima. 
Titus1:15 Eri abantu abaamufu, ebintu byonabyona biba byamufu. Aye eri abo abatali baamufu era abataikiriza, tighaba kyamufu. Kuba ebirowoozo byaibwe, n'emyoyo gyaibwe, byayonooneka." 
Titus1:16 Bakoba mbu baidhi Katonda, aye mu bikolwa byaibwe bamwegaana. Katonda oyo abeenhinhala bwenhinhale, era beene bamudheemera, baabulaku ekikalamu kye basobola okukola." 
Titus2:1 Aye iwe yegeresanga ebyo ebiisania n'endhegeresa entuufu. 
Titus2:2 Kubirizanga abasaadha abakulu beefugenga, babenga bantu bakalamu. Batenga amagezi mu bye bakola, babenga baidhuvu mu kwikiriza, mu kugonza ni mu kuguminkiriza." 
Titus2:3 Abakazi abakulu boona bakubirizenga, babenga n'empisa edhigwanira abantu abatya Katonda nga tibasalagania bibono, era nga ti batamiivu. Bateekwa okwegeresanga ebigwaniire," 
Titus2:4 memale bagalagirenga bakazi banaibwe abakaali abato okugonzanga baibaibwe n'abaana baibwe. 
Titus2:5 Era batenga amagezi mu bye bakola, babenga baamufu, abakola obukalamu emirimo mu maka gaibwe, ab'ekisa era abawulize ye baibaibwe. Memale ekibono kya Katonda kirobenga kuvumibwa." 
Titus2:6 Mu nsambo n'endala, kubirizanga abaisuka okwefuganga." 
Titus2:7 Era iwe mwene oteekwa okuba eky'okuboneraku ekirungi mu by'okola byonabyona, ng'oli wa mazima era omumalirivu mu kwegeresa kwo." 
Titus2:8 Kozesanga ebibono ebituufu byene omuntu by'atasobola kubisaamu maiso olwo, abazigu bo baswale olw'okubula ekibi kye basobola okutwogeraku." 
Titus2:9 Koba abairu bawulirenga basengwa baibwe era babasiimyenga mu bintu byonabyona nga tibabatakania," 
Titus2:10 waire okubaibaku ebyaibwe. Aye boolekenga obwesigwa obw'amazima mu buli kintu, kino kireetere abantu okusiima ebyegeresebwa ku Katonda Omulokozi waife." 
Titus2:11 Kuba ekisa kya Katonda kiboneike, abantu boonaboona baghange okulokoka." 
Titus2:12 Era kitwegeresa okutya Katonda n'okulekayo okwegomba okw'ensi eno, n'okuba abantu abasobola okwefuga, abeesimbu, era abatya Katonda mu nsi muno." 
Titus2:13 Era tube nga tuteegerera olunaku olw'enkabi lwe tusuubira, era nga tuteegerera okuboneka okw'ekitiisa kya Katonda waife omukologho era Omulokozi waife Yesu Kurisito." 
Titus2:14 Oyo n'eyeeghaayo okutununula mu bibi byaife byonabyona era n'okutufuula abantu be abaamufu abenda einho okukola ebintu ebikalamu. 
Titus2:15 Yegeresanga ebintu bino ng'olamba era ng'onenianga abantu bo n'obuyinza bwonabwona. Ghatabangagho muntu yeenayeena akunhoomanga. 
Titus3:1 Idhukizanga Abakurisito bo okuwuliranga abafuzi n'ab'obuyinza, n'okubagonderanga, era babenga beetegefu okukola kiisi mulimo mukalamu." 
Titus3:2 Bakubirizenga balobenga kwogeranga ku muntu yeenayeena bubi, waire okusoolanga n'omuntu yeenayeena, aye babenga ba idembe era abazira ikabyo" 
Titus3:3 kuba twena eira twali basiru era abadheemu, nga twadaaliima era nga tufugibwa okwegomba kwaife n'amasanhu aga buli nsambo. Twali ba itima era ab'ensaalwa, ng'abantu batukyagha era nga tukyagha abantu boonaboona." 
Titus3:4 Aye Katonda Omulokozi waife bwe yayoleka ekisa kye n'okugonza kwe kw'agonzaamu abantu," 
Titus3:5 twalokolwa. Nga ti lwa bikolwa byaife ebikalamu bye twakola aye lwa kusaasira kwe. Yatulokola nga tunaazibwa, twazaalibwa omukuzi ogwokubiri, era twafuuka bayaaka mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Titus3:6 Mwoyo oyo Katonda ye yatugha mu bwidhuvu ku bwa Yesu Kurisito Omulokozi waife. 
Titus3:7 Ekyo yakikola okutugheesa obutuukirivu olw'ekisa kye, tusuubire okugheebwa obulamu obutawaagho." 
Titus3:8 Ekibono kino kituufu kyene. Nhenda weekalangule okukobera abo abaikiriza Katonda ebintu ebyo basobole okwemaliranga ku kukola ebikolwa ebikalamu, nga bikalamu era ebiganhula abantu." 
Titus3:9 Aye oteeyimbanga mu ntaka dhiziramu makulu, oba okutakana ku ndyo dha bantu, oba obutaisania n'okusoola ku biri mu mateeka, kuba ebyo ghazira kye biganhula era bya bwereere." 
Titus3:10 Oyo aleetera abantu okwekutulakutulamu, mulabulenga omukuzi mulala oba ebiri, omwesambe." 
Titus3:11 Kuba oidhi nga omuntu oti n'oyo aba nga adaaliimye era nga mwonooni, era aba nga yeesaliire mwene omusango okumusinga." 
Titus3:12 Bwe nkutumiranga Aritema oba Tukiko, okolanga kyonakyona ky'osobola waidha e Nikopoli, kuba nsazeegho okuba eyo mu biseera by'ekiinhogogo." 
Titus3:13 Fuba nga bw'osobola okutegekera Zena Omunamateeka era ni Apollo mu olugendo lwaibwe, obone nga kiisi kye benda bali nakyo." 
Titus3:14 Abantu baife bagwaine beege okukozesanga ebiseera byaibwe obukalamu, nga bakola emirimo omuva ebyetaago balobe kuba agho nga bazira kye bagasa." 
Titus3:15 Boonaboona abali ninze bakulamwisa. Lamusa abo abatugonza, be tuli nabo mu kwikiriza okulala. Enkabi dha Katonda dhibe n'imwe mwenamwena." 
Philemon1:1 Ninze Paulo, omusibe olwa Kurisito Yesu, era ni Timotheo muganda waife. Mpandiikira mukagwa waife era mukozi munaife Filemoni," 
Philemon1:2 ni Affia mwanhina ife, ni Arikippo mulwani munaife, era n'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito ekyesololeza mu ndhu yo." 
Philemon1:3 Katonda era Lata waife, ni Musengwa Yesu Kurisito abaghe enkabi n'emiraala." 
Philemon1:4 Buliidho nkwidhukira mu kusaba kwange era naasiima Katonda wange. 
Philemon1:5 Kuba mpulira okugonza kw'ogonzaamu abatuukirivu boonaboona, era n'okwikiriza kw'oli nakwo mu Musengwa Yesu."
