Philemon1:6 Era nsaba nti okwisania kwaife n'iwe mu kwikiriza, kutwongere okumanha ebirungi bye tuli nabyo mu Kurisito." 
Philemon1:7 Muganda wange, okugonza kwo kundeeteire okusagamba einho era n'okwiramu amaani, kuba ku lulwo emyoyo gy'abatuukirivu, giize buyaaka." 
Philemon1:8 Olw'okugonza kw'ogonzaamu abatuukirivu boonaboona, nze ng'owoluganda mu Kurisito tikyandintiisiisa kukulagira bulagire kukola ekyo ekigwaine." 
Philemon1:9 Aye olw'okuba tugonzania, nkweghemba bweghembe, waire nga ninze Paulo omukwenda wa Kurisito Yesu, era omusibe ku lwa Kurisito oyo." 
Philemon1:10 Ndi kukweghemba ku lw'omwana wange Onesimo eyafuuka omwana wange nga ndi musibe. 
Philemon1:11 Eira tiyakugasanga, aye mperaano yafuuka wa mugaso ye iwe ninze." 
Philemon1:12 Ndi kumutuma aire y'oli, aye nga mmugonza inho." 
Philemon1:13 Nandyenze inho mmusigaze ghano ninze, anhambe mu kifo kyo nga ndi mu busibe buno bwe ndimu olw'Amawulire Amalungi." 
Philemon1:14 Aye tyayenda kukola kintu kyonakyona nga toganhie olwo obuyambi bwonabwona bw'okola bube nga buviire mu mwoyo gwo mwene aghazira kukakibwa. 
Philemon1:15 Oba katyo kyali nti Onesimo yali ali n'okukuvaaku entangama entonotono, memale aghange okwira okuba owuwo ekiseera kyonakyona." 
Philemon1:16 Era mperaano ti mwiru bwiru kyonka, aye asinga omwiru: buti waluganda waife, omugonzi einho ye nze, aye ate okusingira irala ye iwe. Kuba mwiru ate kabiri yaaba muganda wo mu Musengwa!" 
Philemon1:17 Mbeeni oba nga nze ndi mwino, Onesimo musangaalire oti ni bwe wandisangaaliire nze." 
Philemon1:18 Oba nga ghaligho ekibi kye yakukola oba ekintu ky'omubandha, kibale ku nze." 
Philemon1:19 Kino nkighandiise n'omukono gwange mwene nti: nze Paulo ndidha kukusasula. Ndidhi nti ni bwe ntakwidhukiza, okiidhi bukalamu ng'okaali kunsasula olw'obulamu bwo." 
Philemon1:20 Kale ni owoluganda, nkolera eky'omugaso ku lwa Musengwa. Kola ekinaasangaaza omwoyo gwange mu Kurisito." 
Philemon1:21 Nga neesiga obugonvu bwo, mpandiise nga ndidhi nti oidha kukola ekisingagho ku ekyo kye nsabye." 
Philemon1:22 Ekindi kye nsaba, ntegekeraayo agh'okusula ng'omugeni, kuba ndi kusuubira nti Katonda aidha kwiramu okusaba kwaimwe mwenamwena andhize ye muli." 
Philemon1:23 Epafura musibe munange ku lwa Kurisito Yesu," 
Philemon1:24 era ni bakozi banange bano: Mariko, Arisitaruko, Dema ni Luka, babalamwisa." 
Philemon1:25 Enkabi dha Musengwa Yesu Kurisito dhibe n'imwe mwenamwena. 
Hebrews1:1 Eira Katonda yayogeranga ni badhaadha baife emikuzi kamaala era mu nsambo kamaala ng'abita mu balanzi. 
Hebrews1:2 Aye mu nnaku dhino edhisembayo yaayogera n'ife ng'abita mu Mwana we, ye yataagho okuba mwene bintu byonabyona, era ye yabitamu okutonda ensi." 
Hebrews1:3 Mu oyo ekitiisa kya Katonda mwe kibonekera, era mu oyo mwe tubonera irala Katonda nga bw'afaanana. Era oyo n'agemereire ebintu byonabyona n'ekibono kye eky'amaani. Bwe yamala okuwonia abantu ebibi byaibwe, yaatyama mu igulu ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogw'oyo asinga boonaboona obukumu." 
Hebrews1:4 Mwana yagheebwa ekitiisa ekisinga ekya bamalaika, era nga bwe yagheebwa eriina erisinga agaibwe ekitiisa" 
Hebrews1:5 kuba naani ku bamalaika Katonda ye yaali akobyeku ati: “Iwe oli mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzaire?” Oba ati: “Ndidha kuba Ise, ate mwene abe mwana wange.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Era Kabiri ng'ali kumpi okutuma mu nsi Omwana we omuberi yaakoba ati: “Bamalaika ba Katonda boonaboona, bamusinzenga.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Era bw'ayogera ku bamalaika akoba ati: “Katonda afuula bamalaika be empewo, abagheereza be yaabafuula enimi edh'omuliro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Aye bw'ayogera ku Mwana akoba ati: “Obwakyabazinga bwo, Katonda ow'ekitiisa, bwa byanda na byanda era ofuga abantu bo mu butuufu:" 
Hebrews1:9 Ogonza obutuufu waakyagha obudheemu Katonda wo kyeyava akulonda era n'akugha okusangaalira mu kitiisa okusinga baino boonaboona.” 
Hebrews1:10 Era akoba ati: “Iwe Musengwa, mu kwinhama watonda ensi era n'ebiri mu igulu, n'iwe owabikola n'engalo dho." 
Hebrews1:11 Ebyo biriwaagho, aye iwe olisigalagho ebyanda n'ebyanda era byonabyona birikairigha ng'oti bivaalo." 
Hebrews1:12 Olibizingaku ng'ekidhuuba era birikyusibwa ng'oti bivaalo. Aye iwe tokyukakyuka, era obulamu bwo tibuwaagho.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Aye naani ku bamalaika be, ye yaali akobyeku ati: “Tyama ghano ku luuyi lwange olw'omukono omusaadha, okutuusa lwe ndifuula abazigu bo ekintu kw'ota ebigere.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Kale bamalaika ti n'emyoyo egigheereza Katonda, gy'atuma olw'abo ab'okulokolebwa?" 
Hebrews2:1 Agho ni tuteekwa okukalangula ebyo bye twawulira, tulobe kuwunguka kubivaaku." 
Hebrews2:2 Kale oba nga obukwenda obwalangirirwa bamalaika bwali bwa mazima, era nga kiisi ataabugonderanga, oba eyabudheemeranga yagheebwanga ekibonerezo ekimujaamu," 
Hebrews2:3 memale ife tuliwona tutya bwe tugayaalirira obulokozi obukulu obwaga agho? Obwo Musengwa mwene n'eyasooka okubulangirira, memale abo abaabuwulira, baatukakasa nga bwa mazima." 
Hebrews2:4 Ni Katonda mwene yeena yaakakasa ebibono byaibwe ng'akola obumanhiso, n'ebyewuunhio, n'ebyewuninkiriza eby'endhawulo, era ng'agaba n'ebirabo bya Mwoyo Mutukuvu nga bwe yayendanga." 
Hebrews2:5 Katonda tiyagha bamalaika kufuga nsi ye twogeraku eja okubaagho. 
Hebrews2:6 Aye ghaligho ole gh'akikakasa mu byaghandiikibwa ng'akoba ati: “Omuntu katyo ni ki, iwe okumudhuuba? Oba omwana w'omuntu ni ki, iwe okumulumirwa?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wamukola yaabaaku ghansi gha bamalaika okumala akaseera. Wamuvaaza engule ey'ekitiisa era waamugha okutiibwa. 
Hebrews2:8 Ebintu byonabyona waabiisa mu bufuzi bwe.” Bwe yata ebintu byonabyona mu bufuzi bwe ghazira kintu ky'ataamugha kufuga. Aye mperaano tukaali kubona nga byonabyona bw'abifuga. 
Hebrews2:9 Aye tubona Yesu eyafuulibwa okubaaku ghansi gha bamalaika akaseera, olw'ekisa kya Katonda aghange okufiirira abantu boonaboona. Mperaano tumubona nga yavaazibwa engule ey'ekitiisa era yaagheebwa okutiibwa olw'okufa kwe." 
Hebrews2:10 Kuba kyali kituufu Katonda eyatonda ebintu byonabyona era n'abibeesaagho, okuleeta abaana be kamaala mu kitiisa. Kye yava n'abona nga kigwaine oyo abakulembera okubatuusa ku bulokozi okumufuula atuukiriire, ng'amubisa mu kudaazibwadaazibwa." 
Hebrews2:11 Kuba oyo abatukuza, n'abo abatukuzibwa boonaboona bali ni iseibwe mulala. Kyava Yesu tagemwa nsoni kubeeta baganda be," 
Hebrews2:12 ng'akoba ati: “Ndikumanhisa ye baganda bange; ndikusaaka nga beesoloiza okukusinza.” 
Hebrews2:13 Era akoba ati: “Ndidha kwesiganga Katonda.” Era yeeyongera yaakoba ati: “Ndi ghano, n'abaana Katonda be yampa.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Kale, ng'abo Yesu b'ayeta abaana bwe bali abantu obuntu, yeena mwene yafuuka omuntu nga beene. Yakola atyo asobole okufa, era ng'abita mu kufa kwe azikirize Sitaani, ali n'obukumu ku kufa." 
Hebrews2:15 Olwo awonie abo, entiisa ey'okufa be yali egemereire ng'abairu obulamu bwaibwe bwonabwona;" 
Hebrews2:16 kuba bwenebwene bamalaika ti ni be yaidhirira okuyamba, aye yaidha okuyamba baidhukulu ba Aburahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Mbeeni kye kyava kimugwanira okuba nga baganda be mu byonabyona, memale asobole okugheereza Katonda ng'Omukulu wa Bakabona, ow'ekisa era omwesigwa, asoniyise abantu ebibi byaibwe." 
Hebrews2:18 Era mperaano asobola okubeera abo abalebwa, kuba mwene yalebwa era yaadaazibwadaazibwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Kale ni aboluganda abatukuvu, nga mwena bwemwayetebwa n'okwetebwa okuva mu igulu, mulowooze ku Yesu omutume era Omukulu wa Bakabona mu kwikiriza kwaife." 
Hebrews3:2 Yali mwesigwa y'oyo eyamulonda, era nga ni Musa yeena bwe yali omwesigwa mu nhumba ya Katonda." 
Hebrews3:3 Aye ng'omuzimbi bw'aba n'ekitiisa ekisinga eky'enhumba ye yazimba, ni Yesu agwanira ekitiisa ekisinga ekya Musa." 
Hebrews3:4 Kuba kiisi nhumba ebaaku eyagizimba, aye eyazimba ebintu byonabyona ni Katonda." 
Hebrews3:5 Era Musa yali mugheereza mwesigwa mu nhumba ya Katonda yoonayoona, ng'akakasa ebyo Katonda bye yali aja okwogera." 
Hebrews3:6 Aye Kurisito yali mwesigwa ng'omwana akulira enhumba ya Katonda era ife niife enhumba ya Katonda kasita tukalanguka era ni twesiimira mu kusuubira. 
Hebrews3:7 Kale ni nga Mwoyo Mutukuvu bw'akoba ati: “Olwaleero bwe muwulira eiroboozi lye," 
Hebrews3:8 mutakalangusa myoyo gyaimwe, ng'abadheemu bwe baakola ku lunaku lule, olwali olw'okulebwa mu irungu." 
Hebrews3:9 Eyo badhaadha baimwe bandeba era baabona bye nakola mu myaka amakumi ana (40). 
Hebrews3:10 Mbeeni n'okusungughalira abantu abo, naakoba nti, ‘Buli kaseera emyoyo gyaibwe gidaaliimira luuyi, tibawulira biragiro byange.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Nasungughala neefuugha nti, ‘Tiribaganha kutuuka ghe nali nja kubagheera kuwuumula.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Kale aboluganda, mwegendereze ghalobe kubaagho naire mulala ku imwe aba na mwoyo mubi era ogutaikiriza, n'ava ku Katonda omulamu." 
Hebrews3:13 Aye mulambaganenga buli lunaku, kasita luba nga lwetebwa “Olwaleero”, ghalobe kubaagho naire omulala ku imwe obuguya obw'ekibi ye bukalangusa omwoyo." 
Hebrews3:14 Kiri nti tuba tuli kwisa kirala mu Kurisito, kasita tukalangula obwesige bwaife bwe twatoolera nabwo, ni tubutuukiza irala ku nkomerero." 
Hebrews3:15 Ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Olwaleero bwe muwulira eiroboozi lye, mutakalangusa myoyo gyaimwe, ng'abadheemu bwe baakola ku lunaku lule.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Ni baani abaawulira eiroboozi lye memale ni bamudheemera? Ti n'abo boonaboona Musa be yakulembera n'abatoola mu Misiri? 
Hebrews3:17 Era ni baani Katonda be yasungughalira okumala emyaka amakumi ana (40)? Ti n'abo abaayona, ni bafa era emirambo gyaibwe ni gisigala mu irungu?" 
Hebrews3:18 Era ni baani be yeefuuyiraku obutabaganha kutuuka ghe yali aja okubagheera okuwuumula, okutoolaku abo abaamudheemera?" 
Hebrews3:19 Kale tubona nga baalemwa okutuuka lwa butaikiriza bwaibwe. 
Hebrews4:1 Kale ni ng'ekisuubizo eky'okutuuka aghali okuwuumula bwe kikaaligho, tufengayo okubona nga tighabaagho muntu yeenayeena ku imwe alemwa kutuukagho." 
Hebrews4:2 Kuba twena twawulira Amawulire Amalungi ng'oti ni beene bwe baagawulira. Aye bye baawulira tibyabaganhula, kuba byabaagaana nga baziramu kwikiriza." 
Hebrews4:3 Ife abaikiriza niife abatuuka aghali okuwuumula, nga bwe yakoba ati: “Nasungughala era neefuugha nti, ‘Tiribaganha kutuuka ghe nali nja kubagheera kuwuumula.’ ” Yakoba kino waire ng'emirimo gye gyali nga gyawa, bwe yamala okutonda ensi." 
Hebrews4:4 Ghaligho mu byaghandiikibwa olunaku olwomusanvu ghe lwogerwaku luti: “Era Katonda yawuumula ku lunaku olwomusanvu nga amaze emirimo gye gyonagyona.” 
Hebrews4:5 Era kabiri kyene kino eky'okuwuumula kyogerwaku kiti: “Tiribaganha kutuuka ghe nali nja kubagheera kuwuumula.” 
Hebrews4:6 Abo abaasooka okuwulira Amawulire Amalungi, tibaatuuka ku kuwuumula okwo, olw'obutaikiriza bwaibwe. Ghaligho niini abandi abatuuka." 
Hebrews4:7 Kino kiri kityo kuba era Katonda yataagho olunaku olundi olwetebwa “Olwaleero” lw'ayogeraku nga ghabiseegho emyaka kamaala ng'abita mu Daudi, nga bwe mmaze okukyogeraku ng'akoba ati: “Olwaleero bwe muwulira eiroboozi lye, mutakalangusa myoyo gyaimwe.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Nguli Yoshua yabatuusa aghali okuwuumula, Katonda ti yandyogeire ku lunaku lundi kabiri." 
Hebrews4:9 Kale ni abantu ba Katonda bakaaliyo n'okuwuumula ng'okwa Katonda okw'olunaku olwomusanvu. 
Hebrews4:10 Kuba kiisi atuuka ku kuwuumula Katonda kwe yasuubiza, awuumula mu mirimo gye oti ni Katonda yeena bwe yawuumula ng'amaze egigye." 
Hebrews4:11 Agho ni tufaabiikane okutuuka ku kuwuumula okwo, ghalobe kubaagho agwa olw'obutaikiriza nga bale." 
Hebrews4:12 Ekibono kya Katonda kiramu, kikola era kyogi okusinga empiima eri n'obwogi ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhombi. Kisalira irala kyatuuka n'okwawula omutima n'omwoyo, obuyungiro n'omusokono. Kisobola okubonera irala omuntu by'alowooza ni by'ayenda, ebiri mu mwoyo gwe." 
Hebrews4:13 Ghazira kitonde kisobola kugisibwa mu maiso ge. Ebintu byonabyona mu maiso ge byerule era biboneka. Era y'oyo buli muntu aja kwewozaaku kiisi kye yakola. 
Hebrews4:14 Kale nga bwe tuli n'Omukulu wa Bakabona omukologho atyo, Yesu Omwana wa Katonda, eyajiira irala ye Katonda, tukalangukire ku kwikiriza kwaife kwe twatula." 
Hebrews4:15 Omukulu wa Bakabona oyo ye tuli naye, n'oyo afaayo okutusaasira mu bunafu bwaife, era n'oyo eyalebwa mu buli nsambo ng'oti niife bwe tulebwa aye n'atakola kibi kyonakyona." 
Hebrews4:16 Kale ni tuseete kumpi n'ekityamo eky'ekisa kya Katonda nga tuli bagumu, memale atusaasire era atugemerwe ekisa kiisi lwe tuba nga twetaaga okubeerwa." 
Hebrews5:1 Kiisi Mukulu wa Bakabona alondebwa mu bantu, era ateebwagho okugheereza Katonda ku lwaibwe. Aghaayo ebigheebwayo, n'emisengo ye Katonda olw'ebibi byaibwe." 
Hebrews5:2 Asobola okugema empola abo abadaaliima olw'obutamanha, kuba yeena mwene munafu mu bintu kamaala." 
Hebrews5:3 Era olw'obunafu obwo ateekwa okughaayo emisengo olw'ebibi bye, n'olw'ebibi eby'abantu abandi." 
Hebrews5:4 Era omuntu tasobola kwegha mwene kitiisa ekyo kya kuba Kabona Mukulu. Aye ayetebwa bwetebwe Katonda ng'oti ni Aaroni bwe yayetebwa. 
Hebrews5:5 Mu nsambo n'endala Kurisito tiyeegha yenka kitiisa kya kuba Mukulu wa Bakabona, aye kyamugheebwa Katonda eyamukoba ati: “Iwe oli Mwana wange, olwaleero nkuzaire.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Ate era akoba aghandi ati: “Iwe oli kabona ebyanda n'ebyanda, nga Melekizedeki bwe yali.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Yesu mu bulamu bwe obw'oku nsi kuno, yayogerera ghaigulu mu kusaba kwe, era yaalira n'amaziga nga yeeghemba Katonda, eyali nga n'asobola okumuwonia okufa. Era olw'okutya Katonda okwo kwe yali nakwo, Katonda yamuwulira." 
Hebrews5:8 Waire yali Mwana wa Katonda, yayega obuwulize olw'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwe yabitamu." 
Hebrews5:9 Era ng'amaze okutuukirizibwa, abo boonaboona abamugondera yabafuukira ensimuko ey'obulokozi obutawaagho," 
Hebrews5:10 era Katonda yaamufuula Omukulu wa Bakabona ng'oti ni Melekizedeki bwe yali. 
Hebrews5:11 Tuli n'ebintu kamaala eby'okwogera ku nsonga eno, aye nga bizibu okwinhonhola, kuba mulwagho okutegeera." 
Hebrews5:12 Waire nga buti mwandibaire nga muli beegeresa, aye ate mukaayenda omuntu okubeegeresa ebyo ebiinhamirwaku mu kwega ekibono kya Katonda. Mukaayenda mata buta ng'oti n'abaana abato, mu kifo ky'emere yeene." 
Hebrews5:13 Kiisi anhwa amata obuta, aba akaali mwana muto ataghanga kwawulagho kituufu na kikyamu." 
Hebrews5:14 Aye emere yeene n'ey'abantu abakulu abamaze okwega olw'ebyo bye babitamu, era ni basobola okwawulagho ekirungi n'ekibi." 
Hebrews6:1 Kale ni ka tuleke ebyo bye twasookeraku okwega ebigema ku Kurisito, tuje mu maiso n'ebikulu. Titugwaine kabiri kwiramu kutaagho musingi buyaaka nga tubeegeresa okusooka okulekayo ebyo ebiziramu muganhulo bye mwakolanga, memale mutoolere okwikiriza Katonda." 
Hebrews6:2 Era nga tubeegeresa ebigema ku kubatizibwa okwa buli nsambo, n'ebigema ku kuteebwaku emikono, n'ebigema ku kuzuukira okw'abafu era n'ebigema ku kusalirwa omusango ogutawaagho." 
Hebrews6:3 Twidha kuja mu maiso, kasita Katonda n'atuganha;" 
Hebrews6:4 kuba tikisoboka kwikirizisa bantu kweiraku abaali bamulisiibwaku obutangaavu bwa Katonda ni babuvaamu, era abaali bafunieku ku kirabo eky'omu igulu ni bagabana ni ku Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Hebrews6:5 Era abaali bamanhieku ku bulungi obw'ekibono kya Katonda era n'amaani agali kwidha. 
Hebrews6:6 Abantu ng'oti n'abo bwe bava mu kwikiriza tikisoboka kubaikirizisa kweiraku, kuba bairamu okukomerera Omwana wa Katonda ku musalaba era baamuswaza mu lwatu." 
Hebrews6:7 Amaadhi gatoonha ku itaka emikuzi kamaala, eitaka lyaganhwa, era lyakuza ebisimbe ebiganhula beene byo Katonda yaaligha enkabi." 
Hebrews6:8 Aye bwe likuza amawa n'eisubi, liba tirikaagasa era nga liri kumpi kulaamibwa na kuzikirizibwa na muliro." 
Hebrews6:9 Bakagwa, aye ni bwe twogera tutyo, imwe tubeesiga, era twidhi nga muli n'enkabi inho okutuuka ku kulokolebwa." 
Hebrews6:10 Kuba Katonda ti n'omubi einho okusobola okwerabira omulimo gwe mwakola, n'okugonza kwe mwayoleka mu buyambi bwe mwagha, era bwe mukaagha abatuukirivu ni ye buli eno." 
Hebrews6:11 Era twenda kiisi mulala ku imwe okwolekanga okufaabiikana okwo, okutuusa ku nkomerero lwe mulifuna kye musuubira." 
Hebrews6:12 Ti twenda mube bagayaavu, aye mube ng'oti n'abo abaikiriza, era ni baguminkiriza, ni bafuna ebyasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews6:13 Katonda bwe yasuubiza Aburahamu, yeerayirira mwene ebyo bye yali asuubiza, kuba ghaali ghaziragho amusinga bubbede y'asobola kulayirira." 
Hebrews6:14 Yakoba ati: “Bwenebwene ndikugha enkabi naayaza eizaire lyo.” 
Hebrews6:15 Aburahamu yaaguminkiriza, era atyo yaafuna Katonda kye yamusuubiza." 
Hebrews6:16 Abantu bwe baba nga balayira bakozesa eriina ly'oyo abasinga obubbede, era ole olulayira ati ng'olwo ababaire batakana balekera." 
Hebrews6:17 Kale Katonda bwe yayenda akakase bye yasuubiza, kye yava n'alayira. Yayenda okukakalisa irala abo abalifuna ebyasuubizibwa ati ebyasuubizibwa talibikyusa." 
Hebrews6:18 Agho ni, Katonda bye yasuubiza n'ekirayiro kye, n'ebyo ebintu ebibiri ebitasobola kukyuka, era Katonda by'ataghanga kutuguyaamu. Kale ni, ife abaalumuka nga tunoonia obulumukiro, kitwizaamu inho amaani okunhweza eisuubi eryatugheebwa." 
Hebrews6:19 Eisuubi eryo ni lye tuli nalyo, era n'erinhwekeza irala emyoyo gyaife ng'oti n'ekizito ekyemereza eryato bwe kinhweza eryato. Eisuubi eryo liziramu kutya era ikakafu. Era lingirira irala mu kifo ekitukuvu ekiri einhuma w'olutimbe." 
Hebrews6:20 Ku lwaife, Yesu n'eyatusooka okwingirayo era yaafuuka Omukulu wa Bakabona ow'ebyanda n'ebyanda ng'oti ni Melekizedeki bwe yali." 
Hebrews7:1 Melekizedeki ono yali kyabazinga wa Salemu era kabona wa Katonda Ali Ghaigulu Yeene. Bwe yayagaanana ni Aburahamu nga Aburahamu ava mu lutalo mwe yaitira bakyabazinga, Melekizedeki ono yaamugha enkabi." 
Hebrews7:2 Aburahamu yaamugha ekintu kirala kirala ku buli ikumi, ku bintu byonabyona bye yali anhaze. Okusooka, eriina Melekizedeki litegeeza, “Kyabazinga ow'obutuufu.” Ate kuba yali kyabazinga wa Salemu, eriina lye era litegeeza, “Kyabazinga ow'emiraala.”" 
Hebrews7:3 Aziraku ise oba inhina oba badhaadha be. Aziraku lunaku lwe yazaalibwa oba lwe yafiiraku. Aye okwefaanaanirizaaku n'Omwana wa Katonda, aba kabona wa byanda na byanda." 
Hebrews7:4 Kale mubona omuntu ono nga bwe yali omubbede. Dhaadha waife Aburahamu yamugha ekintu kirala kirala ku buli ikumi, ku bintu byonabyona bye yanhaga mu lutalo." 
Hebrews7:5 Era abo baidhukulu ba Levi abagheebwa obwakabona, Amateeka gabalagira okusoloza ku bantu ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi ku ebyo bye baba bafunie, ekikoba nti okuva ku boluganda lwaibwe beene, waire nga boona baidhukulu ba Aburahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Aye Melekizedeki ono, ataali wa lulyo lwaibwe, yatoola ku Aburahamu ekintu kirala kirala ku buli bintu ikumi Aburahamu bye yanhaga era yaamugha enkabi, ate nga Aburahamu yali amaze okusuubizibwa Katonda." 
Hebrews7:7 Kimanhiibwa bukalamu ng'omukulu n'agha omuto enkabi. 
Hebrews7:8 Bwe twogera ku bakabona, ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi, kigheebwa abantu obuntu era abafa n'okufa. Aye bwe twogera ku Melekizedeki, kyagheebwa oyo akakasibwa nti mulamu." 
Hebrews7:9 Omuntu asobola okukoba ati: Levi mwene, agheebwa ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi, yeena yaghaayo ekintu ekirala ekirala ku buli bintu ikumi ng'oti n'ekyo, ng'akigheerayo mu Aburahamu" 
Hebrews7:10 kuba yali ng'akaali mu mubiri gwa dhaadha we Aburahamu, Aburahamu bwe yayagaanana ni Melekizedeki." 
Hebrews7:11 Abantu ba Isiraeli baagheebwa amateeka nga gajiira ku bwakabona bwa Levi. Mperaano nguli omulimo gwa bakabona ba Levi gwali gutuukiriziibwa, tikyandyetaagiisaayo kabona wundi kwidha atali ng'oti ni Aaroni, aye ali ng'oti ni Melekizedeki." 
Hebrews7:12 Ekikoba nti bweghabaagho okukyuka mu bwakabona, ghateekwa okubaagho okukyuka ni mu mateeka." 
Hebrews7:13 Oyo ayogerwaku ebibono ebyo yava mu kika kindi omutavangaku muntu yeenayeena n'agheereza ku alutaari nga kabona. 
Hebrews7:14 Kimanhiibwa bukalamu nga Musengwa waife yali wa mu kika kya Yuda, Musa ky'ataayogeraku nga kirivaamu bakabona." 
Hebrews7:15 Kino kyongera okweyoleka obukalamu bweghabonekagho kabona owundi ali ng'oti ni Melekizedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 ataafuuka kabona lwa mateeka ga buzaaliranwa, aye olw'amaani ag'obulamu obutakoma." 
Hebrews7:17 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Oli kabona ebyanda n'ebyanda ng'oti ni Melekizedeki bwe yali.” 
Hebrews7:18 Kale ekiragiro ekyasooka kyadibizibwa olw'obunafu bwakyo n'obutaba na muganhulo," 
Hebrews7:19 kuba Amateeka ghazira kye gatuukiriza. Aye mperaano tuli n'eisuubi erisingaku obukalamu mwe tubita okuseeta ye Katonda. 
Hebrews7:20 Okwo Katonda yaayongerezaaku okulayira. Abandi baafuuka bakabona nga bazira kulayira oti n'okwo. 
Hebrews7:21 Aye Yesu yafuuka kabona nga ghaligho ekirayiro Katonda bwe yamukoba ati: “Musengwa yalayira era talyeidhusa, ‘Oli kabona ebyanda n'ebyanda.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Kino kifuula Yesu okugha obweyamo okubona ng'endagaano esinga bukalamu etuukirizibwa. 
Hebrews7:23 Ate ghaligho endhawulo eyindi. Bakabona bale baali kamaala kuba baafanga baaloba kusobola kubaagho ekiseera kyonakyona. 
Hebrews7:24 Aye Yesu mulamu, taja kufa era aba kabona ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Hebrews7:25 Era olw'ensonga eno, kyava asobola okulokolera irala ekiseera kyonakyona abo abaidha ye Katonda nga babita mu mwene, kuba mulamu enaku dhoonadhoona okuboogererayo." 
Hebrews7:26 Kyali kituufu tube n'Omukulu wa Bakabona ali atyo omutukuvu, aziraku musango, aziraku kimyamya, eyayawulwa okuva ku babi, era Katonda ye yagulumiza mu igulu." 
Hebrews7:27 Tali ng'abakulu ba bakabona abandi abali n'okughaayo buli lunaku emisengo, okusooka olw'ebibi byaibwe beene ate kabiri n'olw'ebibi eby'abantu abandi. Yaghaayo omusengo omukuzi mulala guti gwamala, bwe yeeghaayo mwene ng'omusengo." 
Hebrews7:28 Amateeka gataagho abantu mu bunafu bwaibwe okuba abakulu ba bakabona, aye ekibono eky'ekirayiro ekyaidha oluvainhuma ng'Amateeka galigho, kyataagho Mwana eyafuulibwa atuukiriire ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Hebrews8:1 Ekisinga obukulu mu bye tuli kwogera ni kino nti, tuli n'Omukulu wa Bakabona ali ng'oti n'oyo, atyaime ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'ekityamo kya Katonda mwene bukumu mu igulu" 
Hebrews8:2 agheereza nga Kabona Omukulu mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho. Ekifo ekyo, ni weema yeene etaateebwagho bantu, aye eyateebwagho Musengwa." 
Hebrews8:3 Buli Mukulu wa Bakabona yeenayeena, ateebwagho okughaayo ebirabo n'emisengo. Kale, ni Kabona Omukulu owaife yeena kyava agwaine okubaaku ni ky'aghaayooku." 
Hebrews8:4 Nguli yali ku nsi tiyandibaire kabona naire, kuba ghaligho bakabona abaghaayo ebirabo ng'Amateeka bwe galagira." 
Hebrews8:5 Omulimo gwe bakola nga bakabona gwefaanaanirizaaku bwefaanaanirize, era kinsense bunsense eky'ebyo ebikolebwa mu igulu; kuba ni Musa bwe yali ng'aja okutaagho eweema, Katonda yamulagira ati: “Bona nti byonabyona obikola ng'ojiira ku ekyo ekyakulagibwa ku lusozi.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Aye mperaano Kurisito yagheebwa obugheereza obusinga einho obw'abo, era ng'oti n'endagaano y'alimu ng'akwania bw'esinga ere eyasooka, kuba yakolebwa nga by'esuubiza n'ebisinga." 
Hebrews8:7 Nguli endagaano eyasooka yali ezira ky'ebulaku, tighandibaire kyendesa yakubiri." 
Hebrews8:8 Kuba Katonda anenia abantu be ng'akoba ati: “Musengwa akoba ati ekiseera kiri kwidha, mwe ndikolera endagaano empyaka n'abantu ba Isiraeli, era n'abantu ba Yuda" 
Hebrews8:9 Teriba oti n'endagaano ye nakola ni badhaadha baibwe, ku lunaku lwe nabagema ku mukono okubatoola mu nsi Misiri; kuba tibaakalangukira ku ndagaano ye nakola nabo. Zeena kyenava ni ndekayo okubafaaku." 
Hebrews8:10 Eno n'endagaano ye ndikola n'abantu ba Isiraeli: Musengwa ayogera ati Mu biseera ebiri kwidha, ndita amateeka gange mu bidhuubo byaibwe, era ndigaghandiika mu myoyo gyaibwe. Ndiba Katonda waibwe, boona baaba bantu bange." 
Hebrews8:11 Ghazira aliba na kwegeresa mwine, oba aliba na kukoba muganda we ati, ‘Manha Musengwa!’ Kuba okuviira irala ku asembayo obuto okutuukira irala ku mukulu asingayo, boonaboona baliimanha." 
Hebrews8:12 Ndibasonigha okwonoona kwaibwe, n'ebibi byaibwe tiribiidhukira naire.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Katonda bw'ayogera ku ndagaano empyaka aba akairiya eyo eyasooka era ekyo ekikula ni kikairigha, kiba kiri kumpi okuwaagho." 
Hebrews9:1 Endagaano eyasooka yoona yabanga n'amateeka agaakolerwangaku mu kusinza, era yabanga n'ekifo ekitukuvu ku nsi kuno." 
Hebrews9:2 Eweema yateebwagho. Mu kifo kyayo ekituukirwaku mwalimu ekikondo ky'eitaala, n'emeeza, n'emigaati egigheereibwayo eri Katonda. Ekiketezo ekyo nga kyetebwa Ekifo Ekitukuvu." 
Hebrews9:3 Einhuma ew'olutimbe olwokubiri yaliyo ekiketezo ekindi ekyetebwa Ekifo Ekitukuvu Einho. 
Hebrews9:4 Ghano n'aghaali alutaari eyakolebwa mu zaabu nga yaakuniokezaaku bubbaani. Era n'aghaali Esanduuku ey'Endagaano, eyaghembwaku zaabu ku ndhuyi dhoonadhoona. Mu sanduuku omwo mwalimu ekibya ekya zaabu omwali mannu era mwalimu omwigo gwa Aaroni ogwalokaku amakaba, mwabaamu n'ebipande eby'endagaano." 
Hebrews9:5 Ghaigulu ghaayo nga ghaligho ebitonde ebiri n'amaghagha ebyetebwa kerubi, ebyoleka ekitiisa kya Katonda, ebighemba ekityamo ekisoniyirwaku ebibi n'amaghagha gaabyo. Aye bino byonabyona, titughanga kubyogeraku mu bwidhuvu buti." 
Hebrews9:6 Ebintu ebyo byonabyona nga bimaze okutegekebwa bityo, bakabona baajanga buliidho mu kiketezo eky'eweema ekituukirwamu, baakolanga eby'obwakabona." 
Hebrews9:7 Aye mu Weema ey'omunda mwajangamu Omukulu wa Bakabona yenka, ng'angiramu omukuzi mulala buli mwaka, era ng'ateekwa okutwalayo omusaayi gw'aghaayo ku lulwe ni ku lw'ebyonoono eby'abantu bye bakola mu butamanha." 
Hebrews9:8 Mu bino byonabyona Mwoyo Mutukuvu alaga nti engira etuuka mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho yali ekaali kwigulwagho kuba ekiketezo eky'eweema ekituukirwamu kyali nga kikaaligho. 
Hebrews9:9 Ako kaali kamanhiso bumanhiso ak'ebyo ebirigho buti, kuba mu nkola eno ebirabo n'emisengo ebyagheebwangayo tibyasobolanga kutukuza mwoyo gw'oyo aba aidhie okusinza." 
Hebrews9:10 Bino byakomanga ku bya ku ngulu ebigema ku kulya, ni ku kunhwa, ni ku bulombolombo obw'okwetukuza, ebyali eby'okubaagho okutuusa ku kiseera eky'okwiza ebintu byonabyona obuyaaka." 
Hebrews9:11 Aye Kurisito bwe yaidha ng'Omukulu wa Bakabona ow'ebintu ebirungi ebija okwidha, yabita mu weema esinga obukulu n'okutuukirira, etaakolebwa bantu, era etaali ya ku nsi kuno." 
Hebrews9:12 Yangira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho omukuzi mulala guti gwamala, nga tatwalayo musaayi gwa mbuzi na nte nto ng'omusengo, aye ng'atwala omusaayi gwe mwene olw'okutufunira okununulibwa okutawaagho." 
Hebrews9:13 Omusaayi ogw'embuzi, n'ogw'ente enume, n'eivu ery'ente enduusi, bwe bimansirwa ku abo abatali balongoofu bibatukuza baaba balongoofu mu by'oku ngulu." 
Hebrews9:14 Oba ng'ekyo kityo bwekiri, memale omusaayi gwa Kurisito tigulisingagho inho kututukuza ni tugheereza Katonda omulamu ku lwa Kurisito aziraku kimyamya, eyeeghaayo ye Katonda mu maani ga Mwoyo atawaagho?" 
Hebrews9:15 Kale ni Kurisito n'akwania endagaano empyaka, abo abaasuubizibwa ebirungi ebitawaagho babifune. Kuba yafa, yaanunula abantu mu bibi byaibwe bye baakolanga nga bakaafugibwa endagaano eyasooka." 
Hebrews9:16 Aghali ekiraamo ghateekwa okubaagho obukakafu obw'okufa kw'oyo eyakiraama," 
Hebrews9:17 kuba ekiraamo tikikola ng'eyakiraama akaali mulamu, aye amala kufa memale kyakola." 
Hebrews9:18 N'endagaano eyasooka kyeyava ekakasibwa n'omusaayi. 
Hebrews9:19 Musa bwe yamala okukobera abantu ebiragiro byonabyona ebiri mu Mateeka, yatoola omusaayi ogw'ente ento n'ogw'embuzi, ghalala n'amaadhi, n'obuviiri bw'entaama obwa kasaayisaayi, n'akati akeetebwa hissopu, yaamansira ku kitabo ni ku bantu boonaboona," 
Hebrews9:20 nga bw'akoba ati: “Guno n'omusaayi ogukakasa endagaano Katonda y'abateereiregho.” 
Hebrews9:21 Era mu nsambo n'endala Musa yamansira omusaayi ku weema ni ku bintu byonabyona ebyakozesebwanga mu kusinza. 
Hebrews9:22 Era mu Mateeka kumpi buli kintu kitukuzibwa na musaayi, era aghazira kuyugha musaayi, tighabaagho kusoniyibwa." 
Hebrews9:23 Ebintu ebyo ebyefaanaanirizaaku ku bire eby'omu igulu byalinga n'okwamulwa mu nsambo oti n'eyo. Aye eby'omu igulu byene biri n'okwamulibwa n'emisengo egisingaku obukalamu. 
Hebrews9:24 Kurisito tiyangira mu kifo kitukuvu ekyakolebwa abantu, ekifaananaku obufaanane ni kire kyene, aye yangira mu igulu lyene, y'ali mperaano mu maiso ga Katonda ku lwaife." 
Hebrews9:25 Kurisito tiyeeghaayo mikuzi kamaala oti ni Bakabona Abakulu bwe bangiranga buli mwaka mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, ate nga ti kughaayo musaayi gwaibwe gwene." 
Hebrews9:26 Kuba nguli kyali kityo, Kurisito yandibaire ng'ali n'okudaagadaaga emikuzi kamaala kasookanga ensi etondebwe. Aye mu byanda bino ebisembayo yaboneka omukuzi mulala guti nga gumala, atoolegho ekibi olw'okweghaayo mwene." 
Hebrews9:27 Era nga buli muntu bw'ali n'okufa omukuzi omulala, era ng'amaze okufa n'asalirwa omusango," 
Hebrews9:28 ni Kurisito atyo bwe yagheebwayo omukuzi mulala olw'okutoolagho ebibi eby'abantu kamaala. Aliboneka omukuzi ogwokubiri, ti lwa kibi aye lwa kulokola abo abamulindirira." 
Hebrews10:1 Amateeka gali na kinsense bunsense eky'ebikalamu ebija okwidha, aye ti kifaananie kyabyo kyenekyene. Tigasobola kufuula abo abaidha ye Katonda kuba batuukiriire, olw'emisengo egigheebwayo buli mwaka." 
Hebrews10:2 Nguli gaali gasobola okubafuula abatuukiriire, nguli emisengo tigikaagheebwayo kuba abagighaayo bandibaire nga baafuulibwa ira abatuukiriire omukuzi mulala, era nga tibakaawulira mule musango lwa kibi." 
Hebrews10:3 Aye mu misengo muno mulimu okwidhusibwa ebibi buli mwaka 
Hebrews10:4 kuba omusaayi gw'ente enume n'ogw'embuzi tigusobola kutoolagho bibi. 
Hebrews10:5 Kale Kurisito bwe yali nga aidha mu nsi kyeyava n'akoba ati: “Emisengo n'ebigheebwayo tiwabyenda, aye wantegekera omubiri." 
Hebrews10:6 Ebyokebwa byonabyona ni biweekereragho tiwabisiima, n'ebyo ebigheebwayo olw'ebibi byona tiwabisiima." 
Hebrews10:7 Kye nava ni nkoba nti, ‘Katonda wange, ndidhie okukola ky'oyenda, ng'ekyaghandiikibwa bwe kindhogeraku mu nzingo y'ekitabo.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Asooka kukoba ati: “Emisengo n'ebigheebwayo, n'ebyo ebyokebwa ni biweekereragho, n'ebyo ebigheebwayo olw'ebibi, tiwabyenda era tiwabisiima waire ng'ebyo byonabyona byagheebwayo ng'Amateeka bwe galagira.”" 
Hebrews10:9 Ate yaakoba ati: “Ndidhie okukola ky'oyenda.” Yatoolagho enkola eyasooka memale olwo yaataagho eyairirira. 
Hebrews10:10 Twatukuzibwa, kuba Yesu Kurisito yakola ekyo Katonda kye yayenda bwe yaghaayo omubiri gwe omukuzi omulala guti nga gumala." 
Hebrews10:11 Buli lunaku bakabona bairamu okughaayo emisengo miraala egyo egitaghanga kutoolagho bibi. 
Hebrews10:12 Aye Kurisito yaghaayo omusengo mulala gwonka olw'ebibi, memale yaatyama ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda y'ali ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Hebrews10:13 Ali eyo ateegereire, okutuusa abazigu be lwe baliteebwa ghansi gh'ebigere bye." 
Hebrews10:14 Olw'okughaayo omusengo guno omulala, abo be yatukuza yabafuula abatuukiriire ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Hebrews10:15 Era ni Mwoyo Mutukuvu kino akighaaku obudhulizi bw'akoba ati: 
Hebrews10:16 “Eno n'endagaano ye ndikola nabo mu nnaku edhiidha,” Musengwa atyo bw'akoba. “Ndita amateeka gange mu myoyo gyaibwe, era ndigaghandiika mu bidhuubo byaibwe.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Ate era yaakoba ati: “Tiriidhukira kabiri bibi byaibwe na kwonoona kwaibwe.” 
Hebrews10:18 Ebyo bwe bimala okusoniyibwa, okughaayo omusengo olw'ebibi kuba tikukeetaagisa." 
Hebrews10:19 Kale aboluganda, mperaano tusobola okwingira mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, nga tuzira kutya kuba Yesu yafa ku lwaife." 
Hebrews10:20 Yatwiguliragho engira empyaka era ey'obulamu ebita mu lutimbe, okwo n'okubita mu kweghaayo kwe yeeghaayo." 
Hebrews10:21 Nga bwe tuli ni kabona omukulu, akulira enhumba ya Katonda," 
Hebrews10:22 tuseete ye Katonda n'omwoyo oguziramu buguya, ogwidhwire okwikiriza, nga n'emyoyo gyaife gyamwirwa okuva mu bubi, era nga n'emibiri gyaife ginaaziibwa n'amaadhi amatukuvu." 
Hebrews10:23 Tukalangule eisuubi lye tuli nalyo kuba Katonda eyatusuubiza mwesigwa. 
Hebrews10:24 Tufengayo inho okukubiriza banaife mu kugonzania, n'okukola ebikalamu." 
Hebrews10:25 Tutagayaaliriranga kwesolozanga ng'abandi bwe bakola. Aye kiisi muntu agumyenga mwine n'okusingira irala nga mperaano bwe muli kubona ng'Olunaku lwa Musengwa luli kumpi okutuuka. 
Hebrews10:26 Bwe twonoona nga tugendereire ng'ate tumaze okukoberwa amazima, ghaba nga tighakaaligho musengo gwa kugheebwayo olw'ebibi." 
Hebrews10:27 Ekiba kisigaire, n'okuba mu kutya nga tuteegerera okusalirwa omusango, era n'obukambwe obw'omuliro oguja okwokya abazigu ba Katonda." 
Hebrews10:28 Omuntu amenha Amateeka ga Musa aitibwa aghazira kusaasirwa, kasita ghabaagho abadhulizi ababiri oba abasatu abamulumiriza." 
Hebrews10:29 Kale mulowooza ekibonerezo tikirisingagho bukambwe eky'omuntu oyo atyankirira Omwana wa Katonda, era atwala omusaayi ogw'endagaano ogwamutukuza n'agubona ng'ogutali mutukuvu, era n'adhooga Mwoyo ow'ekisa?" 
Hebrews10:30 Kuba twidhi oyo eyakoba ati: “Okulwana enzigu kwange, ndyesasuuza.” Era ati: “Musengwa alisalira abantu be omusango.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Nga kitiisa okugwa mu mikono gya Katonda omulamu! 
Hebrews10:32 Mwidhukire ebiseera eby'eira bwe mwamala okufuna obutangaavu bwa Katonda ni muguminkiriza okudaazibwa okw'amaani. 
Hebrews10:33 Emikuzi egindi mwavumibwanga era mwadaazibwadaazibwa mu maiso g'abantu, emikuzi egindi mwalumirwanga ghalala n'abo be bakolanga batyo." 
Hebrews10:34 Mwalumirwa ghalala n'abasibe era bwe mwanhagibwaku ebyaimwe mwaguminkiriza n'eisanhu, nga mwidhi muti muli n'ekibisinga obukalamu era eky'olubeerera." 
Hebrews10:35 Kale mutasuula ere kumwesiga kwaimwe, kuba kulimu empeera nnene." 
Hebrews10:36 Mwetaaga okuguminkiriza, memale musobole okukola Katonda ky'ayenda, n'okugheebwa ekyasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews10:37 “Kuba esigaire akaseera katono inho, oyo ow'okwidha aidhe, era taja kulwa." 
Hebrews10:38 Omutuufu wange anaabanga mulamu lwa kwikiriza, aye bw'aira einhuma tiri musangaalira naire.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Aye ife tituli mu abo abaira einhuma ni bazikirira, aye tuli mu abo abaikiriza ni balokolebwa." 
Hebrews11:1 Okuba n'okwikiriza n'okukakasa ng'ebyo bye tusuubira birituukirira, era n'okukakasa ng'ebyo bye tutabona bwene biriyo." 
Hebrews11:2 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera abantu ab'eira okusiimibwa Katonda. 
Hebrews11:3 Okwikiriza n'okutusobozesa okutegeera ng'ensi yatondebwa na kibono kya Katonda kyaba nti ebiboneka byakolebwa okuva mu ebyo ebitaboneka. 
Hebrews11:4 Okwikiriza n'okwasobozesa Abeli okughaayo ye Katonda omusengo omukalamu ogusinga ogwa Kaini, era mwe yabita Katonda okumubala okuba omutuufu, kuba Katonda yasiima ebirabo bye. Era olw'okwikiriza kwe waire yafa, akaayogera." 
Hebrews11:5 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Enoka okutwalibwa mu igulu nga tasoose kufa, era ghazira yamubonaku kuba Katonda yamutwala. Bwe yali ng'akaali kutwalibwa kyakakasibwa nga yasiimya Katonda." 
Hebrews11:6 Ghazira aghanga kusiimya Katonda ng'azira kwikiriza. Kuba aja ye Katonda ateekwa okwikiriza nga Katonda aligho, era ng'agha empeera abo abamunoonia." 
Hebrews11:7 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Noa okuwulira Katonda, bwe yamulabula ku bintu ebyali bikaali kuboneka, yaazimba eryato eryawonia mwene n'amaka ge. Olwa kino yaasalira ensi omusango, era mwene yaabalibwa okuba omutuufu olw'okwikiriza." 
Hebrews11:8 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Aburahamu okuwulira Katonda bwe yamweta ave ku butaka, aje mu nsi ye yali aja okugheebwa ng'ekisuubizo, era yaaja nga taidhi y'aja." 
Hebrews11:9 Era okwikiriza n'okwamusobozesa okuba ng'omuvaghala mu nsi eyamusuubizibwa. Yaasulanga mu ntindi ni Isaaka, ni Yakobo, boona abaasuubizibwa." 
Hebrews11:10 Kuba Aburahamu yali ali kwesumba ekibuga Katonda kye yategeka era kye yazimba, ekiri n'omusingi omugumu." 
Hebrews11:11 Okwikiriza n'okwasobozesa Sara okutoola enda waire yali ng'akairiighe okubitirira, kuba yaikiriza ng'eyamusuubiza mwesigwa." 
Hebrews11:12 Kale waire Aburahamu yali omukaire awoireyo, yavaamu abaidhukulu kamaala inho ng'oti n'emuunienie edh'oku igulu era ng'oti musenho ogw'oku mbali okw'enhandha ogutabalika." 
Hebrews11:13 Abo boonaboona baafiira mu kwikiriza nga bakaali kufuna ebyo Katonda bye yabasuubiza, aye nga babirengerera ghala era nga babisangaalira, era nga baatula nga bwe baali abavaghala era abanoonia obubudamo ku nsi kuno." 
Hebrews11:14 Kuba aboogera batyo booleka bukalamu nga bwe bali kwagala obutaka obwaibwe. 
Hebrews11:15 Era nguli baali badhuuba ku nsi ye baavaamu, bandighanze okwirayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Aye mperaano kyali nti baali bali kwegomba obutaka obusinga obukalamu n'obwo obw'omu igulu. Kale Katonda kyava tagemwa nsoni kwetebwa Katonda waibwe, kuba yabategekera ekibuga." 
Hebrews11:17 Okwikiriza n'okwasobozesa Aburahamu, Katonda bwe yamuleba, okughaayo Isaaka omwana we omulala ati bedengedenge abe omusengo. Aburahamu oyo, Katonda yali amaze okumusuubiza ati:" 
Hebrews11:18 “Mu Isaaka mw'olifunira abaidhukulu.” 
Hebrews11:19 Aburahamu yamanha nga Katonda asobola okuzuukiza abafu kyaba ng'oti Katonda yamwiriza Isaaka ng'ali ng'aviire mu bafu. 
Hebrews11:20 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Isaaka okusabira Yakobo ni Esau babe ba nkabi mu biseera ebyali bija okwidha. 
Hebrews11:21 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Yakobo, bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okufa, okusabira abaana ba Yosefu mulala mulala babe ba nkabi, ng'akotaime ku mwigo gwe era ng'asinza Katonda." 
Hebrews11:22 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Yosefu, bwe yali ng'ali kumpi okufa, okwogera ku ky'Abaisiraeli okuva mu Misiri, era n'okubagalagira kye babe bakolere amagumba ge." 
Hebrews11:23 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera abazaire ba Musa okumugisa okumala emyezi esatu ng'amaze okuzaalibwa kuba baamubona nga mwana aboneka bulungi, baaloba kutya kudheemera kiragiro kya kyabazinga." 
Hebrews11:24 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Musa ng'amaze okukula, okuloba okwetebwanga omwana wa mughala wa kyabazinga." 
Hebrews11:25 Yasiima okudaazibwadaazibwa ghalala n'abantu ba Katonda okusinga okuba mu isanhu ery'ekibi ery'akaseera obuseera. 
Hebrews11:26 Yabona nga okuvumwa olwa Kurisito kya mughendo inho okusinga obukombe bw'e Misiri, kuba yalowoozanga ku mpeera ye yali aja okugheebwa." 
Hebrews11:27 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera Musa okuva e Misiri, n'atatya kiruyi kya kyabazinga ng'ali ng'oti abonera irala Katonda ataboneka, yaaguma." 
Hebrews11:28 Okwikiriza n'okwamuleetera okutaagho Ekibinuko ky'Okubitizibwa, yaamansira omusaayi, olwo Namuzisa alobe kwita baana baibwe abalenzi ababeri." 
Hebrews11:29 Okwikiriza n'okwasobozesa Abaisiraeli okubita mu Nhandha Emyufu nga bali ng'oti babita ku bukalu, aye Abamisiri bwe baagezaaku baadimira." 
Hebrews11:30 Okwikiriza n'okwaleetera ebimante by'ekibuga Yeriko okugwa oluvainhuma olw'Abaisiraeli okubyezungulula okumala enaku omusanvu. 
Hebrews11:31 Okwikiriza n'okwawonia malaaya Rahabu n'atazikirira n'abo abataikiriza, kuba yasangaalira abakeesi." 
Hebrews11:32 Nkobe ki era ndeke ki? Ekiseera kiidha kumpwaku bwe nnaayogera ku Gideoni, Baraki, Samusoni, Yefutha, Daudi, Samueli, ni ku balanzi." 
Hebrews11:33 Okwikiriza n'okwabasobozesa okughangula bakyabazinga, baakola ekituufu era baafuna ebyo Katonda bye yabasuubiza. Baalobera empologoma okwasama," 
Hebrews11:34 baazikiza omuliro ogw'amaani, era baawona okwitibwa n'empiima. Baafuna amaani okuva mu bunafu, baafuuka balwani ba ntalo abaziramu ntete, era baabinga amagye ag'abavaghala," 
Hebrews11:35 n'abakazi baagheebwa abantu baibwe abazuukiziibwa. Abandi tibaaganha kulekulibwa, baitibwa basobole okuzuukirira obulamu obusinga bukalamu." 
Hebrews11:36 Abandi baabakiina, baabakuba, baabasiba ku ndhegere era baabata mu ikomera." 
Hebrews11:37 Baabakuba amabaale baabasalamu ghabiri n'emisumeeni, baitibwa n'empiima. Baabitanga nga bavaire amawu g'entaama n'ag'embuzi, nga bazira kantu, nga badaagadaaga, baabisibwa bubi," 
Hebrews11:38 era nga n'ensi tibagibonamu muganhulo. Baatambulatambulanga eyo batyo mu malungu ni mu nsozi ng'oti n'abanoonia obubudamo, nga basula mu mpuku ni mu biina." 
Hebrews11:39 Abo boonaboona waire Katonda yabasiima olw'okwikiriza kwaibwe, aye tibaafuna ebyo bye yasuubiza." 
Hebrews11:40 Kuba Katonda yatutegekera ekisinga obukalamu, abo balobe kufuulibwa batuukiriire okutuusa nga twena tubeeyimbyeku." 
Hebrews12:1 Kale twena nga bwe tuli n'abadhulizi kamaala batyo abatwezungulwire, tusuule ere kiisi kintu ekituzitoogherera era n'ekibi ekitwesibyeku. Tungire n'obumalirivu mu ntaka edh'okulumuka edhiteereibwagho," 
Hebrews12:2 ng'amaiso tugataire ku Yesu eyatoolereza era atuukiriza okwikiriza kwaife. Oyo olw'eisanhu lye yali asuubira, yagumira omusalaba, yaaloba kutya kuswala. Mperaano atyaime ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'ekityamo kya Katonda." 
Hebrews12:3 Mwidhukire bwe yagumira okutakana n'obukyayi obw'aboonooni, olwo mulobenga kuwaamu maani;" 
Hebrews12:4 kuba waire mulwana n'ekibi, mukaali kutuuka ku kwitibwa." 
Hebrews12:5 Mwerabiire Katonda bw'abalamba ng'abaana be? Akoba ati: “Mwana wange tonhoomanga kukangaivula kwa Musengwa. Era towangamu maani bw'akubonerezanga. 
Hebrews12:6 Kuba Musengwa akangaivula oyo y'agonza, era abonereza kiisi y'ayeta omwana we.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Bwe mukangaivulwanga, muguminkirizenga, kuba Katonda abakangaivula ng'abaana be. Kale mwana ki ise y'atakangaivula?" 
Hebrews12:8 Bwe mutakangaivulwa ng'abandi bwe bakangaivulwa, muba nga timuli baana beene aye muba ng'abaghambule." 
Hebrews12:9 Ekyo nga kiri agho, twali ni balata baife mu mubiri abaatukangaivulanga era twabatangamu ekitiisa. Kale titugwaine kugondera Lata waife mu mwoyo kusingagho inho tube abalamu?" 
Hebrews12:10 Balata baife abo baatukangaivulanga ekiseera kitono nga beene bwe baabonanga. Aye Katonda atukangaivula olw'omuganhulo ife beene gwe tufunamu, tughange okugabana ku butukuvu bwe." 
Hebrews12:11 Bwe tuba nga tuli kukangaivulwa, mu kiseera ekyo tuwulira bulumi mu kifo eky'eisanhu. Aye oluvainhuma abeegereseibwa okukangaivulwa okwo, bafuna emiraala n'obutuufu." 
Hebrews12:12 Kale mugolole emikono gyaimwe egiruyiriire, mugumye ebivu byaimwe ebidhugumira." 
Hebrews12:13 Mutambulirenga mu ngira enkalamu, aghenhera alobe kulemalira irala aye awone." 
Hebrews12:14 Mufaabiikanenga okuba n'emiraala y'abantu boonaboona era mufaabiikanenga okuba n'obutukuvu, kuba aghazira obwo, ghazira alibona Musengwa." 
Hebrews12:15 Mwekuume ghalobe kubaagho afiirwa kisa kya Katonda, era ghalobe kubaagho bubi buva mu imwe ni butabulatabula era ni bwonoona bantu kamaala." 
Hebrews12:16 Mwekuume ghalobe kubaagho mwenzi oba atatya Katonda ng'Esau, eyatunda obusika bwe olw'omwiguto omulala guti." 
Hebrews12:17 Mwidhi nga ku nkomerero bwe yayenda okufuna omukisa ogwo, tiyagugheebwa, kuba tiyafuna kaghagaanhia ka kukyusa kye yali akoze, waire yagunoonia ng'alira." 
Hebrews12:18 Timwidhie ng'Abaisiraeli bwe baaja ku lusozi Sinai olusobola okugemwaku era olwaka omuliro. Era timwidhie ya nzikiiza egemye bedimudimu, oba ya kiwunga," 
Hebrews12:19 oba ya kuvuga kwa ndeka, oba ya iroboozi eryavaamu ebibono ebyaleetera abaabiwulira okusaba balobe kweyongera kubiwulira." 
Hebrews12:20 Kuba tibaasobola kugumira kiragiro ekyabagheebwa, ekikoba kiti: “Ni bw'eba ensolo obusolo, bw'esiinha ku lusozi olwo eteekwa kukubibwa mabaale efe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Bwenebwene ebyabonebwa byali bitiisa inho, ni Musa yaatuuka okukoba ati: “Ntiire inho naadhugumira.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Aye imwe mwidhie ku lusozi Sioni era mu kibuga kya Katonda omulamu, Yerusalemu eky'omu igulu, eyeesololeiza bamalaika olukunkumuli." 
Hebrews12:23 Mwidhie mu lwekobaano olw'abaana ababeri abaaghandiikibwa mu igulu, ni ye Katonda omulamuzi w'abantu boonaboona, era ni y'emyoyo gy'abatuufu abaafuulibwa abatuukiriire." 
Hebrews12:24 Mwidhie ye Yesu eyakwania endagaano empyaka. Mwidhie y'omusaayi ogumansirwa, ogwogera ebikalamu okusinga ogwa Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Mwekuume, mutalobanga kuwulira oyo ayogera kuba, oba abo abaaloba okuwulira oyo eyabalabula ng'ali ku nsi, tibaawona, ife bwe tuloba okuwulira oyo atulabula, ng'ali mu igulu tuliwonera gha!" 
Hebrews12:26 Ku olwo eiroboozi lye lyatengeesa ensi, aye ku luno yeesoomera ati: “Kabiri ndidha kwiramu okutengeesa, ti nsi yonka aye n'eigulu.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Okukoba ati: “Ndidha kwiramu”, kitegeeza okutoolwagho ku ebyo ebitengeesebwa n'ebyo ebyatondebwa, memale olwo ebitatengeesebwa bisigalegho." 
Hebrews12:28 Kale twebazenga olw'okufuna Obwakyabazinga obutatengeesebwa, era tusinzenga Katonda mu nsambo emusiimya, nga tumutaamu ekitiisa era nga tumutya" 
Hebrews12:29 kuba Katonda waife muliro gwene oguzikiriza. 
Hebrews13:1 Mujenga mu maiso n'okugonzania ng'aboluganda mu Kurisito. 
Hebrews13:2 Timwerabiranga kusangaazanga bantu be mutaidhi, kuba ghaligho abasangaaza bamalaika nga tibaidhi." 
Hebrews13:3 Mwidhukirenga abasibe nga muli ng'oti mwena muli basibe ghalala nabo. Era mwidhukirenga abo abadaazibwadaazibwa, kuba era mwena mukaali mu mubiri." 
Hebrews13:4 Obufumbo buteebwengamu ekitiisa abantu boonaboona, era obufumbo bukuumibwenga nga butukuvu, kuba abadankaanu n'abenzi, Katonda alibasalira omusango." 
Hebrews13:5 Mulobenga kugonza mpiiya, aye bye muli nabyo bibamalenga. Katonda yakoba ati: “Tirikuvaaku naire era tirikulekulira agho naire.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Kyetuva ni twogera n'obugumu tuti: “Musengwa n'omubeezi wange, tiityenga kintu kyonakyona. Omuntu aghanga kunkola ki?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Mwidhukirenga abakulembeze baimwe abaabakobera ekibono kya Katonda. Mwidhukirenga eby'obulamu bwaibwe, era mubenga n'okwikiriza ng'oti n'okwaibwe." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kurisito nga bwe yali olwaidho, bw'ali n'olwaleero, era bw'aliba ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Hebrews13:9 Okwegeresa okundi kwonakwona kwe babaleetera kutabadaalimyanga. Kuba ekikulu n'ekisa kya Katonda okutugumya omwoyo, okusinga akujiira ku mateeka ag'eby'okulya agataganhulangaku abo abagajiiraku." 
Hebrews13:10 Tuli ni alutaari abo abagheereza mu nhumba ya Katonda kwe bataikirizibwa kulya. 
Hebrews13:11 Olw'ekyo Omukulu wa Bakabona atwala omusaayi gw'ensolo mu Kifo Ekitukuvu Einho, yaagughaayo olw'ebibi, aye emamba yaadho yaayokebwa luuyi etaba bantu." 
Hebrews13:12 Kale Yesu yeena kyeyava n'adaazibwadaazibwa ku luya kw'ekibuga, aghange okutukuza abantu n'omusaayi gwe." 
Hebrews13:13 Kale tuje y'ali ku luya kw'ekibuga tugabane ku kuswala kwe. 
Hebrews13:14 Kuba ku nsi kuno tuziraku kibuga kya lubeerera, aye tunuyirira ekyo ekiri kwidha." 
Hebrews13:15 Kale buliidho tughenga Katonda omusengo ogw'okumusaaka nga tubita mu Yesu, nga twatula eriina lye n'eminwa gyaife." 
Hebrews13:16 Timwerabiranga kukola bukalamu n'okubeeragana kuba egyo n'emisengo Katonda gy'asiima. 
Hebrews13:17 Muwulirenga abakulembeze baimwe era mubagonderenga, kuba n'abalabirira emyoyo gyaimwe, era balyewozaaku ensambo ye baagirabiriramu. Mubasobozese okukola omulimo guno n'eisanhu, aye ti mu nnaku, kuba ekyo ghazira kye kibaganhula." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutusabirenga, kuba tukakasa nga tuli n'omwoyo omunaabuufu era nga twenda okukola obukalamu mu buli kintu." 
Hebrews13:19 Era mbeeghemba okunsabiranga einho nsobole okwira amangu ye muli. 
Hebrews13:20 Nsaba Katonda ow'emiraala, eyazuukiza Musengwa waife Yesu, eyafuuka Omwayi w'entaama omukulu, olw'okuyugha omusaayi gwe ogwataagho endagaano etawaagho," 
Hebrews13:21 abaghe kiisi kikalamu kyonakyona kye mwetaaga okukolanga by'ayenda. Katonda oyo atukozese by'asiima mu Yesu Kurisito, agheebwe ekitiisa, ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Hebrews13:22 Aboluganda, mbeeghemba muguminkirize ebibono byange ebyo eby'okubalamba, kuba mbaghandiikiire mu bumpi." 
Hebrews13:23 Nhenda okubakobera nti muganda waife Timotheo baamulekula, era bw'aliidha amangu aliba ghalala ninze lwe ndiidha okubabona." 
Hebrews13:24 Mulamuse abakulembeze baimwe boonaboona n'abatuukirivu boonaboona. Ab'omu Italia babalamwisa. 
Hebrews13:25 Enkabi dha Katonda dhibe n'imwe mwenamwena. Amiina. 
James1:1 Ninze Yakobo omugheereza wa Katonda, era owa Musengwa Yesu Kurisito. Mpandiikira ebika eikumi n'ebibiri ebisansaaniire woonawoona. Mbalamwisa inho." 
James1:2 Aboluganda, bwe mutuukibwangaku ebizibu ebya buli nsambo, musangaalenga." 
James1:3 Kuba mwidhi ng'okwikiriza kwaimwe bwe kugezesebwa, kibaviiramu okuguma." 
James1:4 Muleke okuguma kwaimwe okwo kukolere mu imwe, olwo mube abantu abatuukiriire era abalamba, nga muziraku kibulaku." 
James1:5 Oba nga ghaligho ku imwe azira magezi, asabe Katonda aidha ku gamugha kuba oyo agabira abantu boonaboona n'omwoyo mulala." 
James1:6 Aye ali n'okusabira mu kwikiriza era na mwoyo mulala, kuba asaba n'emyoyo ebiri ali oti n'amayengo ag'oku nhandha agayuuzibwayuuzibwa empewo." 
James1:7 Era omuntu ng'oti n'oyo akola ekintu n'emyoyo ebiri, era atasalagho mu byonabyona by'akola, atadhuuba ati aja kufuna ekintu kyonakyona okuva ye Musengwa." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Owoluganda omughafu yeesiimenga nga Katonda amutoire mu bughafu. 
James1:10 N'omukombe yeesiimenga nga Katonda amutoireku obukombe, kuba ng'ekimuli eky'omu nsiko bwe kiwaagho, yeena bw'aliwaagho." 
James1:11 Endhuba bw'evaayo n'omusana gwayo ogw'amaani, eniaza ekimera ekimuli kyakyo kyagwa n'obulungi bwakyo bwawaagho. N'omukombe atyo bw'aliwaagho mu ebyo by'akola." 
James1:12 Omuntu agumira okulebwa wa nkabi, kuba bw'abita mu kugezesebwa okwo, aligheebwa obulamu ng'ekirabo Katonda kye yasuubiza abo abamugonza." 
James1:13 Ole bw'abanga nga alebeibwa, atakobanga ati: “Katonda n'andebye.” Kuba ghazira kighanga kuleba Katonda kukola kibi, era ni Katonda mwene ghazira y'aleba." 
James1:14 Aye omuntu akemebwa nga asendebwasendebwa, era nga atwalirizibwa okwegomba kwe mwene." 
James1:15 Okwegomba kuvaamu ekibi ate ekibi kyavaamu okufa. 
James1:16 Aboluganda abagonzi, batabasubaghanga." 
James1:17 Kiisi kirabo kikalamu era ekituukiriire, kiva mu igulu ye Lata eyatonda ebyaka ku igulu. Oyo tafuukafuuka, oba okuleeta enzikiiza ng'akyukakyuka." 
James1:18 Olw'okwenda kwe mwene yatutonda n'ekibono eky'amazima, olwo tutwale ekifo ekisooka mu bitonde bye." 
James1:19 Aboluganda abagonzi, nhenda mumanhe kino: Buli muntu abenga mwangu okuwulira, aye alwengagho okwogera n'okusungughala," 
James1:20 kuba obusungu obw'omuntu tibuleetagho butuufu bwa Katonda. 
James1:21 Kale mulekeyo emize n'empisa embi dhoonadhoona, mwikirize n'obuwombeefu ekibono Katonda ky'asiga mu myoyo gyaimwe era ekisobola okubawonia." 
James1:22 Mulobenga kwesubagha nga muwulira buwulire ekibono, aye mukolenga nga bwe kikoba." 
James1:23 Omuntu yeenayeena awulira obuwulire ekibono n'atakola nga bwe kikoba ali ng'oti n'omuntu eyeebona mu maiso mu mbonerwamu. 
James1:24 Kuba bw'amala okwebona n'aja, akaseera keene ako yeerabira bw'afaanaine." 
James1:25 Aye oyo eyeekalirisa amateeka amatuufu agaleetera abantu eidembe, era n'ageekalanguliraku nga tawulira buwulire ni yeerabira, aye ng'akola bye gakoba, omuntu oyo anaabanga wa nkabi mu buli ky'akola." 
James1:26 Ole bw'alowooza ati aikiriza, aye n'atafuga lulimi lwe, yeesubagha era n'okwikiriza kwe muzira." 
James1:27 Okwikiriza okutuufu era okuziramu buguya mu maiso ga Katonda Lata ni kuno: okulabirira bamulekwa, ni banamwandu, n'okwekuuma obutoonoonebwa nsi eno." 
James2:1 Aboluganda, nga bwe mwikiriza mu Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, oyo Musengwa ow'ekitiisa, mulekere kuboolanga bantu abatababonekera bukalamu." 
James2:2 Omuntu avaire empeta edha zaabu n'ebivaalo eby'omughendo bw'aidha ghe mwesololeiza okusinza, era n'omuntu omwavu avaire ebikepya yeena n'aidha," 
James2:3 memale n'ofa ku ole avaire ebivaalo eby'omughendo n'omukoba oti: “Iwe tyama ghano aghalungi,” aye ole omwavu n'omukoba oti: “Yemerera ghale” oba oti: “Idha otyame ghano gha nsi gha bigere byange”," 
James2:4 olwo oba oboire ng'ojiira ku bidhuubo ebibi. 
James2:5 Aboluganda abagonzi, muwulire kino: Katonda yalonda abaavu ab'oku nsi kuno okuba abakombe mu kwikiriza, era n'okuba mu Bwakyabazinga bwe yasuubiza abo abamugonza." 
James2:6 Aye imwe munhooma abaavu! Abakombe ti n'ababatuntuza? Ti ni beene abo ababatwala ni babakuba mu mbuga? 
James2:7 Ti ni beene abo abavumirira eriina ery'ekitiisa lye mwetebwa? 
James2:8 Muba mukoze bukalamu bwe mutuukiriza eiteeka lino eikulu, nga bwe kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Ogonzanga muntu mwino ng'oti ni bwe weegonza mwene.”" 
James2:9 Aye bwe muboola abantu olw'emboneka yaibwe muba mukoze ekibi, era muba muli bamenhi ba Mateeka." 
James2:10 Oyo agema Amateeka goonagoona aye eirala liti ni limulema, abaaku omusango ogw'okumenha Amateeka goonagoona" 
James2:11 kuba eyakoba ati: “Otayendanga,” era n'omulala eyakoba ati: “Otaitanga.” Bw'otayenda aye n'oita, oba ofuuse mumenhi wa mateeka." 
James2:12 Kale ni mwogerenga era mukolenga ng'abo abaja okusalirwa omusango mu mateeka agatuleetera eidembe. 
James2:13 Mu kusala omusango Katonda taja kusaasira muntu oyo atasaasira ate okusaasira n'okusinga mu kusala emisango. 
James2:14 Aboluganda, kiganhula ki omuntu okukoba ati ali n'okwikiriza ng'ate ebikolwa bye tibyoleka kwikiriza okwo? Okwikiriza kwe okwo kughanga okumulokola?" 
James2:15 Bwe ghabaagho owoluganda omusaadha oba omukazi ng'ali mu bikepya era muyala," 
James2:16 kiganhula ki okumukoba oti: “Nkwendeza nkabi, empewo etakufuuwa, era endhala etakuluma,” aye nga ghazira ky'omughaire ku byetaago bye eby'omubiri?" 
James2:17 Kye kuva okwikiriza okutaliiku bikolwa kuba okufu. 
James2:18 Aye ole aidha kukoba ati: “Iwe oli na kwikiriza aye nze ndi na bikolwa.” Oyo nze mmukoba nti: “Ndaga okwikiriza kwo okuziraku bikolwa, nze ndidha kukulaga okwange nga nkozesa ebikolwa.”" 
James2:19 Oikiriza ekya Katonda okuba omulala? Ekyo kikalamu! Aye n'emizimu emibi gyona giikiriza ekyo, era gyadhugumira n'okudhugumira." 
James2:20 Musiru iwe, oyenda okukulaga ng'okwikiriza okuziraku bikolwa bwe kuli okufu?" 
James2:21 Dhaadha waife Aburahamu tiyasiimibwa Katonda lwa bikolwa, bwe yaghaayo mutabane we Isaaka ku alutaari?" 
James2:22 Obona ng'okwikiriza kwe bwe kwakolera aghalala n'ebikolwa bye, era ng'ebikolwa bye bwe byatuukiriza okwikiriza kwe." 
James2:23 Era ebyaghandiikibwa byatuukirira ebikoba biti: “Aburahamu yaikiriza Katonda, era ekyo kyamuviiramu okugheebwa obutuukirivu era ni Katonda okumweta mukagwa we.”" 
James2:24 Kale nga bwe mubona, omuntu agheebwa obutuukirivu lwa bikolwa se ti lwa kwikiriza kwonka." 
James2:25 Kityo ti bwe kyali ni ku Rahabu omukazi malaaya? Tiyasiimibwa Katonda lwa bikolwa bye, bwe yaganha okukuuma abakwenda abaatumibwa n'abawonia ng'ababisa mu ngira eyindi?" 
James2:26 Kuba ng'omubiri oguziramu mwoyo bwe guba omufu, n'okwikiriza okuziramu bikolwa kutyo bwe kuba okufu." 
James3:1 Aboluganda, muteeyugha ku mulimo gwa kwegeresa, kuba mwidhi nga ife abeegeresa tuja kunhunkuuzibwa inho okusinga abandi nga tusalirwa omusango." 
James3:2 Twenatwena tusobya. Aye oba nga ghaligho atasobya mu ndhogera, oyo mutuukirivu era asobola okufuga n'omubiri gwe gwonagwona." 
James3:3 Tuta ebyuma mu minwa gy'embalaasi dhitugondere, olwo twasobola okudhiragira okuja yoonayoona ye tuba nga twenze." 
James3:4 Oba lingirira amaato: waire gaba mabba gatya era nga gatwalibwa empewo ey'amaani, akantu omuvuzi k'akozesa okugalagira okuja y'ayenda kaba katono inho." 
James3:5 N'olulimi bwe luli: kantu katono ku mubiri aye keesuutira mu bintu kamaala. Ogubira ni bwe gwaga gha, kaba kaliro katono kaagwokya." 
James3:6 Olulimi muliro. Lwidhwire obubi bwonabwona; ate nga kitundu kya ku mibiri gyaife. Lwonoona omubiri gwonagwona era lwakunaania omuliro ku bulamu bwaife bwonabwona, omuliro oguva mu geyeena gwene." 
James3:7 Kiisi kika kya nsolo, na nhonhi, n'ebyekulula, n'eby'omu nhandha, bighanga okufugibwa omuntu era byamala okufugibwa ira," 
James3:8 aye ezira muntu asobola kufuga lulimi. Olulimi kintu kibi inho ekitatyamisa ghalala, era lwidhwire obusagwa obuziraku muzimulo." 
James3:9 Lwe tukozesa okusaaka Musengwa era Lata, ate era lwe tukozesa okufuugha abantu beene abaakolebwa mu kifaananie kya Katonda." 
James3:10 Omunwa mulala ogwo n'omuva okusaaka, kabiri n'okukolima. Aboluganda, kino tikigwaine kuba kityo." 
James3:11 Enhindo endala eti ey'ensulo esobola okuvaamu amaadhi amakalamu kabiri yaavaamu n'ag'oluunhu? 
James3:12 Aboluganda, omutiini gusobola okutaaku emyoliva oba omuzabbibu okutaaku emitiini? N'ensulo ey'amaadhi ag'oluunhu etyo bw'etasobola kuvaamu maadhi makalamu." 
James3:13 Ghaligho mu imwe ali n'amagezi n'okumanha? Kale akakase ekyo nga yeebisa bukalamu mu bulamu bwe, mu bikolwa ebikalamu eby'okwewombeeka n'amagezi." 
James3:14 Aye oba nga mu myoyo gyaimwe mwidhwire ensaalwa enkambwe, n'okweyendeza mwenka, muteesuutanga biziramu muti mbu muli n'amazima." 
James3:15 Amagezi ago ti n'ago agava mu igulu aye ga ku nsi, ga bantu buntu, era ga Sitaani." 
James3:16 Kuba aghaba ensaalwa n'okweyendeza, n'aghaba n'okutabukatabuka n'emize emibi eja buli nsambo." 
James3:17 Aye okusookera irala, amagezi agava mu igulu maamufu, ga idembe, mawombeefu, gawulirisa ensonga, gaidhwire okusaasira, gavaamu bikalamu byereere, ganoonia ekituufu era tigabaamu buguya." 
James3:18 Era abo abakolerera emiraala bakungula obutuufu obw'ensigo dhe basiga olw'okuleetagho emiraala. 
James4:1 Biki ebibaleetera okulwanalwana n'okusoolasoola? N'okwegomba okw'emibiri gyaimwe okulwanira mu imwe? 
James4:2 Bwe muba ni kye mwenda ni mutakifuna ng'olwo mwita. Bwe mwegomba ni mutafuna ng'olwo musoola era nga mulwana. Timufuna kye mwenda kuba timukisaba Katonda. 
James4:3 Bwe musaba timufuna lwa kuba musobya mu kusaba kwaimwe nga mwenda okwigusa okwegomba kwaimwe kwonka. 
James4:4 Ye bano abatatya Katonda! Timwidhi ng'okuba bakagwa b'ensi kitegeeza kuba bazigu ba Katonda? Kiisi ayenda kuba mukagwa wa nsi aba yeefiire muzigu wa Katonda. 
James4:5 Oba mudhuuba muti ekyaghandiikibwa kino ti kituufu ekikoba kiti: “Katonda ali n'enkikidi ku mwoyo gwe yatutaamu.” 
James4:6 Aye atwoleka ekisa kye okusingagho, ekyaghandiikibwa kye kiva ni kikoba kiti: “Katonda atakania abeekudumbaza, aye abeewooya abooleka ekisa kye.”" 
James4:7 Kale ni mugondere Katonda, aye Sitaani mumutakanie, aidha kubalumuka." 
James4:8 Museete kumpi ni Katonda, yeena aidha kuseeta kumpi n'imwe. Munaabe mu ngalo dhaimwe mwetukuze imwe abakozi b'ebibi. Mutukuze emyoyo gyaimwe imwe abaguya." 
James4:9 Munakughale era mulire; enseko dhifuuke maziga, okusagamba kufuuke kuwuubaala." 
James4:10 Mwewooye mu maiso ga Musengwa, alibafuula okuba ng'aba ghaigulu." 
James4:11 Aboluganda, mutoogeranga bubi ku banaimwe. Ole ayogera ku woluganda obubi oba amusalira musango, aba ayogeire bubi ku Mateeka era aba agasaliire omusango. Ate nga bw'osalira Amateeka omusango oba tokaali mugemi wa Mateeka, aye oba ofuuse agasalira omusango." 
James4:12 Agha Amateeka era asala emisango ali mulala yenka. Oyo n'asobola okuwonia n'okuzikiriza. Aye iwe niiwe ani asalira mwino omusango? 
James4:13 Muwulire ni kino imwe abakoba mbu: “Olwaleero oba olwaidho tulija mu kibuga eky'e bulebe twamalayo omwaka mulamba, twatunda era twafuna amagoba”," 
James4:14 ng'ate timwidhi bya nkyo. Aye obulamu bwaimwe mwidhi bwe buli? Buli ng'oti lufu bufu olubaaghooku akaseera obuseera ate ni luwaagho. 
James4:15 Mu kifo ky'ekyo mugwaine kukobanga muti: “Musengwa bw'ayenda twidha kuba balamu era tukole kino oba kire.” 
James4:16 Aye mperaano mwesuutiriza era mwekudumbaza. Okwekudumbaza ng'oti n'okwo kubi. 
James4:17 Kale ni ole yeenayeena aidhi ekituufu eky'okukola aye n'atakikola aba agwire mu kibi. 
James5:1 Muwulire ni kino imwe abakombe, mulire amaziga era muwologome olw'okudaagadaaga okuli kubaidhira." 
James5:2 Eby'obukombe byaimwe biwumbu, ni bye muvaire byaliibwa ebisiisa." 
James5:3 Zaabu waimwe ni feeza byatalaiga, era obutalaivu obwo n'obuja okubalumiriza busiriize emibiri gyaimwe ng'oti muliro, kuba mu nnaku dhino edhisembayo mwesololeizaaku eby'obukombe." 
James5:4 Muwulire, okulira kw'abakozi abaakola mu nimiro dhaimwe ni mutabagha mpeera yaibwe olw'obulyase bwaimwe. Muwulire, n'okulira okw'abantu abaabatoolera ebirime mu nimiro kwatuuka mu kutu wa Musengwa Afuga Amagye." 
James5:5 Ku nsi kuno mubaire mu bulamu obw'okudiibuula n'okwesanhusa. Mugeedheire olunaku lule olw'okwitibwa. 
James5:6 Omuntu azira musango mwamusalira omusango okumusinga, mwamwita. Tiyaghaghaana!" 
James5:7 Baganda bange, muguminkirize okutuusa Musengwa lw'aliira. Mubonere ku mulimi bw'ateegerera eitaka lye okumugha amakungula ag'omugaso. Ateegerera amaadhi amatoigo n'amasambya." 
James5:8 Mwena muguminkirize. Mutawaamu isuubi kuba olunaku Musengwa lw'aliira luli kumpi. 
James5:9 Aboluganda, mutaduuduumanga nga mwogeraganaku kino oba kire, olwo lwe mutalisalirwa musango. Mwidhukire ng'omusazi w'omusango tabali ghala." 
James5:10 Aboluganda, mubonere ku balanzi abaayogeranga mu liina lya Musengwa, abaadaazibwadaazibwa era ni baguminkiriza." 
James5:11 Abantu abo abaaguminkiriza tubeeta ba nkabi. Imwe mwawulira obuguminkiriza bwa Yobu era mwabona ni Musengwa bye yamukolera ku nkomerero, kuba Musengwa wa kisa era musaasizi." 
James5:12 Aye ekikulu ekisinga byonabyona, aboluganda, mutalayiranga igulu, waire ensi, oba ekintu ekindi kyonakyona. Bwe mukobanga muti “Yii” kibenga yii era bwe mukobanga muti “Busa” kibenga busa Katonda alobe kubasalira musango kubasinga." 
James5:13 Ghaligho mu imwe adaagadaaga? Kale asabe Katonda. Ghaligho omusangaavu? Kale ayembe enhembo edhisaaka Katonda. 
James5:14 Ghaligho mu imwe omulwaire? Ayete abakulembeze ab'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito bamusabire, era bamusiige omuzigo mu liina lya Musengwa." 
James5:15 Okusaba okwo nga kukoleibwa n'okwikiriza, kuliwonia omulwaire oyo. Musengwa alimugologosa era bwe ghalibaagho ebibi bye yakola birisoniyibwa." 
James5:16 Kale ni buli muntu akoberenga baine ebibi bye mwene, era musabiraganenga, muwonezebwe. Okusaba okw'omutuukirivu kuli n'amaani mangi." 
James5:17 Eliya yali muntu buntu ng'oti niife. Yasaba inho amaadhi galobe kugwa era emyaka gyabitagho esatu n'emyezi mukaaga ng'ezira liidhi litoonha ku nsi. 
James5:18 Kabiri yaasaba, amaadhi gaagwa, eitaka lyatoolera okukulaku ebimera." 
James5:19 Aboluganda, owundi ku imwe bw'adaaliima n'ava ku mazima, memale omuntu owundi n'amwiza," 
James5:20 oyo amwiziiza ali n'okumanha ati: kiisi atoola mukozi wa bibi mu ngira ye ensobu, aja kuwonia omwoyo ogw'omukozi ow'ebibi oyo okufa era ebibi bye olukunkumuli bisoniyibwe." 
1Peter1:1 Ninze Petero omutume wa Yesu Kurisito. Mpandiikira abo Katonda be yalonda, buti abasansaaniire mu Ponto, Galatia, Kappadokia, Asia ni mu Bithunia, ye bali ng'abanoonia obubudamo." 
1Peter1:2 Katonda Lata yabalonda ng'entegeka ye bwe yali, era Mwoyo we yaabatukuza musobole okugonderanga Yesu Kurisito, era mwamulwe n'omusaayi gwe. Enkabi n'emiraala byeyongerenga mu imwe." 
1Peter1:3 Katonda Lata wa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito asaakibwe, kuba olw'okusaasira kwe okungi twazaalibwa buyaaka okufuna okusuubira okulamu, lwe yazuukiza Yesu Kurisito okuva mu bafu!" 
1Peter1:4 Era n'okufuna omugabo ku birungi bya Katonda ebitawaagho, ebitayonooneka era ebitasiiwuuka, ebyabaterekerwa mu igulu." 
1Peter1:5 Era olw'okwikiriza kwaimwe, Katonda abakuuma n'amaani ge era alibalokola ku nkomerero nga bwe yategeka." 
1Peter1:6 Musagambe olwa kino, waire nga mperaano musobola okumala akaseera nga mudaagadaaga olw'okulebwa mu kino ni mu kire." 
1Peter1:7 Bino birigho lwa kukakasa ng'okwikiriza kwaimwe kwa mazima. Oba nga ni zaabu ow'ekiseera obuseera ateebwa mu muliro yaakenenulwa, n'okwikiriza kwona okw'omughendo okusinga ni zaabu, kuteekwa okulebwa n'okukakasibwa. Olwo ni mwasaakibwa, mwagheebwa ekitiisa n'ekinhagansi ku lunaku Yesu Kurisito lw'alibonekeraku." 
1Peter1:8 Waire nga Yesu oyo timumubonangaku, mumugonza, era waire timumubona buti, mumwikiriza era mwasagamba ebitaloodheka." 
1Peter1:9 Ekiva mu kwikiriza kwaimwe, n'okulokolwa okw'emyoyo gyaimwe." 
1Peter1:10 Abalanzi abalanga ekisa kino Katonda kye yali ow'okubagemerwa, beefumintiriza era baanoonereza ebigema ku kulokolwa kuno." 
1Peter1:11 Baagezaaku okunoonereza okumanha ekiseera okulokoka okwo kye kuliidhiramu, era n'ensambo ye kuliidhamu, nga bajiira ku Mwoyo wa Kurisito eyabalimu, baalanga okudaagadaaga okwali kuli n'okutuuka ku Kurisito, era n'ekitiisa ekyali kiri n'okukuvaamu." 
1Peter1:12 Katonda yayoleka abalanzi abo ng'ebyo tibaabikola ku lwaibwe beene, aye ku lwaimwe. Ebintu ebyo n'ebyo bye mwawulira nga bibakoberwa abo abaabakobera Amawulire Amalungi. Bwe baali nga babakobera Amawulire Amalungi ago, Katonda yasindika Mwoyo Mutukuvu okuva mu igulu, yaidha okubalamba. Ni bamalaika beegomba okubona ku bintu ebyo." 
1Peter1:13 Kale ni mu myoyo gyaimwe mubenga beetegefu era mwefugenga. Eisuubi lyaimwe lyonalyona mulitenga mu kisa Katonda ky'aja okubagemerwa ku lunaku Yesu Kurisito lw'alibonekeraku. 
1Peter1:14 Ng'abaana abawulize, mutafugibwanga kwegomba kwe mwali nakwo nga mukaali kumanha Kurisito." 
1Peter1:15 Aye ng'oyo eyabeeta bw'ali omutukuvu, n'imwe beene mwena mubenga batukuvu mu buli kye mukola." 
1Peter1:16 Kuba kyaghandiikibwa kiti: “Mubenga batukuvu, kuba nze ndi Mutukuvu.”" 
1Peter1:17 Katonda mumweta Lata nga musaba era tasaliriza bw'asalira omuntu yeenayeena omusango, ajiira ku ebyo kiisi muntu by'akola. Kale ni mumutyenga enaku dhoonadhoona edh'obulamu bwaimwe nga muli mu nsi eno etali yaimwe." 
1Peter1:18 Mwidhi bukalamu nga ekyabaleetera okununulwa mu mpisa dhaimwe edhiziramu dhe mwatoola ku badhaadha baimwe, ti feeza oba zaabu ebiwaagho." 
1Peter1:19 Kyali omusaayi gwa Kurisito ogw'omughendo einho, ali ng'oti n'entaama ento eziraku kamogo waire kimyamya." 
1Peter1:20 Kurisito oyo yalondebwa nga n'ensi ekaali kutondebwa, aye yaaboneka mu biseera bino ebisembayo ku lwaimwe." 
1Peter1:21 Mu oyo mwe mubita okwikiriza Katonda eyamuzuukiza okuva mu bafu, naamugha ekitiisa, olwo okwikiriza kwaimwe n'okusuubira byaba nga biri mu Katonda." 
1Peter1:22 Nga bwe mwamala okutukuza emyoyo gyaimwe nga mugondera amazima, ni mugonzania ng'aboluganda, mweyongere okugonzania n'omwoyo oguziramu buguya." 
1Peter1:23 Kuba mwazaalibwa omukuzi ogwokubiri. Aye ku luno timwazaalibwa muzaire oyo afa, aye mwazaalibwa oyo atafa, nga mubita mu kibono kya Katonda ekiramu era ekitawaagho." 
1Peter1:24 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Ebintu byonabyona ebiri n'omubiri biri ng'oti isubi, n'ekitiisa kyabyo kyonakyona kiri ng'oti kimuli kya isubi. Eisubi liniala n'ekimuli kyamagala," 
1Peter1:25 aye ekibono kya Musengwa kibaagho ebyanda n'ebyanda.” Ekibono kino n'Amawulire Amalungi agaabakoberwa. 
1Peter2:1 Kale ni mwetoolemu emize gyonagyona emibi, obuguya, okwewoomya ku ngulu, ensaalwa n'okuvuma." 
1Peter2:2 Ng'abaana abaghere bwe balirira amata amakalamu buli kiseera, mwena buliidho mwegombenga emere enkalamu ey'omwoyo. Bwe mulya emere eyo mwidha kukula era mulokolwe." 
1Peter2:3 Kuba: “Mwamala okubona Musengwa nga bw'asaasira.” 
1Peter2:4 Mwidhe y'ali. Oyo n'eibaale eiramu abantu lye baaloba bati lizira mugaso, aye eryalondebwa Katonda era ery'omughendo einho." 
1Peter2:5 Mwidhe y'ali nga muli ng'oti n'amabaale amalamu, abazimbemu endhu ey'omwoyo. Mube bakabona abatukuvu abagheereza emisengo egy'omwoyo egisiimibwa Katonda, nga mubita mu Yesu Kurisito." 
1Peter2:6 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Bona, ndi kuta mu Sioni eibaale, eibaale ery'oku nsonda lye nalonda era ery'omughendo einho, era oyo amwikiriza taliswazibwa.”" 
1Peter2:7 Kyava n'aba ow'omughendo einho ye imwe abamwikiriza, aye y'abo abatamwikiriza, ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Eibaale abazimbi lye baasuula bati lizira mugaso, n'eryafuuka empango ey'omusingi mu nsonda.”" 
1Peter2:8 Era biti: “Lino n'eibaale abantu kwe beekontola ni bagangalima, olubaale lwe beeguunhaku ni bagwa.” Bagangalima kuba tibaikiriza kibono, kye kikoba era atyo Katonda bwe yabategekera." 
1Peter2:9 Aye imwe muli lulyo lulonde, bakabona aba Kyabazinga, muli ighanga itukuvu era abantu ba Katonda beene. Katonda oyo n'eyabeeta okuva mu nzikiiza okwira mu butangaavu bwe obwewuunhisa einho, yaabalonda okukobera abantu ebyewuninkiriza bye yakola." 
1Peter2:10 Eira timwali bantu ba Katonda, aye buti muli bantu be. Eira mwali timusaasirwa Katonda, aye buti musaasirwa." 
1Peter2:11 Aboluganda, nga bwe muli ababise era abanoonia obubudamo mu nsi muno, mbeeghembye mulobere irala kujiira ku mubiri bye gwegomba ebirwanisa omwoyo." 
1Peter2:12 Mwebisenga bukalamu nga muli mu bamaghanga agandi. Olwo balobe kuboogeraku bati muli bakozi ba bibi, aye babone nga bye mukola bikalamu era basaake Katonda ku lunaku lw'aliidha." 
1Peter2:13 Ku lwa Musengwa muwulirenga kiisi mufuzi ow'oku nsi, leka abe kyabazinga," 
1Peter2:14 oba babe abafuzi b'asindika okubonereza abo abakola obubi n'okusaaka abo abakola obukalamu. 
1Peter2:15 Katonda ayenda inho musirise obutamanha obw'abasiru, nga mukola ebikalamu." 
1Peter2:16 Mubenga ba idembe, aye mulobe kweyambisa idembe eryo mu kukola bubi. Mubenga bagheereza ba Katonda." 
1Peter2:17 Buli muntu mumutengamu ekinhagansi. Mugonzenga aboluganda. Mutyenga Katonda, era ni Kyabazinga mumutengamu ekinhagansi." 
1Peter2:18 Abagheereza mubenga bawulize ye basengwa baimwe nga mubataamu inho ekinhagansi ti abo ab'ekisa era ababatwala obukalamu bonka, aye n'abo abakambwe." 
1Peter2:19 Wa nkabi agumira okudaazibwadaazibwa aghazira musango gw'aiziiza olw'okwenda okukola nga Katonda bw'ayenda. 
1Peter2:20 Naani abasaaka bwe muguminkiriza nga mubonerezeibwa olw'okukola obubi? Aye bwe muguminkiriza nga mudaazibwadaazibwa olw'okukola obukalamu, musiimibwa Katonda." 
1Peter2:21 Ekyo kye mwayeterwa. Kuba Kurisito yeena yadaazibwadaazibwa ku lwaimwe, yaabalekera eky'okuboneraku kye mube mujiireku." 
1Peter2:22 Mpaagho kibi kye yakola, waire ekibono kyonakyona eky'obuguya okumuva mu kanwa." 
1Peter2:23 Bwe yavumibwa, mwene tiyavuma. Bwe yadaazibwadaazibwa, tiyeesoomera abo abaamudaazadaaza. Aye yata obwesige mu Katonda oyo asala omusango nga tasaliriza." 
1Peter2:24 Yaganha okwetwika ebibi byaife ng'akomererwa ku musalaba, tube abafu eri ekibi, aye tube balamu eri obutuufu. Okudaazibwadaazibwa kwe n'okwabawonia imwe." 
1Peter2:25 Mwali ng'oti n'entaama edhibuze, aye mperaano mwiziibwa y'Omwayi era Omukuumi w'emyoyo gyaimwe." 
1Peter3:1 Mu nsambo n'endala, abakazi muwulirenga baibaimwe. Olwo, abandi ku abo waire mperaano tibaikiriza kibono, basobole okuleetebwa mu kwikiriza olw'empisa dhaimwe enkalamu nga ghazira ni kye mubakobyeku." 
1Peter3:2 Kuba baja kubona empisa dhaimwe enkalamu edhibagheesa ekitiisa. 
1Peter3:3 Obulungi bwaimwe bulobe kubanga ku bya ku ngulu, nga mulanga enviiri, nga mwetimbatimba ebya zaabu, n'okuvaala ebivaalo ebyamadholobera." 
1Peter3:4 Aye bubenga mu mwoyo munda, n'omube mube eky'omughendo ekitayonooneka eky'obuwombeefu n'emiraala. Bino bya mughendo inho mu maiso ga Katonda." 
1Peter3:5 Batyo abakazi abatuukirivu ab'eira abaata eisuubi lyaibwe mu Katonda, bwe beewoomyanga era ni bawuliranga baibaibwe." 
1Peter3:6 Nga Sara bwe yawuliranga Aburahamu n'amwetanga musengwa we, mwena buti muli baghala be bwe mukola obukalamu, era ni ghatabaagho kye mutya." 
1Peter3:7 Mu nsambo n'endala eyo abasaadha mubenga ni bakazi baimwe nga mwidhi muti mu kikula kyaibwe banafu. Mubatengamu ekinhagansi kuba mulifuna nabo obulamu obutawaagho. Mukole mutyo ghabule ekitabulatabula okusaba kwaimwe. 
1Peter3:8 Ekisembayo mwisanienga mwenamwena era nga mulumirwagana. Mugonzenga aboluganda era mubenga ba kisa era abawombeefu. 
1Peter3:9 Timwesasuuzanga nga mukoleibwa ekibi, oba okuvuma nga muvumiibwa, aye mubasabirenga bwa nkabi kuba kino Katonda kye yabeetera, olwo mufune enkabi." 
1Peter3:10 Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Kiisi ayenda okufuna obulamu, n'okuba obukalamu, akuume olulimi lwe lulobe kwogera bibi, n'omunwa gwe gulobe kwogera bya buguya." 
1Peter3:11 Ave mu kukola ebibi akole ebituufu, anoonie eidembe era alitambuliremu;" 
1Peter3:12 kuba amaiso ga Musengwa tigava ku batuufu, era talekera kuwulirisa kusaba kwaibwe. Aye abo abakola obubi abakambughalira.”" 
1Peter3:13 Kale bwe munaafubanga okukola ekituufu naani anaabakolanga akabi? 
1Peter3:14 Ni bwe munaadaazibwadaazibwanga olw'okukola ekituufu, muli ba nkabi. Mutatyanga muntu yeenayeena waire okweraliikirira," 
1Peter3:15 aye mu myoyo gyaimwe mutyenga Kurisito nga ni Musengwa. Buli kaseera mubenga beetegefu okwiramu omuntu yeenayeena ababuuza ku kusuubira kwe muli nakwo mu imwe. Aye kino mukikolenga na idembe era na kitiisa. 
1Peter3:16 Mubenga baamufu mu myoyo gyaimwe, olwo muswazenga abo ababavuma n'ababoogeraku obubi ku mpisa dhaimwe enkalamu edh'Obukurisito." 
1Peter3:17 Ekisinga bukalamu n'okudaazibwadaazibwa olw'okukola ekituufu, bwe kuba nga n'okwenda kwa Katonda, mu kifo eky'okudaazibwadaazibwa olw'okukola obubi" 
1Peter3:18 kuba ni Kurisito atyo bwe yafa olw'ebibi byaife omukuzi mulala guti era yaamala. Oyo aziraku kibi yaafiirira aboonooni, olwo atutuuse ye Katonda. Yaitibwa mu mubiri aye yairizibwa obulamu mu mwoyo." 
1Peter3:19 Era mu mwoyo yaaja okukobera emyoyo emisibe mu ikomera ekibono. 
1Peter3:20 Egyo n'emyoyo egy'abo abaaloba okuwulira Katonda eyabaguminkiriza mu biseera Noa bye yazimbiramu eryato. Mu lyato omwo n'omwawonera abantu abatono bati omunaana, abaawonagho mu maadhi." 
1Peter3:21 Amaadhi ago gafaanana n'okubatizibwa okubalokola buti. Okubatizibwa okwo, ti n'okunaazaaku eiko ku mubiri, aye n'okweghemba Katonda atughe omwoyo omunaabuufu olw'okuzuukira kwa Yesu Kurisito." 
1Peter3:22 Kurisito oyo yaja mu igulu era atyaime ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha ogwa Katonda. Era afuga bamalaika, n'ab'obukumu, n'ab'amaani ab'omu igulu." 
1Peter4:1 Nga Kurisito bwe yadaazibwadaazibwa mu mubiri, mwena mwekuume n'ekyo mu myoyo gyaimwe mubenga beetegefu okudaazibwadaazibwa, kuba kiisi adaazibwadaazibwa mu mubiri aba takaafugibwa kibi." 
1Peter4:2 Olwo ekiseera ky'amala ng'akaali mu mubiri, yaaba nga takaafugibwa kwegomba kwa mubiri okutoolaku okufugibwa Katonda by'ayenda." 
1Peter4:3 Mu biseera ebyabita mwali n'obwire obumala okukola ebyo abantu ab'ensi bye benda. Mwemaliranga mu bwenzi, mu bukaba, mu butamiivu, mu kuja ku bibinuko ebibi, ni mu kusinza ebintu ebitali Katonda ebyenhinhalwa." 
1Peter4:4 Buti babeewuunhia bwe batababona nga mubeeyimbaku mu bulamu bwene obwo obw'obukozi obw'ebibi, era imwe kyebava ni babavuma." 
1Peter4:5 Aye baliba n'okwewozaaku mu maiso ga Katonda oyo aja okusalira abalamu n'abafu omusango. 
1Peter4:6 Era Amawulire Amalungi kye gaava ni gakoberwa n'abafu, olwo waire nga baasalirwa omusango ng'abantu boonaboona bwe basalirwa, basobole okuba n'obulamu ng'oti ni Katonda mu mwoyo." 
1Peter4:7 Enkomerero ey'ebintu byonabyona eri kumpi. Agho ni mubenga beetegefu era musabenga. 
1Peter4:8 Ekisinga byonabyona obukulu, mugonzanienga mu mazima, kuba okugonzania kusonighisa ebibi kamaala." 
1Peter4:9 Musangaazenga banaimwe mu maka gaimwe, n'omwoyo mulala." 
1Peter4:10 Nga kiisi mulala ku imwe bwe yagheebwa ekitone, akikozesenga bukalamu baine baganhulwe. Kino akikolenga ng'omughanika ow'ebirungi bya Katonda ebya buli nsambo bwe yandikoze." 
1Peter4:11 Oyo akobera abantu ekibono kya Katonda, akobere irala ekibono ekyo Katonda ky'amugha; oyo agheereza, agheerezenga n'amaani Katonda g'amugha. Olwo Katonda agheebwe ekitiisa mu byonabyona ku lwa Yesu Kurisito mwene kitiisa, n'obukumu, ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
1Peter4:12 Aboluganda, okudaazibwadaazibwa okuzibu kwe mulimu kulobe kubeewuunhisa inho ng'oti tikubangaghooku, kuba kuligho lwa kubaleba bulebe." 
1Peter4:13 Aye musangaale era musagambe olw'okubona nga mudaazibwadaazibwa ng'oti ni Kurisito, olwo mwidhule eisanhu, ekitiisa kye lwe kiriboneka." 
1Peter4:14 Oba nga babavumira eriina lya Kurisito muli ba nkabi, kuba kino kitegeeza nga Mwoyo wa Katonda ow'ekitiisa ali mu imwe." 
1Peter4:15 Mu imwe mulobe kubangamu adaazibwadaazibwa ng'alangibwa obutemo, oba obwibi, oba obukozi bw'ebibi, oba olw'okwengiza mu bitamugemaku." 
1Peter4:16 Aye ole bw'adaazibwadaazibwa olw'okuba Omukurisito, alobenga kuwulira nsoni mu liina lya Kurisito, aye aghenga bwa Katonda kitiisa." 
1Peter4:17 Ekiseera eky'okusalirwa omusango kituuse era abantu ba Katonda beene n'abaja okusooka okusalirwa. Kale oba nga aja kusooka n'ife, memale leero kiriba kitya n'abo abaloba okuwulira Amawulire Amalungi agava ye Katonda?" 
1Peter4:18 Era ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Oba nga kikalangufu omuntu akola ebituufu okulokoka, memale leero abakozi ab'ebibi abatatya Katonda baliba batya?”" 
1Peter4:19 Kale ni abo abadaazibwadaazibwa nga Katonda bw'ayenda bakolenga bukalamu, bagemye Omutonzi waibwe oyo omwesigwa emyoyo gyaibwe." 
1Peter5:1 Nhenda okukubiriza abo abakulembeze b'abaikiriza abali mu imwe. Zeena nga bwendi mukulembeze munaibwe eyaboneraku irala okudaazibwadaazibwa kwa Kurisito, era aja okugabana ku kitiisa ekija okwolekebwa, mbakubiriza" 
1Peter5:2 okwayanga obukalamu ebyayo bya Katonda bye yabagemya. Mutakolanga mutyo lwa kukakibwa, aye mukolenga n'omwoyo ogwenda, era nga ti lwa kugwidhubanira bya kufuna." 
1Peter5:3 Mulobenga kwebisa oti bafuzi mu byayo omwo, aye mubenga kya kuboneraku." 
1Peter5:4 Olwo omwayi omukulu mwene bw'aliboneka, mulifuna engule ey'ekitiisa etawaagho." 
1Peter5:5 Mu nsambo n'endala imwe abato mubenga bawulize eri abakulu mu myaka. Mwenamwena mubenga bawombeefu, nga kiisi mulala agheereza mwine. Kuba ebyaghandiikibwa bikoba biti: “Katonda atakania abeekudumbaza, aye abeewooya abooleka ekisa.”" 
1Peter5:6 Kale ni mwewooye ghansi gh'omukono gwa Katonda ogw'amaani, olwo alibafuula okuba aba ghaigulu mu kiseera kye ekituufu." 
1Peter5:7 Mumulekere ebibeeraliikiriza byonabyona, kuba abafaaku inho." 
1Peter5:8 Mwefugenga era mubenga beetegefu kuba Sitaani omuzigu waimwe aja nga atambulatambula ng'oti mpologoma eja ng'ewologoma, ng'eyagala y'enaakaavuula." 
1Peter5:9 Mutamuganha era mwekalangulire mu kwikiriza kwaimwe, nga mwidhi bukalamu nga baganda baimwe mu nsi yoonayoona bali kudaazibwadaazibwa mu nsambo n'endala eyo." 
1Peter5:10 Aye olumaliira olw'okudaazibwadaazibwa akaseera akatono, Katonda ow'ekisa ekitakoma eyabeeta mube mu kitiisa kye ekitawaagho mu Kurisito, alibagoloza, yaabagha amaani era yaabagumya." 
1Peter5:11 Katonda oyo afugenga ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina. 
1Peter5:12 Mbaghandiikiire embaluwa eno enhimpi nga nhambibwaku Siluvano, nze ye mbona nga Mukurisito munange omwesigwa. Ndi kubakubiriza era naabakakasa nti kino kye mpandiise n'ekisa kya Katonda kyenekyene, era mutakivangamu." 
1Peter5:13 Bakuristo banaimwe ab'omu Kikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'omu Babiloni, boona abaalondebwa Katonda babalamwisa. Era n'omwana wange Mariko yeena abalamwisa." 
1Peter5:14 Mulamusaganienga nga munhwegeragana mu kugonzania. Emiraala gibe n'imwe mwenamwena mu Kurisito. 
2Peter1:1 Ninze Simoni Petero omugheereza era omutume wa Yesu Kurisito. Mpandiikira abo abaafuna okwikiriza okuli ng'oti n'okwaife, olw'obutuufu bwa Katonda waife era Omulokozi waife Yesu Kurisito." 
2Peter1:2 Enkabi n'emiraala byeyongerenga mu imwe mu kumanha Katonda ni Yesu Musengwa waife. 
2Peter1:3 Musengwa waife oyo, mu buyinza bwe nga Katonda, yatugha byonabyona bye twetaaga okuba abalamu n'okutya Katonda, nga tubita mu kumanha oyo eyatweta tube mu kitiisa kye ni mu bulungi bwe." 
2Peter1:4 Muno mwe yatugheera emikisa gye emingi era egy'omughendo gye yasuubiza, olwo imwe musobole okuwona okuzikirira okuva mu kwegomba okw'omubiri nga mubita mu mikisa egyo, era mugabane ku bwakatonda bwe." 
2Peter1:5 Olw'ekyo mwefubirize inho, ku kwikiriza kwaimwe mwongereku ebikolwa ebikalamu ku bikolwa ebikalamu mwongereku okumanha"

2Peter1:13 Era ndowooza nti kasita mba nga nkaali mulamu, ekyo n'ekituufu okubakubirizanga nga mbaidhusa." 
2Peter1:14 Ndidhi nti ndi kumpi okuva mu mubiri guno, nga Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito bwe yakindholeka obukalamu." 
2Peter1:15 Ndidha kukola kyonakyona kye mpanga okubona nga ni bwe ndifa, ghalibaagho ekinaabaidhusanga ebintu bino ekiseera kyonakyona." 
2Peter1:16 Bwe twabamanhisa ku kwira kwa Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito n'obuyinza, ti twali ng'ababakobera enfumo obufumo. Aye twabaloodhera ekitiisa kye, kye twabona n'amaiso gaife geene." 
2Peter1:17 Ku olwo Katonda Lata lwe yamugha ekitiisa n'okusaakibwa, ghaaligho eiroboozi eryamwogeraku nga liva y'oyo ali n'Ekitiisa Ekitaloodheka, nga likoba liti: “Ono ni mutabane wange omugonzi aneesiimisa.”" 
2Peter1:18 Twawulira eiroboozi eryo nga liva mu igulu kuba twali naye ku lusozi olutukuvu.
