Jude1:1 Ninze Yuda omugheereza wa Yesu Kurisito era muganda wa Yakobo. Mpandiikira abo abaayetebwa abagonzi ba Katonda Lata, era abakuumibwa Yesu Kurisito." 
Jude1:2 Okusaasira n'okugonza kwa Katonda, n'emiraala byeyongerenga mu imwe." 
Jude1:3 Bakagwa, mbairenga nhenda inho okubaghandiikira ku kulokolebwa kwaife kwe tugabanaku, aye nkyagaine nga kigwaine okubaghandiikira mbakubirize okulwanirira endhikiriza Katonda ye yagha abatuukirivu omukuzi omulala guti nga gumala." 
Jude1:4 Kuba ghaligho abantu abatatya Katonda era abaatonderwa okusingibwa omusango, abeibirira ni batweyimbamu. Abantu abo bakiidhamya obukwenda obw'ekisa kya Katonda nga benda bwisanie n'obudankaanu bwaibwe. Era beegaana Yesu Kurisito Omukulu waife era Musengwa waife yenka ati." 
Jude1:5 Mperaano nhenda okubaidhusa, waire nga mukiidhi bukalamu, nti oyo eyazaawula Abaisiraeli okuva mu Misiri, yamala yaazikiriza abo abataali na kwikiriza." 
Jude1:6 Era ni bamalaika abo abaaleka ebifo byaibwe eby'obukumu ni babivaamu, yabasiba ku ndhegere yaabakuumira mu nzikiiza okutuusa ku lunaku olw'okusaliraku omusango." 
Jude1:7 Nhenda era okubaidhusa Sodoma ni Gomorra n'ebibuga ebindi ebyali biriiraine agho, byona ebyakola ebikolwa eby'ensoni n'eby'amairu ag'abasaadha n'abakazi agatajiira ku butonde. Bino byabonerezebwa mu muliro ogutazikira, byafuuka eky'okuboneraku." 
Jude1:8 Abantu bano boona bwe bali. Bajiira ku kubonekerwa okw'obuguya, baaghaayo emibiri gyaibwe okugikozesa ebibi, baanhooma obuyinza bwa Katonda era baavuma eby'ekitiisa ebiri mu igulu." 
Jude1:9 Ate nga ni bw'aba Mikaeli omukulu wa bamalaika, tiyakola ekyo bwe yali ali kukaayana ni Sitaani, nga bakaayanira omulambo gwa Musa; tiyakana n'akozesa bibono bivuma ng'asalira Sitaani omusango, okutoolaku okumukoba ati: “Katonda akubonereze.”" 
Jude1:10 Aye abantu bano bavuma kiisi kye bataidhi, ate ebyo bye baidhi babiidhi bwa mu butonde okufaananaku ensolo edh'omu nsiko. Era byene ebyo n'ebibazikiriza." 
Jude1:11 Bakagwireku! Kuba bagema engira nga Kaini ye yagema. Olw'okugonza einho empiiya bagwa mu nsobi ya Balaamu. Era nga Kora bwe yakola, boona badheemera ababafuga, era baazikirizibwa nga bwe yazikirizibwa" 
Jude1:12 Abantu bano bwe baba ku mbaga dhaimwe edh'okugonzania baswaza inho. Baidhirira kulya, na kunhwa, na kwefaaku bonka nga bazira na nsoni. Bali ng'oti bire ebitavaamu maadhi, ebija n'empewo. Bali ng'oti miti egitabaaku bibala mu kiseera eky'ekyengera. Bali ng'oti miti egyakuukulwagho n'emizi era ni gikalira irala." 
Jude1:13 Bali ng'oti n'okwefuukuula kw'enhandha, ate ebikolwa byaibwe ebiswaza byaba ng'oti n'eiwovu erifuukeera ku maadhi agali kwefuukuula. Bali ng'oti muunienie edhimala gaja eyo dhityo, era Katonda yabategekera okuba mu nzikiiza ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Jude1:14 Abantu bano Enoka ow'omu luse olwomusanvu okuva ku Adamu, be yayogeraku ng'alanga ati: “Bona, Musengwa aliidha n'olukunkumuli olw'abatuukirivu," 
Jude1:15 okusalira abantu boonaboona omusango gubasinge olw'ebikolwa byaibwe byonabyona eby'obutatya Katonda, n'olw'ebibono eby'obukambwe byonabyona abatatya Katonda bye baamwogeraku.”" 
Jude1:16 Abantu bano buli kaseera baba mu kutolooma olw'obutasiima, bageyigeyi, bajiira ku kwegomba kwa mibiri gyaibwe, beesaaka era baasuutiriza abantu nga bali ni kye babendaku." 
Jude1:17 Bakagwa, muteerabiranga Abatume ba Musengwa waife Yesu Kurisito, bye baabakobera eira." 
Jude1:18 Baabakobera bati: “Mu biseera eby'enkomerero ghalibaagho abantu abatatya Katonda, abajiira ku kwegomba okw'emibiri gyaibwe, abalibaleetera okufuuka enseko dh'abalamu.”" 
Jude1:19 Bano n'abaleeta okwekutulakutulamu, bajiira ku bya nsi era Mwoyo abaziramu." 
Jude1:20 Aye imwe bakagwa, okwikiriza kwaimwe okutukuvu n'okube kube omusingi kwe mwezimbira. Musabirenga mu maani ga Mwoyo Mutukuvu," 
Jude1:21 era mwekuumirenga mu kugonza kwa Katonda. Muteegerere Musengwa Yesu Kurisito, mu kusaasira kwe abaghe obulamu obutawaagho." 
Jude1:22 Mugumyenga abo abaikiriza n'emyoyo ebiri 
Jude1:23 muwonieku abandi nga mubaghendula mu muliro. Abandi mu basaasire aye nga mubatya, nga mwesambira irala n'ebivaalo byaibwe ebyayonebwa ebikolwa byaibwe eby'omubiri." 
Jude1:24 Katonda oyo ow'obusobozi obubakuuma ni mutagwa, ni bubatuusa mu maiso ge ag'ekitiisa nga muziraku musango gwonagwona era nga musagamba," 
Jude1:25 Katonda omulala ati Omulokozi waife ng'abita mu Yesu Kurisito Musengwa waife, agheebwe ekitiisa, obufuzi, amaani n'obuyinza okuva ku ntoolo, na buti, n'okutuusa ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Revelation1:1 Bino n'ebintu Yesu Kurisito bye yayoleka abagheereza be. Ebintu bino nga biri n'okubaagho amangu. Kurisito yatuma malaika we yaabimanhisa omugheereza we Yoanne. 
Revelation1:2 Ono yakoba byonabyona bye yabona era yakakasa nga bibono bya Katonda, ebyayolekebwa Yesu Kurisito." 
Revelation1:3 Wa nkabi asomera abantu ebibono bino eby'obulanzi, era ba nkabi abo abawulira ebyaghandiikibwa bino ni babigema. Kuba ekiseera kiri kumpi." 
Revelation1:4 Ninze Yoanne nga mpandiikira Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito omusanvu ebiri mu Asia. Katonda oyo aligho, eyaligho era aliidha, abaghe enkabi n'emiraala. Era n'emyoyo omusanvu egiba agho gha mberi gh'ekityamo kye gikole gityo." 
Revelation1:5 Era ni Yesu Kurisito, omudhulirwa omwesigwa, omuberi mu kuzuukira, era afuga bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi, yeena akole atyo. Kurisito oyo atugonza era eyatunaazaaku ebibi byaife n'omusaayi gwe," 
Revelation1:6 yaatufuula obwakyabazinga, era yaatufuula bakabona ba Katonda Ise. Agheebwenga ekitiisa n'obuyinza ebyanda n'ebyanda. Amiina." 
Revelation1:7 Bona, wuuyo aliidhira ku bireri! Abantu boonaboona balimubona, era n'abo abaamufumita balimubona. Abantu boonaboona ku nsi baligegenga ku lulwe. N'ekyo. Amiina." 
Revelation1:8 Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona akoba ati: “Ninze Alufa ni Omega entoolo era Enkomerero, aligho, eyaligho era aliidha.”" 
Revelation1:9 Ninze Yoanne muganda waimwe era Mukurisito munaimwe, agabanira aghalala n'imwe ku kudaazibwadaazibwa ni ku Bwakyabazinga bwa Kurisito era ni ku kuguminkiriza mu kudaazibwadaazibwa. Nateebwa ku kizinga ekyetebwa Patumo nga nangibwa okwegeresa abantu ekibono kya Katonda n'olw'okuba omudhulirwa wa Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 Ku lunaku lwa Musengwa, Mwoyo yandidhaku, naawulira e mugongo wange amamiro ag'amaani nga gali ng'oti ndeka." 
Revelation1:11 Gaakoba gati: “By'obona bighandiike mu kitabo okigheereze Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito bino: eky'Efeso, eky'e Simuruna, eky'e Perugamo, eky'e Thuyatira, eky'e Sarudi, eky'e Filadelufia, n'eky'e Laodikea.”" 
Revelation1:12 Agho naagaluka okubona ali kwogera ninze. Bwe nagaluka, naabona ebikondo by'entaala musanvu ebya zaabu." 
Revelation1:13 Ghagati mu bikondo ebyo, nabonamu afaanana ng'oti mwana wa muntu ng'avaire ekivaalo ekituuka ku bigere, era nga yeesibye mu kifuba olusibiro olwa zaabu." 
Revelation1:14 Omutwe gwe n'enviiri byali bitukula ng'oti biviiri bya ntaama ebyeru, nga byeru ng'oti mugozi. Amaiso ge nga gaaka ng'oti muliro." 
Revelation1:15 Ebigere bye nga biri ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo ekizigule. Amamiro ge nga gali ng'oti mpiriito ya maadhi. 
Revelation1:16 Mu mukono gwe omusaadha, yali agemye emuunienie musanvu. Mu munwa gwe mwavaamu empiima eri n'obwogi ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhombi. Mu maiso ge ng'ali ng'oti ndhuba nga erikwaka inho." 
Revelation1:17 Bwe namubona neeyala gha bigere bye nga ndi ng'oti n'afiire. Aye yangemaku n'omukono gwe omusaadha, yankoba ati: “Totya, ninze entoolo era enkomerero" 
Revelation1:18 ate era omulamu. Nali nfiire, aye mperaano ndi mulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda, era nfuga okufa n'amagombe." 
Revelation1:19 Mperaano ghandiika by'obona ebirigho, n'ebiribaagho ye bwidha." 
Revelation1:20 Gano n'amakulu amagise ag'emuunienie omusanvu dh'oboine mu mukono gwange omusaadha, n'ebikondo eby'entaala omusanvu ebya zaabu: Emuunienie omusanvu, ni bamalaika ab'Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito omusanvu, ate ebikondo eby'entaala omusanvu, n'Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito omusanvu." 
Revelation2:1 “Ghandiikira malaika w'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'Efeso oti: oyo agemye emuunienie omusanvu mu mukono gwe omusaadha, atambulira ghagati gh'ebikondo eby'entaala omusanvu ebya zaabu, akoba ati:" 
Revelation2:2 Ndidhi by'okola, okufaabiikana kwo, n'okuguminkiriza mu bizibu kw'oli nakwo. Ndidhi nga tosobola kuguminkiriza bantu babi. Era ng'abo abaali beeyeta abatume, ate nga ti batume, wabaleba waababona nga baguya." 
Revelation2:3 Ndidhi ng'oguminkiriza, waagumira ebizibu olw'eriina lyange, waaloba kuwaamu maani." 
Revelation2:4 Aye kye ntasiima ni kino: Okugonza kwe wali nakwo mu mainhama wakuvaaku. 
Revelation2:5 Kale idhukira bwe wangonzanga ng'okaali kugwa, weenenie, okole bye wakolanga mu mainhama. Aye bw'oteenenie, ndidha kwidha y'oli, ntoolegho ekikondo kyo eky'entaala mu kifo kyayo." 
Revelation2:6 Aye ate kino n'ekirungi ky'oli nakyo: Okyagha ebikolwa eby'abanonereza Nikolao, zeena bye nkyagha." 
Revelation2:7 “Ali n'amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito. Oyo aghangula, ndimuganha okulya ku muti ogw'obulamu oguli mu kifo kya Katonda eky'okwesiima." 
Revelation2:8 “Ghandiikira malaika w'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'e Simuruna oti: Oyo entoolo era enkomerero, eyafa aye nairamu okulama, akoba ati:" 
Revelation2:9 Ndidhi okudaagadaaga kwo n'obwavu bwo, ate ng'oli mukombe. Ndidhi ebikughaamibwa abo abeeyeta Abayudaaya, ate nga ti Bayudaaya, aye abantu ba Sitaani." 
Revelation2:10 Otatya ebyo ebizibu ebiri okumpi okukutuukaku. Bona, Sitaani aidha kusuula abandi ku imwe mu ikomera okubaleba, era mulidaagadaaga okumala enaku ikumi. Weekalangulire mu kwikiriza okutuusa okufa, ndikugha obulamu ng'ekirabo eky'obughanguzi." 
Revelation2:11 Ali n'amatu awulire Mwoyo ky'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito. Oyo aghangula, okufa okwokubiri tikulimukolaku kabi." 
Revelation2:12 “Ghandiikira malaika w'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'e Perugamo oti: Oyo ali n'empiima eri n'obwogi ku ndhuyi dhaayo dhombi, akoba ati:" 
Revelation2:13 Ndidhi y'oba eyo eri ekityamo kya Sitaani. Weekalanguliire ku nze. Era waasigala ng'ondhikiriza ni mu kiseera Antipa omudhulizi wange omwesigwa mwe yaitirwa eyo ewaimwe Sitaani y'aba. 
Revelation2:14 “Aye ndiku ni bye ntakusiimaku: Eyo oliyo n'abantu abajiira ku kwegeresa kwa Balaamu eyayegeresa Balaki okusendasenda Abaisiraeli okugwa mu kibi balye ebigheereibwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda, era bakole eby'obudankaanu." 
Revelation2:15 Era weena otyo oliyo n'abantu abajiira ku kwegeresa okw'abo abanonereza Nikolao. 
Revelation2:16 Kale weenenie: oba ti n'ekyo, ndidha kukwidhira mangu nwane n'abantu abo n'empiima ey'omu munwa gwange." 
Revelation2:17 “Ali n'amatu awulire Mwoyo ky'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito. Oyo aghangula ndimugha ku mannu eyagisibwa, era ndimugha eibaale eryeru okughandiikiibwa eriina eiyaaka eritamanhiibwa muntu wundi yeenayeena, okutoolaku oyo aba alifunie." 
Revelation2:18 “Ghandiikira malaika w'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'e Thuyatira, oti: Omwana wa Katonda ali n'amaiso agaaka ng'oti muliro, era ali n'ebigere ebiri ng'oti kyuma kya kikomo ekizigule, akoba ati:" 
Revelation2:19 Ndidhi by'okola. Ndidhi okugonza n'okwikiriza by'oli nabyo. Ndidhi okugheereza kwo n'okuguminkiriza mu bizibu kw'oli nakwo. Era ndidhi ng'oli kukola ebintu kamaala buti okusinga bye wakolanga mu mainhama. 
Revelation2:20 Aye kye ntasiima ni kino: Oleka omukazi Yezebeli, eyeeyeta omulanzi, yaayegeresa era yaakiidhamya abagheereza bange. Baakola eby'obudankaanu era baalya ebigheereibwayo eri ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda." 
Revelation2:21 Namugha ekiseera okwenenia aye yaloba okuleka obudankaanu bwe. 
Revelation2:22 Kale ndidha kumukuba ku ndiri n'abo abaayendanga naye badaagedaage, bwe banaaloba okwenenia ebyo bye baakolanga naye." 
Revelation2:23 Era abaana be ndibaita, Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito byonabyona bimanhe nga ninze aidhi kiisi muntu by'alowooza mule ni by'ayenda okukola. Era kiisi mulala ku imwe ndimugha ekigwaniire ebikolwa bye." 
Revelation2:24 “Aye imwe ab'omu Thuyatira abandi, abataaganha kwegeresa okwo era abataayega ebyo abandi bye beeta ebyama eby'omunda einho ebya Sitaani, ndi kubakoba nti: tiidha kwongera kubakaluubiriza," 
Revelation2:25 okutoolaku okubakoba okukalangula ekyo kye muli nakyo okutuusa lwe ndiidha. 
Revelation2:26 Oyo aghangula, n'atuukiriza ebyange okutuusa ku nkomerero, ndimugha obukumu okufuga amaghanga." 
Revelation2:27 Aligafuga n'omwigo ogw'ekyuma, yaagamenhamenha ng'oti amenhamenha bibya bya itosi. Zeena ntyo bwe nafuna obukumu obwo ewa Lata." 
Revelation2:28 Era ndimugha emuunienie ey'oku nkyo. 
Revelation2:29 Ali n'amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
Revelation3:1 “Ghandiikira malaika w'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'e Sarudi, oti: oyo ali n'emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda, n'emuunienie omusanvu, akoba ati: Ndidhi by'okola. Ndidhi ng'omanhiibwa okuba nga oli mulamu, ate ng'oli mufu." 
Revelation3:2 Zuuka, oyongere amaani mu ebyo ebikaasigairegho nga bikaali kufa, kuba mu by'okola tibonamu kituukiriire mu maiso ga Katonda wange." 
Revelation3:3 “Kale idhukira bye wayegeresebwa ni bye wawulira, obigeme era weenenie. Bw'otaazuuke ndidha kwidha ng'omwibi, era tolimanha kaseera ke ndiidhiramu y'oli." 
Revelation3:4 Aye mu Sarudi olimu n'abandi abatonotono abatayonoonanga bivaalo byaibwe: balitambula ninze mu bivaalo ebyeru kuba bagwaine. 
Revelation3:5 Oyo aghangula, alivaazibwa ebivaalo ebyeru, era tirisasa liina lye mu kitabo kya bulamu, aye ndiryatula mu maiso ga Lata, n'aga bamalaika be." 
Revelation3:6 Ali n'amatu, awulire Mwoyo by'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
Revelation3:7 “Ghandiikira malaika ow'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'e Filadelufia, oti: Oyo omutukuvu era ow'amazima, ali n'ekisumuluzo kya Daudi, aigulagho ni ghataba asobola kwigalagho, aigalagho ni ghataba asobola kwigulagho akoba ati:" 
Revelation3:8 Ndidhi by'okola. Bona, nakwiguliragho olwigi mu maiso go oluzira waire mulala asobola kulwigala. Ndidhi ng'oli n'amaani matono, aye weekalanguliire ku kibono kyange waaloba kuneegaana." 
Revelation3:9 “Kale abo abeesoloza okusinza Sitaani, abeeyeta Abayudaaya ate nga ti Bayudaaya, aye nga baguya, ndibaleeta mu maiso go, baakuba amakiryaivu gha bigere byo, bamanhe bati nkugonza." 
Revelation3:10 Olw'okuba waguminkiriza mu kudaazibwadaazibwa nga bwe nakulagira, ndidha kukuwonia ekiseera eky'okulebwa ekija okwidhira ensi yoonayoona okuleba abo abali ku nsi." 
Revelation3:11 Ndi kwidha mangu. Kalangula ky'oli nakyo ghalobe kubaagho akutwalaku kirabo kyo eky'obughanguzi. 
Revelation3:12 Oyo aghangula, ndimufuula empango mu isinzizo lya Katonda wange era talirivaamu. Ndimughandiikaku eriina lya Katonda wange, n'eriina ly'ekibuga kya Katonda wange Yerusalemu ekiyaaka ekiika nga kiva mu igulu ewa Katonda wange. Era ndimughandiikaku eriina lyange eiyaaka." 
Revelation3:13 Ali n'amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito." 
Revelation3:14 “Ghandiikira malaika w'Ekikunsu eky'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito eky'e Laodikea, oti: Oyo oyetebwa Amiina, omudhulirwa omwesigwa, ow'amazima, era ensimuko y'ebyo Katonda bye yatonda, akoba ati:" 
Revelation3:15 Ndidhi by'okola. Ndidhi nga toli mwinhogovu oba omusu, nguli ni waliku kirala ku ebyo!" 
Revelation3:16 Aye kuba oli wa kiwozima, toli mwinhogovu ate toli musu, ndidha kukufuudha ere onve mu kanwa." 
Revelation3:17 Okoba oti, ‘Ndi mukombe, ndi bukalamu, nzira kye ndhulirira’, waaloba kumanha ng'oli mughafu asaasirwa, omwavu, omutulu era ali ekidu." 
Revelation3:18 “Kale nkugha amagezi onguleku zaabu alongooseibwa mu muliro osobole okuba omukombe, onguleku ebivaalo ebyeru ovaale owone ensoni edh'okubita ekidu, era onguleku obulezi obw'okusiiga ku maiso go oghange okubona." 
Revelation3:19 “Nze abo be ngonza mbanenia era mbakangaivula. Kale fuba weenenie. 
Revelation3:20 Ndi ku lwigi nhemereire, nkonkona. Awulira amamiro gange n'aigulagho olwigi, ndingira omumwe naalya naye." 
Revelation3:21 Oyo aghangula, ndimugha obukumu obw'okutyama ninze ku kityamo kyange eky'obwakyabazinga, nga zeena bwe naghangula ni ntyama ni Lata ku kityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Revelation3:22 Ali n'amatu, awulire Mwoyo ky'akoba Ebikunsu eby'Abaikiriza mu Kurisito.”" 
Revelation4:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, naabona olwigi olwigule mu igulu. Era n'amamiro ge nali nsoose okuwuliraku agaali ng'oti ndeka gankoba gati: “Niina ghano, nkwoleke ebiri n'okubaagho oluvainhuma lwa bino.”" 
Revelation4:2 Amangu ago Mwoyo yandidhaku, era naabona ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga mu igulu nga kiriku akityaimeku." 
Revelation4:3 Oyo eyali akityaimeku, emboneka ye, ng'amesunkana ng'amabaale ga yasipera ni sarudio. Musoke yali yeezungulwire ekityamo ekyo, nga amesunkana ng'oti n'eibaale lya semaragido." 
Revelation4:4 Okwezungulula ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekyo, ghaaligho ebityamo ebindi eby'obwakyabazinga amakumi abiri na bina (24), nga kutyaimeku abakulembeze amakumi abiri na bana nga bali mu bivaalo ebyeru, era bavaire engule edha zaabu ku mitwe." 
Revelation4:5 Ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekyo nga kuvaaku okumyansa okw'eigulu, okududumuka, n'okutyabuka okw'olukuba. Emberi waakyo nga ghaligho ebisiki ebiri kwaka, era nga bino n'emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda." 
Revelation4:6 Emberi gh'ekityamo ekyo, nga ghaligho enhandha eri ng'oti kirawuli, era ng'ebitamu amaiso. Ate okwezungulula ekityamo ekyo, ku buli luuyi lwakyo, ng'eriyo ebitonde ebiramu bina, nga biidhwire amaiso emberi n'einhuma." 
Revelation4:7 Ekitonde ekiramu ekisooka kyali kiri ng'oti mpologoma ekyokubiri nga kiri ng'oti nte nume ekyokusatu nga kyakula mu maiso ng'oti muntu ekyokuna nga kiri ng'oti nkookooma eri kuguluka. 
Revelation4:8 Buli kirala ku bitonde ebiramu ebyo ebina nga kiri n'amaghagha mukaaga. Era nga ebitonde ebiramu ebyo biidhwire amaiso ku ngulu ni munda. Omusana n'obwire nga tibirekera kwemba biti: “Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, mutukuvu, mutukuvu, era mutukuvu, n'eyaligho, n'aligho, era n'aliidha.”" 
Revelation4:9 Ebitonde ebiramu ebyo byaghanga ekitiisa oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda, nga bimusaaka era nga bimweyanza. Bwe byabanga nga bikola bityo," 
Revelation4:10 ng'abakulembeze amakumi abiri n'abana (24) beeyala mu maiso g'oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, baamusinza oyo omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda. Era engule dhaibwe baadhiisa gha mberi gh'ekityamo nga bakoba bati:" 
Revelation4:11 “Musengwa era Katonda waife, ogwaniire okugheebwa ekitiisa, okusaakibwa, era n'obukumu. Kuba niiwe watonda ebintu byonabyona, byatondebwa era byabaagho olw'okwenda kwo.”" 
Revelation5:1 Naabona enzingo y'ekitabo mu mukono omusaadha ogw'oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, ng'eghandiikiibwa munda ni ku ngulu era ng'esibiibwaku n'obumanhiso musanvu." 
Revelation5:2 Era naabona malaika ow'amaani, yaabuuza n'amamiro ag'amaani ati: “Naani agwaine okukakampula obumanhiso obusibye enzingo y'ekitabo n'okugizingulula?”" 
Revelation5:3 Aye ghaabula naire omulala mu igulu oba ku nsi, waire ghansi mu bafu, asobola okuzingulula enzingo ey'ekitabo, waire okugisomamu." 
Revelation5:4 Nze naalira inho amaziga okubona nga ghabuzeegho omuntu naire omulala ati, agwaine okuzingulula enzingo ey'ekitabo n'okugisomamu." 
Revelation5:5 Agho owundi ku bakulembeze yankoba ati: “Otalira. Bona, oyo ayetebwa Empologoma, ow'omu ighanga lya Yuda, mwidhukulu wa Daudi yaghangula, era asobola okukakampula obumanhiso omusanvu, n'okuzingulula enzingo ey'ekitabo.”" 
Revelation5:6 Agho naabona Entaama Ento ng'eyemereire ghagati aghali ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, ng'eboneka ng'eyaitibwaku. Ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4) byali bigyezungulwire aghalala n'abakulembeze. Yali n'amayiga musanvu n'amaiso musanvu, nga n'egyo emyoyo omusanvu egya Katonda egitumibwa mu nsi yoonayoona." 
Revelation5:7 Yaaja, yaatoola enzingo ey'ekitabo mu mukono omusaadha ogw'oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Revelation5:8 Bwe yakola ekyo, ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4) n'abakulembeze amakumi abiri n'abana (24), beeyala mu maiso ag'Entaama Ento. Buli mulala yali n'entongooli, n'ebibya ebya zaabu ebiidhwire obubbaani ng'okwo n'okusaba okw'abatuukirivu." 
Revelation5:9 Baayemba olwembo oluyaaka, bati: “Ogwaine okutoola enzingo ey'ekitabo n'okukakampula obumanhiso obugisibye, kuba waitibwa era waanunulira Katonda abantu, aba kiisi kika, kiisi lulimi, kiisi luse, na kiisi ighanga." 
Revelation5:10 Wabafuula obwakyabazinga era waabafuula bakabona ba Katonda waife ab'okufuga ku nsi.” 
Revelation5:11 Agho naabona era naawulira amamiro ga bamalaika, enkumi n'enkumi, obukaire n'obukaire, nga beezungulwire ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga n'ebitonde ebiramu, n'abakulembeze." 
Revelation5:12 Baayogera n'amamiro ag'amaani bati: “Entaama Ento eyaitibwa egwaine okuba n'obukumu, n'obukombe, n'amagezi, n'amaani. Era egwaine okusaakibwa, okugheebwa ekitiisa, n'okusinzibwa!”" 
Revelation5:13 Era naawulira buli kitonde mu igulu, ni ku nsi, ni ghansi mu bafu, ni mu nhandha, byonabyona nga bikoba biti: “Oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga era n'Entaama Ento, asaakibwe, agheebwe ekitiisa, asinzibwe, era abenga wa maani ebyanda n'ebyanda!”" 
Revelation5:14 Ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4) byakoba biti: “Amiina.” Era abakulembeze beeyala baasinza. 
Revelation6:1 Agho naabona Entaama Ento ng'ekakampula akalala ku bumanhiso omusanvu, era naawulira kirala ku bitonde ebiramu ebina (4), nga kyogera mu mamiro agali ng'oti kutyabuka kwa lukuba kiti: Idha!" 
Revelation6:2 Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona embalaasi endheru. Eyali ali kugivuga ng'ali n'akalaso. Yaagheebwa engule aje ng'aghangula, era aghangule." 
Revelation6:3 Entaama Ento bwe yakakampula akamanhiso akokubiri, naawulira ekitonde ekiramu ekyokubiri nga kikoba kiti: “Idha!”" 
Revelation6:4 Yaavaayo embalaasi eyindi, nga myufu. Eyali ali kugivuga, ng'agheereibwa okuleeta entalo ku nsi, abantu baitagane. Era baamugha empiima endeeyiriri." 
Revelation6:5 Entaama Ento bwe yakakampula akamanhiso akokusatu, naawulira ekitonde ekiramu ekyokusatu nga kikoba kiti: “Idha!” Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona embalaasi endhirugavu. Eyali ali kugivuga ng'ali ni minzaani mu ngalo." 
Revelation6:6 Naawulira agaali ng'oti mamiro nga gava ghagati gh'ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4), nga gakoba gati: “Akaibo akatono ak'engaano kanaagula dinari namba, n'obwibo obusatu obwa sayiri bwona bugule dinari namba. Omuzigo n'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu otabyonoona.”" 
Revelation6:7 Entaama Ento bwe yakakampula akamanhiso akokuna, naawulira ekitonde ekiramu ekyokuna nga kikoba kiti: “Idha!”" 
Revelation6:8 Naja okulinga nti, nga mbona embalaasi empaaluufu. Eyali ali kugivuga ng'ayetebwa Kufa, era Magombe ng'ali kumunonereza. Bano baagheebwa obukumu ku kitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu ebina ebiri ku nsi, beeyambise empiima, n'endhala, n'endwaire ya kawumpuli, n'ensolo edh'oku nsi, mu kwita." 
Revelation6:9 Entaama Ento bwe yakakampula akamanhiso akokutaanu, naabona ghansi gh'alutaari emyoyo gy'abo abaitibwa olw'okwikiriza ekibono kya Katonda n'olw'okukidhulira." 
Revelation6:10 Baayasiikana bati: “Wo Musengwa Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, omutukuvu era ow'amazima, olisalira li abantu ab'oku nsi omusango okubasinga, n'obeesasuulizaaku olw'okutwita?”" 
Revelation6:11 Agho kiisi mulala yaagheebwa ekivaalo ekyeru, era baabakoba okuteegaku akaseera katono, okutuusa omughendo gw'abagheereza banaibwe, era baganda baibwe ab'okwitibwa nga beene, lwe gulighera." 
Revelation6:12 Entaama Ento bwe yakakampula akamanhiso akomukaaga, naja okulinga nti nga mbona musisi ow'amaani, n'endhuba ng'eirugala ng'oti kisiriiza, n'omwezi gwonagwona nga gumyuka ng'oti musaayi." 
Revelation6:13 N'emuunienie dhaava ku igulu dhaamagala ku nsi ng'oti n'ebibala ebikaali kwenga eby'omuti omutiini bwe bimagala ghansi, nga kiwunga ow'amaani agutengeesiisa." 
Revelation6:14 Eigulu lyazingibwaku ng'enzingo ey'ekitabo bwezingibwaku, lyavaagho kiisi lusozi na kiisi kizinga byatoolebwa mu bifo byabyo." 
Revelation6:15 Olwo bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi, n'abafuzi, n'abakulu b'abaisirukale, n'abakombe, n'ab'amaani, n'abantu boonaboona, abairu n'ab'eidembe, beegisa mu mpuku ni mu gabaale ag'oku nsozi." 
Revelation6:16 Baakoba ensozi n'agabaale bati: “Mutugweku mutugise, oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga alobe kutubona. Mutuwonie obusungu obw'Entaama Ento," 
Revelation6:17 kuba olunaku olw'obusungu bwayo lutuuse, naani asobola okuwona?”" 
Revelation7:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, naabona bamalaika bana, nga beemereire ku nsonda eina edh'ensi, nga bagemereire empewo eina edh'ensi dhirobe kufuuwa ku nsi, ni ku nhandha, waire ku muti gwonagwona." 
Revelation7:2 Era naabona malaika owundi ng'ali kuniinaniina okuva e buvandhuba, ng'ali n'ekitaaku akamanhiso ka Katonda omulamu. Yaayeta n'amaani bamalaika abana abaali bagheereibwa obukumu okuzikiriza obukalu n'enhandha ku nsi." 
Revelation7:3 Yaabakoba ati: “Mulobe kuzikiriza nsi, na nhandha, waire emiti, okutuusa nga tumaze okuta akamanhiso ku byeni by'abagheereza ba Katonda waife.”" 
Revelation7:4 Agho naawulira omughendo gw'abo abaateebwaku akamanhiso: Baali emitwalo ikumi n'ena n'enkumi ina (144,000), abaava mu buli kika ky'abantu ba Isiraeli." 
Revelation7:5 Ab'omu kika kya Yuda abaateebwaku akamanhiso baali omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Reubeni omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Gadi omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000);" 
Revelation7:6 ab'omu kika kya Asheri omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Nafutali omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Manasse omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000);" 
Revelation7:7 ab'omu kika kya Simeoni omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Levi omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Issakari omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000);" 
Revelation7:8 ab'omu kika kya Zebuluni omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); ab'omu kika kya Yosefu omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000); n'ab'omu kika kya Benjamini boona omutwalo mulala n'enkumi ibiri (12,000)." 
Revelation7:9 Ebyo bwe byawa, naabona eikuukuubira ery'abantu abatabalika nga bava mu maghanga goonagoona, ni mu bika byonabyona, ni mu nse dh'abantu dhoonadhoona, ni mu nnimi dhoonadhoona. Baali nga beemereire gha mberi gh'ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, ni mu maiso ag'Entaama Ento, nga bavaire ebivaalo ebyeru era nga bagemye n'ensansa." 
Revelation7:10 Baayasiikana bati: “Twalokolebwa Katonda waife atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, era n'Entaama Ento!”" 
Revelation7:11 Bamalaika boonaboona baayemerera nga beezungulwire ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga era nga beezungulwire ab'obukumu n'ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4), beeyala gha mberi gh'ekityamo, nga balinze ghansi, baasinza Katonda," 
Revelation7:12 Nga bakoba bati: “Amiina. Okusinzibwa, okutiibwa, amagezi, okweyanzibwa, okusaakibwa, obukumu, n'amaani, bibenga bya Katonda waife ebyanda n'ebyanda! Amiina.”" 
Revelation7:13 Agho owundi ku bakulembeze yambuuza ati: “Abo abavaire ebivaalo ebyeru ni baani, era bava gha?”" 
Revelation7:14 Naamwiramu nti: “Isebo, niiwe oidhi.” Yankoba ati: “Abo n'abaabita mu kudaazibwadaazibwa okunene ni baamula ebivaalo byaibwe n'omusaayi ogw'Entaama Ento, ni bifuuka ebyeru." 
Revelation7:15 Kyebava ni baba gha mberi gh'ekityamo kya Katonda, ni bamugheereza omusana n'obwire mu isinzizo lye. Era oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga anaabanga nabo ng'abakuuma." 
Revelation7:16 “Tibaliirayo kulumwa ndhala oba ndiwo. Endhuba teribookya waire olwota okubagema. 
Revelation7:17 Entaama Ento eri ghagati gh'ekityamo ky'obwakyabazinga, enaabalabiriranga ng'omwayi, yaabakulemberamu, okubatuusa ku nsulo edh'amaadhi ag'obulamu. Era Katonda alyeya buli iziga mu maiso gaibwe.”" 
Revelation8:1 Entaama Ento bwe yakakampula akamanhiso akomusanvu, mu igulu yaabaayo akasiriikiriro okumala nga kitundu kya saawa." 
Revelation8:2 Agho naabona bamalaika omusanvu abeemerera mu maiso ga Katonda, era baagheebwa amagwala musanvu." 
Revelation8:3 Ghaidhagho malaika owundi, yaayemerera gh'alutaari ng'ali n'ekiniokezebwaku obubbaani ekya zaabu, era yaagheebwa obubbaani kamaala abuyimbe n'okusaba kw'abatuukirivu ku alutaari eya zaabu eri gha mberi gh'ekityamo." 
Revelation8:4 Omwosi gw'obubbaani n'okusaba kw'abatuukirivu byaja ghaigulu nga biva mu ngalo dha malaika ali mu maiso ga Katonda. 
Revelation8:5 Malaika oyo yaatoola ekiniokezebwaku obubbaani ekyo, yaakiidhuza omuliro ng'agutoola ku alutaari, yaakisuula ku nsi. Agho ghaabaagho okutyabuka okw'olukuba, okududumuka, okumyansa okw'eigulu, n'ensi okutengeeta." 
Revelation8:6 Agho bamalaika omusanvu abaali n'amagwala omusanvu beetegeka okugafuuwa. 
Revelation8:7 Malaika asooka yaafuuwa eigwala lye, omugozi n'omuliro nga bitabwirwamu n'omusaayi byamagala ku nsi. Ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'ensi kyaya, n'ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'emiti kyaya, era n'eisubi eibisi lyonalyona lyaya." 
Revelation8:8 Agho malaika owokubiri yaafuuwa endeka ye. Ekintu ekiri ng'oti gusozi gukologho oguli kwaka omuliro kyasuulibwa mu nhandha. Ekitundu kirala ku buli bisatu ebyenhandha kyafuuka musaayi. 
Revelation8:9 Ekitonde ekiramu kirala kirala ku buli bitonde bisatu eby'omu nhandha kyafa, n'eryato irala irala ku buli maato asatu lyazikirizibwa." 
Revelation8:10 Malaika owokusatu yaafuuwa eigwala lye. Emuunienie enkologho yaaghanuka ku igulu ng'eyaka ng'oti kisiki, yaagwa ku kitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'emiiga, ni ku nsulo edh'amaadhi." 
Revelation8:11 Eriina ly'emuunienie eyo nga ni “Buka.” Ekitundu eky'amaadhi kirala ku buli bisatu gaafuuka maka, era abantu kamaala baafa olw'okunhwa amaadhi ago, kuba gaali maka." 
Revelation8:12 Malaika owokuna yafuuwa eigwala lye. Ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'endhuba, n'ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'omwezi, n'ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'emuunienie byakubwa; olwo kyaba nti ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'obutangaavu bwabyo kyafuuka nzikiiza. Ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'olunaku, n'ekitundu kirala kirala ku buli bitundu bisatu eby'obwire, byaba nzikiiza." 
Revelation8:13 Agho naabona era naawulira enkookooma, yaaguluka nga yeeruupiise ghaigulu ng'eyasiikana eti: “Mukagwireku! Mukagwireku! Mukagwireku imwe abali ku nsi, amagwala agandi asatu bwe ganaavuga bamalaika abasatu ge baja okufuuwa.”" 
Revelation9:1 Malaika owokutaanu yaafuuwa eigwala lye. Naabona emuunienie eyava ghaigulu n'egwa ku nsi, yaagheebwa ekisumuluzo ekiigula olwina olutakoma." 
Revelation9:2 Emuunienie eyo yaigulagho olwina olwo, omwosi gwava mu lwina olwo ng'oti n'oguva mu luyiira olunene einho, gwaidhula mu mpewo mwonamwona n'endhuba yairugala." 
Revelation9:3 Mu mwosi omwo mwavaamu enzige, dheeyugha ku nsi era dhaagheebwa obukumu ng'oti n'obwa siga ow'oku nsi." 
Revelation9:4 Dhaaloberwa okwonayona eisubi, n'emiti oba ekimera ekindi kyonakyona, okutoolaku abantu abo bonka abaziraku kamanhiso ka Katonda mu byeni byaibwe." 
Revelation9:5 Dhaaloberwa okubaita, aye dhibaleetere bwa bulumi okumala entangama ya myezi etaanu, era nga obulumi obwo buli ng'oti n'omuntu bw'awulira nga siga amulumye." 
Revelation9:6 Era mu nnaku edho abantu balyagala okufa aye baaloba kukubona, balyegomba okufa aye okufa kwabeesamba." 
Revelation9:7 Mu mboneka, enzige dhaali ng'oti n'embalaasi edhitegekeibwa okuja mu lutalo. Ku mitwe gyadho nga kuliku ebyaboneka ng'oti ngule dha zaabu mu maiso nga dhiboneka ng'oti bantu." 
Revelation9:8 Obuviiri bwadho nga buli ng'oti nviiri dha bakazi, amaino nga gali ng'oti ga mpologoma." 
Revelation9:9 Nga dhiri n'ebigalagamba ebiri ng'oti bivaalo bya mu kifuba ebyakolebwa mu kyuma ekigumu einho. Okupapala okw'amaghagha gaadho nga kuli ng'oti n'okupakalania okw'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo ebiri kamaala ebighaluzibwa embalaasi nga dheeyuna mu lutalo. 
Revelation9:10 Dhaali n'emikira egiriku obuluma ng'oti siga, era ng'amaani gaadho ag'okuleetera abantu obulumi okumala emyezi etaanu gali mu mikira gyadho egyo." 
Revelation9:11 Dhaali ni kyabazinga waadho adhifuga nga ni malaika ow'olwina olutakoma. Eriina lye mu Luheburayi, ni Abaddoni, mu Lugureki Apolwoni (eritegeeza “Namuzisa?”)." 
Revelation9:12 Eky'entiisa ekisooka kyaja kityo ate nga ekaaliyo bibiri ebiri kwidha. 
Revelation9:13 Agho malaika owomukaaga yaafuuwa eigwala lye. Naawulira amamiro nga gava mu mayiga ana ag'alutaari eya zaabu eri mu maiso ga Katonda. 
Revelation9:14 Amamiro ago gaakoba malaika owomukaaga eyali n'endeka gati: “Sibula bamalaika abana abaasibibwa ku mwiga omunene Eufurate.” 
Revelation9:15 Agho bamalaika abana baasibululwa nga baategekebwa ira okwita omuntu mulala mulala ku buli bantu basatu ku saawa eyo, ku lunaku olwo, mu mwezi ogwo mu mwaka ogwo." 
Revelation9:16 Abalwani ab'oku mbalaasi baali obukaire ebikumi bibiri (200,000,000), ogwo n'omughendo gwe nawulira." 
Revelation9:17 Era nti bwe nabona embalaasi mu kubonekerwa kwange: abavuzi baadho baali bavaire ebivaalo eby'omu bifuba eby'ekyuma ebyali ebimyufu ng'oti muliro, ebya bbululu ng'oti ibaale lya saffiro, n'ebya kyenvu ng'oti bunhota bwa salufa. Emitwe gy'embalaasi edho gyali ng'oti gya mpologoma, mu kanwa mwadho nga muvaamu omuliro, n'omwosi, n'obunhota bwa salufa" 
Revelation9:18 Ebibamba bino ebisatu: omuliro, n'omwosi, n'obunhota bwa salufa, ebyavanga mu kanwa omw'embalaasi edho, byaita omuntu mulala mulala ku buli basatu." 
Revelation9:19 Amaani ag'embalaasi edho gaadhiringa mu kanwa ni mu mikira. Emikira gyadho nga giri ng'oti misota, nga kuliku n'emitwe gye girumisa." 
Revelation9:20 Abantu abandi boonaboona, abataitibwa bibamba bino, baaloba kwenenia mu ebyo bye baakolanga: Baaloba kuleka okusinza emizimu emibi n'ebisinzibwa ebitali Katonda bye baakola mu zaabu, ni mu feeza, ni mu kyuma eky'ekikomo, ni mu mabaale, ni mu miti, ebitasobola kubona oba kuwulira oba kutambula." 
Revelation9:21 Era baaloba okwenenia olw'obutemo bwaibwe, n'obulogo bwaibwe, n'obudankaanu bwaibwe, n'obwibi bwaibwe." 
Revelation10:1 Agho naabona malaika owundi ow'amaani ng'ava mu igulu. Yali avaire ekireri, era ku mutwe gwe nga kuliku musoke, mu maiso ge ng'ali kwaka ng'oti ndhuba, ate amagulu ge nga gali ng'oti mpango dha muliro." 
Revelation10:2 Yali n'akazingo ak'ekitabo akatono mu ngalo, nga kazingulule. Ekigere kye ekisaadha yaakita ku nhandha, ate ekigooda yaakita ku bukalu." 
Revelation10:3 Yaayeta n'amaani mu mamiro agali ng'oti ga mpologoma eri kuwologoma. Bwe yamala okweta atyo, enkuba omusanvu dhaatyabuka." 
Revelation10:4 Enkuba bwe dhaatyabuka nali nja kughandiika, aye naawulira amamiro agava mu igulu nga gakoba gati: “Ebyo enkuba omusanvu edhityabwike bye dhikobye bigise nga bya kyama era tobighandiika.”" 
Revelation10:5 Agho malaika ye nabona ng'ayemereire ku nhandha ni ku bukalu, yaagololera omukono gwe omusaadha y'eigulu," 
Revelation10:6 yaalayira mu liina lya Katonda omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda, eyatonda eigulu ni byonabyona ebirimu, n'ensi ni byonabyona ebirimu, n'enhandha ni byonabyona ebirimu. Malaika oyo yaakoba ati: “Tighakaali kulwa." 
Revelation10:7 Aye mu nnaku edho malaika owomusanvu mw'alifuuyira eigwala lye, olwo Katonda alituukiriza ekyama kye nga bwe yakobera abagheereza be abalanzi.”" 
Revelation10:8 Agho nairamu okuwulira amamiro ge nali mpuliireku nga gava mu igulu. Gankoba gati: “Ja otoole akazingo akatono ak'ekitabo akazingulwirwa, akali mu ngalo dha malaika ayemereire ku nhandha ni ku bukalu.”" 
Revelation10:9 Naaja ye malaika naamusaba okumpa akazingo akatono ak'ekitabo. Yankoba ati: “Kaako, toola olye. Kaidha kukukaayirira mu nda, aye mu kanwa kaidha kudhuudhuula ng'oti mudheenene gwa ndhuki.”" 
Revelation10:10 Agho naatoola akazingo akatono mu ngalo dha malaika naakalya, mu kanwa kaadhuudhuula ng'oti mudheenene gwa ndhuki. Aye bwe namala okukalya kankaayirira mu nda." 
Revelation10:11 Agho Katonda yankoba ati: “Oli n'okwiramu okulanga ebyo ebirituuka ku bantu abangi, ni ku maghanga, ni ku nnimi, ni ku bakyabazinga.”" 
Revelation11:1 Agho naagheebwa olupimo nga luli ng'oti mwigo, ghaabaagho ankoba ati: “Situka opime eisinzizo lya Katonda ni alutaari, obale n'abalisinzizaamu." 
Revelation11:2 Aye oluya lw'eisinzizo luleke, otalupima, kuba lwagheebwa abamaghanga agandi abaidha okumala emyezi amakumi ana n'ebiri (42) nga baniinirira ekibuga ekitukuvu." 
Revelation11:3 Ndituma abadhulirwa bange babiri nga beesibye ebikaakaati olw'okunakughala, naabagha obukumu bamale enaku lukumi na bibiri na nkaaga (1,260) nga bakobera abantu ebibono bya Katonda.”" 
Revelation11:4 Abadhulirwa abo, n'emiti emyoliva ebiri, n'ebikondo by'entaala ebibiri ebiri mu maiso ga Musengwa ow'ensi." 
Revelation11:5 Bwe ghabaagho ayenda okubakolaku akabi, omuliro gubava mu kanwa gwasiriiza abazigu baibwe. Kiisi ayenda kubakola kabi, atyo bw'alifa." 
Revelation11:6 Abo bali n'obukumu okukingula amaadhi gaaloba kugwa mu kiseera kye bamala nga bakobera abantu ebibono bya Katonda. Era bali n'obukumu obw'okufuula amaadhi omusaayi, n'okuleeta ku nsi ebibamba ebya buli nsambo, buli ghe baba nga bendeire." 
Revelation11:7 Bwe balimala okugha obudhulirwa bwaibwe, ekisolo ekiva mu lwina olutakoma kiribatanulaku olutalo, kyabaghangula, era kyabaita." 
Revelation11:8 Emirambo gyaibwe girisigala mu ngira dh'ekibuga ekinene, Musengwa waibwe mwe yakomererwa ku musalaba. Eriina ery'ekibuga ekyo ery'okugereesa ni Sodoma oba Misiri." 
Revelation11:9 Abantu aba kiisi kika, kiisi ighanga, kiisi lulimi na kiisi luse, baliringirira emirambo gyaibwe okumala enaku isatu n'ekimega, baaloba kugiganha kuziikibwa mu magombe." 
Revelation11:10 Abantu ab'oku nsi balisagamba baasangaala era baagheerezagania ebirabo olw'okufa kw'abalanzi abo bombi; kuba abo baaleetera abantu ab'oku nsi okudaagadaaga einho. 
Revelation11:11 Aye enaku eisatu n'ekitundu bwe dhaabitagho, Katonda yaabafuuwamu omuuka ogw'obulamu, baayemerera. Abaababona baatya inho." 
Revelation11:12 Abalanzi abo ababiri baawulira amamiro agava mu igulu nga gabakoba gati: “Mwidhe eno ghaigulu.” Baajiira mu kireri, baaniina mu igulu ng'abazigu baibwe babona." 
Revelation11:13 Mu kaseera ako keene, ghaabaagho musisi ow'amaani. Ekitundu kirala ku bitundu eikumi eby'ekibuga kyazikirira, n'abantu kasanvu (7,000) baafiira mu musisi oyo. Abantu abaawonagho baatya inho, era baasaaka ekitiisa kya Katonda ow'eigulu." 
Revelation11:14 Eky'entiisa ekyokubiri kibise, aye ekyokusatu kiri kwidha mangu." 
Revelation11:15 Agho malaika owomusanvu yaafuuwa eigwala lye. Ghaabaagho amamiro mu igulu nga gakoba gati: “Obwakyabazinga obw'ensi bufuuse bwa Musengwa waife era bwa Kurisito: aidha kufuganga ebyanda n'ebyanda.” 
Revelation11:16 Agho abakulembeze amakumi abiri n'abana (24) abatyama mu maiso ga Katonda ku makonero gaibwe ag'obwakyabazinga, beeyala ghansi baasinza Katonda." 
Revelation11:17 Baakoba bati: “Tukweyanza Musengwa Katonda, Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, aligho era eyaligho. Kuba okozeisa obukumu bwo waatoolera okufuga." 
Revelation11:18 Abantu abataikiriza baidhula inho, aye obusungu obubwo bwaidha, ekiseera kyatuuka eky'okusalira abafu omusango, n'eky'okugheeramu empeera abagheereza bo abalanzi, n'abatuukirivu, n'abantu bo boonaboona abakutya, abakulu n'abato; era ekiseera eky'okuzikiririzaamu abo abazikiriza ensi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Eisinzizo lya Katonda ery'omu igulu lyaigulwagho n'Esanduuku ey'Endagaano ye, yaaboneka mu isinzizo omwo. Agho ghaabaagho okumyansa okw'eigulu, n'okududumuka, n'okutyabuka okw'olukuba, n'ensi okutengeeta, n'omugozi omungi." 
Revelation12:1 Agho ekirikoliko kyaboneka ku igulu: ghaabaagho omukazi ng'avaire endhuba, ate ng'omwezi guli ghansi gh'ebigere bye, ku mutwe gwe nga kuliku engule ya muunienie ikumi na ibiri." 
Revelation12:2 Yali ali nda era ng'ali kulumwa, yaakuba enduulu olw'obulumi obw'okuzaala." 
Revelation12:3 Era ku igulu kwabonekaku ekirikoliko ekindi: ogusota ogunene ogumyufu nga guli n'emitwe musanvu n'amayiga ikumi, nga ku buli mutwe kuliku engule." 
Revelation12:4 Omukira gwagwo gwagheebya emuunienie ndala ndala ku buli muunienie isatu edh'oku igulu, gwadhisuula ku nsi. Ogusota ogwo gwayemerera mu maiso ag'omukazi eyali ali okumpi okuzaala, gumire omwana we nga yaakamala okumuzaala." 
Revelation12:5 Omukazi yaazaala omwana mulenzi, ow'okufuga amaghanga goonagoona n'omwigo ogw'ekyuma. Aye omwana we yaatwalibwa eri Katonda, n'eri ekityamo kye eky'obwakyabazinga." 
Revelation12:6 Omukazi yaalumukira mu irungu mu kifo Katonda kye yali amaze okumutegekera, bamulabirire eyo okumala entangama ya nnaku lukumi na bibiri na nkaaga (1,260)." 
Revelation12:7 Agho obulwa bwatanukagho mu igulu. Mikaeli ni bamalaika be, baalwanisa ogusota. Ogusota gwona gwabalwanisa ni bamalaika baagwo." 
Revelation12:8 Aye ogusota gwaghangulwa, era olwo gwene ni bamalaika baagwo baabingibwa mu igulu." 
Revelation12:9 Ogusota ogukologho ogwo, n'ogwo omusota ogw'eira ogwetebwa Omukemi era Sitaani omuguya ow'ensi yoonayoona. Ogusota ogwo gwasuulibwa ku nsi ni bamalaika baagwo." 
Revelation12:10 Agho naawulira mu igulu amamiro ag'amaani nga gakoba gati: “Mperaano obulokozi bwa Katonda butuuse! Katonda alaze amaani ag'Obwakyabazinga bwe, n'obuyinza bwa Kurisito we. Kuba oyo alumiriza baganda baife omusana n'obwire mu maiso ga Katonda, abingiibwa mu igulu." 
Revelation12:11 Abo baamughangula n'omusaayi ogw'Entaama Ento n'olwamazima ge badhulira, obulamu bwaibwe baaloba kubufaaku waire okutya okufa." 
Revelation12:12 Kale ni musagambe, imwe mwenamwena abali mu igulu. Aye mukagwireku imwe ensi n'enhandha! Kuba Sitaani aise ye muli n'obusungu obutakobekaku, ng'aidhi ati ali n'akaseera katono.”" 
Revelation12:13 Ogusota bwe gwabona nga gusuuliibwa ku nsi, gwayiiga omukazi eyazaala omwana ole omulenzi." 
Revelation12:14 Aye omukazi yaagheebwa amaghagha abiri ag'enkookooma emba, aguluke aje mu irungu mu kifo ye baali baja okumulabirira okumala entangama ey'emyaka esatu n'ekitundu, ng'ogusota tigumutuukaku." 
Revelation12:15 Ogusota gwafuudha amaadhi, nga gali ng'oti mwiga ganonereze omukazi, gamutwale." 
Revelation12:16 Aye eitaka lyabeera omukazi lyayasama lyamira omwiga ogusota gwe gwali gufuudhie okuva mu kanwa mwagwo. 
Revelation12:17 Ogusota gwasungughalira inho omukazi, gwaja okulumba abasigairegho mu izaire lye abo abagema ebiragiro bya Katonda era abadhulira Yesu." 
Revelation12:18 Agho ogusota gwayemerera ku mbali kw'enhandha. 
Revelation13:1 Agho naabona ekisolo ekikukunuka mu nhandha. Kyali n'emitwe musanvu n'amayiga ikumi; ku buli iyiga nga kuliku engule ate ku buli mutwe nga kuliku eriina erivuma Katonda. 
Revelation13:2 Ekisolo ekyo kye nabona kyali kiboneka ng'oti mpala. Ebigere byakyo nga biri ng'oti n'eby'ekisolo ekikambwe, ate omunwa gwakyo nga guli ng'oti gwa mpologoma. Ogusota gwagha ekisolo ekyo amaani gaagwo, n'ekityamo kyagwo ky'obwakyabazinga, n'obuyinza bungi." 
Revelation13:3 Ku mutwe ogundi ku gy'ekisolo kwali kuboneka ng'oti kuliku eibwa nga lyakukiita. Aye eibwa eryo lyawona. Ensi yoonayoona yeewuunhia era yaanonereza ekisolo ekyo. 
Revelation13:4 Abantu baasinza ogusota kuba gwagha ekisolo obuyinza bwagwo, baasinza n'ekisolo nga bakoba bati: “Naani ali ng'oti n'ekisolo kino, era naani asobola okulwana nakyo?”" 
Revelation13:5 Ekisolo kyagheebwa omunwa, kyesaakasaaka era kyavuma Katonda era kyaikirizibwa okuba n'obuyinza okumala emyezi amakumi ana n'ebiri (42)." 
Revelation13:6 Kyainhama okuvuma Katonda, n'okuvuma eriina lye, n'ekifo mw'aba, n'abo boonaboona ababa mu igulu." 
Revelation13:7 Era kyaikirizibwa okutanula olutalo ku batuukirivu era n'okubaghangula, era kyagheebwa obuyinza ku bika byonabyona, ni ku nse dhoonadhoona, ni ku nnimi dhoonadhoona ni ku maghanga goonagoona." 
Revelation13:8 Abantu ab'oku nsi abo abataaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya bulamu ng'ensi ekaali kutondebwa, balisinza ekisolo ekyo. Ekitabo ekyo kya Ntaama Nto ere eyaitibwa." 
Revelation13:9 Ali n'amatu awulire. 
Revelation13:10 Kiisi muntu eyategekerwa okunhagibwa, alitwalibwa mu bunhage. Era kiisi muntu eyategekerwa okwitibwa empiima, alifa mpiima. Agho ni abatuukirivu bateekwa okuba n'okwikiriza era n'okuguminkiriza." 
Revelation13:11 Agho naabona ekisolo ekindi nga kikukunuka mu itaka. Kyali n'amayiga abiri ng'oti ga ntaama nto era nga kyogera ng'oti gusota. 
Revelation13:12 Kyakozesa obuyinza bwonabwona obw'ekisolo ekyasooka, nga n'ekisolo ekyasooka kyene kyona kirigho kiri kubona. Kyakaka ensi yoonayoona n'ebigirimu okusinza ekisolo ekyasooka, ekyawona eibwa eryali ery'okukiita." 
Revelation13:13 Ekisolo kino ekyokubiri kyakola ebyewuunhio kyatoola omuliro gwene mu igulu kyagumagaza ku nsi ng'abantu boonaboona babona. 
Revelation13:14 Kyaguya abantu ab'oku nsi n'ebyewuunhio bye kyaikirizibwa okukola mu maiso ag'ekisolo ekyasooka. Kyabalagira okukola ekifaananie eky'ekisolo ekyo ekyateebwaku eibwa n'empiima aye ni kimala kirama. 
Revelation13:15 Kyaikirizibwa okuta obulamu mu kifaananie ekyo, ekifaananie ekyo kisobole n'okwogera, era kiite boonaboona abaloba okukisinza." 
Revelation13:16 Ekisolo kyakaka abantu boonaboona, abato n'abakulu, abakombe n'abaavu, ab'eidembe n'abairu, okuteebwaku akamanhiso ku mukono omusaadha oba mu kyeni." 
Revelation13:17 Kiisi muntu yaaloberwa okugula oba okutunda, okutoolaku ng'amaze okuteebwaku akamanhiso ako, ako nga n'eriina ery'ekisolo oba omughendo." 
Revelation13:18 Kino kyetaagisa magezi: ow'amagezi yeekalirise amakulu ag'omughendo ogw'ekisolo ekyo, kuba gutegeeza liina lya muntu. Omughendo gw'ekisolo ekyo, guli lukaaga na nkaaga na mukaaga (666)." 
Revelation14:1 Ebyo bwe byawa naabona Entaama Ento ng'eyemereire ku lusozi Sioni, ng'eri n'abantu emitwalo ikumi n'ena n'enkumi ina (144,000) era ng'eriina lyayo n'erya Lata waayo gaghandiikiibwa mu byeni by'abantu abo." 
Revelation14:2 Ate naawulira amamiro agava mu igulu nga gali ng'oti mpiriito ya maadhi, era nga gali ng'oti kutyabuka kwa lukuba. Amamiro ago ge nawulira gaali ng'oti bakubi ba ntongooli nga bali kukuba entongooli dhaibwe." 
Revelation14:3 Baayemba olwembo mu maiso ag'ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, n'ag'ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4), n'ag'abakulembeze. Olwembo olwo nga luyaaka era nga ghazira wundi asobola kulwega, okutoolaku abo bonka emitwalo eikumi n'ena n'enkumi eina (144,000), abaali bamaze okununulwa mu nsi." 
Revelation14:4 N'abo abatukuvu abateeyonoona na bakazi, baasigala nga beegha. N'abo abanonereza Entaama Ento buli y'eja era abaanunulwa mu bantu, baaba ng'oti bibala ebisooka okukungulwa ebigheebwayo eri Katonda n'eri Entaama Ento." 
Revelation14:5 Tiboogerangaku bya kusubagha era baziraku kibi kyonakyona. 
Revelation14:6 Agho naabona malaika owundi ng'ali kuguluka, nga yeeruupye eyo mu igulu. Yali agheereibwa amawulire amalungi ag'ebyanda n'ebyanda agakobere abo abali ku nsi aba kiisi kika, aba kiisi lulimi, aba kiisi luse n'aba kiisi ighanga." 
Revelation14:7 Yaayogera n'amamiro ag'amaani ati: “Mutyenga Katonda mumusaake, kuba ekiseera kye eky'okusaliramu omusango kituuse. Mumusinze oyo eyatonda eigulu n'ensi, n'enhandha, n'ensulo.”" 
Revelation14:8 “Ni malaika owundi owokubiri yairaku ng'akoba ati: Agwire, agwire Babiloni omukologho, eyanhwesa amaghanga goonagoona omwenge ogw'obutwa ogw'obwenzi bwe!”" 
Revelation14:9 Malaika owundi owokusatu yairirira bale ababiri ng'ayogera n'amamiro ag'amaani ati: “Kiisi muntu asinza ekisolo n'ekifaananie kyakyo, n'aganha okuteebwaku akamanhiso kaakyo mu kyeni oba ku mukono," 
Revelation14:10 yeena alinhwa omwenge ogw'emizabbibu ogw'obusungu bwa Katonda, nga gufukiibwa mu kikopo eky'obusungu bwe era nga tigudhuuluusiibwamu naire. Era alidaazibwadaazibwa n'omuliro n'obunhota bwa salufa, mu maiso ga bamalaika abatukuvu n'ag'Entaama Ento." 
Revelation14:11 Omwosi ogw'okudaazibwadaazibwa kwaibwe gwa kunioka ebyanda n'ebyanda. Era abasinza ekisolo n'ekifaananie kyakyo, na kiisi yeenayeena eyateebwaku akamanhiso k'eriina lyakyo, tibaligheeraku omusana n'obwire.”" 
Revelation14:12 Agho ni abo abatuukirivu abagema ebiragiro bya Katonda, ni basigala nga baikiriza Yesu, bateekwa okuguminkiriza." 
Revelation14:13 Naawulira amamiro agava mu igulu nga gakoba gati: Ghandiika oti: “Okuva ni buti ba nkabi abafu abafiira mu Musengwa! Mwoyo akoba ati: Bwenebwene ba nkabi! Okuva ni buti bawuumwire mu kutakabana kwaibwe, kuba ebikolwa byaibwe bibanonereza.”" 
Revelation14:14 Agho naabona ekire ekyeru, era nga ku kire okwo kutyaimeku afaanana ng'oti mwana wa muntu. Ng'ali n'engule ya zaabu ku mutwe, n'omuwolo omwogi mu ngalo." 
Revelation14:15 Agho malaika owundi yaava mu isinzizo yaalangiriza n'amamiro ag'amaani y'ole atyaime ku kire ati: “Kozesa omuwolo gwo owoobye, ekiseera eky'okukungula kituuse kuba ebikungulwa eby'ensi bituuse.”" 
Revelation14:16 Agho ole atyaime ku kire yaawuuba omuwolo gwe ku nsi, eby'oku nsi byakungulwa." 
Revelation14:17 Malaika owundi yaava mu isinzizo ery'omu igulu, yeena ng'ali n'omuwolo omwogi." 
Revelation14:18 Agho malaika owundi ali n'obukumu ku muliro yaava ku alutaari. Yaayeta n'amaani ng'akoba ole ali n'omuwolo omwogi ati: “Kozesa omuwolo gwo okungule ebifaaganda eby'emizabbibu egy'oku nsi, kuba emizabbibu gyaku gyenze.”" 
Revelation14:19 Agho malaika yaawuuba omuwolo gwe ku nsi, yaakungula emizabbibu gyayo, yaagisuula mu ikunhiro eikologho ery'omwenge gw'emizabbibu ery'obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Revelation14:20 Emizabbibu gyakunhirwa mu ikunhiro kuliya kw'ekibuga, mwavaamu omusaayi gwakuuluula ng'amagulu ag'embalaasi eyemereire gabuliramu, gwakuuluula kilo mita ng'ebikumi bisatu (300)." 
Revelation15:1 Kabiri naabona ekirikoliko ekindi mu igulu, nga kikologho era nga kyewuunhisa. Ghaaligho bamalaika musanvu nga bali n'ebibamba musanvu nga n'ebisembayo, kuba ng'ebyo n'ebimaliriza obusungu bwa Katonda." 
Revelation15:2 Era naabona enhandha eri ng'oti kirawuli ng'etabwirwa ghalala n'omuliro. Ku mbali kw'enhandha eyo nga kwemereireku abo abaaghangula ekisolo n'ekifaananie kyakyo n'omughendo ogw'eriina lyakyo. Baali bagemye entongooli Katonda dhe yabagha. 
Revelation15:3 Baayemba olwembo lwa Musa omugheereza wa Katonda, n'olwembo olw'Entaama Ento, nga bakoba bati: “Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, by'okola bikologho era byewuunhisa! Kyabazinga ow'amaghanga goonagoona, by'okola bituufu era bya mazima." 
Revelation15:4 Musengwa, naani atalitya liina lyo oba okulisaaka? Iwe wenka n'iwe omutukuvu. Abantu ab'amaghanga goonagoona baliidha baasinza mu maiso go, kuba ebikolwa byo eby'obutuufu bibonebwa abantu boonaboona.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ebyo bwe byawa, naabona eisinzizo ery'omu igulu nga liigule, era nga lirimu entindi erimu endagaano." 
Revelation15:6 Bamalaika omusanvu abaali n'ebibamba omusanvu baafuluma mu isinzizo eryo. Baali bavaire ebivaalo ebyamule ebimirimiinha, nga beesibye mu bifuba ensibiro dha zaabu." 
Revelation15:7 Agho ekindi ku bitonde ebiramu ebina (4) kyagha bamalaika omusanvu ebibya musanvu ebya zaabu, ebiidhwire obusungu bwa Katonda omulamu ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Revelation15:8 Eisinzizo lyaidhula omwosi oguva ku kitiisa kye, ni ku bukumu bwe nga ghazira asobola kwingira mu isinzizo okutuusa ebibamba omusanvu ebya bamalaika omusanvu nga biwoire." 
Revelation16:1 Agho naawulira amamiro ag'amaani nga gava mu isinzizo, gaakoba bamalaika omusanvu gati: “Muje muyughe ku nsi ebibya omusanvu eby'obusungu bwa Katonda.”" 
Revelation16:2 Malaika asooka yaaja, yaayugha ekibya kye ku nsi. Amabwa amanene era amabi einho gaagema abantu abaaliku akamanhiso k'ekisolo n'abo abaasinza ekifaananie kyakyo." 
Revelation16:3 Malaika owokubiri yaayugha ekibya mu nhandha. Enhandha yaafuuka ng'oti n'omusaayi ogw'omuntu omufu era kiisi kiramu kyonakyona ekyali mu nhandha kyafa. 
Revelation16:4 Malaika owokusatu yaayugha ekibya kye mu miiga ni mu nsulo edh'amaadhi. Emiiga n'ensulo ebyo byafuuka musaayi. 
Revelation16:5 Naawulira malaika ali n'obukumu ku maadhi ng'akoba ati: “Iwe omutukuvu aligho era eyaligho, bw'osala omusango tosaliriza." 
Revelation16:6 Olw'okuba abantu baayugha omusaayi okw'abatuukirivu bo n'ogw'abalanzi, weena ky'oviire obagha omusaayi okunhwa. Ekyo kye bagwaine!”" 
Revelation16:7 Era naawulira amamiro nga gava ku alutaari, nga gakoba gati: “N'agh'agho Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, bw'osala omusango tosaliriza era oba mutuufu.”" 
Revelation16:8 Malaika owokuna yaayugha ekibya kye ku ndhuba, era endhuba eyo yaikirizibwa okwokya abantu n'omuliro gwayo ogw'amaani." 
Revelation16:9 Abantu baayokebwa n'omuliro ogw'amaani einho, baavuma eriina lya Katonda ali n'obuyinza ku bibamba ebyo, era baaloba kwenenia na kumusaaka." 
Revelation16:10 Malaika owokutaanu yaayugha ekibya kye ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga eky'ekisolo. Obwakyabazinga bwakyo bwagema enzikiiza, abantu beerumaluma enimi olw'obulumi," 
Revelation16:11 baavuma Katonda ow'eigulu olw'okubaleetera obulumi n'amabwa era baaloba kwenenia ebyo bye baakolanga. 
Revelation16:12 Malaika owomukaaga yaayugha ekibya kye mu mwiga omunene Eufurate gwakala, okulekera bakyabazinga abava e buvandhuba engira." 
Revelation16:13 Naabona emizimu emibi esatu egyaboneka ng'oti bikere, nga giva mu kanwa omw'ogusota, ni mu kanwa omw'ekisolo, ni mu kanwa omw'omulanzi omuguya." 
Revelation16:14 N'egyo emizimu emibi egikola ebyewuunhio egija eyo ye bakyabazinga ab'ensi yoonayoona okubasoloza, batanule olutalo ku lunaku olukologho olwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Revelation16:15 “Bona, ndidha kwidha ng'omwibi! Wa nkabi oyo asigala ng'ali kumoga, n'akuuma ebivaalo bye, alobe kutambula madu, na kuswala mu bantu.”" 
Revelation16:16 Emizimu emibi egyo gyasololeza bakyabazinga mu kifo ekyetebwa Arimageddo mu Luheburayi. 
Revelation16:17 Malaika owomusanvu yaayugha ekibya kye mu ibbanga. Amamiro ag'amaani gaava ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga mu isinzizo, nga gakoba gati: “Biwoire!”" 
Revelation16:18 Agho ghaabaagho okumyansa okw'eigulu, n'okududumuka, n'okutyabuka okw'olukuba, n'ensi okutengeeta. Bino byali tibibangaghooku kasookanga abantu batondebwa ku nsi." 
Revelation16:19 Ekibuga ekikologho kyayabikamu ebitundu bisatu, n'ebibuga eby'ensi dhoonadhoona byagwa. Katonda yaaloba kwerabira Babiloni ekibuga ekikologho, yaakigha okunhwa okumaliramu irala ekikopo eky'omwenge ogw'emizabbibu, omwenge ogw'obusungu bwe obungi." 
Revelation16:20 Ebizinga byonabyona byasaanagho, n'ensozi dhaawaagho." 
Revelation16:21 Amabaale ag'omugozi amakologho, nga buli ibaale lizitogha kilo ng'oti makumi ataanu (50), gaava mu igulu gaamagala ku bantu. Abantu baavuma Katonda olw'ekibamba eky'omugozi, kuba kyali kibamba kya ntiisa inho." 
Revelation17:1 Agho owundi ku bamalaika omusanvu abaali n'ebibya omusanvu, yaidha yankoba ati: “Idha nkulage omusango bwe gusalirwa malaaya omukulu atyaime okumpi n'amaadhi amangi." 
Revelation17:2 Bakyabazinga ab'ensi baayenda naye, n'abantu abali ku nsi baatamiira omwenge ogw'obwenzi bwe.”" 
Revelation17:3 Agho mu Mwoyo, malaika yantwala mu irungu, naabona omukazi ng'atyaime ku kisolo ekya kasaayisaayi. Kyali kiidhwire amaina agavuma Katonda, era nga kiri n'emitwe musanvu, n'amayiga ikumi." 
Revelation17:4 Omukazi oyo yali avaire ebivaalo eby'ebitiibwa ebya nakasooma n'ebimyufu, ng'ali kutoonha zaabu, n'ebinhere, n'ebikomo eby'amabaale ag'omughendo einho. Yali agemye ekikopo kya zaabu nga kiidhwire ebyenhinhalwa n'eikoodera eby'obwenzi bwe." 
Revelation17:5 Mu kyeni kye mwali mughandiikiibwamu eriina ery'amakulu amagise liti: “Babiloni omukologho, azaala bamalaaya n'ebyenhinhalwa eby'oku nsi.”" 
Revelation17:6 Naabona ng'omukazi atamiire omusaayi gw'abatuukirivu, n'ogw'abo abaitibwa olw'okudhulira Yesu. Bwe namubona, neewuunhia inho!" 
Revelation17:7 Aye malaika yankoba ati: “Weewuunhia ki? Ka nkukobere amakulu amagise ag'omukazi oyo, n'ag'ekisolo ky'ali kuvuga, ekiri n'emitwe omusanvu n'amayiga eikumi." 
Revelation17:8 Ekisolo ky'oboine kyaligho, aye mperaano tikikaaligho. Aye kiidha kuniinaniina okuva mu lwina olutakoma, kije kizikirizibwe. Abantu abali ku nsi, beene maina agataaghandiikibwa mu kitabo eky'obulamu, okuva ensi lwe yatondebwa, balyewuunhia bwe balibona ng'ekisolo ekyaligho, mperaano tikikaaligho, ate nga kiriidha." 
Revelation17:9 “Kino kyetaagisa amagezi n'okutegeera. Emitwe omusanvu, n'ensozi omusanvu omukazi dh'atyaimeku" 
Revelation17:10 era ni bakyabazinga omusanvu. Abataanu ku abo baagwa, mulala akaaligho, owundi akaali kwidha. Era bw'aliidha, ateekwa kumalagho bwa kaseera buseera." 
Revelation17:11 Ate ekisolo ekyaligho aye mperaano ekitakaaligho, kitegeeza kyabazinga owomunaana, owundi ku bale omusanvu era aja okuzikirizibwa." 
Revelation17:12 Ate amayiga eikumi g'oboine, gategeeza bakyabazinga eikumi abakaali kufuna bwakyabazinga. Aye abo ghalala n'ekisolo balifuna obwakyabazinga baafugiraku esaawa ndala." 
Revelation17:13 Bano baisa kirala, era baagha ekisolo obukumu bwaibwe n'okufuga kwaibwe." 
Revelation17:14 Balirwanisa Entaama Ento aye eribaghangula ng'eri ghalala n'abo abaginonereza be yayeta, be yalondamu era abeesigwa; kuba Entaama Ento eyo ni Musengwa w'abasengwa era ni Kyabazinga wa bakyabazinga.”" 
Revelation17:15 Malaika era yankoba ati: “Amaadhi g'oboine malaaya g'atyaimeku, n'abo enkunkumuli edh'abantu, aba kiisi kika, kiisi lulimi, na kiisi ighanga." 
Revelation17:16 Ate amayiga g'oboine, balyeyimba n'ekisolo baafuuka bazigu ba malaaya. Baja kumweya bamuleke kidu, bamulye emamba era bamwokere irala omuliro" 
Revelation17:17 kuba Katonda yabaleetera mu myoyo gyaibwe, okukola kye yategeka nga baisa kirala, baagha ekisolo obukumu bwaibwe n'okufuga kwaibwe, okutuusa ebibono bya Katonda lwe birituukirira." 
Revelation17:18 Ate omukazi y'oboine, n'ekibuga ekikologho ekifuga bakyabazinga ab'ensi.”" 
Revelation18:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, naabona malaika owundi ng'aika ng'ava mu igulu, ng'ali n'obuyinza obutaloodheka. Ekitiisa kye kyamulisa ensi yoonayoona." 
Revelation18:2 Yaayogera n'eiroboozi ery'amaani ati: “Agwire, agwire Babiloni omukologho! Afuuse kifo omwesololeza emizimu emibi egya buli nsambo, na kiisi nhonhi mbi etali nongoofu." 
Revelation18:3 Kuba amaghanga goonagoona gaatamiira omwenge ogw'obwenzi bwe. Bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi baayenda naye, n'abasuubuzi ab'oku nsi bakombaghalira ku kwedhalabya kwe okungi.”" 
Revelation18:4 Era naawulira amamiro agandi agava mu igulu nga gakoba gati: “Bantu bange, mumuveemu, mulobe kweyimba mu bibi bye, na kugabana ku bibamba bye;" 
Revelation18:5 kuba emungo ey'ebibi bye etuukira irala ku igulu, ni Katonda aidhi ebyonoono bye." 
Revelation18:6 Mumukole nga mwene bwe yabakola, ate ku bikolwa bye mumwesasuuzeemu emikuzi ebiri. Ekikopo kye yabatabulira imwe, mukimutabuliremu obuka bwa mikuzi ebiri." 
Revelation18:7 Ye yakomya okwesaaka n'okwedhalabya, mwena ye mube mukomye okumudaaza n'okumuliza enaku; kuba yeesuuta mu mwoyo ati: ‘Ninze kyabazinga omukazi, tiri namwandu, era tirimanha bughafu naire.’" 
Revelation18:8 Ebibamba bye kye biriva bimwidhira ku lunaku olulala, endwaire ya kawumpuli, obughafu, n'endhala. Era alyokebwa omuliro, kuba Musengwa Katonda ali kumusalira omusango okumusinga wa maani.”" 
Revelation18:9 Bakyabazinga ab'ensi abaayendanga naye era ni beedhalabyanga bwe balibona omwosi ng'ali kuya, balimulirira era baagegenga." 
Revelation18:10 Balyemerera ghalaku olw'okutya okudaagadaaga kwe, baakoba bati: “Okagwireku, okagwireku iwe Babiloni ekibuga ekikologho! Iwe ekibuga eky'amaani! Ozikiriziibwa mu saawa busaawa eti!”" 
Revelation18:11 Abasuubuzi b'ebintu ab'oku nsi balirira era baagegenga kuba ghaliba nga ghazira agula bintu byaibwe. 
Revelation18:12 Nga ghazira agula zaabu, feeza, binhere, bikomo bya mabaale ga mughendo, ngoye mpegheevu edh'ebitiibwa edha nakasooma n'edha liiri n'edha kasaayisaayi, waire okubaagho agula ekintu eky'omuti ogwa kawoowo, oba eky'eisanka, oba eky'omuti ogw'omughendo, oba eky'ekyuma eky'ekikomo, oba eky'ekyuma ekigumu einho, oba eky'amabaale ag'omughendo agamirimiinha." 
Revelation18:13 Era nga ghazira agula buwoowo, na birungo, na bubbaani, na muzigo ogwa kawoowo ogwetebwa mirra. Era nga ghazira agula mwenge gwa mizabbibu, na muzigo gwa bibala bya miti myoliva, na buwunga buseereibwa bukalamu, na ngaano, waire okugula ente n'entaama, embalaasi n'ebigaali eby'omu lutalo, oba okugula abairu n'obulamu bw'abantu." 
Revelation18:14 Balimukoba bati: “Ebirungi byonabyona bye weegombanga okufuna bizikiriire. Eby'obukombe byonabyona n'eby'ekitiisa bikuwoireku, era tokairayo kubibonaku kabiri!”" 
Revelation18:15 Abasuubuzi b'ebintu ebyo be yakombaghaza, balyemerera ghala olw'okutya okudaagadaaga kwe, baalira era baagegenga," 
Revelation18:16 nga bakoba bati: “Okagwireku! Okagwireku iwe ekibuga ekikologho, eyavaalanga ebivaalo ebighegheevu eby'ebitiibwa ebya nakasooma n'ebya kasaayisaayi; ng'otoonha zaabu n'ebinhere, n'ebikomo eby'amabaale ag'omughendo." 
Revelation18:17 Mu saawa busaawa eti ofiiriirwa eby'obukombe ebyo byonabyona!” N'abakulu ab'amaato, n'abakozi ab'oku maato, n'abantu be bawungula, n'abo boonaboona abakola ku nhandha, balyemerera ghala." 
Revelation18:18 Bwe balibona omwosi ng'ali kuya baliwowoigana bati: “Ghaali ghabaireghooku ekibuga ekikologho ng'oti ni kino.” 
Revelation18:19 Era balyeyugha enkungu mu mitwe, baalira era baagegenga nga bakoba bati: “Okagwireku! Okagwireku, iwe ekibuga ekikologho, ekyakombaghaliramu abo boonaboona abaali n'amaato ku nhandha! Mu saawa busaawa eti kizikiriire!" 
Revelation18:20 Imwe mwenamwena abali mu igulu musagambe, kuba azikiriziibwa! N'imwe abatuukirivu, n'abatume, n'abalanzi musagambe! Kuba Katonda amusaliire omusango gwamusinga olw'ebyo bye yabakola.”" 
Revelation18:21 Agho naabona malaika ow'amaani, yaaginga eibaale eriri ng'oti lubengo lukologho, yalisuula mu nhandha ng'akoba ati: “Babiloni ekibuga ekikologho kityo bwe kirisuulibwa ghansi n'amaani amangi, ni kitairayo kuboneka kabiri." 
Revelation18:22 Enhembo edh'abakubi b'entongooli, n'edh'abembi, n'edh'abafuuyi b'endere, n'ab'endeka, tidhiriirayo kuwulirwa mu iwe. Mu iwe timulyagaanibwamu kabiri mukozi mukugu wa mulimo gwonagwona, waire okusa kw'olubengo okwirayo okuwulikika." 
Revelation18:23 Okumulika okw'entaala tikuliirayo kabiri kuboneka mu iwe, waire amamiro ag'oyo abayiiza omugole oba ag'omugole mwene, okwirayo okuwulirwa mu iwe. Abaasuubuliranga mu iwe abaali abakologho ku nsi wabaguya, n'amaghanga goonagoona wagaguyanga n'obulogo bwo.”" 
Revelation18:24 Mu oyo n'omwayagaanibwa omusaayi ogw'abalanzi, n'ogw'abatuukirivu, n'ogwa abantu boonaboona abaitibwa ku nsi." 
Revelation19:1 Ebyo bwe byawa, naawulira mu igulu ekyawulikika ng'oti mamiro ga maani ag'abantu olukunkumuli, nga bakoba bati: “Musaake Katonda waife! Kuba obulokozi n'ekitiisa n'obukumu bibye!" 
Revelation19:2 Bw'asala omusango tasaliriza, aba mutuufu; kuba asaze omusango gwasinga malaaya omukulu eyayonoona ensi n'obwenzi bwe. Malaaya abonerezeibwa olw'okwita abagheereza ba Katonda.”" 
Revelation19:3 Kabiri baakoba bati: “Musaake Katonda waife! Omwosi oguva ku malaaya gwa kunioka ebyanda n'ebyanda.” 
Revelation19:4 Abakulembeze amakumi abiri n'abana (24), n'ebitonde ebiramu ebina (4), beeyala era baasinza oyo atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, nga bakoba bati: “Amiina. Musaake Katonda waife!”" 
Revelation19:5 Era amamiro gaava gha kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga nga gakoba gati: “Musaake Katonda waife mwenamwena imwe abagheereza be abamutya, abakulu n'abato.”" 
Revelation19:6 Agho naawulira ekyali ng'oti mamiro ag'abantu olukunkumuli, oba ng'oti mpiriito ya maadhi, oba ng'oti kutyabuka kwa lukuba okw'amaani. Eiroboozi lyakoba liti: “Musaake Katonda, kuba Musengwa Katonda waife Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona, n'afuga." 
Revelation19:7 Tusangaale, tusagambe, tusaake ekitiisa kye, kuba embaga ey'obugole ey'Entaama Ento etuuse, omugole yeetegeike." 
Revelation19:8 Omugole oyo aikiriziibwa okuvaala ebivaalo ebighegheevu, ebyamule era ebimirimiinha.” Ebivaalo ebighegheevu n'ebikolwa ebirungi eby'abatuukirivu." 
Revelation19:9 Era yankoba ati: “Ghandiika oti: Ba nkabi abo abeeteibwa ku mbaga ey'obugole ey'Entaama Ento.” Kabiri yankoba ati: “Bino n'ebibono bya Katonda byenebyene.” 
Revelation19:10 Agho neeyala gha bigere bye okumusinza. Aye yankoba ati: “Leka otageza kukola ekyo! Nze ndi mugheereza mwino ghalala ni baganda bo abadhulira Yesu. Katonda y'obe osinze.” Kuba amazima Yesu ge yatwoleka n'agagha abalanzi bye bakoba. 
Revelation19:11 Agho naabona eigulu nga liigule, era okuja okulinga nti nga mbona embalaasi endheru! Eyali ali kugivuga nga ayetebwa Mwesigwa, Owamazima, asala emisango era n'alwana entalo mu butuufu." 
Revelation19:12 Amaiso ge gaali gaaka ng'oti muliro, ate ku mutwe gwe nga kuliku engule kamaala. Era ng'aghandiikiibwaku eriina eritamanhiibwa muntu wundi okutoolaku mwene yenka." 
Revelation19:13 Yali avaire ekivaalo ekiidhwire omusaayi. Eriina lye nga ni Kibono wa Katonda. 
Revelation19:14 Amagye ag'omu igulu gaamunonereza, ng'abaisirukale bali kuvuga embalaasi endheru era nga bavaire ebivaalo ebyeru, ebyamule, era ebighegheevu." 
Revelation19:15 Mu munwa gwe mwavaamu empiima endhogi ey'okughangula amaghanga. Aligafuga n'omwigo ogw'ekyuma, yaatyankirira emizabbibu mu kikunhiro mwavaamu omwenge ogw'obusungu obungi obwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona." 
Revelation19:16 Ku kivaalo kye ni ku kiteege kye nga kughandiikiibwaku eriina liti: “Kyabazinga wa bakyabazinga era Musengwa w'abasengwa.” 
Revelation19:17 Agho naabona malaika ng'ayemereire ku ndhuba. Yaayeta n'amaani enhonhi dhoonadhoona edhiguluka nga dheeruupye eyo mu igulu, ati: “Mwidhe mwesololeze ku mbaga ya Katonda enkologho." 
Revelation19:18 Mwidhe mulye emirambo gya bakyabazinga, n'egy'abakulu b'abaisirukale, n'egy'abasaadha ab'amaani, n'egy'embalaasi, n'egy'abadhivuga, n'egy'abantu boonaboona, ab'eidembe n'abairu, abakulu n'abato.”" 
Revelation19:19 Agho naabona ekisolo ni bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi n'amagye gaibwe, nga bakungaine okulwanisa oyo atyaime ku mbalaasi n'eigye lye." 
Revelation19:20 Ekisolo kyagemebwa ghalala n'omulanzi omuguya eyakola ebyewuunhio mu maiso gaakyo. Ebyewuunhio ebyo bye yakozesa okuguya abo abaaganha okuteebwaku akamanhiso k'ekisolo era n'okusinza ekifaananie kyakyo. Ekisolo ekyo ghalala n'omulanzi omuguya, bombi baasuulibwa mu nhandha ey'omuliro n'obunhota bwa salufa nga balamu." 
Revelation19:21 Abaasigalagho baitibwa n'empiima eyava mu munwa gw'oyo atyaime ku mbalaasi. Enhonhi dhoonadhoona dhaalya dhaafundeera emirambo gyaibwe. 
Revelation20:1 Agho naabona malaika ng'aika ng'ava mu igulu, ng'agemye ekisumuluzo ky'olwina olutakoma, era ng'agemye n'oludhegere olunene." 
Revelation20:2 Yaagema ogusota ogunene ogw'eira ogumanhiibwa ng'Omukemi era Sitaani, yaagusibira emyaka lukumi (1,000) ku ludhegere," 
Revelation20:3 yaagusuula mu lwina olwo yaigalagho. Yaataaku n'ekuufulu gulobe kwiramu kuguya maghanga, okutuusa emyaka olukumi (1,000) lwe giriwaaku. Egyo bwe giriwaaku, gwa kusibulwa okumala akaseera katono." 
Revelation20:4 Agho naabona ebityamo eby'obwakyabazinga nga bityaimeku abo abaagheebwa obukumu okufuga. Era naabona emyoyo gy'abo abaatemwaku emitwe olw'okudhulira Yesu n'olw'ekibono kya Katonda. Abo n'abataasinza kisolo waire ekifaananie kyakyo era abataaganha kuteebwaku kamanhiso kaakyo mu byeni oba ku mikono. Abo bairamu okuba abalamu era Kurisito yaafuga nabo emyaka lukumi (1,000)." 
Revelation20:5 Okwo n'okuzuukira okwasooka. Abafu abandi tibairamu kuba balamu okutuusa emyaka olukumi (1,000) lwe gyawaaku." 
Revelation20:6 Ba nkabi era batukuvu abazuukirira mu kuzuukira kuno okusooka. Abo, okufa okwokubiri kubaziraku bukumu, aye baliba bakabona ba Katonda era ba Kurisito era balifuga naye emyaka lukumi." 
Revelation20:7 Emyaka egyo olukumi (1,000) nga gimaze okuwaaku Sitaani alisibulwa mu ikomera lye," 
Revelation20:8 yaafuluma okuguya amaghanga agali ku nsonda eina edh'ensi edheetebwa Gogi ni Magogi. Alibasoloza okulwana nga bali bangi ng'omusenho gw'enhandha. 
Revelation20:9 Balisaatuukira mu nsi yoonayoona, baazingiza enkambi y'abatuukirivu, n'ekibuga kya Katonda ekigonzi. Aye omuliro guliika nga guva mu igulu, gwabazikiriza" 
Revelation20:10 N'omukemi eyabaguya alisuulibwa mu nhandha ey'omuliro n'obunhota bwa salufa mwe balidaazibwadaazibwa omusana n'obwire, ebyanda n'ebyanda. Enhandha eyo n'eyasuulibwamu ekisolo n'omulanzi omuguya." 
Revelation20:11 Agho naabona ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekikologho, nga kyeru, era nga kiriku akityaimeku. Eigulu n'ensi byabulagho mu maiso ge obutairayo kubonekaku." 
Revelation20:12 Naabona abafu, abakulu n'abato, nga beemereire mu maiso g'ekityamo ekyo eky'obwakyabazinga. Ebitabo byawumbululwa. Era n'ekitabo ekindi kyawumbululwa, ekitabo eky'obulamu. Abafu baasalirwa omusango okuva ku bye baakola, ebyaghandiikibwa mu bitabo." 
Revelation20:13 Enhandha yaaghaayo abafu abaagirimu. Okufa n'Amagombe byona byaghaayo abafu be byali nabo. Boonaboona baabasalira omusango ng'ebikolwa byaibwe bwe byali. 
Revelation20:14 Agho Okufa n'Amagombe byasuulibwa mu nhandha ey'omuliro. Enhandha eyo ey'omuliro, n'okufa okwokubiri." 
Revelation20:15 Era kiisi muntu eyayagaanibwa ng'eriina lye tiryaghandiikibwa mu kitabo kya bulamu, yaasuulibwa mu nhandha ey'omuliro." 
Revelation21:1 Agho naabona eigulu eiyaaka n'ensi empyaka, kuba eigulu eryasooka n'ensi eyasooka byali bibuzeegho, n'enhandha nga tekaaligho." 
Revelation21:2 Naabona ekibuga ekitukuvu, Yerusalemu ekiyaaka, nga kiika kiva mu igulu ewa Katonda, nga kiri ng'oti n'omugole ye bavaaziiza, eyetegeike okutwalibwa ewa iba." 
Revelation21:3 Naawulira amamiro ag'amaani nga gava gha kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga, nga gakoba gati: “Bona, mperaano ekifo Katonda mw'aba kiri mu bantu. Katonda anaabanga nabo, nga ni Katonda waibwe, era nga beene bantu be." 
Revelation21:4 Alibeeya amaziga goonagoona mu maiso. Ghaliba tighakaali kufa, kugegenga oba kulira, oba obulumi. Kuba olwo eby'eira biriba nga byawaagho.”" 
Revelation21:5 Agho eyali atyaime ku kityamo eky'obwakyabazinga yankoba ati: “Bona! Ebintu byonabyona mbiiza buyaaka.” Era yankoba ati: “Bino bighandiike, kuba ebibono bino bituufu era bya mazima.”" 
Revelation21:6 Era yankoba ati: “Biwoire! Ninze Alufa ni Omega, entoolo n'enkomerero. Kiisi ali ndiwo ndimugha yaanhwera ku bwereere ku nsulo ey'amaadhi ag'obulamu." 
Revelation21:7 Oyo aghangula, alifuna ebyo. Nze ndiba Katonda we, mwene yaaba mwana wange." 
Revelation21:8 Aye abo abati, n'abataikiriza, n'abadankaanu, n'abatemo, n'abenzi, n'abalogo, n'abasinza ebitali Katonda, n'abaguya boonaboona, ekifo kyaibwe kiriba mu nhandha ey'omuliro n'obunhota bwa salufa: okwo n'okufa okwokubiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Agho owundi ku bamalaika omusanvu abaali n'ebibya omusanvu, ebyali biidhwire ebibamba omusanvu eby'ensembo, yaidha, yaayogera ninze, yankoba ati: “Idha, ndidha kukwoleka omugole Entaama Ento y'ebayiiza.”" 
Revelation21:10 Agho mu Mwoyo malaika yantwala ku lusozi olukologho era oluleeyi, yandholeka Yerusalemu ekibuga ekitukuvu, nga kiika nga kiva mu igulu ewa Katonda." 
Revelation21:11 Kyali kiidhwire okumesunkana okw'ekitiisa kya Katonda. Okumesunkana kwakyo nga kuli ng'oti n'okw'eibaale ery'omughendo einho eryetebwa Yasipera, nga kibitamu amaiso." 
Revelation21:12 Kyali kyezungulwirwa ekimante ekikologho era ekireeyi, nga kuliku emiryango ikumi n'ebiri nga giriku bamalaika ikumi na babiri. Era nga gighandiikiibwaku amaina ag'ebika eikumi n'ebibiri eby'Abaisiraeli." 
Revelation21:13 Ku luuyi olw'e buvandhuba nga kiriku emiryango esatu, ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omusaadha olw'e buvandhuba emiryango esatu, ni ku luuyi olw'omukono omugooda olw'e buvandhuba, emiryango esatu ni ku luuyi olw'e bugwandhuba emiryango esatu." 
Revelation21:14 Ekimante ekyo eky'ekibuga kyali kyemereire ku mabaale ikumi n'abiri ag'omusingi, ku kiisi ibaale nga kuliku eriina ery'omulala ku batume eikumi n'ababiri ab'Entaama Ento." 
Revelation21:15 Malaika eyali ali kwogera ninze, yali n'olupimo olwa zaabu olw'okupima ekibuga, n'emiryango gyakyo, n'ekimante ekikyezungulwire." 
Revelation21:16 Endhuyi edh'ekibuga ekyo eina dhaali dhaagayaga, obuleeyi n'obugazi. Agho malaika yaapima ekibuga ekyo n'olupimo lwe, nga kigheza kilomita nkumi ibiri na bina (2,400) obuleeyi, n'obugazi, n'obugungumavu bwakyo nga byagayaga." 
Revelation21:17 Era yaapima n'ekimante ekikyezungulwire, nga kigheza mita nkaaga malaika yapima mu kipimo ekyabuliidho eky'abantu." 
Revelation21:18 Ekimante ekyo kyali kizimbiibwa n'amabaale ag'omughendo ageetebwa yasipera. Aye ekibuga kyene nga kya zaabu omukenenule, omutangaavu ng'oti kirawuli." 
Revelation21:19 Omusingi ogw'ekimante eky'ekibuga nga gutoneibwatoneibwa n'amabaale ag'omughendo aga buli nsambo. Erisooka nga lyetebwa yasipera, eryokubiri saffiro, eryokusatu agate, eryokuna emeraludo," 
Revelation21:20 eryokutaanu sarudokinisi, eryomukaaga sarudioni, eryomusanvu kurisolito, eryomunaana berulo, eryomwenda topazio, eryeikumi kirusopuraso, eryeikumi n'eirala yakinto, eryeikumi n'abiri ametusito." 
Revelation21:21 Ate emiryango eikumi n'ebiri gyali amabaale ag'omughendo einho ikumi n'abiri. Nga buli mulyango gukoleibwa mu ibaale irala. Oluguudo olw'ekibuga ekyo lwali lwa zaabu omukenenule abitamu amaiso ng'oti kirawuli. 
Revelation21:22 Mu kibuga ekyo tyabonamu isinzizo, kuba Musengwa Katonda Aghanga Ebintu Byonabyona aghalala n'Entaama Ento, abo nga n'eisinzizo lyakyo." 
Revelation21:23 Era ekibuga ekyo tikyetaaga ndhuba, waire mwezi kukyakira, kuba ekitiisa kya Katonda n'obutangaavu bwakyo, era Entaama Ento n'entaala yaakyo." 
Revelation21:24 Abantu abamaghanga goonagoona banaatambuliranga mu butangaavu bwakyo, era bakyabazinga ab'oku nsi banaaleetangamu eby'obukombe byaibwe." 
Revelation21:25 Emiryango gyakyo tigija kwigalwanga olunaku lwonalwona, era eyo teribaayo bwire." 
Revelation21:26 Ekitiisa n'eby'obukombe eby'amaghanga goonagoona birireetebwa mu kibuga ekyo. 
Revelation21:27 Aye tikiringiramu kintu kitali kirongoofu, waire omuntu akola ebyenhinhalwa oba omuguya, okutoolaku abo bonka abaaghandiikibwa mu kitabo eky'obulamu eky'Entaama Ento." 
Revelation22:1 Agho malaika yandholeka omwiga ogw'amaadhi ag'obulamu agabitamu amaiso, oguva mu kityamo kya Katonda n'eky'Entaama Ento." 
Revelation22:2 Gwakulukutira ghagati gh'oluguudo lw'ekibuga ekyo. Eruuyi n'eruuyi ew'omwiga ogwo ghaaligho omuti ogw'obulamu, ogwama ebibala emikuzi ikumi n'ebiri omwaka, nga gwama buli mwezi. Amakaba gaagwo nga ga kuwonia amaghanga goonagoona." 
Revelation22:3 Teribaayo kabiri kikolimo. Ekityamo eky'obwakyabazinga ekya Katonda era eky'Entaama Ento, n'ekinaabanga mu kibuga omwo era abagheereza ba Katonda banaamusinzanga." 
Revelation22:4 Banaabonanga amaiso ge, era eriina lye lirighandiikibwa mu byeni byaibwe." 
Revelation22:5 Obwire tibuliiramu kuziba, era tibalyetaaga butangaavu bwa ntaala oba obw'endhuba. Kuba Musengwa Katonda n'anaabanga obutangaavu bwaibwe, era balifuga ebyanda n'ebyanda." 
Revelation22:6 Era malaika yankoba ati: “Ebibono bino bituufu era bya mazima. Musengwa Katonda oyo agha abalanzi Mwoyo we, atumye malaika we okulaga abagheereza be ebyo ebiri n'okubaagho amangu.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Bona, ndi kwidha mangu! Wa nkabi oyo agema ebibono eby'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino.”" 
Revelation22:8 Nze Yoanne, ninze eyawulira era ni mbona bino. Bwe namala okubiwulira n'okubibona, neeyala gha bigere bya malaika eyabindaga, naamusinza." 
Revelation22:9 Aye yankoba ati: “Leka otageza kukola ekyo! Zeena ndi mugheereza mwino, ni baganda bo abalanzi era n'abo abagema ebibono ebiri mu kitabo kino. Katonda y'obe osinze.”" 
Revelation22:10 Era yankoba ati: “Ebibono by'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino tobigisa mu kyama, kuba ekiseera kiri kumpi ebintu bino bibeegho." 
Revelation22:11 Omwonooni ayongere okwonoona, omudankaanu asigale nga mudankaanu, omutuufu ayongere okuba omutuufu, omutuukirivu ayongere okuba omutuukirivu." 
Revelation22:12 “Bona, ndi kwidha mangu. Ndidha n'empeera nsasule buli muntu, nga njiira ku bye yakola." 
Revelation22:13 Ninze Alufa ni Omega, entoolo n'enkomerero, ainhama era asembayo.”" 
Revelation22:14 Ba nkabi abo abaamula ebivaalo byaibwe. Baligheebwa obukumu okulya ebibala eby'omuti ogw'obulamu, era n'okwingira mu kibuga nga babita mu miryango." 
Revelation22:15 Aye embwa, n'abalogo, n'abenzi, n'abatemo n'abasinza ebyo ebitali Katonda, n'abaguya, baliba kuliya." 
Revelation22:16 “Nze Yesu, ntumye malaika wange okubakobera ebintu bino mu bikunsu eby'abandhikiriza. Ndi wa ku luzi lwa Daudi era nsimuka mu oyo. Ninze emuunienie ey'oku nkyo eyaka einho.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mwoyo n'Omugole bakoba bati: “Idha!” N'oyo awulira bino akoba ati: “Idha!” Kiisi ali ndiwo aidhe, era kiisi ayenda maadhi ga bulamu, agafune aghazira kusasula." 
Revelation22:18 Ndabula kiisi awulira bibono bya bulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino: oyo alibyongeraku, Katonda alimwongeraku ebibamba ebighandiikiibwaku mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:19 Ate alikendeeza ku bibono eby'obulanzi ebiri mu kitabo kino, Katonda alimutoolaku omugabo gwe ogw'oku muti ogw'obulamu, n'ogw'omu kibuga ekitukuvu ebighandiikiibwaku mu kitabo kino." 
Revelation22:20 Akakasa bino, akoba ati: “Bwenebwene, ndi kwidha mangu.” Amiina. Idha Musengwa Yesu."
